The dragon unleashes divine power like that from the core of a star or black hole, dealing @Damage[7d10[spirit]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[will|dc:29|basic] save). The dragon can't use Stellar Breath for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Stellar Mote.name: 星辰微粒 Stellar Mote
Stellar Mote.description:
龙召唤出一团与其当前调谐一致的恒星能量微粒。他们将该微粒指向 90 英尺内的一个方格。当该微粒已部署时，龙的调谐灵光也会从该方格发散，具有相同的发散半径。龙可以通过维持来使该微粒移动至多 90 英尺，或从任意距离将其召回。该微粒由太空能量构成，不占据空间，且不会成为任何效果的目标，也不能被任何效果摧毁。

The dragon conjures a mote of stellar energy that shares their current attunement. They direct the mote to a square within 90 feet. While the mote is deployed, the dragon's attunement aura also emanates from that square, with the same emanation radius. The dragon can Sustain to move the mote up to 90 feet or to recall the mote from any distance. The mote is made of cosmic energy, doesn't occupy a space, and can't be targeted or destroyed by any effect.

Stellar Pulse.name: 星辰脉冲 Stellar Pulse
Stellar Pulse.description:
龙对其调谐灵光内的生物施加一种效果。该效果基于龙当前的调谐。龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Stellar Pulse]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用Stellar Pulse。

  • 引力子 每个生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:29] 豁免，否则会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}，持续1轮。

  • 光子 每个生物都会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}，且该额外动作只能用于Stride或Strike。

The dragon imposes an effect on creatures within their attunement aura. The effect is based on the dragon's current attunement. The dragon can't use Stellar Pulse again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Stellar Pulse]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Graviton Each creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:29] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round.

  • Photon Each creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} and can use the extra action only to Stride or Strike.

Lore (any two planes).name: 位面学识（任意两个位面） Lore (any two planes)

Physical Science Lore.name: 物理科学学识 Physical Science Lore

Cosmic Dragon (Young).publicNotes:
这些庄严雄伟的龙体现了支撑并平衡着物质宇宙中一切存在的恒星力量。太空龙是睿智、合群且耐心的存在，接纳所有它们遇见的人；它们将所有生物都视为物质宇宙中平等的组成部分，因此它们既可能与学者为伴讨论天体物理学，也同样可能与困苦之人为伴哀叹命运的曲折无常。大多数太空龙都能改变自己的形态，不过它们通常只会为了让其他生物感到自在才这么做。它们厌恶欺瞒，即使处于另一种形态时，也总会表明自己是龙。

These majestic dragons embody the stellar forces that underly and balance all that exists in the universe. Cosmic dragons are wise, social, and patient beings, accepting of all whom they come across; they see all creatures as equal components of the universe and are just as likely to be found discussing astrophysics in the company of scholars as they are to be found lamenting the twists and turns of fate in the company of the downtrodden. Most cosmic dragons can change their shape, though they usually only do so to make other creatures comfortable. They detest deception and always introduce themselves as dragons even while in another form.

Corpse Fleet Officer.name: 尸骸舰队军官 Corpse Fleet Officer
Corpse Fleet Officer.tokenName: 尸骸舰队军官 Corpse Fleet Officer

商业 Phase Cutlass.name: 商业 Phase Cutlass
商业 Phase Cutlass.description:
升级： 1

相位弯刀在启动前看起来像一把传统的弧形剑。启动后，它的剑刃会变形成一片闪烁的虚空，其中每一个它终结过的生命都对应着一颗微小的星辰。

Upgrades: 1

A phase cutlass resembles a traditional curved sword until it's powered. Then its blade morphs into a shimmering void, with a tiny star for each life it ended.

Defiance Series.name: 反抗系列 Defiance Series
Defiance Series.description:
升级： 1

这种小队护甲是由强化聚碳酸酯制成的模压外壳，配有头盔和可折叠面罩。

Upgrades: 1

This squad armor is a molded shell of reinforced polycarbon with a helmet and retractable visor.

Bolstering Aura.name: 振奋灵光 Bolstering Aura
Bolstering Aura.description:
20尺。于此灵气中开始其回合的不死生物（包括尸骸舰队军官）获得8点临时生命值，持续1小时，随后在1小时内暂时免疫振奋灵气。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.ZWOPndNX0EIhYCG9]{效果：振奋灵气}

20 feet. Undead that begin their turn in the aura (including the Corpse Fleet officer) gain 8 temporary Hit Points for 1 hour, then become temporarily immune to bolstering aura for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.ZWOPndNX0EIhYCG9]{Effect: Bolstering Aura}

Decimate the Living.name: 歼灭活体生物 Decimate the Living
Decimate the Living.description:
尸骸舰队军官受过训练，专门歼灭生者。他们的打击额外造成 1d6 虚空伤害。

The Corpse Fleet officer has trained to decimate the living. Their Strikes deal an additional 1d6 void damage.

Lead Salvo.name: 先导齐射 Lead Salvo
Lead Salvo.description:
尸骸舰队军官对一个生物进行一次远程或近战打击。军官100英尺内的每个不死生物都可以立即使用一个反应，并从其正在持用的远程武器中消耗等同于其消耗值的弹药，使“铅弹齐射”的伤害每有一个不死盟友便增加 @Damage[1d4[void]] 伤害，最多额外增加 @Damage[4d4[void]] 伤害。

The Corpse Fleet officer makes a ranged or melee Strike against a creature. Each undead within 100 feet of the officer can immediately use a reaction and expend ammunition from a ranged weapon they're wielding equal to its expend value to increase the damage of Lead Salvo by @Damage[1d4[void]] damage for each undead ally, to a maximum of an additional @Damage[4d4[void]] damage.

Tireless Flurry.name: 不倦连击 Tireless Flurry
Tireless Flurry.description:
尸骸舰队军官以任意顺序进行一次远程打击和一次近战打击。这些攻击会计入其多重攻击减值，但在这两次攻击都完成后，该减值才会增加。

The Corpse Fleet officer makes one ranged Strike and one melee Strike in any order. These attacks count toward their multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until after both attacks are made.

Corpse Fleet Lore.name: 尸骸舰队知识 Corpse Fleet Lore

Corpse Fleet Officer.publicNotes:
尸骸舰队军官是一位大胆的战斗领袖，能够强化其不死盟友，并受过专门训练以消灭生者。

尸骸舰队是一支由不死至上主义者组成的军队，他们拒绝屈从于生者的意志。尸骸舰队由伊奥克斯海军的叛逃者创建，旨在粉碎协约世界的团结，并将伊奥克斯从生者以及那些站在生者一边的骸骨贤者的影响下解放出来。尸骸舰队坚定不屈且极端冷酷无情，只带来死亡与毁灭，以生者为食，并利用死者。

A Corpse Fleet officer is a bold combat leader who bolsters their undead allies and has trained to destroy the living.

The Corpse Fleet is an army made up of undead supremacists who refuse to bow to the will of the living. Founded by defectors from the Eoxian navy, the Corpse Fleet aims to shatter Pact Worlds unity and liberate Eox from the influence of the living and those bone sages who sided with them. Unyielding and utterly ruthless, the Corpse Fleet deals in death and destruction, feeding on the living and exploiting the dead.

Arabuk.name: 阿拉布克 Arabuk

Snow Vision.name: 雪地视觉 Snow Vision
Snow Vision.description:
雪不会妨碍阿拉布克的视觉；它忽略降雪导致的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

Snow doesn't impair an arabuk's vision; it ignores @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment} from snowfall.

Avalanche.name: 雪崩 Avalanche
Avalanche.description:
站在雪地上的非阿拉布克生物，若对阿拉布克的鹿角回响的反射豁免失败，便会被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。在鹿角回响影响区域内，最多一块 @Template[cube|distance:20] 的积雪会坍塌，对邻近生物造成 @Damage[5d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免）。在斜坡上，这会使积雪以及所有豁免失败的生物每轮沿下坡方向移动30英尺。在其回合开始时，每个被卷入雪崩的生物都会受到 @Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免），且若失败，仍会被困在雪崩中。

A non-arabuk creature standing on snow that fails its Reflex save against an arabuk's antler reverberation is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. Up to a @Template[cube|distance:20] of snow in the area of an antler reverberation collapses, dealing @Damage[5d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage to adjacent creatures (@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic|options:area-effect] save). On a slope, this causes the snow and any creatures that fail its save to move downhill 30 feet per round. At the start of its turn, each creature caught in the avalanche takes @Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic|options:area-effect] save) and, on a failure, is still caught in the avalanche.

Clatter.name: 咔嗒声 Clatter
Clatter.description:
阿拉布克摇晃头部，使它的鹿角相互碰撞作响。直到其回合结束前，任何被其鹿角击中的生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:22|options:inflicts:stunned] 豁免，否则变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}（若严重失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2}）。

The arabuk clatters its antlers together by shaking its head. Until the end of its turn, any creature hit by its antlers must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:22|options:inflicts:stunned] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} on a critical failure).

Glacial Stride.name: 冰川奔行 Glacial Stride
Glacial Stride.description:
阿拉布克以速度获得 +10 英尺环境加值进行两次Stride，忽略由冰、雪或其他极地环境造成的困难地形。

The arabuk Strides twice with a +10-foot circumstance bonus to Speed, ignoring difficult terrain caused by ice, snow, or other arctic conditions.

Arabuk.publicNotes:
阿拉布克需要 3 年才能成熟。阿拉布克每活过一年，它的鹿角就会长得更加壮观，有时长度甚至会超过 15 英尺。

那些穿越阿基顿冬地的人，可能会误入其顶级掠食者的领地：食肉的阿拉布克。

Arabuks take 3 years to reach maturity. Each year that an arabuk lives, its antlers grow more impressive, sometimes reaching lengths greater than 15 feet.

Those traveling through Akiton's Winterlands risk stumbling on its apex predator: the carnivorous arabuk.

Wahtunshna.name: 瓦顿什纳 Wahtunshna

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣天生法术 Divine Innate Spells

Void Whispers.name: 虚空低语 Void Whispers
Void Whispers.description:
目标听到来自群星彼端、蕴含不可言说奥秘的不祥之声，使其心智迷乱。目标必须进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 目标听见这些奇异的低语，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续 1 轮。

失败 目标开始漫无目的地游荡，将每个动作都用于向随机方向进行调整步。移动时，目标会采取最安全的路线，且不会进入危险地形。该法术持续 1 分钟，或直到有生物对目标使用敌对动作。

大失败 如同失败，但目标会语无伦次地胡言乱语。任何在其回合开始时位于目标 20 尺内的生物都必须尝试一次意志豁免。若失败，它必须在其下个回合中将第一个动作用于向随机方向进行调整步，并在 24 小时内对此法术免疫。这是一个无力化效果。

The target hears ominous sounds containing unspeakable mysteries from beyond the stars that disorient its mind. The target attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target hears the strange whispers, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target begins to wander aimlessly, using each action to Step in a random direction. When it moves, the target takes the safest route and doesn't enter hazardous terrain. The spell has a duration of 1 minute or until a creature uses a hostile action against the target.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target babbles incoherently. Any creature that begins its turn within 20 feet of the target must attempt a Will saving throw. On a failure, it must use its first action on its next turn to Step in a random direction and becomes immune to this spell for 24 hours. This is an incapacitation effect.

Detect Thoughts.name: 侦测思想 Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
你能感知到周围有会思考的生物存在。你能探测到具有 –3 或更高智力调整值的清醒生物的思维存在或不存在。你可以选择忽略你所熟悉生物的思维，以免它们干扰你对其他思维的探测。这个法术可以穿透某些屏障，但 3 英尺厚的泥土或木材、1 英尺厚的石头、1 英寸厚的金属、一层薄铅片，或任何力场屏障都会阻挡它。对精神效果免疫的生物也免疫这个法术的探测。

升阶（4环） 你能探测到会思考心智的数量，以及这些生物是否具有心灵感应。具有心灵感应的生物，其思维比没有心灵感应的生物更加响亮，并且在 GM 斟酌下，它们可能能够察觉到你的侵入。

You sense the presence of thinking creatures around you. You detect the presence or absence of thoughts from conscious creatures that have Intelligence modifiers of –3 or higher. You can choose to ignore the thoughts of creatures you're familiar with so they don't interfere with your detection of other thoughts. The spell can penetrate some barriers, but 3 feet of dirt or wood, 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of metal, a thin sheet of lead, or any force barrier blocks it. Creatures who are immune to mental effects are immune to detection by this spell.

Heightened (4th) You detect the number of thinking minds and whether or not the creatures are telepathic. Creatures with telepathy have louder thoughts than creatures who don't have telepathy and might be able to sense your intrusion, at the GM's discretion.

Doom Scroll.name: 末日卷轴 Doom Scroll
Doom Scroll.description:
你以魔法将骇人的消息广播到附近的设备、全息投影仪、屏幕及其他显示装置上（包括护甲上的通讯装置）。区域内能看见一个或多个显示装置的生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物被显示内容所 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}。

失败 该生物被显示内容所着迷，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 2}（即使着迷结束也是如此）。

大失败 该生物被显示内容所着迷，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 3}，并且处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{厄运 1}（即使着迷结束也是如此）。

You magically broadcast grim news onto nearby devices, holo projectors, screens, and other displays (including comm units on armor). Creatures in the area who can see one or more displays must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the display.

Failure The creature is fascinated by the display and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (even if the fascination ends).

Critical Failure The creature is fascinated by the display, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} (even if the fascination ends).

Sift the Sphere.name: 筛析天体之球 Sift the Sphere
Sift the Sphere.description:
你通过仪式性地筛查本地信息圈，获得关于某个主题的神秘洞见。在施放此法术期间，询问某一特定行动方案的结果。该法术可以预测最多未来30分钟内的结果，并揭示GM对以下结果中最可能出现者的最佳判断。

  • 吉 结果会是好的。
  • 凶 结果会是坏的。
  • 吉凶参半 结果会有好有坏。
  • 无事 不会有特别好或特别坏的结果。GM进行一次秘密的 @Check[flat|dc:6|traits:secret]。若失败，结果总是“无事”。这使得人们无法判断“无事”的结果是否准确。如果在额外一次施放“筛查信息圈”期间，有人询问与第一次施放时相同的主题，GM使用第一次施放时那次秘密掷骰的结果。如果情况发生变化，则有可能得到不同的结果。

强化（4环） 该法术可以预测最多未来1周内的结果。

You ritually sift through the local infosphere and gain mystical insight about a topic. During the casting of this spell, ask about the results of a particular course of action. The spell can predict results up to 30 minutes into the future and reveals the GM's best guess among the following outcomes.

  • Weal The results will be good.
  • Woe The results will be bad.
  • Weal and Woe The results will be a mix of good and bad.
  • Nothing There won't be particularly good or bad results. The GM rolls a secret @Check[flat|dc:6|traits:secret]. On a failure, the result is always "nothing." This makes it impossible to tell whether a "nothing" result is accurate. If anyone asks about the same topic as the first casting of sift the sphere during an additional casting, the GM uses the secret roll result from the first casting. If circumstances change, it's possible to get a different result.

Heightened (4th) The spell can predict results up to 1 week into the future.

Bane.name: 灾祸 Bane
Bane.description:
你将疑虑充满敌人的心智。在区域的敌人必须成功通过一次意志豁免，只要在区域内，在攻击骰上即会承受-1状态减值。第二轮以后每轮一次，你可以维持该法术将弥漫的半径增加10尺，并令区域内尚未受到影响的敌人尝试额外一次豁免骰。

绝望术可以反制@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{祝福术 Bless}。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.UTLp7omqsiC36bso]{法术效果：绝望术}

Diabolic Pact.name: 魔鬼契约 Diabolic Pact
Diabolic Pact.description:
你恳请更强大的魔鬼，请求他派遣一些手下受你调遣。若你的仪式成功，魔鬼会根据自身的选择进行派遣，这可能是1个2级或更低等级的魔鬼、2个0级或更低等级的魔鬼、或者3个-1级或更低等级的魔鬼。

大成功 被派来的魔鬼会为你服务[[/gmr 1d4 #Weeks]]{1d4周}。

成功 被派来的魔鬼会为你服务[[/gmr 1d4 #Days]]{1d4天}。

失败 你的请求被拒绝了。

大失败 你的请求不仅被拒绝了，且强大的魔鬼会将自身的不满告知你的主人。

升阶（+1） 每个选项中为你派遣的魔鬼等级增加2级。

Eldritch Lance.name: 秘法长枪 Eldritch Lance
Eldritch Lance.description:
你将来自群星之间黑暗空隙、侵袭心智的邪异能量凝聚成一道光束，并将其射向目标。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若命中，你造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若严重成功，则造成双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高 1d6。

You condense a beam of mind-assaulting eldritch energy from the dark spaces between the stars and fire it at a target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's AC. If you hit, you deal 2d6 mental damage. On a critical success, you deal double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然存在的引导，赋予目标在持续时间结束前的一次攻击骰，察觉检定，豁免骰，或者技能检定上获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择是否使用该加值。如果目标使用该加值，该法术结束。无论怎样结束，该目标接下来会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

Message.name: 传讯术 Message
Message.description:
你无声地念出言语，这段言语会直接送到目标耳中，而不是从你的嘴中念出。其他人听起来顶多是你与它们正常说话，但法术目标会如同正站在你身边一般听到你的言语。目标可以通过一个反应动作做出一段简要回应，或者根据其意愿，也可以通过其下个回合的自由动作来回应，但它如此做时必须能看见你，并且在射程内。如果它做出回应，它的回应会直接送达你的耳中，如同最初的信息一般。

升阶（3环级） 法术的射程增加到500尺。

Mind Skewer.name: 心灵穿刺 Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
你以过量的灵能信息或神圣裁决令一个生物的心智过载。这次精神猛袭造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若严重失败，目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，持续 1 轮。

强化（+1） 伤害提高 2d6。

You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Protection.name: 防护术 Protection
Protection.description:
你保护一个生物免受伤害。目标在AC和豁免骰上获得+1状态加值。

升阶（3环级） 你可以选择让该好处也会影响目标@Template[emanation|distance:10]范围内的所有的你的盟友。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.RawLEPwyT5CtCZ4D]{法术效果：防护术}

Infernal Tracking.name: 地狱追踪 Infernal Tracking
Infernal Tracking.description:
只要一个生物正因瓦通什纳的爪击而承受持续性流血伤害，该生物就不能对瓦通什纳处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{躲藏}，也不能被瓦通什纳视为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未察觉}。

For as long as a creature is taking persistent bleed damage from the wahtunshna's claw Strike, that creature can't be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} from, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} by the wahtunshna.

Planned Obsolescence.name: 计划性淘汰 Planned Obsolescence
Planned Obsolescence.description:
魔鬼指向一个其能看见且位于60英尺内、具有科技特征的物品，强制进行一次固件更新，使其变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 3}。一个正要使用该物品的生物可以花费一个交互动作，通读该物品新的服务条款，以移除此状态。

The devil points at an item with the tech trait that they can see within 60 feet, forcing a firmware update so it becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 3}. A creature about to use the item can spend an Interact action to read through the item's new terms of service to remove this condition.

Wahtunshna.publicNotes:
瓦吞什纳斯是掮客、商务谈判者和战争投机商。他们活跃于马尔法内的城市和水世界安布罗伊，并且越来越多地出席近宇中合作法务团队的会议。瓦吞什纳斯受过谈判、企业管理以及上百种文化中的企业黑话训练，在为合作提供竞争优势的同时，也建立起了自己的声望。地狱的知识与工业力量对许多想要胜过竞争对手的公司而言极具诱惑力，而瓦吞什纳斯也非常乐于提供协助。作为交换，合作会将间谍软件植入其产品，并在服务条款中加入恶魔式条款，从而获得接触地狱知识产权的机会，并将地狱般的臃肿软件转嫁给自己的客户。传言称，瓦吞什纳斯会在可能的情况下助长初创企业的持续更迭，破坏任何试图违背或规避其恶魔协议条款的公司。

在空间站的阴影中、法庭的大厅里以及合作的办公室内，魔鬼以力量的许诺诱惑凡人，并为他们的征服奠定基础。魔鬼的契约可以是精心拟定的合同，也可以是简短的许诺，但它们的结局都一样：凡人的灵魂遭到谴罚，而地狱的力量得到壮大。从对马尔法内的公开统治、对安布罗伊的无形控制，到与银河各地灵魂缔结的隐秘契约，魔鬼持续不断地推进他们毫不松懈的事业，传播暴政，并迫使物质宇宙变得像他们故乡那地狱般的官僚体系。

Wahtunshnas are brokers, business negotiators, and war profiteers. They operate in the cities of Malfane and the watery planet Embroi and, increasingly, attend meetings with corporate legal teams in Near Space. Trained in negotiation, business administration, and the corporate buzzwords of a hundred cultures, wahtunshnas offer a competitive advantage to corporations while building a reputation of their own. The knowledge and industrial power of Hell are tempting to many companies looking to get an edge over their competitors, and wahtunshnas are more than happy to assist. In exchange for the incorporation of spyware into their products and Diabolic clauses in their terms of service, corporations gain access to the intellectual property of Hell, passing on infernal bloatware to their customers. Rumors claim that wahtunshnas contribute to the constant churn of start-ups whenever possible, sabotaging any companies that seek to break or circumvent the terms of their diabolical agreements.

In the shadows of space stations, halls of courtrooms, and offices of corporations, devils tempt mortals with promises of power and lay the groundwork for their conquest. A devil's pacts can vary from elaborate contracts to quick promises, but they all end the same way: a mortal soul condemned, and Hell's forces bolstered. From the open rule of Malfane, the unseen control of Embroi, and hidden pacts with souls across the galaxy, devils continue their relentless work to spread tyranny and force the universe to resemble the hellish bureaucracy of their home.

Quyu.name: 曲玉 Quyu

Occult Innate Spells.name: 天生异术法术 Occult Innate Spells

Charm.name: 魅惑术 Charm
Charm.description:
在目标看来，你的言语甜蜜动听，你的形象笼罩在梦幻般的光晕中。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免，如果你或者你的盟友最近威胁它或者对它进行了敌对行为，会获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。如果你对目标使用任何敌对动作，法术终止。当该法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己被魅惑了，除非它和你的友好关系，或者你说服它去做的事情与其期望发生冲突。这也即是说你可以通过常规的方法说服目标继续作为你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且意识到你尝试魅惑它。

成功 该目标不受影响，但是认为你的法术是某种无害的东西，而不是魅惑术，除非它能识别该法术（通常通过辨识法术（Identifying Spells））。

失败 目标对你的态度变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友好 Friendly}）。如果已经是友好，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于帮助 Helpful}。它不能对你做出敌对行为。

大失败 目标变为乐于帮助并且不能对你做出敌对行为。

升阶（4环级） 该法术持续时间为持续到下次你进行你的日常准备。

升阶（8环级） 该法术持续时间为持续到下次你进行你的日常准备，并且你能以至多10个生物作为目标。

Motion Sense.name: 运动感知 Motion Sense
Motion Sense.description:
曲鱼可以通过振动和空气流动感知附近的运动，在所列距离内拥有一种精确感官。

A quyu can sense nearby motion through vibration and air movement as a precise sense at the listed range.

Pathetic Gaze.name: 可悲凝视 Pathetic Gaze
Pathetic Gaze.description:
30尺。处于其伪装形态（见下文）时，曲羽会散发出一个使附近生物神魂颠倒的灵光。一个生物若在该灵光中结束其回合，则必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:24] 豁免，否则其会被该曲羽 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷} 1分钟，并且在1轮内对曲羽的攻击检定获得 –2 处境减值，即使曲羽离开了伪装形态也是如此。

30 feet. While in their Facade Form (see below), the quyu emits an aura to infatuate nearby creatures. A creature that ends its turn in the aura must attempt a @Check[will|dc:24] save or it becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the quyu for 1 minute and takes a –2 circumstance penalty to attack the quyu for 1 round, even if the quyu leaves Facade Form.

Cruel Dissection.name: 残酷解剖 Cruel Dissection
Cruel Dissection.description:
需求 一个生物被 quyu 的颚部 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{（被）束缚}，或被 quyu @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}

效果 quyu 对所需生物进行一次爪击 Strike。若此次攻击命中，该生物还会受到 @Damage[2d6[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。

Requirements A creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} by the quyu's jaws or is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} with the quyu

Effect The quyu makes a claw Strike against the required creature. If the attack hits, that creature also takes @Damage[2d6[persistent,bleed]] damage.

Facade Form.name: 外观形态 Facade Form
Facade Form.description:
曲鱼压缩并重塑自身，使自己看起来像一种可爱、无助的生物。它们在伪装成该生物时，唬骗检定和 DC 自动视为 35。处于这种形态时，曲鱼为超小型且无法攻击，并且其可怜凝视灵气处于激活状态。曲鱼可以解除此形态。

The quyu compresses and reshapes themself to appear as an adorable, helpless creature. They have an automatic result of 35 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as the creature. While in this form, the quyu is Tiny and can't attack, and their pathetic gaze aura is active. The quyu can Dismiss this form.

Quyu.publicNotes:
乍看之下，quyus 似乎是小巧可爱的生物，很像宠物或无助的小动物。然而，这种外表只是它们设下的骗局，目的是引诱毫无戒心的生物落入它们的掌控之中。它们的真实形态是由扭曲血肉纠结而成的双头肉块，长着没有眼球的眼窝与滴落酸液的巨口——而且它们绝非无助之辈。

Quyus 无需空气、食物或水也能无限期存活。它们兼具无底线的好奇心，以及对其他物种福祉的彻底漠视，这种组合极其危险。它们起源于一颗如今属于星散带的小行星，不过由于善于伪装，它们已在无数行星上悄然扩散而未被察觉，并在那里为了满足自己施虐般的欲望而猎捕并解剖各种生物。

这些独居生物更喜欢先观察一个地区的野生与驯养物种，然后再渗透进文明边缘地带。在那里，它们会建立低调的掩护身份，常常伪装成儿童的宠物，随后捕获并活体解剖毫无防备的受害者。

Quyus 会变成它们认为最有可能被环境中居民视为可爱的外形，即便它们模仿的生物在那个世界的生态中根本不存在。它们可能会化作可爱而普通的猫、兔子或类似毛茸茸的小动物，哪怕是在小行星矿场中央，或是在深海之中。

At first look, quyus appears to be a small, adorable creatures, likely resembling a pet or helpless animal. This appearance is, however, a ploy meant to lure unsuspecting creatures into their grasp. Their true form is a two-headed twisted knot of flesh with eyeless sockets and gaping maws dripping with acid—and they're far from helpless.

Quyus can live without air, food, or water indefinitely. They have a dangerous combination of bottomless curiosity and complete lack of concern for other species' well-being. They originate from a now-Diasporan asteroid, though due to their disguises, they've spread to countless planets undetected, where they hunt and dissect creatures for their sadistic pursuits.

These solitary creatures prefer to observe an area's wild and domesticated species before infiltrating the peripheries of a civilization. There, they establish quiet cover identities, often as children's pets, only to capture and vivisect unsuspecting victims.

Quyus take on whatever appearance they believe is most likely to be considered cute by whatever beings inhabit their environments, even if the creature they mimic has no place in the world's ecology. They might take on the form of an adorable, mundane cat, rabbit, or similar fluffy creature, even in the middle of an asteroid mine or in the deep sea.

Writhing Tentacles.name: 蠕动触手 Writhing Tentacles

Tentacle Slam.name: 触手猛击 Tentacle Slam
Tentacle Slam.description:
触发条件 一个生物对 kyokor 采取敌对动作、制造出可见的区域效果，或在 kyokor 120 英尺内飞行

效果 kyokor 在 @Template[type:line|distance:120] 内造成 @Damage[(6d10+28)[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] 伤害，且区域内的每个生物都必须进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:40] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害并被向外推开 20 英尺。若其正在飞行，则下降 20 英尺。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，被推开 40 英尺，并下降 60 英尺（若正在飞行）或被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，被向外推开 60 英尺，下降 120 英尺（若正在飞行）或被击倒为俯卧，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2}。

Trigger A creature takes a hostile action against the kyokor, produces a visible area effect, or flies within 120 feet of the kyokor

Effect The kyokor deals @Damage[(6d10+28)[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:line|distance:120], and each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:40] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is pushed 20 feet away. If flying, it descends 20 feet.

Failure The creature takes full damage, is pushed 40 feet, and descends 60 feet (if flying) or is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is pushed 60 feet away, descends 120 feet (if flying) or is knocked prone, and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Writhing Tentacles.disable:
@Check[arcana|dc:45]（传奇）、@Check[occultism|dc:45]（传奇）或 @Check[performance|dc:45]（传奇），以安抚或转移 kyokor 的注意力；使用守护者宝珠（见本页侧栏）来命令 kyokor 可结束该危害

@Check[arcana|dc:45] (legendary), @Check[occultism|dc:45] (legendary), or @Check[performance|dc:45] (legendary) to soothe or divert the kyokor's attention; using a guardian orb (see the sidebar on this page) to command the kyokor ends the hazard
Writhing Tentacles.hazarddescription:
巨噬魇的触手蜿蜒伸出，造成毁灭性的破坏。

当一只巨噬魇经过或穿过一处聚居地——甚至只是发动攻击！——它都会留下一道毁灭的痕迹，可用以下危害来表现。

令人胆寒、体型堪比摩天大楼的巨兽游荡在戴马尔科的荒原上。当地居民称它们为“巨像”，这些怪物从地底深处喷涌而出，在一场可怖的“觉醒”中将城市践踏成尘土，大肆屠戮人口，并摧毁了这颗星球上一切地表文明。巨噬魇是其中最令人畏惧的巨像之一。若没有valko——一种由戴马尔科顽强的幸存者打造、用于对抗巨像的战争机器——就根本没有击败它的希望。

The kyokor's tentacles snake out, causing devastation.

When a kyokor passes by or through a settlement—or even attacks!—it leaves a trail of destruction that can be represented by the following hazards.

Terrifying, skyscraper-sized beasts roam the wastelands of Daimalko. Called colossi by the population, these monsters erupted from deep within the earth to stomp cities into dust, decimating the population and destroying every surface civilization on the planet in a terrifying Awakening. Kyokors are among the most dreaded colossi. There's no hope of defeating one without a valko—a war machine created by Daimalko's stubborn survivors to fight the colossi.
Writhing Tentacles.reset:
巨口魟的触手在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge writhe]]{1d4轮}内无法再次扭动。

The kyokor's tentacles can't writhe again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge writhe]]{1d4 rounds}.

Proog.name: 普鲁格 Proog

Mimic Object.name: 拟态物体 Mimic Object
Mimic Object.description:
一只普鲁格可以花费 1 分钟改变其外形，以模仿任何总体积为 1 Bulk 或以下的固体物体，尽管它无法复制活动部件或特殊功能。伪装中的普鲁格在隐瞒其真实本质的欺骗检定上获得 +2 情境加值。接触该普鲁格会使此加值失效。

A proog can spend 1 minute altering its appearance to imitate any solid object of 1 Bulk or less, though it can't duplicate moving parts or specialized functions. A mimicking proog gains a +2 Circumstance bonus to Deception checks to conceal its true nature. Touching the proog negates this bonus.

Pocket Protection.name: 口袋防护 Pocket Protection
Pocket Protection.description:
普鲁格可以爬到一个占据其空间的中型或更大体型生物身上，并尝试进行一次潜行检定以[[/act hide]]，即使正被观察也是如此。

A proog can climb onto a Medium or larger creature occupying its space and attempt a Stealth check to [[/act hide]], even if observed.

Proog.publicNotes:
在软泥怪中，普鲁格独树一帜，是许多协约世界家庭所珍爱的宠物。这些温顺、和善的生物除非在最糟糕的情况下，否则都被认为无害。普鲁格能迅速适应家庭生活，易于训练，而且似乎乐于通过自己偏爱或滑稽的变形来取悦主人。在其生命周期的后期，这些生物会毫无预兆地一分为二进行繁殖。饲主们注意到，分裂后产生的每一只普鲁格都必须重新学习原本那只会的所有把戏，这使研究者得出结论：原本那只普鲁格会在繁殖过程中消失。

许多种类的软泥怪潜伏在银河各处黑暗而废弃的地方，只会在满足食欲以及威胁冒险者、探索者和倒霉工人时现身。

Proogs, unique among oozes, are cherished pets in many Pact Worlds households. These gentle, affable creatures are considered harmless in all but the worst of circumstances. Proogs quickly adapt to domestic life, are easily trained, and seem to delight in pleasing their owners with favored or humorous transformations. Late in their life cycle, these creatures reproduce by splitting in half without warning. Owners have noted that each resultant proog must relearn any tricks the original knew, leading researchers to conclude that the original proog is lost in the reproductive process.

Oozes of many types lurk in dark and abandoned places across the galaxy, emerging only to satiate their appetites and threaten adventurers, explorers, and hapless workers alike.

Robotic Superior War Machine.name: 机器人卓越战争机器 Robotic Superior War Machine
Robotic Superior War Machine.tokenName: 机械卓越战争机器 Robotic Superior War Machine

Interstellar Comms.name: 星际通信 Interstellar Comms
Interstellar Comms.description:
远程战争机器与其驾驶员保持恒定的数据链路，并使用其驾驶员掌握的语言，以及任何未列出技能的驾驶员技能调整值。此外，驾驶员可以通过数据链路，借由远程战争机器作为传声工具来发言。

A remote war machine maintains a constant data link with its pilot, using its pilot's languages and skill modifiers for any unlisted skill. In addition, the pilot can speak through the data link using the remote war machine as a mouthpiece.

Aquatic Armaments.name: 水生军备 Aquatic Armaments
Aquatic Armaments.description:
这台卓越战争机器的远程打击发射速度极高，因此可在水下使用而不受惩罚。

The superior war machine's ranged Strikes are launched with such high velocity that they can be used underwater without penalty.

Attack Pattern Gamma.name: 攻击模式伽马 Attack Pattern Gamma
Attack Pattern Gamma.description:
遥控战争机器对任意组合的目标进行三次打击。每次打击都获得灵巧特征，且每次打击都计入其多重攻击减值。

The remote war machine makes three Strikes against any combination of targets. Each Strike gains the agile trait, and each Strike counts toward its multiple attack penalty.

Hypersonic Burst.name: 超音速爆发 Hypersonic Burst
Hypersonic Burst.description:
战争机器先后进行两次5尺移动或疾走。在这些移动期间，战争机器的速度获得+10尺的境遇加值。

The war machine Steps or Strides twice. The war machine gains a +10-foot circumstance bonus to its Speed during these moves.

Robotic Superior War Machine.publicNotes:
这款代号“atlapak”的遥控战争机器由以卡洛-马霍伊为基地的工程师设计，专为水下作战而建。就像其两栖创造者一样，atlapak 在陆地上也同样娴熟。代号“ksarik”的机型最早是在对由乌尔丽卡氏族控股公司运营的一处离散带采矿前哨的可怖袭击中被观察到的。当它为战斗展开时，ksarik 会化作一团布满尖刺的触手与刺目的红色传感器，能在几分钟内撕碎整排士兵。

这场入侵始于阿巴隆上的新械族所探测到的一系列侦察活动。带着炽烈传感器和可动触手的诡异机器凭空出现，似乎毫无规律地撕裂基础设施，并在整个协约世界的太空范围内四处收集情报。恐慌迅速蔓延，但由于这些机器总是消失得无影无踪，或在被捕获时自爆，这些目击始终无法得到确认或辨明。流言开始传播，称这些机器是一种前所未见的生物工程产物。很快，理事军正式介入，以最高安全权限那道坚不可摧的壁障将这些事件封锁起来。

在 ag 325 年的萨伦尼思月，数十次军事行动都未能与这些行踪诡秘的侦察机交战之后，一支自伊达里号派出的战斗机联队终于时来运转，在其中一台机器自毁前将其瘫痪。顶尖协约世界科学家设法诱使它吐露出部分秘密后，这艘生物工程载具成为如今正在测试、用于战斗的“本土培育”遥控战争机器的原型。复制品并非活体，而是使用机器人构造模板制造的，因为原始生物工程设计的核心过于复杂，无法用协约世界的技术进行逆向工程。

遥控战争机器是一种可从极远距离操控的代理体。原始的生物工程战争机器通过灵能链接或未知无线电频率与驾驶员的心智相连。机器人型遥控战争机器则通过数据链接入计算机，使驾驶员能够使用键盘、虚拟现实设备，甚至视讯游戏控制器来操控自己的代理体。

Devised by engineers based on Kalo-Mahoi, the robotic war machine, code name "atlapak," was built for aquatic warfare. Just like its amphibious creators, the atlapak is equally proficient on land. Code name "ksarik" was first observed in a terrifying attack on a Diasporan mining outpost operated by Ulrikka Clanholdings. When unfurled for battle, the ksarik becomes a mass of spiked tentacles and glaring red sensors that can tear through platoons of troopers in minutes.

The incursion began with a series of probes detected by anacites on Aballon. Strange machines with blazing sensors and articulated tentacles appeared out of nowhere, ripping through infrastructure seemingly at random and collecting intelligence all around Pact Worlds space. Panic spread fast, but since the machines always vanished without a trace, or exploded when captured, the sightings couldn't be confirmed or identified. Rumors began to circulate that the machines were a form of biotech never encountered before. Soon the Stewards became formally involved, shuttering the incidents behind the adamantine partition of top security clearance.

In Sarenith of 325 ag, after dozens of military operations failed to engage the elusive probes, a wing of fighters dispatched from the Idari finally got lucky and disabled one of the machines before it could self-destruct. Coaxed into giving up some of its secrets by top Pact Worlds scientists, the biotech vessel became the prototype for the "home grown" remote war machines that are currently being tested for use in combat. The replicas aren't alive but are built using robotic construction templates since the core of the original biotech design has proven too complicated to reverse engineer with Pact technology.

Remote war machines are proxies that can be controlled from a great distance. The original biotech war machines connect to the pilot's mind through a psychic link or unknown radio frequency. Robotic remote war machines connect to a computer via data link, allowing the pilot to control their proxy using a keyboard, virtual reality rig, or even a vidgame controller.

Jinsul Warblooded.name: 烬蛛族战血者 Jinsul Warblooded
Jinsul Warblooded.tokenName: 烬蛛族战血者 Jinsul Warblooded

Aim.name: 瞄准 Aim
Aim.description:
烬蛛族用其近战或远程武器瞄准一个 60 尺内的目标。在其本回合剩余时间内，用该武器进行的成功打击会额外造成 1d4 精准伤害，并使目标对 AC 的掩护加值减少 1。

The jinsul aims with their melee or ranged weapon against a target within 60 feet. For the rest of their turn, successful Strikes made with that weapon deal an additional 1d4 precision damage and reduce the target's cover bonus to AC by 1.

Strider Leap.name: 疾行跳跃 Strider Leap
Strider Leap.description:
烬蛛族先【移动】，然后进行一次[[/act long-jump]]。它们进行【跳远】检定时，【移动】可以少于10尺，且不会自动失败。

The jinsul Strides and then performs a [[/act long-jump]]. They can Stride less than 10 feet and not automatically fail their check to Long Jump.

Jinsul Warblooded.publicNotes:
战血者是指至少在为烬蛛族神权国效力期间经历过六场战斗并幸存下来的烬蛛族。他们会在其他烬蛛族组成的部队中担任较低级别的领导职务，或充当菁英神射手与突击队员。战血者常常选择不参加那些他们认为“不配”自己出手的战斗，转而进行训练或在远处观战，除非他们需要作为增援介入。这些烬蛛族常利用额外的训练时间，学习如何在战斗中辨识关键敌人。

烬蛛族是散布于浩界各处的好战物种。这种六足生物有着布满眼睛的球状身躯、显著的几丁质体节，以及一对用于操作装备的上前肢。很久以前，他们居住在被称为荡劫星域的太空区域，但最终离开那里并定居在严酷的星球拉克斯上。近年来，神圣先驱杜鲁斯将烬蛛族统一为一支名为烬蛛族神权国的凝聚力量，并一度重新夺回了荡劫星域。数个物种与寻星者协会成员组成的联合同盟击败了杜鲁斯，并将烬蛛族再次驱散回浩界之中。

由于在深空中拥有无数基地与舰队活动，烬蛛族大多以劫掠者的身份行动，搜刮装备，并通过与其他物种交锋来检验自身实力。烬蛛族被灌输为把自己视作卓越物种，且认为只有荡劫星域的其他居民才有价值，因此他们更喜欢与敌人进行近距离战斗。

烬蛛族数量不足，无法满足他们在银河各处所控制的众多飞船与太空基地上的每一种需求。相反，他们依赖机器人和自动化计算机系统（且始终至少由一名烬蛛族军官指挥）来维持其空间站高效运转。这些系统被设定得与烬蛛族自身一样致命而冷酷；即便是最不起眼的自动化系统或机器人，比如垃圾收集机，也可能配备致命武器或内置凶险的科技魔法反制措施。

Warblooded are jinsuls who have survived at least a half-dozen engagements in service to the Jinsul Hierocracy. They take on roles of minor leadership or as elite sharpshooters and commandos in a unit of other jinsuls. Warblooded often elect to sit out of engagements that they deem "beneath" them, opting to train up or observe fights from a distance unless they need to step in as reinforcements. These jinsuls often use their extra training time to learn how to pick out critical foes in a battle.

Jinsuls are a warlike species scattered across the Vast. Six-legged creatures with a bulbous body covered in eyes, jinsuls have notable segments of chitin along with a set of upper forelimbs for using equipment. They long ago lived in the region of space known as the Scoured Stars but eventually departed and settled on the harsh world of Rax. In recent years, the divine herald Dhurus unified the jinsuls into a cohesive force known as the Jinsul Hierocracy, which briefly retook the Scoured Stars. A joint alliance between several species and members of the Starfinder Society defeated Dhurus and scattered the jinsuls back into the Vast.

With countless bases and fleets operating in deep space, jinsuls mostly act as raiders, scavenging for equipment and testing their mettle against other species. Indoctrinated to view themselves as a superior species, with only other inhabitants of the Scoured Stars having any value, jinsuls prefer to engage in short-ranged combat with their foes.

Jinsuls aren't numerous enough to fill every need on the many ships and starbases they control across the galaxy. Instead, they rely on robots and automated computer systems (always commanded by at least one jinsul officer) to keep their space stations running efficiently. These systems are programmed to be just as deadly and ruthless as jinsuls themselves; even the most innocuous automated system or robot, like a garbage collector, might wield deadly weapons or contain vicious technomagical countermeasures.

Hesper.name: 赫斯珀 Hesper

Radiation Sense.name: 辐射感应 Radiation Sense
Radiation Sense.description:
赫斯珀能以所列距离内的一种不精确感官感知辐射源，例如反应堆和动力核心。

A hesper can sense radiation sources, such as reactors and power cores, as an imprecise sense at the listed range.

Mutating Touch.name: 突变之触 Mutating Touch
Mutating Touch.description:
赫斯珀只需触碰，便能注入一剂庞大且会诱发变异的辐射。被赫斯珀拳击 Strike 命中的生物必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:18] 豁免。若失败，该生物会从下表中随机获得一种变异，持续 1 小时（若大失败则持续 24 小时）。

[[/r 1d8]]变异
1额外眼睛：目标在明亮光照下目眩，并在基于视觉的察觉检定上获得 +2 状态加值。
2生物电细胞：目标持有的科技物品会在该生物回合结束时恢复所有已消耗的充能。只要目标持有科技物品，这些物品便处于故障 1。若目标是具有科技特征的生物，则其变为故障 1，且其近战 Strike 额外造成 @Damage[1d6[electricity]] 伤害。
3尖刺：目标获得一种徒手近战攻击，造成 @Damage[1d4[piercing]] 伤害。它使用双手武器进行攻击骰时承受 –2 状态减值。
4发光肿瘤：目标如同手电筒般发出光亮，并在隐匿检定上承受 –2 状态减值。
5鳃：目标获得两栖特征，并在强韧豁免上承受 –1 状态减值。
6麝香腺：目标获得一个 30 英尺的恶臭灵光，其 DC 等于其职业 DC。
7防护性增生：目标的 AC 获得 +1 状态加值，并在基于敏捷的检定上承受 –2 状态减值。
8细胞改变：目标在持续时间内处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.fJSNOw4zHGbIm4bZ]{Fast Healing}，其数值等于其等级的一半（向上取整）。

A hesper can deliver an enormous, mutating dose of radiation with a touch. Creatures struck by a hesper's fist Strike must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:18] save. On a failure, the creature gains a random mutation from the table below for 1 hour (or 24 hours on a critical failure).

[[/r 1d8]]Mutation
1Extra eyes: Target is dazzled in bright light and gains a +2 status bonus to sight-based Perception checks.
2Bioelectric cells: Tech items held by the target regain all spent charges at the end of the creature's turn. Tech items are glitching 1 for as long as the target holds them. If the target is a creature with the tech trait, it becomes glitching 1, and its melee Strikes deal an additional @Damage[1d6[electricity]] damage.
3Spikes: Target gains an unarmed melee attack that deals @Damage[1d4[piercing]] damage. It takes a –2 status penalty to attack rolls with two-handed weapons.
4Glowing Tumors: Target sheds light as a flashlight and takes a –2 status penalty to Stealth checks.
5Gills: Target gains the amphibious trait and takes a –1 status penalty to Fortitude saves.
6Musk gland: Target gains a 30-foot stench aura with a DC equal to their class DC.
7Protective growths: Target gains a +1 status bonus to AC and takes a –2 status penalty to Dexterity-based checks.
8Cellular alteration: The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} for the duration and gains @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.fJSNOw4zHGbIm4bZ]{Fast Healing} with a value equal to half its level (rounded up).

Physical Science Lore.name: 物理科学学识 Physical Science Lore

Hesper.publicNotes:
这些核能精类以反应堆为家，体现了其放射性居所迅速变化的本质。它们会变换颜色来反映自己的情绪，而这有时可用于预测它们因无聊而引发的危险发作。赫斯珀从无恶意之心，但它们很少考虑自己行为的后果。

These nuclear fey make their homes in reactors and embody the rapidly changing nature of their radioactive homes. They shift colors to reflect their moods, which can sometimes be used to predict their dangerous bouts of boredom. Hespers never intend malice, but they rarely consider the consequences of their actions.

Host Dragon (Adult).name: 寄主龙（成年） Host Dragon (Adult)

Covered in Bugs.name: 满是虫子 Covered in Bugs
Covered in Bugs.description:
触发条件 巨龙的豁免检定大失败

效果 成群的昆虫会干扰该效果，牺牲自己来保护宿主体魄与心智。巨龙进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:17]。若成功，巨龙此次豁免检定改为失败，而非大失败。

Trigger The dragon critically fails a saving throw

Effect Swarming insects interfere with the effect, sacrificing themselves to protect their host's body and mind. The dragon attempts a @Check[flat|dc:17]. On a success, the dragon fails the saving throw instead of critically failing.

+2 status to all saves vs. mental.name: 对抗精神效果的所有豁免检定获得 +2 状态加值 +2 status to all saves vs. mental

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打和一次尾击打。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one tail Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙族势头 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
该龙每当以一次打击造成重击时，都会为其虫群吐息充能。

The dragon recharges their Swarm Breath whenever they score a critical hit with a Strike.

Excruciating Bites.name: 痛苦噬咬 Excruciating Bites
Excruciating Bites.description:
受到宿主龙颚部打击伤害的生物，或被该龙吞下的生物，也会被数百只细小昆虫叮咬；该生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:28] 豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}，持续1轮。

A creature that takes damage from a host dragon's jaws Strike or is swallowed by the dragon is also bitten by hundreds of tiny insects; the creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:28] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 round.

One with Swarms.name: 与虫群同一 One with Swarms
One with Swarms.description:
宿主龙免疫任何由昆虫群或类似生物（由GM酌情判定）发起的攻击。

The host dragon is immune to any attack made by a swarm of insects or similar creature (at the GM's discretion).

Swallow Whole.name: 活吞 Swallow Whole
Swallow Whole.description:
大型，@Damage[(3d10+7)[bludgeoning]] 外加剧痛啃咬，破裂 26

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Large, @Damage[(3d10+7)[bludgeoning]] plus excruciating bites, Rupture 26

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Swarm Breath.name: 虫群吐息 Swarm Breath
Swarm Breath.description:
巨龙吐出一群叮咬性的昆虫，在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:40] 内造成 @Damage[9d8[piercing]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:30|basic] 豁免）。它们在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Swarm Breath]]{1d4 轮}内不能再次使用虫群吐息。

The dragon disgorges a swarm of biting insects that deals @Damage[9d8[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] (@Check[reflex|dc:30|basic] save). They can't use Swarm Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Swarm Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Swarm Shape.name: 虫群形态 Swarm Shape
Swarm Shape.description:
该龙变形为一个昆虫群。它们放下所有手持、穿戴和携带的物品。处于此形态时，它们不能使用攻击动作（群聚啮咬和虫群吐息除外），也不能施放法术，但它们可以穿过足以容纳其个体昆虫通过的狭小区域，而无需进行挤压。它们可以使用相同的动作重新凝聚回其正常形态。

The dragon transforms into an insect swarm. They drop all held, worn, and carried items. While in this form, they can't use attack actions (except Swarming Bites and Swarm Breath) and can't cast spells, but they can move through areas small enough for their individual insects to fit without having to Squeeze. They can use the same action to coalesce back into their normal form.

Swarming Bites.name: 蜂群噬咬 Swarming Bites
Swarming Bites.description:
需求 该龙是一个虫群

效果 虫群空间内的每个敌人受到 @Damage[8d6[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:30|basic] 豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}，持续 1 轮。

Requirements The dragon is a swarm

Effect Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[8d6[piercing]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:30|basic] save). A creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round.

Host Dragon (Adult).publicNotes:
无数昆虫追随着这些步履沉重、贪得无厌的巨龙，无论它们游荡到何处，昆虫都会簇拥在它们周围，并栖居于宿主龙身体上无数孔窍之中。这头龙既是虫群本身的一部分，也是虫群生态系统的一部分——虫群以它们的身体为食，而龙也以虫群为食，在这场怪诞、持续数百年的循环中，即使宿主龙一生中不摄取任何其他物质，也会以某种方式不断变得更庞大、更强大。宿主龙的力量源自昆虫的原始本能，而且尽管它们拥有智慧，却常常表现得像被它们聚集而来的昆虫一样。宿主龙厌恶回答问题，并会以暴烈的方式反抗他人试图理解其本质的一切努力。

Innumerable insects follow these lumbering, ravenous dragons wherever they roam, swarming around them and living in the countless orifices along the host dragon's body. The dragon is both a part of the swarm itself and a part of the swarm's ecosystem—the swarm feeds on their body, and the dragon feeds on the swarm in a grotesque, centuries-long cycle that somehow results in the host dragon growing larger and more powerful even if they feed on no other substance in their lifetime. Host dragons draw their power from the primal instincts of insects and, despite their intelligence, often behave like the insects they gather to them. Host dragons despise answering questions and violently defy all attempts others make to understand their nature.

Free Captain Knave.name: 自由船长无赖 Free Captain Knave
Free Captain Knave.tokenName: 自由船长恶棍 Free Captain Knave

Armored Coat.name: 衬甲外套 Armored Coat
Armored Coat.description:
升级： 1

这件大衣由真皮或合成皮革制成，并以装甲板加固。装甲大衣通常会量身定制，以契合穿着者的个人风格。标准版本则作为制服的一部分配发给军官。

Upgrades: 1

This overcoat is made of real or synthetic leather and reinforced with armored plates. Armored coats are often tailor-made to match the wearer's personal style. Standard versions are issued to military officers as part of their uniforms.

Blow the Man Down.name: 把那家伙打倒 Blow the Man Down
Blow the Man Down.description:
自由船长无赖的近战攻击获得摔绊特征，并且对 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 的生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.BCLvAx4Pz4MLa2pu]{击倒} 能力。

A Free Captain knave's melee attacks gain the trip trait and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.BCLvAx4Pz4MLa2pu]{Knockdown} ability against @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures.

Capitalize on Fear.name: 利用恐惧 Capitalize on Fear
Capitalize on Fear.description:
任何带有恐慌状态的生物在面对自由船长无赖的攻击时，均视为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。

Any creature that has the frightened condition is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against the Free Captain knave's attacks.

Free Swing.name: 空挥 Free Swing
Free Swing.description:
触发条件 近战触及范围内的一个生物被远程武器命中，或在对抗区域攻击时掷出失败或大失败

效果 自由船长恶棍对触发该反应的生物进行一次近战打击。

Trigger A creature within melee reach is hit by a ranged weapon or rolls a failure or critical failure against an area attack

Effect The Free Captain knave makes a melee Strike against the triggering creature.

Free Captain Knave.publicNotes:
自由船长对雇员并不挑剔，几乎任何他们认为有能力遵守《海盗法典》的人都会录用。大多数自由船长的船每次航行都会带上几名新招募的水手，其中有些人甚至真的会回来参加第二次航行。虽然他们通常会被打发去做船上最卑微、最琐碎的工作，但一旦战斗开始，这些水手就会抓住一切机会向船上的其他船员证明自己。

数代以来，自由船长一直是协约世界星际航运的祸患；而自从采用了漂流航道之后，这些亡命之徒借助新的标准化星际航线，将他们的掠夺范围和规模扩大到了整个银河系的船只。

The Free Captains aren't picky employers and will take almost anyone they believe capable of following the Pirate Code. Most Free Captain ships carry a handful of fresh recruits each trip, some of whom will actually return for a second voyage. While usually relegated to the most demeaning and mundane jobs on board, these sailors take every opportunity to prove themselves to the rest of the crew once combat starts.

The Free Captains have been a scourge of interstellar shipping across the Pact Worlds for generations, but since the adoption of Drift Lanes, the outlaws have expanded their reach and scale by targeting ships across the galaxy using the new standardized interstellar shipping routes.

Shipbreaker.name: 拆船者 Shipbreaker

Electroreception.name: 电感受 Electroreception
Electroreception.description:
在太空中，拆船怪能够感知来自同一恒星系内星舰的电子信号。虽然它未必能解读星舰信号，但它能模糊地感知任意特定星舰信号的意图或用途，例如“扫描”“通信”或“警告危险”。

While in space, the shipbreaker can sense electronic signals from starships in the same star system. While it can't necessarily interpret starship signals, it has a vague sense of the intent or purpose of any given starship signal, such as "to scan," "to communicate," or "to warn of danger."

Techsense.name: 科技感知 Techsense
Techsense.description:
拆船者能够在所列距离内，将具有科技特征的生物和物品侦测为一种不精确感知。

A shipbreaker can detect creatures and items with the tech trait as an imprecise sense at the listed range.

Plasma Shield.name: 等离子护盾 Plasma Shield
Plasma Shield.description:
触发条件 一个生物以近战打击命中拆舰者

效果 拆舰者释放出一片等离子场，对触发该反应的生物造成 @Damage[2d6[fire]] 伤害和 @Damage[1[persistent,electricity]] 伤害，并附加电浆震击的效果。

Trigger A creature hits the shipbreaker with a melee Strike

Effect The shipbreaker discharges a field of plasma, dealing @Damage[2d6[fire]] damage and @Damage[1[persistent,electricity]] damage plus the effects of plasmashock to the triggering creature.

Atmospheric Breach.name: 大气层裂口 Atmospheric Breach
Atmospheric Breach.description:
拆舰兽先进行飞行，然后垂直高跳至多25英尺，并且每连续一轮使用此能力，跳跃高度累计再增加25英尺，并且在跳跃期间的任意时点对一个生物进行一次颚部打击。在低重力环境中，拆舰兽在其跳跃的第一轮可高跳100英尺；若它试图达到逃逸速度以离开行星表面，则之后每连续一轮的高度累计乘以4（这需要在低重力环境中连续5轮使用“大气突破”）。

The shipbreaker Flies, then Leaps vertically up to 25 feet, plus a cumulative 25 feet for each consecutive round the shipbreaker uses this ability, and makes a jaws Strike against a creature at any point during the jump. In low gravity, the shipbreaker Leaps 100 feet high the first round it jumps, cumulatively multiplied by 4 each consecutive round if trying to reach escape velocity to leave the surface of a planet (which requires 5 consecutive rounds of using Atmospheric Breach in a low-gravity environment).

Plasmashock.name: 等离子震击 Plasmashock
Plasmashock.description:
被拆船者的等离子护盾或颚击 Strike 造成伤害的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:26] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响，并在 1 小时内暂时免疫等离子震击。

成功 该生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，并失去其反应，直到其下个回合开始为止。若该生物具有科技特征，或拆船者曾被科技武器攻击，则该生物或武器变为故障 1。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。若该生物具有科技特征，或拆船者曾被科技武器攻击，则该生物或武器变为故障 2。

大失败 如失败，但为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2} 且故障 3。

A creature damaged by a shipbreaker's Plasma Shield or jaws Strike must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:26] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and becomes temporarily immune to plasmashock for 1 hour.

Success The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} and loses its reactions until the start of its next turn. If the creature has the tech trait or the shipbreaker was attacked by a tech weapon, the creature or weapon becomes glitching 1.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}. If the creature has the tech trait or the shipbreaker was attacked by a tech weapon, the creature or weapon becomes glitching 2.

Critical Failure As failure, but @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} and glitching 3.

Shipbreaker.publicNotes:
破舰者是呈子弹形的活体钢铁块，其等离子场迸发着电火花。破舰者在太空中推进自身，搜寻星舰发出的微弱电子信号。锁定目标后，破舰者会以强力的突破机动猛撞星舰，然后撕开船壳以接触内部船员，将乘客、部件和货物一口凶残吞下，以此为它们穿行星际的掠食行为提供能量。

破舰者尤其会被电池吸引，甚至会优先吞食一块充满电的电池，而不是一只更有营养的活体生物。这些电池会永久成为破舰者身体的一部分，帮助这些元素生物储存并提取多余的热量能。那些在漫长存在中吞入了大量电池的破舰者，往往会从内部发光，或周身电光噼啪作响。

元素生物是来自原初存在位面的高能入侵体。它们形态各异，从风或水中无心智的涡流，到能够驾驭原初魔法的复杂实体，不一而足。太空旅行的到来与科技的进步，使更多作为元素之活体化身的存在得以在物质宇宙中显现。

野火、太阳风暴和洪水等自然事件，能在一颗行星上或一片太空区域中释放出成群失控的元素生物。有时，一群强大的元素生物会引发史诗级规模的自然灾害，比如一次爆表的太阳耀斑烧毁整颗行星的电网，或一场在气态巨行星大气中盘旋不息的永恒风暴。

Shipbreakers are bullet-shaped chunks of living steel crackling with electricity from their plasma fields. Shipbreakers propel themselves through space, seeking faint electronic signals emitted by starships. After tracking a target, shipbreakers slam into the starship using a powerful breach maneuver and then rip through the hull to get at the crew inside, ingesting passengers, components, and cargo in a vicious gulp that fuels their interplanetary predation.

Shipbreakers are especially attracted to batteries and even prioritize eating a fully charged battery over a more nutritious living creature. These batteries remain a permanent component of shipbreakers, storing and retrieving excess caloric energy from the elementals. Shipbreakers that have ingested a tremendous amount of batteries over their long existences often glow from the inside or crackle with electricity.

Elementals are energetic intrusions from the primal planes of existence. They take many forms, from mindless eddies in the wind or water to complex entities capable of wielding primal magic. The advent of space travel and the progress of technology have allowed even more living embodiments of the elements to manifest in the Universe.

Natural events like wildfires, solar storms, and floods can unleash hordes of unruly elementals on a planet or into a region of space. Sometimes, a gathering of powerful elementals causes a natural disaster on an epic scale, like an off-the-charts solar flare that fries a planet's power grid or a ceaseless storm swirling in a gas giant's atmosphere.

Abysium Dragon (Adult).name: 深渊龙（成年） Abysium Dragon (Adult)

Arcane Spontaneous Spells.name: 奥术自发法术 Arcane Spontaneous Spells

Rocket Dash.name: 火箭猛冲 Rocket Dash
Rocket Dash.description:
你从身后喷射出一道火焰火箭，向前猛冲。你沿直线移动，距离至多为你速度的两倍；你可以穿过由生物占据的空间，且此移动不会触发反应。区域内的生物受到 6d12 火焰伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。若严重失败，该生物还会受到 2d6 持续性火焰伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态，持续 1 轮。你在这条线的末端重新出现。

升阶（+2） 火焰伤害增加 2d12，且严重失败时的持续性火焰伤害增加 1d6。

You emit a rocket of flame from behind you and blast forward. You move in a straight line up to twice your Speed; you can move through spaces occupied by creatures, and the movement doesn't trigger reactions. Creatures in the area take 6d12 fire damage with a basic Reflex save. On a critical failure, a creature also takes 2d6 persistent fire damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round. You reappear at the end of the line.

Heightened (+2) The fire damage increases by 2d12, and the persistent fire damage on a critical failure increases by 1d6.

Toxic Cloud.name: 毒云术 Toxic Cloud
Toxic Cloud.description:
你创造一团有毒云雾。该效果如同@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{迷雾术 Mist}一般，除了该区域会每轮远离你10尺。在该区域中开始回合的生物承受6d8毒素伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d8。

Unfettered Movement.name: 行动无碍 Unfettered Movement
Unfettered Movement.description:
你驱散可能影响一个生物的阻碍。当处于该法术效果中时，法术目标忽视会赋予其速度环境减值的效果。当法术目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}一个令其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，它自动成功，除非该效果是魔法性的，并且其环级比行动无碍更高。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement}

Fireball.name: 火球术 Fireball
Fireball.description:
在你指定的位置爆发出咆哮的烈焰，造成6d6火焰伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Ignition.name: 引火术 Ignition
Ignition.description:
你打个响指并指向一个目标，后者便开始燃烧。作出一次法术攻击检定对抗目标的AC，命中时造成2d4点火焰伤害。若目标位于你的近战触及范围内，你能选择用火焰进行一次近战法术攻击以取代远程法术攻击，这会使得法术的所有伤害骰提升至d6骰子。

大成功 目标承受双倍伤害以及1d4点持续火焰伤害。

成功 目标承受全额伤害。

升阶（+1） 起始伤害增加1d4点，重击的持续火焰伤害增加1d4点。

@Damage[(@item.rank)d4[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害}

@Damage[(@item.rank)d6[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害（近战）}

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Radioactive Aura.name: 放射性灵光 Radioactive Aura
Radioactive Aura.description:
90英尺。进入放射性灵气的生物必须尝试进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:30] 对抗极度辐射病的豁免。随后，它会暂时免疫放射性灵气 10 分钟。

90 feet. A creature that enters the radioactive aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:30] save against extreme radiation sickness. It's then temporarily immune to radioactive aura for 10 minutes.

Abysium Maelstrom.name: 阿比西姆湍流区 Abysium Maelstrom
Abysium Maelstrom.description:
如果这条龙接下来使用的动作是 Radiation Breath，则该辐射会被奥术力量超级充能。每个对 Radiation Breath 的豁免失败的生物都会受到 @Damage[3d6[persistent,force]] 伤害，因为超级充能的辐射会从体内将其撕裂。每个对其豁免大失败的生物还会在承受此持续力场伤害期间陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}。

If the next action the dragon uses is Radiation Breath, the radiation becomes supercharged with arcane power. Each creature that fails its save against Radiation Breath takes @Damage[3d6[persistent,force]] damage as the supercharged radiation tears it apart from within. Each creature that critically fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} as long as it has this persistent force damage.

Control Radiation.name: 操控辐射 Control Radiation
Control Radiation.description:
深渊铋龙对其体内不断滋长的放射性能量拥有终极掌控。每当深渊铋龙造成火焰或毒素伤害时，它们可以选择该伤害是否为魔法伤害，并且可以将任意数量的火焰伤害改为毒素伤害（或将任意数量的毒素伤害改为火焰伤害）。

Abysium dragons have ultimate control over the radioactive energy that grows within their bodies. Any time an abysium dragon deals fire or poison damage, they can choose whether that damage is magical, and they can change any amount of the fire damage to poison (or any amount of poison damage to fire).

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打和一次尾击打。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one tail Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙族动量 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
龙每当以一次打击造成重击时，便会为其辐射吐息充能。

The dragon recharges their Radiation Breath whenever they score a critical hit with a Strike.

Radiation Breath.name: 辐射吐息 Radiation Breath
Radiation Breath.description:
巨龙喷吐一股腐蚀性的过热气体，在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:40] 内造成 @Damage[7d6[fire],4d12[persistent,poison]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect] 基础豁免）。它们在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Radiation Breath]]{1d4轮} 内不能再次使用辐射吐息。

The dragon breathes a blast of caustic superheated gas that deals @Damage[7d6[fire],4d12[persistent,poison]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] (@Check[fortitude|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect] save). They can't use Radiation Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Radiation Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Abysium Dragon (Adult).publicNotes:
渊铁龙既将辐射视为一种毁灭之力，也将其视为能量来源，因此与同名的放射性星铁——渊铁——有着紧密联系。这些龙的体内会长出纯净渊铁的沉积物，随着年龄增长，它们的放射性也会越来越强，从而引发攻击性、躁动，甚至孤独感，因为能长期在一头年迈渊铁龙身边存活的生物并不多。渊铁龙经常投身于义体改造、武器制造（以利用它们与生俱来的能量源）以及机器人建造（以便陪伴自己）等 pursuits。这些工作驱使渊铁龙去寻找坚固且耐辐射的材料用于制作，而它们常常会花上数年时间，在小型卫星和小行星间四处搜寻珍贵材料。

Drawing on radiation as both a force of destruction and a source of energy, abysium dragons are tied to the radioactive starmetal of the same name. These dragons grow deposits of pure abysium in their bodies, becoming more radioactive as they age, causing aggression, agitation, and even loneliness since not many creatures can long survive the company of an aging abysium dragon. Abysium dragons frequently turn to pursuits such as augmentation and weapon crafting (to take advantage of their innate power source) and the construction of robots (to keep them company). This work drives abysium dragons to seek out sturdy, radiation-resistant materials they can use for crafting, and they often spend years at a time scouring small moons and asteroids in search of precious materials.
Abysium Dragon (Adult).allSaves: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Plasmazer.name: 等离子灼烧器 Plasmazer

Redirect Arc.name: 偏转电弧 Redirect Arc
Redirect Arc.description:
触发条件 plasmazer受到电击伤害

效果 plasmazer将触发该反应的效果转移给30英尺内的一个生物。该生物必须进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:21] 豁免。若失败，该生物受到与触发该反应的效果等量的电击伤害。

Trigger The plasmazer takes electricity damage

Effect The plasmazer redirects the triggering effect to a creature within 30 feet. The creature attempts a @Check[reflex|dc:21] save. On failure, the creature takes an equal amount of electricity damage as the triggering effect.

Tinted Glow.name: 染色光辉 Tinted Glow
Tinted Glow.description:
等离闪耀体会在30英尺半径内发出其颜色的明亮光照，并在接下来的30英尺内发出微光。

A plasmazer emits bright light of their color in a 30-foot radius and dim light in the next 30 feet.

Flash Strike.name: 闪击 Flash Strike
Flash Strike.description:
等离子疾射体沿直线飞行两次，忽略其路径上的任何生物，如同等离子疾射体具有虚体般。位于等离子疾射体路径上或邻接其路径的所有生物均受到 @Damage[4d6[electricity]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] 豁免。若重度失败，该生物还会受到 @Damage[2d6[persistent,fire]] 伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 状态，持续 1 轮。

The plasmazer Flies twice in a straight line, ignoring any creatures in their path as if the plasmazer is incorporeal. All creatures in or adjacent to the plasmazer's path take @Damage[4d6[electricity]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] save. On critical failure, a creature also takes @Damage[2d6[persistent,fire]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Plasmazer.publicNotes:
等离子疾射灵是色彩鲜艳、脾气暴躁的气元素生物；自霓虹灯发明后，它们便在物质宇宙中变得十分常见。它们会显现为危险的光与色彩爆炸，使城市电网瘫痪，并将电力导入一片频闪的霓虹万花筒之中。它们常常呈现为传说中的神鸟，或其他源自当地神话的生物形态。尝试新潮玩法的俱乐部老板曾试图利用等离子疾射灵为舞会制造特殊效果，但这种情况通常都会以舞者闪避等离子光束收场。“等离子滑步”是一种排舞的名字；此前，一只等离子疾射灵在伊奥克斯一家名为“霓虹墓穴”的全天营业俱乐部中挣脱失控后，这种舞便迅速走红。那家俱乐部以喧闹狂欢闻名。

元素生物是来自原初存在位面的活跃侵入者。它们形态多样，从风或水中毫无心智的涡流，到能够驾驭原初魔法的复杂实体，不一而足。太空旅行的到来与科技的进步，让更多作为元素活体化身的存在得以在物质宇宙中显现。

野火、太阳风暴和洪水等自然事件，能够在一颗行星上或某片太空区域中释放出成群桀骜不驯的元素生物。有时，一群强大的元素生物聚集在一起，会引发史诗级规模的自然灾害，例如强到爆表、足以烧毁整颗行星电网的太阳耀斑，或是在气态巨行星大气中永不停息地盘旋的风暴。

Plasmazers are air elementals of vivid colors and grumpy disposition who became commonly found in the Universe after the invention of neon lighting. They manifest as dangerous explosions of light and color that shut down city grids, redirecting the power into a strobing neon kaleidoscope. They often take the shape of legendary birds or other creatures from local myths. Experimental club owners have tried harnessing plasmazers to produce special effects for their dance parties, but such situations usually end with dancers dodging plasma beams. The plasma slide is the name of a line dance that went viral after a plasmazer broke free at the Neon Crypt, an all-hours club on Eox with a reputation for rowdy fetes.

Elementals are energetic intrusions from the primal planes of existence. They take many forms, from mindless eddies in the wind or water to complex entities capable of wielding primal magic. The advent of space travel and the progress of technology have allowed even more living embodiments of the elements to manifest in the Universe.

Natural events like wildfires, solar storms, and floods can unleash hordes of unruly elementals on a planet or into a region of space. Sometimes, a gathering of powerful elementals causes a natural disaster on an epic scale, like an off-the-charts solar flare that fries a planet's power grid or a ceaseless storm swirling in a gas giant's atmosphere.

Juvenile Nyssholora.name: 幼年倪索罗拉 Juvenile Nyssholora
Juvenile Nyssholora.tokenName: 幼年奈索洛拉 Juvenile Nyssholora

Telepathy Sense.name: 心灵感应感知 Telepathy Sense
Telepathy Sense.description:
一只 nyssholora 能感知所有拥有心灵感应、有限心灵感应或类似能力（例如秘法使的纽带）的生物，将其视为在所列距离内的不精确感官。此感官可穿过墙壁和其他障碍物生效。

A nyssholora senses all creatures that have telepathy, limited telepathy, or a similar ability, such as a mystic's bond, as an imprecise sense at the listed range. This sense works through walls and other obstacles.

Crunch.name: 嘎吱嘎吱 Crunch
Crunch.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 一个生物被@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}在 nyssholora 的颚中

效果 nyssholora 猛然咬下，对该生物造成 @Damage[(1d8+7)[穿刺]] 伤害。

Frequency once per round

Requirements A creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} in the nyssholora's jaws

Effect The nyssholora chomps down on the creature, dealing @Damage[(1d8+7)[piercing]] damage.

Discordant Bellow.name: 刺耳咆哮 Discordant Bellow
Discordant Bellow.description:
nyssholora 释放出一阵刺耳的不协和声波冲击，造成 @Damage[5d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] 伤害，作用于一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] （@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] 豁免）。区域内的物体和构装体视为其硬度只有通常的一半。重创性豁免失败的生物还会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}，持续 1 轮。nyssholora 在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Discordant Bellow]]{1d4 轮} 内无法再次使用“Discordant Bellow”。

The nyssholora unleashes a blast of discordant sound that deal @Damage[5d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] save). Objects and constructs in the area are treated as if they had half as much Hardness as usual. Creatures that critically fail their saving throw are also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round. The nyssholora can't use Discordant Bellow again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Discordant Bellow]]{1d4 rounds}.

Phasic Strike.name: 相位打击 Phasic Strike
Phasic Strike.description:
nyssholora 的相位刃打击将它命中的任何物体或构装体视为其硬度只有通常的一半。

A nyssholora's phasic blade Strike treats any object or construct it hits as if the target had half as much Hardness as usual.

Juvenile Nyssholora.publicNotes:
尽管年纪尚轻，幼年 nyssholora 仍然是危险而强悍的掠食者。

凶猛得令人难以置信，nyssholora 是一种外形近似恐龙的生物，属于卡斯卓韦星球上最危险、最令人畏惧的顶级掠食者之列。这些行走的武器炫示着致命的生物构造：一张巨大的血盆大口，内侧排列着两排剃刀般锋利的牙齿；形如镰刀、会以超声速振动的相位刃前臂；以及一条如鞭笞器般、能够从周围大气中吸收电能的尾巴。然而，nyssholora 也同样狡猾而敏锐——头顶如冠冕般展开的一圈触须能够侦测心灵感应信号，使当地的弗米蚁族和拉申塔人根本无法逃过它们的注意。它们的相位刃切开墙壁和载具就像切开灌木丛一样轻而易举，确保猎物无处可安全藏身。

Despite their age, juvenile nyssholoras remain dangerous and formidable predators.

Incredibly ferocious, nyssholoras are dinosaur-like creatures that number among the most dangerous and feared apex predators on the planet of Castrovel. These walking weapons brandish lethal biology: a massive maw lined with twin rows of razor-sharp teeth, scythe-shaped phasic blade forearms that vibrate at ultrasonic speeds, and a scourge-like tail capable of absorbing electricity from the surrounding atmosphere. Yet, nyssholoras are also cunning and perceptive—a frill of tentacles that crowns their head detect telepathic signals, making it impossible for the local formians and lashuntas to escape their notice. Their phasic blades can cut through walls and vehicles as easily as underbrush, ensuring prey have nowhere safe to hide.

Erabryth.name: 埃拉布里斯 Erabryth

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣天生法术 Divine Innate Spells

Detect Thoughts.name: 侦测思想 Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
你感知到周围有会思考的生物存在。你能探测到拥有智力调整值为 –3 或更高的清醒生物的思维存在与否。你可以选择忽略你所熟悉生物的思维，以免它们干扰你对其他思维的探测。该法术可以穿透某些屏障，但 3 英尺厚的泥土或木材、1 英尺厚的石头、1 英寸厚的金属、一层薄铅片，或任何力场屏障都会阻挡它。对精神效果免疫的生物也免疫此法术的探测。

升阶（4环） 你会探测到会思考心智的数量，以及这些生物是否具有心灵感应。具有心灵感应的生物，其思维会比不具备心灵感应的生物更响亮，并且可能会察觉到你的侵入，具体由 GM 裁定。

You sense the presence of thinking creatures around you. You detect the presence or absence of thoughts from conscious creatures that have Intelligence modifiers of –3 or higher. You can choose to ignore the thoughts of creatures you're familiar with so they don't interfere with your detection of other thoughts. The spell can penetrate some barriers, but 3 feet of dirt or wood, 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of metal, a thin sheet of lead, or any force barrier blocks it. Creatures who are immune to mental effects are immune to detection by this spell.

Heightened (4th) You detect the number of thinking minds and whether or not the creatures are telepathic. Creatures with telepathy have louder thoughts than creatures who don't have telepathy and might be able to sense your intrusion, at the GM's discretion.

Invisibility (at will; self only).name: 隐形术（任意使用；仅限自身） Invisibility (at will; self only)
Invisibility (at will; self only).description:
扭曲光线的幻觉包复目标，令其变得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}。这令该生物对所有生物 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{无踪} ，但生物可以尝试寻找目标，令其改为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}。如果目标使用敌对动作，法术在敌对动作完成后结束。

升阶（4环级） 该法术持续1分钟，但目标使用敌对动作时该法术不会结束。

Revealing Light.name: 显光尘 Revealing Light
Revealing Light.description:
一道魔法光亮的波浪掠过该区域。由你选择光亮的外观，例如五彩斑斓、无热量的火焰或者闪烁的微尘。受显光尘影响的生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}。 若该生物处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}，则它改为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}。如果目标已由于任何其他原因处于隐蔽状态，则它不再隐蔽。

大成功 该目标不受影响。

成功 该光亮影响生物2轮。

失败 该光亮影响生物1分钟。

大失败 该光亮影响生物10分钟。

Skim Data.name: 略读数据 Skim Data
Skim Data.description:
你触碰一个物品，并将注意力集中于其中包含的一组数据上，例如故事、消息、文件、信息圈站点、音频记录或视频。你会理解这组数据的大意，并且能够迅速定位与你搜索内容最相关的页面或章节。如果这组数据是以你不懂的语言写成或以其他方式传达的，或者你试图从一台你无权访问的计算机中获取信息（例如一台设有你不知道密码的计算机），则该法术失败。

如果你将此法术作为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{研究} 活动的一部分来施放，则你将严重失败视为失败。

You touch one object and concentrate on a dataset contained within it, such as a story, message, file, infosphere site, audio recording, or video. You understand the gist of the dataset and can quickly locate the most relevant pages or sections to your search. If the dataset is written or otherwise communicated in a language you don't know, or you attempt to gain information from a computer you don't have access to (such as one with a password you don't know), the spell fails.

If you Cast this Spell as part of a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{Research} activity, you treat a critical failure as a failure instead.

Delete.name: 删除 Delete
Delete.description:
你以一个浮夸的魔法手势，从一个装置或物体中删除数据。这些数据可以是手写的、印刷的或数字形式的。你最多可以删除相当于 1,500 个单词的文本、一页内容，或一整个显示屏上的文本或其他视觉信息。无人看管或被持握的物体内或上的非魔法文字会被自动删除。尝试进行一次反制检定，以删除数字或魔法文字。如果你未能删除作为一个隐患一部分的文字，你会触发该隐患。此法术不能用于删除法术书或类似用于储存魔法公式或法术的媒介中的内容。

如果你的目标是一个具有追踪特征的已被持用科技物品，请尝试进行一次反制检定。若成功，该物品变为故障 1。持握该物品的生物可以执行交互动作来重启软件，使故障值降低 1。

升环（7环） 你可以删除单个装置或书籍中本地存储的所有数据，或删除某个装置或书籍上与特定名称、主题或类别相关的所有数据。

You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Implant Data.name: 植入体数据 Implant Data
Implant Data.description:
你将一个计算机或设备重新编程，使其在被访问时显示一条你选定的数据。你每个法术环阶最多可以植入一条数据。一条数据可以是一个简单事实，例如某个生物或物体的位置或物理描述；某个生物或物体的图像；或一段不超过300个字符的简单陈述。当目标计算机或设备被访问时，这条植入的数据会成为访问它的生物首先获得的数据，无论该生物正在查找什么数据。植入的数据不会阻止生物访问设备中存储的其他信息，不会改变设备的运作方式，也不会以其他方式妨碍设备运作。如果在某个生物访问植入数据之前，这个法术的持续时间结束，则该信息会消失。

升阶（3环） 持续时间为一年。

升阶（6环） 持续时间为无限。

You reprogram a computer or device to display a chosen piece of data when accessed. You can implant up to one piece of data per spell rank. A piece of data can be a simple fact, such as a creature or object's location or physical description; an image of a creature or object; or a simple statement of no more than 300 characters. When the target computer or device is accessed, this implanted data is the first data the accessing creature gains, regardless of what data the creature is looking for. Implanted data doesn't prevent a creature from accessing other information stored on a device, change how the device functions, or otherwise inhibit the device from functioning. If this spell's duration ends before a creature accesses the implanted data, the information vanishes.

Heightened (3rd) The duration is one year.

Heightened (6th) The duration is unlimited.

Buffering Zone.name: 缓冲区 Buffering Zone
Buffering Zone.description:
15英尺。回合开始时位于该区域内的生物必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:14] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响，并在1天内暂时免疫缓冲区。

成功 该生物将缓冲区视为困难地形，持续1轮。

失败 如同成功，且该生物被向后推5英尺，并在1轮内对攻击检定承受 –1状态减值。

大失败 如同失败，但该生物会被推到缓冲区界限之外，且1轮内无法重新进入缓冲区。

15 feet. A creature that begins its turn within the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:14] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and is temporarily immune to buffering zone for 1 day.

Success The creature treats the buffering zone as difficult terrain for 1 round.

Failure As success, and the creature is pushed back 5 feet and takes a –1 status penalty to attack rolls for 1 round.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature is pushed back beyond the boundary of the buffering zone and can't reenter the buffering zone for 1 round.

Reflect Aggression.name: 反射攻击性 Reflect Aggression
Reflect Aggression.description:
触发 一个生物以近战或远程打击命中艾拉布里斯

效果 艾拉布里斯将其攻击者的部分愤怒与攻击性反射回去。艾拉布里斯对触发伤害获得 3 点抗性，并对其攻击者造成 @Damage[3[mental]] 伤害。

Trigger A creature hits the erabryth with a melee or ranged Strike

Effect The erabryth reflects some of their attacker's anger and aggression back at them. The erabryth gains resistance 3 to the triggering damage and deals @Damage[3[mental]] damage to their attacker.

Forced Reflection.name: 强制反射 Forced Reflection
Forced Reflection.description:
伊拉布瑞斯迫使60英尺内的一个生物在瞬间重历自己最痛苦的记忆与悔恨，以这些艰难的回忆直面自身，帮助其与自己的行为和解并放下痛苦。目标必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:17] 豁免检定。无论结果如何，目标随后都会对“强制反思”暂时免疫1天。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1} 且恐慌 1。

大失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2} 且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}。

The erabryth forces a creature within 60 feet to relive its most painful memories and regrets in an instant, confronting it with it difficult memories to help it reconcile its actions and let go of its pain. The target must attempt a @Check[will|dc:17] save. Regardless of the result, the target is then temporarily immune to Forced Reflection for 1 day.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} and frightened 1.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Shepherd's Touch.name: 牧者之触 Shepherd's Touch
Shepherd's Touch.description:
蚀影兽的打击获得幽灵杀手升级的加益，并且对活体生物额外造成 1d4 虚空伤害，或对亡灵额外造成 1d4 活力伤害。

An erabryth's Strikes have the benefit of a ghost killer upgrade and deal an extra 1d4 void damage to living creatures or 1d4 vitality damage to undead.

Boneyard Lore.name: 白骨墓园学识 Boneyard Lore

Erabryth.publicNotes:
当安卓人死亡，或为再生而放弃自己的躯体——这是一种备受赞颂与尊重、近似于繁衍的事件——便由沉默而平静的厄拉布里斯将他们的灵魂引入骸骨原野。作为善于反思与内省的存在，这些招魂者帮助安卓人正视自己的选择，与生命中艰难的经历和解，并认识到再生的时刻终于到来。

厄拉布里斯身形瘦长而雌雄莫辨，拥有带状的反光血肉，面部则是一面镜盘。它们通过姿态与富有情感的光芒进行交流，并以其抚慰人心、持续不变的存在带来慰藉。

招魂者是死亡的牧者，它们通过消灭亡灵，或护送灵魂安全穿越骸骨原野，来守护生命、死亡与来世的循环。

When androids die or give their bodies up for renewal—a celebrated and respected event akin to procreation—it's the silent and calm erabryths who usher their souls into the Boneyard. Beings of reflection and introspection, these psychopomps help androids come to terms with their choices, reconcile the trying events of their lives, and realize that the time for renewal has finally come.

Erabryths are lanky and androgynous, with reflective, ribboned flesh and a mirrored disk for a face. They communicate through posture and emotive lights, offering comfort through their soothing, persistent presence.

Psychopomps are death's shepherds who safeguard the cycle of life, death, and the afterlife by slaying undead or ushering souls safely through the Boneyard.

Dreamer.name: 梦者 Dreamer

Occult Innate Spells.name: 天赋异术灵能法术 Occult Innate Spells

Confusion.name: 困惑术 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你使用奇怪的能量波动扰乱了目标的思维，令其随机行动。法术效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标胡言乱语，并且获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑 Confused}1分钟。在其每个回合结束，它能尝试一次新豁免来结束困惑术。

大失败 目标困惑1分钟，并且没有提前结束的豁免。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Eldritch Wrath.name: 异术之怒 Eldritch Wrath
Eldritch Wrath.description:
你引导存在于物质宇宙外缘之外的诡异力量，幻影般的利爪、巨颚和触须猛然扑向区域内的每个目标，对区域内每个生物造成 3d12 点精神伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试一次意志豁免。对于任何因该法术效果而陷入恶心的生物而言，该区域为困难地形。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1d12。

You channel the bizarre powers that exist beyond the outer reaches of the universe, dealing 3d12 mental damage to each creature in the area as phantasmal claws, jaws, and tentacles lash out at each target. Each creature in the area must attempt a Will save. The area is difficult terrain for any creature sickened by the effects of this spell.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Mind Reading.name: 读心术 Mind Reading
Mind Reading.description:
你通过一次短暂的心灵接触来尝试阅读目标的想法。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。目标会暂时免疫你的读心术1小时。

大成功 目标得知当施放该法术时你模糊的表层想法。

成功 你得知目标的智力调整值是高于，等于，还是低于你。

失败 你得知当施放该法术时目标模糊的表层想法，并且你得知目标的智力是高于，等于，还是低于你。

大失败 如失败，并且在法术持续时间中，你可以维持该法术来再次侦测目标的表层想法。目标不会获得另外的豁免。

Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
Slow.description:
你令目标周围的时间膨胀，令其行动缓慢。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1} ，持续1轮。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 2}，持续1分钟。

升阶（6环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Time's Edge.name: 时间之锋 Time's Edge
Time's Edge.description:
你将来自时间维度的潜在能量折射到你当前所在的位面，形成一把巨大的刀刃。这把刀刃会对区域内所有生物造成 5d6 点挥砍伤害，因为它会使它们身体上一片薄薄的切面中的时间急速流逝。区域内的生物必须尝试进行一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

强化（+1） 伤害提高 2d6。

You refract latent energy from the Dimension of Time into your current plane in the form of a massive blade. The blade deals 5d6 slashing damage to all creatures in the area as it causes time to pass rapidly in a thin slice of their bodies. Creatures in the area must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Void Whispers.name: 虚空低语 Void Whispers
Void Whispers.description:
目标听见了来自群星之外、蕴含不可言说奥秘的不祥声响，使其心智迷乱。目标进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 目标听见那些奇异的低语，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续1轮。

失败 目标开始漫无目的地游荡，将每个动作都用于向随机方向进行调整步。当它移动时，目标会采取最安全的路线，且不会进入危险地形。该法术的持续时间为1分钟，或直到有生物对目标使用敌对动作。

大失败 如失败，但目标会语无伦次地喃喃自语。任何在目标20尺内开始其回合的生物都必须尝试一次意志豁免。若其失败，则它必须在其下个回合将它的第一个动作用于向随机方向进行调整步，并对此法术免疫24小时。这是一个无力化效果。

The target hears ominous sounds containing unspeakable mysteries from beyond the stars that disorient its mind. The target attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target hears the strange whispers, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target begins to wander aimlessly, using each action to Step in a random direction. When it moves, the target takes the safest route and doesn't enter hazardous terrain. The spell has a duration of 1 minute or until a creature uses a hostile action against the target.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target babbles incoherently. Any creature that begins its turn within 20 feet of the target must attempt a Will saving throw. On a failure, it must use its first action on its next turn to Step in a random direction and becomes immune to this spell for 24 hours. This is an incapacitation effect.

Augury.name: 卜筮术 Augury
Augury.description:
你能够粗略地窥见未来。在施放该法术期间，询问特定行动方式的结果。法术能够至多未来30分钟内的结果，并使用后述结果揭示出GM得出的最有可能的猜想：吉、凶、兼（结果将是好与坏的混合）、以及平（不会产生特别好或者坏的结果）。

GM投掷一次@Check[flat|dc:6|showDC:all|traits:secret]检定。失败时，结果总是“平”。这使得它人无法判断“平”的结果究竟是否准确。若有任何人在另一次施法过程中询问的问题与首次卜筮术具有相同的主题，那么GM要使用与首次施法相同的秘密检定结果。不过，在情况改变时，也有可能得到不同的结果。
