Detect Thoughts.name: 侦测思想 Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
你感知到周围有会思考的生物存在。你能探测到具有智力调整值为 –3 或更高的清醒生物之思维的存在或不存在。你可以选择忽略你所熟悉生物的思维，以免它们干扰你对其他思维的探测。该法术可以穿透某些屏障，但 3 英尺厚的泥土或木材、1 英尺厚的石头、1 英寸厚的金属、一层薄铅片，或任何力场屏障都会阻挡它。对精神效果免疫的生物也免疫此法术的探测。

升阶（4环） 你会探测到会思考之心智的数量，以及这些生物是否具有心灵感应。具有心灵感应的生物，其思维会比没有心灵感应的生物更响亮，并且在 GM 自行裁定下，它们可能会察觉到你的侵入。

You sense the presence of thinking creatures around you. You detect the presence or absence of thoughts from conscious creatures that have Intelligence modifiers of –3 or higher. You can choose to ignore the thoughts of creatures you're familiar with so they don't interfere with your detection of other thoughts. The spell can penetrate some barriers, but 3 feet of dirt or wood, 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of metal, a thin sheet of lead, or any force barrier blocks it. Creatures who are immune to mental effects are immune to detection by this spell.

Heightened (4th) You detect the number of thinking minds and whether or not the creatures are telepathic. Creatures with telepathy have louder thoughts than creatures who don't have telepathy and might be able to sense your intrusion, at the GM's discretion.

Sift the Sphere.name: 筛析球体 Sift the Sphere
Sift the Sphere.description:
你通过仪式性地筛查当地的信息圈，获得关于某个主题的神秘洞见。在施放此法术期间，询问某一特定行动方案的结果。该法术可以预测最远到未来30分钟内的结果，并揭示GM对以下结果中最可能情况的最佳判断。

  • 吉 结果会是好的。
  • 凶 结果会是坏的。
  • 吉凶参半 结果会是好坏参半。
  • 无事 不会有特别好或特别坏的结果。GM进行一次秘密的 @Check[flat|dc:6|traits:secret]。若失败，结果总是“无事”。这使得你无法判断“无事”的结果是否准确。如果有人在额外一次施放“筛查天球”时询问与第一次施放相同的主题，GM使用第一次施放时的秘密掷骰结果。如果情况发生变化，则有可能得到不同的结果。

高阶化（4环） 该法术可以预测最远到未来1周内的结果。

You ritually sift through the local infosphere and gain mystical insight about a topic. During the casting of this spell, ask about the results of a particular course of action. The spell can predict results up to 30 minutes into the future and reveals the GM's best guess among the following outcomes.

  • Weal The results will be good.
  • Woe The results will be bad.
  • Weal and Woe The results will be a mix of good and bad.
  • Nothing There won't be particularly good or bad results. The GM rolls a secret @Check[flat|dc:6|traits:secret]. On a failure, the result is always "nothing." This makes it impossible to tell whether a "nothing" result is accurate. If anyone asks about the same topic as the first casting of sift the sphere during an additional casting, the GM uses the secret roll result from the first casting. If circumstances change, it's possible to get a different result.

Heightened (4th) The spell can predict results up to 1 week into the future.

Vibe Check.name: 氛围检查 Vibe Check
Vibe Check.description:
你通过将一种强烈情绪以心灵感应投射进一个生物的心智中，来共享情绪。目标必须进行一次意志豁免。若其失败，目标会体验到由你从以下情绪中选择的一种，但如果你选择愤怒或喜悦，此法术获得失能特征。

  • 愤怒 在其下一回合，目标将其第一个动作用于攻击最近的生物，即使那是其盟友。
  • 喜悦 目标不能采取任何敌对动作。
  • 恐惧 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}。
  • 悲伤 目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1} 状态并泪流满面。

强化（4环） 该法术影响20尺爆发内的所有生物。每个生物都必须受到相同情绪的影响。

You share a mood by psychically projecting an intense emotion into a creature's mind. The target attempts a Will save. On a failure, the target experiences your choice of the following emotions, but if you pick anger or joy this spell gains the incapacitation trait.

  • Anger On its next turn, the target spends its first action to attack the nearest creature, even if it's an ally.
  • Joy The target can't take any hostile actions.
  • Fear The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.
  • Sorrow The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and bursts into tears.

Heightened (4th) The spell affects all creatures in a 20-foot burst. Each creature must be affected by the same emotion.

Akashic Download.name: 阿卡西下载 Akashic Download
Akashic Download.description:
你对阿卡西记录执行一次灵能搜索，以获取关于某个特定主题的信息，并将这些数据以魔法方式传输到你的通讯器或电脑中。当你施放此法术时，选择一个你已受训且具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 动作的任意技能。

在持续时间内的任何时候，当你使用所选技能尝试进行一次回忆知识检定时，你都可以查阅你的通讯器。此次检定获得+1状态加值。查阅通讯器是回忆知识动作的一部分。你必须手持该通讯器才能这样做。通讯器会立即汇编并显示与该主题相关的各种媒体中的片段和选录，从而给予你该加值。如果你在此次检定中掷出重度失败，则改为失败。如果检定成功且对象是生物，你会获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。你一旦查阅该通讯器，此法术便结束。当此法术结束时，你对阿卡西记录的访问也会终止，而你下载的所有信息都会返回阿卡西记录。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{法术效果：阿卡西下载}

升阶（3环） 此法术结束前，你可以查阅你的通讯器三次。

You execute a psychic search of the Akashic Record for information about a specific topic and magically transfer this data to your comm unit or computer. When you Cast this Spell, choose any skill in which you're trained that has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action.

Any time during the duration, you can consult your comm unit while attempting a Recall Knowledge check using your chosen skill. This check gains a +1 status bonus. Checking your comm unit is part of the action to Recall Knowledge. You must be holding the comm unit to do so. The comm unit instantly compiles and displays snippets and selections from various media relevant to the topic, which grants you the bonus. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the check is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature. Once you reference the comm unit, the spell ends. When the spell ends, your access to the Akashic Record ends, and all the information you downloaded returns to the Akashic Record.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{Spell Effect: Akashic Download}

Heightened (3rd) You can reference your comm unit three times before the spell ends.

Daze.name: 晕眩术 Daze
Daze.description:
你侵入目标的精神，利用精神冲击令目标晕眩。该冲击造成1d6心灵伤害，具有基础意志豁免。如果目标在豁免中大失败，它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 该伤害增加1d6。

Dream of Home.name: 故乡之梦 Dream of Home
Dream of Home.description:
你唤起一个生物对家园的思绪，以及它从这一概念中获得的慰藉，让其被关于“家”的含义的怅惘回忆所淹没。目标必须成功通过一次意志豁免，否则会因这些回忆而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}。

You draw on a creature's thoughts of home and the comfort it finds in that concept, overwhelming the creature with wistful memories of whatever home means to it. The target must succeed at a Will save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the memories.

Eldritch Lance.name: 秘法长枪 Eldritch Lance
Eldritch Lance.description:
你将来自群星之间黑暗空间、足以侵袭心智的诡秘能量凝聚成一道光束，并将其射向目标。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若命中，你造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若为重击成功，则伤害翻倍。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d6。

You condense a beam of mind-assaulting eldritch energy from the dark spaces between the stars and fire it at a target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's AC. If you hit, you deal 2d6 mental damage. On a critical success, you deal double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Mind Skewer.name: 心灵穿刺 Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
你用大量灵能信息或神圣裁决使一个生物的心智超载。此次精神猛袭造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若重度失败，目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，持续 1 轮。

强化（+1） 伤害提高 2d6。

You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Mindlink.name: 讯息传递 Mindlink
Mindlink.description: 你将你和目标的精神链接在一起，并且将通常需要10分钟来交流的信息在一瞬间通过精神传递给对方。

Shield.name: 护盾 Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一面力场构成的魔法护盾。这视同你使用了举起盾牌动作，赋予你在AC上的+1环境加值，直到你的下个回合开始，但这里不需要手来使用。

当该法术生效时，你可以使用你的魔法护盾来进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡 Shield Block}反应动作。该盾牌具有硬度5。你可以使用该法术的反应动作来减少任何来自法术或者魔法效果的伤害，即使这不造成物理伤害。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，并且你无法在10分钟内再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

升阶（+2） 该盾牌的硬度增加5。

Atavistic Rage.name: 返祖狂怒 Atavistic Rage
Atavistic Rage.description:
触发条件 梦者的生命值降至其生命值总数的一半或以下

效果 受伤的梦者爆发出一种骇人的灵能力狂怒状态，要求位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内的所有非梦者进行一次 @Check[will|dc:24] 豁免。梦者的攻击检定和伤害掷骰获得 +2 状态加值，持续 1 分钟，但不能使用其先天法术。在其停止狂暴后，梦者 1 分钟内无法再次进入返祖狂怒。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

大失败 该生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 3}，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃窜}，持续 1 轮。

Trigger The Dreamer is reduced to half or less than half their total Hit Points

Effect The injured Dreamer erupts into a terrifying state of psychic fury, requiring all non-Dreamers in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] to attempt a @Check[will|dc:24] save. The Dreamer gains a +2 status bonus to attack and damage rolls for 1 minute but can't use their innate spells. After they stop raging, a Dreamer can't enter an Atavistic Rage again for 1 minute.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Sluggish Mind.name: 迟缓思维 Sluggish Mind
Sluggish Mind.description:
任何对梦者施加情绪或精神效果的生物都必须在一次 @Check[will|dc:24] 豁免中成功，否则其心智会被预言之歌的片段充满，并在接下来的 [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮} 内陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

Any creature that uses an emotion or mental effect on a Dreamer must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:24] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for the next [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} as fragments of prophetic songs fill its mind.

Synesthetic Shock.name: 联觉震击 Synesthetic Shock
Synesthetic Shock.description:
任何被织梦者触手击中的生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:24] 豁免，以抵抗一阵感官过度刺激的冲击。随后，该生物会暂时免疫所有联觉冲击，持续1分钟。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物被压制，且直到其下个回合结束前处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}。

失败 同成功，但该生物还会直到其下个回合结束前处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。

大失败 同失败，但持续时间为2轮，且该生物还会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2}。

Any creature struck by a Dreamer's tentacle must attempt a @Check[will|dc:24] save to resist a wave of sensory overstimulation. The creature is then temporarily immune to all synesthetic shocks for 1 minute.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is suppressed and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the end of its next turn.

Failure As success, but the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of its next turn.

Critical Failure As failure, but with a duration of 2 rounds, and the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Dreamer.publicNotes:
在利亚瓦拉桃色的云层间翩然起舞的是梦者——飞螅族那些拥有灵能天赋的近亲。梦者并非利亚瓦拉的原生居民，他们最初是飞螅族探险者。早在大断层之前很久，他们便乘着最早的一艘活体奥玛飞船之一来到这里。究竟是什么改变了他们，至今仍无人知晓，不过从那以后，飞螅族这个族群便一直极力保护他们那些具有预言能力的近亲。

梦者缺乏飞螅族那种将意识结合起来的能力，也不像他们那样拥有集体主义文化。尽管如此，梦者仍常常结队成群，在利亚瓦拉的天空中翩然游弋。对协约世界的大多数居民而言，他们只是个新奇景象；对飞螅族来说，他们则是需要被保护的对象。而梦者自己似乎并不在意这种种关注，对周遭发生的一切既不上心，也不留意。

Dancing between Liavara's peach-colored clouds are the Dreamers, the psychically gifted cousins of barathus. Not native to Liavara, the Dreamers were originally barathu explorers. They arrived by sailing one of the first living oma-ships long before the Gap. What exactly transformed them is still unknown to this day, though barathus as a people have been extremely protective of their prophetic cousins ever since.

The Dreamers lack barathus' ability to combine consciousnesses as well as their collectivist culture. That said, the Dreamers often dance through the skies of Liavara in flotillas together. To most of the Pact Worlds, they're a curiosity. To barathus, they're charges to be protected. The Dreamers themselves seem unconcerned with any such attention, giving neither care nor notice as to what's going on around them.

Voidsage.name: 虚空贤者 Voidsage

Occult Innate Spells.name: 异能天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Eldritch Wrath.name: 邪异之怒 Eldritch Wrath
Eldritch Wrath.description:
你引导存在于物质宇宙最外层边缘之外的诡异力量，幻影般的利爪、巨颚和触手猛然扑向区域内的每个目标，对区域内每个生物造成3d12点精神伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试进行一次意志豁免。对于任何因该法术效果而陷入恶心状态的生物而言，该区域为困难地形。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d12。

You channel the bizarre powers that exist beyond the outer reaches of the universe, dealing 3d12 mental damage to each creature in the area as phantasmal claws, jaws, and tentacles lash out at each target. Each creature in the area must attempt a Will save. The area is difficult terrain for any creature sickened by the effects of this spell.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Hypnotize (at will).name: 催眠术（随意） Hypnotize (at will)
Hypnotize (at will).description:
你创造一个漂浮在空中的令人着迷的彩色图案云团。在云团中的生物@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩 Dazzled}。除此之外，在你施放时处于云团中的生物，进入云团中的生物，在云团中结束回合的生物，或者对云团使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索 Seek}或者交互动作的生物在此时必须尝试一次意志豁免。已经被@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated}的生物无需尝试新的豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标被该云团迷魂。

大失败 目标被该云团迷魂。只要其仍迷魂，它无法使用反应动作。

Mind Reading (at will).name: 读心术（随意） Mind Reading (at will)
Mind Reading (at will).description:
你通过一次短暂的心灵接触来尝试阅读目标的想法。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。目标会暂时免疫你的读心术1小时。

大成功 目标得知当施放该法术时你模糊的表层想法。

成功 你得知目标的智力调整值是高于，等于，还是低于你。

失败 你得知当施放该法术时目标模糊的表层想法，并且你得知目标的智力是高于，等于，还是低于你。

大失败 如失败，并且在法术持续时间中，你可以维持该法术来再次侦测目标的表层想法。目标不会获得另外的豁免。

Void Whispers.name: 虚空低语 Void Whispers
Void Whispers.description:
目标听到来自群星之外、蕴含不可言说奥秘的不祥声响，使其心智陷入迷乱。目标必须进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 目标听见这些怪异的低语，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续1轮。

失败 目标开始漫无目的地游荡，将每个动作都用于向随机方向进行调整步。当它移动时，目标会选择最安全的路线，且不会进入危险地形。该法术持续1分钟，或直到某个生物对目标使用敌对动作。

大失败 如同失败，但目标会语无伦次地胡言乱语。任何在其回合开始时位于目标20尺内的生物都必须进行一次意志豁免检定。若失败，它必须在其下一回合将第一个动作用于向随机方向进行调整步，并对此法术免疫24小时。这是一个无力化效果。

The target hears ominous sounds containing unspeakable mysteries from beyond the stars that disorient its mind. The target attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target hears the strange whispers, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target begins to wander aimlessly, using each action to Step in a random direction. When it moves, the target takes the safest route and doesn't enter hazardous terrain. The spell has a duration of 1 minute or until a creature uses a hostile action against the target.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target babbles incoherently. Any creature that begins its turn within 20 feet of the target must attempt a Will saving throw. On a failure, it must use its first action on its next turn to Step in a random direction and becomes immune to this spell for 24 hours. This is an incapacitation effect.

Logic Bomb.name: 逻辑炸弹 Logic Bomb
Logic Bomb.description:
你向目标植入一个含有海量信息、足以令人头脑炸裂的隐患。该隐患的隐匿和解除 DC 等于你的法术 DC，且需要一次成功的 @Check[computers] 检定才能解除。第一次有生物试图访问、摧毁或以其他方式操纵目标却未成功时（例如使用计算机技能、以一次打击未命中，或其他情况），逻辑炸弹会引爆，该生物受到 6d6 点精神伤害，并进行一次基础意志豁免。该法术会在被触发或持续时间结束时终止，以先发生者为准。

强化（+1） 伤害提高 2d6。

You implant a hazard containing a mind-blowing amount of information into the target. The hazard has a Stealth and Disable DC equal to your spell DC and requires one successful @Check[computers] check to disable. The first time a creature unsuccessfully attempts to access, destroy, or otherwise manipulate the target (such as using the Computers skill, failing to hit with a Strike, or otherwise), logic bomb detonates, and the creature takes 6d6 mental damage with a basic Will save. The spell ends when it's triggered or the duration ends, whichever comes first.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Skim Data (at will).name: 略读数据（随意） Skim Data (at will)
Skim Data (at will).description:
你触碰一个物体，并专注于其中包含的一组数据，例如故事、信息、文件、信息圈站点、音频记录或视频。你会理解这组数据的大意，并且能够迅速定位与你搜索最相关的页面或章节。若该数据集是以你不懂的语言书写或以其他方式传达，或者你试图从一台你无权访问的计算机中获取信息（例如一台设有你不知道密码的计算机），则该法术失败。

如果你将施放此法术作为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{研究} 活动的一部分，则你将一次严重失败改为失败。

You touch one object and concentrate on a dataset contained within it, such as a story, message, file, infosphere site, audio recording, or video. You understand the gist of the dataset and can quickly locate the most relevant pages or sections to your search. If the dataset is written or otherwise communicated in a language you don't know, or you attempt to gain information from a computer you don't have access to (such as one with a password you don't know), the spell fails.

If you Cast this Spell as part of a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{Research} activity, you treat a critical failure as a failure instead.

Akashic Download.name: 阿卡西下载 Akashic Download
Akashic Download.description:
你对阿卡西记录执行一次灵能检索，以获取关于特定主题的信息，并将这些数据以魔法方式传输到你的通讯器或计算机中。施放该法术时，选择一项你已受训且具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 动作的技能。

在持续时间内的任意时刻，当你尝试使用所选技能进行一次回忆知识检定时，你都可以查阅你的通讯器。此次检定获得+1状态加值。查阅通讯器是回忆知识动作的一部分。你必须手持该通讯器才能这样做。通讯器会即时编译并显示与该主题相关的各类媒体中的片段与摘录，从而使你获得该加值。若你在此次检定中掷出大失败，则改为失败。若该检定成功且对象是生物，你会获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。你一旦查阅该通讯器，此法术便结束。当法术结束时，你对阿卡西记录的访问也随之终止，而你下载的所有信息都会返回阿卡西记录。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{法术效果：阿卡西下载}

升阶（3环） 在法术结束前，你可以查阅你的通讯器三次。

You execute a psychic search of the Akashic Record for information about a specific topic and magically transfer this data to your comm unit or computer. When you Cast this Spell, choose any skill in which you're trained that has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action.

Any time during the duration, you can consult your comm unit while attempting a Recall Knowledge check using your chosen skill. This check gains a +1 status bonus. Checking your comm unit is part of the action to Recall Knowledge. You must be holding the comm unit to do so. The comm unit instantly compiles and displays snippets and selections from various media relevant to the topic, which grants you the bonus. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the check is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature. Once you reference the comm unit, the spell ends. When the spell ends, your access to the Akashic Record ends, and all the information you downloaded returns to the Akashic Record.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{Spell Effect: Akashic Download}

Heightened (3rd) You can reference your comm unit three times before the spell ends.

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你专注于目标，在魔法全息影像显示信息的同时收集数据。施法完成后，你会获知关于目标的生物识别信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况以及其他基本生理信息。你，或任何你告知了该分析内容的人，在对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充}的检定、对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势}的检定，以及对其进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}的检定时，获得+1状态加值。如果目标是虚幻之物，或正处于幻术魔法的影响下，只有当该效果的阶级低于你的分析目标法术阶级时，你才能察觉到这一点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{法术效果：分析目标}

强化（3环） 状态加值提高至+2，且你最多可以将10个生物作为目标。

强化（6环） 状态加值提高至+3，且你可以将任意数量的生物作为目标。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Delete (at will).name: 解除（随意） Delete (at will)
Delete (at will).description:
你以一个夸张华丽的魔法手势删除装置或物体中的数据。这些数据可能是手写的、印刷的，或是数字形式的。你最多可以删除相当于 1,500 个词的文本、一页内容，或一整块显示屏上的文本或其他视觉信息。无人持有或仅被持有的物体内或其上的非魔法文字会被自动删除。尝试进行一次反制检定以删除数字或魔法文字。若你未能删除作为一个危害一部分的文字，你会触发该危害。此法术不能用于删除法术书或类似用于储存魔法公式或法术的载体中的内容。

如果你的目标是一个具有追踪特征的有人持用科技物品，则尝试进行一次反制检定。成功时，该物品变为故障 1。持有该物品的生物可以执行【互动】来重启软件，使故障值降低 1。

升阶（7环） 你可以删除单个装置或书籍中本地储存的全部数据，或删除装置或书籍上与某个特定名称、主题或类别相关的全部数据。

You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Eldritch Lance.name: 秘法长枪 Eldritch Lance
Eldritch Lance.description:
你将来自群星之间黑暗空隙中的一束侵袭心智的异界能量凝聚起来，并将其射向一个目标。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若你命中，则造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若大成功，则造成双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d6。

You condense a beam of mind-assaulting eldritch energy from the dark spaces between the stars and fire it at a target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's AC. If you hit, you deal 2d6 mental damage. On a critical success, you deal double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Implant Data.name: 植入数据 Implant Data
Implant Data.description:
你重新编程一台计算机或装置，使其在被访问时显示一条你选择的数据。每个法术环阶最多可以植入一条数据。一条数据可以是一个简单事实，例如某个生物或物体的位置或外观描述；某个生物或物体的图像；或一段不超过300个字符的简单陈述。当目标计算机或装置被访问时，这条植入的数据会成为访问该装置的生物首先获得的数据，无论该生物正在寻找什么数据。植入的数据不会阻止生物访问装置中存储的其他信息，不会改变装置的运作方式，也不会以其他方式妨碍装置运作。如果在有生物访问植入数据之前该法术的持续时间结束，则该信息会消失。

升阶（3环） 持续时间为一年。

升阶（6环） 持续时间无限。

You reprogram a computer or device to display a chosen piece of data when accessed. You can implant up to one piece of data per spell rank. A piece of data can be a simple fact, such as a creature or object's location or physical description; an image of a creature or object; or a simple statement of no more than 300 characters. When the target computer or device is accessed, this implanted data is the first data the accessing creature gains, regardless of what data the creature is looking for. Implanted data doesn't prevent a creature from accessing other information stored on a device, change how the device functions, or otherwise inhibit the device from functioning. If this spell's duration ends before a creature accesses the implanted data, the information vanishes.

Heightened (3rd) The duration is one year.

Heightened (6th) The duration is unlimited.

Mind Skewer.name: 心灵穿刺 Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
你以过量的灵能信息或神圣裁决令一个生物的心智超载。此次精神猛攻造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若重度失败，目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，持续 1 轮。

强化（+1） 伤害提高 2d6。

You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Nanite Projection.name: 纳米虫群投射 Nanite Projection
Nanite Projection.description:
虚空贤者可以共享受其量子纳米体影响的生物的感官，并读取其表层思维。虚空贤者一次只能将自己的心智投射到一个生物身上，并且可以用一个具有专注特征的单一动作，选择哪个受影响的生物作为其纳米体投射的焦点。只要该生物是虚空贤者纳米体投射的焦点，它对虚空贤者任何法术的意志豁免都会承受 –1 情境减值。

A voidsage can share the senses and read the surface thoughts of creatures affected by their quantum nanites. A voidsage can project its mind into just one creature at a time, and choose which affected creature is the focus of its nanite projection as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. The creature also takes a –1 circumstance penalty to Will saves against any of the voidsage's spells as long as it's the focus of the voidsage's nanite projection.

Nanite Network.name: 纳米机器人网络 Nanite Network
Nanite Network.description:
5英尺。虚空贤者会散发出一团纳米机器云。进入该灵光或在该灵光中开始其回合的生物会暴露于量子纳米机器。

5 feet. A voidsage exudes a cloud of nanites. A creature entering the aura or starting its turn in the aura is exposed to quantum nanites.

Revert.name: 还原 Revert
Revert.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 虚空贤者在投映期间受到伤害

效果 虚空贤者停止投映，并获得 50 点持续 10 分钟的临时生命值。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger The voidsage takes damage while projecting

Effect The voidsage stops projecting and gains 50 temporary Hit Points that last for 10 minutes.

Quantum Nanites.name: 量子纳米机器人 Quantum Nanites
Quantum Nanites.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:24]

最长持续时间 1天

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（1天）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 3}（1天）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 4}和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}（1天）

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:24]

Maximum Duration 1 day

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 day)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3} (1 day)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 4} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} (1 day)

Lore (any one subcategory).name: 学识（任一子类别） Lore (any one subcategory)

Voidsage.publicNotes:
虚空贤者是那些在年轻时的战斗中保留完整纳米网络而幸存下来的阿尔古苏。在吞食了许多同类的纳米体后，虚空贤者的网络会变得足够强大，以控制一台远程战争机器。

Voidsages are alghollthus who survived the battles of youth with an intact nanite network. After consuming many of their peers' own nanites, a voidsage's network grows strong enough to control a remote war machine.

Diaspora Worm.name: 流散带蠕虫 Diaspora Worm

Electrocommunication.name: 电通讯 Electrocommunication
Electrocommunication.description:
流散带蠕虫通过塑造和读取电磁场进行交流。对于具有这种能力的生物，这如同心灵感应。

Diaspora worms communicate by shaping and reading electromagnetic fields. This functions like telepathy with creatures that share this ability.

Electromagnetic Sight.name: 电磁视觉 Electromagnetic Sight
Electromagnetic Sight.description:
流散带蠕虫通过读取电磁场来感知周围环境，包括由生物或物体引起的扰动。这是一种在所列范围内的精确感官。强烈的电磁场，例如释放辐射的区域或带有电流灵光的区域，会使其中的生物对流散带蠕虫而言处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态。

Diaspora worms sense their surroundings by reading electromagnetic fields, including disruptions caused by creatures or objects. This is a precise sense within the listed range. Intense fields, such as areas emitting radiation or auras of electricity, make creatures within them @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to the diaspora worm.

Electromagnetic Blindness.name: 电磁盲目症 Electromagnetic Blindness
Electromagnetic Blindness.description:
受到电击伤害的流散带蠕虫必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:23] 豁免。

大成功 蠕虫不受影响。

成功 蠕虫陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1轮。

失败 蠕虫陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 1轮。

大失败 蠕虫先失明1轮，然后目眩1轮。

Diaspora worms that take electricity damage must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save.

Critical Success The worm is unaffected.

Success The worm is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The worm is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The worm is blinded for 1 round, then dazzled for 1 round.

Darkwater Veil.name: 暗水帷幕 Darkwater Veil
Darkwater Veil.description:
需求 流散带蠕虫位于水中

效果 蠕虫改变 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 内水的结构，形成吸光纳米管。该区域随蠕虫移动，并持续 1 分钟。该散发会使非魔法光源失效，并自动尝试反制魔法光源（反制阶位 4，反制修正 [[/r 1d20+17 #Counteract]]{+17}）。该区域还会为其中的生物提供来自外部生物的掩护，反之亦然。

Requirements The diaspora worm is in water

Effect The worm alters the structure of water within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10], forming light-absorbing nanotubes. This field moves with the worm and lasts for 1 minute. The emanation deactivates non-magical light sources and automatically attempts to counteract magical light (counteract rank 4, counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+17 #Counteract]]{+17}). This field also provides cover for creatures inside of it from those outside, and vice versa.

Tongue Grab.name: 卷舌擒抓 Tongue Grab
Tongue Grab.description:
被流散带蠕虫的舌头命中的生物会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱}。生物可以对 AC 19 进行一次打击，且至少造成 @Damage[12[slashing]] 伤害，以切断这条舌头。这会使蠕虫在舌头重新长出之前无法使用其舌头打击；重新长出舌头需要 1 天。

A creature hit by the diaspora worm's tongue becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}. A creature can sever the tongue with a Strike against AC 19 that deals at least @Damage[12[slashing]] damage. This prevents the worm from using its tongue Strike until it regrows its tongue, which takes 1 day.

Tongue Reel.name: 卷舌轮 Tongue Reel
Tongue Reel.description:
需求 流散带蠕虫已用其舌头使一个生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{抓握}

效果 流散带蠕虫尝试将被抓握的生物 [[/act reposition]] 向自己拉近。若被抓握的生物被带到距离蠕虫 10 尺或更近处，蠕虫可以尝试将该生物整个吞下。

Requirements The diaspora worm has @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} a creature with its tongue

Effect The diaspora worm attempts to [[/act reposition]] the grabbed creature toward the worm. If the grabbed creature is brought to within 10 feet or less of the worm, the worm can attempt to Swallow Whole the creature.

Diaspora Worm.publicNotes:
流散带蠕虫形似长着獠牙的鳗鱼，以触须鬃毛代替眼睛。它们最初统治着一片漆黑海洋的深邃水域，而那片海洋后来变成了冰封的小行星尼西斯。蠕虫对闯入者的敌意，以及缺乏可观察的语言，使大多数人认为它们不过是野兽；但异种生物学家知道，这些蠕虫的触须会对电磁波作出反应，而它们正是借此进行视觉感知、交流并与周围环境互动。从蠕虫家园珊瑚礁中采集并回收的珊瑚样本所释放的生物电辐射，记录了蠕虫长达数千年的文化与历史，甚至早于流散带的形成。

这一物种的幼年个体尽管体型不小，却依然光滑、蜿蜒而敏捷。它们对电磁的操控使其能够短暂改变水的分子结构，让水变得如它们原本栖居的深渊一般浑浊。年轻的蠕虫往往会发动鲁莽大胆的攻击，往往需要数十年的经验，才会懂得更复杂策略的价值。

“太空蠕虫”并非科学术语，而是异种生物学上对一类复杂的无脊椎动物与野兽支系的统称，它们以浩瀚太空为家。其中一些——如流散带蠕虫和尘蠕虫——表现出智慧迹象，且彼此有直接亲缘关系。另一些——如苏尔诺奇——则是分别独立演化而来，其起源对科学而言完全未知。

Resembling fanged eels with manes of tendrils instead of eyes, diaspora worms originally ruled the inky depths of the ocean that later became the icy planetoid Nisis. The worms' hostility toward trespassers and lack of observable speech lead most people to consider them mere beasts, but xenobiologists know the worms' tendrils respond to electromagnetic waves, which they manipulate to see, communicate, and interact with their surroundings. Bioelectric radiation from coral samples recovered from the worms' home reef documents millennia of worm culture and history from even before the Diaspora's formation.

Juvenile members of this species are sleek, sinuous, and nimble despite their size. Their electromagnetic manipulation lets them briefly change the molecular structure of water, making it murky like their original depths. Young worms tend to commit brazen attacks, requiring decades of experience to value more complex strategies.

"Space worm" is a nonscientific term for a xenobiologically complex clade of invertebrate animals and beasts that make their home in the vastness of space. Some, like the diaspora and dust worms, show signs of intelligence and are directly related to each other. Others, like the surnoch, evolved separately, with their origins completely unknown to science.

Tool Rat.name: 工具鼠 Tool Rat

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术先天法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Inject Nanobots.name: 注入纳米机器人 Inject Nanobots
Inject Nanobots.description:
你将魔法纳米机器人注入一个生物体内。进行一次近战法术攻击检定。若命中，目标受到4d6点强酸伤害。若重击，目标受到双倍伤害，并因纳米机器人在其生物或机械系统中蜂拥肆虐而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 状态，持续1轮。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

You inject magical nanobots into a creature. Make a melee spell attack roll. On a hit, the target takes 4d6 acid damage. On a critical hit, the target takes double damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round as nanobots swarm through the target's biological or mechanical systems.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Instant Virus.name: 瞬时病毒 Instant Virus
Instant Virus.description:
你的触碰会植入一种危险的自我复制病毒，扰乱科技生物的程序。目标必须进行一次强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}。

失败 目标处于故障 1 且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

大失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2} 且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2}。

Your touch installs a dangerous self-replicating virus that disrupts a technological creature's programming. The target must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}.

Failure The target is glitching 1 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Electric Arc.name: 电弧击 Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一段电弧从一个目标跳跃到另一个目标。每个目标承受2d4电击伤害，这有一次基础反射豁免。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Mending.name: 修复术 Mending
Mending.description:
你修复目标物品。你回复目标每法术环级5点生命值，并且如果修复达到了物品的破损阈值，会移除 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{破损 Broken} 状态。你无法代替丢失的组成部分，或者修复已经完全损毁的物体。

升阶（2环级） 你能以1负载或者更低的非魔法物品为目标。

升阶（3环级） 你能以2负载或者更低的非魔法物品为目标，或者1负载或者更低的魔法物品为目标。

Recharge Weapon.name: 武器充能 Recharge Weapon
Recharge Weapon.description:
你触碰一把已无剩余弹药的武器，并以魔法能量为其充能。目标获得等同于其 expend 的弹药或充能，持续至你的下个回合结束，使任何持握该目标的人都能用该武器进行一次打击。该法术只能为使用单价 10 信用点或以下弹药的武器充能。

高环（3环） 目标获得等同于其 expend 两倍的弹药或充能。

高环（6环） 目标获得等同于其 expend 三倍的弹药或充能。

高环（9环） 目标获得等同于其 expend 四倍的弹药或充能。

You touch a weapon with no remaining ammunition and recharge it with magical energy. The target gains ammunition or charges equal to its expend until the end of your next turn, allowing anyone holding the target to make one Strike with the weapon. This spell only recharges weapons that use ammunition with a cost of 10 credits or less.

Heightened (3rd) The target gains ammunition or charges equal to double its expend.

Heightened (6th) The target gains ammunition or charges equal to triple its expend.

Heightened (9th) The target gains ammunition or charges equal to quadruple its expend.

Stumble.name: 踉跄 Stumble
Stumble.description:
一阵微重力爆发在目标周围引发震颤，将其拉向地面。目标必须进行一次反射豁免。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，持续1轮。若目标当时正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，则其向下坠落10英尺。

大失败 目标倒地 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。若目标当时正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，则其向下坠落20英尺。

强化（+1） 若目标坠落，则其在失败时额外坠落5英尺，在大失败时额外坠落10英尺。

A burst of microgravity causes a tremor around the target, pulling it toward the ground. The target must attempt a Reflex save.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 10 feet downward.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 20 feet downward.

Heightened (+1) If the target falls, it falls an additional 5 feet on a failure and 10 feet on a critical failure.

Supercharge Weapon.name: 超充武器 Supercharge Weapon
Supercharge Weapon.description:
你从周围汲取并凝聚环境中的魔法能量，为一把武器充能。下次使用那把武器进行的打击会被超充。那次打击会额外造成 1d6 点与该武器通常伤害相同类型的伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.zzOekbiIKePQDQKy]{法术效果：超充武器}

升阶（+2） 额外伤害提高 1d6。

You draw in and condense ambient magical energy from around you to power up a weapon. The next Strike made using that weapon is supercharged. That Strike deals an additional 1d6 damage of the same type as the weapon's normal damage.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.zzOekbiIKePQDQKy]{Spell Effect: Supercharge Weapon}

Heightened (+2) The extra damage increases by 1d6.

Scoring.name: 计分 Scoring
Scoring.description:
当工具鼠的尾击对物体或具有科技特征的生物造成伤害时，该尾巴也会获得以下特征，直到废料鼠的下个回合开始：致命 d4、妨碍和摧毁。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.GpzaKY9WlDFAhgcg]{效果：刻痕}

When the tool rat's tail Strike deals damage to an object or creature with the tech trait, the tail also gains the following traits until the beginning of the scrap rat's next turn: deadly d4, hampering, and razing.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.GpzaKY9WlDFAhgcg]{Effect: Scoring}

Upscaled Recycling.name: 升级再利用 Upscaled Recycling
Upscaled Recycling.description:
经过 1 小时不间断的工作，工具鼠仅用废料就能组装出一件任意类型的简易战术武器，等级最高为 2 级，包括一块 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.0jSc8zqUPnAByMf9]{商用电池} 或一个装满的投射武器弹匣。它会在 10 分钟后散架，并变成无法使用的废料。

Over the course of 1 hour of uninterrupted work, a tool rat can assemble a simple tactical weapon of any type, up to 2nd level, including a single @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.0jSc8zqUPnAByMf9]{commercial battery} or a full magazine of projectile ammunition. using nothing but junk. It falls apart and becomes unusable junk after 10 minutes.

Tool Rat.publicNotes:
工具鼠看起来像是同类的幼崽，但仔细观察就会发现它们有着铜色的胡须，宛如矮人的胡子和眉毛。凭借直觉性的法术技艺，它们能把废品场变成让粗心者步步惊心的雷区

当成堆的金属垃圾开始侵占荒野时，啮齿动物便征服了这些垃圾。废料鼠适应了一切会丢弃损坏装置和工业残骸的文明，而这些东西都会被老鼠回收再利用，并可能产生致命的效果。虽然它们并不特别聪明，但天生就很擅长制作。

The tool rat resembles an infant of their kind, but closer study reveals coppery whiskers akin to a dwarven beard and eyebrows. Intuitive spellcraft helps them turn junkyards into minefields for the unwary

When pileups of metal garbage begin to conquer the wilderness, rodents conquer the garbage. Scrap rats adapt to every civilization that disposes their ruined gadgets and industrial debris, all of which the rats recycle and reuse to potentially deadly effect. While not especially intelligent, they have an innate knack for crafting.

Aeon Guard Trooper.name: 万古卫队士兵 Aeon Guard Trooper
Aeon Guard Trooper.tokenName: 万古卫队士兵 Aeon Guard Trooper

Frag Grenade (Commercial).name: 破片手雷（商用型） Frag Grenade (Commercial)
Frag Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 @Damage[1[bleed]]

这些破片手雷爆炸时会形成一团弹片云，并在一个 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内造成1d8点穿刺伤害，可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 1d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Aeon Guard armor.name: 万古卫队护甲 Aeon Guard armor
Aeon Guard armor.description:
升级： 1

这款传统护甲由层层叠加、既柔韧又坚固的甲片构成，是卡斯卓韦上拉申塔人骑兵所穿戴的护甲。过去，shotalashu骑兵会用其坐骑蜕下的皮来打造自己的护甲；更罕见的情况下，则会使用阵亡坐骑的皮革，以此在未来的战斗中向它们致敬。在卡斯卓韦的某些地区，合成仿制品也很时髦。

Upgrades: 1

Flexible but sturdy plates layered together form this traditional armor worn by lashunta cavalry on Castrovel. In times past, a shotalashu cavalry member forged their armor from their mount's shed skin, or more rarely, the skin of a fallen mount, to honor them in future battles. Synthetic imitations are fashionable on some parts of Castrovel.

Darkvision Visor.name: 黑暗视觉面罩 Darkvision Visor
Darkvision Visor.description:
这副面罩环绕你的视觉器官，增强你的天然感官。你获得黑暗视觉。

This visor wraps around your visual organs, enhancing your natural senses. You gain darkvision.

Frag Grenade.name: 破片手雷 Frag Grenade
Frag Grenade.description:
重度失败时 @Damage[1[流血]|options:area-damage]

@Damage[1[bleed]|options:area-damage] on critical failure

Coordinated Fire.name: 协同火力 Coordinated Fire
Coordinated Fire.description:
在士兵对一个目标尝试进行一次打击后（无论成功还是失败），该士兵的一名盟友随后对同一目标进行的下一次攻击检定获得 +2 情境加值。若一次因协同火力获得加值的打击命中，则该目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{压制}，直到进行攻击的盟友的下个回合结束。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.x9nA4lIcHmE7x8Tt]{效果：协同火力}

After the trooper attempts a Strike against a target (regardless of success or failure), the next attack roll one of the trooper's allies makes against the same target gains a +2 circumstance bonus. If a Strike with a bonus from coordinated fire hits, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the end of the attacking ally's next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.x9nA4lIcHmE7x8Tt]{Effect: Coordinated Fire}

Sharpshooter.name: 神枪手 Sharpshooter
Sharpshooter.description:
当士兵对因较弱掩护或标准掩护而获得 AC 加值的目标进行一次远程打击时，该目标此次打击的 AC 加值减少 1。

When the trooper makes a ranged Strike against a target with an AC bonus from lesser or standard cover, they reduce the AC bonus by 1 for that Strike.

Show No Mercy.name: 毫不留情 Show No Mercy
Show No Mercy.description:
士兵对@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{被压制}目标的伤害掷骰获得+2环境加值。

The trooper gains a +2 circumstance bonus to damage rolls against @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} targets.

Aeon Guard Trooper.publicNotes:
万古卫队的普通士兵很容易辨认，他们身着独特的绿色护甲，由陶瓷与聚碳酸酯板构成，外覆一层能量反射分子涂层。万古卫队成员还经常用万古石升级自己的护甲，这使他们与“低等”军队的士兵进一步区分开来。

即便是最新入伍的新兵，也都曾向万古王座宣誓效忠——阿兹兰特星际帝国的叛徒或逃兵极其罕见。这些士兵彼此之间也同样忠诚，并且受过高度训练，能够以协调一致的队形作战；他们毫无疑问地服从指挥官的命令，即使这些命令意味着必死无疑。

Rank-and-file Aeon Guard troopers are easily identified by their distinctive green armor consisting of ceramic and polycarbonate plates overlaid with an energy-reflective molecular coating. Aeon Guards frequently upgrade their armor with aeon stones, further distinguishing them from soldiers of "lesser" armies.

Even the newest recruits have sworn personal oaths of loyalty to the Aeon Throne—a traitor or deserter of the Azlanti Star Empire is extraordinarily rare. These troopers are also loyal to one another and highly trained to fight in coordinated formations, and they obey their commanding officers without question, even if their orders mean certain death.

Thermatrod.name: 温控炉虎机് Thermatrod

Temperature Sense.name: 温度感知 Temperature Sense
Temperature Sense.description:
温感棒能够精确感知附近的温度变化，并以此作为精准感官来侦测生物和其他热源。

A thermatrod can detect nearby changes in temperature as a precise sense to detect living creatures and other heat sources.

Melting Aura.name: 熔融灵光 Melting Aura
Melting Aura.description:
10英尺。回合开始时位于此灵光内的生物受到 @Damage[1d6[fire]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:17|basic] 豁免）。

10 feet. A creature that begins its turn within this aura takes @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:17|basic] save).

Slag Barrage.name: 熔渣弹幕 Slag Barrage
Slag Barrage.description:
炽渣兽将其熔融核心的一部分喷射成一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:15]，并在片刻后硬化。区域内的每个生物受到 @Damage[4d6[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] 豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身} 状态（[[/act escape dc=20]]）。炽渣兽在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Slag Barrage]]{1d4 轮}内无法再次使用熔渣齐射。

The thermatrod sprays part of its molten core in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] that hardens moments later. Each creature in the area takes @Damage[4d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] save). A creature that fails the save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} ([[/act escape dc=20]]). The thermatrod can't use Slag Barrage again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Slag Barrage]]{1d4 rounds}.

Thermatrod.publicNotes:
标准热棒兽栖息于火山喷口附近及其他强热源周围。

热棒兽最初被认为是来自火元素位面的流放者，但实际上，它们是在物质宇宙中多个恒星系里独立演化出来的。热棒兽看起来像一种熔融的双足生物，不过它们常以前肢指节着地行走，以支撑沉重的身躯。热棒兽有着独特的隆起背板，形似六边形玄武岩柱，研究人员据此估算个体的年龄。热棒兽的硬化外壳因构成其食物来源的当地矿物沉积不同而有很大差异。

A standard thermatrod dwells near volcanic vents and other sources of intense heat.

Originally thought to be exiles from the Plane of Fire, thermatrods actually developed independently in multiple star systems in the Universe. A thermatrod resembles a molten bipedal creature, though they often walk on their front knuckles to support their heavy frames. Thermatrods sport distinctive raised dorsal plates that resemble hexagonal basalt columns, which researchers use to estimate an individual's age. A thermatrod's hardened exterior varies greatly based on local mineral deposits that make up a thermatrod's diet.

Trained Squox.name: 受训的松鼠狐 Trained Squox
Trained Squox.tokenName: 受过训练的松鼠狐 Trained Squox

Go for the Eyes!.name: 攻击眼睛！ Go for the Eyes!
Go for the Eyes!.description:
松鼠狐进行移动，尝试进行一次 @Check[acrobatics|against:perception] 检定，对抗一个相邻生物的察觉DC，然后进行一次颚部打击。

大成功 由于松鼠狐突然跃起，目标措手不及，直到松鼠狐下个回合结束。

成功 目标只是短暂地受到了惊吓，并且直到松鼠狐当前回合结束前处于措手不及状态。

大失败 松鼠狐误判了到目标脸部的距离并倒地 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

The squox Strides, attempts an @Check[acrobatics|against:perception] check against an adjacent creature's Perception DC, and then makes a jaws Strike.

Critical Success Thrown by the squox's sudden leap, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of the squox's next turn.

Success The target is only momentarily startled and is off-guard until the end of the squox's current turn.

Critical Failure The squox misjudges the distance to its target's face and falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Squox Tricks.name: 松鼠狐把戏 Squox Tricks
Squox Tricks.description:
松鼠狐可以用它的尾巴对生物执行 [[/act disarm skill=acrobatics]] 和 [[/act trip skill=acrobatics]]，以特技代替运动，即使它没有空闲手也是如此。松鼠狐可以尝试对体型比它大至多两个级别的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 生物执行缴械或绊摔，并且对措手不及的目标执行缴械或绊摔时获得 +2 处境加值

A squox can [[/act disarm skill=acrobatics]] and [[/act trip skill=acrobatics]] creatures with its tail using Acrobatics instead of Athletics, even if it doesn't have a free hand. A squox can attempt to Disarm or Trip @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures up to two sizes larger than it and gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Disarm or Trip an off-guard target

Trained Squox.publicNotes:
微小的弗卡里基斯是协约世界常见的一种动物，原产于卡斯卓韦星球。来自失落戈拉里昂的人类探险者给它们取名为“松鼠狐”，因为他们认为这种生物像是狐狸和松鼠的混合体。松鼠狐狡猾到近乎奸诈的地步，并会使用恐吓手段，惯常偷走它们在旅行途中发现的闪亮物品。它们表现出复杂的社会行为，包括一群潜行队个体之间明确的等级关系，还拥有庞大的发声 repertoire，用来为不同的松鼠狐个体分配标志性的声音。

松鼠狐早已从协约世界被输出到各地，如今遍布整个银河；近宇中的许多文明都维持着这些毛茸茸小生物日益壮大的群体，这让异星卫士愈发忧心，因为他们担心这种适应力极强的松鼠狐已经在数种生物群系中成为入侵物种。尽管有些人主张扑杀这些种群，但这种动物作为宠物的高人气，使这种观点极不受欢迎。

幼年松鼠狐被称为幼崽，在大多数协约世界都可以从公开市场购得。松鼠狐的寿命通常约为10年。典型的松鼠狐重约10磅，体长约3英尺，其中大部分长度来自它的尾巴。松鼠狐有各种各样的毛色，许多个体甚至会因特定气候而产生独特的环境适应，例如生活在沙漠中的松鼠狐会长出更长的耳朵以帮助散热。

The tiny vulkarikis are a common animal in the Pact Worlds, originating from the planet Castrovel. Human explorers from Lost Golarion gave them the name "squox," as they interpreted the creatures as being a mix of fox and squirrel. Squoxes are cunning to the point of being devious and employ scare tactics to routinely abscond with shiny items they uncover on their travels. They exhibit complex social behaviors, including a distinct hierarchy between individuals in a skulk, and have a vast vocal repertoire used to assign signature sounds to different individual squoxes.

Having long since been exported from the Pact Worlds, squoxes are found throughout the galaxy, with many civilizations in Near Space maintaining growing communities of these tiny furry creatures, much to the growing consternation of the Xenowardens who worry that the highly adaptable squox has become an invasive species in several biomes. While some advocate for culling these populations, the popularity of the animal as a pet has made this view an incredibly unpopular stance.

Young squoxes are referred to as kits and can be purchased from the open market on most Pact Worlds. Squoxes tend to live for about 10 years. A typical squox weighs about 10 pounds and is about 3 feet long, with much of its length being its tail. Squoxes come in all colorations, and many even take on unique environmental adaptations to specific climates, such as desert-dwelling squoxes growing longer ears to help disperse heat.

Othinni.name: 奥西尼 Othinni

Diabolic Pact (DC 36).name: 邪魔契约（DC 36） Diabolic Pact (DC 36)
Diabolic Pact (DC 36).description:
你恳请更强大的魔鬼，请求他派遣一些手下受你调遣。若你的仪式成功，魔鬼会根据自身的选择进行派遣，这可能是1个2级或更低等级的魔鬼、2个0级或更低等级的魔鬼、或者3个-1级或更低等级的魔鬼。

大成功 被派来的魔鬼会为你服务[[/gmr 1d4 #Weeks]]{1d4周}。

成功 被派来的魔鬼会为你服务[[/gmr 1d4 #Days]]{1d4天}。

失败 你的请求被拒绝了。

大失败 你的请求不仅被拒绝了，且强大的魔鬼会将自身的不满告知你的主人。

升阶（+1） 每个选项中为你派遣的魔鬼等级增加2级。

+2 Status Bonus Vs Magical Effects.name: 对魔法效应获得 +2 状态加值 +2 Status Bonus Vs Magical Effects

Abyssal Ink.name: 深渊墨水 Abyssal Ink
Abyssal Ink.description:
20英尺。othinni始终被一团有毒的黑色墨云包围。任何进入该灵气的生物，或在该灵气内开始其回合时，都必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:32] 豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2} 1分钟（若严重失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 3}）。

20 feet. The othinni is constantly surrounded by a cloud of poisonous black ink. Any creature that enters the aura or begins its turn inside the aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:32] save or becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} for 1 minute (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3} on a critical failure).

Infernal Origin.name: 地狱血统 Infernal Origin
Infernal Origin.description:
触发条件 othinni 成为具有圣洁特征的魔法效果的目标

效果 othinni 的炼狱符文骤然亮起，试图反制该效果（反制等级 7，反制调整值 [[/r 1d20+26 #Counteract]]{+26}）。

Trigger The othinni is targeted by a magical effect with the holy trait

Effect The othinni's infernal runes flare to life, attempting to counteract the effect (counteract rank 7, counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+26 #Counteract]]{+26}).

Infernal Binding.name: 炼狱束缚 Infernal Binding
Infernal Binding.description:
欧辛尼以邪魔符文束缚100尺内的一个生物，目标必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:32] 豁免。若失败，目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身} 1轮。若大失败，该生物会定身1分钟，但可以在其每个回合开始时重新进行一次豁免检定以结束该效果。

The othinni binds a creature within 100 feet with diabolic runes, and the target must attempt a @Check[will|dc:32] save. On a failure, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round. On a critical failure, the creature is immobilized for 1 minute but can attempt a new saving throw at the start of each of its turns to end the effect.

Psychic Screech.name: 灵能尖啸 Psychic Screech
Psychic Screech.description:
欧辛尼发出一阵精神哀嚎，作用于一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]。该区域内的所有生物都必须尝试进行一次 @Check[will|dc:32] 豁免。

大成功 无效果。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}，并在其处于恐慌期间陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑}。

大失败 如失败，但为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 3}。

The othinni unleashes a mental wail in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. All creatures in this area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:32] save.

Critical Success No effect.

Success The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for as long as it's frightened.

Critical Failure As failure, but @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Othinni.publicNotes:
沿着安布罗伊危机四伏的海域，居民们低声谈论着奥辛尼。一些人认为它只是神话，但据说这种体型巨大的类乌贼异怪身上带有不祥的发光符文，暗示着它们拥有地狱般的血统。那些被它们扭动的触手拖入深海、再被张开的巨口吞下的人，据说会直接坠入地狱；他们临终的惨叫，更助长了这些传说。

这些神话都是真的。奥辛尼拥有残忍的智慧，并能强力支配凡人的心智。幸存者会遭受令人不安的幻象、强烈的恐惧与混乱感，以及看见邪秽火焰在浪涛之上燃烧的景象。对任何敢于航行在安布罗伊海洋上的人来说，听见奥辛尼阴险的灵能尖啸，或驶入它们巨大的阴影之中，都是可怕的经历。

天使及其盟友会用巨大的圣洁鱼叉和附魔银网猎杀奥辛尼。一场传奇性的猎杀被记录在纪录片《Umiqon》（由丧媒体制作）中，这部影片以那头高达40英尺、最终被四名艾奥梅黛骑士击倒的怪物命名。

Along Embroi's perilous seas, residents speak in hushed tones of the othinni. Considered by some to be a myth, the enormous, squid-like aberrations supposedly bear sinister glowing runes suggestive of an infernal lineage. Those dragged into the deep by their writhing tentacles and swallowed by their gaping maws are said to go straight to Hell, their final screams fueling the legends.

The myths are true. Othinni possess a cruel intelligence and dominating influence over the minds of mortals. Survivors suffer disturbing visions, intense feelings of fear and confusion, and visions of unholy fire burning atop the waves. Hearing the insidious psychic screech of an othinni or sailing into their massive shadow is a frightful experience for anyone braving the oceans of Embroi.

Angels and their allies hunt othinni with massive holy harpoons and enchanted silver nets. One legendary hunt is recorded in the documentary film Umiqon (produced by Zo! Media), which is named for the 40-foot tall monster brought down by four Knights of Iomedae.

Ignurso.name: 伊格努尔索 Ignurso

Smoke Vision.name: 烟视觉 Smoke Vision
Smoke Vision.description:
焚灵兽无视来自烟雾的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状况。

The ignurso ignores the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition from smoke.

Lavaproof.name: 熔岩防护 Lavaproof
Lavaproof.description:
伊格努尔索免疫来自高温和熔岩的环境火焰伤害以及疲乏

The ignurso is immune environmental fire damage and fatigue from to heat and lava

Thermal Venting.name: 热量排放 Thermal Venting
Thermal Venting.description:
20尺。熏燃熊笼罩在一团烟雾与灰烬之云中。处于该灵气内的生物处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态，而处于灵气外的生物对于灵气内的生物而言也处于隐蔽状态。熏燃熊可以用单个动作停用或激活该灵气，该动作具有专注特征。

20 feet. The ignurso is shrouded in a cloud of smoke and ash. Creatures within the aura are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and creatures outside it are concealed to creatures within. The ignurso can deactivate or activate this aura as a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Mauler.name: 破军 Mauler
Mauler.description:
焚荒兽对其已使其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{（被）束缚} 状态的生物进行伤害掷骰时，获得 +3 处境加值。

The ignurso gains a +3 circumstance bonus to damage rolls against creatures it has @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}.

Spew Lava.name: 喷吐熔岩 Spew Lava
Spew Lava.description:
炎熊兽喷吐熔岩，形成一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]，造成 @Damage[6d6[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] 豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会受到 @Damage[1d6[persistent,fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害。炎熊兽在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Spew Lava]]{1d4 轮}内无法再次喷吐熔岩。

The ignurso expels lava in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30], dealing @Damage[6d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] save). A creature that fails its save also takes @Damage[1d6[persistent,fire]|options:area-damage] damage. The ignurso can't Spew Lava again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Spew Lava]]{1d4 rounds}.

Ignurso.publicNotes:
在活跃的地热区域探险的冒险者，可能会遇到这种极端栖息地中最独特的生物之一：焰熊兽。它们是熊科穴居动物，身躯部分覆盖鳞甲，并长有一根可怖的角。它们天性较为静伏，但一旦受到惊扰，它们的狂怒便兼具熊类扑杀的凶猛与火山碎屑流的高热。

焰熊兽经过特殊适应，能够在极端炎热的气候中生存，但凡是温暖之地都能繁盛生息。栖居于较不宜居星球上的个体，往往会待在地下，并在一年中最寒冷的时节冬眠。

焰熊兽天生是食腐动物，无法想当然地认为下一餐总会到手。不过，这些聪明的生物能够操纵周围环境来困住猎物。据观察，焰熊兽常会在火山喷发前不久挖出庞大的地道网络，似乎是因为它们明白熔岩流会沿着这条阻力最小的路径前进。这些隧道会化作赤红灼热的熔岩之河，恰好将奔逃的野生动物困住。待喷发最猛烈的阶段过去后，焰熊兽便会回来收取战利品。

焰熊兽对火山生态系统有着显著影响。掘穴的焰熊兽会打碎坚硬岩石——通常是喷发后新近沉积的岩层——从而启动土壤形成过程，而这一过程对于植物回归是必不可少的。有些个体挖得离地下岩浆房过近，结果使它们的地道变成释放熔岩与气体的火山喷气口。通过这种方式，它们大大降低了爆炸性、破坏性喷发发生的可能性，并为严酷环境提供了一种调节力量。

Adventurers exploring active geothermal areas might encounter one of the extreme habitat's most unique creatures: ignursos. These ursine burrowers are partially armored with scales and a fearsome horn. They're sedentary by nature, but when disturbed, their rage combines the ferocity of a bear mauling with the heat of a pyroclastic flow.

Ignursos are specially adapted to survive in extremely hot climates but thrive anywhere warm. Those that inhabit less hospitable planets tend to stay underground and hibernate during the coldest parts of the year.

Scavengers by nature, ignursos can't take their next meal for granted. However, these clever creatures can manipulate their environment to trap prey. Ignursos have been observed creating large networks of burrows right before volcanic eruptions, seemingly because they understand lava flows will follow this path of least resistance. These tunnels turn to rivers of red-hot lava perfectly positioned to strand fleeing wildlife. Ignursos then return for their spoils after the worst of the eruption has passed.

Ignursos have a significant impact on volcanic ecosystems. Burrowing ignursos break up solid rock—often freshly deposited after an eruption—kick-starting the process of soil formation that's necessary for the return of plants. Some dig too close to underground magma chambers, turning their tunnels into volcanic vents that release lava and gases. In this way, they make explosive, damaging eruptions much less likely and provide a moderating force on a harsh environment.

Warpstitcher.name: 曲跃编缝者 Warpstitcher

Occult Innate Spells.name: 神秘天赋法术 Occult Innate Spells

Truespeech (constant).name: 真言（恒常） Truespeech (constant)
Truespeech (constant).description:
无论什么语言，目标都可以理解其所有的词语，并且向其他生物用该语言交流。当处于一群各异的生物中时，每次目标将要说话，他可以选择一个生物，并使用一种该生物理解的语言来讲述，即使该目标不知道这语言具体是什么。

升阶（7环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Resist Reality.name: 抗拒现实 Resist Reality
Resist Reality.description:
触发条件 扭缝者将要受到伤害

效果 扭缝者获得对触发伤害类型的 12 点抗性，直到其下一回合开始。该抗性适用于此次触发的伤害。

Trigger The warpstitcher would take damage

Effect The warpstitcher gains resistance 12 to the triggering damage type until the start of their next turn. The resistance applies to the triggering damage.

Fold Reality.name: 折叠现实 Fold Reality
Fold Reality.description:
空间缝合师将自己与另一处地点之间的空间压缩。他们选择120英尺内一个10英尺见方的区域。随后，空间缝合师进行一次大步移动，将所选区域视为与自己相邻。

The warpstitcher collapses the space between themself and another location. They choose a 10-foot square within 120 feet. The warpstitcher then Strides, treating the chosen area as adjacent to them.

Threads of Quintessence.name: 第五元素丝线 Threads of Quintessence
Threads of Quintessence.description:
跃织者的爪中缠绕着精华丝线，它们会将这些丝线强行塞入受害者的伤口中。其效果等同于“擒抱”，若为重击则等同于“强化擒抱”。

The warpstitcher's claws are laced with strands of quintessence they force into victims' wounds. This functions as Grab, or Improved Grab on a critical hit.

Warp Suture.name: 扭曲缝合 Warp Suture
Warp Suture.description:
要求 扭缝者已使一个生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{（被）束缚}

效果 扭缝者将该生物缝入自己体内。该生物被拖拽进入扭缝者的空间，并随扭缝者一起移动。它陷入（被）束缚，且在其每个回合结束时受到 @Damage[3d12[force]] 伤害，直到被解救。此外，每当扭缝者使用“抗拒现实”时，它还会受到 @Damage[1d12[force]] 伤害（@Check[will|dc:34|basic] 豁免）。逃脱 DC 为 34（[[/act escape dc=34]]），或者也可以切断缝线（AC 25，硬度 8，HP 30，对挥砍伤害弱点 5）来解救该生物。扭缝者的身体内最多可以缝入总计 12 Bulk 的生物。若一个生物在被缝住期间死亡，其尸体会被扭缝者的身体吸收，并在 [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 轮} 后被摧毁。

Requirements The warpstitcher has a creature @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}

Effect The warpstitcher sews the creature into themself. The creature is pulled into the warpstitcher's space and moves with the warpstitcher. It becomes restrained and takes @Damage[3d12[force]] damage at the end of each of its turns until freed. Additionally, it takes @Damage[1d12[force]] damage whenever the warpstitcher uses Resist Reality (@Check[will|dc:34|basic] save). The Escape DC is 34 ([[/act escape dc=34]]), or the sutures can be severed (AC 25, Hardness 8, HP 30, weakness to slashing 5), freeing the creature. The warpstitcher can have up to 12 Bulk of creatures sewn into their body. The body of a creature that dies while sutured is absorbed into the warpstitcher's body and destroyed [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} later.

Warpstitcher.publicNotes:
扭缝者自称为存在的守护者，坚信自己是由诸神创造出来，用以将平行现实之间的空间缝合起来的。这些可怖的异怪会无情追猎任何它们怀疑利用魔法或科技改变多元宇宙结构的存在。一旦找到猎物，它们只会等待到足以确认怀疑的那一刻，随后便发动攻击。至于潜在威胁——比如初次尝试戏法的新手施法者，或研究星际旅行的学院理论家——则会先收到一道心灵感应警告，告知他们若将自己的尝试推进得太远，将会面临什么。除威胁之外的一切（无论是否潜在）都只是可供利用的工具，是扭缝者谎言与胁迫的目标。

它们仅仅是外貌就足以成为梦魇的燃料：昆虫般的肢体支撑着一个巨大而臃肿的躯干。它们背后伸出五条多节肢体，末端是邪恶的利爪，缠绕着现实本身的物质；它们用这些利爪刺穿猎物，再将其缝入自己的身体。这样不幸的生物会迅速溶解，也许借此为扭缝者提供维系，尽管那究竟是通过它们的血肉、思想，还是平行现实的潜能来实现，尚无人知晓。少数幸存者会被令人不安、挥之不去的幻象所折磨；另有更少一部分人则会看见更幸福的可能人生的幻象，从而获得平静，有时甚至得到前所未有的曲术师力量。

Warpstitchers are self-proclaimed guardians of existence, holding the belief that they were created by the gods to sew together the space between alternate realities. These horrifying aberrations relentlessly hunt anything they suspect abuses magic or technology to change the fabric of the multiverse. Once they find their quarry, they wait only long enough to confirm their suspicions before attacking. Potential threats—a neophyte spellcaster trying their first cantrips, an academic theorist exploring interstellar travel—instead earn a telepathic warning of what awaits should they pursue their efforts too far. Everything other than threats (potential or otherwise) is a possible tool, a target for warpstitcher lies and coercion.

Their mere appearance is fuel for nightmares, with insectile limbs supporting a massive, bulbous torso. From their back spring five multi-segmented limbs ending in wicked claws threaded with the very stuff of reality that they use to skewer their prey, who they then sew into their bodies. Such unfortunate creatures quickly dissolve, possibly sustaining the warpstitchers, though whether that's through their flesh, thoughts, or alternate reality potential is unknown. Those few who survive are plagued by disturbing, haunting visions; a smaller percentage instead see visions of happier possible lives, gaining peace and sometimes unprecedented witchwarper powers.

Deprimogon.name: 德普里莫贡 Deprimogon

Diabolic Pact (DC 27).name: 魔鬼契约（DC 27） Diabolic Pact (DC 27)
Diabolic Pact (DC 27).description:
你恳请更强大的魔鬼，请求他派遣一些手下受你调遣。若你的仪式成功，魔鬼会根据自身的选择进行派遣，这可能是1个2级或更低等级的魔鬼、2个0级或更低等级的魔鬼、或者3个-1级或更低等级的魔鬼。

大成功 被派来的魔鬼会为你服务[[/gmr 1d4 #Weeks]]{1d4周}。

成功 被派来的魔鬼会为你服务[[/gmr 1d4 #Days]]{1d4天}。

失败 你的请求被拒绝了。

大失败 你的请求不仅被拒绝了，且强大的魔鬼会将自身的不满告知你的主人。

升阶（+1） 每个选项中为你派遣的魔鬼等级增加2级。

Masked Emotions.name: 掩饰情感 Masked Emotions
Masked Emotions.description:
如果deprimogon没有佩戴面具，他们就会失去对情绪和精神效应的免疫。此外，未戴面具的沉默魔在对抗精神效应的豁免检定中，所采用的结果会比其掷骰结果低一级成功度。deprimogon的面具可以像其为手持物品一样被缴械。

The deprimogon loses their immunity to emotion and mental effects if they aren't wearing a mask. In addition, an unmasked silencer devil uses the outcome one degree of success worse than they roll on saving throws against mental effects. A deprimogon's mask can be Disarmed as if it were a held item.

Evoke Paranoia.name: 唤起偏执 Evoke Paranoia
Evoke Paranoia.description:
deprimogon将偏执与猜疑注入其武器，每次攻击都会向受害者心中灌输怀疑。被deprimogon的打击伤害的生物必须进行一次@Check[will|dc:27]豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响，并在1分钟内暂时免疫deprimogon的激发偏执。

成功 该生物不受影响，并在1轮内暂时免疫deprimogon的激发偏执。

失败 直到deprimogon下个回合开始前，该生物认为它所见的每个人都是潜在威胁。它对所有原本并非已经敌对的生物变为不友好，即使那些先前是盟友的生物也是如此。它不将任何人视为盟友。

大失败 如失败，但目标认为它所见的每个人都是不共戴天的死敌。它会按照GM的裁定，对所有人使用其反应与自由动作，无论这些人先前是否是它的盟友。除此之外，它的行动方式仍如平常一样理性，并且很可能会优先攻击那些正在攻击或阻碍它的生物，而非那些对它不加理会的生物。

The deprimogon infuses their weapons with paranoia and mistrust, instilling doubt in their victims with every attack. A creature damaged by a deprimogon's Strikes must attempt a @Check[will|dc:27] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and temporarily immune to the deprimogon's evoke paranoia for 1 minute.

Success The creature is unaffected and temporarily immune to the deprimogon's evoke paranoia for 1 round.

Failure Until the beginning of the deprimogon's next turn, the creature believes everyone it sees is a potential threat. It becomes unfriendly to all creatures to which it wasn't already hostile, even those who were previously allies. It treats no one as an ally.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target believes that everyone it sees is a mortal enemy. It uses its reactions and free actions against everyone, regardless of whether they were previously its allies, as determined by the GM. It otherwise acts as rationally as it normally does and likely prefers to attack creatures that are actively attacking or hindering it over those leaving it alone.

Infernal Disgrace.name: 地狱耻辱 Infernal Disgrace
Infernal Disgrace.description:
低阶魔神的打击视为具有魔法和邪秽属性。

The deprimogon's Strikes count as magical and unholy.

Silent Prison.name: 寂静监狱 Silent Prison
Silent Prison.description:
deprimogon 施放一个 6环的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Iela4GgVeO3LfAo]{力场墙}，能够抑制声音。任何移动过并在其回合开始时邻接这道墙的生物都必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:27] 豁免。若失败，该生物在邻接这道墙时不能说话，也不能使用任何具有音波或听觉特征的动作与效果；这也会阻止该生物施放法术，但隐秘法术除外。

The deprimogon casts a 6th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Iela4GgVeO3LfAo]{Wall of Force} that dampens sound. Any creature that moves and begins its turn adjacent to the wall must attempt a @Check[will|dc:27] save. On a failure, the creature can't speak and can't use any actions and effects with the sonic or auditory traits while adjacent to the wall; this also prevents the creature from casting spells, with the exception of subtle spells.

Deprimogon.publicNotes:
德普里莫贡潜伏于隐秘的隧道、昏暗的小巷，以及那些政府与地狱立下契约的聚居地中高耸的塔楼之间，悄无声息地监视公民是否有任何叛乱迹象。煽动者或自由战士会先遭到这些魔鬼的骚扰或追捕，随后被困住，从此永远消失。德普里莫贡以光滑的金属面具遮住面容，压抑自身的情感，隔绝任何可能使他们偏离使命的哀求、威胁或讨价还价。德普里莫贡乐于召唤来自早已被遗忘时代的炼狱生物来折磨囚犯。

在空间站的阴影中、法庭的大厅里，以及合作的办公室内，魔鬼以力量为诱饵引诱凡人，并为他们的征服铺设根基。魔鬼的契约形式各异，从精心拟定的合同到简短的许诺，但结局都如出一辙：凡人的灵魂遭受诅咒，而地狱的势力得以壮大。从马尔法涅的公开统治、安布罗伊的幕后操控，到与银河各处灵魂缔结的隐秘契约，魔鬼仍在不断推进他们毫不松懈的工作，传播暴政，并迫使物质宇宙变得如同他们故乡那地狱般的官僚体系。

Deprimogons stalk hidden tunnels, shadowed alleys, and looming towers of settlements whose governments have made infernal pacts as they silently monitor citizens for any signs of sedition. Agitators or freedom fighters are harassed or chased down and trapped by these devils before disappearing forever. Deprimogons hide their faces behind sleek metallic masks that suppress their own emotions, blocking out any pleas, threats, or bargaining that might dissuade them from their mission. Deprimogons delight in summoning diabolic creatures from eras long forgotten to torment their prisoners.

In the shadows of space stations, halls of courtrooms, and offices of corporations, devils tempt mortals with promises of power and lay the groundwork for their conquest. A devil's pacts can vary from elaborate contracts to quick promises, but they all end the same way: a mortal soul condemned, and Hell's forces bolstered. From the open rule of Malfane, the unseen control of Embroi, and hidden pacts with souls across the galaxy, devils continue their relentless work to spread tyranny and force the universe to resemble the hellish bureaucracy of their home.

Dredgelit.name: 渣光虫 Dredgelit

Fan Club.name: 粉丝俱乐部 Fan Club
Fan Club.description:
一只挖灯怪最多可与另外六个自愿的生物维持纽带。粉丝俱乐部中的生物始终知晓其他缔结纽带生物的大致距离和方向、影响其的任何状态，以及其是否处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死}，或已经死亡。粉丝俱乐部中的生物只要位于同一存在位面，便始终可以通过心灵感应交流。

A dredgelit maintains a bond with up to six other willing creatures. Creatures in the fan club always know the general distance and direction toward other bonded creatures, any conditions affecting them, and if they're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying}, or dead. Creatures in the fan club can always communicate telepathically while on the same plane of existence.

Phantasmal Fans.name: 幻影扇群 Phantasmal Fans
Phantasmal Fans.description:
20尺。疏浚幽灯周围总是环绕着一群喧闹的灵体人群。疏浚幽灯对所有生物都处于隐蔽状态，而这群人群视为困难地形。

20 feet. A rowdy spectral crowd always surrounds the dredgelit. The dredgelit has concealment against all creatures, and the crowd counts as difficult terrain.

Alluring Debut.name: 迷人亮相 Alluring Debut
Alluring Debut.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

效果 淤光者尝试进行一次表演检定，对抗30英尺内单个生物的意志DC，重现一场标志性演出。

大成功 该生物会成为他们粉丝俱乐部的一员，持续24小时，即使其并不情愿也是如此。

成功 如同大成功，但仅持续1小时。

失败 该生物不受影响。

大失败 该生物不受影响，而淤光者因表演失败而尴尬不已，以至于受到 @Damage[2d8[mental]] 伤害。

Frequency once every 10 minutes

Effect The dredgelit attempts a Performance check against the Will DC of a single creature within 30 feet, recreating an iconic show.

Critical Success The creature becomes part of their fan club for 24 hours, even if it's unwilling.

Success As critical success, but only for 1 hour.

Failure The creature is unaffected.

Critical Failure The creature is unaffected, and the dredgelit is so embarrassed by their failure to perform that they take @Damage[2d8[mental]] damage.

Parasocial Leech.name: 寄生社交水蛭 Parasocial Leech
Parasocial Leech.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 渣光怪从其粉丝俱乐部中的一个生物身上吸取生命力。渣光怪尝试进行一次表演检定，对抗该生物的意志DC。该生物受到 @Damage[6d6[void]] 伤害，且渣光怪恢复 @Damage[10[healing]] 生命值。

大成功 目标受到双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2} 且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}，持续1轮。

成功 目标受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1} 且定身，持续1轮。

失败 目标不受影响。

大失败 目标不受影响。渣光怪糟糕透顶的表演导致其非但未能恢复生命值，反而受到 @Damage[2d8[mental]] 心灵伤害。

Frequency once per hour

Effect The dredgelit leeches vitality from a creature in their fan club. The dredgelit attempts a Performance check against the Will DC of the creature. The creature takes @Damage[6d6[void]] damage, and the dredgelit regains @Damage[10[healing]] Hit Points.

Critical Success The target takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round.

Success The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} and immobilized for 1 round.

Failure The target is unaffected.

Critical Failure The target is unaffected. The dredgelit's abysmal performance results in them taking @Damage[2d8[mental]] damage instead of regaining Hit Points.

Dredgelit.publicNotes:
淤渣魅影会以银幕上的闪烁残像或后台瞥见的霓虹剪影的形式徘徊不去。它们在短波噪声中翻涌，在逐渐褪色的凹版画面中向外凝视。淤渣魅影是已故媒体超级巨星化作的不死幽魂，萦绕于昔日辉煌的演出场所，并渴求健忘粉丝的关注。

大多数淤渣魅影都活在自己昔日人生的幻想版本中，但一旦它们的妄想被击碎，想要重拾失落名声的炽烈渴望便会驱使它们。到了这时，它们会变得难以预测，哪怕是最微小、被它们视作怠慢的举动，也可能引发一阵致命的狂怒。

淤渣魅影体现着它们昔日的舞台人设。这些腐朽的名媛会将仰慕者诱入自己永恒的粉丝俱乐部，浑然不觉自己会给新崇拜者带来汲取生命的后果。淤渣魅影会寻找可供献祭的粉丝，引诱毫无防备之人，并吸取他们的生命力，以便永远维持声名与光彩。

Dredgelits linger as flickers on the silver screen or neon silhouettes glimpsed backstage. They seethe in shortwave static and stare out from fading gravure tableaux. Dredgelits are the undead specters of deceased media megastars who haunt the venues of their former glories and crave the attention of forgetful fans.

Most dredgelits live in a fantasy version of their former lives, but once their delusions are shattered, a burning desire to recapture their lost fame drives them. At this point, they become unpredictable, and even the smallest perceived slight can lead to a murderous fit of rage.

Dredgelits embody their former stage personas. These decaying debutantes ensnare admirers into their eternal fan clubs, blissfully unaware of the life-draining consequences they have upon new admirers. Dredgelit seek sacrificial fans, luring in the unwary and draining their vitality to stay famous and fabulous forever.

Emganat.name: 恩甘纳特 Emganat

Acidic Mouth Cannon.name: 酸性口腔加农炮 Acidic Mouth Cannon

Motion Sense.name: 运动感知 Motion Sense
Motion Sense.description:
埃姆加纳特能够通过移动在空气或水中引发的振动，以所列距离内的一种不精确感知来察觉附近的生物。

An emganat can sense nearby creatures through vibrations in air or water caused by movement as an imprecise sense at the listed range.

Colony Mind.name: 殖民地思维 Colony Mind
Colony Mind.description:
30尺。所有彼此位于所列范围内且具有殖民思维的盟友，都会保持恒常的心灵感应通讯，并知晓任意个体所知的所有威胁。当位于至少一名具有殖民思维的盟友范围内时，若一个生物对抗精神效果的豁免检定结果为成功，则改为获得大成功。

30 feet. All allies with colony mind within the listed range of each other are in constant telepathic communication and are aware of all threats any individual knows about. While within range of at least one ally with colony mind, when a creature rolls a success on a save against a mental effect, it gets a critical success instead.

Burrowing Reveal.name: 钻地显现 Burrowing Reveal
Burrowing Reveal.description:
需求 先攻尚未掷定，且emganat处于掘穴状态

触发条件 一个生物进入emganat的动觉感知范围

效果 emganat注意到该生物，并在掷先攻之前进行掘穴。此次移动必须使emganat从地面中现身。

Requirements Initiative hasn't yet been rolled, and the emganat is burrowed

Trigger A creature enters the range of the emganat's motion sense

Effect The emganat notices the creature and Burrows before it rolls initiative. This movement must cause the emganat to emerge from the ground.

Coordinated Digestion.name: 协同消化 Coordinated Digestion
Coordinated Digestion.description:
如果恩加纳特用其酸性口炮成功击中一个生物，且该生物已经承受持续性酸蚀伤害，则将该持续伤害的伤害骰提高一级（最高为d8）。

If the emganat successfully Strikes a creature with its acidic mouth cannon and that creature was already taking persistent acid damage, increase the damage dice of the persistent damage by one step (to a maximum of d8s).

Emganat.publicNotes:
战斗虫最初是在克雷西斯卡次殖民群突然现身，以及首次袭击桑迪特联合体空域时被遭遇到的。这些狼一般大小的个体部件能够在地下掘进，并以极快的速度移动到适合设伏的位置。随后，一旦它们侦测到威胁，战斗虫便会从潜伏的地下位置猛然窜出，用位于口中的酸液炮猛攻敌人。对敌人喷吐生物酸液的战斗虫越多，这种物质溶解目标的速度就越快，呈现出令人痛苦不堪的景象。

虫群在浩界深处由一种被称为虫族的昆虫类物种发展而来，被数个文明视为现存最大的威胁。虫群由无数次殖民群构成，而每个次殖民群又包含无数组成性的亚种；这是一个庞大的群体，以灵能联合的方式行动，目的在于吞噬宇宙间的一切物质。最可怕的是，虫群拥有同化其所吞噬对象的知识与 DNA 的能力。由于在大断层之前就已发展出星际旅行技术，虫群在历史断裂之前便已吞噬了无数星系；而在获得信标以及被称为漂流域的超空间维度的使用权后，虫群扩张的速度更是进一步加快。

被虫群染指的世界会被抽干自然资源，沦为被称作“空壳世界”的荒芜之地。外人所谓的“虫群空域”，不过是虫群在其肆意推进中吞噬后留下的一大片死寂世界。虫群对这些世界的掠夺极其彻底，以至于勘测者甚至连稀有矿物和水等无机资源的微量痕迹都难以发现。这些空壳世界中，几乎没有多少被彻底探索过，因为探索往往会唤醒惰性的无人机体；理论上，这些单位是被留在原地，以防那些被吞噬的星系将来再次遭到殖民并恢复人口。在这片空域之外更遥远的地方，仍存在着虫群活动的零星区域，因为在大断层之前的漫长岁月中，虫群曾派出无数次殖民群，而即使到了现在，也只有其中一部分抵达了预定目的地。

在当今时代，虫群最广为人知的或许有两件重要之事。其一，它对协约世界和维斯卡里姆的进攻，促成了这两个势力停止敌对，并结成了脆弱的同盟。其二，虫群是希林族的直接祖先。希林人在大断层期间的某个时刻脱离了虫群，并从女神海拉丝那里获得庇护；人们认为海拉丝是由一种前虫群时期的虫族进化而来，并且她背弃了虫群这个已经演变成贪婪噬食实体的存在。

近年来，虫群一直不过被视为遥远的骇人传说，除了在浩界的苏斯基隆星系进行一些机密行动外，几乎没有其他活动。然而，最近对失踪的塞赞迪特世界克雷西斯卡的发现，无意间唤醒了一个沉眠的次殖民群；正是它曾对该世界的吞噬负有责任。自那以后，这个新近被称作“克雷西斯卡次殖民群”的群体已成为近宇的一大祸患，积极入侵桑迪特联合体诸世界，并且随时可能蔓延至维斯卡里姆和协约世界等其他势力。这个重新现身的次殖民群已经开始让其组成部分快速进化，虽然它仍与更广泛的虫群网络隔绝，但它依然明确构成了对近宇的威胁。

Emganats were first encountered during the Krethiskar subcolony's sudden emergence and the first attacks on Szandite Collective space. These wolf-sized components can burrow beneath the ground, and they move at great speeds to reach a location where they can set up an ambush. Then, once they detect a threat, the emganats spring forth from their burrowed positions and lay into their foes with an acidic cannon located in their mouths. The more emganats that unleash their bio-acid on foes, the faster the substance dissolves their targets in an agonizing display.

Developing far out in the Vast from an insectile species known as kucharns, the Swarm is considered the greatest threat in existence for several cultures. Composed of countless subcolonies, each consisting of myriad component subspecies, the Swarm is a vast host that acts in psychic union for the purpose of consuming all matter across the cosmos. Most frightening of all is the Swarm's ability to assimilate the knowledge and DNA of those they consume. Thanks to its pre-Gap development of star travel, the Swarm had already consumed innumerable systems before history short-circuited, and the Swarm's pace only accelerated once it received access to the Signal and the hyperspace dimension known as the Drift.

Worlds touched by the Swarm are drained of their natural resources and rendered barren places known as huskworlds. What outsiders consider to be "Swarm space" is little more than a swathe of lifeless worlds that the Swarm have consumed in its reckless advance. The Swarm so thoroughly strips these worlds that surveyors struggle to find even trace amounts of inorganic resources, such as rare minerals and water. Few of these huskworlds have been thoroughly explored, as oftentimes exploration awakens inert drones, theorized to have been left behind in case the devoured system was ever colonized and repopulated. Pockets of Swarm activity exist well beyond this region of space, as the Swarm sent out countless subcolonies in the ages before the Gap, and even now, only some of them have reached their intended destinations.

The Swarm is perhaps most known in the current era for two important facts. First, its assault on the Pact Worlds and the Veskarium led to the cessation of hostilities and tenuous alliance between the two powers. Second, the Swarm is the direct ancestor of the shirren species. Having broken away sometime during the Gap, shirrens found succor with the deity Hylax, who was believed to have evolved from a pre-Swarm kucharn and who turned her back on the ravenous entity the Swarm has evolved into.

In recent years, the Swarm had been seen as little more than a distant boogeyman with no activities save for classified actions in the Suskillon system in the Vast. However, the recent discovery of the missing Szandite world of Krethiskar inadvertently awoke a dormant subcolony that had been responsible for the world's consumption. Since then, the newly dubbed Krethiskar subcolony has become a scourge of Near Space, engaged in an active invasion of Szandite Collective worlds and poised to spill over into other powers like the Veskarium and Pact Worlds. This rediscovered subcolony has begun rapid evolution of its components and remains cut off from the wider Swarm, but it still represents a clear danger to Near Space.

Terror of Ukulam.name: 乌库兰之恐怖 Terror of Ukulam
Terror of Ukulam.tokenName: 乌库兰之恐怖 Terror of Ukulam

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Cataclysm.name: 大灾变 Cataclysm
Cataclysm.description:
你唤动难以想象的足以毁天灭地的大灾难的力量，从每种灾难中取一小块，并将它们组合在一起形成可怕的强力攻击。后续效果影响区域中的所有生物。在决定大灾变的伤害时，区域内的生物的抗力视为低10点。每个生物必须尝试一次基础反射豁免，对所有六种伤害类型生效。

  • 溶解肉体的酸雨造成3d10酸伤害。
  • 咆哮的地震击打地面上的生物，造成3d10钝击伤害。
  • 爆发的寒冰寒风暴造成3d10寒冷伤害。
  • 可怕的闪电撕裂区域，造成3d10闪电伤害。
  • 爆裂的狂风席卷天空，对在该区域飞行的生物造成3d10钝击伤害。
  • 突然的海啸横扫区域中的生物，造成3d10钝击伤害，并具有水特征（对于在该区域游泳的生物翻倍）。
  • 猛烈的野火如炼狱般烧过，造成3d10火焰伤害。

Indestructibility.name: 无敌咒 Indestructibility
Indestructibility.description: 你把自己与因果割裂。在法术持续时间内，你免疫任何对你有害的效果或者伤害，除了由神器，神力，以及类似的强力来源造成的效果。你仍然可以受到任何你愿意受到的效果的影响。

Atomic Blast.name: 原子爆 blast Atomic Blast
Atomic Blast.description:
你以魔法裂变一个原子，制造出带有放射性沉降物的爆炸。区域内所有生物受到 5d12 钝击伤害和 5d12 火焰伤害，并暴露于极端辐射之中；该辐射导致的辐射病，其暴露所用的 @Check[fortitude]{强韧 DC} 采用你的法术 DC。此魔法辐射的潜伏期和发作频率均为 1 轮，且该区域会保持放射性 10 分钟。

大成功 目标不受初始伤害影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 分钟。

失败 目标受到全部伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 1 分钟。

大失败 如失败，且目标受到双倍伤害。

You magically split an atom, creating an explosion with radioactive fallout. All creatures in the area take 5d12 bludgeoning damage and 5d12 fire damage, and they're exposed to extreme radiation that uses your spellcasting DC as the @Check[fortitude]{Fortitude DC} for radiation sickness incurred by exposure to this radiation. The onset and frequency of this magical radiation is 1 round, and the area remains radioactive for 10 minutes.

Critical Success The target is unaffected by the initial damage.

Success The target takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure As failure, and the target takes double damage.

Unfettered Movement (constant).name: 自由移动（恒常） Unfettered Movement (constant)
Unfettered Movement (constant).description:
你驱散可能影响一个生物的阻碍。当处于该法术效果中时，法术目标忽视会赋予其速度环境减值的效果。当法术目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}一个令其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，它自动成功，除非该效果是魔法性的，并且其环级比行动无碍更高。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement}

Voice of Linked Minds.name: 灵念相连之音 Voice of Linked Minds
Voice of Linked Minds.description:
恐噩不会说话，但它可以与 200 英尺内任何属于蜂巢思维、空壳思维或类似共享心智的生物进行心灵感应，传达复杂概念。其他能够进行心灵感应交流的生物也能在一定程度上理解恐噩，但他们的理解很模糊。
