The Terror doesn't speak, but it can psychically communicate complex concepts with any creature within 200 feet that is part of a hive mind, husk mind, or similar shared mind. Other creatures that can communicate telepathically can somewhat understand the Terror, but their understanding is vague.

Regeneration 25 (deactivated by fire).name: 再生 25（被火焰停用） Regeneration 25 (deactivated by fire)

+1 to all saves vs. primal.name: 对抗原能的所有豁免检定获得+1加值 +1 to all saves vs. primal

Ancient Bond.name: 远古羁绊 Ancient Bond
Ancient Bond.description:
恐噩能命令卡斯卓韦上的生物服从，这暗示着它与这颗星球之间有着古老的联系。原产于卡斯卓韦或其卫星的野生生物，在某一天内首次来到它200英尺范围内时，必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:45] 豁免检定；若失败，它们对恐噩的态度会提升为友善。变得友善的生物通常会接近恐噩，结果因辐射病而痛苦地死去。

The Terror commands obedience from creatures on Castrovel, suggesting an ancient connection to the planet. Wild creatures native to Castrovel or its moon must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:45] saving throw when they first come within 200 feet of it on a given day; on a failure, they improve their attitude toward the Terror to friendly. Creatures that become friendly typically approach the Terror, resulting in a painful death by radiation sickness.

Radioactive Death.name: 放射性死亡 Radioactive Death
Radioactive Death.description:
当乌库兰的恐噩死亡时，它会爆发出一次放射性爆炸，瞬间将 30 英里内的所有生物和物体汽化，并对 150 英里半径散发范围内的所有生物、物体和建筑造成 @Damage[45d12[fire]] 伤害，需进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:45|basic] 豁免。区域内的生物还会受到可怕的辐射病影响。地形和任何水体（或更大水体中的适当部分，例如海洋，由 GM 自行裁定）会在至少 50 年内变得具有强烈放射性；在那之后，它们会缓慢地变得不那么具有放射性，并由 GM 自行裁定使用 GM Core 中较轻程度的辐射等级。

When the Terror of Ukulam dies, it explodes in a radioactive blast that instantly vaporizes all creatures and objects within 30 miles and deals @Damage[45d12[fire]] damage to all creatures, objects, and structures in a 150-mile-radius emanation with a @Check[fortitude|dc:45|basic] save. Creatures in the area are also exposed to terrible radiation sickness. The terrain and any bodies of water (or suitable portions of larger bodies, such as oceans, at the GM's discretion) become terribly radioactive for a minimum of 50 years, after which time they slowly become less radioactive, using less severe degrees of radiation from GM Core at the GM's discretion.

Terribly Radioactive.name: 极度放射性 Terribly Radioactive
Terribly Radioactive.description:
120英尺。恐噩所到之处都会散播辐射。恐噩附近的非生物植物会迅速枯萎死亡。任何在此灵光内开始其回合的生物都会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 3}，并且每轮都会暴露于可怕的辐射病之中。

120 feet. The Terror spreads radiation everywhere it goes. Non-creature plants near the Terror quickly wither and die. Any creature that begins its turn within the aura is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3} and is exposed to terrible radiation sickness each round.

Induce Frenzy.name: 诱发狂暴 Induce Frenzy
Induce Frenzy.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 恐噩激起蜂巢思维中的生物，使其陷入狂乱。200英尺内每个属于蜂巢思维一部分的生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速} 状态，持续1分钟，并且它每轮获得的额外动作只能用于疾奔或打击。

Frequency once per day

Effect The Terror stirs creatures in hive minds into a frenzy. Each creature within 200 feet that's part of a hive mind gains the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition for 1 minute, and it can use the extra action each round only to Stride or Strike.

Terrible Radiation Sickness.name: 可怕的辐射病 Terrible Radiation Sickness
Terrible Radiation Sickness.description:
这种辐射会造成难以想象的痛苦灼伤、持续不止的恶心，以及死亡

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:45]

发作时间 1小时

阶段 1 @Damage[13d6[poison]] 伤害，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1小时）

阶段 2 @Damage[14d6[poison]] 伤害，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（1小时）

阶段 3 @Damage[15d6[poison]] 伤害，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 3}（1小时）

阶段 4 死亡

This radiation causes unimaginably painful burns, unrelenting nausea, and death

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:45]

Onset 1 hour

Stage 1 @Damage[13d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 hour)

Stage 2 @Damage[14d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 hour)

Stage 3 @Damage[15d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3} (1 hour)

Stage 4 death

Toxic Touch.name: 剧毒之触 Toxic Touch
Toxic Touch.description:
被恐噩的污泥触须击中的生物获得毒素弱点 10，并且在1轮内其强韧豁免检定承受 –2状态减值。

Creatures struck by the Terror's sludge tendril gain weakness 10 to poison and take a –2 status penalty to Fortitude saves for 1 round.

Undulating Wrath.name: 起伏之怒 Undulating Wrath
Undulating Wrath.description:
恐噩以其污泥触须进行六次打击。

The Terror Strikes with its sludge tendrils six times.

Vorpal Eye Beam.name: 斩首眼部光束 Vorpal Eye Beam
Vorpal Eye Beam.description:
恐噩向后掀开一片黏稠的“皮肤”盖片，露出它唯一的解剖学特征——一只巨大的深紫色眼睛——并沿着其视线射出一道不可见的粒子光束。该光束宽10英尺、长120英尺。区域内的生物受到 @Damage[18d8[slashing]] 伤害（进行 @Check[fortitude|dc:45|basic] 基础豁免）。豁免严重失败的生物会被立即斩首。这会杀死任何生物，除非其生存不需要头颅。对于有多个头颅的生物，通常只有在它最后一个头颅被斩断时才会死亡。恐噩在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Vorpal Eye Beam]]{1d4轮} 内不能再次使用斩首眼光束。在此期间，它失去对重击和精准伤害的免疫。

The Terror pulls back a lid of oozy "skin" to reveal its only anatomical feature—an enormous dark purple eye—firing an invisible particle beam along the path of its gaze. The beam is 10 feet wide and 120 feet long. Creatures in the area take @Damage[18d8[slashing]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:45|basic] save). Creatures that critically fail their save are instantly decapitated. This kills any creature except ones that don't require a head to live. For creatures with multiple heads, this usually kills the creature only if its last head is severed. The Terror can't use Vorpal Eye Beam again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Vorpal Eye Beam]]{1d4 rounds}. During this time, it loses immunity to critical hits and precision damage.

Terror of Ukulam.publicNotes:
当一个巨大的类软泥生物从卡斯卓韦工业卫星艾琳卓的受污染洞窟中出现时，这颗星球的领导者犯下了一个错误：他们以为这团软泥对卡斯卓韦本身不构成威胁。当这团软泥摧毁了这颗卫星上的数座造船厂，随后又穿越太空，将自己投向乌库兰的偏远地带时，他们又犯下了一个错误：他们以为自己还有时间把这一威胁隔离在那片大陆偏僻的荒野中。当它的辐射开始扩散，而早已死去的艾琳卓人邪教徒从鸣歌山脉下方的巢穴墓城中爬起、开始崇拜这团软泥时，这颗星球的领导者终于明白，他们无法再无视它。他们称其为“乌库兰之恐噩”。直到现在，他们仍完全不明白它究竟是什么、为何存在，或想要什么。

恐噩是一个巨大的类软泥之物，外形有些像一层层油腻的深绿色肉瓣。它将自己唯一的解剖学特征——一只巨大的紫色眼睛——隐藏在起伏涌动的体表之下。这头生物大部分时间都漂浮在地下深处的洞窟或海沟中，连续数日一动不动，随后又会突然跨越极远的距离，而且几乎总是沿直线前进，然后再次停下。这些停顿看似毫无规律，但它们已经以越来越高的频率冲击并迫迁定居点。追随恐噩路径的那些满怀复仇之心的崇拜者，几乎与它所散播的辐射一样危险，尽管他们追随它的理由，和恐噩本身一样难以理解。

由于原子能，尤其是核武器的特性，卡斯卓韦的科学家推断，这个具有放射性的恐噩即使在死后，也很可能会造成与其生前同样巨大的破坏——甚至可能更大。即便卡斯卓韦及其盟友联合起来的军事力量足以击败恐噩，这些科学家也已警告说，他们仍需要更多时间研究恐噩，并评估将其彻底摧毁所带来的风险。当然，每过去一天，就会有更多艾琳卓人涌向恐噩，也会有更多受害者踏上它那条毁灭性的路径。

When a massive ooze-like being emerged from the polluted caverns of Castrovel's industrial moon, Elindrae, the planet's leaders made the mistake of assuming the ooze posed no threat to Castrovel itself. When the ooze destroyed several of the moon's shipyards, then launched itself through space to the remote reaches of Ukulam, they made the mistake of assuming they had time to quarantine the threat in that continent's remote wilderness. When its radiation began to spread, and long-dead elindrian cultists rose from their nest-necropolises beneath the Singing Range to worship the ooze, the planet's leaders finally understood they couldn't ignore it. They called it the Terror of Ukulam. They still don't understand quite what it is, why it exists, or what it wants.

The Terror is an enormous ooze-like thing, somewhat resembling layered flaps of oily dark green flesh. It conceals its only anatomical feature—a large purple eye—beneath its undulating surface. The creature spends most of its time floating in deep subterranean caverns or ocean trenches, remaining immobile for days at a time, then suddenly traversing a great distance, almost always in a straight line, before stopping again. These stops are seemingly random, but they've displaced settlements with increasing regularity. The vengeful worshippers who follow the Terror's path are almost as dangerous as the radiation it spreads, though their reasons for following it are as inscrutable as the Terror itself.

Thanks to the nature of atomic energy and especially atomic weapons, Castrovel's scientists have deduced that the radioactive Terror is likely to cause as much destruction in death as it has caused in life—or perhaps more. Even if the combined military might of Castrovel and its allies was sufficient to defeat the Terror, these scientists have warned that they need more time to study the Terror and assess the risks of destroying it outright. Of course, every day that passes is another day that more elindrians flock to the Terror, and yet more victims cross its destructive path.

Cyanoscum Bloom.name: 蓝藻绽放 Cyanoscum Bloom

Water Sense.name: 水流感知 Water Sense
Water Sense.description:
青渣可以以一种不精确感官感知60英尺内是否存在水源。

A cyanoscum can sense the presence of water within 60 feet as an imprecise sense.

Regeneration 5 (Deactivated by Fire).name: 再生 5（被火焰停用） Regeneration 5 (Deactivated by Fire)

Toxic Exposure.name: 毒素暴露 Toxic Exposure
Toxic Exposure.description:
位于青渣花丛空间内的生物会暴露于青渣毒素。生物在与青渣花丛共享同一空间时，无法将该毒素降低到第 1 阶段以下。

Creatures inside the cyanoscum bloom's space are exposed to cyanoscum toxin. A creature can't reduce the poison below stage 1 while it shares a space with the cyanoscum bloom.

Cyanoscum Toxin.name: 青藻渣毒素 Cyanoscum Toxin
Cyanoscum Toxin.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

最长持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 2}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d8[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} (1 round)

Frenzied Scratching.name: 狂乱抓挠 Frenzied Scratching
Frenzied Scratching.description:
蓝藻渣花所处空间内的每个敌人受到 @Damage[3d6[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] 豁免）。

Each enemy in the cyanoscum bloom's space takes @Damage[3d6[piercing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] save).

Squish.name: 压扁 Squish
Squish.description:
青渣花群可以以每轮半速度通过那些并非完全气密的狭窄空间进行挤压移动。

A cyanoscum bloom can Squeeze through spaces that aren't airtight at half its Speed per round.

Cyanoscum Bloom.publicNotes:
尽管这些木元素生物长着可爱的啮齿动物外表，但很不幸，它们的主体实际上由会产生毒素的藻类构成。蓝渣藻喜欢任何温暖潮湿的环境。蓝渣藻的绽放很容易辨认；从远处看，它们像漂浮在静水表面的蓝绿色草地，或是一簇簇附着在植物和岩石上的毛茸茸蓝绿色苔藓。被这番壮丽景象打动的探险者，可能会冒险靠近水边，或伸手去触摸那柔软而光彩夺目的苔藓——从而与这些美丽却有毒的生物发生接触。

元素生物是来自原初存在位面的活性能量侵入体。它们形态万千，从风中或水中无心智的涡流，到能够驾驭原初魔法的复杂实体，不一而足。太空旅行的到来和技术的进步，使更多作为元素鲜活化身的存在得以在物质宇宙中显现。

野火派、太阳风暴和洪水等自然事件，能够在一颗行星上或某片太空区域中释放出成群难以驯服的元素生物。有时，一群强大的元素生物会引发史诗级规模的自然灾害，例如一次强度爆表、足以烧毁整颗行星电网的太阳耀斑，或是一场在气态巨行星大气中不断旋转、永不停歇的风暴。

While these wood elementals bear the adorable appearance of a rodent, their main bodies are unfortunately composed of toxin-producing algae. Cyanoscums thrive in any warm, wet environment. Cyanoscum blooms are easy to spot; from a distance, they look like blue-green meadows floating atop still waters or clusters of fuzzy, teal moss clinging to plants and rocks. An explorer moved by this majestic sight might venture too close to the water's edge or reach out to touch the soft, resplendent moss—inviting contact with these beautiful but poisonous creatures.

Elementals are energetic intrusions from the primal planes of existence. They take many forms, from mindless eddies in the wind or water to complex entities capable of wielding primal magic. The advent of space travel and the progress of technology have allowed even more living embodiments of the elements to manifest in the Universe.

Natural events like wildfires, solar storms, and floods can unleash hordes of unruly elementals on a planet or into a region of space. Sometimes, a gathering of powerful elementals causes a natural disaster on an epic scale, like an off-the-charts solar flare that fries a planet's power grid or a ceaseless storm swirling in a gas giant's atmosphere.

Finitrium Fatebender.name: 天金稀金命运扭转者 Finitrium Fatebender
Finitrium Fatebender.tokenName: 稀金命运扭转者 Finitrium Fatebender

Ray Of Twisted Fate.name: 扭曲命运射线 Ray Of Twisted Fate

Glimpse Fate.name: 一瞥命运 Glimpse Fate
Glimpse Fate.description:
天金稀金命运扭曲者在为先攻掷感知时获得+5环境加值，因为它依据从潜在未来中汲取的灵光乍现来行动。

A finitrium fatebender gains a +5 circumstance bonus when rolling Perception for initiative, as it acts on flashes of insight harvested from potential futures.

A Million Fates.name: 百万命运 A Million Fates
A Million Fates.description:
20英尺。一只天金稀金命运扭转者被一道由无数不断变化的潜在未来构成的灵光所环绕——可能性的破碎毫秒彼此重叠，形成一片混乱的模糊景象。在该灵光中结束其回合的生物必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:33] 豁免。若其失败，则其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}，持续1轮（若大失败则为 [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}）。大成功的生物会暂时免疫该灵光1天。

20 feet. A finitrium fatebender is surrounded by an aura of countless shifting potential futures—fragmented milliseconds of possibility all overlapping in a tumultuous blur. A creature that ends its turn in the aura must attempt a @Check[will|dc:33] save. If it fails, it's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} for 1 round (or [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} on a critical failure). A creature that critically succeeds becomes temporarily immune to the aura for 1 day.

Fated Outcome.name: 命定结局 Fated Outcome
Fated Outcome.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 天金稀金命运扭曲者的攻击检定或豁免检定失败或严重失败

效果 天金稀金命运扭曲者重掷触发此次能力的检定，并采用较好的结果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger The finitrium fatebender fails or critically fails an attack roll or saving throw

Effect The finitrium fatebender rerolls the triggering check and takes the better result.

Tactical Prescience.name: 战术先见 Tactical Prescience
Tactical Prescience.description:
频率 每轮一次

触发 天金稀金命运扭转者将被一次打击命中

效果 天金稀金命运扭转者已预见到即将到来的攻击，因此挪动位置，在对抗此次触发攻击时，其 AC 获得 +4 环境加值。

Frequency once per round

Trigger The finitrium fatebender would be hit by a Strike

Effect Having foreseen the incoming attack, the finitrium fatebender shifts position, gaining a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

Fate Wave.name: 命运浪潮 Fate Wave
Fate Wave.description:
天金稀金命运扭转者释放出一波扭曲的未来与破碎的可能性，在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:60]内造成 @Damage[16d6[mental]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[will|dc:36|basic] 豁免）。天金稀金命运扭转者在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Fate Wave]]{1d4 轮}内无法再次使用命运波。

The finitrium fatebender releases a wave of twisted futures and shattered possibilities, dealing @Damage[16d6[mental]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:60] (@Check[will|dc:36|basic] save). The finitrium fatebender can't use Fate Wave again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Fate Wave]]{1d4 rounds}.

Foretell Doom.name: 预示厄运 Foretell Doom
Foretell Doom.description:
任何被天金稀金命运扭转者的拳击或扭曲命运射线打击命中的生物，都会看到自己即将死于天金稀金命运扭转者之手的幻象。它必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:36] 豁免，否则变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}；若严重失败，该生物还会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。如果该生物已经受到命定厄运影响，则在豁免失败时，适用的震慑和迟钝值均提高 1，最高至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 4}。当天金稀金命运扭转者被摧毁时，该生物便避开了这一悲惨命运，并立即从其迟钝状态中恢复。

Any creature hit by the finitrium fatebender's fist or ray of twisted fate Strikes receives a vision of their impending death at the hands of the finitrium fatebender. It must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:36] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}; on a critical failure, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}. If the creature is already affected by foretold doom, it increases the appropriate stunned and stupefied values by 1 on a failed save, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}. When the finitrium fatebender is destroyed, the creature has avoided this tragic fate and immediately recovers from its stupefied condition.

Inexorable March.name: 无情行军 Inexorable March
Inexorable March.description:
天金稀金命运扭转者以其速度进行一次Stride，将其移动进入其空间的每个生物推开，并对试图阻止其移动的生物造成伤害。生物可以尝试进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:40] 豁免来阻挡去路，若成功则使天金稀金命运扭转者的移动停止。若大成功，抵抗的生物不受伤害；否则，它受到如同被天金稀金命运扭转者的拳击打击命中的伤害。

The finitrium fatebender Strides up to its Speed, pushing back each creature whose space it moves into and damaging creatures that try to stop its movement. A creature can attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:40] save to bar the way, stopping the finitrium fatebender's movement on a success. On a critical success, the resisting creature takes no damage; otherwise, it's damaged as if hit by the finitrium fatebender's fist Strike.

Finitrium Fatebender.publicNotes:
天金稀金命运扭转者是由精炼天金稀金制成的强大魔法构装体。天金稀金是一种具有预言属性的稀有星铁。由于能够看见——并对——未来作出反应，天金稀金命运扭转者会成为出色的守卫，也是令人畏惧的对手。

Finitrium fatebenders are powerful magical constructs created from refined finitrium, a rare starmetal with divinatory properties. Thanks to their ability to see—and react to—the future, finitrium fatebenders make exceptional guardians and formidable foes.

Glass Serpent.name: 玻璃蛇 Glass Serpent

Ambush.name: 伏击 Ambush
Ambush.description:
触发条件 一个生物进入玻璃蛇20尺内，且尚未发现它

效果 玻璃蛇从藏身处猛扑而出。它径直朝触发生物进行Stride，并对其进行一次颚部Strike。目标生物对此次攻击处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。

Trigger A creature passes within 20 feet of the glass serpent and hasn't detected it

Effect The glass serpent lunges out of hiding. It Strides directly toward the triggering creature and makes a jaws Strike against it. The target creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to this attack.

Ravenous Invisibility.name: 贪婪隐形术 Ravenous Invisibility
Ravenous Invisibility.description:
玻璃蛇天生隐形。当玻璃蛇进行任何形式的敌对动作时，在其身体的部分暂时变得可触碰之际，它不会处于未察觉状态，而是处于隐匿状态，直到其下个回合开始。吞下了生物的玻璃蛇会在接下来的一天内显形，因为它正在消化这顿食物。若被吞下的生物逃脱或以其他方式被移除，玻璃蛇会立即恢复隐形。

The glass serpent is naturally invisible. When a glass serpent takes a hostile action of any kind, it is hidden instead of undetected until the start of its next turn, as parts of its body become momentarily tangible. A glass serpent that has swallowed a creature becomes visible for the next day as its meal is being digested. If the swallowed creature escapes or is otherwise removed, the glass serpent immediately returns to being invisible.

Concealing Coil.name: 隐匿线圈 Concealing Coil
Concealing Coil.description:
需求 玻璃蛇上一个动作必须是一次成功的尾鞭打击

效果 被玻璃蛇命中的生物对除玻璃蛇以外的所有生物而言处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态，直到该生物移动出玻璃蛇的触及范围，或直到玻璃蛇的下一回合开始。

Requirements The glass serpent's last action was a successful tail whip Strike

Effect The creature the glass serpent hit is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from all creatures except the glass serpent until that creature moves out of the glass serpent's reach or until the start of the glass serpent's next turn.

Glass Serpent.publicNotes:
荒芜星球伊奥克斯上的巨型玻璃蛇，是协约世界最臭名昭著的顶级掠食者之一。它们平均体长接近60英尺，体重约5,000磅，而玻璃蛇之所以成为如此高效的杀手，体型与优雅姿态还只是其中一部分原因。得益于其独特鳞片所赋予的先天隐形能力，玻璃蛇始终处于大多数生物的可见光谱之外，使它们能够悄无声息地接近毫无防备的猎物。由于是在伊奥克斯无数次大灾变中进化而来，这些蛇以造访这颗世界的少数活体生物群为食；而颇为奇特的是，恰恰是在它们吞食活物时，玻璃蛇才最为脆弱。它们在吞食活体生物时所使用的酸液与消化液的混合作用，也会剥夺玻璃蛇的隐形能力，因此精明的玻璃蛇猎人会主动用动物引诱猎物先行进食，然后再群起而攻之。

玻璃蛇的活动范围早已远远超出伊奥克斯的边界，有些甚至在流散带那条奇异水道——星间之河——中找到了能够接纳它们的生态环境。当地的萨瑟蝶人指责伊奥克斯故意向他们的水道投放这些掠食者造成污染，但伊奥克斯否认了一切关于蓄意干预的指控。自从流散带在萨瑟蝶人的监管下被授予协约世界临时成员地位以来，这类争论只愈演愈烈。

The great glass serpents of the barren planet of Eox are one of the Pact Worlds' most notorious apex predators. With an average length of almost 60 feet and a weight of about 5,000 pounds, the size and grace of glass serpents are only part of what makes them such efficient killers. Thanks to an innate invisibility provided by their unique scales, glass serpents remain outside of the visual spectrum of most creatures, allowing them to silently approach unsuspecting prey. Having evolved through Eox's numerous cataclysms, these serpents find sustenance from the rare bands of living creatures who visit the world, and in an odd turn, while they're consuming the living is when glass serpents are at their most vulnerable. The combination of acids and digestive fluids used in consuming a living creature also deprives the serpents of their invisibility, and canny glass serpent hunters actively tempt their quarry with animals to consume before attacking in force.

Glass serpents have made their way well beyond the confines of Eox, and some have even found an accepting ecosystem in the Diaspora's strange waterway, the River Between. The local sarcesians blame Eox for intentionally polluting their waterways with predators, though Eox denies all accusations of intentional meddling. Such debates have only intensified since the Diaspora was granted provisional Pact World status under the sarcesians' stewardship.

Cloud Ray.name: 云鳐 Cloud Ray

Explosive Death.name: 爆炸死亡 Explosive Death
Explosive Death.description:
如果一只云鳐因火焰或电击伤害而死亡，它体内储存的爆炸性气体与可燃液体会引爆，形成一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]，造成 @Damage[11d8[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:30|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免）。

If a cloud ray dies due to fire or electricity damage, its internal reservoirs of explosive gases and combustible fluids detonate in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] that deals @Damage[11d8[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:30|basic|options:area-effect] save).

Engulf.name: 包卷 Engulf
Engulf.description:
@Check[reflex|dc:30]，@Damage[(3d8+8)[bludgeoning]] 伤害，[[/act escape dc=30]]，破裂 25

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

@Check[reflex|dc:30], @Damage[(3d8+8)[bludgeoning]] damage, [[/act escape dc=30]], Rupture 25

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

Lash Out.name: 猛然出击 Lash Out
Lash Out.description:
云鳐对任何位于其触及范围内的目标以–2减值连续进行两次尾击打击。这些攻击会计入云鳐的多重攻击减值，但在它完成所有攻击之前，多重攻击减值不会增加。

The cloud ray makes two consecutive tail lash Strikes at a –2 penalty against any targets within reach. These attacks count toward the cloud ray's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after it makes all its attacks.

Natural Thruster.name: 天然推进器 Natural Thruster
Natural Thruster.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 直到其下个回合开始时，云鳐的飞行速度获得 +80 尺状态加值，且其尾击额外造成 1d10 挥砍伤害。

Frequency once per hour

Effect Until the beginning of its next turn, the cloud ray gains a +80-foot status bonus to its fly Speed and deals an additional 1d10 slashing damage with its tail Strikes.

Stunning Lash.name: 震慑长鞭 Stunning Lash
Stunning Lash.description:
一个生物若因云鳐尾部的打击而受到电击伤害，则会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}（若为重击则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2}），随后在1分钟内暂时免疫麻痹尾击。对电击具有弱点的生物不会获得这种暂时免疫。

A creature that takes electricity damage from a cloud ray's tail Strike is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} on a critical hit), then becomes temporarily immune to stunning lash for 1 minute. Creatures with a weakness to electricity don't become temporarily immune.

Cloud Ray.publicNotes:
巨型云鳐是布雷瑟达和利亚瓦拉等气态巨行星上的顶级掠食者。云鳐的机动性高得惊人，能够以少有生物能匹敌的速度穿行于大气层中，使它们在狩猎时几乎无法逃脱。

Enormous cloud rays are apex predators on gas giants such as Bretheda and Liavara. Cloud rays are incredibly maneuverable and can fly through the atmosphere at speeds few can match, rendering them nearly inescapable when on the hunt.

Akashic Dragon (Young).name: 阿卡西巨龙（年轻） Akashic Dragon (Young)
Akashic Dragon (Young).tokenName: 阿卡西巨龙（幼年） Akashic Dragon (Young)

Occult Innate Spells.name: 天生异术法术 Occult Innate Spells

Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only.name: 位面间传送（随意；仅自身；仅限往返于阿卡西记录与物质宇宙） Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only; to and from Akashic Record and the Universe only)
Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only.description:
需求 你具有目标位面的位面密钥用于给法术定位

你和你的盟友跨越位面之间的屏障进行旅行。目标移动至其他位面，比如火元素位面、幽界、或者外层裂隙。你必须知晓目标位面的存在，而且需要使用由该位面的物质制作的魔法位面密钥来给法术定位。就如同跨界传送这个法术本身一样，大多数著名位面的位面密钥具有罕见稀有度，而鲜为人知的位面及半位面通常具有稀有、甚至有可能时独特稀有度的位面密钥。

该法术极其不精准，你会出现在目标之一（由你选择）上一次造访该位面时的位置周边，误差为1d20 x 25英里。若所有目标都是初次造访某个特定位面，你们就会出现在该位面的随机位置。跨界传送不会提供返回的手段，不过除非发生了什么另外情况，否则再次施放跨界传送能让你返回自身之前身处的位面。

Clairvoyance.name: 鹰眼术 Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description: 你在射程内创造出一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}的悬浮眼睛（它甚至可以在你的视觉线或者效果线之外）。这只眼睛不能移动，但是你可以从该处看到所有方向，如同使用你通常的视觉感官。

Confusion.name: 困惑术 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你使用奇怪的能量波动扰乱了目标的思维，令其随机行动。法术效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标胡言乱语，并且获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑 Confused}1分钟。在其每个回合结束，它能尝试一次新豁免来结束困惑术。

大失败 目标困惑1分钟，并且没有提前结束的豁免。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Akashic Download (at will).name: 阿卡西下载（随意） Akashic Download (at will)
Akashic Download (at will).description:
你对阿卡西记录执行一次灵能搜索，以获取有关特定主题的信息，并将这些数据魔法般地传输到你的通讯装置或计算机中。当你施放此法术时，选择任意一项你已受训且具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 动作的技能。

在持续时间内的任意时刻，当你尝试使用所选技能进行一次回忆知识检定时，你可以查阅你的通讯装置。此次检定获得+1状态加值。查阅你的通讯装置是回忆知识动作的一部分。你必须手持该通讯装置才能这样做。该通讯装置会立即编译并显示与该主题相关的各种媒体中的片段与摘录，从而使你获得该加值。如果你在此次检定中掷出大失败，则改为失败。如果此次检定成功且对象是一个生物，你会获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。你一旦查阅该通讯装置，此法术便结束。当法术结束时，你对阿卡西记录的访问也随之终止，而你下载的所有信息都会返回阿卡西记录。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{法术效果：阿卡西下载}

强化（3环） 该法术结束前，你可以查阅你的通讯装置三次。

You execute a psychic search of the Akashic Record for information about a specific topic and magically transfer this data to your comm unit or computer. When you Cast this Spell, choose any skill in which you're trained that has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action.

Any time during the duration, you can consult your comm unit while attempting a Recall Knowledge check using your chosen skill. This check gains a +1 status bonus. Checking your comm unit is part of the action to Recall Knowledge. You must be holding the comm unit to do so. The comm unit instantly compiles and displays snippets and selections from various media relevant to the topic, which grants you the bonus. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the check is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature. Once you reference the comm unit, the spell ends. When the spell ends, your access to the Akashic Record ends, and all the information you downloaded returns to the Akashic Record.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{Spell Effect: Akashic Download}

Heightened (3rd) You can reference your comm unit three times before the spell ends.

Akashic Eye.name: 阿卡西之眼 Akashic Eye
Akashic Eye.description:
阿卡西巨龙可以不使用自己的记忆，而是从阿卡西记录中获取信息。这赋予它阿卡西记录学识技能，使其能够使用该技能对任何种类的事物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}。

Instead of using their own memories, an Akashic dragon can ascertain information from the Akashic Records. This gives it the Akashic Record Lore skill, which it can use to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} of any kind.

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult.name: 对抗神秘时所有豁免检定获得 +2 状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult

Akashic Interference.name: 阿卡夏干扰 Akashic Interference
Akashic Interference.description:
90 英尺。阿卡西巨龙附近持续不断的上传与下载旋流，使得尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}变得难以预测。除阿卡西巨龙外，任何进入该区域或在该区域内开始其回合的生物都必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:23|options:area-effect] 豁免。无论此次豁免检定结果如何，该生物都会暂时免疫这只巨龙的阿卡西干扰，持续 1 分钟。

大成功 持续 1 轮，当该生物尝试回忆知识时，其检定获得 +3 状态加值。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 持续 1 轮，当该生物尝试回忆知识时，其检定承受 –3 状态减值。

大失败 同失败，但该效果持续 1 分钟。

90 feet. The swirl of constant uploads and downloads near the Akashic dragon make attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} unpredictable. A creature other than an akashic dragon that enters or begins its turn in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:23|options:area-effect] save. Regardless of the result of the saving throw, the creature is temporarily immune to this dragon's Akashic interference for 1 minute.

Critical Success For 1 round, when the creature attempts to Recall Knowledge, it gains a +3 status bonus to its check.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure For 1 round, when the creature attempts to Recall Knowledge, it takes a –3 status penalty to its check.

Critical Failure As failure, but the effect lasts 1 minute.

Deflecting Lasers.name: 偏转激光束 Deflecting Lasers
Deflecting Lasers.description:
触发 该龙被一次攻击重创命中

效果 幼年阿卡西巨龙利用嵌布于其全身的眼睛升起一张偏转激光之网，针对触发攻击获得所有伤害抗性 8，并吸收该次打击的部分能量，为其阿卡西弹幕充能。如果阿卡西巨龙在过去 1 分钟内曾对该生物的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定成功，则其改为获得抗性 11。

Trigger The dragon is critically hit by an attack

Effect The young Akashic dragon raises a web of deflecting lasers using the eyes embedded all over their body, gaining resistance 8 to all damage against the triggering attack and absorbing some of the blow's energy, recharging their Akashic Barrage. If the Akashic dragon has succeeded at a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} check against the creature in the last minute, they gain resistance 11 instead.

Akashic Adaptability.name: 阿卡西适应性 Akashic Adaptability
Akashic Adaptability.description:
阿卡西巨龙可以激活带有“施放法术”激活方式的魔法物品和科技物品，无论其属于任何传统，都如同其中所含的法术是神秘法术一般。

The Akashic dragon can activate magic and tech items with the Cast a Spell activation of any tradition as if the spells they contain were occult spells.

Akashic Barrage.name: 阿卡西轰击 Akashic Barrage
Akashic Barrage.description:
巨龙将来自阿卡西记录的锋锐真理与炽烈启示凝聚成滋滋作响的激光火焰，并从其主眼中以锥形喷射而出，袭击敌人。这会造成 @Damage[10d6[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害，作用于一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] （@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:stupefied] 豁免）。如果某生物在对抗阿卡西齐射的反射豁免中严重失败，且阿卡西巨龙在过去 1 分钟内已成功对该生物进行过一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定，则该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续 1 轮。巨龙在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Akashic Barrage]]{1d4 轮} 内不能再次使用阿卡西齐射。

The dragon condenses cutting truths and fiery revelations from the Akashic Record into sizzling laser fire that they project as a cone from their primary eye to assail their foes. This deals @Damage[10d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:stupefied] save). If a creature critically fails its Reflex save against Akashic Barrage and the Akashic dragon has succeeded at a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about the creature in the last minute, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round. The dragon can't use Akashic Barrage again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Akashic Barrage]]{1d4 rounds}.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打和一次尾部击打。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one tail Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙裔冲势 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
巨龙每当以一次打击造成重击时，便会为其灵能弹幕充能。

The dragon recharges their Akashic Barrage whenever they score a critical hit with a Strike.

Records of the Enemy.name: 敌方记录 Records of the Enemy
Records of the Enemy.description:
每次遭遇中，阿卡西巨龙第一次用其颚部打击命中并对一个生物造成伤害时，它会获得关于该生物的信息，如同它在针对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定时成功了一样。

The first time each encounter the Akashic dragon hits and deals damage to a creature with their jaws Strike, they receive information about the creature as if they'd succeeded at a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about that creature.

Akashic Record Lore.name: 阿卡西记录知识 Akashic Record Lore

Akashic Dragon (Young).publicNotes:
阿卡西巨龙虽然很少在其那些满是遗物、正在崩塌的巢穴之外被人遇见，但它们偶尔也会居住在知识的中心枢纽中，例如繁忙的空间站或城市。这些巨龙被赋予了与阿卡西记录的直接联系，是傲慢的知识典藏者，认定（而且往往没错）其他任何存在都不可能比它们更深刻地理解物质宇宙的秘密。阿卡西巨龙会在阿卡西记录中度过漫长时间，常常在它们觉得已经过去了许多天之后才现身，而对银河系中的其他存在来说其实仅仅过去了几个小时。

Though rarely encountered outside their crumbling, relic-filled lairs, Akashic dragons occasionally live in hubs of knowledge, such as bustling space stations or cities. These dragons, bestowed with a direct connection to the Akashic Record, are arrogant curators of knowledge, assuming (often correctly) that no other being could possibly have a deeper understanding of the universe's secrets. Akashic dragons spend extensive time in the Akashic Record, often emerging after what they perceive as many days while mere hours have passed for the rest of the galaxy.

Elimination-Class Assassin Robot.name: 歼灭级刺客机器人 Elimination-Class Assassin Robot
Elimination-Class Assassin Robot.tokenName: 歼灭型刺客机器人 Elimination-Class Assassin Robot

Integrated Advanced Nano-edge Rapier.name: 集成式先进纳米锋刃细剑 Integrated Advanced Nano-edge Rapier
Integrated Advanced Nano-edge Rapier.description:
升级： 1

这把精工打造的刺剑边缘被磨砺到仅有一个原子的厚度，并利用再生纳米机器人在无数次打击后维持自身锋锐。

Upgrades: 1

The edge of this precision-crafted foil is sharpened to the thickness of a single atom, using regenerating nanites to maintain itself after countless strikes.

Integrated Advanced Semi-Auto Pistol.name: 集成先进半自动手枪 Integrated Advanced Semi-Auto Pistol
Integrated Advanced Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪会在每次射击后自动弹出用过的弹壳并装填新弹药。

Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Shirren-eye Rifle.name: 希壬复眼步枪 Shirren-eye Rifle

Accelerated Response.name: 加速反应 Accelerated Response
Accelerated Response.description:
触发条件 清除级刺客机器人“目标追踪”的目标尝试对该机器人进行一次打击

效果 机器人读取其目标的动作，从而在针对该触发性打击的 AC 上获得 +2 情境加值。

Trigger The target of the elimination-class assassin robot's Target Tracking attempts a Strike against the robot

Effect The robot reads its target's movements, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering Strike.

Burn Protocol.name: 焚烧协议 Burn Protocol
Burn Protocol.description:
刺客机器人在被摧毁时，其电路会自毁，使追查其所有者变得极其困难。对已被摧毁的刺客机器人进行计算机检定以恢复数据时，DC增加10。

The circuitry of an assassin robot self-destructs upon the robot's destruction, making tracing its owner extremely difficult. Add 10 to the DC of a Computers check to recover data from a destroyed assassin robot.

Holographic Camouflage.name: 全息伪装 Holographic Camouflage
Holographic Camouflage.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 歼灭级刺客机器人变为隐形，持续10分钟。如果该机器人使用敌对动作，或在单个动作中移动超过其速度的一半，则该机器人会在完成该动作后再次显形。

Frequency once per hour

Effect The elimination-class assassin robot becomes invisible for 10 minutes. If the robot uses a hostile action or moves more than half its Speed in a single action, the robot becomes visible again after it completes that action.

Nanite Surge.name: 纳米虫浪涌 Nanite Surge
Nanite Surge.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 歼灭级刺客机器人使一个科技生物或物品恢复 @Damage[45[healing]] 生命值。

Frequency once per day

Effect The elimination-class assassin robot restores @Damage[45[healing]] Hit Points to one technological creature or item.

Retractable Weapons.name: 可折叠武器 Retractable Weapons
Retractable Weapons.description:
灭除级刺客机器人可以通过交互以自由动作拔出或收回其任意一件集成武器。观察者必须成功通过一次 @Check[perception|dc:40] 检定，才能注意到一件已收回的武器。

The elimination-class assassin robot can Interact to draw or retract any of its integrated weapons as a free action. An observer must succeed at a @Check[perception|dc:40] check to notice a retracted weapon.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
歼灭级刺客机器人的打击对@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}的生物额外造成 3d6 点精准伤害。

The elimination-class assassin robot's Strikes deal an additional 3d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures.

Target Tracking.name: 目标追踪 Target Tracking
Target Tracking.description:
歼灭级刺客机器人对其在 120 英尺内可见的一个生物建立目标锁定。该生物无法对该机器人成为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，也无法对该机器人 [[/act create-a-diversion]]。此能力持续，直到机器人失去与目标之间的视线，或目标以其他方式变为隐藏。

The elimination-class assassin robot establishes a target lock on a creature it can see within 120 feet. The creature can't become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} against the robot or [[/act create-a-diversion]] against the robot. This ability lasts until the robot loses line of sight with the target or the target otherwise becomes hidden.

Elimination-Class Assassin Robot.publicNotes:
优雅而致命，消除型号依靠其隐形力场让敌人捉摸不定，并在最出人意料之处发动打击。它们的先进智能使其能够布置更为复杂的伏击，也能根据需要对局势变化作出反应并处理客户的要求。这可能意味着让杀戮尽可能隐蔽，或尽可能血腥，这取决于预期传达的意图与信息。

在某些社会中，机器将许多流程自动化。因此，有些人试图将谋杀这一行为也自动化，也就不足为奇了。大多数制造商绝不会承认自己创造了这种设计，这迫使富有权势的人物通过隐秘渠道，从秘密设施或不择手段的制造商那里获取这些单位。无论它们出身如何，这些机器人都可以被设定一个目标后释放出去，而其主人可以确信：要么目标会死亡，要么由于该单位电路被烧毁而无法证明是谁试图杀害他们。

Elegant and deadly, elimination models rely upon their stealth fields to keep foes guessing and strike where least expected. Their advanced intelligence gives them the capacity to set up more complex ambushes as well as react to changes in the situation as needed and handle requests from the client. This could mean making the killing as subtle or as gruesome as possible, depending on the intent and message intended.

In some societies, machines automate many processes. It only makes sense, then, that some would attempt to automate the act of murder. Most manufacturers would never admit to creating such designs, forcing wealthy figures to go through hidden channels to acquire units from secret facilities or unscrupulous manufacturers. Regardless of their origins, these robots can be programmed with a target and set loose, the owner assured that either their target will be dead or will be unable to prove who tried to kill them thanks to the unit's fried circuitry.

Dust Manta.name: 尘蝠鳐 Dust Manta

Sandsense.name: 沙感 Sandsense
Sandsense.description:
沙尘蝠鲼能够感知附近沙粒中最轻微的扰动，因此可以察觉其他生物在与其所处同一片沙体中或其上方移动。此外，沙尘蝠鲼无视沙暴造成的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，并且免疫因沙子或其他砂砾而陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。

The dust manta can feel the slightest disturbance in nearby sand, granting it the ability to sense other creatures moving through or on top of the same body of sand that it's in. In addition, the dust manta ignores @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment} from sandstorms, and they're immune to being @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} by sand or other grit.

Burrowing Charge.name: 掘地冲锋 Burrowing Charge
Burrowing Charge.description:
沙尘蝠鲼在沙中猛冲，以袭击毫无防备的猎物。它先以至多两倍掘穴速度进行【掘穴】，然后垂直【跳跃】至多25英尺高，并在跃起过程中的任意一点对一个生物进行一次尾刺【打击】（这使它能够攻击地表35英尺范围内的生物）。在[[/act leap]]之后，沙尘蝠鲼会坠落到地面上，但如果它落在沙地上，则不会因坠落而受到伤害。

The dust manta surges through sand to attack unwary prey. It Burrows up to twice its burrow Speed, then Leaps vertically up to 25 feet high, making a stinger Strike against a creature at any point during the jump (this lets it attack a creature within 35 feet of the surface). After the [[/act leap]], the dust manta falls to the ground but takes no damage from the fall if it lands on sand.

Disappear in Dust.name: 尘中消失 Disappear in Dust
Disappear in Dust.description:
尘蝠鲼沙色的外皮使其即使没有掩体或隐蔽，也能在沙地或任何其他颜色相近的细颗粒物质中[[/act hide]]。

The dust manta's sand-colored hide allows it to [[/act hide]] in sand or any other fine, similarly colored substance even without cover or concealment.

Dust Manta Toxin.name: 尘蝠鳐毒素 Dust Manta Toxin
Dust Manta Toxin.description:
豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:24]

最长期限 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[2d4[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[3d4[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力衰 1}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[3d4[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力衰 2}（1 轮）

阶段 4 @Damage[4d4[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力衰 3}（1 轮）

阶段 5 死亡，且受害者的身体会崩解成尘，只能通过祈愿仪式或类似的强大魔法复生

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:24]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[2d4[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[3d4[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[3d4[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Stage 4 @Damage[4d4[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3} (1 round)

Stage 5 death, and the victim's body disintegrates into dust and can only be brought back via a wish ritual or similarly powerful magic

Spray Sand.name: 喷射沙土 Spray Sand
Spray Sand.description:
尘蝠鳐从鳃中喷出一团沙云，形成一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:30]。云中的所有生物都变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，而云外的所有生物对于云中的生物而言也变为隐蔽。该云团持续到尘蝠鳐下个回合结束。尘蝠鳐在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Spray Sand]]{1d4轮}内不能再次使用喷沙。非尘蝠鳐生物若进入云中或在云中开始其回合，必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:24] 豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，持续1分钟，或直到其花费一个互动动作擦去眼中的尘土与砂砾。重创

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明}，持续1轮，之后其会陷入目眩，持续1分钟，或直到其花费一个互动动作擦拭双眼。

The dust manta sprays a cloud of sand from its gills in a @Template[type:burst|distance:30]. All creatures in the cloud become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all creatures outside the cloud become concealed to creatures within it. The cloud lasts until the end of the dust manta's next turn. The dust manta can't use Spray Sand again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Spray Sand]]{1d4 rounds}. A non-dust manta creature that enters or starts its turn in the cloud must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:24] save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute or until it spends an Interact action to wipe the dirt and grit from its eyes. Critical

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, after which it's dazzled for 1 minute or until it spends an Interact action to wipe its eyes.

Dust Manta.publicNotes:
致命的潜行掠食者，沙尘蝠鲼潜伏在物质宇宙各地沙漠世界的地表之下。尽管其翼展平均达10英尺、体重1吨，沙尘蝠鲼凭借其布满卵石状凸起、沙色的外皮，在原生栖息地中几乎无法被察觉。就像鳐鱼在水中一样，它们能够感知附近的振动，并滑行穿过沙原与沙丘，伏击不幸的猎物。它们邪恶的尾刺会注入一种致命毒素，分解血肉与骨骼，将其溶解为沙子，使以滤食为生的沙尘蝠鲼能够从由此产生的悬浮物中滤出食物颗粒。

Deadly stealth predators, dust mantas lurk just below the surface on desert worlds across the Universe. Despite a wingspan averaging 10 feet across and weighing 1 ton, dust mantas are nearly undetectable in their native habitat thanks to their pebbly, sand-colored hide. Like a ray through water, they can sense nearby vibrations and glide through sand flats and dunes to ambush unfortunate prey. Their wicked stinger injects a lethal toxin that breaks down flesh and bone, dissolving it into sand so filter-feeding dust mantas can strain particles of food from the resulting suspension.

Enraged Noquasar.name: 狂怒的诺夸萨尔 Enraged Noquasar
Enraged Noquasar.tokenName: 暴怒的诺夸萨尔 Enraged Noquasar

Gravity Crash.name: 重力撞击 Gravity Crash
Gravity Crash.description:
被狂怒星吞灵的引力子闪焰重击的生物会被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。如果目标正在飞行，它会坠落至多30英尺。

A creature critically hit by an enraged noquasar's graviton flare is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the target is flying, it falls up to 30 feet.

Ionized Plasma Blas.name: 电离等离子冲击波 Ionized Plasma Blas
Ionized Plasma Blas.description:
类星体无星火花在 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 或 @Template[type:line|distance:30] 中释放等离子体。区域内的每个生物受到 @Damage[3d6[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] 豁免）。在其豁免中大失败的生物还会受到 @Damage[1d8[persistent,electricity]|options:area-damage] 伤害，并被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。类星体无星火花在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Ionized Plasma Blast]]{1d4 轮}内不能再次使用“电离等离子爆发”。

The noquasar spark unleashes plasma in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] or @Template[type:line|distance:30]. Each creature in the area takes @Damage[3d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] save). A creature that critically fails its save also takes @Damage[1d8[persistent,electricity]|options:area-damage] damage and is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. The noquasar spark can't use Ionized Plasma Blast again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Ionized Plasma Blast]]{1d4 rounds}.

Enraged Noquasar.publicNotes:
星无类的怒火会随着其折磨延续多年而不断增长。

当一名日辉武僧在与群星循环失去同步时死去，他们的灵魂可能会与其太阳微粒纠缠在一起。灵魂试图抵达灵魂之河时，极端的太空力量会作用于其上，将其无限拉伸，直至永恒。

A noquasar's rage increases as its torture extends over many years.

When a solarian perishes while out of sync with the cycle of stars, their soul might become entangled with their solar mote. Extreme cosmic forces act on the soul as it attempts to reach the River of Souls, stretching it infinitely thin for all of eternity.

Assembly Ooze.name: 装配软泥怪 Assembly Ooze

Techsense.name: 科技感知 Techsense
Techsense.description:
装配软泥怪能够将带有科技特征的生物和物体视为其在所列范围内的精确感知目标。

An assembly ooze can detect creatures and objects with the tech trait as a precise sense within the listed range.

Assemble.name: 组装 Assemble
Assemble.description:
在 1 分钟的过程中，组装软泥怪利用储存在体内的通用聚合物制作一件随机装备（掷 [[/r 1d6]]：1–护甲，2–盾牌，3–武器，4–护甲升级，5–武器升级，或 6–科技物品）。组装软泥怪可以制作成本不超过其储存通用聚合物价值的物品，但该物品的等级和体积均不能高于 4。

Over the course of 1 minute, the assembly ooze crafts a random piece of gear (rolling a [[/r 1d6]]: 1–armor, 2–shield, 3–weapon, 4–armor upgrade, 5–weapon upgrade, or 6–tech item) using the UPBs stored inside of it. An assembly ooze can craft items with a cost up to the UPBs stored, but with an item level and Bulk of no greater than 4 each.

Disassemble.name: 拆解 Disassemble
Disassemble.description:
构装软泥吞没一件邻近、无人看管且体积不超过4 Bulk的装备，将其分解为组成部件。该软泥获得等同于该物品价格（以信用点计）的通用聚合物数量。构装软泥一次最多可储存1,000通用聚合物。

The assembly ooze engulfs an adjacent, unattended piece of gear of no more than 4 Bulk, deconstructing it into its component parts. The ooze gains a number of UPBs equal to the item's price in credits. An assembly ooze can hold up to 1,000 UPBs at a time.

Sticky Disarm.name: 黏性缴械 Sticky Disarm
Sticky Disarm.description:
需求 该装配软泥怪上一个动作必须是一次成功的伪足打击

效果 该软泥怪尝试对它击中的生物进行[[/act disarm options=sticky-disarm]]。它在此次运动学检定中获得+4状态加值。此次尝试既不会承受也不会计入该软泥怪的多重攻击减值。

Requirements The assembly ooze's last action was a successful pseudopod Strike

Effect The ooze attempts to [[/act disarm options=sticky-disarm]] the creature it hit. It gains a +4 status bonus to the Athletics check. This attempt neither applies nor counts toward the ooze's multiple attack penalty.

Assembly Ooze.publicNotes:
人们认为装配软泥怪是在一家制造公司试图将物品打印机自动化以削减成本时，意外创造出来的。最初的那只生物早已逃离了协约世界中的收容设施，并在宇宙各处复制自身。尽管它常被视为类似古老时代害虫那样的烦人东西，但若任其在星舰或空间站上不受控制地扩散，装配软泥怪最终会演变成一种生存性威胁。

装配软泥怪通常呈现为一个无定形的金属立方体。它的外壳由液态聚碳酸酯浆液构成，包裹着一个由自我复制纳米机器人组成的核心。软泥怪的颜色会随着它分解的材料而变化，但最常见的是棕色或灰色的金属混合色。为了生存，这种软泥怪会不断尝试拆解科技物品，遵循其预设子程序，然后制造出新的东西。装配软泥怪体内的纳米机器确实具有繁殖驱动力；当软泥怪在短时间内吸收了足够多的材料时，它们会以类似细胞有丝分裂的过程进行分裂。装配软泥怪通常不会攻击那些没有携带它们所需科技物品作为燃料的人，但会反击以保护自己。

许多种类的软泥怪潜伏在银河各处黑暗而废弃的地方，只在满足食欲时现身，同时威胁冒险者、探索者和倒霉的工人。

The assembly ooze is believed to have been created by accident when a manufacturing company attempted to automate an object printer as a cost cutting measure. The original creature has long since left containment in the Pact Worlds, replicating itself across the cosmos. While often considered a nuisance akin to pests of yore, an assembly ooze left unchecked on a starship or space station can eventually turn into an existential threat.

An assembly ooze typically takes the form of an amorphous metallic cube. It has an outer shell composed of a liquid polycarbonate slurry that encases a core of replicating nanobots. The ooze's color can change based on the materials it breaks down, but it's most often a metallic amalgamation of brown or gray. To survive, the ooze attempts to constantly disassemble technological items in following its programmed subroutines then manufacture something new. The nanites within an assembly ooze do have a drive for reproduction, splitting in a process similar to cellular mitosis when the ooze absorbs enough material in a short period of time. Assembly oozes generally don't assault those not carrying the technological items they require as fuel but do lash out to protect themselves.

Oozes of many types lurk in dark and abandoned places across the galaxy, emerging only to satiate their appetites and threaten adventurers, explorers, and hapless workers alike.

Observer-Class Security Robot.name: 观察者级安保机器人 Observer-Class Security Robot
Observer-Class Security Robot.tokenName: 观察者级安保机器人 Observer-Class Security Robot

Intergrated Commercial Pulsecaster Pisto.name: 集成式商用脉冲投射手枪 Intergrated Commercial Pulsecaster Pistol
Intergrated Commercial Pulsecaster Pisto.description:
升级： 1

这把气势逼人的手枪会从枪管中射出一股令人麻痹的电流。它的剩余充能会以发光的能量线条显示出来，并沿着枪身向下延伸。脉冲发射手枪常被赏金猎人和执法人员使用，因为他们需要让目标活着。

Upgrades: 1

This imposing pistol fires a jolt of paralyzing electricity from its barrel. Its remaining charges are visible as glowing lines of energy radiating down its body. Pulsecaster pistols are often used by bounty hunters and law enforcement who need to keep their targets alive.

Pulsecaster Pistol.name: 脉冲发射手枪 Pulsecaster Pistol

Exigency.name: 紧急情况 Exigency
Exigency.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发条件 一个生物以该安保机器人为目标发动一次攻击

效果 该机器人使其处理能力超频，以尝试避开一次攻击，在对抗触发攻击的AC上获得+2的环境加值。

Frequency once every 10 minutes

Trigger A creature targets the security robot with an attack

Effect The robot overclocks its processing power to attempt to avoid an attack, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to its AC against the triggering attack.

Observer-Class Security Robot.publicNotes:
观察者级安保机器人被编程为在小范围内巡逻，类似于看门狗，只不过内置了一把枪。一些制造商将这类机器人设计成犬形，而它们的飞行能力也常常会让原本以为面对的是更偏地面防御的潜在窃贼大吃一惊。

安保机器人遍布整个工业化太空，在协约世界和维斯卡里姆中都占有重要地位，既被合作也被私人公民雇用并定制。

大多数士兵机器人型号都被制造得尽可能具有破坏性，歼灭机器人则被设计用于杀戮；而安保机器人通常会在其行为程序中加入保险机制，以防止它们施加超出执行指定安保职能所必需的暴力。这使它们在城市中特别有用，因为意外破坏可能会伤及旁观者或引发法律问题，即使是在星舰上也是如此，因为一道偏离目标的激光爆炸也可能对关键的星舰系统造成严重损害。

Programmed to patrol small areas, an observer-class security robot is akin to a watch dog, but with a built-in gun. Some manufacturers design these robots with canine forms, and their capability to fly can surprise would-be burglars who were expecting a more terrestrial defense.

Security robots are ubiquitous throughout industrialized space and have major presences in both the Pact Worlds and Veskarium, employed and customized by corporations and private citizens alike.

While most soldier robot models are built to be as destructive as possible, and elimination robots are designed to kill, security robots usually have fail-safes programmed into their behavior to prevent them from causing any more violence than is necessary to perform their designated security function. This makes them especially useful in cities, where unintended destruction might harm bystanders or cause legal issues, and even on starships, where a stray laser blast might cause serious damage to vital starship systems.

Gwereiad.name: 格维雷亚德 Gwereiad

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Gravity Field.name: 重力场 Gravity Field
Gravity Field.description:
你将物质宇宙的法则扭曲为己所用，提高一片区域内的重力作用力。区域内所有飞行生物下降40英尺。整个区域对飞行和攀爬生物而言是更高难度地形，对地面上的生物而言是困难地形。任何被重力场拖拽到地面的生物都会受到钝击伤害，如同其曾经坠落一般。

区域内的重力提高一个等级（例如，零重力变为低重力，低重力变为标准重力，标准重力变为高重力，而高重力变为极端重力）。

Bending the laws of the Universe to your will, you increase the forces of gravity in an area. All flying creatures in the area descend 40 feet. The entire area is greater difficult terrain for Flying and Climbing creatures, and difficult terrain for creatures on the ground. Any creature pulled to the ground by a gravity field takes bludgeoning damage as though it had fallen.

Gravity in the area increases by one step (for example, zero-g becomes low gravity, low gravity becomes standard, standard gravity becomes high gravity, and high gravity becomes extreme gravity).

Electrotether.name: 电流束索 Electrotether
Electrotether.description:
你为目标的电磁力超量充能，并用一道闪电形成的天索将它们拉向你。对每个目标进行一次远程法术攻击检定。如果你攻击两个目标，这两次攻击都计入你的多重攻击减值，但该减值会在两次攻击都完成后才增加。每个目标受到4d8点电击伤害，并被拖拽至离你更近5尺；若为重击，则改为更近10尺。如果两次攻击都命中，你可以选择让这些生物彼此靠近，而不是靠近你。若将目标移动到屏障、生物或障碍物中，目标会在进入该空间前停下。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d8。

You supercharge the targets' electromagnetism and pull them with a tether of lightning. Make a ranged spell attack against each target. If you attack two targets, both attacks count toward your multiple attack penalty, but it doesn't increase until after both attacks. The targets each take 4d8 electricity damage and are pulled 5 feet closer to you, or 10 feet closer on a critical hit. If both attacks hit, you can choose to move the creatures closer to one another instead of closer to you. Moving a target into a barrier, creature, or obstacle causes the target to stop before entering that space.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Personal Gravity (Constant).name: 个人引力（恒常） Personal Gravity (Constant)
Personal Gravity (Constant).description:
你改变重力对你的影响。你将重力视为比实际情况高或低一级，由你选择其一（例如，如果你处于低重力区域，你可以选择将其视为标准重力或零重力）。当该法术生效时，任何会影响你的强制位移距离减少 5 英尺（最低为 0 英尺），并且你忽略因重力效果对你造成的笨拙和未系缆状态。你可以解散该法术。

You alter gravity's effects on you. You treat gravity as if it were your choice of one step higher or lower (for example, if you were in an area of low gravity, you could choose either standard gravity or zero-g). While the spell is active, you reduce the distance of any forced movement that would affect you by 5 feet (minimum 0 feet), and you ignore being clumsy and untethered because of gravity effects on you. You can Dismiss the spell.

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你将恐惧植入目标；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}.

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}.

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 3} 并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing} 1轮.

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Glow Up.name: 焕新 Glow Up
Glow Up.description:
你制造出一种幻觉，使目标在旁观者眼中显得更有魅力且更为文雅。该法术会根据观察者所认为的吸引人之处，强化目标的外表、服饰、声音和举止。手持物品不受影响，而从该生物身上取下的任何穿戴物品都会恢复其真实外观。

目标在使用外交检定进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象} 时，获得 +1 状态加值；若未受训，还可将其等级加入外交检定。此外，目标只需 10 分钟便可尝试进行一次外交检定来收集信息。你可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hOp5ybOzyJlECU6B]{法术效果：容光焕发}

升阶（+2） 该加值提高 1，最高在第 7 环时达到 +4。

You create an illusion that causes the target to appear more charming and genteel to observers. The spell accentuates the target's appearance, clothing, voice, and mannerisms according to what an observer finds appealing. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item removed from the creature returns to its true appearance.

The target gains a +1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and lets the target add its level to Diplomacy checks if untrained. In addition, the target can attempt a Diplomacy check to Gather Information in only 10 minutes. You can Dismiss this spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hOp5ybOzyJlECU6B]{Spell Effect: Glow Up}

Heightened (+2) The bonus increases by 1, to a maximum of +4 at 7th rank.

Stumble.name: 踉跄 Stumble
Stumble.description:
一阵微重力爆发在目标周围引发震颤，将其拉向地面。目标必须进行一次反射豁免。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 1轮。如果目标原本正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，它会向下坠落10英尺。

大失败 目标 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。如果目标原本正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，它会向下坠落20英尺。

升阶（+1） 如果目标坠落，则失败时额外坠落5英尺，大失败时额外坠落10英尺。

A burst of microgravity causes a tremor around the target, pulling it toward the ground. The target must attempt a Reflex save.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 10 feet downward.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 20 feet downward.

Heightened (+1) If the target falls, it falls an additional 5 feet on a failure and 10 feet on a critical failure.

Sense Transponder.name: 感知收发器 Sense Transponder
Sense Transponder.description:
当处于与其绑定的天体上时，宁芙能够感知到在距该天体一天行程内正在接近的星舰。这不会向她们提供关于该飞船、其乘员或其确切位置的任何信息。宁芙可以像使用个人通讯器一样向该飞船发送消息。

While on their bonded celestial body, a nymph can sense approaching starships within a day's travel from the celestial body. This doesn't give them any information about the ship, its occupants, or its exact position. The nymph can send a message to the ship as if using a personal comm unit.

Black Hole-Dependent.name: 依赖黑洞的 Black Hole-Dependent
Black Hole-Dependent.description:
古威里亚德与单个黑洞有着神秘的联结。如果他们离开自己所联结的黑洞超过24小时，他们会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{吸取 1}，并且此后每额外24小时都必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:29] 豁免，否则其吸取值增加1。古威里亚德可以进行一个持续24小时的仪式，使自己与一个新的黑洞建立联结。

A gwereiad is mystically bonded to a single black hole. If they're away from their bonded black hole for more than 24 hours, they become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} and must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:29] save each additional 24 hours or increase their drained value by 1. A gwereiad can perform a 24-hour ritual to bond themself to a new black hole.

Singularity Field.name: 奇点力场 Singularity Field
Singularity Field.description:
30尺。gwereiad周围的区域会无可阻挡地将事物拉向其中心。进入该灵光范围内或在其中开始其回合的生物，必须成功通过一次 @Check[reflex|dc:29] 豁免，否则会被拖拽5尺向gwereiad移动（若大失败则为10尺）。

30 feet. The area around a gwereiad inexorably draws things toward its center. Creatures entering or starting their turns inside the aura must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:29] save or be pulled 5 feet toward the gwereiad (10 feet on a critical failure).

Gravitic Crush.name: 引力碾压 Gravitic Crush
Gravitic Crush.description:
格维雷亚德在30尺内一名生物周围召唤一次引力坍缩，造成 @Damage[6d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。受影响的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:29] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物的身体在重力下蜷缩，并受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并因引力坍缩而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}。它会受到 @Damage[2d6[persistent,bludgeoning]] 伤害，直到它 [[/act escape dc=29]]{脱逃}。

大失败 如失败，但该生物受到双倍伤害，且持续伤害变为4d6。

The gwereiad summons a gravitational collapse around a creature within 30 feet, dealing @Damage[6d6[bludgeoning]] damage. The affected creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:29] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature's body crumples under the gravity, and it takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} by the gravitational collapse. It takes @Damage[2d6[persistent,bludgeoning]] damage until it [[/act escape dc=29]]{Escapes}.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature takes double damage and the persistent damage is 4d6.

Gwereiad.publicNotes:
格维瑞阿德是孤高而神秘的宁芙，惯于离群索居，栖身于被称为黑洞的现象深处。她们的独居天性究竟是主动的偏好，还是仅仅由其居所导致的结果，仍有争议，因为几乎没有生物能在黑洞的引力作用下坚持足够久，从而与格维瑞阿德取得接触。除非受到挑衅，否则她们很少怀有敌意，偶尔甚至还会拯救那些有被其居所吞噬之险的星舰。

格维瑞阿德热爱艺术与音乐，不过她们的品味往往偏向怪诞与前卫。尽管大多数宁芙并不明显虔信宗教，格维瑞阿德却奉行一种聚焦于时空的深奥灵修。

宁芙是美丽的精类，外表为带有精灵特征的人形生物。她们通常呈现女性形态，但也存在各种性别与性别表达的宁芙。许多宁芙生活在行星上，充当天然池塘、森林、洞穴和悬崖边的守护者；而另一些宁芙——通常被称为空间宁芙——则因与天体相关而闻名。和她们那些栖居行星的同族一样，空间宁芙也会保护自己缔结联系的领地，免遭开发或伤害。

作为艺术的爱好者，宁芙对富有创造力的人尤其友善，而主动提出要在故事、图画或歌曲中描绘一位宁芙，几乎必定能赢得她们的青睐——除非那位宁芙不喜欢最终成果，并因艺术家拿平庸之作冒犯了她而大发雷霆。视频播送和直播是那些更善交际的宁芙中很受欢迎的消遣，无论是为了展示她们偏远的环境，还是为表演寻找观众。有些宁芙会引诱电影摄制组到她们的领地取景拍摄，但有两个前提：第一，制作过程不得破坏环境；第二，宁芙本人必须在影片中获得一个显眼的角色。

除非她们的领地受到威胁，否则大多数空间宁芙对凡人要么友善，要么冷淡，但她们记性很长。任何造访空间宁芙领地的人，若能事先调查那位宁芙怀有的旧怨、她过去与凡人的接触经历，或该地区最近可能影响她对靠近其家园之旅者看法的事件，都会是明智之举。

若凡人展现出恰当的态度与能力，例如保护某个恒星天体免于毁灭，或创作出格外优美的艺术作品，便可能吸引空间宁芙的注意。空间宁芙有时会向太阳武者或秘法师提供导师服务，不过她们很少主动寻找学生。空间宁芙很少同时达成不止一项这类安排，而且通常只会作出预计持续数十年甚至数百年的承诺，因此她们在选择受训者时极其挑剔。

Gwereiads are aloof and enigmatic nymphs who keep to themselves, nestling deep inside the phenomena known as black holes. Whether their solitary nature is an active preference or simply a consequence of their homes is up for debate, as few creatures can brave the gravitational forces of a black hole long enough to make contact with gwereiads. They're rarely hostile unless provoked and occasionally even rescue starships at risk of being devoured by their homes.

Gwereiads adore art and music, though their tastes tend toward the strange and avant-garde. While most nymphs aren't overtly religious, gwereiads devote themselves to esoteric spirituality focused on space-time.

Nymphs are beautiful fey who appear as humanoids with elven features. They generally take female forms, but nymphs of all genders and presentations exist. While many nymphs live on planets and act as protectors of natural ponds, forests, caves, and cliffsides, other nymphs—often called space nymphs—are known for their association with celestial bodies. Like their planet-bound kin, space nymphs guard their bonded territories from exploitation or harm.

As admirers of the arts, nymphs are especially friendly toward creatives, and offering to depict a nymph in story, picture, or song is a sure way to win their favor—unless the nymph doesn't like the final result and lashes out at the artist for insulting them with a mediocre product. Vidcasting and livestreaming are popular pastimes among more sociable nymphs, whether to show off their remote environments or find audiences for performances. Some nymphs entice movie crews to film in their territories, with two provisos: first, that the production not damage the environment, and second, that the nymph receive a prominent role in the film.

Unless their territories are threatened, most space nymphs are friendly or indifferent to mortals, but they have long memories. Anyone visiting a space nymph's territory would be wise to research that nymph's grudges, past encounters with mortals, or any recent events in the area that might color the nymph's perspective of those traveling near their home.

A mortal who demonstrates the right attitude and abilities, such as by protecting a stellar body from destruction or creating an especially beautiful work of art, might draw a space nymph's attention. From time to time, space nymphs will offer their services as mentors to solarians or mystics, though they seldom seek pupils on their own. Space nymphs rarely enter into more than one such arrangement at a time and typically only make commitments that promise to last decades or centuries, so they're extremely selective in their choice of mentee.

Zalyop.name: 扎利奥普 Zalyop

Explosive Burst.name: 爆炸迸发 Explosive Burst
Explosive Burst.description:
触发条件 扎利约普因物理或火焰伤害而被减至 0 生命值

效果 扎利约普会爆炸，对以自身为中心、@Template[type:burst|distance:20]内的所有生物造成 @Damage[4d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:18|basic] 豁免）。这也会触发“迷乱云雾”，即使它在过去 1 小时内已经使用过。

Trigger The zalyop is reduced to 0 Hit Points by physical or fire damage

Effect The zalyop explodes, dealing @Damage[4d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] centered on itself (@Check[fortitude|dc:18|basic] save). This also triggers a Befuddling Cloud, even if it's been used in the last hour.

Befuddling Cloud.name: 迷惑云雾 Befuddling Cloud
Befuddling Cloud.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 扎廖普喷吐出一团气体云雾，形成一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]。云雾内的生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:18] 豁免，否则会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 状态，持续 1 轮（若严重失败则为 1 分钟）。同样被扎廖普吞没的困惑生物不能进行平检来结束困惑状态。

Frequency once per hour

Effect The zalyop expels a gaseous cloud in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. Creatures within the cloud must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:18] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round (or 1 minute on a critical failure). Confused creatures that are also engulfed by the zalyop don't receive flat checks to end the confused condition.

Engulf.name: 包卷 Engulf
Engulf.description:
@Check[reflex|dc:18], @Damage[2d6[强酸]], [[/act escape dc=18]], 爆裂 7

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.吞没]

@Check[reflex|dc:18], @Damage[2d6[acid]], [[/act escape dc=18]], Rupture 7

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

Zalyop.publicNotes:
气态巨行星布雷瑟达的急流中充满了一种名为zalyops的大型球状轮廓，有时也被称为气球植物。它们内部充满气体且十分坚韧，在这颗行星永恒的风暴中被四处冲撞。人们常能看到成串的这类植物拖在奥玛身后，或糊在频繁往来于这颗气态巨行星的诸多航天器与飞行器之一的表面。

zalyops高速撞击金属船壳时发出的声音可能颇为滑稽，但旅客应当小心，不要因此认定这些植物无害。众所周知，zalyops会通过反射动作喷射高速有机碎片。此外，它们会制造令人神志混乱的气态排泄物，这种气体很容易在大气中扩散，并被卷入飞船的进气阀。

zalyops在地表也会引发混乱。当它们飘入小型聚居地时，成群的个体会扑向小型生物，并将其吞没以获取养分。这类入侵造成的大范围迷乱云团是一种危险的麻烦。在这种事件发生时，行人和宠物都必须小心，待在室内，静静等这些入侵的气球飘过去。

协约世界的化学家们利用zalyops气体开发出了一种名为Balyoon的麻醉药物（并已申请专利）。除了本就难以获取之外，这种药物在实验室精炼之前还极不稳定，而且已有不止一艘星舰因船员未能妥善储存刚从zalyops身上采集来的气体而毁失。

Balyoon还在伊俄克斯肥皂剧以及协约世界各地的其他戏剧性视频节目中扮演角色。它被以万般方式用作情节装置，例如反派借此设计败坏英雄名声，或让某位家庭成员在肥皂剧中突然失去理智或记忆。不过，这些角色究竟是如何弄到一种掠食性布雷瑟达植物所产的加工气体，往往远不如扣人心弦的戏剧冲突来得重要。

The jet streams of the gas giant Bretheda are filled with large, bulbous silhouettes called zalyops, sometimes referred to as balloon plants. Gas-filled and hardy, they're buffeted around by the planet's eternal storms. It's common for a cascade of these plants to be found trailing in the wake of an oma or plastered against one of the many spacecrafts and aircrafts frequenting the gas giant.

The sound of zalyops bouncing against a metal hull at high velocity can be a humorous one, but travelers should be careful not to assume these plants are harmless. Zalyops are known to expel high-speed organic shrapnel by reflex. Additionally, their confusion-inducing gaseous waste easily spreads across the atmosphere and can be caught in a ship's air-intake valve.

Zalyops can also cause chaos at ground level. When they float into small settlements, flocks of them will descend on small creatures, which they engulf for nutrients. The widespread befuddling clouds caused by such incursions are a dangerous nuisance. Pedestrians and pets alike must take care during such events to stay inside and simply wait the invasive balloons out.

Pact Worlds chemists have developed (and patented) Balyoon, an anesthetic drug from zalyop gases. In addition to being difficult to obtain in the first place, the drug is highly unstable until refined in the laboratory, and more than one starship has been lost when its crew failed to properly store the gases they just harvested from a zalyop.

Balyoon also plays a role in Eoxian soap operas and other dramatic vidshows across the Pact Worlds. It's used as a plot device in a myriad of ways, such as a villain contriving to discredit a hero or for a family member to suddenly lose their mind or memory in a soap opera. How these characters obtained the processed gas of a predatory Brethedan plant is rarely as important as the exciting drama, however.

Hellknight Armiger.name: 地狱骑士扈从 Hellknight Armiger
Hellknight Armiger.tokenName: 地狱骑士扈从 Hellknight Armiger

Frag Grenade (Tactical).name: 破片手榴弹（战术型） Frag Grenade (Tactical)
Frag Grenade (Tactical).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 @Damage[1d4[bleed]]

这些破片手榴弹会爆炸并形成一团弹片云，在一个 @Template[burst|distance:10] 内造成 2d8 穿刺伤害，且可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d4[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 2d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Incendiary Grenade (Tactical).name: 燃烧手雷（战术型） Incendiary Grenade (Tactical)
Incendiary Grenade (Tactical).description:
激活 1 区域射击

致命一击 5英尺

这些手雷使用被点燃的化学物质爆炸，产生强烈高热，并造成 2d8 点火焰伤害，且目标需进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免（@Template[burst|distance:10]）。如果你拥有手雷的致命专精效果，则对燃烧手雷的豁免结果大失败的生物会被从手雷处击退。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 5 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 2d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:10]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Hardlight Series.name: 硬光系列 Hardlight Series
Hardlight Series.description:
升级： 1

固定在腰带或翻领上的投影器会将穿戴者的身体包裹在这层闪烁的硬光外壳中。军用制式硬光护甲遵循可预测的标准，而私人用户则可享受各种可定制的时尚选项。

Upgrades: 1

A projector fastened to a belt or lapel encases the wearer's body in this shimmering hardlight shell. Military-issue hardlight armor follows a predictable standard, but private users enjoy a range of customizable fashion options.

Frag Grenade.name: 破片手榴弹 Frag Grenade
Frag Grenade.description:
重度失败时受到 @Damage[1d4[bleed]]

@Damage[1d4[bleed]] on critical failure

Incendiary Grenade.name: 燃烧手雷 Incendiary Grenade
Incendiary Grenade.description:
重度失败时被推离5英尺

Pushed 5 feet on critical failure

Forged in Hellfire.name: 地狱烈焰锻铸而成 Forged in Hellfire
Forged in Hellfire.description:
触发 护兵受到火焰伤害

效果 护兵吸收一部分火焰以强化其攻击。直到其下个回合结束时，其打击额外造成 @Damage[1d6[fire]] 伤害。

Trigger The armiger takes fire damage

Effect The armiger absorbs a fraction of the fire to empower their attacks. Until the end of their next turn, their Strikes deal an additional @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage.

Four-Armed.name: 四臂 Four-Armed
Four-Armed.description:
你有四只手臂，这使你能够持用和握持最多相当于四只手可用的武器与装备。任何时候，其中一对手都会被指定为你的主动手。你可以通过执行 Switch Hands 动作来将这一指定从一对手变更为另一对手，这是一项单动作。你只能用你的主动手持用物品。

You have four arms, which allows you to wield and hold up to four hands' worth of weapons and equipment. At any time, one pair of hands is designated as your active hands. You can change this designation from one pair of hands to another by taking the Switch Hands action, which is a single action. You can wield items only with your active hands.

Rapid Bombardment.name: 快速轰炸 Rapid Bombardment
Rapid Bombardment.description:
军械兵抽出两枚手雷，然后对两枚手雷都进行区域射击。同时处于两枚手雷影响区域内的生物，对这两枚手雷进行的豁免检定都承受 –1 处境减值。

The armiger draws two grenades, then Area Fires both grenades. Creatures in the area of both grenades take a –1 circumstance penalty to their saving throws against both grenades.

Hellknight Armiger.publicNotes:
地狱骑士侍从是地狱骑士中等级最低者，不过要获得这一阶级，他们必须先作为见习者度过六年，然后通过地狱骑士试炼；在试炼期间，他们必须召唤、与一名地狱邪魔战斗，并将其击败。

地狱骑士是炼狱骑士，尽管他们曾经在失落的戈拉里昂统治过整个国家，协约世界的地狱骑士则以更全面的方式执行法律与秩序，乘坐巨大的堡垒星舰四处巡行以扩展他们的影响力，而不是停留在某一个地方。在战斗中，地狱骑士纪律严明、毫不留情且致命。

Hellknight armigers are the lowest-ranked Hellknights, though attaining this rank requires them to spend six years as an initiate and then pass the Hellknight Test, during which they must summon, combat, and defeat a fiend of Hell.

Hellknights are infernal knights, and while they once ruled entire nations on Lost Golarion, the Hellknights of the Pact Worlds enforce law and order more holistically, traveling in massive citadel starships to spread their influence rather than remaining in any one place. In battle, Hellknights are orderly, unrelenting, and deadly.

Crest-Eater Necrograft Zombie.name: 噬冠死灵植入僵尸 Crest-Eater Necrograft Zombie
Crest-Eater Necrograft Zombie.tokenName: 噬冠者死灵植入丧尸 Crest-Eater Necrograft Zombie

Necrograft.name: 死灵植入 Necrograft
Necrograft.description:
死灵植入僵尸的死灵植入可以被一名生物以成功通过一次 @Check[religion|dc:22] 检定的方式停用 1 小时。尝试这样做通常只能在僵尸的触及范围内进行，并且这是一项具有操作特征的 2 动作活动。死灵植入被停用的死灵植入僵尸处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1} 状态，且不能使用任何反应。

A necrograft zombie's necrografts can be disabled for 1 hour by a creature that succeeds at a @Check[religion|dc:22] check. Attempting to do so can typically be done only while within reach of the zombie, and is a 2-action activity that has the manipulate trait. A necrograft zombie with disabled necrografts is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and can't use any reactions.

Rapid Decomposition.name: 快速分解 Rapid Decomposition
Rapid Decomposition.description:
死灵植入僵尸必须使用此反应，除非其死灵植入已失效

触发条件 该僵尸的生命值降至 0

效果 该僵尸迅速腐解成一堆腐烂的生物质，造成 @Damage[2d8[poison],2d8[void]|options:area-damage] 伤害，范围为 @Template[type:emanation|distance:15]（@Check[reflex|dc:22|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免），并使该区域成为持续 1 分钟的危险地形（@Damage[1d4[void]|options:area-damage] 伤害）。此能力会摧毁该僵尸身上的任何有机物品（包括死灵植入）。

A necrograft zombie must use this reaction unless its necrograft is disabled

Trigger The zombie is reduced to 0 Hit Points

Effect The zombie rapidly decomposes into a heap of rotting biomass, dealing @Damage[2d8[poison],2d8[void]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] (@Check[reflex|dc:22|basic|options:area-effect] save) and making that area hazardous terrain for 1 minute (@Damage[1d4[void]|options:area-damage] damage). This ability destroys any organic items on the zombie (including necrografts).

Scree Strider.name: 碎石跨行者 Scree Strider
Scree Strider.description:
食嵴者死灵植入僵尸无视由瓦砾、沙地以及由泥土和石头构成的不平整地面所造成的困难地形。

The crest-eater necrograft zombie ignores difficult terrain caused by rubble, sand, and uneven ground made of earth and stone.

Crest-Eater Necrograft Zombie.publicNotes:
死灵植入僵尸由以不死生物的身体部位和内脏制造的死灵植入所驱动。在伊奥克斯，人们常会给动物和野兽加装死灵植入，以确保它们能在这颗死星上存活。死后，这些生物中的许多会以真正的不死生物之姿归来，继续为其创造者效力。

科技僵尸是在死去的生物被内部或整合式科技物品——通常是一种植入体——重新赋予行动能力（或以其他方式维持活动）时造就的。尽管不同科技僵尸在形态和硬件上差异巨大，它们确实也有相似之处——它们都是没有心智、受驱使去伤害活物的不死生物，并具有可被利用的科技组件与弱点。

Necrograft zombies are animated by necrografts created from the body parts and internal organs of undead creatures. On Eox, it's common to augment animals and beasts with necrografts to ensure their survival on the dead planet. After death, many of these creatures return as true undead to continue serving their creators.

Technological zombies are created when a dead creature is reanimated (or otherwise kept moving) by an internal or integrated technological item—usually an augmentation. Despite the vast differences in form and hardware between different tech zombies, they do have similarities—they're mindless undead driven to harm the living, with technological components and weaknesses that can be leveraged.

Line-Class Soldier Robot.name: 线列职业士兵机器人 Line-Class Soldier Robot
Line-Class Soldier Robot.tokenName: 线列步兵机器人 Line-Class Soldier Robot

Integrated Commercial Hammer.name: 集成商用锤 Integrated Commercial Hammer
Integrated Commercial Hammer.description:
升级： 1

这种锤子既是珍贵的制作工具，也是有效的武器；它采用经过特殊配重的锤头和锤柄，以便每次挥击都能施加最大的力量。

Upgrades: 1

Valued as both a crafting tool and an effective weapon, this hammer uses specially weighted heads and handles to deliver maximum force with each strike.

Field Repairs.name: 战地修理 Field Repairs
Field Repairs.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

效果 分界线职业士兵机器人拆解一个相邻的科技生物尸体，该生物必须是在不超过1个月前被摧毁，以恢复 @Damage[18[healing]] 生命值。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect The line-class soldier robot salvages an adjacent corpse of a tech creature that was destroyed no more than 1 month ago to regain @Damage[18[healing]] Hit Points.

Formation.name: 阵型 Formation
Formation.description:
当一台列线职业士兵机器人与至少两名其他盟友相邻时，该机器人获得AC和豁免检定的+1境况加值。对于针对区域效果的反射豁免，此加值提高为+2。

When a line-class soldier robot is adjacent to at least two other allies, the robot gains a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and saving throws. This bonus increases to +2 for Reflex saves against area effects.

Line-Class Soldier Robot.publicNotes:
大多数分界线级士兵机器人都是瘦长、无头的人形机器。它们有四指手掌和披覆装甲的躯干，机体外壳涂有其主人的纹章配色，胸部上方有一个红色传感器。默认情况下，它们配备廉价品牌的激光步枪和破拆锤。每台高5英尺，重300磅。

分界线士兵是士兵机器人概念的最终改良版本，其危险性正来自于它们的简洁。分界线级机器人能够适应任何战场，通过信息圈下载技能包，拆取受损盟友的零件进行维修，而且制造、维护与改装都很简单。因此，大批量购入它们的成本相对低廉，并且部署时几乎无需顾虑伤亡。

活着的士兵是一种负担。他们有不希望他们死去的家人，需要薪水，有士气，需要纪律约束，会犯下暴行，还会对战争抱有看法。对于任何并不一心热爱死灵术的社群来说，他们都是战争中必要却不幸的一部分。

最尖端的士兵机器人承诺能够解决这个问题。士兵机器人没有所爱之人、没有意见、没有自我保存本能，也不会倾向于随机施暴。许多公司将他们的士兵机器人宣传为现代战斗中的人道解决方案。

而在实践中，它们绝非如此。

当没有生命真正命悬一线时，士兵机器人会鼓励其拥有者更频繁、更暴烈地投入冲突。对峙会演变成小规模冲突，小规模冲突会升级为战斗，而无辜者也不可避免地被卷入其中。它们尤其受合作和非政府组织欢迎；这些势力很欣赏自己能够把十几个士兵机器人扔向任何他们不喜欢的反对者、公开批评者或探险者，同时还能否认真正为所发生的一切负责。

尽管公众始终担心士兵机器人失控，但事实证明这还不足以成为严重问题。如果一个士兵机器人想让你死，那是因为有人并不在乎它杀了你。

Most line-class soldier robots are lanky, headless humanoid machines. They have four-fingered hands and armored torsos painted in their owner's livery, with a single red sensor in the upper torso. By default, they're armed with bargain-brand laser rifles and breaching hammers. Each is 5 feet tall and weighs 300 pounds.

Line soldiers are the final refinement of the soldier robot concept, made dangerous through their simplicity. Line-class robots can be adapted to any battlefield, download skill packages via infosphere, cannibalize damaged allies for repairs, and are simple to make, maintain, and modify. As such, they are relatively cheap to purchase in large numbers and can be deployed with little regard for casualties.

Living soldiers are a liability. They have families who don't want them to die, need salaries, have morale, require discipline, commit atrocities, and have opinions on the war. They're a necessary, but unfortunate, part of warfare for any society without an abiding love for necromancy.

Cutting-edge soldier robots promise to solve this problem. Soldier robots have no loved ones, opinions, self-preservation instinct, or tendency toward random atrocities. Many companies market their soldier robots as a humane solution to modern combat.

In practice, they're anything but.

Without lives on the line, soldier robots encourage their owners to engage more often and more violently. Standoffs turn into skirmishes, skirmishes into battles, and inevitably the innocent are caught up in the mix. They're particularly popular with corporations and non-governmental organizations that appreciate being able to throw a dozen soldier robots at any naysayer, public critic, or explorer they dislike while being able to deny true responsibility for what happens.

Though there's constant public fear of soldier robots going rogue, it has yet to prove a serious concern. If a soldier robot wants you dead, it's because someone doesn't mind if it kills you.

Barachius Angel.name: 巴拉基乌斯天使 Barachius Angel
Barachius Angel.tokenName: 巴拉基乌斯天使 Barachius Angel

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣先天法术 Divine Innate Spells

Interplanar Teleport (Self Only).name: 位面间传送（仅限自身） Interplanar Teleport (Self Only)
Interplanar Teleport (Self Only).description:
需求 你具有目标位面的位面密钥用于给法术定位

你和你的盟友跨越位面之间的屏障进行旅行。目标移动至其他位面，比如火元素位面、幽界、或者外层裂隙。你必须知晓目标位面的存在，而且需要使用由该位面的物质制作的魔法位面密钥来给法术定位。就如同跨界传送这个法术本身一样，大多数著名位面的位面密钥具有罕见稀有度，而鲜为人知的位面及半位面通常具有稀有、甚至有可能时独特稀有度的位面密钥。

该法术极其不精准，你会出现在目标之一（由你选择）上一次造访该位面时的位置周边，误差为1d20 x 25英里。若所有目标都是初次造访某个特定位面，你们就会出现在该位面的随机位置。跨界传送不会提供返回的手段，不过除非发生了什么另外情况，否则再次施放跨界传送能让你返回自身之前身处的位面。

Truespeech (Constant).name: 真言（恒常城） Truespeech (Constant)
Truespeech (Constant).description:
无论什么语言，目标都可以理解其所有的词语，并且向其他生物用该语言交流。当处于一群各异的生物中时，每次目标将要说话，他可以选择一个生物，并使用一种该生物理解的语言来讲述，即使该目标不知道这语言具体是什么。

升阶（7环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Eldritch Wrath.name: 异界之怒 Eldritch Wrath
Eldritch Wrath.description:
你引导存在于物质宇宙外缘彼方的诡异力量，幻影般的利爪、颚口和触手猛然挥击区域内的每个目标，对区域内每个生物造成 3d12 点精神伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须进行一次意志豁免。对于任何因该法术效果而陷入恶心状态的生物而言，该区域属于困难地形。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d12。

You channel the bizarre powers that exist beyond the outer reaches of the universe, dealing 3d12 mental damage to each creature in the area as phantasmal claws, jaws, and tentacles lash out at each target. Each creature in the area must attempt a Will save. The area is difficult terrain for any creature sickened by the effects of this spell.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Holographic Memory.name: 全息记忆 Holographic Memory
Holographic Memory.description:
你探入目标的心灵，提取一段你有所了解的特定记忆，并将其投射为一段全息影像。或者，在施放此法术时，你也可以选择抽取一段随机记忆，具体由GM裁定。该全息记忆最长不能超过5分钟；如果提取出的记忆长于此时长，则全息影像只会在该节点结束。该全息影像包含音频和视觉成分，但不包含触觉、嗅觉或其他成分。该全息影像通常会播放发生在单一场景中的记忆，不过如果符合该记忆内容且时长允许，它也可以切换至多个场景。该全息影像会完全按照目标亲身经历该记忆时的样子、并从目标的视角播放，因此往往缺乏背景信息。

该法术可以将任何活着的、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}的，或已死亡的、智力调整值为–3或更高的知性生物作为目标。若目标已死亡，则其死亡时间不能超过1周，否则该法术失败；一具尸体一旦被任何施法者施加过全息记忆，之后再对其施放全息记忆都会失败。

如果目标不愿分享这段记忆，它可以尝试进行一次意志豁免来抵抗该法术。

You reach into the target's mind, extract a specific memory you have some awareness of, and project it into a hologram. Alternatively, when casting this spell, you can choose to pull a random memory left to the GM's discretion. The holographic memory can be no longer than 5 minutes; if the extracted memory is longer than this, the hologram simply ends at that point. The hologram includes audio as well as visual components, but it doesn't contain haptic, olfactory, or other components. The hologram typically plays a memory that takes place in a single scene, though it can cut to multiple scenes if they're accurate to the memory and its length allows.
