The hologram plays the memory exactly as the target experienced it and from the target's perspective, so it often lacks context.

This spell can target any living, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, or deceased sentient creature with an Intelligence modifier of –3 or higher. If the target is deceased, it can't have been dead for longer than 1 week, or this spell fails; once a corpse has been subjected to holographic memory by any caster, any subsequent castings of holographic memory fail.

If the target is unwilling to share this memory, it can attempt a Will save to resist this spell.

Share Pain.name: 分担痛苦 Share Pain
Share Pain.description:
你以心灵感应与一个生物分享令人痛苦万分的疼痛感。目标受到 3d12 点精神伤害，并尝试进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，持续 1 分钟。

大失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，持续 1 分钟。

升阶（6环） 该法术的目标至多为四个生物，且造成 6d12 点精神伤害。

You telepathically share the sensation of agonizing pain with a creature. The target takes 3d12 mental damage and attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 minute.

Heightened (6th) The spell targets up to four creatures and deals 6d12 mental damage.

Doom Scroll.name: 末日卷轴 Doom Scroll
Doom Scroll.description:
你以魔法将可怕的消息广播到附近的设备、全息投影仪、屏幕和其他显示装置上（包括护甲上的通讯装置）。区域内能看到一个或多个显示装置的生物必须尝试进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物被显示装置 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}。

失败 该生物被显示装置着迷，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}（即使着迷结束也是如此）。

大失败 该生物被显示装置着迷，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 3}，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{注定 1}（即使着迷结束也是如此）。

You magically broadcast grim news onto nearby devices, holo projectors, screens, and other displays (including comm units on armor). Creatures in the area who can see one or more displays must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the display.

Failure The creature is fascinated by the display and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (even if the fascination ends).

Critical Failure The creature is fascinated by the display, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} (even if the fascination ends).

Soul Surge.name: 灵魂涌动 Soul Surge
Soul Surge.description:
你将自己的生命力导入一支能量长矛。你失去 6 点生命值；或者，如果你与一个至少有 12 点生命值的活力网络建立了联结，你也可以改为使该活力联结的生命值减少 12 点。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击检定。命中时，你造成 6d6 点灵魂伤害。重击时，目标受到双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 1}。

强化（+1） 造成的伤害增加 2d6，失去的生命值增加 2 点（如果你消耗的是活力网络的生命值，则改为增加 4 点）。

You channel your life force into a spear of energy. You lose 6 Hit Points or, if you're in a bond with a vitality network that has at least 12 Hit Points, you can reduce the vitality bond's Hit Points by 12 instead. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, you deal 6d6 spirit damage. On a critical hit, the target takes double damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage dealt by 2d6 and the Hit Points lost by 2 (or by 4 if you spend Hit Points from a vitality network).

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你专注于目标，在魔法全息影像显示信息的同时收集数据。施法完成时，你会获知关于目标的生物特征信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况和其他基本生理信息。你或任何接受你分析建议的人，在对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充}、对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}，以及对其进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 的检定时，获得 +1 状态加值。如果目标是幻象，或处于幻术魔法的影响之下，只有当该效果的环阶低于你的分析目标法术的环阶时，你才能察觉到这一点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{法术效果：分析目标}

强化（3环） 状态加值提高至 +2，且你的目标至多可以是 10 个生物。

强化（6环） 状态加值提高至 +3，且你可以将任意数量的生物作为目标。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Angelic Messenger.name: 天界信使 Angelic Messenger
Angelic Messenger.description:
你把自身传送至天界位面或者宇宙中中可以找到你的主人的信徒的世界里。你的等级不能高于天界信使的法术环级的两倍。

大成功 同成功，不过即便你之前从未到访过该位面或世界，也可以出现在天界信使的正确预定目标面前。

成功 你抵达目标位面或世界，但前提是你到访过该位面或世界；若你之前从未到访过该位面或世界，则会抵达天界信使的正确预定目标周围[[/r 10d10 #Miles Off]]英里内的随机地点。

失败 你未能成功旅行。

大失败 你意外旅行到了错误的位面，且很可能是危险的位面。

Ricochet.name: 弹射 Ricochet
Ricochet.description:
一枚旋转的圆盘或光滑的闪烁钢球会从一个目标跃向另一个目标。你造成 2d4 点钝击或挥砍伤害（进行一次基础反射豁免）。

强化（+1） 伤害提高 1d4。

A spinning disk or smooth orb of shimmering steel leaps from one target to another. You deal 2d4 bludgeoning or slashing damage (with a basic Reflex save).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Divine Farewell.name: 神圣道别 Divine Farewell
Divine Farewell.description:
20尺。天使灵光内的所有生物，对抗具有邪秽特征的生物和环境危害的攻击与效应时，其AC和豁免检定获得+1状态加值。

20 feet. All creatures within the angel's aura gain a +1 status bonus to their AC and saving throws against attacks and effects from creatures and hazards with the unholy trait.

Angelic Override.name: 天使超控 Angelic Override
Angelic Override.description:
巴拉基乌斯对一个邻近的生物或具有科技特征的物品进行一次数码匕首打击。

若命中，目标必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:25|options:inflicts:controlled,inflicts:dazzled,inflicts:stunned] 豁免，因为天使的圣洁影响试图夺取其控制权。具有圣洁特征的目标将其结果视为比掷骰结果高一个成功等级，而具有邪秽特征的目标则将其结果视为比掷骰结果低一个成功等级。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的视野被圣洁的符印与代码充满，使其获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状况，直到其下一回合结束。

失败 如成功，且目标还会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

大失败 目标的核心进程被天使夺取，使目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{受控} 状况，持续1分钟。当目标被巴拉基乌斯控制时，天使还可以将其任何法术视为从目标而非天使自身发出。目标可以在其每个回合结束时再次进行一次豁免，以结束受控状况。

The barachius makes a digital dagger Strike against an adjacent creature or item that has the tech trait.

On a hit, the target must attempt a @Check[will|dc:25|options:inflicts:controlled,inflicts:dazzled,inflicts:stunned] saving throw as the angel's holy influence attempts to seize control over it. A target with the holy trait use the outcome one degree of success better than the result of its roll, while one with the unholy trait uses the outcome one degree of success worse than the result of its roll.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's vision is filled with holy sigils and code, giving it the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} condition until the end of its next turn.

Failure As success, and the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The target's core processes are seized by the angel, giving the target the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} condition for 1 minute. While the target is controlled by the barachius, the angel can also use any of their spells as if it originated from the target rather than the angel. The target can attempt a new saving throw at the end of each of its turns to end the controlled condition.

Holy Arms.name: 圣洁武装 Holy Arms
Holy Arms.description:
在巴拉基乌斯天使手中，所有武器都获得圣洁和魔法特征，并由神圣意志驱动，因此无需电池或弹药。

In the hands of a barachius angel, all weapons gain the holy and magical traits and are powered by divine will, negating the need for batteries or ammunition.

Barachius Angel.publicNotes:
巴拉基乌斯天使是令人望而生畏、头戴头盔的身影，拥有由数字电路构成的发光双翼。它们监控科技的发展，以防其被用于邪恶目的。为达成这一神圣目标，它们的武装已被赐予圣洁能量。它们能够生成一把可折叠的数据刃，从手中伸出，并可用于与计算机终端和机器人上的数据端口进行通用接口连接。

巴拉基乌斯天使作为仁善诸神的神圣征伐者而效命——清除物质宇宙中被认定为扭曲或邪恶的科技。对于何谓邪恶，它们的理念可能并不明确，因为这些天使也许会猎杀一台发生故障的单体机器人，却对核导弹发射井置之不理。

尽管现代的许多天使都是由来自宇宙各处的凡人灵魂升格而来，这些天族存在却是整个宇宙中最早诞生的生物之一。作为诸神的战士与信使，它们对自身使命完全奉献，无论那使命是消灭邪恶，还是将某位神祇的讯息传播至整个星系。

Barachius angels are imposing, helmed figures with glowing wings made of digital circuitry. They monitor the development of technology to prevent it from being used for malevolent purposes. Toward this divine end, their armaments have been blessed with holy energy. They can produce a retractable data blade that extends from their hand and that can be used to interface universally with computer terminals and data ports on robots.

Barachius angels serve as divine vanquishers to benevolent gods—purging technology across the Universe deemed to be twisted or evil. Their philosophies on what constitutes evil can be unclear, as these angels might hunt down an individual malfunctioning robot yet leave nuclear missile silos untouched.

While many angels in modern times ascended from mortal souls across the cosmos, these celestial beings were among the first creatures to exist in all the cosmos. Warriors and messengers of the gods, they're utterly devoted to their cause, whether that be destroying evil or spreading a deity's message across the galaxy.

Tashtari Alpha.name: 塔什塔里首领 Tashtari Alpha
Tashtari Alpha.tokenName: 塔什塔里阿尔法 Tashtari Alpha

Bristle Flash.name: 刚刺闪光 Bristle Flash
Bristle Flash.description:
塔什塔里使其丝状物发出强烈光芒。位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:40] 内的非塔什塔里生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:21] 豁免。尝试过此次豁免的生物对所有刺鬃闪光在 1 分钟内免疫。随后，塔什塔里的皮毛会变暗，并且在至少沐浴阳光 10 分钟之前，无法再次使用此能力。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 轮。

失败 该生物目眩 1 分钟。

大失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 1 轮，并目眩 1 分钟。

The tashtari causes their filaments to glow with intense light. Non-tashtari creatures within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:40] must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:21] save. A creature that attempts this save is immune to all Bristle Flashes for 1 minute. The tashtari's fur then dims, and they can't use this ability until they bask in sunlight for at least 10 minutes.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is dazzled for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round and dazzled for 1 minute.

Solar Cry.name: 星辰哀号 Solar Cry
Solar Cry.description:
塔什塔里首领释放出一道炽热的彩虹口鼻光束，光束冲向天空后分裂成无数道多彩光线，向四面八方轰然坠落。每个非塔什塔里生物在 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内受到 @Damage[4d6[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:19|basic] 豁免）。若重度失败，能看见塔什塔里首领的生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，持续1分钟。区域内的其他塔什塔里为其荆刺闪光充能。塔什塔里首领发光的心脏会变得黯淡，且在至少沐浴阳光1小时之前无法再次使用此能力。

The tashtari alpha unleashes a searing, rainbow muzzle beam that soars into the sky before splitting into countless rays of multicolored light that crash down in every direction. Each non-tashtari creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] takes @Damage[4d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:19|basic] save). On a critical failure, a creature that can see the tashtari alpha is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute. Other tashtaris in the area recharge their Bristle Flash. The tashtari alpha's glowing heart dims, and they can't use this ability until they bask in sunlight for at least 1 hour.

Tashtari Alpha.publicNotes:
原产于绿色世界卡斯卓韦的塔什塔里，已在更广阔的银河中以“激光狼”闻名。塔什塔里是狼一般的群居猎手，身上覆盖着一层柔韧的丝状结构，能够发出磷光，并让它们通过一种定制的视觉语言进行无声交流。每只塔什塔里的喉部都拥有一个结点，使其能够引导储存的太阳能并释放一道聚焦光束，这也让它们获得了“激光狼”的别称。由一只或两只头狼组成的交配伴侣会领导塔什塔里狼群，而它们通常会成为拥有一处或多处森林区域的广大地带中的顶级掠食者。树木的存在对夜行性的塔什塔里至关重要，因为它们白天会睡在树梢上，沐浴阳光，为自身的太阳能充能。

Native to the green world of Castrovel, the tashtari has become known throughout the wider galaxy as the laser wolf. Wolflike pack hunters, tashtaris have a layer of flexible filaments that emit phosphorescent lights and allow them to silently communicate through a bespoke visual language. Each tashtari possesses a node within their throat that allows them to channel their stored solar energy and unleash a beam of focused light, giving them their moniker of laser wolves. A mating pair, consisting of one or two alphas, leads packs of tashtaris, who generally become the apex predators of large areas with one or more forested regions. The presence of trees is important for the nocturnal tashtaris, who sleep on the treetops during the day to bask in sunlight and recharge their solar energies.

Irradiated Undead Charger.name: 受辐照不死冲锋者 Irradiated Undead Charger
Irradiated Undead Charger.tokenName: 受辐射的亡灵冲锋者 Irradiated Undead Charger

Meltdown.name: 熔毁 Meltdown
Meltdown.description:
触发条件 这株受辐照的不死植物因任何种类的能量伤害而生命值降至 0

效果 该能量充当核反应的催化剂，使植物爆炸，并对 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内的所有生物造成 @Damage[9d6[poison]|options:area-damage] 伤害，进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:24|basic] 豁免。

Trigger The irradiated undead plant is reduced to 0 Hit Points by energy damage of any kind

Effect The energy acts as a catalyst for a nuclear reaction, causing the plant to explode and dealing @Damage[9d6[poison]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] with a @Check[reflex|dc:24|basic] save.

Radioactive Remains.name: 放射性遗骸 Radioactive Remains
Radioactive Remains.description:
20英尺。生物进入该灵光范围内，或在其中开始其回合时，会暴露于极端辐射之下。

20 feet. A creature entering or starting its turn inside the aura is exposed to extreme radiation.

Charged Burst.name: 充能爆发 Charged Burst
Charged Burst.description:
辐照冲锋兽在冲锋时会引发一次局部放射性反应。它先移动一次，然后进行一次打击。被此次攻击伤害的生物，每因该冲锋兽在进行其打击前移动了1格，便额外受到1点虚空伤害。若为重击，该生物还会被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

The irradiated charger triggers a localized radioactive reaction as it charges. It Strides once and then Strikes. A creature damaged by this attack takes 1 additional point of void damage for every space the charger moved prior to making its Strike. On a critical hit, the creature is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Trample.name: 践踏 Trample
Trample.description:
中型或更小，獠牙，@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic]

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

Medium or smaller, Tusk, @Check[reflex|dc:24|basic]

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

Irradiated Undead Charger.publicNotes:
冲锋尸有着和其起源星球一样多的别称，通常诞生于因天然或人为核灾难而死亡的野兽受辐照尸体之中。这些四足、兽性的亡灵，因其强力的冲锋攻击而得名。

为了在严酷无情的太空中生存，生物必须要么天生适应环境，要么采取防护措施。虽然死者通常很少需要针对这些威胁采取此类防护，但有时辐射会让一具尸体（或好几具）活动起来，进入亡灵状态！

科学家和宗教学者们都在争论，是否是某种特定类型的辐射导致了这一会自发引发非生命状态的现象，但所有人都一致认同，这类受辐照生物所带来的危险不容忽视。许多类型的辐射都可能是成因：恒星释放出的强烈太空辐射爆发、行星或卫星地壳中发现的经魔法强化的放射性同位素，甚至是某个社群中新型能源的出现（或其放射性废料）对土地造成的污染。无论其具体起源如何，所有受辐照亡灵都会带来同样的威胁——它们会释放出电离辐射，摧残周围的一切。

Chargers, known by as many different names as their planets of origin, usually spawn from the irradiated corpses of beasts slain by natural or manufactured nuclear disasters. These quadrupedal, animalistic undead are so named for their mighty charge attack.

To survive in the unforgiving expanse of space, creatures must be naturally adapted or take protective measures. While the dead rarely need such precautions against these threats, sometimes radiation can animate a corpse (or several) to a state of undeath!

Scientists and religious scholars alike debate whether a specific type of radiation is to blame for this phenomenon that spontaneously triggers unlife, but all agree on the dangers such irradiated creatures pose. Many types of radiation could be the cause: intense bursts of cosmic radiation emitted by the stars, magically enhanced radioactive isotopes found in a planet's or moon's crust, or even the advent of new energy sources in a society (or its radioactive waste) contaminating the land. Regardless of their specific origin, irradiated undead all pose the same threat—they emit ionizing radiation that ravages everything around them.

Infrared Vision.name: 红外视觉 Infrared Vision
Infrared Vision.description:
血亲兽可以在所列距离内将红外辐射（例如温血生物发出的红外辐射）作为精确感官来察觉。

A bloodbrother can detect infrared radiation (such as that given off by warm-blooded creatures) as a precise sense at the listed range.

Frigid Cold.name: 刺骨寒冷 Frigid Cold
Frigid Cold.description:
10英尺。血亲兽的血肉会散发出强烈的寒冷。生物在该区域内开始其回合时，必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:22|options:area-effect,inflicts:fatigued] 豁免，否则在其停留于该区域内期间陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 状态。对环境寒冷效应免疫的生物，或具有任何寒冷抗性的生物，均免疫。

10 feet. A bloodbrother's flesh radiates intense cold. A creature that starts its turn in the area must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:22|options:area-effect,inflicts:fatigued] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} while it remains in the area. Creatures immune to environmental cold effects or with any cold resistance are immune.

Drain Vital Fluids.name: 吸取生命液体 Drain Vital Fluids
Drain Vital Fluids.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 一个生物被囚禁在血亲兽的肋 cage 监牢中

效果 血亲兽从被囚禁的生物身上抽取生命体液。受害者陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} 状态（或其 drained 值增加 1），且血亲兽恢复 @Damage[10[healing]] 生命值，任何超出的生命值都会作为持续 1 分钟的临时生命值获得。

Frequency once per round

Requirements A creature is imprisoned in the bloodbrother's ribcage prison

Effect The bloodbrother drains the vital fluids from the imprisoned creature. The victim is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (or increases its drained value by 1), and the bloodbrother regains @Damage[10[healing]] Hit Points, gaining any excess Hit Points as temporary Hit Points that last for 1 minute.

Frigid Touch.name: 寒冷之触 Frigid Touch
Frigid Touch.description:
在其回合开始时若处于被血亲兽 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚} 的状态，则该生物受到 @Damage[1d8[cold]] 伤害。

A creature that begins its turn @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} by the bloodbrother takes @Damage[1d8[cold]] damage.

Grisly Ambush.name: 骇人伏击 Grisly Ambush
Grisly Ambush.description:
触发条件 血亲兽在战斗的第一轮命中一个生物，且血亲兽在战斗开始时处于该生物未察觉的状态

效果 30尺内每个目睹此次攻击的敌人（包括该攻击的目标）都必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:25|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened] 豁免。若失败，该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}（若重度失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 4}）。

Trigger The bloodbrother hits a creature in the first round of combat, and the bloodbrother was hidden from that creature at the start of combat

Effect Each enemy within 30 feet that witnesses the attack (including the target of the attack) must attempt a @Check[will|dc:25|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened] save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4} on a critical failure).

Ice Passage.name: 冰封通道 Ice Passage
Ice Passage.description:
血亲兽无视由冰和雪造成的困难地形，并且在穿越冰面时不会有跌倒的风险。

A bloodbrother ignores difficult terrain from ice and snow and doesn't risk falling when crossing ice.

Imprison.name: 囚禁 Imprison
Imprison.description:
要求 血亲兽已用其骨刺使一个大型或更小的生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{抓握} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚} 状态

效果 血亲兽试图将所需的生物囚禁进自己的肋笼牢狱中。血亲兽进行一次 @Check[athletics|against:reflex] 检定，对抗该生物的反射DC；若成功，便将其囚禁。血亲兽的骨刺不再抓握或束缚被其囚禁的生物，因此血亲兽可以再次使用其骨刺进行一次打击。血亲兽不能攻击被其囚禁的生物，且其肋笼牢狱同一时间只能囚禁一个生物。被囚禁的生物处于束缚状态（[[/act escape dc=25]]），并且在处于束缚状态时，暂时免疫血亲兽的寒霜之触。

Requirements The bloodbrother has a Large or smaller creature @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} with their bone spur

Effect The bloodbrother tries to imprison the required creature in their ribcage prison. The bloodbrother attempts an @Check[athletics|against:reflex] check against the creature's Reflex DC, imprisoning it on a success. The bloodbrother's bone spur is no longer grabbing or restraining the creature they've imprisoned, so the bloodbrother is free to use their bone spur Strike once again. The bloodbrother can't attack a creature they've imprisoned and can have only one creature imprisoned in their ribcage prison at a time. An imprisoned creature is restrained ([[/act escape dc=25]]) and temporarily immune to the bloodbrother's frigid touch while restrained.

Paradoxical Solipsist.name: 悖论式唯我论者 Paradoxical Solipsist
Paradoxical Solipsist.tokenName: 悖论唯我论者 Paradoxical Solipsist

Occult Innate Spells.name: 先天异能法术 Occult Innate Spells

Subjective Reality.name: 主观现实 Subjective Reality
Subjective Reality.description:
你改变自己的感知，说服自己另一个生物或物体只是幻觉。选择一个你能在射程内感知到的物体或生物。对你而言，目标会变得透明，且不会产生声音、气味或其他感官输出。你可以穿过目标移动，目标也可以穿过你移动。你获得对所有源自目标的伤害的抗性，数值等于你的等级。如果你成为目标某个能力或效应的目标，或处于其区域内，则目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[flat|dc:5]；若其失败，你不受该能力或效应影响。你免疫目标所有具有听觉、语言和气味基础的攻击与效应。你的攻击对目标不造成伤害，且目标免疫你的法术和其他效应。你与目标仍可间接影响彼此，例如通过仆从的打击，或通过受巫术扭曲者量子场影响的环境。当该法术结束时，目标会对主观现实免疫 24 小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.4P2rPLVKjSpUbOWI]{法术效果：主观现实}

You alter your perceptions to convince yourself that another creature or object is an illusion. Choose one object or creature you can perceive within range. For you, the target becomes transparent and doesn't create sound, smell, or other sensory output. You can move through the target, and the target can move through you. You gain resistance to all damage originating from the target equal to your level. If you are targeted by or are in the area of one of the target's abilities or effects, the target must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5], and if it fails, you're unaffected by the ability or effect. You're immune to all of the target's auditory, linguistic, and scent-based attacks and effects. Your attacks deal no damage to the target, and the target is immune to your spells and other effects. You and the target can affect one another indirectly, such as through a Strike from a minion or through the environment affected by a witchwarper's quantum field. When this spell ends, the target becomes immune to subjective reality for 24 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.4P2rPLVKjSpUbOWI]{Spell Effect: Subjective Reality}

Suggestion.name: 暗示术 Suggestion
Suggestion.description:
你的甜言蜜语令生物难以抗拒。你向目标指示一系列动作，其用语对目标而言必须是一系列合理的动作，并且它不可以招致自毁或者明显违抗目标自身愿望。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你尝试控制它。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标立即按照你的指示行动。该法术的持续时间为1分钟，或者直到目标完成一个有终点的指示，或者直到指示变得会招致自毁，或具有其他明显的负面效果。

大失败 如同失败，但基本持续时间为1小时。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Translocate.name: 次元移位 Translocate
Translocate.description:
你立即将自身以及自己正在穿戴和持有的物品从当前空间转移走，移动至法术射程内你能看到的未被占据的空间。如果这将会带着其他生物与你一同移动——即便你把该生物放置在异次元容器中——你就会失去该法术。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至1英里。你不需要看到目的地，只要你曾经去过目的地，并且知晓该地点与你相对的位置以及距离即可。之后你会在1小时内临时免疫该法术。

Calm.name: 安定心神 Calm
Calm.description:
你令区域内的生物强制冷静，令它们进入平和的状态；每个生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 对沉静的渴求令该生物在攻击骰上承受-1状态减值。

失败 任何会影响该生物的情绪效果会被压制，并且该生物无法进行敌对行为。如果该目标成为任何其他生物敌对行为的目标，它不再受到安定心神的影响。

大失败 如同失败，但是敌对行为不会结束该效果。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Qr5rgoZvI4KmFY0N]{法术效果：安定心神}

Vibe Check.name: 氛围检查 Vibe Check
Vibe Check.description:
你通过将强烈情绪以心灵感应投射进一个生物的意识中来共享一种情绪。目标必须进行一次意志豁免。若失败，目标会体验你从以下情绪中选择的一种；但如果你选择愤怒或喜悦，此法术获得失能（特征）。

  • 愤怒 在其下一回合，目标将用它的第一个动作攻击最近的生物，即使那是它的盟友。
  • 喜悦 目标不能采取任何敌对行动。
  • 恐惧 目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。
  • 悲伤 目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}，并突然流下眼泪。

升阶（4环） 该法术影响20尺爆发内的所有生物。每个生物都必须受到同一种情绪影响。

You share a mood by psychically projecting an intense emotion into a creature's mind. The target attempts a Will save. On a failure, the target experiences your choice of the following emotions, but if you pick anger or joy this spell gains the incapacitation trait.

  • Anger On its next turn, the target spends its first action to attack the nearest creature, even if it's an ally.
  • Joy The target can't take any hostile actions.
  • Fear The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.
  • Sorrow The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and bursts into tears.

Heightened (4th) The spell affects all creatures in a 20-foot burst. Each creature must be affected by the same emotion.

Wisp Ally.name: 微光盟友 Wisp Ally
Wisp Ally.description:
你召唤出一个微型的、蹦跳的光之幽芒，足以轻易分散哪怕最坚定的战斗者的注意力。该幽芒漂浮在你的目标附近。幽芒不占据空间、不提供夹击，也不具有生物所拥有的任何其他属性。该幽芒在10英尺半径内产生明亮光照。当你施放此法术时，以及每次你维持该法术时，你的幽芒都会尝试分散你的目标的注意力；目标必须通过一次意志豁免，否则将变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，直到你的下个回合开始。若某生物获得重度成功，则其在1小时内免疫灵芒盟友。

强化（+1） 你会额外制造一个幽芒，从而可以选择一个不同的目标。你创造的每个幽芒都必须拥有不同的目标，并且当你施放或维持此法术时，它们都会在同一时间尝试分散各自目标的注意力。

You summon a Tiny bouncing wisp of light that easily distracts even the most determined of combatants. The wisp floats near your target. A wisp doesn't take up space, grant flanking, or have any other attributes a creature would. The wisp generates bright light in a 10-foot radius. When you Cast the Spell and each time you Sustain the spell, your wisp attempts to distract your target, which must succeed at a Will save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn. A creature who critically succeeds becomes immune to wisp ally for 1 hour.

Heightened (+1) You create one additional wisp, allowing you to choose a different target. Each wisp you create must have a different target, and all of them attempt to distract their targets at the same time when you cast or Sustain this spell.

Flash Grenade (Advanced).name: 闪光手雷（先进型） Flash Grenade (Advanced)
Flash Grenade (Advanced).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 1轮

闪光手雷会释放出一阵强光爆炸，要求 @Template[burst|distance:10] 内的生物尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class] 豁免。若失败，该生物将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 2轮。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round

A flash grenade unleashes a blast of bright light that requires creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:10] to attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 2 rounds.

Flight Suit.name: 飞行服 Flight Suit
Flight Suit.description:
升级： 0

这款舒适的连体工作服由轻质保温织物制成，常饰有展示个人徽记、军衔，甚至最喜欢的乐队或运动队的贴章。

Upgrades: 0

This comfortable coverall is made from lightweight thermal fabric and often adorned with patches displaying personal insignia, military rank, or even favorite bands or sports teams.

Flash Grenade.name: 闪光手雷 Flash Grenade
Flash Grenade.description:
效果 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 持续 2 轮，失败时（@Check[fortitude|dc:26] 豁免）

Effect @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 2 rounds on failure (@Check[fortitude|dc:26] save)

Elude Consequences.name: 逃避后果 Elude Consequences
Elude Consequences.description:
触发条件 唯我论者成功通过一次意志豁免，或对其进行的一次攻击严重失败

效果 唯我论者向其所选择的任意方向传送至多25英尺。唯我论者传送后与其相邻的生物，在唯我论者下个回合结束前，对其处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}状态。

Trigger The solipsist succeeds at a Will save, or an attack against them is a critical failure

Effect The solipsist teleports up to 25 feet in any direction of their choice. Creatures adjacent to the solipsist after they teleport are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to them until the end of the solipsist's next turn.

Perceive Unreality.name: 感知虚幻 Perceive Unreality
Perceive Unreality.description:
唯我论者将其正在观察的所有生物、物体和结构（Paradox 17除外）都视为准幻象，因此唯我论者可以像自己处于虚体状态那样穿过它们。他们还可以选择在对抗任何非伤害性效果的任何豁免检定中使用意志。

The solipsist treats all creatures, objects, and structures they're observing (except for Paradox 17) as quasi-illusory, allowing the solipsist to move through them as though the solipsist were incorporeal. They can also choose to use Will for any saving throw against any non-damaging effect.

Area Fire (Flash Grenade).name: 区域射击（闪光手雷） Area Fire (Flash Grenade)
Area Fire (Flash Grenade).description:
闪光手雷 (@Template[type:burst|distance:10], 射程 70 英尺，追踪 +1)

效果 失败时 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 2 轮（@Check[fortitude|dc:26] 豁免）

Flash Grenade (@Template[type:burst|distance:10], range 70 feet, tracking +1)

Effect @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 2 rounds on failure (@Check[fortitude|dc:26] save)

Baffling Attack.name: 惑乱攻击 Baffling Attack
Baffling Attack.description:
唯我论者对@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}的生物额外造成 2d6 精确伤害，并且在每回合中，他们首次以近战打击成功命中一名措手不及的生物时，目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:28] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}，并在震慑期间 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}。

The solipsist deals an additional 2d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures, and on the first successful melee Strike they make against an off-guard creature each turn, the target must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:28] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} while stunned.

Paradoxical Solipsist.publicNotes:
在六次有记录的案例中，与Paradox 17长期接触的个体在事后仍持续表现出异常行为。其中两人表示自己相信他们是在做梦，四人则认为自己身处一个充满敌意的模拟之中。后者中的一人在一次访谈中坚持要“再次找到那道光”，随后便穿过了看守人员和收容室墙壁，自此再也没有人见过他。

你真的能够知道，你所感知的物质宇宙是存在的吗？你能确定自己永远不会在某一天醒来，却发现这一切都只是一场梦吗？很久以前，有一整颗星球的哲学家曾试图寻找这些问题的答案……就在他们集体消失前不久。他们留下了令人费解的记录，声称一颗“旋舞之星”的光揭示了物质实体并无实质，而物质宇宙其实是一个精神牢笼。这些记录，就是已知与被称为Paradox 17的存在首次接触后仅存的遗留之物。

On six recorded occasions, individuals having prolonged contact with Paradox 17 continued to display anomalous behavior afterward. Two expressed belief they were dreaming, four that they were in a hostile simulation. One of these latter individuals insisted on "finding the light again" during an interview before walking through their guards and the holding cell wall, and they haven't been seen since.

Can you ever really know that the Universe you perceive exists? That you'll never awaken one day to find it was all a dream? A planet full of philosophers sought the answers to these questions once upon a time… shortly before they all vanished en masse. They left behind confusing records stating that the light of a "whirling star" revealed that physical matter had no substance and the Universe was secretly a mental prison. These records are all that remain from the first known encounter with the being known as Paradox 17.

Dust Worm Augur.name: 尘蠕虫卜者 Dust Worm Augur
Dust Worm Augur.tokenName: 尘蠕预言师 Dust Worm Augur

Electrocommunication.name: 电通讯 Electrocommunication
Electrocommunication.description:
尘蠕占兆师通过塑造和读取电磁场进行交流。对于同样拥有此能力的生物，这如同心灵感应。

Dust worm augurs communicate by shaping and reading electromagnetic fields. This functions like telepathy with creatures that share this ability.

Electromagnetic Sight.name: 电磁视觉 Electromagnetic Sight
Electromagnetic Sight.description:
尘蠕占卜者通过读取电磁场来感知周围环境，包括由生物或物体引起的扰动。这是在所列距离内的一种精确感知。强烈的场域，例如释放辐射的区域或带有电流灵光的区域，会使其中的生物对流散带蠕虫处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态。

Dust worm aurgurs sense their surroundings by reading electromagnetic fields, including disruptions caused by creatures or objects. This is a precise sense within the listed range. Intense fields, such as areas emitting radiation or auras of electricity, make creatures within them @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to the diaspora worm.

Electromagnetic Blindness.name: 电磁失明 Electromagnetic Blindness
Electromagnetic Blindness.description:
受到电击伤害的沙尘蠕虫预言者必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:43] 豁免。

大成功 该蠕虫不受影响。

成功 该蠕虫陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1轮。

失败 该蠕虫陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 1轮。

大失败 该蠕虫先陷入目盲1轮，随后陷入目眩1轮。

Dust worm aurgurs that take electricity damage must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:43] save.

Critical Success The worm is unaffected.

Success The worm is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The worm is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The worm is blinded for 1 round, then dazzled for 1 round.

Electromagnetic Surge.name: 电磁激涌 Electromagnetic Surge
Electromagnetic Surge.description:
沙尘蠕虫占兆师向一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:50] 内释放出一股集中的电磁波。区域内的每个生物都必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:40] 豁免。具有科技特征的生物，其结果视为比其掷骰结果低一级成功度。

大成功 该生物不受影响，并在 1 小时内免疫电磁激涌。

成功 该生物具有科技特征的物品变为故障 1，持续 1 轮。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}，且其具有科技特征的物品变为故障 2，持续 1 分钟。具有科技特征的生物也会获得此故障状态。

大失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}，持续 1 轮，且其具有科技特征的物品变为故障 3，持续 10 分钟。具有科技特征的生物也会获得此故障状态。

The dust worm augur emits a concentrated wave of electromagnetism in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50]. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:40] save. A creature with the tech trait uses the outcome one degree of success worse than the result of its roll.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and becomes immune to Electromagnetic Surge for 1 hour.

Success The creature's items with the tech trait become glitching 1 for 1 round.

Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, and its items with the tech trait become glitching 2 for 1 minute. A creature with the tech trait also gains this glitching condition.

Critical Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round, and its items with the tech trait become glitching 3 for 10 minutes. A creature with the tech trait also gains this glitching condition.

Sandstorm Vortex.name: 沙暴涡旋 Sandstorm Vortex
Sandstorm Vortex.description:
尘虫占兆师在一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] 内召唤出由沙尘与金属碎屑构成的飓风。这个漩涡会随蠕虫一同移动，并持续 1 分钟。该漩涡使蠕虫获得对物理伤害的 11 点抗性，并使其中的任何生物对外部生物而言处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐蔽}状态，反之亦然。任何进入该漩涡或在其中开始其回合的生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:40] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到 @Damage[3d10[slashing]|options:area-damage] 伤害。

失败 该生物受到 @Damage[6d10[slashing]|options:area-damage] 伤害，且在漩涡内时所有速度都承受 –15 尺的状态减值。

大失败 如同失败，但受到 @Damage[12d10[slashing]|options:area-damage] 伤害，且该生物还会被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

The dust worm augur conjures a hurricane of sand and metallic bits in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15]. This vortex moves with the worm and lasts for 1 minute. The vortex grants the worm resistance 11 to physical damage and makes any creature inside of it @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to creatures outside of it, and vice versa. Any creature that enters or starts its turn within the vortex must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:40] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes @Damage[3d10[slashing]|options:area-damage] damage.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[6d10[slashing]|options:area-damage] damage and takes a –15-foot status penalty to all Speeds while within the vortex.

Critical Failure As failure, but @Damage[12d10[slashing]|options:area-damage] damage, and the creature is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Tongue Grab.name: 舌头抓取 Tongue Grab
Tongue Grab.description:
被尘虫预兆者的舌头命中的生物会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱}。生物可以对 AC 42 进行一次打击，且至少造成 @Damage[38[slashing]] 伤害，以切断这条舌头。这会阻止该虫使用其舌头打击，直到它重新长出舌头，这需要 1 天。

A creature hit by the dust worm augur's tongue becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}. A creature can sever the tongue with a Strike against AC 42 that deals at least @Damage[38[slashing]] damage. This prevents the worm from using its tongue Strike until it regrows its tongue, which takes 1 day.

Tongue Reel.name: 卷舌轮盘 Tongue Reel
Tongue Reel.description:
要求 尘蠕预言者已用其舌头对一个生物施加了@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{抓握}

效果 流散带蠕虫尝试将被抓握的生物[[/act reposition]]向自己拉近。若被抓握的生物被带到距蠕虫10英尺或更近的位置，蠕虫可以尝试将该生物整个吞下。

Requirements The dust worm aurgur has @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} a creature with its tongue

Effect The diaspora worm attempts to [[/act reposition]] the grabbed creature toward the worm. If the grabbed creature is brought to within 10 feet or less of the worm, the worm can attempt to Swallow Whole the creature.

Dust Worm Augur.publicNotes:
古老的流散带尘虫会成为虫群殖民的完美典范，征服小行星，并煞费苦心地将其地球化改造，以支持虫群社群。

“太空蠕虫”是一个非科学术语，用来指称一类在异种生物学上很复杂的无脊椎动物与野兽谱系，它们栖居于广袤太空之中。其中一些，如流散带尘虫，显现出智慧的迹象，且彼此之间有直接亲缘关系。另一些，如瑟诺赫，则是分别独立演化而来，其起源对科学而言完全未知。

Ancient diaspora dust worms become paragons of worm colonization, conquering asteroids and painstakingly terraforming them to support worm society.

"Space worm" is a nonscientific term for a xenobiologically complex clade of invertebrate animals and beasts that make their home in the vastness of space. Some, like the diaspora and dust worms, show signs of intelligence and are directly related to each other. Others, like the surnoch, evolved separately, with their origins completely unknown to science.

Botnib.name: 博特尼布 Botnib

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Delete.name: 删除 Delete
Delete.description:
你以一个花哨的魔法手势删除装置或物体上的数据。这些数据可以是手写的、印刷的或数字形式的。你最多可以删除相当于1,500个单词的文本、一页内容，或一个显示屏大小的文本或其他视觉信息。位于无人看管或被持握物体中或其上的非魔法文字会被自动删除。尝试进行反制检定以删除数字或魔法文字。如果你未能删除属于一个危害一部分的文字，你会触发该危害。此法术不能用于删除法术书或类似用于储存魔法公式或法术的载体中的内容。

如果你的目标是一件具有追踪（特征）的受持科技物品，则尝试进行反制检定。成功时，该物品变为故障 1。持握该物品的生物可以通过交互来重启软件，使故障值减少1。

升阶（7环） 你可以删除单个装置或书籍中本地存储的全部数据，或删除装置或书籍上与某个特定名称、主题或类别相关的全部数据。

You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Electric Arc.name: 电弧击 Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一段电弧从一个目标跳跃到另一个目标。每个目标承受2d4电击伤害，这有一次基础反射豁免。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Figment.name: 虚构幻术 Figment
Figment.description:
你创造出简单的声音或图像的幻术。声音会为法术添加听觉特征，且不能包含能被理解的单词或复杂的音乐。图像会为法术添加视觉特征，但是它不能大于5尺边长的立方体，且在15尺的距离内观察会发现它的构造明显很粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你能尝试用幻术让人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}，这会为你的欺骗检定提供+2环境加值。若对某个生物进行的此尝试失败了，该生物就不会相信虚构幻术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：虚构幻术}

Recharge Weapon.name: 充能武器 Recharge Weapon
Recharge Weapon.description:
你触碰一把没有剩余弹药的武器，并以魔法能量为其充能。目标获得等同于其 expend 数值的弹药或充能，直到你的下个回合结束，使任何持握该目标的人都能用该武器进行一次打击。该法术只能为使用成本为 10 信用点或以下弹药的武器充能。

升环（3环） 目标获得等同于其 expend 两倍的弹药或充能。

升环（6环） 目标获得等同于其 expend 三倍的弹药或充能。

升环（9环） 目标获得等同于其 expend 四倍的弹药或充能。

You touch a weapon with no remaining ammunition and recharge it with magical energy. The target gains ammunition or charges equal to its expend until the end of your next turn, allowing anyone holding the target to make one Strike with the weapon. This spell only recharges weapons that use ammunition with a cost of 10 credits or less.

Heightened (3rd) The target gains ammunition or charges equal to double its expend.

Heightened (6th) The target gains ammunition or charges equal to triple its expend.

Heightened (9th) The target gains ammunition or charges equal to quadruple its expend.

Thunderstrike.name: 雷击术 Thunderstrike
Thunderstrike.description:
你呼唤一道伴随着雷鸣之声的闪电，对目标造成1d12点电击伤害和1d4点音波伤害，基础反射豁免。穿戴金属护甲或者由金属构成的生物在豁免中承受-1环境减值，若它们受到该法术的伤害，会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 1}，持续1轮。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d12点电击以及1d4点音波。

Digital Telepathy.name: 数字心灵感应 Digital Telepathy
Digital Telepathy.description:
博特尼布可以与数字设备以及其他能够这样做的生物（例如其他博特尼布）进行心灵感应交流。这使博特尼布能够尝试进行“计算机”检定，以访问心灵感应范围内的任何计算机。

A botnib can communicate telepathically with digital devices and with other creatures that can do so (such as other botnibs). This allows the botnib to attempt Computers checks to access any computer within the telepathy's range.

Techsense.name: 科技感知 Techsense
Techsense.description:
博特尼布能够感知100英尺内具有科技特征的物品和生物。

The botnib can sense items and creatures with the tech trait within 100 feet.

Glitch Aura.name: 故障灵光 Glitch Aura
Glitch Aura.description:
20英尺。带有科技特征的生物和物品在接近博特尼布时会难以可靠运作。带有科技特征的生物、带有科技特征的无人持用物品，或持有带有科技特征装备的生物，若在其回合开始时处于该灵光内，必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:16|options:area-effect,inflicts:glitching] 豁免。

大成功 无效果，且该生物或物品在1分钟内暂时免疫博特尼布的故障灵光。

成功 该生物或物品不受影响。

失败 该生物、物品，或该生物持有的所有物品变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}。

大失败 如同失败，但为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}。

20 feet. Creatures and items with the tech trait struggle to function reliably when near a botnib. Creatures with the tech trait, unattended items with the tech trait, or creatures holding equipment with the tech trait that start their turn in the aura must attempt a @Check[will|dc:16|options:area-effect,inflicts:glitching] save.

Critical Success No effect, and the creature or item is temporarily immune to the botnib's glitch aura for 1 minute.

Success The creature or items are unaffected.

Failure The creature, item, or all the creature's held items become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}.

Critical Failure As failure, but @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.

Botnib.publicNotes:
卑微的博特尼布，也被称为电脑故障小魔怪，与现代的计算化设备和网络有着一种直觉上的联系。这些嬉闹的精类以尽可能制造更多破坏为使命，通过影响计算机系统并在所到之处制造混乱来达成目的。电脑故障小魔怪以其与数字设备交流的天生能力而闻名，常常会迷恋上这类系统，并像拼一个有趣的谜题一样去颠覆它们。

早在大断层之前很久，小魔怪就已经用残酷的恶作剧祸害着物质宇宙，并且已经完全适应了充满科技的银河。无论是干扰通讯装置、一艘星舰，还是整座空间站，小魔怪都以毁坏与混乱为乐。

The lowly botnib, also called a computer glitch gremlin, is intuitively tied with the computerized devices and networks of the modern age. These cavorting fey make it their mission to create as much havoc as they can by influencing computer systems and creating chaos in their wake. Known for their innate ability to communicate with digital devices, computer glitch gremlins routinely become infatuated with such systems, which they subvert like one might put together a fun puzzle.

Gremlins have plagued the Universe with cruel tricks since long before the Gap, and they've fully adapted to a galaxy filled with technology. Whether meddling with a comm unit, a starship, or an entire space station, gremlins delight in ruination and chaos.

Driftdead Returned.name: 飘流亡者归来 Driftdead Returned
Driftdead Returned.tokenName: 漂流亡者归来 Driftdead Returned

Drift Ambush.name: 漂流域伏击 Drift Ambush
Drift Ambush.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 漂流域死灵传送，最远可达其速度。如果它位于漂流域中，漂流域死灵能够传送的距离翻倍。

Frequency once per round

Effect The driftdead teleports up to its Speed. If it's in the Drift, the distance a driftdead can teleport is doubled.

Driftdead Returned.publicNotes:
这些可悲灵体中最弱小的是归返者。它们看起来像是自己生前形态的扭曲版本，用扭动的、带爪的附肢拖着自己穿行于太空，或以骇人的优雅漂浮。归返者出没于漂流信标、失事飞船和无空气的岩体。

漂流亡骸诞生于躁动不安的灵魂与位面能量融合，并将自己的尸体重新激活成令人不安的生命拙劣仿制品之时。极少数情况下，从别处被攫来的受扰灵体会彼此融合，共同寄居于一具尸体之中。漂流域中的任何死亡都可能催生出漂流亡骸，但那些在强烈情绪狂潮中死去的生物，更有可能完成这种转变。

The least of these wretched spirits are the returned. Appearing as twisted versions of the shapes they wore in life, the returned drag themselves through space with wriggling, clawed appendages or float with hideous grace. The returned haunt Drift beacons, castaway ships, and airless rocks.

Driftdead are created when a restless soul fuses with planar energies and reanimates its own corpse into a disturbing parody of life. Rarely, disturbed spirits snatched from elsewhere fuse together to inhabit a single dead body. Any death within the Drift might spawn a driftdead, but creatures that die in a frenzy of intense emotion are more likely to make the transition.

Trawler.name: 拖网船 Trawler

Transparency.name: 透明巨构 Transparency
Transparency.description:
除非它们最近进食过，否则拖网虫天生完全透明，使它们在没有隐蔽或掩护的情况下也能[[/act hide]]，并在进行“躲藏”的隐秘检定时获得+4处境加值。拖网虫若采取任何种类的敌对动作，便会失去这种透明性。

Unless they've fed recently, the trawler is naturally fully transparent, allowing them to [[/act hide]] without concealment or cover and granting them a +4 circumstance bonus to Stealth checks to Hide. A trawler loses this transparency if they take a hostile action of any kind.

Reel In.name: 收线 Reel In
Reel In.description:
需求 捕捞者已用其套索丝状体使一个中型或更小的生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱} 状态

效果 捕捞者将该生物拉向自己。它对目标的强韧DC进行一次运动检定。捕捞者可以通过这种方式将生物提离地面。

大成功 目标被移动到离捕捞者更近20英尺的位置。

成功 目标被移动到离捕捞者更近10英尺的位置。

大失败 捕捞者放开目标。

Requirements The trawler has a Medium or smaller creature @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} with its lasso filament

Effect The trawler pulls the creature toward themself. They attempt an Athletics check against the target's Fortitude DC. A trawler can lift a creature off the ground in this way.

Critical Success The target is moved 20 feet closer to the trawler.

Success The target is moved 10 feet closer to the trawler.

Critical Failure The trawler releases the target.

Sticky Filaments.name: 黏性丝缕 Sticky Filaments
Sticky Filaments.description:
被捕捞者的套索丝命中的生物会被捕捞者 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}。该生物并非 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}，但它无法移动到超出套索丝射程的地方。只要生物被套索丝擒抱，它就会处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。生物可以通过一次对 AC 19 的打击切断丝线，且该打击至少造成 6 点火焰或挥砍伤害。这不会对捕捞者造成伤害，但会摧毁这根丝线。一个捕捞者有三根套索丝；如果三根都被摧毁，它们就无法使用套索丝打击。捕捞者需要一周时间才能重新长出全部三根丝线。

A creature hit by the trawler's lasso filament becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by the trawler. The creature isn't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, but it can't move beyond the range of the lasso filament. A creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for as long as it's grabbed by a lasso filament. A creature can sever the filament with a Strike against AC 19 that deals at least 6 fire or slashing damage. This deals no damage to the trawler but destroys the filament. A trawler has three lasso filaments, and they can't use their lasso filament Strike if all three are destroyed. It takes a week for the trawler to regrow all three of their filaments.

Trawler Venom.name: 拖网者毒液 Trawler Venom
Trawler Venom.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:20]

最长持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[2d4[poison]] 伤害，衰弱 2，且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1 轮）

阶段 4 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害，衰弱 2，且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:20]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[2d4[poison]] damage, enfeebled 2, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 4 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage, enfeebled 2, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 round)

Trawler.publicNotes:
经验丰富的卡斯卓韦探险者都知道要留意天空，以免在毫无防备时被一只半透明的拖网者偷袭。拖网者能够纺出覆有黏性涂层的丝线，这种涂层带有轻微的麻醉效果，使它们可以在远处潜行跟踪，然后将猎物拉到近前，同时始终轻松地悬浮于空中。

成年拖网者极少会主动降落或停栖在任何东西上。通常，它们会让自己与任何物体之间至少保持一小段空气间隙。若被迫待在地面上，拖网者可以用触手笨拙地移动，不过多数时候，它们一有机会就会把自己重新发射到空中。

Experienced explorers of Castrovel know to monitor the sky, lest they be caught unaware by a diaphanous trawler. A trawler can spin a filament with sticky coating that has a mild anesthetic effect, allowing them to stalk at a distance and then pull their prey in close, all while comfortably airborne.

It's extremely rare for an adult trawler to land or alight on anything voluntarily. Usually, they maintain at least a minimal air gap between themself and any object. If forced to be on the ground, a trawler can use their tentacles to clumsily ambulate, though more often than not, they'll launch themself into the air given the first opportunity.

Civusdaemon.name: 民间魔鬼 Civusdaemon

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣先天法术 Divine Innate Spells

Nightmare.name: 梦魇 Nightmare
Nightmare.description:
你向目标送去一段恼人的噩梦。在目标下一次入睡时，它必须尝试一次意志豁免。如果你知道目标的名字但是从未遇见过它，目标在意志豁免上获得+4环境加值。

大成功 目标不承受任何负面效果，并暂时免疫1星期。

成功 目标经历了噩梦，但不会承受除了糟糕回忆以外的负面效果。

失败 目标经历噩梦，并且在醒来时@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}。

大失败 目标经历噩梦，醒来时疲乏，并且获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 2} 直到不再疲乏。

Suggestion.name: 暗示术 Suggestion
Suggestion.description:
你的甜言蜜语令生物难以抗拒。你向目标指示一系列动作，其用语对目标而言必须是一系列合理的动作，并且它不可以招致自毁或者明显违抗目标自身愿望。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你尝试控制它。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标立即按照你的指示行动。该法术的持续时间为1分钟，或者直到目标完成一个有终点的指示，或者直到指示变得会招致自毁，或具有其他明显的负面效果。

大失败 如同失败，但基本持续时间为1小时。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Clairaudience.name: 锐耳术 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description: 你在射程内创造出一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}的悬浮耳朵（它甚至可以在你的视觉线或者效果线之外）。它不能移动，但是你可以通过该耳朵听到声音，如同你通常的听觉感官。

Mind Reading.name: 读心术 Mind Reading
Mind Reading.description:
你通过一次短暂的心灵接触来尝试阅读目标的想法。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。目标会暂时免疫你的读心术1小时。

大成功 目标得知当施放该法术时你模糊的表层想法。

成功 你得知目标的智力调整值是高于，等于，还是低于你。

失败 你得知当施放该法术时目标模糊的表层想法，并且你得知目标的智力是高于，等于，还是低于你。

大失败 如失败，并且在法术持续时间中，你可以维持该法术来再次侦测目标的表层想法。目标不会获得另外的豁免。

Selective Invisibility (At Will).name: 选择性隐形（随意） Selective Invisibility (At Will)
Selective Invisibility (At Will).description:
你触碰的一名自愿生物会对除法术射程内第二个目标之外的所有人变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。如果该隐形生物对任何不是那个能看见它们的目标的人使用敌对动作，则在该敌对动作完成后，法术结束。

强化（5环） 你可以使30英尺内至多6名自愿生物隐形，但它们都必须拥有相同的目标。

A willing creature you touch becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} to everyone except a second target within the spell's range. If the invisible creature uses a hostile action against anyone who isn't the target that can see them, the spell ends after that hostile action is completed.

Heightened (5th) You can make up to 6 willing creatures within 30 feet invisible, but they all must have the same target.

Share Pain.name: 分担痛苦 Share Pain
Share Pain.description:
你以心灵感应与一个生物分享极度痛苦的感觉。目标受到 3d12 点精神伤害，并进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，持续 1 分钟。

大失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，持续 1 分钟。

升阶（6环） 该法术的目标至多变为四个生物，且造成 6d12 点精神伤害。

You telepathically share the sensation of agonizing pain with a creature. The target takes 3d12 mental damage and attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 minute.

Heightened (6th) The spell targets up to four creatures and deals 6d12 mental damage.

Detect Thoughts.name: 侦测思想 Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
你感知到周围具有思维能力的生物的存在。你能探测到智力调整值为 –3 或更高的清醒生物是否存在思维。你可以选择忽略你所熟悉的生物的思维，以免它们干扰你对其他思维的探测。该法术可以穿透某些屏障，但 3 英尺厚的泥土或木材、1 英尺厚的石头、1 英寸厚的金属、一层薄铅片，或任何力场屏障都会阻挡它。对精神效果免疫的生物也免疫此法术的探测。

强化（4环） 你能探测到具有思维能力的心智数量，以及这些生物是否具有心灵感应。具有心灵感应的生物，其思维比不具有心灵感应的生物更为响亮，并且可能在 GM 自行裁定下察觉到你的侵入。

You sense the presence of thinking creatures around you. You detect the presence or absence of thoughts from conscious creatures that have Intelligence modifiers of –3 or higher. You can choose to ignore the thoughts of creatures you're familiar with so they don't interfere with your detection of other thoughts. The spell can penetrate some barriers, but 3 feet of dirt or wood, 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of metal, a thin sheet of lead, or any force barrier blocks it. Creatures who are immune to mental effects are immune to detection by this spell.

Heightened (4th) You detect the number of thinking minds and whether or not the creatures are telepathic. Creatures with telepathy have louder thoughts than creatures who don't have telepathy and might be able to sense your intrusion, at the GM's discretion.

Doom Scroll (At Will).name: 末日卷轴（随意） Doom Scroll (At Will)
Doom Scroll (At Will).description:
你以魔法将可怕的消息广播到附近的设备、全息投影仪、屏幕和其他显示器上（包括护甲上的通讯装置）。区域内能看到一个或多个显示器的生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。

重度成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物被显示器所 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}。

失败 该生物被显示器所着迷，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}（即使着迷结束也是如此）。

重度失败 该生物被显示器所着迷，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 3}，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{末运 1}（即使着迷结束也是如此）。

You magically broadcast grim news onto nearby devices, holo projectors, screens, and other displays (including comm units on armor). Creatures in the area who can see one or more displays must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the display.

Failure The creature is fascinated by the display and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (even if the fascination ends).

Critical Failure The creature is fascinated by the display, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} (even if the fascination ends).

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你专注于目标，在魔法全息影像显示信息的同时收集数据。施法完成后，你会得知关于目标的生物特征信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况以及其他基本生理信息。你，或任何你告知了该分析结果的人，在对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{伪装}、对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}，以及对其进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定时，获得 +1 状态加值。若目标是虚幻之物，或处于幻觉魔法效果之下，只有当该效果的环阶低于你的分析目标法术的环阶时，你才能侦测到这一点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{法术效果：分析目标}

升阶（3环） 状态加值提升至 +2，且你的目标至多可以为 10 个生物。

升阶（6环） 状态加值提升至 +3，且你的目标可以为任意数量的生物。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Injury Echo.name: 伤害回响 Injury Echo
Injury Echo.description:
你将来自未来或过去的伤势显现出来，在当下伤害一个生物。选择钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害。目标受到所选伤害类型的 1d8 伤害，并进行一次基础意志豁免。若目标豁免失败，且在你的下个回合结束前再次受到同类型伤害，则它会额外受到 @Damage[ceil((@item.level)/2)d4[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。

升阶（+2） 初始伤害增加 1d8，且豁免失败时的持续伤害增加 1d4。

You manifest an injury from the future or past to harm a creature in the present. Choose bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage. The target takes 1d8 of the selected damage type with a basic Will save. If the target fails its save and then takes the same type of damage before the end of your next turn, it takes an additional @Damage[ceil((@item.level)/2)d4[persistent,bleed]] damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 1d8, and the persistent damage on a failure increases by 1d4.

Eyes on the Infosphere.name: 关注信息圈 Eyes on the Infosphere
Eyes on the Infosphere.description:
一只civusdaemon知晓任何与其可访问的本地信息圈相连的生物的存在。与信息圈相连的生物，对civusdaemon而言可被视为一种精确感知。已断开连接、但在过去一天内曾活跃于信息圈上的生物，会留下足够的残余痕迹，使civusdaemon能够将其作为一种不精确感知来察觉。

A civusdaemon knows the presence of any creatures connected to any local infospheres it has access to. A creature who is connected to an infosphere is visible to the civusdaemon as a precise sense. Disconnected creatures who've been active on an infosphere within the past day leave enough residual trace that a civusdaemon can sense them as an imprecise sense.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Mental.name: 对抗精神时，所有豁免检定获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Mental

Profile Picture.name: 头像 Profile Picture
Profile Picture.description:
一只城疫魔会呈现为其所选生物的一种诡异的二维版本。以城疫魔为目标的生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[flat|dc:5] 才能如此，如同城疫魔处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态一般。成功通过此次检定的生物，在接下来 1 轮内自动成功通过后续此类平检定。

A civusdaemon appears as a strangely two-dimensional version of a creature of their choice. Creatures targeting the civusdaemon must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] to do so, as if the civusdaemon were @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}. A creature who succeeds at this check automatically succeeds at further such flat checks for 1 round.

Well, Actually.name: 嗯，其实 Well, Actually
Well, Actually.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 一名敌人对市魔造成重击，或市魔对敌人的效果进行豁免检定时大失败

效果 该次攻击改为命中而非重击，或者该次豁免检定的大失败改为失败。

Frequency once per day

Trigger An enemy critically hits the civusdaemon or the civusdaemon critically fails a save against an enemy's effect

Effect The attack becomes a hit instead of a critical hit, or the critical failure on the save becomes a failure instead.

Character Assassination.name: 人格抹杀 Character Assassination
Character Assassination.description:
civusdaemon以共享信息圈中其知晓的一名生物的在线声誉为目标。经过1天停工期后，civusdaemon尝试进行一次 @Check[computers|defense:computers] 检定，对抗目标的计算机DC。

若成功，目标因其声誉受损，在该信息圈上进行的所有检定获得 –2 处境减值。civusdaemon每天再花费1天停工期即可维持此效果，无需再尝试额外检定。

若civusdaemon将此维持1周或更久，该减值增至 –4。该生物或其盟友可以花费1天停工期，尝试一次 @Check[computers|dc:26]、@Check[deception|dc:26] 或 @Check[diplomacy|dc:26] 检定，以反制这次角色攻击。

若成功，civusdaemon的行动结束，且目标在1个月内对此能力免疫。

若大成功，目标或其盟友还会查明civusdaemon活动的一个具体地点，例如它经常连接到信息圈的位置之一。

The civusdaemon targets the online reputation of a creature it's aware of on a shared infosphere. After 1 day of downtime, the civusdaemon attempts a @Check[computers|defense:computers] check against the target's Computers DC.

If successful, the target takes a –2 circumstance penalty to all checks made on that infosphere because of damage to their reputation. The civusdaemon can maintain this effect each day by spending another day of downtime without needing to attempt an additional check.

If the civusdaemon maintains this for a week or more, the penalty increases to –4. The creature or an ally of the creature can spend a day of downtime to attempt a @Check[computers|dc:26], @Check[deception|dc:26] or @Check[diplomacy|dc:26] check to counter the character attack.

On a success, the civusdaemon's efforts end, and the target becomes immune to this ability for 1 month.

On a critical success, the target or ally also identifies a specific location that the civusdaemon operates out of, such as one where it frequently connects to the infosphere.

Civusdaemon.publicNotes:
由信息圈和数字网络孕生而成，市民魔是一股怀有恶毒意图的力量，会操纵线上空间来折磨凡人。它们象征着通过社交媒体中的压迫与仇恨所带来的死亡，这些魔鬼在阴影中活动，将敌人折磨到极其毁灭性的地步，以至于对方往往会自行了断。

魔鬼来自亚巴顿位面，彻底献身于毁灭一切生命。它们的存在围绕着特定的死亡方式展开，并为了侍奉它们的主人——天启骑士——而追求万物之死。每一种魔鬼都代表着一种不同的死法，并运用各自特有的力量来推动那种死亡方式。

科技的发展只不过创造了新的死亡与折磨手段，因此新的魔鬼种类不断诞生；每当积累了足够多的新型死亡，便会催生出一种新的新兴魔鬼。这些新兴魔鬼往往更喜欢待在银河中而非亚巴顿，因为在那里它们能更有效地将自己的折磨传播给造物中的凡人。

Born from infospheres and digital networks, the civusdaemon is a force of malign intent who bends online spaces to torment mortals. Representing death through oppression and hate from social media, these daemons act in the shadows, tormenting their foes to such a ruinous extent that they often take their own life.

Hailing from the plane of Abaddon, daemons are utterly devoted to the destruction of all life. Their existence is based around specific means of death, and they seek the death of all things in service to their lords: the Apocalypse Riders. Each daemon represents a different way to die, and they use their specific powers to further that means of death.

Advents in technology have only created new means of death and torment, so new types of daemons enter existence with regularity, each created once a sufficient mass of new deaths occurs to spawn them. These new advent daemons often prefer to spend their time in the galaxy rather than Abaddon, as they can better spread their torments to the mortals of creation.
Civusdaemon.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. mental

Ranonek.name: 拉诺内克 Ranonek

Bloodsense.name: 血液感知 Bloodsense
Bloodsense.description:
拉诺内克可以在所列距离内，以一种不精确感官侦测生物体内的血液。对于正在积极流血的生物，这是一种精确感官。

The ranonek can detect blood inside creatures' bodies as an imprecise sense at the listed range. This is a precise sense against actively bleeding creatures.

Bear Hug.name: 熊抱 Bear Hug
Bear Hug.description:
拉诺内克对其已 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{抓握} 的生物的伤害掷骰获得 +4 情境加值。即使拉诺内克移动，一个大型或更小的生物仍会被拉诺内克抓握或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}。如果拉诺内克在抓握一个生物时本应受到坠落伤害，则改为由该被抓握的生物承受该坠落伤害（除了其通常会受到的任何坠落伤害之外）。

The ranonek gains a +4 circumstance bonus to damage rolls against creatures it has @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}. A Large or smaller creature remains grabbed or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} by the ranonek even if the ranonek moves. If a ranonek would take falling damage while it has a creature grabbed, the grabbed creature takes the falling damage instead (in addition to any falling damage it would normally take).

Blood Feast.name: 血腥盛宴 Blood Feast
Blood Feast.description:
要求 ranonek 已使一个生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{（被）束缚} 状态

效果 ranonek 从被擒抱的生物身上吸血。若受害者处于被擒抱状态，则这需要进行一次对抗该生物强韧 DC 的运动学检定；若该生物处于（被）束缚状态，或自 ranonek 上个回合开始以来受到了 50 点或更多伤害，则自动成功。受害者陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{吸取 1} 状态，直到其受到治疗（任何类型或任意数量）为止；且 ranonek 恢复 @Damage[25[healing]] 生命值，任何超出的生命值都会转为持续 1 分钟的临时生命值。

Requirements The ranonek has a creature @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}

Effect The ranonek sucks blood from the grabbed creature. This requires an Athletics check against the creature's Fortitude DC if the victim is grabbed and is automatic if the creature is restrained or if it took 50 or more damage since the start of the ranonek's last turn. The victim is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} until it receives healing (of any kind or amount), and the ranonek regains @Damage[25[healing]] Hit Points, gaining any excess Hit Points as temporary Hit Points that last for 1 minute.

Soaring Rush.name: 翱翔猛冲 Soaring Rush
Soaring Rush.description:
拉诺内克【Stride】、【Climb】或【Leap】两次（可任意组合），然后在移动结束时用爪击或颚击进行一次【Strike】。如果它以【Leap】结束此次移动，则拉诺内克直到其回合结束时才会开始下落，但它每次【Leap】都需要一个坚实表面作为[[/act leap]]的起跳点。

The Ranonek Strides, Climbs, or Leaps twice (in any combination), then makes a claw or jaws Strike at the end of the movement. If it ends this movement by Leaping, the ranonek doesn't begin to fall until the end of the ranonek's turn, but it needs a solid surface to [[/act leap]] from for each Leap.

Ranonek.publicNotes:
这些体型庞大、外形似熊的吸血猛兽潜伏于崔阿克斯寒冷的丛林环境中。虽然它们一年中的大部分时间都在冬眠，但拉诺内克会在严寒冰冻来临前苏醒，捕猎那些随着逼近的冰川一同迁徙的野兽、巨龙或其他任何生物。它们拥有如大型猫科动物般精壮修长的腿，这些白毛掠食者会利用林木线隐藏身形，伏击飞行猎物，纵身跃起，在半空中将其攫住。拉诺内克会用猎物的身体来缓冲下坠冲击，将其猛砸向下方地面，把内脏撞成肉糜后再吸食其鲜血。

拉诺内克的消化系统由数条高压压缩消化道构成，使它们能够将较小猎物体内的血液挤压出来。当下一顿猎物试图飞走时，它们还能咳出并射出含有干瘪残骸的干燥团块，在猎物飞得太远之前将其击落。记录这些残骸的人已经证实，这些巨兽比起其他任何猎物都更偏爱巨龙；考虑到拉诺内克能在不到一分钟内吸干许多幼龙，并将整个龙人一口吞下，这一点倒也不足为奇。

These enormous, bearlike vampiric beasts stalk the chilly jungle environments of Triaxus. While they hibernate most of the year, ranoneks awaken before deep freezes to catch beasts, dragons, or anything else migrating with the encroaching glaciers. With muscular, lean legs like a large cat, these white-furred predators use the tree line to hide from and ambush flying prey by leaping up to snatch them from midair. Using the hunted creatures' bodies to break the fall, ranoneks slam them into the ground below to reduce their insides to pulp before feeding on their blood.

A ranonek's digestive system utilizes several highly compressive tracts that allow them to squeeze the blood from smaller prey. When another meal tries to fly away, they can hock up and shoot the dried pellets containing the remains of their desiccated meals, knocking down prey before it gets too far away. Those documenting these remains have confirmed that these huge beasts prefer dragon prey over any other; this comes as no surprise given that ranoneks can drain many young dragons in under a minute and swallow entire dragonkin whole.

Quaking Footfalls.name: 震地足音 Quaking Footfalls

Quake.name: 震击 Quake
Quake.description:
触发条件 kyokor 至少移动了 60 尺

效果 以 kyokor 的空间为中心，@Template[type:emanation|distance:120] 内的地面震动。

地面变为困难地形，其上的生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，持续 1 轮。地面载具以半速移动。

地下空间（如下水道、陷坑或地下墓穴）上方会裂开缝隙。区域内的生物会坠入由此形成的 40 尺深坑洞，除非其成功通过一次 @Check[reflex|dc:40] 豁免。靠近水体时，这些震动会激起危险的波浪。位于水中或距水线 60 尺以内的生物会被波浪击中，受到 @Damage[3d8[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:35|basic] 豁免）。若严重失败，生物会立刻被卷向海中 60 尺，并被拖至水面下 60 尺。

Trigger The kyokor moves at least 60 feet

Effect The ground shakes in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:120] from the kyokor's space.

The ground becomes difficult terrain, and creatures on it are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 round. Ground vehicles move at half speed.

Fissures open above underground spaces (like sewers, sinkholes, or catacombs). Creatures in the area tumble into the resulting 40-foot-deep hole unless they succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:40] save. Near a body of water, these tremors creates dangerous waves. Creatures in the water or within 60 feet of the waterline are struck by waves that deal @Damage[3d8[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:35|basic] save). On a critical failure, a creature is instantly swept 60 feet out to sea and 60 feet under the water's surface.

Quaking Footfalls.disable:
@Check[athletics|dc:39]（受训） 、@Check[civil-engineering-lore|dc:39]（受训）或 @Check[crafting|dc:39]（受训）以加固小型结构或表面，抵消该区域内地震的影响；@Check[arcana|dc:41]（传奇）、@Check[occultism|dc:41]（传奇）或 @Check[performance|dc:41]（传奇）以安抚或引开 kyokor；总共需要三次成功才能停用该危险；若在载具中，则可进行 @Check[piloting|dc:30]（受训）以避开 kyokor 的路径（仅对该载具停用该危险）

@Check[athletics|dc:39] (trained), @Check[civil-engineering-lore|dc:39] (trained), or @Check[crafting|dc:39] (trained) to brace a small structure or surface to cancel the effects of the quake in that area, @Check[arcana|dc:41] (legendary), @Check[occultism|dc:41] (legendary), or @Check[performance|dc:41] (legendary) to calm or divert the kyokor; three total successes are required to disable the hazard; @Check[piloting|dc:30] (trained) if in a vehicle to avoid the kyokor's path (disables the hazard only for that vehicle)
Quaking Footfalls.hazarddescription:
一头巨岳兽（或其他怪兽）的脚步会震动地面，使其周围的大地如同遭受强烈地震般颤抖。

当一头巨岳兽经过或穿过一处聚居地——甚至发动攻击时！——它都会留下一道毁灭的痕迹，可由以下危害来表示。

骇人、如摩天大楼般巨大的野兽游荡在戴马尔科的荒原上。当地居民称它们为巨像，这些怪物从地底深处喷涌而出，将城市践踏成尘埃，在一场可怖的觉醒中大量屠戮人口，并摧毁了这颗行星上所有的地表文明。巨岳兽是其中最令人畏惧的巨像之一。若没有瓦尔科——戴马尔科顽强的幸存者为对抗巨像而创造的战争机器——就根本没有击败它的希望。

The footsteps of a kyokor (or other kaiju) shake the ground, causing the earth around it to tremble as though from a powerful earthquake.

When a kyokor passes by or through a settlement—or even attacks!—it leaves a trail of destruction that can be represented by the following hazards.

Terrifying, skyscraper-sized beasts roam the wastelands of Daimalko. Called colossi by the population, these monsters erupted from deep within the earth to stomp cities into dust, decimating the population and destroying every surface civilization on the planet in a terrifying Awakening. Kyokors are among the most dreaded colossi. There's no hope of defeating one without a valko—a war machine created by Daimalko's stubborn survivors to fight the colossi.
Quaking Footfalls.reset:
巨怖（或其他怪兽）在 [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮} 内不会再次以这种方式移动。

The kyokor (or other kaiju) doesn't move this way again for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Host Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).name: 宿主龙（成年，施法者） Host Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster)
Host Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).tokenName: 宿主龙（成年，施法者） Host Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster)

Primal Prepared Spells.name: 原始预备法术 Primal Prepared Spells

Carcinization.name: 甲壳化 Carcinization
Carcinization.description:
你操纵目标的遗传密码并加速那不可避免的结局，迫使目标经历癌化并变成一只螃蟹。自愿的目标会完全变形为一只螃蟹，如同其施放了与此法术同环阶的 animal form，并使用以下数据。

  • 螃蟹

    • 速度 25 尺，游泳 15 尺
    • 近战 1 大螯，伤害 2d8 穿刺
    • 近战 1 螯（灵巧），伤害 2d4 穿刺。
    • 可以在空气和水中呼吸。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.16Li37zRYKClxqsv]{法术效果：癌化}

不自愿的目标则必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的身体长出螃蟹的少量特征，其附肢变成螯，使其变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

失败 目标变形成半螃蟹状的生物，变为笨拙 1、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 目标被变形成半螃蟹状的生物，并变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

You manipulate the target's genetic code and accelerate the inevitable, pressuring the target to undergo carcinization and become a crab. A willing target fully transforms into a crab, as if it had cast animal form heightened to the same rank as this spell and using the following statistics.

  • Crab

    • Speed 25 feet, swim 15 feet
    • Melee 1 big claw, Damage 2d8 piercing
    • Melee 1 claw (agile), Damage 2d4 piercing.
    • Can breathe air and water.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.16Li37zRYKClxqsv]{Spell Effect: Carcinization}

Unwilling targets must instead attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's body gains minor features of a crab, its appendages turning into claws and causing it to become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}.

Failure The target transforms into a partial crab-like being, becoming clumsy 1, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The target is transformed into a partial crab-like being and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Toxic Cloud.name: 毒云术 Toxic Cloud
Toxic Cloud.description:
你创造一团有毒云雾。该效果如同@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{迷雾术 Mist}一般，除了该区域会每轮远离你10尺。在该区域中开始回合的生物承受6d8毒素伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d8。

Wall of Stone.name: 石墙术 Wall of Stone
Wall of Stone.description:
你塑造一面岩石墙壁。你创造一个至多120尺长，20尺高1寸厚的石墙。你可以塑形石墙的路径，将墙壁的每5尺放在方格之间的边界上。该墙壁无需竖直，所以举例而言，你可以用其塑造一座桥，或者一组阶梯。你必须将该墙创造在连续的开放空间中，令其边界不会穿过任何生物或者物体，否则你会失去该法术。

每一段10尺乘10尺的墙壁具有AC10，硬度14，以及50生命值，并且它免疫重击，寒冷伤害，以及精准伤害。一段被摧毁的墙壁可以移动通过，但是因此留下的碎石会令其变成困难地形。

升阶（+2） 每一段墙的生命值增加15。

Unfettered Movement.name: 行动无碍 Unfettered Movement
Unfettered Movement.description:
你驱散可能影响一个生物的阻碍。当处于该法术效果中时，法术目标忽视会赋予其速度环境减值的效果。当法术目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}一个令其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，它自动成功，除非该效果是魔法性的，并且其环级比行动无碍更高。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement}

Earthbind.name: 地缚术 Earthbind
Earthbind.description:
你使用大地的重量以干扰目标的飞行能力，其效果基于强韧豁免。如果该生物安全到达地面，它不会承受坠落伤害。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标安全坠落至多120尺。

失败 目标安全坠落至多120尺。如果它碰到地面，它1轮内不能飞行，浮空或者以其他方式离开地面。

大失败 目标安全坠落至多120尺。如果它碰到地面，它1分钟内不能飞行，浮空或者以其他方式离开地面。

Life Seal.name: 生命封印 Life Seal
Life Seal.description:
触发 范围内的一个生物进入了一个会对其造成伤害的环境。

一道闪烁的气泡包裹住目标的身体，使其能够在真空或其他不安全环境中正常呼吸，并保护其免受严酷温度与辐射的影响。

强化（7环） 你最多可以额外指定 5 个生物，使其获得针对触发生物所进入环境的防护。该法术持续 8 小时，并且还会防护极端温度与辐射。

强化（10环） 你最多可以额外指定 10 个生物，使其获得针对触发生物所进入环境的防护。该法术持续至你的下一次每日准备，并且还会防护难以置信的温度与辐射。

Trigger A creature within range enters an environment that would be harmful to it.

A shimmering bubble envelops the target's body, allowing it to breathe normally in a vacuum or other unsafe environment and protecting it from severe temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 5 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts for 8 hours and also protects against extreme temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (10th) You can target up to 10 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts until your next daily preparations and also protects against incredible temperatures and radiation.

Wall of Wind.name: 风墙术 Wall of Wind
Wall of Wind.description:
你创造一层会干扰所有通过事物的暴风墙。这面由旋风组成的墙有5尺厚，60尺长，30尺高。该墙为竖直的，但你可以指定其形态。虽然风墙会搅动空气，但不会阻碍视觉。该墙壁具有下列效果。

  • 来自物理远程攻击的弹药（例如箭，矢，投石索弹丸，以及其他类似大小的物体）无法穿过该墙。更大的远程武器的攻击，例如标枪，如果其路线通过该墙壁，则其在攻击骰上承受-2环境减值。重型远程武器和不创造实体物体的法术效果可以不受减值地通过该墙。
  • 该墙对尝试从地面通过它的生物为困难地形。气体，以及处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V8wXOsoejQhe6CyG]{Vapor Form}的生物，无法穿过墙壁。
  • 尝试使用移动动作飞过墙壁的生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物本回合可以正常移动穿过该墙。

成功 该飞行生物本回合可以正常移动穿过该墙，但是该墙为困难地形。

失败 该墙阻挡飞行生物的移动，并且当前动作的剩余移动力被浪费。

大失败 如同失败，并且该生物会被推离该墙10尺。

Entangling Flora.name: 纠缠植被 Entangling Flora
Entangling Flora.description:
植物与菌类无法抑制地快速成长，缠绕生物。区域内的所有表面均为困难地形。对于每轮内在该区域内开始自身回合的生物，必须尝试1次反射豁免。失败时，其速度承受-10尺环境减值，直至离开该区域为止，大失败时，它还会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}1轮。生物能够尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱 Escape}来移除这些效果。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.rjM25qfw5BKj9h97]{法术效果：纠缠植被}

Environmental Endurance.name: 忍受环境 Environmental Endurance
Environmental Endurance.description:
你保护目标对抗危险气温。选择严寒或炎热。目标不受你选择的气温的影响，但这对极寒和极热无效。

升阶（3环级） 目标受到保护，免遭严寒或炎热影响。

升阶（5环级） 目标受到保护，免遭严寒、炎热、极寒和极热影响。

Speak with Animals.name: 动物交谈 Speak with Animals
Speak with Animals.description: 你能向动物提问、得到动物的回答、以及对动物使用交涉技能。该法术不会让动物们变得比平时更加友善。狡猾动物的沟通表现得简短且模棱两可，而缺乏智能的动物通常会发表无意义的意见。

Water Breathing.name: 水中呼吸 Water Breathing
Water Breathing.description:
目标可以在水中呼吸。

升阶（3环级） 该持续时间增加到8小时。

升阶（4环级） 该持续时间增加到直到你的下次日常准备。

Ant Haul.name: 重负术 Ant Haul
Ant Haul.description:
你增强了目标的骨骼和肌肉系统，以承受更大的重量。目标可以比通常达到@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{Encumbered}额外携带3负载，最大不超过6负载。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.5yCL7InrJDHpaQjz]{Spell Effect: Ant Haul}

Caustic Blast.name: 酸液喷溅 Caustic Blast
Caustic Blast.description:
你发射一团立即爆发的酸液，泼溅到周围生物上。区域中的生物承受1d8酸蚀伤害，这有一次基础反射豁免；在大失败时，该生物也会承受@Damage[(1+floor((@item.rank -1)/2))[persistent,acid]]伤害。

升阶（+2） 该初始伤害增加1d8，并且持续伤害增加1。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Detect Poison.name: 侦测毒素 Detect Poison
Detect Poison.description:
你可以侦测一个生物是否分泌毒素或者具有毒素，或者一件物体是否是毒素或者已经被下毒。你无法判断目标是否有多种毒素，也无法了解毒素的种类。特定的物质，例如铅或者酒精，是毒素，并会遮盖其他毒素。

升阶（2环级） 你会得知毒素的数量和类型。

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你将恐惧植入目标；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}.

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}.

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 3} 并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing} 1轮.

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Seek the Stars.name: 追寻群星 Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
在你的心眼中，你描绘出一条穿越宇宙的路径。如果你身处协约世界的太空中，你会立刻知道应朝哪个方向旅行，才能抵达艾巴萨罗姆空间站上的星石。如果你在协约星系之外，你会知道距离最近的漂流信标或星石的方向。

强化（7环） 你也可以改为知晓某个熟悉地点的方向，例如你曾到访过的世界或中途站。

In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Stumble.name: 踉跄 Stumble
Stumble.description:
一阵微重力爆发在目标周围引发震颤，将其拉向地面。目标必须进行一次反射豁免。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，持续 1 轮。如果目标正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，它会向下坠落 10 英尺。

严重失败 目标倒地 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。如果目标正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，它会向下坠落 20 英尺。

强化（+1） 如果目标坠落，则失败时额外坠落 5 英尺，严重失败时额外坠落 10 英尺。

A burst of microgravity causes a tremor around the target, pulling it toward the ground. The target must attempt a Reflex save.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 10 feet downward.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 20 feet downward.

Heightened (+1) If the target falls, it falls an additional 5 feet on a failure and 10 feet on a critical failure.

Tangle Vine.name: 绊足藤 Tangle Vine
Tangle Vine.description:
一条藤蔓凭空出现，从你手上弹射而出并捆绑在目标身上。尝试一次法术攻击检定对抗目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：绊足藤}

大成功 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}状态，并且其速度承受-10尺环境减值，持续1轮。它能尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱 Escape}对抗你的法术DC，来以此移除减值和禁足状态。

成功 目标速度承受-10尺环境减值，持续1轮。它能尝试逃脱对抗你的法术DC来移除减值。

失败 目标不受影响。

升阶（2环级） 效果持续2轮。

升阶（4环级） 效果持续1分钟。

Covered in Bugs.name: 被虫群覆盖 Covered in Bugs
Covered in Bugs.description:
触发 巨龙的豁免检定严重失败

效果 成群的昆虫干扰该效应，牺牲自己来保护宿主的身心。巨龙进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:17]。若成功，巨龙此次豁免检定改为失败，而非严重失败。

Trigger The dragon critically fails a saving throw

Effect Swarming insects interfere with the effect, sacrificing themselves to protect their host's body and mind. The dragon attempts a @Check[flat|dc:17]. On a success, the dragon fails the saving throw instead of critically failing.

+2 status to all saves vs. mental.name: 对抗精神效果的所有豁免获得 +2 状态加值 +2 status to all saves vs. mental
