Excruciating Bites.name: 痛苦噬咬 Excruciating Bites
Excruciating Bites.description:
生物若因宿主龙的颚击打击而受到伤害，或被该龙吞下，也会被数百只微小昆虫叮咬；该生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:28] 豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}，持续1轮。

A creature that takes damage from a host dragon's jaws Strike or is swallowed by the dragon is also bitten by hundreds of tiny insects; the creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:28] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 round.

One with Swarms.name: 与虫群同体 One with Swarms
One with Swarms.description:
宿主龙免疫由虫群或类似生物所进行的任何攻击（由GM酌情决定）。

The host dragon is immune to any attack made by a swarm of insects or similar creature (at the GM's discretion).

Swallow Whole.name: 活吞 Swallow Whole
Swallow Whole.description:
大型，@Damage[(3d10+7)[bludgeoning]] 外加剧痛啮咬，破裂 26

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Large, @Damage[(3d10+7)[bludgeoning]] plus excruciating bites, Rupture 26

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Swarm Breath.name: 虫群吐息 Swarm Breath
Swarm Breath.description:
巨龙喷吐出一群叮咬性的昆虫，在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:40] 内造成 @Damage[9d8[piercing]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:30|basic] 豁免）。它们在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Swarm Breath]]{1d4 轮} 内不能再次使用“虫群吐息”。

The dragon disgorges a swarm of biting insects that deals @Damage[9d8[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] (@Check[reflex|dc:30|basic] save). They can't use Swarm Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Swarm Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Swarm Shape.name: 虫群形态 Swarm Shape
Swarm Shape.description:
龙变形为一个虫群。他们会丢下所有手持、穿戴和携带的物品。处于这种形态时，他们不能使用攻击动作（“蜂拥啮咬”和“虫群吐息”除外），也不能施放法术，但他们可以穿过足够小、其个体昆虫能够通过的区域，而无需进行挤压。他们可以使用相同的动作重新聚合回其正常形态。

The dragon transforms into an insect swarm. They drop all held, worn, and carried items. While in this form, they can't use attack actions (except Swarming Bites and Swarm Breath) and can't cast spells, but they can move through areas small enough for their individual insects to fit without having to Squeeze. They can use the same action to coalesce back into their normal form.

Swarming Bites.name: 蜂拥啃咬 Swarming Bites
Swarming Bites.description:
需求 该龙是虫群

效果 虫群空间内的每个敌人受到 @Damage[8d6[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:30|basic] 豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}，持续1轮。

Requirements The dragon is a swarm

Effect Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[8d6[piercing]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:30|basic] save). A creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round.

Host Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).publicNotes:
无数昆虫跟随着这些行动迟缓、贪婪无度的巨龙，无论它们游荡到哪里，虫群都会环绕在它们周围，并栖居在宿主龙身体沿线无数的孔洞之中。这条龙既是虫群本身的一部分，也是虫群生态系统的一部分——虫群以它们的身体为食，而巨龙又以虫群为食，在这场怪诞而绵延数个世纪的循环中，不知为何，宿主龙即使一生中不摄取任何其他物质，也会变得更庞大、更强大。宿主龙从昆虫的原始本能中汲取力量，尽管它们拥有智慧，却常常表现得像它们所聚集而来的昆虫一样。宿主龙厌恶回答问题，并会以暴力抗拒他人试图理解其本性的所有努力。

Innumerable insects follow these lumbering, ravenous dragons wherever they roam, swarming around them and living in the countless orifices along the host dragon's body. The dragon is both a part of the swarm itself and a part of the swarm's ecosystem—the swarm feeds on their body, and the dragon feeds on the swarm in a grotesque, centuries-long cycle that somehow results in the host dragon growing larger and more powerful even if they feed on no other substance in their lifetime. Host dragons draw their power from the primal instincts of insects and, despite their intelligence, often behave like the insects they gather to them. Host dragons despise answering questions and violently defy all attempts others make to understand their nature.

Flayer Leech.name: 夺心蛭 Flayer Leech

Effigy Identity.name: 塑像身份 Effigy Identity
Effigy Identity.description:
当夺心蛭处于拟躯中时，它获得理解并说出尸体所知所有语言的能力，同时也获得对尸体身体能力、身份、在社群中的角色以及个性的了解。然而，它不会获得尸体的具体记忆或知识。

While a flayer leech is in an effigy, it gains the ability to understand and speak all languages known by the corpse as well as knowledge of the corpse's physical abilities, identity, role in society, and personality. However, it doesn't gain the specific memories or knowledge of the corpse.

Regeneration 5 (deactivated by acid or s.name: 再生 5（被强酸或音波停用） Regeneration 5 (deactivated by acid or sonic)

Create Effigy.name: 制造拟像 Create Effigy
Create Effigy.description:
剥脑蛭会吞食一具死亡不超过 1 小时的中型或小型生物尸体的大脑，从而接管其身体。它还会将尸体身上的任何伤口缝合起来，只留下几乎难以察觉的细线。它可以使用隐匿来[[/act impersonate skill=stealth]]，且无需伪装工具包即可如此做；但如果有任何生物与剥脑蛭交谈 1 分钟，它在此次检定上会受到 –2 情境减值。处于这种拟像形态时，它失去对钝击伤害的弱点，并获得弱点 5（音波伤害）。它可以通过手腕的伸展进行口器近战打击，但不能进行次声爆破远程打击。剥脑蛭可以解除该拟像。

A flayer leech consumes the brain of the corpse of a Medium or Small creature dead for no longer than an hour, taking over its body. It also stitches together any wounds the corpse might have, presenting only barely visible lines. It can use Stealth to [[/act impersonate skill=stealth]] and doesn't need a disguise kit to do so, but it takes a –2 circumstance penalty to the check if any creature engages the flayer leech in conversation for 1 minute. When in this effigy form, it loses its weakness to bludgeoning and gains weakness 5 to sonic damage. It can make proboscis melee Strikes through extension in its wrists, but it can't make subsonic blast ranged Strikes. A flayer leech can Dismiss the effigy.

Drink Marrow.name: 饮用骨髓 Drink Marrow
Drink Marrow.description:
需求 吸髓水蛭的上一动作必须是以口针对一个活物进行的一次成功打击

效果 吸髓水蛭以次声速振动其口针，钻入一个生物的骨髓或等效骨骼结构中。所需生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:21] 豁免检定，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。若严重失败，则它在 1 分钟内无法降低该恶心状态。

Requirements The flayer leech's last action was a successful proboscis Strike against a living creature

Effect The flayer leech vibrates its proboscis at subsonic speed, drilling into a creature's marrow or equivalent bone structure. The required creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:21] saving throw or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. On a critical failure, it can't reduce this sickened condition for 1 minute.

Mandible Dance.name: 颚钳之舞 Mandible Dance
Mandible Dance.description:
需求 剥噬水蛭当前未处于拟像中

效果 剥噬水蛭以一种撩人的方式扭动其面部触须。30尺内每个能看见剥噬水蛭的生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:21] 豁免检定，否则会被 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷} 于剥噬水蛭，持续1分钟。

Requirements The flayer leech isn't currently in an effigy

Effect The flayer leech wriggles its facial tendrils in a tantalizing way. Each creature within 30 feet that can see the flayer leech must attempt a @Check[will|dc:21] saving throw or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the flayer leech for 1 minute.

Warp Bones.name: 扭曲骨骼 Warp Bones
Warp Bones.description:
需求 剥皮水蛭位于一个塑像中

效果 s 剥皮水蛭与它尝过的任何骨髓之间都有联系。它发出次声波以振动敌人的骨骼结构，造成巨大的痛苦。任何位于40英尺内且因剥皮水蛭的“饮髓”能力而处于恶心状态的生物都会受到 @Damage[3d8[sonic]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:21|basic] 豁免）。

Requirements The flayer leech is in an effigy

Effect s The flayer leech has a link to any marrow it's tasted. It sends out subsonic waves to vibrate its enemies' skeletal structures, causing immense pain. Any creature within 40 feet with the sickened condition from the flayer leech's Drink Marrow ability takes @Damage[3d8[sonic]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:21|basic] save).

Flayer Leech.publicNotes:
剥皮水蛭是微小的无脊椎猎食者，拥有多重铰接的口器，并演化出一种有趣的生命周期：它们会披上受害者的皮肤来冒充对方，吞食其内脏以进行繁殖。

剥皮水蛭会杀死并以活体生物为食，享用受害者的骨髓。这种摄食为它们提供了可维持数周生存的养分。剥皮水蛭会松开其花瓣状口器上的触须，将其延伸至2米长，并用它们将猎物的残骸缝合起来，把大脑留给自己食用。随后，它们会把这些触须当作伪骨架，为身体提供结构并驱动其移动，使自己能够以极具说服力的方式让尸体重新活动起来，并呈现出其生前的动作与生活状态。然而，剥皮水蛭并不具备尸体的具体记忆，因此对于那些熟悉受害者的人来说，往往很容易看出破绽。剥皮水蛭将这种伪装当作安全的栖身之所，一边继续吸食残余的骨髓和神经系统，一边会像保卫自己的家一样保卫这些新身体。

Flayer leeches are tiny, invertebrate hunters with multi-hinged mouths that have developed an interesting life cycle: they wear their victim's skin to pose as them, consuming their innards to reproduce.

Flayer leeches will kill and feed on living creatures, feasting on the bone marrow of their victims. This consumption gives them sustenance to survive for weeks. Flayer leeches disengage the tendrils of their petallike mouths, extending them up to 2 meters and using them to stitch together a prey's remains, leaving the brain for it to consume. They then use these tendrils as a pseudo-skeleton to give structure to the body and move it, allowing them to convincingly reanimate the corpse and take on its movements and previous life. The flayer leech lacks the corpse's specific memories, however, which can make it easy to spot for those familiar with the leech's victim. Flayer leeches use this disguise as a safe harbor while feeding off the remaining marrow and nervous system and will defend these new bodies like their home.

Cloud Skate.name: 云霄滑板 Cloud Skate

Effect: Natural Thruster.name: 效果：自然推进器 Effect: Natural Thruster
Effect: Natural Thruster.description:
你的飞行速度获得 +75 尺状态加值，且你的尾部打击额外造成 1d10 挥砍伤害。

You gain a +75-foot status bonus to your fly Speed and deal an additional 1d10 slashing damage with your tail Strikes.

Explosive Death.name: 爆炸性死亡 Explosive Death
Explosive Death.description:
如果一只云鳐因火焰或电击伤害而死亡，它体内储存的爆炸性气体和可燃液体会在一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内引爆，造成 @Damage[6d8[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免）。

If a cloud skate dies due to fire or electricity damage, its internal reservoirs of explosive gases and combustible fluids detonate in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] that deals @Damage[6d8[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic|options:area-effect] save).

Engulf.name: 包卷 Engulf
Engulf.description:
@Check[reflex|dc:21|options:damaging-effect,inflicts:grabbed,inflicts:slowed], @Damage[(2d6+3)[bludgeoning]] 伤害, [[/act escape dc=21]], 爆裂 12

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

@Check[reflex|dc:21|options:damaging-effect,inflicts:grabbed,inflicts:slowed], @Damage[(2d6+3)[bludgeoning]] damage, [[/act escape dc=21]], Rupture 12

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

Natural Thruster.name: 天然推进器 Natural Thruster
Natural Thruster.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 直到其下个回合开始时，云滑鳐的飞行速度获得 +75 尺状态加值，且其尾击打击额外造成 1d10 点挥砍伤害。

Frequency once per hour

Effect Until the beginning of its next turn, the cloud skate gains a +75-foot status bonus to its fly Speed and deals an additional 1d10 slashing damage with its tail Strikes.

Cloud Skate.publicNotes:
云鳐是容易受惊的生物，会尽可能避开聚居地。它们在温顺期会成大群旅行，而即使在攻击性的狩猎周期中也会保持小群活动，这使它们对旅行者而言十分危险。它们用三条强有力的尾巴在云层中穿行，并用巨大的、长满鲸须的口器捕获猎物；那口器横跨其单节身体的整个宽度。

Cloud skates are skittish creatures that avoid settlements whenever possible. They travel in large packs when in their docile periods and remain in small groups even during their aggressive hunting cycles, making them dangerous to travelers. They navigate through the clouds using three powerful tails, trapping prey with huge, baleen-filled mouths that span the full width of their single-segmented bodies.

Iridia.name: 伊瑞迪娅 Iridia

Occult Innate Spells.name: 神秘天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Truespeech (constant).name: 真言（恒常） Truespeech (constant)
Truespeech (constant).description:
无论什么语言，目标都可以理解其所有的词语，并且向其他生物用该语言交流。当处于一群各异的生物中时，每次目标将要说话，他可以选择一个生物，并使用一种该生物理解的语言来讲述，即使该目标不知道这语言具体是什么。

升阶（7环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Translocate (at will).name: 位移（随意施放） Translocate (at will)
Translocate (at will).description:
你立即将自身以及自己正在穿戴和持有的物品从当前空间转移走，移动至法术射程内你能看到的未被占据的空间。如果这将会带着其他生物与你一同移动——即便你把该生物放置在异次元容器中——你就会失去该法术。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至1英里。你不需要看到目的地，只要你曾经去过目的地，并且知晓该地点与你相对的位置以及距离即可。之后你会在1小时内临时免疫该法术。

Holographic Memory.name: 全息记忆 Holographic Memory
Holographic Memory.description:
你深入目标的心智，提取一段你已有所知晓的特定记忆，并将其投射为全息影像。或者，在施放此法术时，你可以选择抽取一段随机记忆，由GM自行裁定。该全息记忆最长不能超过5分钟；如果被提取的记忆长于此时长，则全息影像会在到达该时点时直接结束。该全息影像包含音频与视觉成分，但不包含触觉、嗅觉或其他成分。该全息影像通常会播放发生于单一场景中的一段记忆，不过如果这样符合该记忆且其时长允许，它也可以切换至多个场景。该全息影像会完全按照目标的亲身经历，并以目标的视角播放这段记忆，因此往往缺乏上下文。

此法术可以将任何活着的、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}的，或已死亡的、智力调整值为–3或更高的有知觉生物作为目标。如果目标已死亡，则其死亡时间不能超过1周，否则此法术失败；一具尸体一旦曾被任何施法者施加过全息记忆，之后再对其施放全息记忆都会失败。

如果目标不愿分享这段记忆，它可以尝试进行一次意志豁免以抵抗此法术。

You reach into the target's mind, extract a specific memory you have some awareness of, and project it into a hologram. Alternatively, when casting this spell, you can choose to pull a random memory left to the GM's discretion. The holographic memory can be no longer than 5 minutes; if the extracted memory is longer than this, the hologram simply ends at that point. The hologram includes audio as well as visual components, but it doesn't contain haptic, olfactory, or other components. The hologram typically plays a memory that takes place in a single scene, though it can cut to multiple scenes if they're accurate to the memory and its length allows. The hologram plays the memory exactly as the target experienced it and from the target's perspective, so it often lacks context.

This spell can target any living, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, or deceased sentient creature with an Intelligence modifier of –3 or higher. If the target is deceased, it can't have been dead for longer than 1 week, or this spell fails; once a corpse has been subjected to holographic memory by any caster, any subsequent castings of holographic memory fail.

If the target is unwilling to share this memory, it can attempt a Will save to resist this spell.

Caustic Conversion.name: 腐蚀转化 Caustic Conversion
Caustic Conversion.description:
你发射出一股魔法纳米机械洪流，开始溶解你的目标。对目标进行一次远程法术攻击。命中时，你造成 3d8 点强酸伤害外加 1d6 点持续性强酸伤害。重击时，初始伤害加倍，但持续性伤害不加倍。

升阶（+2） 初始伤害提高 2d8，且持续性强酸伤害提高 1d6。

You launch a torrent of magical nanites that begin dissolving your target. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, you deal 3d8 acid damage plus 1d6 persistent acid damage. On a critical hit, double the initial damage, but not the persistent damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 2d8, and the persistent acid damage increases by 1d6.

Detect Thoughts.name: 侦测思想 Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
你感知到周围有会思考的生物存在。你能探测到具有意识且智力调整值为 –3 或更高的生物的思维存在与否。你可以选择忽略你所熟悉生物的思维，这样它们就不会干扰你对其他思维的探测。该法术可以穿透某些屏障，但 3 英尺厚的泥土或木材、1 英尺厚的石头、1 英寸厚的金属、一层薄铅片或任何力场屏障都会阻挡它。对精神效果免疫的生物也免疫此法术的探测。

升阶（4环） 你会探测到会思考心智的数量，以及这些生物是否具有心灵感应。具有心灵感应的生物，其思维比不具有心灵感应的生物更响亮，并且可能能够察觉你的侵入，具体由 GM 自行裁定。

You sense the presence of thinking creatures around you. You detect the presence or absence of thoughts from conscious creatures that have Intelligence modifiers of –3 or higher. You can choose to ignore the thoughts of creatures you're familiar with so they don't interfere with your detection of other thoughts. The spell can penetrate some barriers, but 3 feet of dirt or wood, 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of metal, a thin sheet of lead, or any force barrier blocks it. Creatures who are immune to mental effects are immune to detection by this spell.

Heightened (4th) You detect the number of thinking minds and whether or not the creatures are telepathic. Creatures with telepathy have louder thoughts than creatures who don't have telepathy and might be able to sense your intrusion, at the GM's discretion.

Inject Nanobots.name: 注入纳米机器人 Inject Nanobots
Inject Nanobots.description:
你将魔法纳米机器人注入一个生物体内。进行一次近战法术攻击检定。若命中，目标受到4d6点强酸伤害。若重击，目标受到双倍伤害，并且由于纳米机器人在目标的生物或机械系统中蜂拥穿行而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 1轮。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

You inject magical nanobots into a creature. Make a melee spell attack roll. On a hit, the target takes 4d6 acid damage. On a critical hit, the target takes double damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round as nanobots swarm through the target's biological or mechanical systems.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Skim Data (at will).name: 略读数据（随意） Skim Data (at will)
Skim Data (at will).description:
你触碰一件物体，并专注于其中包含的一组数据，例如故事、讯息、文件、信息圈站点、音频记录或视频。你会理解这组数据的大意，并且能够迅速定位与你搜索最相关的页面或章节。若这组数据是以你不懂的语言写成或以其他方式传达，或者你试图从一台你无权访问的计算机中获取信息（例如一台设有你不知道的密码的计算机），则该法术失败。

如果你将此法术作为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{研究} 活动的一部分来施放，你将重度失败视为失败。

You touch one object and concentrate on a dataset contained within it, such as a story, message, file, infosphere site, audio recording, or video. You understand the gist of the dataset and can quickly locate the most relevant pages or sections to your search. If the dataset is written or otherwise communicated in a language you don't know, or you attempt to gain information from a computer you don't have access to (such as one with a password you don't know), the spell fails.

If you Cast this Spell as part of a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{Research} activity, you treat a critical failure as a failure instead.

Delete.name: 删除 Delete
Delete.description:
你以一个花哨的魔法手势删除设备或物体中的数据。这些数据可以是手写、印刷或数字形式。你最多可以删除相当于 1,500 个单词的文本、一页内容，或一整块显示屏上的文字或其他视觉信息。无人看管或被持握物体里或表面的非魔法文字会自动被删除。尝试进行一次反制检定以删除数字或魔法文字。如果你未能删除作为一个危害组成部分的文字，你会触发该危害。这不能用于删除法术书或类似用于储存魔法公式或法术的媒介中的内容。

如果你以一个具有追踪特征的受持握科技物品为目标，尝试进行一次反制检定。成功时，该物品变为故障 1。持握该物品的生物可以执行交互动作以重启软件，将故障值降低 1。

强化（7环） 你可以删除单个设备或书籍中本地存储的全部数据，或删除某个设备或书籍上与特定名称、主题或类别相关的全部数据。

You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Implant Data.name: 植入体数据 Implant Data
Implant Data.description:
你重新编程一台计算机或装置，使其在被访问时显示一段你所选择的数据。每个法术环阶最多可以植入一段数据。一段数据可以是一个简单事实，例如某个生物或物体的位置或物理描述；某个生物或物体的图像；或一段不超过300个字符的简单陈述。当目标计算机或装置被访问时，这段植入的数据会成为访问它的生物首先获得的数据，无论该生物正在寻找什么数据。植入的数据不会阻止生物访问装置中存储的其他信息，不会改变装置的运作方式，也不会以其他方式妨碍装置运作。如果在有生物访问植入的数据之前该法术的持续时间结束，则这些信息会消失。

强化（3环） 持续时间为一年。

强化（6环） 持续时间为无限。

You reprogram a computer or device to display a chosen piece of data when accessed. You can implant up to one piece of data per spell rank. A piece of data can be a simple fact, such as a creature or object's location or physical description; an image of a creature or object; or a simple statement of no more than 300 characters. When the target computer or device is accessed, this implanted data is the first data the accessing creature gains, regardless of what data the creature is looking for. Implanted data doesn't prevent a creature from accessing other information stored on a device, change how the device functions, or otherwise inhibit the device from functioning. If this spell's duration ends before a creature accesses the implanted data, the information vanishes.

Heightened (3rd) The duration is one year.

Heightened (6th) The duration is unlimited.

Mending.name: 修复术 Mending
Mending.description:
你修复目标物品。你回复目标每法术环级5点生命值，并且如果修复达到了物品的破损阈值，会移除 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{破损 Broken} 状态。你无法代替丢失的组成部分，或者修复已经完全损毁的物体。

升阶（2环级） 你能以1负载或者更低的非魔法物品为目标。

升阶（3环级） 你能以2负载或者更低的非魔法物品为目标，或者1负载或者更低的魔法物品为目标。

Seek the Stars.name: 追寻群星 Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
在你的脑海中，你勾勒出一条穿越宇宙的路径。如果你位于协约世界的空间内，你会立刻知道应朝哪个方向旅行，才能抵达艾巴萨罗姆空间站上的星石。如果你在协约星系之外，你会知道最近的漂流信标或星石所在的方向。

强化（7环） 你可以改为知晓某个熟悉地点的方向，例如你曾到访过的世界或中途站。

In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Wisp Ally.name: 微光盟友 Wisp Ally
Wisp Ally.description:
你召唤出一个微型、跳动的光之幽芒，足以轻易分散哪怕最坚定战斗者的注意力。该幽芒漂浮在你的目标附近。幽芒不占据空间、不能形成夹击，也不具备生物所拥有的其他任何属性。该幽芒在10尺半径内产生明亮光照。当你施放此法术时，以及每次你维持此法术时，你的幽芒都会尝试分散你的目标的注意力；目标必须成功通过一次意志豁免，否则直到你下个回合开始前变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。若生物获得大成功，则会对鬼火盟友免疫1小时。

强化（+1） 你会额外创造一个幽芒，使你能够选择一个不同的目标。你创造的每个幽芒都必须有不同的目标，并且当你施放或维持此法术时，它们都会同时尝试分散各自目标的注意力。

You summon a Tiny bouncing wisp of light that easily distracts even the most determined of combatants. The wisp floats near your target. A wisp doesn't take up space, grant flanking, or have any other attributes a creature would. The wisp generates bright light in a 10-foot radius. When you Cast the Spell and each time you Sustain the spell, your wisp attempts to distract your target, which must succeed at a Will save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn. A creature who critically succeeds becomes immune to wisp ally for 1 hour.

Heightened (+1) You create one additional wisp, allowing you to choose a different target. Each wisp you create must have a different target, and all of them attempt to distract their targets at the same time when you cast or Sustain this spell.

Arc Network.name: 奥术网络 Arc Network
Arc Network.description:
铱灵可以通过带有科技特征的物品和生物进行交流，从该物品或生物的声音、扬声器或其他音频输出中投射声音并借其发声。此外，在计算射程、距离、效应线和效果区域时，警宿可以将其数字心灵感应灵光内任何带有科技特征的物品或生物，作为其法术和能力的起点。

The iridia can communicate through items and creatures with the tech trait, projecting sound from and speaking through the item or creature's voice, speakers, or other audio output. In addition, the excuba can use any item or creature with the tech trait within their digital telepathy aura as the point of origin for their spells and abilities when calculating range, distance, line of effect, and area of effect.

Slip Drive.name: 滑移引擎 Slip Drive
Slip Drive.description:
虹彩体拥有内置的生体机械漂流引擎，使其在进行一个 1 分钟活动后，能够为其所驾驶的星舰或载具充当漂流引擎。护航型个体可以通过一个 1 分钟活动自行进入或离开漂流域。当护航型个体在穿越漂流域进行导航或规划航线的驾驶检定中获得大失败时，改为获得失败。

An iridia has an internal biomechanical Drift engine, allowing them to function as a Drift engine for a starship or vehicle they pilot as a 1-minute activity. An excuba can enter or exit the Drift themself as a 1-minute activity. When an excuba gets a critical failure on a Piloting check to Navigate or Plot a Course through the Drift, they get a failure instead.

Techsense.name: 技感 Techsense
Techsense.description:
伊里迪亚能够以精确感知在所列范围内察觉具有科技（特征）的生物和物体。

The iridia senses creatures and objects with the tech trait as a precise sense within the listed range.

Digital Telepathy.name: 数字心灵感应 Digital Telepathy
Digital Telepathy.description:
100英尺。虹辉可以与其灵光内任何具有科技特征的物品或生物，以及其他具备科技心灵感应的生物（例如具有短波和类似能力者）进行心灵感应交流。此能力还允许虹光体在其灵光范围内远程尝试计算机检定。

100 feet. An iridia can communicate telepathically with any item or creature with the tech trait within their aura as well as with other technologically telepathic creatures (such as those with shortwave and similar abilities). This ability also allows the spectra to remotely attempt Computers checks within their aura.

Shift Dimensionality.name: 维度转移 Shift Dimensionality
Shift Dimensionality.description:
频率 每轮一次

触发条件 艾瑞迪亚成为一次远程打击的目标

效果 一道由视觉扭曲构成的彩虹掠过艾瑞迪亚全身。它们与现实失去同步，并短暂地被一个二维显像所取代，从而对触发此次效果的打击获得隐蔽。

Frequency once per round

Trigger The iridia is targeted by a ranged Strike

Effect A rainbow of visual distortion cascades across the iridia. They desynchronize from reality and are briefly replaced by a two-dimensional rendering, gaining concealment against the triggering Strike.

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
卫哨魔可以呈现为任何小型或中型类人生物的外貌。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

The excuba can take on the appearance of any Small or Medium humanoid.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Iridia.publicNotes:
当凡人在漂流域之外遭遇灵光体时，那次遭遇通常面对的是一名虹辉使。这些拥有乳光色泽、双足而立的使者作为漂流域的信使与代理人穿行宇宙，颂扬新兴与不断发展的技术所带来的益处。他们在生活的一切层面都倡导成长与改进，但尤其专注于推动新技术的发展。他们的目标常常使其与那些拒绝有争议且危险技术的人，或是以谨慎态度看待新颖且未经验证发现的人发生冲突。

众所周知，虹辉使会造访浩界中偏远的世界，远离艾巴萨罗姆空间站与漂流航道；在那些地方，三贤一最初的信标以及漂流域旅行的秘密曾被压制、遗失或误解。他们为这些与世隔绝的世界带去实现星际旅行的指引，以及再次加入银河共同体的第二次机会。

在伟大彼岸，时间并非以数百年、数千年或数百万年来衡量，而是以纪元——以现实本身的一次次迭代——来计算。灵光体仅在过去三个世纪里，随着漂流域技术的出现与扩散而崭露头角，并在原本停滞的伟大彼岸时代思潮中，于一个新兴的生态位里蓬勃发展。

尽管他们的起源与目标仍笼罩于谜团之中，但与灵光体的遭遇总是围绕着新技术发现、超光速旅行知识的分享，以及对漂流域的保护展开。没人知道灵光体是否在漂流域出现之前就已存在，但他们与这一超空间位面的联系无可争议。著名的形而上学家认为，灵光体是由被拖拽入漂流域的原初第五元素聚合而成的，就如同漂流域本身也是由多元宇宙的碎片增长而来。若真如此，灵光体对漂流域技术扩散的兴趣便会显露出一丝阴险意味，因为每一台新的漂流引擎都在为漂流域以及灵光体自身的成长，收割伟大彼岸及其中的一切住民。

When mortals encounter spectra outside the drift, that encounter is usually with an iridia. These opalescent, bipedal ambassadors travel the cosmos as messengers and agents of the Drift, extolling the benefits of new and emergent technologies. They champion growth and improvement in all aspects of life but especially focus on the advancement of new technologies. Their goals often put them at odds with those who forswear controversial and dangerous tech or who approach new and untested discoveries with caution.

Iridias are known to visit remote worlds in the Vast, far away from Absalom Station and the Drift lanes where Triune's original signal and the secrets of Drift travel were suppressed, lost, or misunderstood. They bring the people of these isolated worlds instructions to achieve interstellar travel and a second chance to join the galactic community.

In the Great Beyond, time is measured not in hundreds, thousands, or millions of years, but rather in eons—in iterations of reality itself. Only rising to prominence within the last three centuries alongside the advent and proliferation of Drift technology, spectra have thrived in a burgeoning niche of the otherwise stagnant zeitgeist of the Great Beyond.

Though their origins and objectives remain shrouded in mystery, encounters with spectra revolve around new technological discoveries, sharing the knowledge of faster-than-light travel, and protecting the Drift. No one knows if spectra existed before the Drift, but their connection to the hyperspace plane is indisputable. Prominent metaphysicians believe spectra were created as amalgams of raw quintessence pulled into the Drift, just as the Drift itself grows from pieces of the Multiverse. If this is true, spectra's interest in the proliferation of Drift technology takes a subtle sinister turn, as each new Drift engine serves to harvest the Great Beyond and all its denizens for the growth of the Drift and spectra themselves.

Gwereiad Queen.name: 格维里亚德女王 Gwereiad Queen
Gwereiad Queen.tokenName: 格维雷亚德女王 Gwereiad Queen

Primal Spontaneous Spells.name: 原始自发法术 Primal Spontaneous Spells

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始本能法术 Primal Innate Spells

Event Horizon.name: 事件视界 Event Horizon
Event Horizon.description:
你释放出一个超大质量黑洞的力量。区域内所有生物受到 6d10 钝击伤害和 6d10 虚空伤害。事件视界忽略区域内生物对钝击伤害至多 10 点抗性，以及对虚空伤害至多 10 点抗性。每个生物都要进行一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并且直到其下个回合结束前处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，直到其下个回合结束前处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 3}，并且接下来 1 分钟内处于减速 1。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，直到其下个回合结束前处于减速 3，并且接下来 1 分钟内处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 2}。

You unleash the power of a supermassive black hole. All creatures in the area take 6d10 bludgeoning and 6d10 void damage. Event horizon ignores up to 10 resistance creatures in the area have to bludgeoning, and up to 10 resistance they have to void. Each creature attempts a Reflex save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of its next turn.

Failure The creature takes full damage, is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 3} until the end of its next turn, and slowed 1 for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is slowed 3 until the end of its next turn, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for 1 minute.

Call Cosmos.name: 呼唤宇宙 Call Cosmos
Call Cosmos.description:
你探入虚空，召下一道由危险太空物质构成的垂直光柱，对区域内的生物倾泻毁灭，并以旋舞的星尘笼罩其周围地形。这些物质由燃烧恒星的碎片和冰冻彗星的块体组成；当你施放该法术时，它对区域内每个生物造成 5d12 寒冷伤害和 5d12 火焰伤害。在法术持续时间内，这些太空物质会降低可见度与机动性，使该区域成为强效困难地形，并使在区域内或穿过该区域看到的一切都处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态。

强化（10环） 寒冷伤害和火焰伤害各增加 2d12。

You reach into the void and call down a vertical column of dangerous cosmic material that rains destruction upon creatures in the area and shrouds the terrain around it in a swirl of stardust. This matter is made up of bits of burning stars and chunks of frozen comets, and it deals 5d12 cold damage and 5d12 fire damage to every creature in the area when you Cast the Spell. For the spell's duration, the cosmic material reduces visibility and mobility, making the area greater difficult terrain and making everything seen within or through the area @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Heightened (10th) The cold and fire damage each increase by 2d12.

Implosion.name: 内爆术 Implosion
Implosion.description:
你通过令目标自身崩坏来摧毁目标，造成75伤害。每当你维持该法术时，你必须选择一个新的目标承受相同的效果；相同的生物不能被同一次施放的该法术重复作为目标。你也不能在一回合中通过内爆术影响超过一个生物。你不能以虚体，气体，液体或者其他缺少固体形态的生物作为目标。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加10。

Telekinetic Tantrum.name: 念动力狂乱 Telekinetic Tantrum
Telekinetic Tantrum.description:
你释放出一阵强大的念动力能量弹幕，压制生物、掷飞物体并造成伤害。当你施放这个法术时，以及此后你每轮第一次维持该法术时，你可以选择以下效果之一。你不能连续两次选择相同的效果。

  • 退后！ 你将至多15个物体或生物向任意方向掷出至多40尺（包括向上或向下）。你对每个生物或物体最多可以掷动总计40 Bulk的重量。生物根据其移动的距离受到钝击伤害，并以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{伏倒} 状态落地，如同其受到了坠落伤害一样。对该法术的强韧豁免成功的生物不会被移动。
  • 暴雨 你用区域内的碎片与物体猛击区域内的所有生物，造成5d10点钝击伤害，进行一次基础反射豁免。
  • 念动力猛击 你的念动力风暴猛然撞向区域内的所有生物。进行一次远程法术攻击检定。所有被你命中的目标受到7d6点力场伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

You launch a barrage of powerful psychokinetic energy that overpowers creatures, hurls objects, and deals damage. When you Cast this Spell and the first time each round you Sustain the spell, you can choose one of the following effects. You can't choose the same effect twice in a row.

  • Back Off! You hurl up to 15 objects or creatures up to 40 feet in any direction (including up or down). You can hurl up to a total weight of 40 Bulk per creature or object. Creatures take bludgeoning damage based on the distance they moved and land @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, as though they'd taken falling damage. Creatures that succeed on a Fortitude save against the spell avoid being moved.
  • Hard Rain You pummel all creatures in the area with debris and objects in the area, dealing 5d10 bludgeoning damage with a basic Reflex save.
  • Psychokinetic Slam Your psychokinetic storm slams into all creatures in the area. Make a ranged spell attack roll. All targets you hit take 7d6 force damage and are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Gravity Field.name: 重力场 Gravity Field
Gravity Field.description:
你将物质宇宙的法则扭曲为己所用，使一个区域内的重力增强。区域内所有飞行中的生物下降40英尺。对飞行和攀爬生物而言，整个区域成为高等困难地形；对地面上的生物而言，则为困难地形。任何被重力场拖拽至地面的生物，都会如同坠落一般受到钝击伤害。

该区域内的重力提高一级（例如，零重力变为低重力，低重力变为标准重力，标准重力变为高重力，而高重力变为极端重力）。

Bending the laws of the Universe to your will, you increase the forces of gravity in an area. All flying creatures in the area descend 40 feet. The entire area is greater difficult terrain for Flying and Climbing creatures, and difficult terrain for creatures on the ground. Any creature pulled to the ground by a gravity field takes bludgeoning damage as though it had fallen.

Gravity in the area increases by one step (for example, zero-g becomes low gravity, low gravity becomes standard, standard gravity becomes high gravity, and high gravity becomes extreme gravity).

Singularity Seed.name: 纯一主义种子 Singularity Seed
Singularity Seed.description:
一个极其高密度的小粒子以魔法方式绽放成一个引力奇点，将生物拉向自身，并对任何被移入其中的生物进行空间压缩。你在一个未被任何生物占据的5尺方格内制造一个奇点。施法时，奇点周围 @Template[type:emanation|distance:50] 内的所有生物和未固定物体会根据其反射豁免结果（见下文）被移向奇点。生物和物体的移动从最接近奇点者开始，因此它们可能会阻挡之后被拉入的其他生物和物体的路径。

生物所占据的空间可以在包含奇点的方格内重叠。进入奇点或在其中结束其回合的生物或物体会受到10d10点钝击伤害，且没有豁免。处于奇点中时，生物不能执行任何动作，除了尝试对抗你的法术DC进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{脱身}。当该法术结束时，奇点消失，重叠的生物会被移动到最近的未占据空间，由GM决定。

对于远离奇点移动的生物而言，散发区域内的方格属于困难地形；而朝奇点移动的生物每花费5尺移动力可以移动10尺。

若生物在施法时位于该区域内，以及在其于该区域内结束其回合时，都需要尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物被拖拽10尺，朝奇点移动。

失败 该生物被拖拽20尺，朝奇点移动。

大失败 该生物被拖拽30尺，朝奇点移动。

A tiny particle of incredibly dense mass magically blossoms into a gravitational singularity that pulls creatures toward it and spatially compresses any creatures that are moved into it. You create a singularity in a 5-foot square that is unoccupied by any creatures. All creatures and unsecured objects in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:50] around the singularity are moved toward the singularity when the spell is cast, depending on their Reflex save (see below). Creatures and objects are moved starting with those closest to the singularity, so they might block the path of other creatures and objects that are pulled in later.

Creatures' spaces can overlap in the square that contains the singularity. A creature or object that enters the singularity or ends its turn there takes 10d10 bludgeoning damage with no saving throw. While in the singularity, a creature can take no actions except to attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} against your Spell DC. When the spell ends, the singularity disappears, and overlapping creatures are moved to the closest unoccupied space, as determined by the GM.

Squares in the emanation are difficult terrain for creatures moving away from the singularity, and creatures moving toward the singularity can move 10 feet for each 5 feet of movement they spend.

A creature needs to attempt a Reflex save if it's in the area when the spell is cast and when it ends its turn in the area.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is pulled 10 feet toward the singularity.

Failure The creature is pulled 20 feet toward the singularity.

Critical Failure The creature is pulled 30 feet toward the singularity.

Eclipse Burst.name: 噬星爆发 Eclipse Burst
Eclipse Burst.description:
一个冰寒漆黑的球体在区域中爆炸，对区域中的生物造成8d10寒冷伤害，以及对活物8d4额外虚能伤害。在区域中的每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。

如果该球体覆盖了一个魔法光源的区域，或者影响了一个会受到魔法光照影响的生物，噬星会尝试反制光亮效果。

大成功 该生物或者物体不受影响。

成功 该生物或者物体承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物或者物体承受完整伤害。

大失败 该生物或者物体承受双倍伤害。如果它是生物，他会因这黑暗而 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded}，持续时间无限。

升阶（+1） 该寒冷伤害增加1d10，并且对活物的虚能伤害增加1d4。

Execute.name: 处死一指 Execute
Execute.description:
你将你的手指指向目标生物，并祈求万物的终结。目标承受70点虚能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。如果目标是不死生物，或者具有虚能治疗能力，该法术失去死亡和虚能特征，获得命能特征，并且目标改为承受70点命能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加10。

Void Scour.name: 虚空鞭笞 Void Scour
Void Scour.description:
一股荒芜的黑暗之井席卷一切生命，对区域内所有活体生物造成 10d10 虚空伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须进行一次反射豁免。若虚空冲刷与魔法光照区域重叠，或影响到受魔法光照影响的生物，则虚空冲刷会尝试反制该光照效果。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害和 @Damage[(@item.rank - 6)d6[persistent,void]] 伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 1}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害和 @Damage[(@item.rank - 5)d6[persistent,void]] 伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 2}。

升阶（+1） 初始虚空伤害增加 2d10。持续虚空伤害在失败时增加 1d6，在大失败时增加 2d6。

A well of desolate darkness scours all life, dealing 10d10 void damage to all living creatures in the area. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save. If void scour overlaps with an area of magical light or affects a creature affected by magical light, void scour attempts to counteract the light effect.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and @Damage[(@item.rank - 6)d6[persistent,void]] damage, and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and @Damage[(@item.rank - 5)d6[persistent,void]] damage, and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}.

Heightened (+1) Increase the initial void damage by 2d10. The persistent void damage increases by 1d6 on a failure, or by 2d6 on critical failure.

Mislead.name: 假像术 Mislead
Mislead.description:
你将自身变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}，并且创造一个自身的幻术复制。当你维持该法术时，你可以通过意念指定一系列行动，你的复制该轮会按此行动。你的复制会如同具有你的完整数量的动作一般行动，尽管它不能影响环境中的任何事物。你的复制和你的隐形都会持续整个法术持续时间。进行敌对动作不会结束假像术的隐形，如同4环级@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}法术。一个了解到该复制为幻象的生物并不会直接知道你是隐形的，并且可以看见你的隐形形态的生物并不会直接知道你的复制是幻象。

如果你施放法术，或者以另外方式和其他生物交互，以该动作的一部分，你可以尝试一次欺骗检定，对抗观察者的察觉DC，以令它相信你的复制品使用了该动作。这不会欺骗任何了解你的复制品为幻觉的生物，并且对于显然不是来自复制的攻击也没有用。例如，你发射了一道射线，并且你可以令其看起来来自你的复制，只要你的复制的位置合适，但如果你使用剑攻击，并且你的复制在房间里与目标相对的另一个角落，你的欺骗检定自动失败。

Pocket Vacuum.name: 口袋真空器 Pocket Vacuum
Pocket Vacuum.description:
你制造出一片突然的真空，迫使区域内的生物屏住呼吸，否则便会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识} 并开始窒息。爆炸性减压会在法术施放时，或在持续时间内进入该区域时，对区域内每个生物造成 5d12 点钝击伤害（除非它们已经处于真空中），并进行一次基础强韧豁免。豁免大失败的生物还会被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d12。

You create a sudden vacuum, forcing creatures in the area to hold their breath or fall @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} and start suffocating. The explosive decompression deals 5d12 bludgeoning damage to each creature in the area when the spell is cast or that enters the area during the duration (unless they were already in a vacuum), with a basic Fortitude save. Creatures who critically fail the save are also knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Promession.name: 普罗梅西翁 Promession
Promession.description:
你将目标瞬间冻结，然后向其体内传入次声波，可能将其化为细粉。对目标进行一次法术攻击检定。若你命中目标，则目标受到 6d8 点寒冷伤害，并且必须尝试一次强韧豁免。若你重击，则目标在其强韧豁免上的结果等级比其掷出的结果恶化一级。生物若被降至 0 生命值，则会被炸成细粉；其装备会保留。

大成功 目标不受后续伤害影响。

成功 目标额外受到 @Damage[((@item.level -3)d8)[sonic]] 点音波伤害。

失败 目标额外受到 @Damage[((@item.level)d8)[sonic]] 点音波伤害。

大失败 目标额外受到 @Damage[((@item.level +6)d8)[sonic]] 点音波伤害。

升阶（+1） 寒冷伤害和音波伤害各增加 1d8。

You flash freeze a target then send subsonic waves through it, potentially reducing it into fine powder. Make a spell attack against the target. If you hit a target, the target takes 6d8 cold damage and must attempt a Fortitude save. If you critically hit, the target gets a result one degree of success worse than it rolled on its Fortitude save. A creature reduced to 0 Hit Points is blasted to fine powder; its gear remains.

Critical Success The target is unaffected by further damage.

Success The target takes an additional @Damage[((@item.level -3)d8)[sonic]] damage.

Failure The target takes an additional @Damage[((@item.level)d8)[sonic]] damage.

Critical Failure The target takes an additional @Damage[((@item.level +6)d8)[sonic]] damage.

Heightened (+1) The cold and sonic damage each increase by 1d8.

Wave of Warning.name: 警告波动 Wave of Warning
Wave of Warning.description:
你以一阵充满敌意的意念震慑敌人。目标受到 7d8 点非致命精神伤害，且目标必须进行一次意志豁免。随后，灵能会弧跳至首个目标 30 尺内的另一名生物，再跳至该目标 30 尺内的另一名生物，依此类推。你可以在任意时点结束这道波动。你不能将同一生物设为目标超过一次，且你必须对所有目标都具有效果线。伤害只掷一次，并将结果应用于每个目标（根据其豁免结果适当减半或加倍）。

大成功 目标生物不受影响，且波动在该目标处结束。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全额伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 2d8。

You deter enemies with a wave of hostile intent. The target takes 7d8 nonlethal mental damage, and the target must attempt a Will save. The psychic energy then arcs to another creature within 30 feet of the first target, jumps to another creature within 30 feet of that target, and so on. You can end the wave at any point. You can't target the same creature more than once, and you must have line of effect to all targets. Roll the damage only once, and apply it to each target (halving or doubling as appropriate for its saving throw outcome).

Critical Success The target creature is unaffected, and the wave ends with that target.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d8.

Cairn Form.name: 石冢形态 Cairn Form
Cairn Form.description:
目标的皮肤变成厚实的坚固石质甲壳，获得对物理伤害的抗性 5，但精金除外。目标获得一种拳头徒手攻击，造成 2d6 点钝击伤害。目标以其最高的武器或徒手攻击熟练度来进行这些攻击；如果其具有武器专精或高等武器专精，也将该伤害加值加入其中。若以这些徒手攻击之一造成重击，被击中的生物必须对抗目标的职业 DC 进行一次强韧豁免，失败则变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}，持续 1 轮。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.v724q5Xi7KPPnLQ3]{法术效果：Cairn Form}

强化（6环） 该抗性提升至 10，且这些攻击造成的伤害提升至 3d6。

强化（10环） 该抗性提升至 20，且这些攻击造成的伤害提升至 4d6。

Your target's skin becomes a thick carapace of solid stone, granting resistance 5 to physical damage, except adamantine. The target gains a fist unarmed attack that deals 2d6 bludgeoning damage. The target uses their highest weapon or unarmed attack proficiency with these attacks, and if they have weapon specialization or greater weapon specialization, they add this damage as well. On a critical hit with one of these unarmed attacks, the creature struck must succeed at a Fortitude save against the target's class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.v724q5Xi7KPPnLQ3]{Spell Effect: Cairn Form}

Heightened (6th) The resistance increases to 10, and the damage dealt by the attacks increases to 3d6.

Heightened (10th) The resistance increases to 20, and the damage dealt by the attacks increases to 4d6.

Clairvoyance.name: 鹰眼术 Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description: 你在射程内创造出一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}的悬浮眼睛（它甚至可以在你的视觉线或者效果线之外）。这只眼睛不能移动，但是你可以从该处看到所有方向，如同使用你通常的视觉感官。

Electrotether.name: 电索束 Electrotether
Electrotether.description:
你将目标的电磁性大幅增强，并用一道闪电构成的天索将其拉拽。对每个目标进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若你攻击两个目标，这两次攻击都计入你的多重攻击减值，但要在两次攻击都完成后才增加。每个目标受到4d8点电击伤害，并被拖拽至更靠近你5英尺处；若重击，则被拖拽至更靠近你10英尺处。若两次攻击都命中，你可以选择让这些生物彼此靠近，而非靠近你。若将目标移动到屏障、生物或障碍物中，则目标会在进入该空间前停下。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d8。

You supercharge the targets' electromagnetism and pull them with a tether of lightning. Make a ranged spell attack against each target. If you attack two targets, both attacks count toward your multiple attack penalty, but it doesn't increase until after both attacks. The targets each take 4d8 electricity damage and are pulled 5 feet closer to you, or 10 feet closer on a critical hit. If both attacks hit, you can choose to move the creatures closer to one another instead of closer to you. Moving a target into a barrier, creature, or obstacle causes the target to stop before entering that space.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法强化了目标，令其行动迅速。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}状态，并且每轮可以使用该额外动作以打击或者行走。

升阶（7环级） 你能以至多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Personal Gravity (Constant).name: 个人重力（恒常城） Personal Gravity (Constant)
Personal Gravity (Constant).description:
你改变重力对你的影响。你将重力视为由你选择提高或降低一级（例如，如果你处于低重力区域，你可以选择将其视为标准重力或零重力）。当该法术生效时，任何会影响你的强制移动距离减少5英尺（最少为0英尺），并且你忽略因重力对你造成的笨拙和未系缆状态。你可以解散该法术。

You alter gravity's effects on you. You treat gravity as if it were your choice of one step higher or lower (for example, if you were in an area of low gravity, you could choose either standard gravity or zero-g). While the spell is active, you reduce the distance of any forced movement that would affect you by 5 feet (minimum 0 feet), and you ignore being clumsy and untethered because of gravity effects on you. You can Dismiss the spell.

Time's Edge.name: 时间边缘 Time's Edge
Time's Edge.description:
你将来自时间维度的潜在能量折射到你当前的位面，形成一把巨大的刀刃。这把刀刃对区域内所有生物造成 5d6 点挥砍伤害，因为它会使它们身体的一薄片区域中的时间迅速流逝。区域内的生物必须尝试进行一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 2d6。

You refract latent energy from the Dimension of Time into your current plane in the form of a massive blade. The blade deals 5d6 slashing damage to all creatures in the area as it causes time to pass rapidly in a thin slice of their bodies. Creatures in the area must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Darkness.name: 黑暗术 Darkness
Darkness.description:
你创造一片黑暗的帷幕，光线无法穿透，并且光源无法在区域中发光。光线无法进入该区域，并且任何非魔法光源，例如火炬或者提灯，在区域中不会发出任何光线，即使其光照可能到达黑暗术之外也是如此。这也会压制等于或低于你的黑暗术环级的魔法光亮。光线无法穿透，所以在区域中的生物无法看到外面。对于外面，这看起来如同一团纯粹黑暗的球。

升阶（4环级） 即使具有黑暗视觉的生物（但不包括高等黑暗视觉）也几乎无法看穿这黑暗。它们透过黑暗看到的生物视为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}。

Charm.name: 魅惑术 Charm
Charm.description:
在目标看来，你的言语甜蜜动听，你的形象笼罩在梦幻般的光晕中。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免，如果你或者你的盟友最近威胁它或者对它进行了敌对行为，会获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。如果你对目标使用任何敌对动作，法术终止。当该法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己被魅惑了，除非它和你的友好关系，或者你说服它去做的事情与其期望发生冲突。这也即是说你可以通过常规的方法说服目标继续作为你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且意识到你尝试魅惑它。

成功 该目标不受影响，但是认为你的法术是某种无害的东西，而不是魅惑术，除非它能识别该法术（通常通过辨识法术（Identifying Spells））。

失败 目标对你的态度变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友好 Friendly}）。如果已经是友好，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于帮助 Helpful}。它不能对你做出敌对行为。

大失败 目标变为乐于帮助并且不能对你做出敌对行为。

升阶（4环级） 该法术持续时间为持续到下次你进行你的日常准备。

升阶（8环级） 该法术持续时间为持续到下次你进行你的日常准备，并且你能以至多10个生物作为目标。

Command.name: 命令术 Command
Command.description:
你喊出一句难以被忽视的命令。你可以命令目标接近你，逃离你（如同获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing}状态），扔下持有物，俯卧@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，或者站立在原地。它不能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.A72nHGUtNXgY5Ey9]{延后 Delay}或者使用任何反应动作，直到它服从你的命令为止。法术效果基于目标的意志豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 作为该生物下个回合的第一个动作，其必须用一个单动作来完成你的命令。

大失败 目标必须使用其下个回合的全部动作来完成你的命令。

升阶（5环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你将恐惧植入目标；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}.

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}.

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 3} 并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing} 1轮.

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Glow Up.name: 焕发光彩 Glow Up
Glow Up.description:
你制造出一种幻象，使目标在观察者眼中显得更加迷人且文雅。该法术会根据观察者认为有吸引力的特质，强化目标的外貌、衣着、声音和举止。手持物品不受影响，而生物身上任何被移除的穿戴物品都会恢复其真实外观。

目标在进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象} 的交涉检定时获得 +1 状态加值，且若未受训，则可将其等级加到交涉检定中。此外，目标只需 10 分钟即可尝试进行一次交涉检定来打探消息。你可以解除该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hOp5ybOzyJlECU6B]{法术效果：容光焕发}

升阶（+2） 该加值提高 1，至多在第 7 环时达到 +4。

You create an illusion that causes the target to appear more charming and genteel to observers. The spell accentuates the target's appearance, clothing, voice, and mannerisms according to what an observer finds appealing. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item removed from the creature returns to its true appearance.

The target gains a +1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and lets the target add its level to Diplomacy checks if untrained. In addition, the target can attempt a Diplomacy check to Gather Information in only 10 minutes. You can Dismiss this spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hOp5ybOzyJlECU6B]{Spell Effect: Glow Up}

Heightened (+2) The bonus increases by 1, to a maximum of +4 at 7th rank.

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然存在的引导，赋予目标在持续时间结束前的一次攻击骰，察觉检定，豁免骰，或者技能检定上获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择是否使用该加值。如果目标使用该加值，该法术结束。无论怎样结束，该目标接下来会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法帮你完成杂物。只要你维持该法术，你就可以产生简单的魔法效果。每当你维持该法术时，你可以选择四个选项中的一个。

  • 烹饪 为1磅非活物材料冷却，加热，或者调味。
  • 抬起 将一件轻负载或者更低的无主物品缓慢抬离地面。
  • 创造 创造一个负载可忽略的临时物体，它由凝结的魔法物质组成。该物体看起来粗糙且非常脆弱——它无法被用做工具，武器，法器或法术开销。
  • 整理 为一件轻负载或者更低的物体染色，清洁，或者弄脏它。你可以通过10轮专注来影响一件1负载的物体，对于更大的物体为每负载1分钟。

魔法伎俩无法造成伤害或者负面效果。对一件物体的任何改变（在上述内容之外的）只会在你仍维持该法术时持续。

Scan Environment.name: 扫描环境 Scan Environment
Scan Environment.description:
你会分析1英里内区域中的自然环境，获知有关大气、生物群系和重力的一般信息。你可以预测接下来1小时的天气，包括天气将从哪个方向来；得知该区域内有哪些大气、生物群系和重力，以及这些要素所在的方向与距离；并得知该区域内是否有任何事物构成环境危害，包括寒冷或高温危险（处于哪个温度范围）、辐射（处于何种严重程度）、烟雾效果，以及水下环境状况。这些信息只足以探测直径超过30英尺的大范围效应。你会大致感知这些危险位于何处以及距离多远。

强化（+1） 扫描区域的半径增加1英里。

You analyze the natural environment in the area within 1 mile, learning general information about the atmosphere, biomes, and gravity. You forecast the weather for the next hour, including the direction it will come from; learn which atmospheres, biomes, and gravity are in the area, as well as the direction and distance to those elements; and learn if anything in the area presents an environmental hazard, including cold or heat dangers (at what temperature range), radiation (at what severity), smoke effects, and underwater conditions. This is enough to detect large effects that span spaces over 30 feet in diameter only. You gain a general sense of where and how far away these dangers are.

Heightened (+1) The scanned area increases in radius by 1 mile.

Seek the Stars.name: 追寻群星 Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
在你的心眼中，你勾勒出一条穿越宇宙的路径。如果你身处协约世界的空间中，你会立刻知道应朝哪个方向旅行，才能抵达艾巴萨罗姆空间站上的星石。如果你在协约星系之外，你会知道距离最近的漂流信标或星石所在的方向。

强化（7环） 你也可以转而知晓某个熟悉地点的方向，例如你曾造访过的世界或中途站。

In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Stumble.name: 踉跄 Stumble
Stumble.description:
一阵微重力爆发在目标周围引发震颤，将其拉向地面。目标必须进行一次反射豁免。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态，持续1轮。如果目标当时正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，则它会向下坠落10英尺。

大失败 目标倒地 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。如果目标当时正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，则它会向下坠落20英尺。

强化（+1） 如果目标坠落，则在失败时额外坠落5英尺，在大失败时额外坠落10英尺。

A burst of microgravity causes a tremor around the target, pulling it toward the ground. The target must attempt a Reflex save.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 10 feet downward.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 20 feet downward.

Heightened (+1) If the target falls, it falls an additional 5 feet on a failure and 10 feet on a critical failure.

Sense Transponder.name: 感测转发器 Sense Transponder
Sense Transponder.description:
当身处与其绑定的天族天体上时，宁芙能够感知到在距该天体一天行程范围内接近的星舰。这不会向其提供任何关于该星舰、其乘员或其确切位置的信息。宁芙可以如同使用个人通讯器一样向该星舰发送信息。

While on their bonded celestial body, a nymph can sense approaching starships within a day's travel from the celestial body. This doesn't give them any information about the ship, its occupants, or its exact position. The nymph can send a message to the ship as if using a personal comm unit.

Astronomical Ties.name: 星际羁绊 Astronomical Ties
Astronomical Ties.description:
宁芙女王与某个特定的天体有着内在联系，例如日耀宁芙女王对应一颗超巨星。

只要女王健康无恙，她的领地便会繁荣兴盛，而且她可以尝试以10环反制等级对抗会改变其物理性质的法术和仪式 [[/r 1d20+32 #Counteract]]。

然而，如果宁芙女王受伤或状况不佳，她的天体也会随之衰弱：小行星偏离轨道摇摆不定，恒星变得昏暗，黑洞的引力减弱。恢复宁芙女王的状态后，她的天体便会回归平衡。

A nymph queen is intrinsically tied to a specific celestial body, such as a supergiant star for a heliad queen.

As long as the queen is healthy, her territory thrives, and she can attempt to [[/r 1d20+32 #Counteract]] counteract spells and rituals that alter its physical properties with a counteract rank of 10.

If a nymph queen is injured or unhealthy, however, her celestial body also weakens: asteroids wobble out of orbit, stars dim, and the gravity of black holes diminishes. Restoring the nymph queen returns her celestial body to its equilibrium.

Singularity Field.name: 奇点力场 Singularity Field
Singularity Field.description:
60尺。gwereiad 周围的区域会无可阻挡地将事物拉向其中心。进入灵光或在灵光内开始其回合的生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[reflex|dc:40] 豁免，否则会被拖拽 5 尺朝向 gwereiad（若大失败则为 10 尺）。

60 feet. The area around a gwereiad inexorably draws things toward its center. Creatures entering or starting their turns inside the aura must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:40] save or be pulled 5 feet toward the gwereiad (10 feet on a critical failure).

Broadcast Allure.name: 广播魅惑 Broadcast Allure
Broadcast Allure.description:
宁芙女王会以魔法将她的影像叠加到行星范围内所有能够显示该影像的科技物品上，例如数据板或通讯装置。或者，她也可以将该影像发送到她所知晓的任意一个或多个通讯地址。

每个能看见该影像的生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:40]，否则其对她的态度会改善一级（若严重失败则改善两级）。

如果宁芙女王对受影响的生物或其盟友采取敌对行动，这些生物的态度会恢复到先前的等级。

The nymph queen magically superimposes her image on all technological items capable of displaying it, such as datapads or comm units, within planetary range. Alternatively, she can send this image to any comm address or addresses that she knows.

Each creature that can see the image must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:40] or have their attitude toward her improve by one step (two steps on a critical failure).

Affected creatures' attitudes revert to their previous level if the nymph queen uses a hostile action against them or their allies.

Celestial Step.name: 天族步伐 Celestial Step
Celestial Step.description:
一位宁芙女王能够近乎瞬间地穿行于她的天族躯体之中。宁芙女王可以使用 Celestial Step 传送到她领地上或领地内的任何区域，遁入其表面并在她预定的目的地重新出现。

A nymph queen can traverse her celestial body near-instantaneously. A nymph queen can use Celestial Step to teleport to any area on or within her territory, vanishing into its surface and reemerging at her intended destination.

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
宁芙女王可以在其原本形态——看起来很像其种类中典型的宁芙——与任何小型或中型类人生物形态之间变形，通常会选择其自然形态的一个版本，并带有所选种族的外貌。

Nymph queens can transform between their original form, which looks much like a typical nymph of their kind, and any Small or Medium humanoid form, typically choosing a version of their natural form with the appearance of the chosen species.

Fan Mail.name: 粉丝来信 Fan Mail
Fan Mail.description:
宁芙女王可以通过发送一段激励视频或文本消息来激励一个单一的智能生物。只要该生物保留着这条消息，且与宁芙女王保持良好关系，他们便在所有与艺术或表演相关的制作、表演和学识检定上获得 +1 状态加值。

该生物可以用一个单动作的交互动作来播放或查看这条消息，以鼓舞自己的精神。如此一来，该生物可以尝试进行一次 [[/r 1d20+26 #Counteract]] 反制检定，以对抗一个正影响其的情绪效应。

当宁芙女王的消息以这种方式使用后，它之后就会变成一段普通的视频或文本。

A nymph queen can inspire a single intelligent creature by sending them a motivational video or text message. As long as the creature keeps the message saved and remains in good standing with the nymph queen, they gain a +1 status bonus to all Crafting, Performance, and Lore checks related to art or performance.

As a 1-action Interact action, the creature can play or view the message to bolster their spirits. Doing so allows the creature to attempt a [[/r 1d20+26 #Counteract]] counteract check against a single emotion effect affecting them.

When the nymph queen's message is used in this way, it becomes a mundane video or text afterward.

Gravitic Crush.name: 引力碾压 Gravitic Crush
Gravitic Crush.description:
格维雷亚德在30英尺内一名生物周围召唤一次引力坍缩，造成 @Damage[5d12[bludgeoning]] 伤害。受影响的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:40] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物的身体在重力下蜷缩，且它受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并因引力坍缩而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{无法移动}。它会持续受到 @Damage[2d6[persistent,bludgeoning]] 伤害，直到它 [[/act escape dc=40]]{挣脱}。

大失败 如失败，但该生物受到双倍伤害，且持续伤害变为4d6。

The gwereiad summons a gravitational collapse around a creature within 30 feet, dealing @Damage[5d12[bludgeoning]] damage. The affected creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:40] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature's body crumples under the gravity, and it takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} by the gravitational collapse. It takes @Damage[2d6[persistent,bludgeoning]] damage until it [[/act escape dc=40]]{Escapes}.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature takes double damage and the persistent damage is 4d6.

Gwereiad Queen.publicNotes:
最稀有的宁芙之一，格维雷亚德女王形成于超大质量黑洞之中，要么源自较弱格维雷亚德的飞升，要么在黑洞的强大能量中自发诞生。她们往往比典型的格维雷亚德更加超然，只会以融合科学与秘术的奇特隐喻交谈。

宁芙是美丽的精类，外表为具备精灵特征的人形。她们通常呈现为女性形态，但各种性别与性别表达的宁芙都存在。许多宁芙生活在行星上，担任天然池塘、森林、洞穴与悬崖边的守护者；而另一些宁芙——通常被称为空间宁芙——则以与天体的联系而闻名。和她们那些居于行星的同族一样，空间宁芙会保护与自己结下联系的领地，防止其遭到开发利用或伤害。

作为艺术的爱好者，宁芙尤其亲近富有创造力的人；若有人提出要在故事、图画或歌谣中描绘一位宁芙，这几乎必定能赢得她们的青睐——除非那位宁芙不喜欢最终成品，并因艺术家拿平庸之作羞辱自己而大发雷霆。视频播送和直播是较为善于交际的宁芙中颇受欢迎的消遣，无论是为了展示她们偏远的环境，还是为表演寻找观众。有些宁芙会引诱电影摄制组到她们的领地取景拍摄，但有两个前提：第一，制作过程不得破坏环境；第二，宁芙必须在影片中获得一个重要角色。

除非自己的领地受到威胁，大多数空间宁芙对凡人都很友善，或至少漠不关心，但她们记性极好。任何造访空间宁芙领地的人，若能事先调查那位宁芙怀有的怨恨、过去与凡人的遭遇，或该地区近期发生的、可能影响她对靠近其家园之旅者看法的事件，都会是明智之举。

若某位凡人展现出恰当的态度与能力，例如保护某个恒星天体免于毁灭，或创作出格外美丽的艺术作品，便可能吸引空间宁芙的注意。空间宁芙偶尔会主动向日行者或秘术师提供导师服务，尽管她们很少会自行寻找学生。空间宁芙很少同时建立不止一段这样的关系，而且通常只会作出预计持续数十年乃至数百年的承诺，因此她们在挑选门生时极其挑剔。

The rarest of nymphs, gwereiad queens form within supermassive black holes, either from a weaker gwereiad's ascension or created spontaneously amid the black hole's powerful energies. They tend to be even more detached than the typical gwereiad, speaking only in peculiar metaphors blending science and mysticism.

Nymphs are beautiful fey who appear as humanoids with elven features. They generally take female forms, but nymphs of all genders and presentations exist. While many nymphs live on planets and act as protectors of natural ponds, forests, caves, and cliffsides, other nymphs—often called space nymphs—are known for their association with celestial bodies. Like their planet-bound kin, space nymphs guard their bonded territories from exploitation or harm.

As admirers of the arts, nymphs are especially friendly toward creatives, and offering to depict a nymph in story, picture, or song is a sure way to win their favor—unless the nymph doesn't like the final result and lashes out at the artist for insulting them with a mediocre product. Vidcasting and livestreaming are popular pastimes among more sociable nymphs, whether to show off their remote environments or find audiences for performances. Some nymphs entice movie crews to film in their territories, with two provisos: first, that the production not damage the environment, and second, that the nymph receive a prominent role in the film.

Unless their territories are threatened, most space nymphs are friendly or indifferent to mortals, but they have long memories. Anyone visiting a space nymph's territory would be wise to research that nymph's grudges, past encounters with mortals, or any recent events in the area that might color the nymph's perspective of those traveling near their home.

A mortal who demonstrates the right attitude and abilities, such as by protecting a stellar body from destruction or creating an especially beautiful work of art, might draw a space nymph's attention. From time to time, space nymphs will offer their services as mentors to solarians or mystics, though they seldom seek pupils on their own. Space nymphs rarely enter into more than one such arrangement at a time and typically only make commitments that promise to last decades or centuries, so they're extremely selective in their choice of mentee.

Aeon Guard Commander.name: 万古卫队指挥官 Aeon Guard Commander
Aeon Guard Commander.tokenName: 万古卫队指挥官 Aeon Guard Commander

Frag Grenade (Tactical).name: 破片手榴弹（战术型） Frag Grenade (Tactical)
Frag Grenade (Tactical).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 @Damage[1d4[bleed]]

这些破片手榴弹会爆炸成一团弹片云，在一个 @Template[burst|distance:10] 内造成 2d8 点穿刺伤害，并可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d4[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 2d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Aeon Guard Armor.name: 万古卫队护甲 Aeon Guard Armor
Aeon Guard Armor.description:
升级： 1

这是一种由柔韧而坚固的甲片层叠构成的传统护甲，供卡斯卓韦的拉申塔人骑兵穿戴。过去，shotalashu骑兵会用其坐骑蜕下的皮来打造自己的护甲，较少见的情况则是使用阵亡坐骑的皮，以在未来的战斗中纪念它们。在卡斯卓韦的某些地区，合成仿制品也很流行。

Upgrades: 1

Flexible but sturdy plates layered together form this traditional armor worn by lashunta cavalry on Castrovel. In times past, a shotalashu cavalry member forged their armor from their mount's shed skin, or more rarely, the skin of a fallen mount, to honor them in future battles. Synthetic imitations are fashionable on some parts of Castrovel.

Darkvision Visor.name: 黑暗视觉面罩 Darkvision Visor
Darkvision Visor.description:
这副面罩环绕你的视觉器官，增强你的天然感官。你获得黑暗视觉。

This visor wraps around your visual organs, enhancing your natural senses. You gain darkvision.

Area Fire.name: 区域射击 Area Fire
Area Fire.description:
重度失败时受到 @Damage[1d4[persistent,bleed]|options:area-damage] 伤害

@Damage[1d4[persistent,bleed]|options:area-damage] damage on critical failure

Lead the Charge.name: 带头冲锋 Lead the Charge
Lead the Charge.description:
指挥官进行两次Stride。如果他们在此次移动结束时处于至少一个敌人的近战触及范围内，他们可以对该敌人进行一次近战Strike。指挥官的盟友对这次Strike的目标进行攻击时获得 +1 境况加值，并且在 1 轮内忽略指挥官为该目标提供的任何掩护。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.UEnGE804ZFRJmQYN]{效果：带头冲锋}

The commander Strides twice. If they end this movement within melee reach of at least one enemy, they can make a melee Strike against that enemy. The commander's allies gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack the target of this Strike and ignore any cover the commander provides the target for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.UEnGE804ZFRJmQYN]{Effect: Lead the Charge}

Rally the Troops.name: 鼓舞部队 Rally the Troops
Rally the Troops.description:
指挥官下令，让其盟友重新集结。所有位于指挥官 120 尺内的万古卫队盟友都可以使用一个反应，以其速度进行一次 Stride。任何在移动结束时与另一名万古卫队相邻的万古卫队，获得 5 点持续 1 分钟的临时生命值；如果其在移动结束时与指挥官相邻，则改为获得双倍数量的临时生命值。指挥官在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Rally the Troops]]{1d4 轮}内不能再次使用“集结部队”。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.p2GrXbOJbv0OT4Zr]{效果：集结部队}

The commander issues an order for their allies to regroup. All Aeon Guard allies within 120 feet of the commander can use a reaction to Stride up to their Speed. Any Aeon Guards who end their movement adjacent to another Aeon Guard gain 5 temporary Hit Points that last 1 minute, or double that number of temporary Hit Points if they end their movement adjacent to the commander. The commander can't Rally the Troops again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Rally the Troops]]{1d4 rounds}.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.p2GrXbOJbv0OT4Zr]{Effect: Rally the Troops}

Tactical Strike.name: 战术打击 Tactical Strike
Tactical Strike.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 指挥官点出60英尺内的一名敌人，然后对该敌人进行一次打击，若命中则额外造成1d6精准伤害。若此次打击命中，指挥官便会扭转战局，激励盟友展现更高超的军事才能。所有位于指挥官60英尺内的万古卫队盟友在指挥官下个回合开始前，攻击骰与伤害骰获得+1状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ppKeWbPcSaVqD1Cj]{效果：战术打击}

Frequency once per round

Effect The commander calls out an enemy within 60 feet then makes a Strike against that enemy, dealing an additional 1d6 precision damage on a hit. If the Strike hits, the commander changes the tide of the battle, inspiring their allies to greater feats of military prowess. All Aeon Guard allies within 60 feet of the commander gain a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls until the beginning of the commander's next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ppKeWbPcSaVqD1Cj]{Effect: Tactical Strike}

Terrifying Takedown.name: 骇人制服 Terrifying Takedown
Terrifying Takedown.description:
触发条件 指挥官以一次打击使一名敌人生命值降至 0，或以一次打击对一名敌人造成重击

效果 指挥官将自己残暴的一击变成一场骇人的展示。他们尝试进行一次恐吓检定，以对 30 尺内的所有敌人执行 [[/act demoralize]]。

Trigger The commander reduces an enemy to 0 Hit Points or critically hits an enemy with a Strike

Effect The commander makes a gruesome spectacle of their brutal hit. They attempt an Intimidation check to [[/act demoralize]] all enemies within 30 feet.

Aeon Guard Commander.publicNotes:
万古卫队指挥官受过从前线率队作战的训练，使用射程相对较短的火器，并以其决斗剑的高超技艺在近距离扩大战果，同时激励其余部队逼近。每当需要迅速且果断地结束一场战斗时，就会派遣万古卫队指挥官出动。

Aeon Guard commanders are trained to lead from the front, using relatively short-range firearms and extraordinary skill with their dueling swords to press the advantage up close while motivating the rest of their unit to close in. Aeon Guard commanders are dispatched whenever there's a need to end a battle quickly and decisively.

Caypin.name: 凯平 Caypin

Appendage Cluster.name: 附肢簇 Appendage Cluster
Appendage Cluster.description:
凯平的分离附肢簇是一种由凯平控制的小型、无心智、半独立生物。它具有仆从（特征）、黑暗视觉、@Damage[30[healing]] 生命值、20尺陆地速度，以及15尺游泳速度。它与凯平共享AC、豁免加值和技能调整值。凯平可以看见其附肢簇所看见的事物，并在其他方面与该附肢簇共享感官。每轮，凯平可以指挥一个仆从，为一个附肢簇赋予2个动作。附肢簇可以进行颚部打击（近战 1 颚部 +14，伤害 2d4+3 穿刺），并具有“簇群猛袭”能力。

如果凯平被杀死，任何已分离的附肢簇也会一并死亡。任何附肢簇一旦移动到距离凯平超过100尺的位置，都会立即死亡。

如果凯平的两个分离附肢簇都被摧毁，但凯平仍然存活，则凯平会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，直到它至少重新长出一个附肢簇为止。一个死亡的附肢簇会在3天后重新长出。

A caypin's detached appendage cluster is a Small, mindless, semi-independent creature controlled by the caypin. It has the minion trait, darkvision, @Damage[30[healing]] Hit Points, a land Speed of 20 feet, and a swim Speed of 15 feet. It shares the caypin's AC, saving throw bonuses, and skill modifiers. The caypin can see what its appendage cluster sees and otherwise shares its senses with the cluster. Each round, the caypin can Command a Minion to grant an appendage cluster 2 actions. An appendage cluster can make jaws Strikes (Melee 1 jaws +14, Damage 2d4+3 piercing) and has the Cluster Onslaught ability.

If the caypin is killed, any detached appendage clusters are also killed. Any appendage cluster that moves more than 100 feet from the caypin dies instantly.

If both the caypin's detached appendage clusters are destroyed but the caypin still lives, the caypin is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} until it regrows at least one of its appendage clusters. A dead appendage cluster regrows in 3 days.

Aquatic Ambush.name: 水下伏击 Aquatic Ambush
Aquatic Ambush.description:
40尺

要求 该怪物正藏身于水中，且一名尚未察觉它的生物位于上述尺数范围内

效果 该怪物朝触发该反应的生物移动，最多可移动相当于其游泳速度 + 10尺的距离，并可在水面与陆地上行进。一旦该生物进入其触及范围内，该怪物便对其进行一次打击。该生物在此次打击中处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}状态。

40 feet

Requirements The monster is hiding in water and a creature that hasn't detected it is within the listed number of feet

Effect The monster moves up to its swim Speed + 10 feet toward the triggering creature, traveling on water and on land. Once the creature is in reach, the monster makes a Strike against it. The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against this Strike.

Cluster Onslaught.name: 集群猛攻 Cluster Onslaught
Cluster Onslaught.description:
一团附肢簇尝试进行一次特技检定，以[[/act tumble-through]]穿越一个生物的空间。若成功，该簇的口器会对该生物疯狂撕咬，造成 @Damage[3d8[piercing]] 伤害。若该特技检定为大成功，则目标还会受到 @Damage[4[bleed]] 伤害。

An appendage cluster attempts an Acrobatics check to [[/act tumble-through]] a creature's space. On a success, the mouths of the cluster gnash and gnaw at the creature, dealing @Damage[3d8[piercing]] damage. If the Acrobatics check was a critical success, the target also takes @Damage[4[bleed]] damage.

Detach Cluster.name: 分离集群 Detach Cluster
Detach Cluster.description:
凯平将其一半的面部附肢分离，形成一个附肢簇，并占据其所选的一个相邻方格。一个凯平同时最多可以分离两个附肢簇；如果两个附肢簇都已分离，则凯平无法进行颚部打击，也无法再次使用“分离簇”，直到至少有一个附肢簇重新附着。一个相邻的附肢簇可以通过一个互动动作重新附着到凯平身上。

The caypin detaches half of its facial appendages into an appendage cluster that occupies a single adjacent square of its choice. A caypin can have up to two appendage clusters detached at a time, and if both clusters are detached, the caypin can't make jaws Strikes or Detach Cluster again until at least one cluster reattaches. An adjacent appendage cluster can reattach to the caypin with an Interact action.

Caypin.publicNotes:
凯平是强壮的掠食者，兼具狼的敏捷与鳄鱼般的鳞状皮肤。它们最引人注目的特征，是覆盖在头部的一团不断扭动、半具感知能力的附肢。这些触手般的突起每一根都带有一只布满血丝的眼球和一张满是利齿的大嘴，而凯平自身并没有眼睛或嘴巴——它依靠这些孔口来视物与进食。附肢吸收的营养会通过这头野兽下颌上的微小接纳孔传递给凯平，而凯平还能将这些附肢脱离下来，形成不断翻腾的簇团，独立移动到离本体最远100英尺的范围。在荒野中，凯平会利用这些簇团伏击猎物，而这种生物也因其贪婪的进食能力闻名于整个银河——它们能吃下相当于自身一半体重的生肉。

Caypins are brawny predators with the agility of wolves and the scaly skin of crocodiles. Their most striking feature is a mass of wriggling, semi-sentient appendages that cover their heads. Each of these tentacle-like protuberances contains a bloodshot eyeball and a gaping mouth full of teeth, and the caypin—which has no eyes or mouth of its own—relies on these orifices to see and feed. Nutrients absorbed by the appendages are passed to the caypin via tiny receptive sockets in the beast's jaw, and caypins can detach these appendages into writhing clusters that independently move up to 100 feet from their bodies. In the wild, caypins use these clusters to ambush prey, and the creatures are known across the galaxy for their rapacious ability to consume half of their body weight in raw meat.

Abysium Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).name: 深渊锡龙（成年，施法者） Abysium Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster)
Abysium Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).tokenName: 深渊星金龙（成年，施法者） Abysium Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster)

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术预备法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Arcane Spontaneous Spells.name: 奥术自发法术 Arcane Spontaneous Spells

Rocket Dash.name: 火箭冲刺 Rocket Dash
Rocket Dash.description:
你从身后喷射出一道火焰火箭，向前猛冲。你沿直线移动，距离最多为你速度的两倍；你可以穿过被生物占据的空间，且此次移动不会触发反应。区域内的生物受到 6d12 火焰伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。若重度失败，该生物还会受到 2d6 持续性火焰伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 轮。你在这条直线的末端重新出现。

升阶（+2） 火焰伤害提高 2d12，而重度失败时的持续性火焰伤害提高 1d6。

You emit a rocket of flame from behind you and blast forward. You move in a straight line up to twice your Speed; you can move through spaces occupied by creatures, and the movement doesn't trigger reactions. Creatures in the area take 6d12 fire damage with a basic Reflex save. On a critical failure, a creature also takes 2d6 persistent fire damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round. You reappear at the end of the line.

Heightened (+2) The fire damage increases by 2d12, and the persistent fire damage on a critical failure increases by 1d6.

Slice Reality.name: 切裂现实 Slice Reality
Slice Reality.description:
你切开现实，形成一道汲取生命的熵之裂隙，呈一条高20英尺、长120英尺、厚2英寸的直线。该裂隙提供掩护。裂隙对每个在其被创造时处于裂隙空间内、试图穿过裂隙，或在其回合结束时位于裂隙内部的生物造成 7d8 虚空伤害，进行一次基础反射豁免。在裂隙被创造时于此次豁免成功的生物会被推到其所选一侧最近的空间。试图穿过裂隙的生物若在豁免中大失败，则无法穿过，并在裂隙旁结束其移动。

强化（+1） 伤害提高 1d8。

You slice through reality, forming a chasm of life-draining entropy in a straight line 20 feet high, 120 feet long, and 2 inches thick. The chasm provides cover. The chasm deals 7d8 void damage to each creature that's in the chasm's space when it's created, that attempts to pass through the chasm, or that ends its turn inside the chasm, with a basic Reflex save. A creature that succeeds at this save when the chasm is created is pushed to the nearest space on the side of its choice. Creatures trying to move through the chasm fail to do so if they critically fail the save, ending their movement next to the chasm.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

X-Ray Vision.name: X射线视觉 X-Ray Vision
X-Ray Vision.description:
你强化自身，使自己能够看穿60英尺内的大多数材料和墙壁。你的视线会被2英尺厚的木材或塑料、1英尺厚的石头、2英寸厚的普通金属、任意厚度的铅或任何星铁阻挡，而且你只能以黑白方式视物。

You empower yourself to see through most materials and walls within 60 feet. Your sight is blocked by 2 feet of wood or plastic, 1 foot of stone, 2 inches of common metal, or any amount of lead or any starmetal, and you can only see in black and white.

Control Machine.name: 操控机械 Control Machine
Control Machine.description:
你控制一个科技生物或物体，并以心灵感应向其下达命令。如果你对一个有智能的目标下达明显会自我毁灭的命令，目标不会行动，直到你下达新的命令为止。其效果取决于它的意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标在抗拒你的命令时陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 你控制目标。它获得受控状态，但它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试进行一次意志豁免。若成功，则该法术结束。

大失败 如失败，但只有当目标具有智能且你向其下达了违背其本性的新的命令时，它才会获得新的豁免，例如杀死其盟友。

强化（10环） 持续时间变为无限。

You take control of a technological creature or object and command it telepathically. If you issue an obviously self-destructive order to a sapient target, the target doesn't act until you issue a new order. The effect depends on its Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} as it fights off your commands.

Failure You control the target. It gains the controlled condition, but it can attempt a Will save at the end of each of its turns. On a success, the spell ends.

Critical Failure As a failure, but the target receives a new save only if it's sapient and you give it a new order that's against its nature, such as killing its allies.

Heightened (10th) The duration is unlimited.

Overload Systems.name: 系统过载 Overload Systems
Overload Systems.description:
你以一阵电气干扰的波浪淹没该区域。你对区域内的生物造成 7d8 点电击伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试进行一次反射豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全额伤害，且其任何具有科技特征的物品变为故障 1，持续 1 分钟或直到该状态被移除。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，且其任何具有科技特征的物品变为故障 2，持续 1 分钟或直到该状态被移除。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1d8。

You flood the area with a wave of electrical interference. You deal 7d8 electricity damage to creatures in the area. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 1 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 2 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Toxic Cloud.name: 毒云术 Toxic Cloud
Toxic Cloud.description:
你创造一团有毒云雾。该效果如同@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{迷雾术 Mist}一般，除了该区域会每轮远离你10尺。在该区域中开始回合的生物承受6d8毒素伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d8。

Confusion.name: 困惑术 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你使用奇怪的能量波动扰乱了目标的思维，令其随机行动。法术效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标胡言乱语，并且获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑 Confused}1分钟。在其每个回合结束，它能尝试一次新豁免来结束困惑术。

大失败 目标困惑1分钟，并且没有提前结束的豁免。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Translocate.name: 次元移位 Translocate
Translocate.description:
你立即将自身以及自己正在穿戴和持有的物品从当前空间转移走，移动至法术射程内你能看到的未被占据的空间。如果这将会带着其他生物与你一同移动——即便你把该生物放置在异次元容器中——你就会失去该法术。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至1英里。你不需要看到目的地，只要你曾经去过目的地，并且知晓该地点与你相对的位置以及距离即可。之后你会在1小时内临时免疫该法术。

Unfettered Movement.name: 行动无碍 Unfettered Movement
Unfettered Movement.description:
你驱散可能影响一个生物的阻碍。当处于该法术效果中时，法术目标忽视会赋予其速度环境减值的效果。当法术目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}一个令其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，它自动成功，除非该效果是魔法性的，并且其环级比行动无碍更高。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement}

Vapor Form.name: 汽化形体 Vapor Form
Vapor Form.description:
目标变化成气体形态。在此状态下，目标形态不定。它失去所有AC上的物品加值，以及从护甲得到的所有其他效果和加值，并且使用其熟练度调整值用于无武装防御。它对物理伤害获得抗力8，并且免疫精准伤害。它无法施放法术，启动物品，或者使用具有攻击或者操作特征的动作。它获得10尺飞行速度，并且可以钻过超小型的裂隙。目标可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.sILRkGTwoBywy0BU]{法术效果：汽化形体}

Blindness.name: 目盲术 Blindness
Blindness.description:
你令目标目盲。法术效果由目标的强韧豁免决定。目标会暂时免疫1分钟。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标直到其下个回合结束前 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded}。

失败 目标目盲1分钟。

大失败 目标永久目盲。

Fireball.name: 火球术 Fireball
Fireball.description:
在你指定的位置爆发出咆哮的烈焰，造成6d6火焰伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法强化了目标，令其行动迅速。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}状态，并且每轮可以使用该额外动作以打击或者行走。

升阶（7环级） 你能以至多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
Slow.description:
你令目标周围的时间膨胀，令其行动缓慢。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1} ，持续1轮。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 2}，持续1分钟。

升阶（6环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Mist.name: 迷雾术 Mist
Mist.description: 你唤来一团迷雾。在雾中的所有生物获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}，并且在雾外的所有生物对其内的生物获得隐蔽。你可以解消这团云雾。

See the Unseen.name: 识破无形 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的目光穿透了幻术，发现了隐形生物和魂灵。你能看到@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}生物，就如同它们并未隐形一般，然而它们的体征仍然很模糊，使得它们具有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}并且难以被识别。你还能看到虚体生物，比如幽灵，你能通过透视物体的内部来看到虚体生物，在物体表面下10尺内的此类生物会显现为经过分层的模糊轮廓。对细节更强的洞察力还让你在作出不相信幻术的检定时，获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环级） 持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：识破无形}

Sound Body.name: 身健体康 Sound Body
Sound Body.description:
你释放出一股治疗能量洪流，以恢复目标的身体。尝试反制一个你所选择的、使目标陷入以下状态之一的效应：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱}，或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心}。如果你未能反制该效应，但若其反制阶级低 2 级你本可以成功反制，则改为压制该效应，直到你的下一回合开始。该效应被压制期间，其持续时间不会流逝。

此法术不能反制或压制诅咒、疾病，或属于目标正常状态一部分的状态。

升阶（4环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{枯竭} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓} 加入状态列表。

升阶（8环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑} 加入状态列表。

You send a surge of healing energy to restore the target's body. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}. If you didn't counteract the effect, but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed.

This spell can't counteract or suppress curses, diseases, or conditions that are part of the target's normal state.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (8th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions.

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你专注于目标，在魔法全息影像显示信息的同时收集数据。施法完成后，你会获知目标的生物特征信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况以及其他基础生理信息。你或任何接受你分析建议的人，在对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充} 的检定、对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口} 的检定，以及对其进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 的检定时，获得+1状态加值。如果目标是虚幻的，或处于幻术魔法的效果之下，只有当该效果的环阶低于你的分析目标法术的环阶时，你才能察觉到这一点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{法术效果：分析目标}

升阶（3环） 状态加值提升至+2，且你的目标最多可以是10个生物。

升阶（6环） 状态加值提升至+3，且你可以以任意数量的生物为目标。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it.
