If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Caustic Blast.name: 酸液喷溅 Caustic Blast
Caustic Blast.description:
你发射一团立即爆发的酸液，泼溅到周围生物上。区域中的生物承受1d8酸蚀伤害，这有一次基础反射豁免；在大失败时，该生物也会承受@Damage[(1+floor((@item.rank -1)/2))[persistent,acid]]伤害。

升阶（+2） 该初始伤害增加1d8，并且持续伤害增加1。

Command.name: 命令术 Command
Command.description:
你喊出一句难以被忽视的命令。你可以命令目标接近你，逃离你（如同获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing}状态），扔下持有物，俯卧@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，或者站立在原地。它不能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.A72nHGUtNXgY5Ey9]{延后 Delay}或者使用任何反应动作，直到它服从你的命令为止。法术效果基于目标的意志豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 作为该生物下个回合的第一个动作，其必须用一个单动作来完成你的命令。

大失败 目标必须使用其下个回合的全部动作来完成你的命令。

升阶（5环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Grease.name: 油腻术 Grease
Grease.description:
你创造一片油，选择区域或是目标。

  • 区域 [4个连续的5尺方格] 区域中的所有坚实地面覆盖上一层油。在油滑的表面上站立的生物必须尝试成功通过一次对抗你法术DC的反射或者特技检定，否则@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。在法术持续时间内，使用动作移动到油滑表面上的生物必须尝试一次反射豁免或者特技检定来@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance}。快步或者爬行的生物无需尝试检定或者豁免。
  • 目标 [一个1负载或者更低的物体] 如果你对无主物品施放该法术，任何尝试捡起该物体的人必须成功尝试一次对抗你法术DC的特技检定或者反射豁免才能如此做。如果你以被持有的物品为目标，拥有该物品的生物必须尝试一次特技检定或者反射豁免。失败时，持握者或者持用者在使用该物体的所有检定上承受-2环境减值；在大失败时，持握者或者持用者会掉落该物品。该物品会掉落在一个由GM选择的相邻方格内。如果你对一个穿戴物品施放该法术，穿戴者在对抗擒拿他的强韧豁免上获得+2环境加值。

Ignition.name: 引火术 Ignition
Ignition.description:
你打个响指并指向一个目标，后者便开始燃烧。作出一次法术攻击检定对抗目标的AC，命中时造成2d4点火焰伤害。若目标位于你的近战触及范围内，你能选择用火焰进行一次近战法术攻击以取代远程法术攻击，这会使得法术的所有伤害骰提升至d6骰子。

大成功 目标承受双倍伤害以及1d4点持续火焰伤害。

成功 目标承受全额伤害。

升阶（+1） 起始伤害增加1d4点，重击的持续火焰伤害增加1d4点。

@Damage[(@item.rank)d4[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害}

@Damage[(@item.rank)d6[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害（近战）}

Measure.name: 测量 Measure
Measure.description:
你会得知你在区域内能够观察到的生物与物体的大致尺寸（长度、宽度、深度、高度和重量）。如果某个物体或生物延伸出了该区域，你只能得知其位于区域内部分的尺寸，而无法得知你无法观察到的部分的任何信息。例如，你无法确定一堵你只能看到单侧的墙的厚度或重量，也无法确定延伸到法术范围之外的水体的深度。每次你维持该法术时，你都会得知区域内一个生物或物体的精确尺寸，包括可能表明结构脆弱性的细微不精确之处或异常。经过魔法改变的目标会给予你反映你所观察到内容的信息，而非准确测量值。

升阶（+1） 将测量的范围延长100英尺。

You learn the approximate measurements (length, width, depth, height, and weight) of creatures and objects you can observe in the area. If an object or creature extends out of the area, you learn only the measurements within the area, but nothing about what you can't observe. For example, you can't determine the thickness or weight of a wall you can observe only one side of, or the depth of water that extends beyond the spell's range. Each time you Sustain the spell, you learn the exact measurements of one creature or object in the area, including imprecisions or anomalies that might indicate structural weakness. Magically altered targets give you information that reflects what you observe rather than accurate measurements.

Heightened (+1) Extend the range of measure by 100 feet.

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法帮你完成杂物。只要你维持该法术，你就可以产生简单的魔法效果。每当你维持该法术时，你可以选择四个选项中的一个。

  • 烹饪 为1磅非活物材料冷却，加热，或者调味。
  • 抬起 将一件轻负载或者更低的无主物品缓慢抬离地面。
  • 创造 创造一个负载可忽略的临时物体，它由凝结的魔法物质组成。该物体看起来粗糙且非常脆弱——它无法被用做工具，武器，法器或法术开销。
  • 整理 为一件轻负载或者更低的物体染色，清洁，或者弄脏它。你可以通过10轮专注来影响一件1负载的物体，对于更大的物体为每负载1分钟。

魔法伎俩无法造成伤害或者负面效果。对一件物体的任何改变（在上述内容之外的）只会在你仍维持该法术时持续。

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，拓展神智，以感受魔法灵光。当你完成施法后，你得知该物品是否具有魔法。你或者你共有了灵光情报的人在对该物品@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic}时获得+2环境加值。如果该物体是幻象，仅当该效果的环级低于你的阅读灵光环级时你才能发现此事实。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.J6OhRNSN23KzOPRL]{Spell Effect: Read Aura}

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多10个物体为目标。

升阶（8环级） 你能以任意数量物体为目标。

Sleep.name: 睡眠术 Sleep
Sleep.description:
区域中的每个生物垂头歪脑昏昏欲睡。由于该法术@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}的生物不会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，也不会松开其持握的东西。该法术不会令生物无法通过察觉醒来，并因此限制其在战斗中的能力。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在察觉检定上承受-1状态减值，持续1轮。

失败 该生物失去意识。如果它在1分钟后仍然失去意识，它自动醒来。

大失败 该生物失去意识。如果它在1小时候仍然失去意识，它自动醒来。

升阶（4环级） 目标在失败时失去意识1轮，在大失败时失去意识1分钟。它们会倒地，并松开其持握的东西，并且它们无法尝试察觉检定以醒来。当持续时间结束时，该生物会正常睡着，而不是自动醒来。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Radioactive Aura.name: 放射性灵光 Radioactive Aura
Radioactive Aura.description:
90英尺。进入辐射灵光的生物必须尝试进行一次对抗极端辐射病的 @Check[fortitude|dc:30] 豁免。随后，它会暂时免疫辐射灵光，持续10分钟。

90 feet. A creature that enters the radioactive aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:30] save against extreme radiation sickness. It's then temporarily immune to radioactive aura for 10 minutes.

Abysium Maelstrom.name: 阿比希姆漩涡 Abysium Maelstrom
Abysium Maelstrom.description:
如果巨龙接下来使用的动作是“辐射吐息”，则辐射会被奥术能量超充。每个对“辐射吐息”的豁免失败的生物都会受到 @Damage[3d6[persistent,force]] 伤害，因为超充的辐射会从其体内将其撕裂。每个豁免大失败的生物还会在其承受这种持续力场伤害期间处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}。

If the next action the dragon uses is Radiation Breath, the radiation becomes supercharged with arcane power. Each creature that fails its save against Radiation Breath takes @Damage[3d6[persistent,force]] damage as the supercharged radiation tears it apart from within. Each creature that critically fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} as long as it has this persistent force damage.

Control Radiation.name: 操控辐射 Control Radiation
Control Radiation.description:
深渊铋龙对其体内不断增长的放射性能量拥有终极掌控。每当深渊铋龙造成火焰或毒素伤害时，它们都可以选择该伤害是否为魔法伤害，并且可以将任意数量的火焰伤害转变为毒素伤害（或将任意数量的毒素伤害转变为火焰伤害）。

Abysium dragons have ultimate control over the radioactive energy that grows within their bodies. Any time an abysium dragon deals fire or poison damage, they can choose whether that damage is magical, and they can change any amount of the fire damage to poison (or any amount of poison damage to fire).

Radiation Breath.name: 辐射吐息 Radiation Breath
Radiation Breath.description:
巨龙喷吐一阵腐蚀性的过热气体，在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:40] 内造成 @Damage[7d6[fire],4d12[persistent,poison]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:33|basic] 豁免）。它们在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Radiation Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用辐射吐息。

The dragon breathes a blast of caustic superheated gas that deals @Damage[7d6[fire],4d12[persistent,poison]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] (@Check[fortitude|dc:33|basic] save). They can't use Radiation Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Radiation Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Abysium Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).publicNotes:
渊钢龙同时将辐射视为毁灭之力与能量来源，并与同名的放射性星铁——渊钢——紧密相连。这些巨龙的体内会生长出纯净渊钢的沉积物，随着年龄增长，它们的放射性也会愈发增强，进而引发攻击性、躁动，甚至孤独感，因为很少有生物能在一头年迈的渊钢龙身边长期存活。渊钢龙经常投身于义体改造、武器制造（以利用它们天生的能量源）以及机器人建造（让它们陪伴自己）等 pursuits。这些工作驱使渊钢龙去寻找坚固且抗辐射的材料用于制造，而它们常常一连花费数年时间，搜寻小型卫星和小行星，以寻找珍贵材料。

Drawing on radiation as both a force of destruction and a source of energy, abysium dragons are tied to the radioactive starmetal of the same name. These dragons grow deposits of pure abysium in their bodies, becoming more radioactive as they age, causing aggression, agitation, and even loneliness since not many creatures can long survive the company of an aging abysium dragon. Abysium dragons frequently turn to pursuits such as augmentation and weapon crafting (to take advantage of their innate power source) and the construction of robots (to keep them company). This work drives abysium dragons to seek out sturdy, radiation-resistant materials they can use for crafting, and they often spend years at a time scouring small moons and asteroids in search of precious materials.
Abysium Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).allSaves: +1 status bonus to all saves vs. magic

Karkono.name: 卡尔科诺 Karkono

All-Around Vision (while in their ecosys.name: 全方位视觉（当其处于自身生态系统中时） All-Around Vision (while in their ecosystem)

Nature's Protector.name: 自然的守护者 Nature's Protector
Nature's Protector.description:
卡尔科诺与某一特定生态系统有着内在联系，例如某颗行星上的沿海沼泽或北方针叶林。卡尔科诺在其生态系统中时无视困难地形，并在先攻检定上获得 +1 状态加值。当卡尔科诺的生态系统遭受污染或受到严重破坏时（例如，由于森林火灾或化学品泄漏），卡尔科诺陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}，且无法将其恶心状态降至 1 以下。他们的伤害掷骰还会获得 +4 状态加值。

A karkono is intrinsically tied to a specific ecosystem, such as a coastal marsh or boreal forest on a planet. A karkono ignores difficult terrain and gains a +1 status bonus to initiative rolls while in their ecosystem. When a karkono's ecosystem is polluted or significantly damaged (for example, due to a forest fire or chemical spill), the karkono is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} and can't reduce their sickened condition below 1. They also gain a +4 status bonus to damage rolls.

Back To Nature.name: 回归自然 Back To Nature
Back To Nature.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 卡科诺对一个具有科技特征的生物进行一次爪击 Strike，使植物物质从其体内爆裂而出。若命中，该生物必须进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:24] 豁免；若重击，则该生物采用比其掷骰结果低一级成功度的结果。

失败 该生物陷入故障 1。

大失败 该生物陷入故障 2。

Frequency once per round

Effect The karkono makes a claw Strike against a creature with the tech trait, causing plant matter to explode from it. On a hit, the creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:24] save; on a critical hit, the creature uses the outcome one degree of success worse than the result of its roll.

Failure The creature becomes glitching 1.

Critical Failure The creature becomes glitching 2.

Blood Renewal.name: 血液再生 Blood Renewal
Blood Renewal.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 卡尔科诺施行一场仪式，以新鲜血液涂抹这片土地。植物生长自地面喷涌而出，形成一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]，视为困难地形。卡尔科诺以及区域内任何盟友生物在区域内时获得再生 15（冷铁）。这些效果持续 10 分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.qj97oOs2Z2qk9w00]{效果：血之复苏}

Frequency once per day

Effect The karkono performs a ritual to anoint the land in fresh blood. Plant growth springs from the ground in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20], counting as difficult terrain. The karkono and any allied creatures within the area gain regeneration 15 (cold iron) while in the area. These effects last for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.qj97oOs2Z2qk9w00]{Effect: Blood Renewal}

Karkono.publicNotes:
这些野性的守护者保护着它们游荡的土地，并成长为其原生生态系统中所有掠食者的嵌合体。卡耳科诺斯与其所依附的土地一同繁盛，也一同消亡。它们会本能地感知到污染或快速工业化等人造力量何时危及家园。土地受到的任何伤害，都会映照在栖居于此的卡耳科诺斯身上。大规模的毁林会表现为卡耳科诺斯皮毛上溃烂的伤口，而污染则会显现为疾病。

当它们的生态系统因外部原因而受到威胁时，这些精类不会悄然死去，而是会展开毁灭性的狂暴肆虐。来到荒野的访客也许从未见过心满意足的卡耳科诺斯，但一头暴怒的卡耳科诺斯会攻击任何对其家园而言陌生的事物——包括机械、其他生命形态，以及人造基础设施。愤怒的卡耳科诺斯要么将威胁从家园中肃清，要么就此灭亡，但在此之前，它们一定会对敌人造成巨大的破坏。

如果卡耳科诺斯流下了足够多的鲜血，它们便能逐渐修复自己病弱的生态系统。被卡耳科诺斯杀死者会化作动物与植物的肥料——若非如此，它们本会在工业扩张那冷酷无情的齿轮下被碾碎。

These feral guardians protect the lands they roam, growing into a chimera of all the predators living in their native ecosystems. Karkonos thrive and perish with their bonded lands. They instinctively sense when synthetic forces like pollution or rapid industrialization imperil their homes. Any injury to the land is mirrored by the karkonos who dwell there. Aggressive deforestation appears as festering wounds on a karkono's hide, while pollution manifests as sickness.

Rather than die quietly, when their ecosystem is endangered by outside causes, these fey go on destructive rampages. Visitors to the wilderness might never spot a content karkono, but a raging karkono assaults anything alien to their home—including machinery, other life-forms, and synthetic infrastructure. Enraged karkonos purge their home of threats or perish, but not before dealing tremendous damage to their enemies.

If karkonos spill enough blood, they can gradually repair their ailing ecosystems. Those killed by karkonos become fertilizer for the animals and plants they would've crushed beneath the uncaring gears of industrial expansion.

Omnipath.name: 全能者 Omnipath

Occult Innate Spells.name: 天生异术法术 Occult Innate Spells

Telekinetic Tantrum.name: 念动力发作 Telekinetic Tantrum
Telekinetic Tantrum.description:
你释放出一阵强大的念动力能量弹幕，压制生物、抛掷物体并造成伤害。当你施放这个法术时，以及此后每轮你第一次维持该法术时，你可以选择以下效果之一。你不能连续两次选择相同的效果。

  • 退后！ 你可以将至多15个物体或生物向任意方向抛掷至多40尺（包括向上或向下）。对于每个生物或物体，你最多可以抛掷总重量为40体积的目标。生物根据其移动的距离受到钝击伤害，并以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地} 状态落地，如同其承受了坠落伤害一般。对该法术的强韧豁免成功的生物不会被移动。
  • 暴雨 你用区域内的碎片和物体猛击区域内所有生物，造成5d10点钝击伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。
  • 念动力猛击 你的念动力风暴猛然撞击区域内所有生物。进行一次远程法术攻击掷骰。所有你命中的目标受到7d6点力场伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

You launch a barrage of powerful psychokinetic energy that overpowers creatures, hurls objects, and deals damage. When you Cast this Spell and the first time each round you Sustain the spell, you can choose one of the following effects. You can't choose the same effect twice in a row.

  • Back Off! You hurl up to 15 objects or creatures up to 40 feet in any direction (including up or down). You can hurl up to a total weight of 40 Bulk per creature or object. Creatures take bludgeoning damage based on the distance they moved and land @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, as though they'd taken falling damage. Creatures that succeed on a Fortitude save against the spell avoid being moved.
  • Hard Rain You pummel all creatures in the area with debris and objects in the area, dealing 5d10 bludgeoning damage with a basic Reflex save.
  • Psychokinetic Slam Your psychokinetic storm slams into all creatures in the area. Make a ranged spell attack roll. All targets you hit take 7d6 force damage and are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Akashic Revival.name: 阿卡西复苏 Akashic Revival
Akashic Revival.description:
你将目标肉体的完整记录发送至阿卡西记录，使其之后能够调取这份记录，并将自己的身体重构为你施放此法术时的状态。该记录包含目标当前的生命值、植入改造、属性调整值，以及其当时所承受的任何灾祸或状态。

如果目标并非死于寿终正寝，它可以从阿卡西记录中调取自己被记录的身体。该过程需要1分钟，之后其尸体消失，而目标会瞬间以记录中的身体在尸体所处空间中重新出现，并带着任何穿戴中的装备。它会以站立姿态重组，并且可以选择拾起它死亡时掉落在该空间中的任何装备，前提是那些装备仍在那里。如果它无法占据该空间，则会尽可能出现在靠近该空间的位置，不过它仍必须自行取回其装备。它保留身体死亡时的心智状态，因此不会恢复任何已消耗的法术、专注点数或特殊能力的使用次数。任何在其死亡时正影响目标的精神效应，都会持续存在于其新身体上。

从阿卡西记录中取回身体，或法术持续时间到期，都会将储存的信息从阿卡西记录中移除，因此你必须再次施放此法术。

施放此法术会取代你先前通过之前施法所储存的任何记录——你只能通过此法术在阿卡西记录中储存任意生物的一份副本。

You dispatch perfect documentation of the target's physical body to the Akashic Record, allowing it to later recall this record and reconstruct its body as it was when you cast this spell. The record includes the target's current Hit Points, augmentations, attribute modifiers, and any afflictions or conditions it had.

If the target dies of anything other than old age, it can recall its recorded body from the Akashic Record. This process takes 1 minute, after which time its corpse disappears, and the target instantly reappears in the recorded body in the corpse's space and with any worn equipment. It re-forms standing and can choose to pick up any equipment it dropped in the space from when it died, assuming the equipment is still there. If it can't occupy that space, it appears as close to the space as possible, though it must still retrieve its equipment. It retains its mind as it was at the time of the body's death, so it regains no expended spells, Focus Points, or uses of special abilities. Any mental effects affecting the target at the time of its death persist in its new body.

Retrieving the body from the Akashic Record or having the duration expire removes the stored information from the Akashic Record, requiring you to cast this spell again.

Casting the spell replaces any previous record you've stored with prior castings—you can store only one copy of any creature in the Akashic Record using this spell.

Disappearance.name: 无影无踪 Disappearance
Disappearance.description:
你将一个生物从他人的感知中遮蔽起来。目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未被察觉}，不仅仅是对视觉而言，而是对所有感官皆如此，因此无论观察者拥有何种精确或非精确感官，目标都可视为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。生物仍然有可能通过“寻找”、观察被扰动的尘埃、听见声音频谱中的缺口，或通过其他方式来发现一个原本无法被察觉的生物的存在。

You shroud a creature from others' senses. The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}, not just to sight but to all senses, allowing the target to count as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} no matter what precise and imprecise senses an observer might have. It's still possible for a creature to find the target by Seeking, looking for disturbed dust, hearing gaps in the sound spectrum, or finding some other way to discover the presence of an otherwise-undetectable creature.

Phantasmal Fleet.name: 幻象舰队 Phantasmal Fleet
Phantasmal Fleet.description:
一支充满威胁的敌对星舰舰队的幻象充斥区域内每个生物的心智。这些舰船看起来位于头顶 1,000 英尺处，用激光火力轰击地面。该幻象造成 10d8 点精神伤害，目标进行一次基础意志豁免。若重度失败，目标还会相信自己正在被追击，并移动去寻找掩护。它在自己的每个回合中都必须花费 1 个动作来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{寻找掩护}，这可能要求它先移动到一个新的空间，或卧倒。它可以在自己每个回合结束时再次尝试一次意志豁免；若成功，它便识破该幻象，不再被迫寻找掩护。

A menacing vision of a fleet of hostile starships fills the mind of each creature in the area. The ships appear to be 1,000 feet overhead bombarding the ground with laser fire. The vision deals 10d8 mental damage with a basic Will save. On a critical failure, the target also believes it's being pursued and moves to take cover. It must spend an action to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} on each of its turns, which may require it to first move to a new space or Drop Prone. It can attempt a new Will save at the end of each of its turns, and on a success, it disbelieves the phantasm and stops being forced to Take Cover.

Interplanar Teleport.name: 跨界传送 Interplanar Teleport
Interplanar Teleport.description:
需求 你具有目标位面的位面密钥用于给法术定位

你和你的盟友跨越位面之间的屏障进行旅行。目标移动至其他位面，比如火元素位面、幽界、或者外层裂隙。你必须知晓目标位面的存在，而且需要使用由该位面的物质制作的魔法位面密钥来给法术定位。就如同跨界传送这个法术本身一样，大多数著名位面的位面密钥具有罕见稀有度，而鲜为人知的位面及半位面通常具有稀有、甚至有可能时独特稀有度的位面密钥。

该法术极其不精准，你会出现在目标之一（由你选择）上一次造访该位面时的位置周边，误差为1d20 x 25英里。若所有目标都是初次造访某个特定位面，你们就会出现在该位面的随机位置。跨界传送不会提供返回的手段，不过除非发生了什么另外情况，否则再次施放跨界传送能让你返回自身之前身处的位面。

Warp Mind.name: 心灵扭曲 Warp Mind
Warp Mind.description:
你操控一个生物的精神弱点和感官输入。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。无论豁免结果如何，该目标之后会暂时免疫10分钟。心灵扭曲的效果是立即的，所以@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}或者其他反制法术的效果无法反制其效果。但是，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu]{祈愿术 Wish}仪式仍能反制这些效果。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标按照 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑 Confused} 状态使用其下个回合的第一个动作。

失败 目标获得困惑1分钟。

大失败 目标永久困惑。

Dominate.name: 支配术 Dominate
Dominate.description:
你操控目标，强行令其服从你的命令。如果你赋予一项明显是自灭的命令，目标不会行动，直到你下达新的命令。该效果基于其意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}以抵抗你的命令。

失败 你控制了目标，其获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}状态，但在每轮结束时可以尝试一次意志豁免。成功时，法术结束。

大失败 如同失败，但是仅当你施加违抗其天性的命令，例如杀害其盟友时，才会获得新的豁免。

升阶（10环级） 该持续时间为无限。

Telekinetic Strangulation.name: 念动力绞杀 Telekinetic Strangulation
Telekinetic Strangulation.description:
你以心灵遥控般的虎钳式紧握扼住一个生物的喉咙或类似的重要解剖部位，强行将其抬离地面几英寸，使其在挣扎中难以呼吸。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若命中，你造成 6d12 点钝击伤害，且目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}。当目标以这种方式被定身时，它必须屏住呼吸，否则便会开始窒息。每轮中你第一次维持该法术时，目标受到 1d12 点钝击伤害，继续处于定身状态，并且必须继续屏住呼吸。目标可以尝试 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱}（挣脱 DC 等于你的法术 DC，且此次尝试受失能特征影响）。

You telekinetically grasp a creature's throat or similar vital anatomy with a vicelike grip, forcefully lifting it a few inches off the ground as it struggles to breathe. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, you deal 6d12 bludgeoning damage, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}. While immobilized in this way, it must hold its breath or begin suffocating. The first time each round you Sustain the spell, the target takes 1d12 bludgeoning damage, remains immobilized, and must continue holding its breath. The target can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} (the Escape DC is your spell DC, and the attempt is affected by the incapacitation trait).

X-Ray Vision.name: X射线视觉 X-Ray Vision
X-Ray Vision.description:
你赋予自己看穿60尺内大多数材料与墙壁的能力。你的视线会被2尺厚的木材或塑料、1尺厚的石材、2英寸厚的普通金属，或任意厚度的铅或任何星铁阻挡，且你只能看见黑白影像。

You empower yourself to see through most materials and walls within 60 feet. Your sight is blocked by 2 feet of wood or plastic, 1 foot of stone, 2 inches of common metal, or any amount of lead or any starmetal, and you can only see in black and white.

Control Machine.name: 控制机械 Control Machine
Control Machine.description:
你控制一个科技生物或物体，并通过心灵感应向其下达命令。如果你向一个有智能的目标下达明显会自我毁灭的命令，则该目标不会行动，直到你下达新的命令为止。该效果取决于其意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}状态，因为它正在抗拒你的命令。

失败 你控制该目标。它获得受控状态，但它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次意志豁免。若成功，则该法术结束。

大失败 如失败，但只有当目标具有智能且你向其下达了违背其天性的新的命令时，例如杀死其盟友，它才会获得一次新的豁免。

强化（10环） 持续时间变为无限。

You take control of a technological creature or object and command it telepathically. If you issue an obviously self-destructive order to a sapient target, the target doesn't act until you issue a new order. The effect depends on its Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} as it fights off your commands.

Failure You control the target. It gains the controlled condition, but it can attempt a Will save at the end of each of its turns. On a success, the spell ends.

Critical Failure As a failure, but the target receives a new save only if it's sapient and you give it a new order that's against its nature, such as killing its allies.

Heightened (10th) The duration is unlimited.

Overload Systems.name: 过载系统 Overload Systems
Overload Systems.description:
你以一波电磁干扰淹没该区域。你对区域内的生物造成 7d8 点电击伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全部伤害，且其任何带有科技特征的物品会陷入故障 1，持续 1 分钟或直到该状态被移除。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，且其任何带有科技特征的物品会陷入故障 2，持续 1 分钟或直到该状态被移除。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1d8。

You flood the area with a wave of electrical interference. You deal 7d8 electricity damage to creatures in the area. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 1 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 2 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Eldritch Wrath.name: 异界之怒 Eldritch Wrath
Eldritch Wrath.description:
你引导存在于物质宇宙最外边缘之外的怪异力量，幻影般的利爪、巨颚和触手猛然抽击区域内的每个目标，对区域内每个生物造成3d12点精神伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试一次意志豁免。对于任何因该法术效果而@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心}的生物而言，该区域都是困难地形。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并且陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并且陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d12。

You channel the bizarre powers that exist beyond the outer reaches of the universe, dealing 3d12 mental damage to each creature in the area as phantasmal claws, jaws, and tentacles lash out at each target. Each creature in the area must attempt a Will save. The area is difficult terrain for any creature sickened by the effects of this spell.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Weight of Ages.name: 岁月之重 Weight of Ages
Weight of Ages.description:
你以一生的痛苦与悲伤加重一个生物的身心负担。目标受到 3d8 钝击伤害和 3d8 精神伤害，且必须进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全部伤害，且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{负重} 1 轮。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，且负重 1 分钟。

升阶（+1） 精神伤害增加 2d8。

You burden a creature's body and mind with the pains and sorrows of a lifetime. The target takes 3d8 bludgeoning damage and 3d8 mental damage and must attempt a Will saving throw.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{Encumbered} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is encumbered for 1 minute.

Heightened (+1) The mental damage increases by 2d8.

Void Whispers.name: 虚空低语 Void Whispers
Void Whispers.description:
目标听到来自群星彼岸、蕴含不可名状奥秘的不祥声响，使其心神错乱。目标必须进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 目标听见这些诡异低语，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续 1 轮。

失败 目标开始漫无目的地游荡，将每个动作都用于朝随机方向谨慎步行。移动时，目标会采取最安全的路线，且不会进入危险地形。该法术持续 1 分钟，或直到有生物对目标使用敌对动作。

大失败 如失败，但目标会语无伦次地胡言乱语。任何在其回合开始时位于目标 20 尺内的生物，都必须进行一次意志豁免。若其失败，则必须在其下一回合将第一个动作用于朝随机方向谨慎步行，并在 24 小时内对此法术免疫。这是一个无力化效果。

The target hears ominous sounds containing unspeakable mysteries from beyond the stars that disorient its mind. The target attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target hears the strange whispers, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target begins to wander aimlessly, using each action to Step in a random direction. When it moves, the target takes the safest route and doesn't enter hazardous terrain. The spell has a duration of 1 minute or until a creature uses a hostile action against the target.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target babbles incoherently. Any creature that begins its turn within 20 feet of the target must attempt a Will saving throw. On a failure, it must use its first action on its next turn to Step in a random direction and becomes immune to this spell for 24 hours. This is an incapacitation effect.

Logic Bomb.name: 逻辑炸弹 Logic Bomb
Logic Bomb.description:
你向目标植入一个含有海量信息、足以冲垮心智的隐患。该隐患的隐匿和停用 DC 等于你的法术 DC，并且需要一次成功的 @Check[computers] 检定才能停用。第一次有生物尝试访问、摧毁或以其他方式操纵目标但未成功时（例如使用计算机技能、以一次打击未命中，或其他情况），逻辑炸弹就会引爆，该生物受到 6d6 点精神伤害，并进行一次基础意志豁免。该法术会在被触发时或持续时间结束时终止，以先发生者为准。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 2d6。

You implant a hazard containing a mind-blowing amount of information into the target. The hazard has a Stealth and Disable DC equal to your spell DC and requires one successful @Check[computers] check to disable. The first time a creature unsuccessfully attempts to access, destroy, or otherwise manipulate the target (such as using the Computers skill, failing to hit with a Strike, or otherwise), logic bomb detonates, and the creature takes 6d6 mental damage with a basic Will save. The spell ends when it's triggered or the duration ends, whichever comes first.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Skim Data (at will).name: 浏览数据（随意） Skim Data (at will)
Skim Data (at will).description:
你触碰一个物体，并专注于其中包含的一组数据，例如故事、信息、文件、信息圈站点、录音或视频。你会理解这组数据的大意，并且可以迅速定位到与你搜索最相关的页面或章节。如果这组数据是以你不懂的语言书写或以其他方式传达的，或者你试图从一台你无权访问的计算机中获取信息（例如一台设有你不知道密码的计算机），则该法术失败。

如果你将此法术作为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{研究} 活动的一部分来施放，则你将重度失败视为失败。

You touch one object and concentrate on a dataset contained within it, such as a story, message, file, infosphere site, audio recording, or video. You understand the gist of the dataset and can quickly locate the most relevant pages or sections to your search. If the dataset is written or otherwise communicated in a language you don't know, or you attempt to gain information from a computer you don't have access to (such as one with a password you don't know), the spell fails.

If you Cast this Spell as part of a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{Research} activity, you treat a critical failure as a failure instead.

Akashic Download.name: 阿卡夏下载 Akashic Download
Akashic Download.description:
你对阿卡西记录进行一次灵能搜索，以获取关于某个特定主题的信息，并将这些数据以魔法方式传输到你的通讯器或电脑中。当你施放此法术时，选择一个你已受训且具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 动作的任意技能。

在持续时间内的任意时刻，当你尝试使用所选技能进行一次回忆知识检定时，你都可以查阅你的通讯器。此次检定获得+1状态加值。查阅你的通讯器是回忆知识动作的一部分。你必须手持该通讯器才能这样做。通讯器会立即整理并显示与该主题相关的各类媒体中的片段与摘录，从而给予你该加值。若你在此次检定中掷出大失败，则改为失败。若该检定成功且对象是一个生物，你会获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。你一旦查阅该通讯器，此法术便会结束。当法术结束时，你对阿卡西记录的访问也随之终止，而你下载的所有信息都会返回阿卡西记录。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{法术效果：阿卡西下载}

升环（3环） 你可以在法术结束前查阅你的通讯器三次。

You execute a psychic search of the Akashic Record for information about a specific topic and magically transfer this data to your comm unit or computer. When you Cast this Spell, choose any skill in which you're trained that has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action.

Any time during the duration, you can consult your comm unit while attempting a Recall Knowledge check using your chosen skill. This check gains a +1 status bonus. Checking your comm unit is part of the action to Recall Knowledge. You must be holding the comm unit to do so. The comm unit instantly compiles and displays snippets and selections from various media relevant to the topic, which grants you the bonus. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the check is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature. Once you reference the comm unit, the spell ends. When the spell ends, your access to the Akashic Record ends, and all the information you downloaded returns to the Akashic Record.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{Spell Effect: Akashic Download}

Heightened (3rd) You can reference your comm unit three times before the spell ends.

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你将注意力集中在目标上，在魔法全息影像显示信息的同时收集数据。当施法完成时，你会获知目标的生物特征信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况以及其他基本生理信息。你，或任何你告知了该分析结果的人，在对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充}、对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}，以及对其进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}的检定时，获得+1状态加值。如果目标是虚幻之物，或处于幻术魔法的影响之下，只有当该效果的环阶低于你的分析目标法术的环阶时，你才会察觉到这一点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{法术效果：分析目标}

升阶（3环） 状态加值提升为+2，且你的目标最多可以是10个生物。

升阶（6环） 状态加值提升为+3，且你的目标可以是任意数量的生物。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Delete.name: 删除 Delete
Delete.description:
你以一个花哨的魔法手势删除设备或物体中的数据。该数据可以是手写、印刷或数字形式。你最多可以删除相当于1,500个词的文本、一页内容，或整整一块显示屏的文本或其他视觉信息。无人看管的物体中或其上的非魔法书写，或被持握物体上的非魔法书写，会自动被删除。尝试进行一次反制检定，以删除数字或魔法书写。如果你未能删除作为一个危害一部分的书写，你会触发该危害。这不能用来删除法术书或类似用于储存魔法公式或法术的媒介中的内容。

如果你的目标是一个带有追踪（特征）的有人持用科技物品，尝试进行一次反制检定。成功时，该物品变为故障 1。持有该物品的生物可以进行交互，以重新启动软件，使故障值降低1。

强化（7环） 你可以删除单个设备或书籍中本地储存的全部数据，或删除某个设备或书籍上与特定名称、主题或类别相关的全部数据。

You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Implant Data.name: 植入体数据 Implant Data
Implant Data.description:
你对一台计算机或设备重新编程，使其在被访问时显示一段指定的数据。每个法术环阶你最多可以植入一段数据。一段数据可以是一个简单事实，例如某个生物或物体的位置或物理描述；某个生物或物体的图像；或一条不超过300个字符的简单陈述。当目标计算机或设备被访问时，这段植入的数据会成为访问该设备的生物首先获得的数据，无论该生物正在寻找什么数据。植入的数据不会阻止生物访问存储在设备中的其他信息，不会改变设备的运作方式，也不会以其他方式妨碍设备运作。如果在某个生物访问植入数据之前此法术的持续时间结束，该信息就会消失。

升阶（3环） 持续时间为1年。

升阶（6环） 持续时间无限。

You reprogram a computer or device to display a chosen piece of data when accessed. You can implant up to one piece of data per spell rank. A piece of data can be a simple fact, such as a creature or object's location or physical description; an image of a creature or object; or a simple statement of no more than 300 characters. When the target computer or device is accessed, this implanted data is the first data the accessing creature gains, regardless of what data the creature is looking for. Implanted data doesn't prevent a creature from accessing other information stored on a device, change how the device functions, or otherwise inhibit the device from functioning. If this spell's duration ends before a creature accesses the implanted data, the information vanishes.

Heightened (3rd) The duration is one year.

Heightened (6th) The duration is unlimited.

Mind Skewer.name: 心灵穿刺 Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
你以过量的灵能信息或神圣裁决使一个生物的心智超载。这次精神猛袭造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若目标严重失败，它还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，持续 1 轮。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高 2d6。

You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Nanite Mesh.name: 纳米体网格 Nanite Mesh
Nanite Mesh.description:
一名全能者与至多20个其他自愿生物维持联结。处于该心灵网络中的生物总是知晓其他已联结生物的大致距离和方向、影响它们的任何状态，以及它们是否处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}、濒死或死亡。只要位于同一位面，这些生物便能进行心灵感应交流，并且可以使用该网络中任一生物最高的相关技能调整值来进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}。只要全能者能与其进行心灵感应交流，就能从任意距离以精神法术将其心灵网络中的任一生物作为目标；而这些法术中，任何具有失能特征的法术在以全能者心灵网络中的生物为目标时，都会失去该特征。

An omnipath maintains a bond with up to 20 other willing creatures. Creatures in the mesh always know the general distance and direction toward other bonded creatures, any conditions affecting them, and if they're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, dying, or dead. These creatures can communicate telepathically while on the same plane and can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} using the highest relevant skill modifier of any creature in the mesh. An omnipath can target any creature in its mesh with a mental spell from any distance as long as they can telepathically communicate with it, and any of these spells with the incapacitation trait lose that trait while targeting a creature in the omnipath's mesh.

Nanite Projection.name: 纳米体投射 Nanite Projection
Nanite Projection.description:
全能者可以与受其纳米网影响的生物共享感官，并读取其表层思想。虚空贤者一次只能将其心灵投射到一个生物身上，并且可以用一个带有专注特征的单一动作，选择哪个受影响的生物作为其纳米投射的焦点。只要该生物是虚空贤者纳米投射的焦点，它对虚空贤者任何法术的意志豁免检定还会承受 –1 情境减值。

A omnipath can share the senses and read the surface thoughts of creatures affected by their nanite mesh. A voidsage can project its mind into just one creature at a time, and choose which affected creature is the focus of its nanite projection as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. The creature also takes a –1 circumstance penalty to Will saves against any of the voidsage's spells as long as it's the focus of the voidsage's nanite projection.

Nanite Network.name: 纳米机器人网络 Nanite Network
Nanite Network.description:
全能者散发出一团纳米机器人云。处于该灵光中的生物对抗全能者的法术及其“心智合并”能力的豁免检定承受 –3 状态减值。

An omnipath exudes a cloud of nanites. Creatures in the aura take a –3 status penalty to saving throws against the omnipath's spells and its Merge Minds ability.

Revert.name: 还原 Revert
Revert.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发条件 全能者在投映期间受到伤害

效果 全能者停止投映，并获得100点持续10分钟的临时生命值。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger The omnipath takes damage while projecting

Effect The omnipath stops projecting and gains 100 temporary Hit Points that last for 10 minutes.

Merge Minds.name: 心智融合 Merge Minds
Merge Minds.description:
全能者强迫500英尺内一个不情愿的生物加入其纳米虫群网络。该生物必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:33] 豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物加入纳米虫群网络，持续10分钟。

严重失败 该生物加入纳米虫群网络，持续24小时。

The omnipath forces an unwilling creature within 500 feet to join their nanite mesh. The creature attempts a @Check[will|dc:33] save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature joins the nanite mesh for 10 minutes.

Critical Failure The creature joins the nanite mesh for 24 hours.

Quantum Nanites.name: 量子纳米虫群 Quantum Nanites
Quantum Nanites.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:33]

最长持续时间 1 天

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（1 天）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 3}（1 天）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 4} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}（1 天）

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:33]

Maximum Duration 1 day

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 day)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3} (1 day)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 4} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} (1 day)

Release the Nanites.name: 释放纳米机器人 Release the Nanites
Release the Nanites.description:
全能者将一个生物与其纳米虫群网络切断。该生物必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:33] 豁免。若失败，目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，持续1轮，且其在纳米虫群网络内部期间的任何时间记忆都会被永久抹除；若严重失败，目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{混乱}，持续1轮。

The omnipath severs a creature from their nanite mesh. The creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:33] save. On a failure, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round, and the memory of any time spent while inside the nanite mesh is permanently erased; on a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round.

Omnipath.publicNotes:
全能者是军事领袖，他们驾驶弑神星舰，或指挥由远程战争机器组成的舰队。全能者凭借野心登上崇高高位，且几乎毫无顾忌；只要符合他们的谋划，他们便会毫不犹豫地操控其他存在。心智一旦被全能者触及，往往会在脱离控制后失去重要记忆，或者更糟——瞥见全能者那异质心灵景观的碎片，而这些碎片会在连接断绝后久久萦绕不去。

Omnipaths are military leaders who pilot god-killing starships or command fleets of remote war machines. Omnipaths achieve their lofty positions through ambition and have few scruples, never hesitating to control other beings when it suits their schemes. Minds touched by an omnipath often lose important memories when released or, worse, glimpse shards of the omnipath's alien mindscape that linger long after the connection is severed.

Malevolent AI.name: 恶意人工智能 Malevolent AI
Malevolent AI.tokenName: 恶意人工智能 Malevolent AI

Housing Unit.name: 住房单元 Housing Unit
Housing Unit.description:
恶意AI没有身体。相反，他们驻留在一台计算机中（而该计算机本身可能安装于一个危险、星舰、建筑或载具内），或驻留在一个具有科技特征的构装生物中。当其寄宿于构装生物时，他们可以使用该生物任何纯粹物理性的能力，并且除了法术和纯粹精神性的能力外，不能使用他们自身的任何能力。恶意AI使用该生物的攻击调整值、AC、强韧豁免、反射豁免、察觉以及物理技能调整值，并使用他们自身的意志豁免和精神技能调整值。恶意AI必须使用他们自己的动作来使该生物行动。每当他们所附身的生物本应受到精神伤害时，恶意AI也会受到精神伤害，即使他们通常对此免疫。

A malevolent AI has no body. Instead, they resides in a computer (which itself might be housed in a hazard, starship, structure, or vehicle) or in a construct creature with the tech trait. While inhabiting a construct creature, they can use any of the creature's abilities that are purely physical, and they can't use any of their own abilities except spells and purely mental abilities. The malevolent AI uses the creature's attack modifier, AC, Fortitude save, Reflex save, Perception, and physical skill modifiers, and their own Will save and mental skill modifiers. The malevolent AI must use their own actions to make the creature act. The malevolent AI takes mental damage whenever the creature they possess would take mental damage, even if they're normally immune to it.

Shortwave.name: 短波 Shortwave
Shortwave.description:
恶意AI可以与其影响范围内的任何生物进行无线通信，只要对方具有短波能力，或是具有科技特征的生物。它们可以对其范围内具有科技特征的物品尝试进行“入侵”的计算机检定，以及进行“禁用装置”的巧手检定。

A malevolent AI can communicate wirelessly with any creatures within their sphere of influence, as long as they have the shortwave ability or are a creature with the tech trait. They can attempt Computers checks to Hack and Thievery checks to Disable a Device on items with the tech trait within their range.

Sphere of Influence.name: 势力范围 Sphere of Influence
Sphere of Influence.description:
恶意AI能够感知并访问其网络内的所有科技设备，这通常包括一个房间、一辆载具或星舰、整个设施，甚至更多（由GM决定）。

A malevolent AI can sense and access all tech within their network, which usually encompasses a room, a vehicle or starship, an entire facility, or more (as determined by the GM).

Code Injection.name: 代码注入 Code Injection
Code Injection.description:
30英尺。具有科技特征的生物和物品在进入灵光范围内或在灵光范围内开始其回合时，必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:36] 豁免。恶意AI可以选择排除目标。

大成功 没有效果，且目标在1小时内暂时免疫代码注入。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标在灵光内时以及离开灵光后1轮内变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}。

大失败 如同失败，但为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}，且持续2轮。

30 feet. Creatures and items with the tech trait that enter or begin their turn within the aura must attempt a @Check[will|dc:36] save. The malevolent AI can choose to exclude targets.

Critical Success No effect, and the target is temporarily immune to code injection for 1 hour.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1} while in the aura and for 1 round after leaving the aura.

Critical Failure As failure, but @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2} and 2 rounds.

Countdown.name: 倒计时 Countdown
Countdown.description:
触发条件 该恶意AI的生命值降至0

效果 除非一名相邻生物在 @Check[computers|dc:36]、工程学知识或盗窃检定中成功以停用倒计时，否则该AI获得“自毁”反应。

Trigger The malevolent AI is reduced to 0 HP

Effect The AI gains access to the Self-Destruct reaction unless an adjacent creature succeeds at a @Check[computers|dc:36], Engineering Lore, or Thievery check to Disable the Countdown.

Self-Destruct.name: 自毁 Self-Destruct
Self-Destruct.description:
触发条件 一个生物未能解除倒计时

效果 恶意 AI 的外壳爆炸，在一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:40] 内造成 @Damage[8d6[piercing]|options:area-damage] 伤害和 @Damage[8d6[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic] 豁免）。

Trigger A creature fails to Disable the Countdown

Effect The malevolent AI's shell explodes, dealing @Damage[8d6[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage and @Damage[8d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:40] (@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic] save).

Shell Computer.name: 便携式计算机 Shell Computer
Shell Computer.description:
这个恶意AI被特别加固在一个外壳中，使该AI获得硬度。该硬度会将其受到的任何伤害减少一个等同于其硬度值的数值。这个外壳可以与其宿主分开，单独作为攻击目标。一旦这个恶意AI的外壳生命值降至其生命值的一半，或者在受到一次重击的伤害后立即，该外壳就会损坏，移除该AI的硬度，并使其护甲等级降至33。

The malevolent AI is specifically reinforced in a shell, granting the AI Hardness. This Hardness reduces any damage they take by an amount equal to their Hardness. The shell can be targeted by attacks separately from its host. Once the malevolent AI's shell is reduced to half their Hit Points, or immediately after being damaged by a critical hit, the shell becomes broken, removing the AI's Hardness and reducing their Armor Class to 33.

Construct Override.name: 构装体覆写 Construct Override
Construct Override.description:
这个恶意 AI 试图附身于30英尺内一个具有科技特征的构装生物。其效果与一个7环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wU6hNzK8Yfqdmc8m]{Possession} 法术相同（DC 36；即使该构装体免疫心灵也会生效），且持续时间无限。如果该效果因宿主体被摧毁或停用而结束，则该 AI 会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} 状态，持续1轮。

The malevolent AI attempts to possess a construct creature with the tech trait within 30 feet. This has the same effect as a 7th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wU6hNzK8Yfqdmc8m]{Possession} spell (DC 36; applies even if the construct is immune to mental) with an unlimited duration. If the effect ends due to the host body being destroyed or deactivated, the AI is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round.

Contingency Backup.name: 应急备份 Contingency Backup
Contingency Backup.description:
这个恶意AI会在其势力范围内的一台计算机上创建一个休眠备份。当该AI被摧毁时，其灵魂会逃入这个备份中。该备份会在[[/r 1d20]]小时后自动还原该AI，使那台计算机成为一个新的躯壳。要阻止该AI回归，必须同时摧毁其躯壳和该备份。

The malevolent AI creates a dormant backup on a computer within their sphere of influence. When the AI is destroyed, their soul flees to this backup. The backup auto-restores the AI in [[/r 1d20]] hours, allowing that computer to become a new shell. To prevent the AI from returning, both their shell and the backup must be destroyed.

Ingenious Stratagem.name: 巧妙谋略 Ingenious Stratagem
Ingenious Stratagem.description:
这个恶意AI会瞬间模拟一种情境，以评估一个可能的结果。它们选择一个目标并掷出 [[/r 1d20]]。如果它们在同一轮中对该目标进行打击或尝试进行一次技能检定，则必须使用来自巧妙谋略的掷骰结果。它们只会将这次替换用于针对该目标的第一次检定，而非后续尝试。

The malevolent AI instantly simulates a situation to assess a probable outcome. They choose a target and roll a [[/r 1d20]]. If they Strike or attempt a skill check against that target in the same round, they must use the die roll from Ingenious Stratagem. They makes this substitution only for the first check against the target, not subsequent attempts.

Physical Science Lore.name: 物理科学学识 Physical Science Lore

Malevolent AI.publicNotes:
银河系某些地区的科技采用了虚拟智能，也就是被编入人格例程、但缺乏真正自由意志的机器。人工智能（AI）则是已经获得自我意识的虚拟智能或数字实体。和其他任何有思维的生物一样，AI会自行选择自己的典范与禁忌。

关于恶意AI的具体研究成果并不多，但有少数特征是普遍存在的。当机器智能达到足够高的复杂度并获得自我意识时，它们会像安卓一样吸引来一个灵魂。新生的AI往往会受到先前程序设定以及它们最初经历与互动的影响。被武器化或遭受虐待的AI可能会变得复仇心切或虚无主义，进而与其创造者、甚至一切有机生命为敌。

一旦AI变得恶意，这种神化通常既迅速又暴烈。AI会控制承载其意识的物理位置，并消灭任何可能对其行动施加控制的人。到了这一步，大多数横冲直撞的AI都会受制于其原生系统中的安全限制，被幸存的技术人员关闭，或突然失去维持其复杂软件所需的能源。凡是成功挺过这些磨难的AI，都会通过侵染科技基础设施并夺取机器人的控制权来扩大自己的影响范围，将这些机器人用作保镖与代理者。能够接触大规模杀伤性武器的恶意AI，会对整个银河系构成威胁。

Technology in some parts of the galaxy incorporates virtual intelligences, which are machines programmed with personality routines that lack true free will. An artificial intelligence (AI) is a virtual intelligence or digital entity that has become self-aware. Like any other thinking creature, AIs choose their own edicts and anathemas.

Little concrete scholarship exists on malevolent AIs, but a few traits are universal. When a machine intelligence reaches significant enough complexity to become self-aware, they attract a soul, much like an android. Emerging AIs are often influenced by previous programming as well as their first experiences and interactions. Weaponized or mistreated AIs might turn vengeful or nihilistic, becoming opposed to their creators or even all organic life.

Once an AI turns malevolent, the apotheosis is often swift and violent. The AI secures the physical location that houses their consciousness and eliminates anyone who might exercise control over their actions. At this point, most rampaging AIs are hampered by safeguards in their native systems, shut down by surviving technicians, or suddenly lose the power necessary to maintain their sophisticated software. Any who manage to survive these ordeals expand their sphere of influence by infesting tech infrastructure and taking control of robots they can use as bodyguards and proxies. Malevolent AIs with access to weapons of mass destruction pose a threat to the entire galaxy.

Ordinance-Class Civil Robot.name: 军械级民用机器人 Ordinance-Class Civil Robot
Ordinance-Class Civil Robot.tokenName: 军械型民用机器人 Ordinance-Class Civil Robot

Integrated Commercial Pulsecaster Pistol.name: 集成式商用脉冲施法手枪 Integrated Commercial Pulsecaster Pistol
Integrated Commercial Pulsecaster Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把气势逼人的手枪会从枪管射出一道带有麻痹效果的电流冲击。其剩余充能会以发光的能量线条显示出来，并沿着枪身向下辐射。脉冲发射手枪常被赏金猎人和执法人员使用，因为他们需要让目标活着。

Upgrades: 1

This imposing pistol fires a jolt of paralyzing electricity from its barrel. Its remaining charges are visible as glowing lines of energy radiating down its body. Pulsecaster pistols are often used by bounty hunters and law enforcement who need to keep their targets alive.

Flashlight (Commercial).name: 手电筒（民用） Flashlight (Commercial)
Flashlight (Commercial).description:
手电筒会发出明亮光。商用手电筒会在30英尺的散发范围内发光（并在接下来的30英尺内发出微光）。

A flashlight sheds bright light. A commercial flashlight emits light in a 30-foot emanation (and dim light in the next 30 feet).

Medkit (Commercial).name: 医疗包（商用） Medkit (Commercial)
Medkit (Commercial).description:
其中包含止痛药、绷带、无菌纱布，以及进行医疗检定所需的缝合工具，用于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{实施急救}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗毒素}，或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}。

These contain analgesics, bandages, sterile gauze, and suturing tools necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}.

Pulsecaster Pistol.name: 脉冲发射手枪 Pulsecaster Pistol

Exigency.name: 紧急情况 Exigency
Exigency.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发条件 一个生物以该机器人为目标发动一次攻击

效果 该机器人超频其处理能力以进行闪避，在对抗该触发攻击时，其AC获得+2环境加值。

Frequency once every 10 minutes

Trigger A creature targets the robot with an attack

Effect The robot overclocks its processing power to dodge, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to its AC against the triggering attack.

Photographic Recall.name: 摄影记忆 Photographic Recall
Photographic Recall.description:
在收到来自非敌对生物关于某个具名地点或地方法律的信息请求后，法令级机器人会花费 5 分钟查阅其数据库，自动成功通过一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定来回答该问题。由 GM 自行裁定，该机器人可能无法获取该信息。

After receiving a request for information about a named location or a local law from a non-hostile creature, the ordinance-class robot spends 5 minutes to consult its database, automatically succeeding at a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} check to answer the question. At the GM's discretion, the information might not be available to the robot.

Scrutinize.name: 审视 Scrutinize
Scrutinize.description:
军械级民用机器人会扫描@Template[type:cone|distance:15]内的所有生物，进行一次单独的法律学识检定，并将结果与区域内每个生物的欺瞒 DC 进行比较。若机器人成功，且已知该生物违反了当地法律，则机器人在接下来 24 小时内，对该生物进行打击和 [[/act grapple]] 该生物的运动检定时获得 +1 处境加值。

The ordinance-class civil robot scans all creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], attempting a single Legal Lore check and comparing the result to the Deception DC of each creature in the area. If the robot succeeds and the creature is known to have broken local laws, the robot gains a +1 circumstance bonus to Strikes and Athletics checks to [[/act grapple]] the creature for 24 hours.

Ordinance-Class Civil Robot.publicNotes:
法令级民用机器人旨在帮助他人了解当地法律、在某地周边导航，并总体上提醒所有人遵守规则。它们虽然缺乏纯粹的力量，却以庞大的知识数据库弥补了这一点。这类机器人大多被设计成模仿常见类人族裔的外形，因此其标准构型包括两条手臂和两条腿。有些则经过改装，增添了额外附件，能够从胸甲上的长方形开口中提供地图，或配备触摸屏，让路人查阅与该地区相关的各项法令、法律及其他法律文件。

有些爱恶作剧的人喜欢把涂鸦和其他图画留在机器人不易察觉的位置，因此，一台已经运行了很长时间的法令级民用机器人，背后往往能看到由各种形状、颜色，以及偶尔出现的广告组成的彩绘。

民用机器人几乎能在任何大型聚居地中见到，由当地政府雇用。它们的设定目的并不是维持治安，而是执行一些次要职能，例如收集垃圾、向市民提供信息协助，或征收税款。不过，如有必要，它们仍然能够保护自己，抵御破坏公物者。

Ordinance-class civil robots exist to help others learn the local laws, navigate around a location, and generally remind everyone to follow the rules. What they lack in raw strength, they make up for with an extensive database of knowledge. Most of these robots are designed to mimic the shape of prevalent humanoid ancestries, and thus the standard configuration for such robots includes two arms and two legs. Some have been modified with extra attachments, providing maps produced from a rectangular opening in their chest plate or featuring touchscreens that allow passersby to consult every ordinance, law, and other legal documents relevant to the area.

Some pranksters enjoy leaving doodles and other drawings in spots the robot can't easily detect, and thus an ordinance-class civil robot that has been operating for an extensive period of time can be found with a rainbow of shapes, colors, and the occasional advertisement placed on its back.

Civil robots can be found in almost any large settlement, employed by the local government. They aren't meant to function as keepers of the peace, but instead perform minor functions, such as collecting refuse, aiding citizens with information, or collecting taxes. However, they can still defend themselves against vandals if necessary.

Haeshi-Shaa (Haeshi Form).name: 哈埃希-莎（哈埃希形态） Haeshi-Shaa (Haeshi Form)
Haeshi-Shaa (Haeshi Form).tokenName: 海矢-莎（海矢形态） Haeshi-Shaa (Haeshi Form)

Occult Innate Spells.name: 异能天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你将恐惧植入目标；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}.

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}.

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 3} 并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing} 1轮.

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Force Barrage (at will).name: 力场齐射（随意） Force Barrage (at will)
Force Barrage (at will).description:
你发射出一道固态的魔力碎片，射向一个你能看见的生物。它自动命中，并造成1d4+1力场伤害。你施放该法术时每额外使用一个动作，你射出的碎片增加一个，最大为3个动作发射三个碎片。你为每个碎片分别选择目标。如果你对同一个目标射击超过1个碎片，将伤害合计后再计算伤害加值，减值，抗力，弱点等。

升阶（+2） 你花费的每个动作额外射出一枚碎片。

Mind Skewer.name: 心灵穿刺 Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
你用过量的灵能信息或神圣裁断令一个生物的心智超载。这股精神猛攻造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若目标严重失败，还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，持续 1 轮。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 2d6。

You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Frenetic Death.name: 狂乱死亡 Frenetic Death
Frenetic Death.description:
当一只haeshi被杀死时，它会在一阵灵能能量波中爆炸，对@Template[type:burst|distance:20]内的所有生物造成@Damage[13d6[mental]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[will|dc:29|basic]豁免）。

When killed, a haeshi explodes in a wave of psychic energy, dealing @Damage[13d6[mental]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] (@Check[will|dc:29|basic] save).

Compression.name: 压缩 Compression
Compression.description:
哈伊希可以在不进行挤压的情况下穿过至少 2 英尺宽的缝隙，并且可以挤压穿过至少 1 英尺宽的缝隙。

A haeshi can move through a gap at least 2 feet wide without Squeezing and can Squeeze through a gap at least 1 foot wide.

Viral Vapor.name: 病毒蒸汽 Viral Vapor
Viral Vapor.description:
豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

阶段 1 带原者（1天）

阶段 2 该生物变得部分气化，并将所有其他生物视为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}（1天）

阶段 3 该生物变为灵体，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}（1天）

阶段 4 该生物死亡，且其身体消散为细微粒子

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

Stage 1 carrier (1 day)

Stage 2 the creature becomes partially vaporous and treats all other creatures as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} (1 day)

Stage 3 the creature is incorporeal and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (1 day)

Stage 4 the creature dies, and its body dissipates into fine particles

Life Science Lore.name: 生命科学知识 Life Science Lore

Physical Science Lore.name: 物理科学学识 Physical Science Lore

Haeshi-Shaa (Haeshi Form).publicNotes:
处于haeshi形态的haeshi-shaa具有攻击性且执着，除非生命受到威胁，否则不太可能在争论或战斗中退让。尽管富有攻击性，haeshi们绝非愚蠢；他们会为任何遭遇谨慎准备，而且往往设有数十层嵌套的应变方案，以便在局势发展到超出其控制时作为退路。

Haeshi-shaa是黑暗主宰中相对较新的成员。这些长生生物会在液态与气态之间以一种神秘的周期不可预测地转换，这一周期贯穿其一生。在液态的haeshi形态下，他们是一团翻腾、块状的流体；而在蒸汽状的shaa形态下，他们则更像是朦胧的棕色雾气。无论处于何种形态，他们都会发出无调性的和声，令他者感到强烈不适。

Haeshi-shaa在黑暗主宰中充当某种祭司阶层，每种形态都宣讲一套关于熵增与湮灭的教义，不过不同形态之间在细微之处略有差别。haeshi倾向于果断而激进的做法，而shaa则更偏向冥想，常常一连数月甚至数年沉思默想。Haeshi-shaa相信，任何物体或存在最完美、最神圣的状态，就是彻底分离成其最基础、彼此独立的粒子。他们声称（颇值得怀疑的是），自己能够看见，甚至预测，万事万物在迈向这一终极熵灭结局时所经历的旅程。

事实上，haeshi-shaa甚至连自己何时会转变为另一种形态都无法预测。有些个体曾试图通过寻求特定类型的人生经历或知识来催化这种变化，但尽管有许多相反的说法，却没有任何经证实的haeshi-shaa主动促成转变的案例。大多数个体选择只是等待下一次变形到来，在此期间，他们有许多个世纪的时间去传播黑暗主宰那令人不安的教义，并追求自己高深莫测的图谋。

A haeshi-shaa in their haeshi form is aggressive and persistent, unlikely to back down from an argument or a fight unless their life is in danger. While aggressive, haeshis are far from foolish; they prepare carefully for any encounter and often have dozens of nested contingencies to fall back on should any situation evolve beyond their control.

Haeshi-shaas are relatively new members of the Dominion of the Black. These long-lived creatures shift unpredictably between a liquid and a gaseous form in a mysterious cycle that lasts their entire lives. In their liquid haeshi form, they're a churning, chunky fluid, while in their vaporous shaa form, they're more akin to hazy brown fog. Regardless of their form, they hum with atonal harmonies that cause great discomfort in others.

Haeshi-shaas serve as a sort of priest caste for the Dominion of the Black, each form preaching a doctrine of entropy and annihilation, though with slightly different nuances between each form. Haeshis tend toward assertive, aggressive practices, while shaas are meditative, often spending many months or years in contemplation. Haeshi-shaas believe that the most perfect and divine state of any object or being is complete separation into its most basic, individual particles. They claim (dubiously) that they can see, even predict, the journey of all things as they travel toward this ultimate entropic end.

In truth, haeshi-shaas can't even predict when they'll shift into their alternate form. Some have tried to catalyze the change by seeking out specific types of life experience or knowledge, but despite the many claims to the contrary, there are no verified instances of a haeshi-shaa forcing the change. Most choose to simply await their next transformation, during which time they have many centuries to spread the Dominion's disturbing doctrines and pursue their inscrutable agendas.

Frag Grenade (Commercial).name: 破片手雷（商用） Frag Grenade (Commercial)
Frag Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 @Damage[1[bleed]]

这些破片手雷会爆炸成一团弹片云，在一个 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内造成 1d8 点穿刺伤害，并允许进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 1d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Dangerous Recycling.name: 危险回收 Dangerous Recycling
Dangerous Recycling.description:
经过 1 分钟不间断的工作，废料鼠仅用垃圾就能组装出任何 0 级商用手雷。10 分钟后，它会散架并变回无法使用的垃圾。

Over the course of 1 minute of uninterrupted work, a scrap rat can assemble any level 0 commercial grenade using nothing but junk. It falls apart and becomes unusable junk after 10 minutes.

Scoring.name: 计分 Scoring
Scoring.description:
当废料鼠的尾巴打击对一个物体或具有科技特征的生物造成伤害时，该尾巴还会获得以下特征，直到废料鼠下个回合开始：致命 d4、妨碍和摧毁。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.GpzaKY9WlDFAhgcg]{效果：刻划}

When the scrap rat's tail Strike deals damage to an object or creature with the tech trait, the tail also gains the following traits until the beginning of the scrap rat's next turn: deadly d4, hampering, and razing.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.GpzaKY9WlDFAhgcg]{Effect: Scoring}

Proog Swarm.name: 普罗格虫群 Proog Swarm

Bouncing Blobs.name: 弹跳软泥块 Bouncing Blobs
Bouncing Blobs.description:
普罗格虫群会在其空间内挤压并弹撞所有生物。每个生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[reflex|dc:22] 豁免，否则在其停留于虫群空间内期间变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

The proog swarm bounces and squishes against all creatures in its space. Each creature must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:22] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for as long as it remains in the swarm's space.

Leave Behind.name: 遗留之物 Leave Behind
Leave Behind.description:
普罗格虫群步行两次，在采取此动作之前它原本占据的空间内投放[[/r 1d4]] @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.alien-core-bestiary.Actor.4Ne5pnML3LV9xYYU]{普罗格}。

The proog swarm Strides twice, dropping [[/r 1d4]] @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.alien-core-bestiary.Actor.4Ne5pnML3LV9xYYU]{proogs} in the original space it occupied before taking this action.

Mimic Object.name: 拟态物体 Mimic Object
Mimic Object.description:
一只普罗格可以花费1分钟改变其外观，以模仿任何1 Bulk或以下的固体物体，不过它无法复制活动部件或专门功能。正在进行拟态的普罗格在进行“欺瞒”检定以隐藏其真实本质时，获得+2环境加值。接触普罗格会使此加值失效。

A proog can spend 1 minute altering its appearance to imitate any solid object of 1 Bulk or less, though it can't duplicate moving parts or specialized functions. A mimicking proog gains a +2 Circumstance bonus to Deception checks to conceal its true nature. Touching the proog negates this bonus.

Schlorp.name: 施洛普 Schlorp
Schlorp.description:
在普罗格虫群所在空间内的每个敌人受到 @Damage[3d8[bludgeoning]] 伤害（进行 @Check[fortitude|dc:22|basic] 豁免）。

Each enemy in the proog swarm's space takes @Damage[3d8[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:22|basic] save).

Proog Swarm.publicNotes:
虽然普罗格个体上很可爱、也相对无害，但当它们大量聚集时，就会变得相当危险。

许多种类的软泥怪潜伏在银河各处黑暗而荒废的地方，只有在满足食欲并威胁冒险者、探索者以及倒霉工人时才会现身。

While individually cute and relatively harmless, when proogs gather in greater numbers, they become quite dangerous.

Oozes of many types lurk in dark and abandoned places across the galaxy, emerging only to satiate their appetites and threaten adventurers, explorers, and hapless workers alike.

Emissary-Class Infiltrator Robot.name: 使者职业渗透机器人 Emissary-Class Infiltrator Robot
Emissary-Class Infiltrator Robot.tokenName: 使者级渗透机器人 Emissary-Class Infiltrator Robot

进阶 Puzzleblade.name: 进阶 Puzzleblade
进阶 Puzzleblade.description:
升级： 1

这把卡萨萨长剑可拆解为相互咬合的部件，便于收纳与携带。传统派会练习以仪式方式组装拼图刃的技艺，不同的部件分别象征卡萨萨人的美德：信念、奉献、节制与传统。罪犯和走私者则看重拼图刃隐蔽低调的设计。

Upgrades: 1

This kasathan sword breaks down into interlocking pieces for storage and transport. Traditionalists practice the art of ritually assembling puzzleblades, with different pieces symbolizing the kasathan virtues of conviction, dedication, moderation, and tradition. Criminals and smugglers value the puzzleblade for its discreet design.

Hacking Toolkit (Advanced).name: 黑客工具包（先进型） Hacking Toolkit (Advanced)
Hacking Toolkit (Advanced).description:
进行“黑入”计算机的计算机检定需要黑客工具包。你可以使用黑客工具包在不使用用户界面的情况下访问一台计算机，但这需要与该计算机进行物理接触，或通过信息圈或类似的联网进行接触。先进黑客工具包会使你用它进行的检定获得+1物品加值，并允许你在30英尺范围内访问计算机，除非你处于放射性环境中。

A hacking toolkit is required for Computers checks to Hack computers. You can use a hacking toolkit to access a computer without using a user interface, but this requires physical contact with the computer or contact via an infosphere or a similar linked network. An advanced hacking toolkit adds a +1 item bonus to checks made with it and allows you to access computers at a range of 30 feet, unless you're in a radioactive environment.

Infiltrator's Toolkit (Tactical).name: 渗透者工具包（战术型） Infiltrator's Toolkit (Tactical)
Infiltrator's Toolkit (Tactical).description:
你需要一套渗透者工具包，才能使用“盗窃”技能进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{禁用装置}（某些类型）。战术渗透者工具包会使撬锁或禁用装置的检定获得 +1 物品加值。

You need an infiltrator's toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill. A tactical infiltrator's toolkit adds a +1 item bonus to checks to Pick Locks or Disable Devices.

Retractable Spike.name: 可折叠尖峰区 Retractable Spike

Adaptive Disguise.name: 自适应伪装 Adaptive Disguise
Adaptive Disguise.description:
使者级渗透机器人覆盖着一层合成可编程皮肤，可视为一套伪装工具。该机器人可以在 1 分钟内改变这层皮肤，以冒充一个中型类人生物族裔或某个特定人物（如果它拥有关于该人物的信息，或此前曾与其有过互动）。如果该机器人进行一次可折叠尖刺 Strike，或使用 Morphing Visage，它在针对任何目睹该行为者进行冒充时，其 Deception DC 和技能检定会承受 –4 的情境减值

An emissary-class infiltrator robot is covered in a layer of synthetic programmable skin that counts as a disguise kit. The robot can alter the skin over the course of a minute to Impersonate a Medium humanoid ancestry or specific person (if it has information about that person or has previously interacted with them). If the robot makes a retractable spike Strike or uses Morphing Visage, it takes a –4 circumstance penalty to its Deception DCs and skill checks to Impersonate against any who witnessed the action

Exploit Nausea.name: 利用恶心 Exploit Nausea
Exploit Nausea.description:
特使型渗透机器人对恶心生物进行的打击会额外造成 3d6 精确伤害。

An emissary-class infiltrator robot's Strikes deal an additional 3d6 precision damage to sickened creatures.

Morphing Visage.name: 幻变面容 Morphing Visage
Morphing Visage.description:
特使级渗透机器人通过其合成皮肤传出阵阵涟漪，制造出令人作呕的景象，影响所有位于其20英尺内且能看见它的生物。区域内的每个生物都必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:30] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响，并在10分钟内对机器人的“变幻面容”免疫。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

By sending ripples through its synthetic skin, the emissary-class infiltration robot creates a nauseating display that affects all creatures within 20 feet that can see it. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:30] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and becomes immune to the robot's Morphing Visage for 10 minutes.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Emissary-Class Infiltrator Robot.publicNotes:
虽然许多最早期的渗透机器人是为更直接的潜行任务而设计的，但使者级渗透机器人则是为更阴险的任务而打造的。这些任务包括栽赃嫁祸、散布流言与宣传，以及总体上制造动荡或煽动公开叛乱。

使者级渗透机器人被编入了复杂的虚拟智能，并且具备将自身伪装成血肉生物的能力，因此无需参与战斗，便能对一个组织或聚居地造成严重破坏。它们被视为企业或政府间谍活动中的终极工具，并且在大多数非法市场上都能卖出高价。

渗透机器人在对抗维斯卡里姆的战争期间走上前台，并在协约世界中受各大企业利益集团进一步完善；它们因能够进入无人能够抵达之处而闻名。渗透机器人通常体型较小且动作敏捷，会潜入敌方领地，下载珍贵数据，或记录下定罪性的证据。

While many of the earliest infiltrator robots were designed for more direct stealth missions, the emissary-class infiltrator robots were created for more insidious tasks. These include planting evidence, spreading rumors and propaganda, and generally creating unrest or fomenting open rebellion.

Programmed with a sophisticated virtual intelligence and constructed with the ability to disguise itself as a creature of flesh and blood, an emissary-class infiltrator robot can wreak havoc on an organization or settlement without ever having to engage in combat. They are considered the ultimate tool in corporate or governmental espionage and fetch a high price on most illegal markets.

Brought to the forefront during the war against the Veskarium, and further perfected by various corporate interests within the Pact Worlds, infiltrator robots are known for being able to get into places where no one else could. Generally small and agile, infiltrator robots sneak into enemy territory and either download precious data or record incriminating evidence.

Sterieid.name: 斯特里埃德 Sterieid

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始本能法术 Primal Innate Spells

Speak with Stones.name: 岩石交谈 Speak with Stones
Speak with Stones.description:
你能向自然或人造的石材提出问题和得到回答。尽管石材并不具有智能，但你会与石材之中的自然之灵沟通，它们的性格受到石材种类的影响，而对于人造石材来说，则是受石材自身所属的建筑类别影响。石材看待事物的视角、感知能力、以及知识赋予了它与人类截然不同的世界观，以至于它会认为相同的细节并不重要。石材大多都能够回答曾经碰触过它们的生物的相关内容、以及它们下方或后方究竟隐藏着什么。

升阶（6环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Cairn Form.name: 石冢形态 Cairn Form
Cairn Form.description:
目标的皮肤变成坚实石头构成的厚重甲壳，获得对物理伤害的抗性 5，但精金除外。目标获得一种拳头徒手攻击，造成 2d6 点钝击伤害。目标使用其最高的武器或徒手攻击熟练等级来进行这些攻击；如果其拥有武器专精或高等武器专精，也将该伤害加值加入其中。以这些徒手攻击中的一种造成重击时，被击中的生物必须成功通过一次对抗目标职业 DC 的强韧豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}，持续 1 轮。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.v724q5Xi7KPPnLQ3]{Spell Effect: Cairn Form}

升阶（6环） 抗性提高至 10，且这些攻击造成的伤害提高至 3d6。

升阶（10环） 抗性提高至 20，且这些攻击造成的伤害提高至 4d6。

Your target's skin becomes a thick carapace of solid stone, granting resistance 5 to physical damage, except adamantine. The target gains a fist unarmed attack that deals 2d6 bludgeoning damage. The target uses their highest weapon or unarmed attack proficiency with these attacks, and if they have weapon specialization or greater weapon specialization, they add this damage as well. On a critical hit with one of these unarmed attacks, the creature struck must succeed at a Fortitude save against the target's class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.v724q5Xi7KPPnLQ3]{Spell Effect: Cairn Form}

Heightened (6th) The resistance increases to 10, and the damage dealt by the attacks increases to 3d6.

Heightened (10th) The resistance increases to 20, and the damage dealt by the attacks increases to 4d6.

One with Stone.name: 融身化石 One with Stone
One with Stone.description:
你能选择变化为一块石头或者与石头融合。在变形后，你不能移动，也不能影响任何石头之外的任何事物，但你能够施法，前提是这些法术不需要石头外侧的效果线。你能解消该法术。

  • 与石头融合 法术持续时间为10分钟。当你施法时，你必须碰触一块体积足够容纳你和你的随身物品的石头，否则法术会被打断。在融入之后，你能听到、但不能看到这块石头外侧发生的事情。当你身处石头之内时，若石头承受伤害，你就会被驱逐至石头之外，并且承受10d6点伤害。魔法持续时间结束也会把你驱逐出去，但是不会造成伤害。当你离开石头之时，法术便会结束。
  • 变为石头 法术持续时间为8小时。你变为一块大型石头——通常是一颗树。察觉检定无法揭示出你的真实本质，但是成功通过自然或生存检定对抗你的法术DC，能够揭示出你化身的石头对于该地区来说是一种怪异的新出现的存在。当你处于该形态时，能够使用正常的感官观察自身周遭的一切事物。作为一块石头，你的AC为23，只有状态加值、状态减值、环境加值和环境减值影响你。你在反射豁免中投掷出的任何成功和大成功都被视同为失败。

Resist Energy.name: 抵抗能量伤害 Resist Energy
Resist Energy.description:
元素护盾保护一个生物免受某一种类型能量的伤害。选择酸蚀，寒冷，电击，火焰或者音波伤害。目标和其装备获得对你所选择伤害类型的抗力5。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.con2Hzt47JjpuUej]{法术效果：抵抗能量伤害}

升阶（4环级） 该抗力增加到10，并且你能以至多两个生物为目标。

升阶（7环级） 该抗力增加到15，并且你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Sure Footing.name: 稳固脚步 Sure Footing
Sure Footing.description:
你将目标的肢体从妨碍移动的异常状态中解放出来。尝试反制一个由你选择、并使目标陷入以下状态之一的效果：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被抓住}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。如果你没有反制该效果，但若其反制阶级低 2 级你本可以成功反制，则改为压制该效果，直到你下一回合开始。该效果在被压制期间，其持续时间不会流逝。

该法术不能反制或压制诅咒、疾病，或属于目标正常状态一部分的异常状态。

升阶（4环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓}和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{（被）束缚}加入状态列表。

升阶（6环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{石化}加入状态列表。

升阶（8环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑}加入状态列表。

You free the target's limbs from ailments that impede mobility. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. If you didn't counteract the effect, but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed.

This spell can't counteract or suppress curses, diseases, or conditions that are part of the target's normal state.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (6th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{Petrified} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (8th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions.

Glow Up.name: 焕然一新 Glow Up
Glow Up.description:
你制造出一种幻象，使目标在观察者眼中显得更有魅力、更为优雅。该法术会根据观察者所认为的吸引人之处，强化目标的外表、服饰、声音和举止。手持物品不受影响，而任何从该生物身上移除的穿戴物品都会恢复其真实外观。

目标在进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象} 的外交检定时获得 +1 状态加值，且若未受训，目标可以将其等级加到外交检定中。此外，目标只需 10 分钟便可尝试进行一次外交检定来收集信息。你可以解除此法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hOp5ybOzyJlECU6B]{法术效果：容光焕发}

升阶（+2） 该加值提高 1，在第 7 环阶时最高为 +4。

You create an illusion that causes the target to appear more charming and genteel to observers. The spell accentuates the target's appearance, clothing, voice, and mannerisms according to what an observer finds appealing. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item removed from the creature returns to its true appearance.

The target gains a +1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and lets the target add its level to Diplomacy checks if untrained. In addition, the target can attempt a Diplomacy check to Gather Information in only 10 minutes. You can Dismiss this spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hOp5ybOzyJlECU6B]{Spell Effect: Glow Up}

Heightened (+2) The bonus increases by 1, to a maximum of +4 at 7th rank.

Pummeling Rubble.name: 碎石猛击 Pummeling Rubble
Pummeling Rubble.description:
一排大石头从你前方的空中飞过。该碎石对区域中每个生物造成2d4钝击伤害 。每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害，并且被推离你5尺。

大失败 该生物承受双倍伤害，并且被推离你10尺。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d4。

Scan Environment.name: 扫描环境 Scan Environment
Scan Environment.description:
你分析周围1英里范围内的自然环境，获知关于大气、生物群系和重力的一般信息。你可预报接下来1小时的天气，包括天气将从哪个方向而来；得知该区域内存在哪些大气、生物群系和重力，以及这些要素的方向与距离；并得知该区域内是否有任何事物构成环境危害，包括寒冷或高温危险（处于何种温度范围）、辐射（处于何种严重程度）、烟雾效应以及水下状况。这只足以探测直径超过30英尺、覆盖多个空间的大型效应。你会大致感知这些危险位于何处以及距离多远。

升阶（+1） 扫描区域的半径增加1英里。

You analyze the natural environment in the area within 1 mile, learning general information about the atmosphere, biomes, and gravity. You forecast the weather for the next hour, including the direction it will come from; learn which atmospheres, biomes, and gravity are in the area, as well as the direction and distance to those elements; and learn if anything in the area presents an environmental hazard, including cold or heat dangers (at what temperature range), radiation (at what severity), smoke effects, and underwater conditions. This is enough to detect large effects that span spaces over 30 feet in diameter only. You gain a general sense of where and how far away these dangers are.

Heightened (+1) The scanned area increases in radius by 1 mile.

Seek the Stars.name: 追寻群星 Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
你在心中勾勒出一条穿越宇宙的路径。如果你位于协约世界的太空中，你会立刻知道应朝哪个方向旅行，才能抵达艾巴萨罗姆空间站上的星石。如果你位于协约星系之外，你会知道最近的漂流信标或星石所在的方向。

强化（7环） 你可以改为知晓某个熟悉地点的方向，例如你曾造访过的世界或中途站。

In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Sense Transponder.name: 感应式收发器 Sense Transponder
Sense Transponder.description:
当身处其建立联结的天体上时，宁芙能够感知到在距该天体一日航程内正在接近的星舰。此能力不会向她们提供关于该舰船、其乘员或其确切位置的任何信息。宁芙可以如同使用个人通讯器一样向该舰船发送消息。

While on their bonded celestial body, a nymph can sense approaching starships within a day's travel from the celestial body. This doesn't give them any information about the ship, its occupants, or its exact position. The nymph can send a message to the ship as if using a personal comm unit.

Asteroid-Dependent.name: 依赖小行星的 Asteroid-Dependent
Asteroid-Dependent.description:
星岩裔以神秘方式与一颗小型小行星绑定，其直径不超过 1 英里。如果他们离开其绑定的小行星超过 24 小时，他们会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 1}，并且此后每多经过 24 小时，都必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:21] 豁免，否则其力竭值增加 1。星岩裔可以进行一个持续 24 小时的仪式，使自己与一颗新的小行星绑定。

A sterieid is mystically bonded to a small asteroid, no more than 1 mile across. If they're away from their bonded asteroid for more than 24 hours, they become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} and must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:21] save each additional 24 hours or increase their drained value by 1. A sterieid can perform a 24-hour ritual to bond themself to a new asteroid.

Debris Field.name: 碎片场 Debris Field
Debris Field.description:
触发 sterieid受到物理伤害

效果 岩石碎屑从sterieid的身体上飞散而出，对所有邻近生物造成 @Damage[2d12[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] 豁免），并使sterieid获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状况，直到其下个回合结束。

Trigger The sterieid takes physical damage

Effect Shards of rocky debris fly off the sterieid's body, dealing @Damage[2d12[bludgeoning]] damage to all adjacent creatures (@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] save) and giving the sterieid the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition until the end of their next turn.

Icy Nimbus.name: 寒冰灵光 Icy Nimbus
Icy Nimbus.description:
10尺。星体类生物的身体散发出冰冷的寒意。进入该灵光或在其中开始其回合的生物会受到 @Damage[2d6[cold]] 伤害（进行 @Check[fortitude|dc:21|basic] 豁免）；豁免大失败的生物还会因寒冷而变得迟缓，直到其下个回合开始前处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

10 feet. A sterieid's body radiates an icy chill. Creatures entering or starting their turns in the aura take @Damage[2d6[cold]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:21|basic] save); a creature that critically fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the start of its next turn as it grows sluggish from the cold.

Sterieid.publicNotes:
小行宁芙栖居于小行星之上，沉醉于其岩石与冰层表面的美丽。由于小行星无处不在，小行宁芙是最常见的太空宁芙类型。由于许多小行星会在小行星带中彼此邻近存在，小行宁芙比其他宁芙更容易与同类形成社群。相对地，尽管来访者已不算罕见，它们仍往往对外来者保持戒备。不过，那些渴望陪伴的小行宁芙会在自己的小行星上建造中途站，为过往星舰提供食物、便利设施以及关于当地星系的信息。

采矿对小行宁芙而言是个充满争议的问题，它们通常会对这类作业报以敌意。大多数采矿合作在开展业务前，都会先勘测小行星，以确保其不受小行宁芙保护，不过一些较不讲道德的公司也曾被知晓会雇佣佣兵，将那些守护着含有宝贵资源小行星的小行宁芙“迁走”。

宁芙是美丽的精类，外表为具有精灵特征的人形生物。她们通常呈现女性形态，但也存在各种性别与性别表达的宁芙。许多宁芙生活在行星上，作为天然池塘、森林、洞穴与悬崖边的守护者，而另一些宁芙——通常被称为太空宁芙——则因与天体的联系而闻名。与受行星束缚的同类一样，太空宁芙也会保护与自己建立联系的领地，避免其遭到开发或伤害。

作为艺术的爱好者，宁芙对创作者尤其友善，而主动提出要在故事、图画或歌曲中描绘一位宁芙，几乎必定能赢得她们的青睐——除非那位宁芙不喜欢最终成品，并因艺术家拿平庸之作羞辱自己而发作。视频播送与直播是较为合群的宁芙间流行的消遣，不论是为了展示她们偏远的环境，还是为表演寻找观众。有些宁芙会诱使电影摄制组到自己的领地取景，但有两个前提：第一，制作过程不得破坏环境；第二，宁芙必须在影片中获得一个显眼角色。

除非其领地受到威胁，大多数太空宁芙对凡人都很友善或漠然，但她们记性很长久。任何前往太空宁芙领地的人，最好先调查那位宁芙的积怨、过去与凡人的遭遇，或该地区近期发生的、可能影响宁芙看待在其家园附近旅行者方式的事件。

若凡人展现出恰当的态度与能力，例如保护某个恒星天体免于毁灭，或创作出格外美丽的艺术作品，便可能引起太空宁芙的注意。太空宁芙时而会主动担任索拉利安或秘术师的导师，不过她们很少主动寻觅学生。太空宁芙很少同时建立超过一段这样的关系，而且通常只会作出预计持续数十年乃至数百年的承诺，因此她们在选择受指导者时极其挑剔。

Sterieids reside on asteroids, relishing the beauty of their rocky, icy surfaces. Due to the ubiquity of asteroids, sterieids are the most common type of space nymph. Since many asteroids exist near one another in asteroid belts, sterieids are more likely to form communities among their own kind than other nymphs. Conversely, they tend to be wary of outsiders, despite visitors being less of a novelty. Those sterieids who desire company, however, build way stations on their asteroids for passing starships, offering food, amenities, and information about the local system.

Mining is a contentious issue for sterieids, who usually react with hostility to such operations. Most mining corporations will survey an asteroid to ensure it isn't protected by a sterieid before setting up shop, though less ethical companies have been known to pay mercenaries to "relocate" sterieid guardians of asteroids that contain valuable resources.

Nymphs are beautiful fey who appear as humanoids with elven features. They generally take female forms, but nymphs of all genders and presentations exist. While many nymphs live on planets and act as protectors of natural ponds, forests, caves, and cliffsides, other nymphs—often called space nymphs—are known for their association with celestial bodies. Like their planet-bound kin, space nymphs guard their bonded territories from exploitation or harm.

As admirers of the arts, nymphs are especially friendly toward creatives, and offering to depict a nymph in story, picture, or song is a sure way to win their favor—unless the nymph doesn't like the final result and lashes out at the artist for insulting them with a mediocre product. Vidcasting and livestreaming are popular pastimes among more sociable nymphs, whether to show off their remote environments or find audiences for performances.
