沃苏尔会自然吸引光线。由于微光或黑暗而以沃苏尔为目标时，针对其 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 或隐藏状态所需平检的 DC 降低 2。沃苏尔对抗光效应时，其 AC 和豁免检定承受 –2 处境减值；对抗来自激光组武器的攻击时，其 AC 也承受 –2 处境减值。

A vorthuul naturally draws in light. The DC of the flat check to target a vorthuul @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or hidden due to dim light or darkness is reduced by 2. A vorthuul takes a –2 circumstance penalty to AC and saving throws against light effects and to AC against attacks from weapons in the laser group.

Quantum Duality.name: 量子二重性 Quantum Duality
Quantum Duality.description:
沃苏尔存在于两种状态中：一种是绝对宁静，另一种是永恒煎熬。沃苏尔会根据其主导状态获得加值。它们在掷先攻时，以一个自由动作决定哪种状态为主导。

  • 绝对宁静 沃苏尔对抗情绪效果的豁免检定获得 +1 状态加值，并获得 10 点精神伤害抗性。

  • 永恒煎熬 沃苏尔对抗活力效果的豁免检定获得 +1 状态加值，并获得 10 点火焰伤害抗性。

Vorthuuls exist in two states: one in perfect tranquility, the other in perpetual agony. The vorthuul gains bonuses depending on the dominant state. They decide which is dominant as a free action when they roll initiative.

  • Absolute Tranquility The vorthuul gains a +1 status bonus to saves against emotion effects and resistance 10 to mental damage.

  • Everburning Agony The vorthuul gains a +1 status bonus to saves against vitality effects and resistance 10 to fire damage.

Gravity Maelstrom.name: 引力漩涡 Gravity Maelstrom
Gravity Maelstrom.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 沃苏尔将其重力牵引强化1分钟，将其碾压重力灵光的半径增至20英尺。此外，在该灵光扩展期间，生物若朝任何并非直接接近沃苏尔的方向移动，均将灵光内的方格视为困难地形。

Frequency once per hour

Effect The vorthuul intensifies their gravitational pull for 1 minute, increasing the radius of their crushing gravity aura to 20 feet. Additionally, while this aura is expanded, creatures moving in any direction other than directly toward the vorthuul treat squares in the aura as difficult terrain.

Quantum Agony.name: 量子剧痛 Quantum Agony
Quantum Agony.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 沃苏尔处于绝对宁静状态

效果 沃苏尔在痛苦洪流中进入永燃的苦痛。沃苏尔的粉碎重力灵气中的每个生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:28] 豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（若严重失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}）。

Frequency once per round

Requirements The vorthuul is in absolute tranquility state

Effect The vorthuul enters everburning agony in torrents of anguish. Each creature in the vorthuul's crushing gravity aura must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:28] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).

Quantum Tranquility.name: 量子宁静 Quantum Tranquility
Quantum Tranquility.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 伏索苏尔处于永燃苦痛状态

效果 伏索苏尔在一阵令人窒息的静止波动中进入绝对宁静。伏索苏尔的粉碎重力灵光中的每个生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:28] 豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}，持续 1 轮（若重度失败，则迟缓 1 持续 3 轮）。

Frequency once per round

Requirements The vorthuul is in everburning agony state

Effect The vorthuul enters absolute tranquility in a wave of oppressive stillness. Each creature in the vorthuul's crushing gravity aura must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:28] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round (or slowed 1 for 3 rounds on a critical failure).

Singularity Pocket.name: 奇点口袋 Singularity Pocket
Singularity Pocket.description:
沃苏尔将其肉体与精神上的折磨强加于它触碰到的生物。目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:28] 豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{无法移动} 1分钟（[[/act escape dc=28]]）。只要它以这种方式处于无法移动状态，它就在自己的每个回合结束时受到 @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害和 @Damage[1d6[mental]] 心灵伤害。成功脱逃的生物会在24小时内暂时免疫该沃苏尔的纯一主义口袋。

The vorthuul forces their physical and psychological torment upon a creature they touch. The target must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:28] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 minute ([[/act escape dc=28]]). As long as it's immobilized in this way, it takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage and @Damage[1d6[mental]] damage at the end of each of its turns. Creatures that Escape become temporarily immune to this vorthuul's Singularity Pocket for 24 hours.

Vorthuul.publicNotes:
沃苏尔是具有两种彼此重叠却又互不协调形态的不死生物：一种是因无尽痛苦而尖啸的扭曲灵体，另一种是漆黑如墨、却满溢宁静的骸骨。其中一种形态或许看起来比另一种更真实，但下一刻情况便可能恰恰相反。

Vorthuuls are undead beings with two overlapping yet incongruous forms: a distorted spirit shrieking in unending torment and a pitch-black skeleton overflowing with serenity. One form might seem more real than the other, only for the opposite to be true the next moment.

Wastewither.name: 废萎 Wastewither

Toxic Exhaust.name: 剧毒废气 Toxic Exhaust
Toxic Exhaust.description:
15英尺。一团有毒的薄雾萦绕在枯废兽周围。当一个生物进入该灵光或在其中开始其回合时，它必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:23] 豁免。若该生物失败，则它会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}，直到它离开该灵光。环境防护或适当的法术会使对抗该灵光的豁免获得 +2 情境加值。

15 feet. A poisonous mist lingers around the wastewither. When a creature enters or starts its turn in the aura, it must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save. If the creature fails, it's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until it leaves the aura. Environmental protections or an appropriate spell provides a +2 circumstance bonus to saves against the aura.

Acid Rain.name: 酸雨 Acid Rain
Acid Rain.description:
废蚀凋灵蒸发成一团云雾，并降下酸液雨滴。废蚀凋灵飞行，最多移动相当于其速度两倍的距离。废蚀凋灵飞越的任何生物都会受到 @Damage[9d8[acid]] 伤害，并可进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:23|basic] 豁免。废蚀凋灵在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Acid Rain]]{1d4 轮} 内不能再次使用酸液雨。

The wastewither vaporizes into a cloud and rains down acid drops. The wastewither Flies up to twice their Speed. Any creature the wastewither passes over takes @Damage[9d8[acid]] damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:23|basic] save. A wastewither can't use Acid Rain again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Acid Rain]]{1d4 rounds}.

Contaminated Sludge.name: 污染淤泥 Contaminated Sludge
Contaminated Sludge.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内的所有地形都变为困难地形，持续1分钟。所有进入或在其回合开始时位于受影响区域内的生物都必须尝试进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:23] 豁免，否则变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 1}。该力竭值可累积，最高至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 4}。

Frequency once per day

Effect All terrain in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute. All creatures that enter or begin their turn in the affected area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}. This drained value is cumulative, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 4}.

Swallow Whole.name: 活吞 Swallow Whole
Swallow Whole.description:
中型，@Damage[(2d8+12)[钝击]] 外加 @Damage[(2d6)[强酸]]，破裂 21

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Medium, @Damage[(2d8+12)[bludgeoning]] plus @Damage[(2d6)[acid]], Rupture 21

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Wastewither.publicNotes:
若长时间不加处理，积存的工业废水在蒸发时会从水元素位面吸引来凋废怪。凋废怪会污染它们所接触的一切，把坚实的地面和洁净的水变成污泥。许多企业倾倒场和有毒泄漏地点都会吸引或滋生凋废怪，而它们仅仅存在于此，就会进一步污染生态系统。

元素生物是来自原初存在位面的活跃侵入体。它们形态各异，从风中或水中无意识的涡流，到能够驾驭原初魔法的复杂实体，不一而足。太空旅行的到来与科技的进步，使更多作为元素鲜活化身的存在得以在物质宇宙中显现。

野火派、太阳风暴和洪水等自然事件，能够在一颗行星上或一片太空区域中释放出成群难以驾驭的元素生物。有时，一群强大的元素生物会引发史诗级规模的自然灾害，比如一次爆表的太阳耀斑烧毁一颗行星的电网，或一场在气态巨行星大气中盘旋不止的永恒风暴。

When left untreated for too long, standing industrial wastewater attracts wastewithers from the elemental Plane of Water as it evaporates. Wastewithers contaminate everything they touch, turning solid ground and clean water into sludge. Many corporate dumping sites and toxic spills attract or spawn wastewithers, whose mere presence further contaminates the ecosystem.

Elementals are energetic intrusions from the primal planes of existence. They take many forms, from mindless eddies in the wind or water to complex entities capable of wielding primal magic. The advent of space travel and the progress of technology have allowed even more living embodiments of the elements to manifest in the Universe.

Natural events like wildfires, solar storms, and floods can unleash hordes of unruly elementals on a planet or into a region of space. Sometimes, a gathering of powerful elementals causes a natural disaster on an epic scale, like an off-the-charts solar flare that fries a planet's power grid or a ceaseless storm swirling in a gas giant's atmosphere.

Robotic Tactical War Machine.name: 机器人战术战争机器 Robotic Tactical War Machine
Robotic Tactical War Machine.tokenName: 机器人战术战争机器 Robotic Tactical War Machine

Plasma Blaster.name: 等离子爆能枪 Plasma Blaster

Interstellar Comms.name: 星际通讯 Interstellar Comms
Interstellar Comms.description:
远程战争机器与其驾驶员保持恒定的数据链接；对于任何未列出的技能，它使用驾驶员的语言和技能调整值。此外，驾驶员可以通过该数据链接，借助远程战争机器作为传声筒来发言。

A remote war machine maintains a constant data link with its pilot, using its pilot's languages and skill modifiers for any unlisted skill. In addition, the pilot can speak through the data link using the remote war machine as a mouthpiece.

Notch Position.name: 缺口位置 Notch Position
Notch Position.description:
触发条件 一名敌人进行疾行

需求 遥控战争机器位于目标触及范围之外

效果 遥控战争机器沿与目标相同的方向疾行，最多移动至其速度值；持续移动直到目标停止移动，或战争机器已移动其完整速度值。

Trigger An enemy Strides

Requirements The remote war machine is outside the target's reach

Effect The remote war machine Strides up to its Speed in the same direction as the target until the target stops moving or the war machine has moved its full Speed.

Radio Silence.name: 无线静默 Radio Silence
Radio Silence.description:
60英尺。远程战争机器灵气范围内的非盟友通讯装置和其他计算机无法运作，除非其操作者以一个交互动作成功通过一次对抗该战争机器隐匿DC的@Check[computers|against:stealth|rollerRole:target]检定。

60 feet. Non-allied comm units and other computers don't function within the remote war machine's aura unless their operator succeeds at a @Check[computers|against:stealth|rollerRole:target] check against the war machine's Stealth DC as an Interact action.

Attack Pattern Beta.name: 攻击模式贝塔 Attack Pattern Beta
Attack Pattern Beta.description:
远程战争机器对一个目标进行一次打击，然后进行一步5尺移步或疾行，并对射程内的另一个目标进行一次打击。这两次打击都计入其多重攻击减值，但其多重攻击减值要在它进行完这两次打击后才会增加。

The remote war machine makes a Strike against a target, then Steps or Strides and makes a Strike against another target within range. Both Strikes count toward its multiple attack penalty, but its multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after it makes both Strikes.

Robotic Tactical War Machine.publicNotes:
多元工业与泽泽尔军械集团合作，创造出了最早期的机器人遥控战争机器之一。这台机器被赋予代号“tashtari”，其设计目的在于能够迅速部署至战场。tashtari可以在远距离为突击部队提供支援，同时扰乱战场上的敌方通信。

这场入侵始于一系列由阿巴隆上的新械族探测到的侦察活动。奇异的机器凭空出现，带着炽热发光的传感器和可动触手，近乎毫无规律地撕裂基础设施，并在整个协约世界星域四处搜集情报。恐慌迅速蔓延，但由于这些机器总会消失得无影无踪，或者在被捕获时自爆，因此目击报告始终无法得到证实或识别。流言开始传播，称这些机器是一种前所未见的生物工程产物。很快，理事军正式介入，将这些事件封锁在最高安全权限那道坚不可摧的帷幕之后。

在 ag 325 年的萨伦尼思月，数十次军事行动都未能与这些行踪诡秘的探测器交战，最终，一支由伊达里号派出的战机编队总算走了运，在其中一台机器自毁之前将其瘫痪。在协约世界顶尖科学家的诱导下，这艘生物工程载具吐露了自己的一部分秘密，并成为如今正在测试用于实战的“本土制造”遥控战争机器原型。这些复制品并非活体，而是采用机器人建造模板制造，因为原始生物工程设计的核心已被证明过于复杂，无法用协约世界的技术进行逆向工程。

遥控战争机器是能够从极远距离进行操控的代理体。最初的生物工程战争机器通过灵能链接或某种未知无线电频率与驾驶员的心智相连。机器人遥控战争机器则通过数据链路连接至计算机，使驾驶员能够使用键盘、虚拟现实设备，甚至电子游戏控制器来操控他们的代理体。

Multifold Industries, in collaboration with Zeizerer Munitions, created one of the earliest robotic remote war machines. Given the code name "tashtari," the machine was engineered for swift deployment to the battlefield. The tashtari can support a strike force at range while disrupting enemy communications on the field.

The incursion began with a series of probes detected by anacites on Aballon. Strange machines with blazing sensors and articulated tentacles appeared out of nowhere, ripping through infrastructure seemingly at random and collecting intelligence all around Pact Worlds space. Panic spread fast, but since the machines always vanished without a trace, or exploded when captured, the sightings couldn't be confirmed or identified. Rumors began to circulate that the machines were a form of biotech never encountered before. Soon the Stewards became formally involved, shuttering the incidents behind the adamantine partition of top security clearance.

In Sarenith of 325 ag, after dozens of military operations failed to engage the elusive probes, a wing of fighters dispatched from the Idari finally got lucky and disabled one of the machines before it could self-destruct. Coaxed into giving up some of its secrets by top Pact Worlds scientists, the biotech vessel became the prototype for the "home grown" remote war machines that are currently being tested for use in combat. The replicas aren't alive but are built using robotic construction templates since the core of the original biotech design has proven too complicated to reverse engineer with Pact technology.

Remote war machines are proxies that can be controlled from a great distance. The original biotech war machines connect to the pilot's mind through a psychic link or unknown radio frequency. Robotic remote war machines connect to a computer via data link, allowing the pilot to control their proxy using a keyboard, virtual reality rig, or even a vidgame controller.

Corzad.name: 科扎德 Corzad

Fungal Symbiosis.name: 真菌共生 Fungal Symbiosis
Fungal Symbiosis.description:
当目标位于科扎德至少两名盟友20英尺内时，科扎德的打击会额外造成 1d4 伤害。

A corzad's Strikes deal an extra 1d4 damage to targets within 20 feet of at least two of the corzad's allies.

Spore Tide.name: 孢潮 Spore Tide
Spore Tide.description:
科尔扎德化解成一团黏滑的孢子并两次Stride，无视困难地形和其他生物。此移动不会触发反应。科尔扎德路径上的任何生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:15|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened] 豁免，否则变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。科尔扎德在此次移动结束时重新成形。

The corzad dissolves into a mass of slimy spores and Strides twice, ignoring difficult terrain and other creatures. This movement doesn't trigger reactions. Any creature in the corzad's path must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:15|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. The corzad re-forms at the end of this movement.

Corzad.publicNotes:
成群的狼般科尔扎代生物充当着科尔扎代人真菌群落的眼睛与口舌。

科尔扎代人诞生自奥克腾破碎后的残骸。它们被爆炸般地抛射入太空，这些真菌群落由神秘力量维系在一起。它们奇异的子实体呈现出多种形态，其中有两种在协约世界中比其他形态更为常见：科尔扎代兽与科尔扎代卫。

Packs of wolflike corzads act as the eyes and mouths of the corzadai fungal colony.

Corzadais spawned from the broken remains of Aucturn. Explosively launched into space, these fungal colonies are held together by mysterious forces. Their strange fruiting bodies have taken on numerous shapes, of which two have been more commonly seen in the Pact Worlds than others: corzads and corzadors.

Supenga Pup.name: 苏彭加幼犬 Supenga Pup

Slowing Enzyme.name: 迟滞酶 Slowing Enzyme
Slowing Enzyme.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:20]

最长持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 所有速度获得 –10 尺状态减值（1 轮）

阶段 2 所有速度获得 –10 尺状态减值，且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减缓 1}（2 轮）

阶段 3 所有速度获得 –20 尺状态减值，且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减缓 2}（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:20]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 –10-foot status penalty to all Speeds (1 round)

Stage 2 –10-foot status penalty to all Speeds and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (2 rounds)

Stage 3 –20-foot status penalty to all Speeds and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} (1 round)

Spinning Charge.name: 旋转冲锋 Spinning Charge
Spinning Charge.description:
苏彭加幼崽蜷缩成一团，随后将自己向前弹射出去。它以直线进行一次【疾走】，移动距离最多等于其两倍速度。若它在此次移动结束时与一名敌人相邻，它会猛撞该敌人，造成 @Damage[(3d8+3)[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:22|basic] 豁免）。严重失败该豁免的生物会被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{伏地}。

The supenga pup curls into a ball and launches itself forward. It Strides up to twice its Speed in a straight line. If it ends this movement adjacent to an enemy, it bashes into that enemy, dealing @Damage[(3d8+3)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:22|basic] save). A creature that critically fails this save is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Supenga Pup.publicNotes:
苏彭加斯通过结果繁殖，这一过程在严酷的沙漠环境中可能需要数月。幼株常常要花上数年学习如何生存，之后才准备好独自闯荡——或者被赶出去。

当这种多肉植物原生栖息地的降雨变得稀少时，它就会转向另一种液体来源：血液。苏彭加斯已经适应了这个资源匮乏的世界，并会利用任何机会，借助其锋利的叶片和麻痹毒素进行猎杀。

Supengas reproduce by fruiting, a process that can take months in a harsh desert environment. Pups often spend years learning to survive before they are ready to strike out on their own—or are kicked out.

When rains grow sparse in this succulent's native habitat, it turns to another source for liquid: blood. The supenga has adapted to a world of scarcity and takes advantage of any chance to hunt using its sharp leaves and paralyzing toxin.

Sterieid Queen.name: 斯特里艾德女王 Sterieid Queen
Sterieid Queen.tokenName: 斯特里德女王 Sterieid Queen

Primal Spontaneous Spells.name: 原始自发法术 Primal Spontaneous Spells

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始内在法术 Primal Innate Spells

Speak with Stones.name: 岩石交谈 Speak with Stones
Speak with Stones.description:
你能向自然或人造的石材提出问题和得到回答。尽管石材并不具有智能，但你会与石材之中的自然之灵沟通，它们的性格受到石材种类的影响，而对于人造石材来说，则是受石材自身所属的建筑类别影响。石材看待事物的视角、感知能力、以及知识赋予了它与人类截然不同的世界观，以至于它会认为相同的细节并不重要。石材大多都能够回答曾经碰触过它们的生物的相关内容、以及它们下方或后方究竟隐藏着什么。

升阶（6环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Wall of Stone.name: 石墙术 Wall of Stone
Wall of Stone.description:
你塑造一面岩石墙壁。你创造一个至多120尺长，20尺高1寸厚的石墙。你可以塑形石墙的路径，将墙壁的每5尺放在方格之间的边界上。该墙壁无需竖直，所以举例而言，你可以用其塑造一座桥，或者一组阶梯。你必须将该墙创造在连续的开放空间中，令其边界不会穿过任何生物或者物体，否则你会失去该法术。

每一段10尺乘10尺的墙壁具有AC10，硬度14，以及50生命值，并且它免疫重击，寒冷伤害，以及精准伤害。一段被摧毁的墙壁可以移动通过，但是因此留下的碎石会令其变成困难地形。

升阶（+2） 每一段墙的生命值增加15。

Wave of Warning.name: 警示波动 Wave of Warning
Wave of Warning.description:
你以一阵充满敌意的意念威慑敌人。目标受到7d8点非致命精神伤害，且目标必须进行一次意志豁免。随后，这股灵能力量会跃向距第一个目标30英尺内的另一生物，再跃向距该目标30英尺内的另一生物，如此继续。你可以在任意时刻结束这股波动。你不能将同一个生物作为目标超过一次，且你必须对所有目标都具有效应线。伤害只掷骰一次，并将结果应用于每个目标（根据其豁免结果适当地减半或加倍）。

大成功 目标生物不受影响，且波动在该目标处结束。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全额伤害，且陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，且陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}。

升环 (+1) 伤害增加2d8。

You deter enemies with a wave of hostile intent. The target takes 7d8 nonlethal mental damage, and the target must attempt a Will save. The psychic energy then arcs to another creature within 30 feet of the first target, jumps to another creature within 30 feet of that target, and so on. You can end the wave at any point. You can't target the same creature more than once, and you must have line of effect to all targets. Roll the damage only once, and apply it to each target (halving or doubling as appropriate for its saving throw outcome).

Critical Success The target creature is unaffected, and the wave ends with that target.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d8.

Cairn Form.name: 石冢形态 Cairn Form
Cairn Form.description:
你目标的皮肤变成厚实的坚石甲壳，使其获得对物理伤害的抗性 5，但精金除外。目标获得一种拳击徒手攻击，造成 2d6 钝击伤害。目标以其最高的武器或徒手攻击熟练等级进行这些攻击；如果其具有武器专精或高等武器专精，也将该伤害加上。以这些徒手攻击之一造成重击时，被击中的生物必须成功通过一次对抗目标职业 DC 的强韧豁免，否则将变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}，持续 1 轮。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.v724q5Xi7KPPnLQ3]{法术效果：Cairn Form}

升阶（6环） 抗性提高至 10，且这些攻击造成的伤害提高至 3d6。

升阶（10环） 抗性提高至 20，且这些攻击造成的伤害提高至 4d6。

Your target's skin becomes a thick carapace of solid stone, granting resistance 5 to physical damage, except adamantine. The target gains a fist unarmed attack that deals 2d6 bludgeoning damage. The target uses their highest weapon or unarmed attack proficiency with these attacks, and if they have weapon specialization or greater weapon specialization, they add this damage as well. On a critical hit with one of these unarmed attacks, the creature struck must succeed at a Fortitude save against the target's class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.v724q5Xi7KPPnLQ3]{Spell Effect: Cairn Form}

Heightened (6th) The resistance increases to 10, and the damage dealt by the attacks increases to 3d6.

Heightened (10th) The resistance increases to 20, and the damage dealt by the attacks increases to 4d6.

Shape Stone.name: 塑石术 Shape Stone
Shape Stone.description:
你将目标石块变成你选择的粗糙形状。该塑形过程十分粗糙，无法制造复杂的组件，细致的细节，可动部分，或者其他类似的东西。当你塑形一个石头时，站在其上的生物必须尝试一次反射豁免或者特技检定。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标在石头上@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

大失败 该生物从石头上摔落（如可能）并且倒地着地。

Earthbind.name: 地缚术 Earthbind
Earthbind.description:
你使用大地的重量以干扰目标的飞行能力，其效果基于强韧豁免。如果该生物安全到达地面，它不会承受坠落伤害。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标安全坠落至多120尺。

失败 目标安全坠落至多120尺。如果它碰到地面，它1轮内不能飞行，浮空或者以其他方式离开地面。

大失败 目标安全坠落至多120尺。如果它碰到地面，它1分钟内不能飞行，浮空或者以其他方式离开地面。

Electrotether.name: 电索牵引 Electrotether
Electrotether.description:
你为目标的电磁力超载，并用一道闪电形成的天索将其拉向你。对每个目标进行一次远程法术攻击检定。如果你攻击两个目标，则两次攻击都计入你的多重攻击减值，但该减值要在两次攻击都结算后才会增加。每个目标受到 4d8 点电击伤害，并被拉向你 5 尺；若为重击，则被拉向你 10 尺。如果两次攻击都命中，你可以选择将这些生物彼此拉近，而不是拉向你。将目标移入屏障、生物或障碍物时，目标会在进入该空间前停下。

强化（+1） 伤害提高 1d8。

You supercharge the targets' electromagnetism and pull them with a tether of lightning. Make a ranged spell attack against each target. If you attack two targets, both attacks count toward your multiple attack penalty, but it doesn't increase until after both attacks. The targets each take 4d8 electricity damage and are pulled 5 feet closer to you, or 10 feet closer on a critical hit. If both attacks hit, you can choose to move the creatures closer to one another instead of closer to you. Moving a target into a barrier, creature, or obstacle causes the target to stop before entering that space.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Life Seal.name: 生命封印 Life Seal
Life Seal.description:
触发条件 范围内的一个生物进入了会对其造成伤害的环境。

一个闪烁的气泡包裹住目标的身体，使其能够在真空或其他不安全环境中正常呼吸，并保护其免受严酷温度与辐射的影响。

升阶（7环） 你可以额外将至多 5 个生物作为目标，使其获得针对触发该法术生物所进入环境的防护。该法术持续 8 小时，并且也能防护极端温度与辐射。

升阶（10环） 你可以额外将至多 10 个生物作为目标，使其获得针对触发该法术生物所进入环境的防护。该法术持续至你的下一次每日准备，并且也能防护难以置信的温度与辐射。

Trigger A creature within range enters an environment that would be harmful to it.

A shimmering bubble envelops the target's body, allowing it to breathe normally in a vacuum or other unsafe environment and protecting it from severe temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 5 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts for 8 hours and also protects against extreme temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (10th) You can target up to 10 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts until your next daily preparations and also protects against incredible temperatures and radiation.

One with Stone.name: 融身化石 One with Stone
One with Stone.description:
你能选择变化为一块石头或者与石头融合。在变形后，你不能移动，也不能影响任何石头之外的任何事物，但你能够施法，前提是这些法术不需要石头外侧的效果线。你能解消该法术。

  • 与石头融合 法术持续时间为10分钟。当你施法时，你必须碰触一块体积足够容纳你和你的随身物品的石头，否则法术会被打断。在融入之后，你能听到、但不能看到这块石头外侧发生的事情。当你身处石头之内时，若石头承受伤害，你就会被驱逐至石头之外，并且承受10d6点伤害。魔法持续时间结束也会把你驱逐出去，但是不会造成伤害。当你离开石头之时，法术便会结束。
  • 变为石头 法术持续时间为8小时。你变为一块大型石头——通常是一颗树。察觉检定无法揭示出你的真实本质，但是成功通过自然或生存检定对抗你的法术DC，能够揭示出你化身的石头对于该地区来说是一种怪异的新出现的存在。当你处于该形态时，能够使用正常的感官观察自身周遭的一切事物。作为一块石头，你的AC为23，只有状态加值、状态减值、环境加值和环境减值影响你。你在反射豁免中投掷出的任何成功和大成功都被视同为失败。

Caustic Conversion.name: 腐蚀转化 Caustic Conversion
Caustic Conversion.description:
你释放出一股魔法纳米机器洪流，开始溶解你的目标。对目标进行一次远程法术攻击。若命中，你造成 3d8 点强酸伤害，外加 1d6 点持续性强酸伤害。若重击，初始伤害加倍，但持续性伤害不加倍。

升阶（+2） 初始伤害增加 2d8，且持续性强酸伤害增加 1d6。

You launch a torrent of magical nanites that begin dissolving your target. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, you deal 3d8 acid damage plus 1d6 persistent acid damage. On a critical hit, double the initial damage, but not the persistent damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 2d8, and the persistent acid damage increases by 1d6.

Shatter.name: 粉碎音波 Shatter
Shatter.description:
高频音波攻击击碎附近的一件物体。你对该物体造成2d10音波伤害，如果物体的硬度为4或者更低，忽视该硬度。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d10，法术所能忽视的硬度增加2。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Glow Up.name: 光彩焕发 Glow Up
Glow Up.description:
你创造出一种幻象，使目标在观察者眼中显得更有魅力且更为优雅。该法术会根据观察者认为有吸引力的特质来强化目标的外貌、服饰、声音和举止。手持物品不受影响，而从该生物身上取下的任何穿戴物品都会恢复其真实外观。

目标在进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象} 的外交检定时获得 +1 状态加值，且若未受训，可将其等级加入外交检定。此外，目标只需 10 分钟即可尝试一次以“收集信息”为目的的外交检定。你可以撤销该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hOp5ybOzyJlECU6B]{法术效果：魅力焕发}

升阶（+2） 该加值提高 1，至多在第 7 环时达到 +4。

You create an illusion that causes the target to appear more charming and genteel to observers. The spell accentuates the target's appearance, clothing, voice, and mannerisms according to what an observer finds appealing. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item removed from the creature returns to its true appearance.

The target gains a +1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and lets the target add its level to Diplomacy checks if untrained. In addition, the target can attempt a Diplomacy check to Gather Information in only 10 minutes. You can Dismiss this spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hOp5ybOzyJlECU6B]{Spell Effect: Glow Up}

Heightened (+2) The bonus increases by 1, to a maximum of +4 at 7th rank.

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然存在的引导，赋予目标在持续时间结束前的一次攻击骰，察觉检定，豁免骰，或者技能检定上获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择是否使用该加值。如果目标使用该加值，该法术结束。无论怎样结束，该目标接下来会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法帮你完成杂物。只要你维持该法术，你就可以产生简单的魔法效果。每当你维持该法术时，你可以选择四个选项中的一个。

  • 烹饪 为1磅非活物材料冷却，加热，或者调味。
  • 抬起 将一件轻负载或者更低的无主物品缓慢抬离地面。
  • 创造 创造一个负载可忽略的临时物体，它由凝结的魔法物质组成。该物体看起来粗糙且非常脆弱——它无法被用做工具，武器，法器或法术开销。
  • 整理 为一件轻负载或者更低的物体染色，清洁，或者弄脏它。你可以通过10轮专注来影响一件1负载的物体，对于更大的物体为每负载1分钟。

魔法伎俩无法造成伤害或者负面效果。对一件物体的任何改变（在上述内容之外的）只会在你仍维持该法术时持续。

Pummeling Rubble.name: 碎石猛击 Pummeling Rubble
Pummeling Rubble.description:
一排大石头从你前方的空中飞过。该碎石对区域中每个生物造成2d4钝击伤害 。每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害，并且被推离你5尺。

大失败 该生物承受双倍伤害，并且被推离你10尺。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d4。

Scan Environment.name: 扫描环境 Scan Environment
Scan Environment.description:
你分析1英里内区域中的自然环境，获知关于大气群系、生物群系和重力的一般信息。你预测接下来1小时的天气，包括它将从哪个方向而来；了解该区域内存在哪些大气群系、生物群系和重力，以及这些要素的方向和距离；并了解该区域内是否有任何事物构成环境危害，包括寒冷或高温危险（处于何种温度范围）、辐射（处于何种严重程度）、烟雾效应，以及水下环境状况。此效果仅足以探测直径超过30英尺、覆盖多个空间的大型效应。你会大致感知这些危险位于何处，以及距离有多远。

强化（+1） 扫描区域的半径增加1英里。

You analyze the natural environment in the area within 1 mile, learning general information about the atmosphere, biomes, and gravity. You forecast the weather for the next hour, including the direction it will come from; learn which atmospheres, biomes, and gravity are in the area, as well as the direction and distance to those elements; and learn if anything in the area presents an environmental hazard, including cold or heat dangers (at what temperature range), radiation (at what severity), smoke effects, and underwater conditions. This is enough to detect large effects that span spaces over 30 feet in diameter only. You gain a general sense of where and how far away these dangers are.

Heightened (+1) The scanned area increases in radius by 1 mile.

Seek the Stars.name: 追寻群星 Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
在你的心眼中，你于宇宙间描绘出一条路径。若你身处协约世界的太空中，你会立刻知道应朝哪个方向旅行，才能抵达艾巴萨罗姆空间站上的星石。若你在协约星系之外，你会知道最近的漂流信标或星石所在的方向。

强化（7环） 你也可以改为知晓某个熟悉地点的方向，例如你曾造访过的世界或中途站。

In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Stumble.name: 踉跄 Stumble
Stumble.description:
一阵微重力爆发在目标周围引发震颤，将其拉向地面。目标必须尝试一次反射豁免。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，持续1轮。如果目标当时正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，它会向下坠落10英尺。

重度失败 目标倒地 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。如果目标当时正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，它会向下坠落20英尺。

强化（+1） 如果目标坠落，则失败时额外坠落5英尺，重度失败时额外坠落10英尺。

A burst of microgravity causes a tremor around the target, pulling it toward the ground. The target must attempt a Reflex save.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 10 feet downward.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 20 feet downward.

Heightened (+1) If the target falls, it falls an additional 5 feet on a failure and 10 feet on a critical failure.

Astronomical Ties.name: 天文纽带 Astronomical Ties
Astronomical Ties.description:
宁芙女王与某个特定的天体有着内在联系，例如赫利俄德女王对应的一颗超巨星。

只要女王身体健康，她的领地便会繁荣兴盛，并且她可以尝试以 5 级反制等级对会改变其物理性质的法术和仪式进行[[/r 1d20+21 #反制]]反制。

然而，如果宁芙女王受伤或身体欠佳，她所对应的天体也会随之衰弱：小行星偏离轨道摇摆，恒星变暗，黑洞的引力减弱。恢复宁芙女王的状态会让她的天体回归平衡。

A nymph queen is intrinsically tied to a specific celestial body, such as a supergiant star for a heliad queen.

As long as the queen is healthy, her territory thrives, and she can attempt to [[/r 1d20+21 #Counteract]] counteract spells and rituals that alter its physical properties with a counteract rank of 5.

If a nymph queen is injured or unhealthy, however, her celestial body also weakens: asteroids wobble out of orbit, stars dim, and the gravity of black holes diminishes. Restoring the nymph queen returns her celestial body to its equilibrium.

Debris Field.name: 碎片场 Debris Field
Debris Field.description:
触发 sterieid受到物理伤害

效果 岩石碎片从sterieid的身体上飞散而出，对所有邻近生物造成 @Damage[3d12[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:29|basic] 基础豁免），并使sterieid获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状况，直到其下个回合结束。

Trigger The sterieid takes physical damage

Effect Shards of rocky debris fly off the sterieid's body, dealing @Damage[3d12[bludgeoning]] damage to all adjacent creatures (@Check[reflex|dc:29|basic] save) and giving the sterieid the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition until the end of their next turn.

Icy Nimbus.name: 冰冷灵光 Icy Nimbus
Icy Nimbus.description:
20尺。立体翼蜥的身体散发出冰冷的寒气。进入该灵光或在其中开始其回合的生物会受到 @Damage[3d6[cold]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:29|basic] 豁免）；重创失败其豁免的生物还会因寒冷而变得迟缓，直到其下个回合开始前陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

20 feet. A sterieid's body radiates an icy chill. Creatures entering or starting their turns in the aura take @Damage[3d6[cold]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:29|basic] save); a creature that critically fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the start of its next turn as it grows sluggish from the cold.

Broadcast Allure.name: 广播魅惑 Broadcast Allure
Broadcast Allure.description:
宁芙女王会以魔法将她的影像叠加到行星范围内所有能够显示该影像的科技物品上，例如数据板或通讯装置。或者，她也可以将该影像发送到她所知晓的任意一个或多个通讯地址。

每个能够看见该影像的生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:29] ，否则其对她的态度将改善一级（若为严重失败，则改善两级）。

若宁芙女王对受影响的生物或其盟友采取敌对动作，这些生物的态度会恢复到先前的等级。

The nymph queen magically superimposes her image on all technological items capable of displaying it, such as datapads or comm units, within planetary range. Alternatively, she can send this image to any comm address or addresses that she knows.

Each creature that can see the image must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:29] or have their attitude toward her improve by one step (two steps on a critical failure).

Affected creatures' attitudes revert to their previous level if the nymph queen uses a hostile action against them or their allies.

Celestial Step.name: 天族步伐 Celestial Step
Celestial Step.description:
一位宁芙女王能够近乎瞬间地穿行于她的天体躯体。一位宁芙女王可以使用天族之步传送到她领地上或领地内的任何区域，遁入其表面并在她预定的目的地重新出现。

A nymph queen can traverse her celestial body near-instantaneously. A nymph queen can use Celestial Step to teleport to any area on or within her territory, vanishing into its surface and reemerging at her intended destination.

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
宁芙女王可以在其原本形态——看起来与其种类的典型宁芙非常相似——与任何小型或中型类人生物形态之间变形，通常会选择其自然形态的一个版本，并带有所选物种的外观。

Nymph queens can transform between their original form, which looks much like a typical nymph of their kind, and any Small or Medium humanoid form, typically choosing a version of their natural form with the appearance of the chosen species.

Fan Mail.name: 粉丝来信 Fan Mail
Fan Mail.description:
宁芙女王可以通过发送一段激励视频或短信来鼓舞一个具有智能的生物。只要该生物保留这条消息，并且与宁芙女王保持良好关系，他们在所有与艺术或表演相关的制作、表演和学识检定上都获得+1状态加值。

该生物可以用一个单动作的交互动作来播放或查看这条消息，以振奋精神。这样做可以使该生物对一个正在影响他们的单一情绪效应进行一次[[/r 1d20+21 #Counteract]]反制检定。

当宁芙女王的消息以这种方式被使用后，它随后就会变成普通的视频或短信。

A nymph queen can inspire a single intelligent creature by sending them a motivational video or text message. As long as the creature keeps the message saved and remains in good standing with the nymph queen, they gain a +1 status bonus to all Crafting, Performance, and Lore checks related to art or performance.

As a 1-action Interact action, the creature can play or view the message to bolster their spirits. Doing so allows the creature to attempt a [[/r 1d20+21 #Counteract]] counteract check against a single emotion effect affecting them.

When the nymph queen's message is used in this way, it becomes a mundane video or text afterward.

Sterieid Queen.publicNotes:
最大的那些小行星中，有些直径达数英里，是sterieid女王的家园。由于这些小行星更有可能具备某种大气层，sterieid女王也习惯于与其他居民共享自己的领地，通常只要她们自身和环境都得到尊重，她们并不介意。

宁芙是美丽的精类，外表如同具有精灵特征的人形生物。她们通常呈现为女性形态，但也存在各种性别与外在表现的宁芙。许多宁芙生活在行星上，充当天然池塘、森林、洞穴和悬崖地带的守护者；而另一些宁芙——通常被称为太空宁芙——则以与天体的关联而闻名。与她们那些居于行星上的同族一样，太空宁芙会保护自己所绑定的领地，防止其遭到开发利用或伤害。

作为艺术的爱好者，宁芙尤其友善地对待创作者；若有人提出要在故事、图画或歌曲中描绘一位宁芙，几乎必定能赢得她们的青睐——除非那位宁芙不喜欢最终成品，并因那件平庸之作冒犯了自己而迁怒于艺术家。视频播送和直播是较为合群的宁芙间流行的消遣，不论是为了展示她们偏远的环境，还是为表演寻找观众。有些宁芙会引诱电影摄制组到她们的领地取景拍摄，但有两个前提：第一，制作过程不能破坏环境；第二，宁芙本人必须在影片中获得一个显眼角色。

除非其领地受到威胁，大多数太空宁芙对凡人都很友好，或至少漠不关心，但她们记性极好。任何造访太空宁芙领地的人，最好都先调查那位宁芙怀有的怨恨、她过去与凡人的接触经历，或该地区最近发生的、可能影响她对靠近其家园之旅者看法的任何事件。

若一名凡人展现出恰当的态度与能力，例如保护某个恒星天体免于毁灭，或创作出格外优美的艺术作品，便可能吸引太空宁芙的注意。太空宁芙有时会主动向日曜使或秘术师提供导师服务，尽管她们很少会自行寻找学生。太空宁芙很少同时建立超过一段这样的关系，而且通常只会作出预期持续数十年乃至数百年的承诺，因此她们在选择门徒时极为挑剔。

The largest asteroids, some many miles across, are home to sterieid queens. As these asteroids more likely have a semblance of atmosphere, sterieid queens are accustomed to sharing their territory with other inhabitants and generally don't mind so long as they and the environment are treated with respect.

Nymphs are beautiful fey who appear as humanoids with elven features. They generally take female forms, but nymphs of all genders and presentations exist. While many nymphs live on planets and act as protectors of natural ponds, forests, caves, and cliffsides, other nymphs—often called space nymphs—are known for their association with celestial bodies. Like their planet-bound kin, space nymphs guard their bonded territories from exploitation or harm.

As admirers of the arts, nymphs are especially friendly toward creatives, and offering to depict a nymph in story, picture, or song is a sure way to win their favor—unless the nymph doesn't like the final result and lashes out at the artist for insulting them with a mediocre product. Vidcasting and livestreaming are popular pastimes among more sociable nymphs, whether to show off their remote environments or find audiences for performances. Some nymphs entice movie crews to film in their territories, with two provisos: first, that the production not damage the environment, and second, that the nymph receive a prominent role in the film.

Unless their territories are threatened, most space nymphs are friendly or indifferent to mortals, but they have long memories. Anyone visiting a space nymph's territory would be wise to research that nymph's grudges, past encounters with mortals, or any recent events in the area that might color the nymph's perspective of those traveling near their home.

A mortal who demonstrates the right attitude and abilities, such as by protecting a stellar body from destruction or creating an especially beautiful work of art, might draw a space nymph's attention. From time to time, space nymphs will offer their services as mentors to solarians or mystics, though they seldom seek pupils on their own. Space nymphs rarely enter into more than one such arrangement at a time and typically only make commitments that promise to last decades or centuries, so they're extremely selective in their choice of mentee.

Abysium Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).name: 深渊钢龙（上古，施法者） Abysium Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster)
Abysium Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).tokenName: 深渊矿龙（远古，施法者） Abysium Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster)

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术预备法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Arcane Spontaneous Spells.name: 奥术自发法术 Arcane Spontaneous Spells

Atomic Blast.name: 原子爆发 Atomic Blast
Atomic Blast.description:
你以魔法裂变一个原子，引发一场伴随放射性沉降物的爆炸。区域内所有生物受到 5d12 钝击伤害和 5d12 火焰伤害，并暴露于极端辐射之中；该辐射导致的辐射病，其 @Check[fortitude]{Fortitude DC} 使用你的法术施法 DC。此魔法辐射的潜伏期和发作频率均为 1 轮，且该区域会在 10 分钟内保持放射性。

大成功 目标不受初始伤害影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 分钟。

失败 目标受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 1 分钟。

大失败 同失败，且目标受到双倍伤害。

You magically split an atom, creating an explosion with radioactive fallout. All creatures in the area take 5d12 bludgeoning damage and 5d12 fire damage, and they're exposed to extreme radiation that uses your spellcasting DC as the @Check[fortitude]{Fortitude DC} for radiation sickness incurred by exposure to this radiation. The onset and frequency of this magical radiation is 1 round, and the area remains radioactive for 10 minutes.

Critical Success The target is unaffected by the initial damage.

Success The target takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure As failure, and the target takes double damage.

Earthquake.name: 地震术 Earthquake
Earthquake.description:
你震撼大地，将生物绊入裂谷，并且摧毁建筑。在特定环境中，GM可能会增加额外的效果。悬崖可能会崩塌，造成生物坠落，湖可能会由于其下方的裂隙而干涸，剩下一片流沙陷阱。

  • 震撼大地 地面成为困难地形，其上的生物在攻击骰，AC以及技能检定上承受-2环境减值。@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.09rtx50laDw68FGT]{Spell Effect: Earthquake (Shaking Ground)}
  • 裂隙 每个在地面上的生物必须在其回合开始时尝试一次反射豁免，以站稳脚步来避免坠落到脚下裂开的40尺深的缝隙中。这些裂隙是永久的，攀爬其侧面需要@Check[athletics|dc:15|traits:action:climb]检定。
  • 崩塌 建筑物和顶棚可能会崩塌。GM为每个建筑骰一次纯骰检定（坚固建筑@Check[flat|dc:16]，常规建筑和多数自然结构@Check[flat|dc:14]，粗劣建筑@Check[flat|dc:9]，GM均可按合适调整其高低）。崩塌对每个处于崩塌中的生物造成11d6钝击伤害，尝试一次基础反射豁免。除非它大成功，否则会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，并且如果大失败会坠入裂隙。

升阶（10环级） 你可以创造一个范围巨大的足以摧毁一个聚居地的地震。射程增加到半英里，范围为四分之一英里爆发。

Gravity Field.name: 重力场 Gravity Field
Gravity Field.description:
你将物质宇宙的法则扭转为己所用，使一个区域内的重力增强。区域内所有飞行中的生物下降40英尺。整个区域对飞行和攀爬生物而言是更高难度地形，对地面上的生物而言则是困难地形。任何被重力场拖拽到地面的生物都会受到钝击伤害，如同其曾经坠落一样。

该区域内的重力提高一个等级（例如，零重力变为低重力，低重力变为标准重力，标准重力变为高重力，而高重力变为极端重力）。

Bending the laws of the Universe to your will, you increase the forces of gravity in an area. All flying creatures in the area descend 40 feet. The entire area is greater difficult terrain for Flying and Climbing creatures, and difficult terrain for creatures on the ground. Any creature pulled to the ground by a gravity field takes bludgeoning damage as though it had fallen.

Gravity in the area increases by one step (for example, zero-g becomes low gravity, low gravity becomes standard, standard gravity becomes high gravity, and high gravity becomes extreme gravity).

Energy Aegis.name: 辟能圣盾 Energy Aegis
Energy Aegis.description:
你使用长效的强力能量护盾保护目标。目标获得对酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、音波、命能、以及虚能伤害的抗力5。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.4Lo2qb5PmavSsLNk]{法术效果：辟能圣盾}

升阶（9环级） 该抗力提升到10。

Wall of Steel.name: 钢铁之墙 Wall of Steel
Wall of Steel.description:
你塑造出一堵实心钢墙。你创造出一堵厚 4 英寸、最长可达 120 英尺、高 20 英尺的钢墙。你可以塑造这堵墙的路径，将墙体的每 5 英尺放置在方格之间的边界上。墙不必垂直竖立，因此你可以用它来形成一座桥或一组楼梯，例如。你必须在一片连续且开阔的空间中召唤这堵墙，使其边缘不会穿过任何生物或物体，否则该法术失效。

墙的每个 10 英尺 × 10 英尺区段具有 AC 10、硬度 18 和 60 生命值，并且免疫重击和精准伤害。墙体被摧毁的区段可以穿过，但由其产生的瓦砾属于困难地形。

升阶（+1） 墙体每个区段的生命值增加 15。

You shape a wall of solid steel. You create a 4-inch-thick wall of steel up to 120 feet long and 20 feet high. You can shape the wall's path, placing each 5 feet of the wall on the border between squares. The wall doesn't need to stand vertically, so you can use it to form a bridge or set of stairs, for example. You must conjure the wall in an unbroken open space so its edges don't pass through any creatures or objects, or the spell is lost.

Each 10-foot-by-10-foot section of the wall has AC 10, Hardness 18, and 60 Hit Points, and it's immune to critical hits and precision damage. A destroyed section of the wall can be moved through, but the rubble created from it is difficult terrain.

Heightened (+1) The Hit Points of each section of the wall increase by 15.

Rocket Dash.name: 火箭冲刺 Rocket Dash
Rocket Dash.description:
你从身后喷射出一枚火焰推进弹，向前猛冲。你沿直线移动，距离至多为你速度的两倍；你可以穿过被生物占据的空间，且此次移动不会触发反应。区域内的生物受到 6d12 火焰伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。若重度失败，该生物还会受到 2d6 持续性火焰伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 轮。你在分界线末端重新出现。

升阶（+2） 火焰伤害增加 2d12，且重度失败时的持续性火焰伤害增加 1d6。

You emit a rocket of flame from behind you and blast forward. You move in a straight line up to twice your Speed; you can move through spaces occupied by creatures, and the movement doesn't trigger reactions. Creatures in the area take 6d12 fire damage with a basic Reflex save. On a critical failure, a creature also takes 2d6 persistent fire damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round. You reappear at the end of the line.

Heightened (+2) The fire damage increases by 2d12, and the persistent fire damage on a critical failure increases by 1d6.

Slice Reality.name: 切裂现实 Slice Reality
Slice Reality.description:
你切开现实，形成一道汲取生命的熵之裂隙，呈一直线，20英尺高、120英尺长、2英寸厚。该裂隙提供掩护。裂隙对每个在其被创造时位于裂隙空间内、试图穿过裂隙，或在裂隙内结束其回合的生物造成7d8点虚空伤害，需进行一次基础反射豁免。在裂隙被创造时于此次豁免中成功的生物，会被推至其所选择一侧最近的空间。试图穿过裂隙的生物若在此次豁免中大失败，则无法穿过，并在裂隙旁结束其移动。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d8。

You slice through reality, forming a chasm of life-draining entropy in a straight line 20 feet high, 120 feet long, and 2 inches thick. The chasm provides cover. The chasm deals 7d8 void damage to each creature that's in the chasm's space when it's created, that attempts to pass through the chasm, or that ends its turn inside the chasm, with a basic Reflex save. A creature that succeeds at this save when the chasm is created is pushed to the nearest space on the side of its choice. Creatures trying to move through the chasm fail to do so if they critically fail the save, ending their movement next to the chasm.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Wall of Plasma.name: 等离子体墙 Wall of Plasma
Wall of Plasma.description:
你塑造出一道噼啪作响的等离子墙，能够灼烧穿过它的生物。你可以创造一道5英尺厚、呈直线、最长60英尺且高10英尺的等离子墙，或者一道5英尺厚、半径10英尺且同样高度的环形等离子墙。无论是哪种形态，墙体都竖直矗立；如果你愿意，墙的长度或高度都可以更短。墙两侧的所有事物对另一侧的生物而言都处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态。任何穿过这道墙的生物，或在其回合开始时占据墙体区域的生物，都会受到4d6点火焰伤害和2d6点持续电击伤害。

强化（+1） 持续电击伤害增加1d6。

You shape a wall of crackling plasma that burns creatures passing through it. You create either a 5-foot-thick wall of plasma in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high, or a 5-foot-thick, 10-foot-radius ring of plasma with the same height. The wall stands vertically in either form; if you wish, the wall can be of a shorter length or height. Everything on each side of the wall is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from creatures on the opposite side. Any creature that crosses the wall or is occupying the wall's area at the start of its turn takes 4d6 fire damage and 2d6 persistent electricity damage.

Heightened (+1) The persistent electricity damage increases by 1d6.

X-Ray Vision.name: X射线视觉 X-Ray Vision
X-Ray Vision.description:
你强化自身，使你能够看穿60英尺内的大多数材料和墙壁。你的视线会被2英尺厚的木材或塑料、1英尺厚的石头、2英寸厚的普通金属、任意厚度的铅或任何星铁阻挡，而且你只能以黑白视物。

You empower yourself to see through most materials and walls within 60 feet. Your sight is blocked by 2 feet of wood or plastic, 1 foot of stone, 2 inches of common metal, or any amount of lead or any starmetal, and you can only see in black and white.

Control Machine.name: 控制机械 Control Machine
Control Machine.description:
你控制一个科技生物或物体，并以心灵感应向其下达命令。如果你向一个有智能的目标下达明显自我毁灭的命令，则该目标不会行动，直到你下达新的命令为止。其效果取决于它的意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}，因为它在抵抗你的命令。

失败 你控制目标。它获得受控状态，但它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次意志豁免。若成功，则该法术结束。

大失败 如失败，但只有当目标具有智能且你向其下达了违背其天性的新的命令时，它才会获得新的豁免，例如杀死它的盟友。

升阶（10环） 持续时间不限。

You take control of a technological creature or object and command it telepathically. If you issue an obviously self-destructive order to a sapient target, the target doesn't act until you issue a new order. The effect depends on its Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} as it fights off your commands.

Failure You control the target. It gains the controlled condition, but it can attempt a Will save at the end of each of its turns. On a success, the spell ends.

Critical Failure As a failure, but the target receives a new save only if it's sapient and you give it a new order that's against its nature, such as killing its allies.

Heightened (10th) The duration is unlimited.

Overload Systems.name: 系统过载 Overload Systems
Overload Systems.description:
你向该区域倾泻一波电气干扰。你对区域内的生物造成 7d8 点电击伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试进行一次反射豁免。

严重成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全部伤害，且其任何带有科技特征的物品变为故障 1，持续 1 分钟或直到该状态被移除。

严重失败 目标受到双倍伤害，且其任何带有科技特征的物品变为故障 2，持续 1 分钟或直到该状态被移除。

强化（+1） 伤害提高 1d8。

You flood the area with a wave of electrical interference. You deal 7d8 electricity damage to creatures in the area. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 1 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 2 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Toxic Cloud.name: 毒云术 Toxic Cloud
Toxic Cloud.description:
你创造一团有毒云雾。该效果如同@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{迷雾术 Mist}一般，除了该区域会每轮远离你10尺。在该区域中开始回合的生物承受6d8毒素伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d8。

Confusion.name: 困惑术 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你使用奇怪的能量波动扰乱了目标的思维，令其随机行动。法术效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标胡言乱语，并且获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑 Confused}1分钟。在其每个回合结束，它能尝试一次新豁免来结束困惑术。

大失败 目标困惑1分钟，并且没有提前结束的豁免。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Fire Shield (Constant).name: 火焰护盾（恒常） Fire Shield (Constant)
Fire Shield (Constant).description:
你创造出1面由火焰构成的盾牌悬停在空中。只要盾牌存在，它的热量就会让你获得5点寒冷抗力，使你免疫环境中的寒以及严寒。你能如同使用普通盾牌一般对火焰护盾使用举起盾牌动作并使得AC获得+1环境加值。你也能使用火焰护盾进行盾牌格挡反应动作，它具有10点硬度、免疫火焰、以及40点生命值（不具有破损阈值），其硬度在对抗具有水特征的效果时减半。若你盾牌格挡一次近战攻击，且该次攻击是非武装攻击或者由相邻攻击者作出的话，攻击者承受2d6点火焰伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.1RsScTvNdGD9zGWe]{法术效果：火焰护盾}

升阶（+2） 寒冷抗力增加5点，生命值增加10点，火焰伤害增加1d6点。

Translocate.name: 次元移位 Translocate
Translocate.description:
你立即将自身以及自己正在穿戴和持有的物品从当前空间转移走，移动至法术射程内你能看到的未被占据的空间。如果这将会带着其他生物与你一同移动——即便你把该生物放置在异次元容器中——你就会失去该法术。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至1英里。你不需要看到目的地，只要你曾经去过目的地，并且知晓该地点与你相对的位置以及距离即可。之后你会在1小时内临时免疫该法术。

Unfettered Movement.name: 行动无碍 Unfettered Movement
Unfettered Movement.description:
你驱散可能影响一个生物的阻碍。当处于该法术效果中时，法术目标忽视会赋予其速度环境减值的效果。当法术目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}一个令其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，它自动成功，除非该效果是魔法性的，并且其环级比行动无碍更高。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement}

Vapor Form.name: 汽化形体 Vapor Form
Vapor Form.description:
目标变化成气体形态。在此状态下，目标形态不定。它失去所有AC上的物品加值，以及从护甲得到的所有其他效果和加值，并且使用其熟练度调整值用于无武装防御。它对物理伤害获得抗力8，并且免疫精准伤害。它无法施放法术，启动物品，或者使用具有攻击或者操作特征的动作。它获得10尺飞行速度，并且可以钻过超小型的裂隙。目标可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.sILRkGTwoBywy0BU]{法术效果：汽化形体}

Blindness.name: 目盲术 Blindness
Blindness.description:
你令目标目盲。法术效果由目标的强韧豁免决定。目标会暂时免疫1分钟。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标直到其下个回合结束前 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded}。

失败 目标目盲1分钟。

大失败 目标永久目盲。

Fireball.name: 火球术 Fireball
Fireball.description:
在你指定的位置爆发出咆哮的烈焰，造成6d6火焰伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法强化了目标，令其行动迅速。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}状态，并且每轮可以使用该额外动作以打击或者行走。

升阶（7环级） 你能以至多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
Slow.description:
你令目标周围的时间膨胀，令其行动缓慢。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1} ，持续1轮。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 2}，持续1分钟。

升阶（6环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Mist.name: 迷雾术 Mist
Mist.description: 你唤来一团迷雾。在雾中的所有生物获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}，并且在雾外的所有生物对其内的生物获得隐蔽。你可以解消这团云雾。

See the Unseen.name: 识破无形 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的目光穿透了幻术，发现了隐形生物和魂灵。你能看到@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}生物，就如同它们并未隐形一般，然而它们的体征仍然很模糊，使得它们具有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}并且难以被识别。你还能看到虚体生物，比如幽灵，你能通过透视物体的内部来看到虚体生物，在物体表面下10尺内的此类生物会显现为经过分层的模糊轮廓。对细节更强的洞察力还让你在作出不相信幻术的检定时，获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环级） 持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：识破无形}

Sound Body.name: 身健体康 Sound Body
Sound Body.description:
你释放出一股治疗能量的激涌，以修复目标的身体。尝试反制你所选择的一个效果，该效果使目标陷入以下状态之一：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{失聪}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱}，或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心}。如果你未能反制该效果，但若其反制环阶低 2 阶你本会成功，则改为压制该效果，直到你下个回合开始。该效果被压制期间，其持续时间不会流逝。

该法术无法反制或压制诅咒、疾病，或属于目标正常状态一部分的状态。

强化（4环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{吸竭} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓}加入状态列表。

强化（8环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑}加入状态列表。

You send a surge of healing energy to restore the target's body. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}. If you didn't counteract the effect, but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed.

This spell can't counteract or suppress curses, diseases, or conditions that are part of the target's normal state.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (8th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions.

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你将注意力集中在目标上，在魔法全息影像显示信息的同时收集数据。施法完成时，你会获知关于目标的生物特征信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况，以及其他基本生理信息。你，或任何你告知了这项分析的人，在对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{伪装}、对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势}，以及对其进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}的检定时，获得+1状态加值。如果目标是虚幻的，或处于幻术魔法的影响之下，只有当该效果的环阶低于你的分析目标法术的环阶时，你才会察觉到这一点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{法术效果：分析目标}

升阶（3环） 状态加值提升为+2，且你最多可以将10个生物作为目标。

升阶（6环） 状态加值提升为+3，且你可以将任意数量的生物作为目标。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Caustic Blast.name: 酸液喷溅 Caustic Blast
Caustic Blast.description:
你发射一团立即爆发的酸液，泼溅到周围生物上。区域中的生物承受1d8酸蚀伤害，这有一次基础反射豁免；在大失败时，该生物也会承受@Damage[(1+floor((@item.rank -1)/2))[persistent,acid]]伤害。

升阶（+2） 该初始伤害增加1d8，并且持续伤害增加1。

Command.name: 命令术 Command
Command.description:
你喊出一句难以被忽视的命令。你可以命令目标接近你，逃离你（如同获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing}状态），扔下持有物，俯卧@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，或者站立在原地。它不能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.A72nHGUtNXgY5Ey9]{延后 Delay}或者使用任何反应动作，直到它服从你的命令为止。法术效果基于目标的意志豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 作为该生物下个回合的第一个动作，其必须用一个单动作来完成你的命令。

大失败 目标必须使用其下个回合的全部动作来完成你的命令。

升阶（5环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Grease.name: 油腻术 Grease
Grease.description:
你创造一片油，选择区域或是目标。

  • 区域 [4个连续的5尺方格] 区域中的所有坚实地面覆盖上一层油。在油滑的表面上站立的生物必须尝试成功通过一次对抗你法术DC的反射或者特技检定，否则@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。在法术持续时间内，使用动作移动到油滑表面上的生物必须尝试一次反射豁免或者特技检定来@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance}。快步或者爬行的生物无需尝试检定或者豁免。
  • 目标 [一个1负载或者更低的物体] 如果你对无主物品施放该法术，任何尝试捡起该物体的人必须成功尝试一次对抗你法术DC的特技检定或者反射豁免才能如此做。如果你以被持有的物品为目标，拥有该物品的生物必须尝试一次特技检定或者反射豁免。失败时，持握者或者持用者在使用该物体的所有检定上承受-2环境减值；在大失败时，持握者或者持用者会掉落该物品。该物品会掉落在一个由GM选择的相邻方格内。如果你对一个穿戴物品施放该法术，穿戴者在对抗擒拿他的强韧豁免上获得+2环境加值。

Ignition.name: 引火术 Ignition
Ignition.description:
你打个响指并指向一个目标，后者便开始燃烧。作出一次法术攻击检定对抗目标的AC，命中时造成2d4点火焰伤害。若目标位于你的近战触及范围内，你能选择用火焰进行一次近战法术攻击以取代远程法术攻击，这会使得法术的所有伤害骰提升至d6骰子。

大成功 目标承受双倍伤害以及1d4点持续火焰伤害。

成功 目标承受全额伤害。

升阶（+1） 起始伤害增加1d4点，重击的持续火焰伤害增加1d4点。

@Damage[(@item.rank)d4[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害}

@Damage[(@item.rank)d6[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害（近战）}

Measure.name: 测量 Measure
Measure.description:
你会得知你在区域内能够观察到的生物与物体的大致尺寸（长度、宽度、深度、高度和重量）。如果某个物体或生物延伸到了区域之外，你只能得知区域内部分的尺寸，而无法得知你观察不到的部分。例如，你无法判断一堵你只能观察到单侧的墙的厚度或重量，也无法判断超出该法术范围的水体深度。每次你维持该法术时，你会得知区域内一个生物或物体的精确尺寸，包括可能表明结构弱点的不精确之处或异常。受到魔法改变的目标向你提供的信息，会反映你所观察到的样子，而非准确尺寸。

升阶（+1） 将测量的范围延长100尺。

You learn the approximate measurements (length, width, depth, height, and weight) of creatures and objects you can observe in the area. If an object or creature extends out of the area, you learn only the measurements within the area, but nothing about what you can't observe. For example, you can't determine the thickness or weight of a wall you can observe only one side of, or the depth of water that extends beyond the spell's range. Each time you Sustain the spell, you learn the exact measurements of one creature or object in the area, including imprecisions or anomalies that might indicate structural weakness. Magically altered targets give you information that reflects what you observe rather than accurate measurements.

Heightened (+1) Extend the range of measure by 100 feet.

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法帮你完成杂物。只要你维持该法术，你就可以产生简单的魔法效果。每当你维持该法术时，你可以选择四个选项中的一个。

  • 烹饪 为1磅非活物材料冷却，加热，或者调味。
  • 抬起 将一件轻负载或者更低的无主物品缓慢抬离地面。
  • 创造 创造一个负载可忽略的临时物体，它由凝结的魔法物质组成。该物体看起来粗糙且非常脆弱——它无法被用做工具，武器，法器或法术开销。
  • 整理 为一件轻负载或者更低的物体染色，清洁，或者弄脏它。你可以通过10轮专注来影响一件1负载的物体，对于更大的物体为每负载1分钟。

魔法伎俩无法造成伤害或者负面效果。对一件物体的任何改变（在上述内容之外的）只会在你仍维持该法术时持续。

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，拓展神智，以感受魔法灵光。当你完成施法后，你得知该物品是否具有魔法。你或者你共有了灵光情报的人在对该物品@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic}时获得+2环境加值。如果该物体是幻象，仅当该效果的环级低于你的阅读灵光环级时你才能发现此事实。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.J6OhRNSN23KzOPRL]{Spell Effect: Read Aura}

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多10个物体为目标。

升阶（8环级） 你能以任意数量物体为目标。

Sleep.name: 睡眠术 Sleep
Sleep.description:
区域中的每个生物垂头歪脑昏昏欲睡。由于该法术@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}的生物不会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，也不会松开其持握的东西。该法术不会令生物无法通过察觉醒来，并因此限制其在战斗中的能力。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在察觉检定上承受-1状态减值，持续1轮。

失败 该生物失去意识。如果它在1分钟后仍然失去意识，它自动醒来。

大失败 该生物失去意识。如果它在1小时候仍然失去意识，它自动醒来。

升阶（4环级） 目标在失败时失去意识1轮，在大失败时失去意识1分钟。它们会倒地，并松开其持握的东西，并且它们无法尝试察觉检定以醒来。当持续时间结束时，该生物会正常睡着，而不是自动醒来。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Radioactive Aura.name: 放射性灵气 Radioactive Aura
Radioactive Aura.description:
90英尺。进入放射性灵光的生物必须尝试进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:37] 豁免，对抗难以置信的辐射病。随后，其会暂时免疫放射性灵光 10 分钟。

90 feet. A creature that enters the radioactive aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:37] save against incredible radiation sickness. It's then temporarily immune to radioactive aura for 10 minutes.

Abysium Maelstrom.name: 深渊旋风石 Abysium Maelstrom
Abysium Maelstrom.description:
如果巨龙接下来使用的动作是辐射吐息，则辐射会被奥术能量过载强化。每个对辐射吐息豁免失败的生物都会受到 @Damage[4d6[persistent,force]] 伤害，因为过载的辐射会从其体内将其撕裂。每个重度失败其豁免的生物在承受此持续力场伤害期间还会处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

If the next action the dragon uses is Radiation Breath, the radiation becomes supercharged with arcane power. Each creature that fails its save against Radiation Breath takes @Damage[4d6[persistent,force]] damage as the supercharged radiation tears it apart from within. Each creature that critically fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} as long as it has this persistent force damage.

Control Radiation.name: 操控辐射 Control Radiation
Control Radiation.description:
阿比锡姆龙对其体内不断增长的放射性能量拥有终极掌控。每当阿比锡姆龙造成火焰或毒素伤害时，它们都可以选择该伤害是否为魔法伤害，并且可以将任意数量的火焰伤害转化为毒素伤害（或将任意数量的毒素伤害转化为火焰伤害）。

Abysium dragons have ultimate control over the radioactive energy that grows within their bodies. Any time an abysium dragon deals fire or poison damage, they can choose whether that damage is magical, and they can change any amount of the fire damage to poison (or any amount of poison damage to fire).

Radiation Breath.name: 辐射吐息 Radiation Breath
Radiation Breath.description:
巨龙喷吐出一阵腐蚀性的过热气体爆风，造成 @Damage[10d6[fire],5d12[persistent,poison]|options:area-damage] 伤害，范围为 @Template[type:cone|distance:60]（@Check[fortitude|dc:40|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免）。它们在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Radiation Breath]]{1d4 轮}内不能再次使用辐射吐息。

The dragon breathes a blast of caustic superheated gas that deals @Damage[10d6[fire],5d12[persistent,poison]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:60] (@Check[fortitude|dc:40|basic|options:area-effect] save). They can't use Radiation Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Radiation Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Recharge with Radiation.name: 以辐射充能 Recharge with Radiation
Recharge with Radiation.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 该龙位于一个非任何深渊铋龙的强烈辐射源60英尺内

效果 该龙汲取该辐射源的力量，恢复其所有已消耗的自发法术位。

Frequency once per day

Requirements The dragon is within 60 feet of a source of incredible radiation other than any abysium dragon

Effect The dragon draws on the source of radiation, regaining all their expended spontaneous spell slots.

Abysium Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).publicNotes:
深渊钢龙同时将辐射视为毁灭之力与能量来源，并与同名的放射性星铁——深渊钢——紧密相连。这些龙会在体内生长出纯净深渊钢的沉积物，随着年龄增长而变得愈发具有放射性，进而导致攻击性、躁动，甚至孤独感，因为几乎没有多少生物能在一头年迈的深渊钢龙身边长久存活。深渊钢龙经常投身于义体改造与武器制造之类的追求（以利用它们天生的能量源），以及机器人建造（让它们陪伴自己）。这项工作驱使深渊钢龙去寻找可用于制造的坚固、耐辐射材料，它们也常常一连花上数年时间，在小型卫星和小行星上四处搜寻珍贵材料。

Drawing on radiation as both a force of destruction and a source of energy, abysium dragons are tied to the radioactive starmetal of the same name. These dragons grow deposits of pure abysium in their bodies, becoming more radioactive as they age, causing aggression, agitation, and even loneliness since not many creatures can long survive the company of an aging abysium dragon. Abysium dragons frequently turn to pursuits such as augmentation and weapon crafting (to take advantage of their innate power source) and the construction of robots (to keep them company). This work drives abysium dragons to seek out sturdy, radiation-resistant materials they can use for crafting, and they often spend years at a time scouring small moons and asteroids in search of precious materials.
Abysium Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).allSaves: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Emissar Angel.name: 使灵天使 Emissar Angel

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣天生法术 Divine Innate Spells

Detect Thoughts.name: 侦测思想 Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
你感知到周围有思维生物的存在。你能探测到具有智力调整值为 –3 或更高的清醒生物的思想存在与否。你可以选择忽略你所熟悉生物的思想，以免它们干扰你对其他思想的探测。该法术可以穿透某些屏障，但 3 英尺厚的泥土或木材、1 英尺厚的石头、1 英寸厚的金属、一层薄铅片，或任何力场屏障都会阻挡它。免疫心灵效果的生物也免疫此法术的探测。

升阶（4环） 你能探测到具有思维的心智数量，以及这些生物是否具有心灵感应。具有心灵感应的生物，其思想比不具有心灵感应的生物更响亮，并且在 GM 的裁定下，它们可能能够察觉你的侵入。

You sense the presence of thinking creatures around you. You detect the presence or absence of thoughts from conscious creatures that have Intelligence modifiers of –3 or higher. You can choose to ignore the thoughts of creatures you're familiar with so they don't interfere with your detection of other thoughts. The spell can penetrate some barriers, but 3 feet of dirt or wood, 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of metal, a thin sheet of lead, or any force barrier blocks it. Creatures who are immune to mental effects are immune to detection by this spell.

Heightened (4th) You detect the number of thinking minds and whether or not the creatures are telepathic. Creatures with telepathy have louder thoughts than creatures who don't have telepathy and might be able to sense your intrusion, at the GM's discretion.

Doom Scroll.name: 末日卷轴 Doom Scroll
Doom Scroll.description:
你以魔法将可怕的消息广播到附近的设备、全息投影仪、屏幕以及其他显示装置上（包括护甲上的通讯装置）。区域内能够看到一个或多个显示装置的生物必须尝试进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物被显示装置 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{吸引}。

失败 该生物被显示装置吸引，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}（即使吸引效果结束也是如此）。

大失败 该生物被显示装置吸引，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 3}，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{厄运 1}（即使吸引效果结束也是如此）。

You magically broadcast grim news onto nearby devices, holo projectors, screens, and other displays (including comm units on armor). Creatures in the area who can see one or more displays must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the display.

Failure The creature is fascinated by the display and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (even if the fascination ends).

Critical Failure The creature is fascinated by the display, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} (even if the fascination ends).

Vibe Check.name: 氛围检查 Vibe Check
Vibe Check.description:
你通过将一种强烈情绪以心灵感应投射进一个生物的心智中，来共享一种情绪。目标必须进行一次意志豁免。若失败，目标会体验你所选择的以下情绪之一，但如果你选择愤怒或喜悦，则该法术获得失能特征。

  • 愤怒 在其下一回合，目标将其第一个动作用于攻击最近的生物，即使那是其盟友。
  • 喜悦 目标不能进行任何敌对动作。
  • 恐惧 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。
  • 悲伤 目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}，并突然哭了起来。

强化（4环） 该法术影响20尺爆发范围内的所有生物。每个生物都必须受到相同情绪的影响。

You share a mood by psychically projecting an intense emotion into a creature's mind. The target attempts a Will save. On a failure, the target experiences your choice of the following emotions, but if you pick anger or joy this spell gains the incapacitation trait.

  • Anger On its next turn, the target spends its first action to attack the nearest creature, even if it's an ally.
  • Joy The target can't take any hostile actions.
  • Fear The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.
  • Sorrow The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and bursts into tears.

Heightened (4th) The spell affects all creatures in a 20-foot burst. Each creature must be affected by the same emotion.

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你专注于目标，在魔法全息影像显示信息的同时收集数据。施法完成后，你会获知关于目标的生物特征信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况以及其他基础生理信息。你或任何你告知分析结果的人，在对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{伪装}、对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}，以及对其进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定时，获得+1状态加值。如果目标是虚幻之物，或处于幻术魔法效果之下，只有当该效果的阶级低于你的分析目标法术阶级时，你才能察觉到这一点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{法术效果：分析目标}

强化（3环） 状态加值提高至+2，且你最多可以将10个生物作为目标。

强化（6环） 状态加值提高至+3，且你可以将任意数量的生物作为目标。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Angelic Messenger.name: 天界信使 Angelic Messenger
Angelic Messenger.description:
你把自身传送至天界位面或者宇宙中中可以找到你的主人的信徒的世界里。你的等级不能高于天界信使的法术环级的两倍。

大成功 同成功，不过即便你之前从未到访过该位面或世界，也可以出现在天界信使的正确预定目标面前。

成功 你抵达目标位面或世界，但前提是你到访过该位面或世界；若你之前从未到访过该位面或世界，则会抵达天界信使的正确预定目标周围[[/r 10d10 #Miles Off]]英里内的随机地点。

失败 你未能成功旅行。

大失败 你意外旅行到了错误的位面，且很可能是危险的位面。

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导命能，以治疗活物或者伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿活物 ，你回复这个数量的生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成1d8命能伤害，并且它可以进行基础强韧豁免。你在施放该法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标，范围，区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 （专注） 该法术的射程为30尺。如果你在治疗一个活物，回复的生命值增加8。

3 （专注） 你在@Template[emanation|distance:30]内释放命能。这会以区域中所有活物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或者伤害的量增加1d8，两个动作版本的额外治疗增加8。

Message.name: 传讯术 Message
Message.description:
你无声地念出言语，这段言语会直接送到目标耳中，而不是从你的嘴中念出。其他人听起来顶多是你与它们正常说话，但法术目标会如同正站在你身边一般听到你的言语。目标可以通过一个反应动作做出一段简要回应，或者根据其意愿，也可以通过其下个回合的自由动作来回应，但它如此做时必须能看见你，并且在射程内。如果它做出回应，它的回应会直接送达你的耳中，如同最初的信息一般。

升阶（3环级） 法术的射程增加到500尺。

Motivating Ringtone.name: 激励铃声 Motivating Ringtone
Motivating Ringtone.description:
你使目标通讯器播放一首由宇宙谱写、专属于其拥有者的个人主题铃声。当你施放此法术时，目标通讯器的拥有者恢复 1d8+4 点生命值，并在持续时间内于该通讯器持续播放铃声期间，所有速度获得 +5 尺状态加值，且对抗恐惧效应的豁免获得 +1 状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.NmhqKZyMgQSHbyHj]{法术效果：激励铃声}

升阶（+1） 治疗量增加 1d8+4。

You cause the target comm unit to play a cosmically composed personal theme song specific to its owner. The creature who owns the target comm unit regains 1d8+4 Hit Points when you Cast the Spell, a +5-foot status bonus to all Speeds, and a +1 status bonus to saves against fear effects for the duration as long as the comm unit continues to play the ringtone.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.NmhqKZyMgQSHbyHj]{Spell Effect: Motivating Ringtone}

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d8+4.

Reorient.name: 重新定向 Reorient
Reorient.description:
你运用生命能量与指压的结合，帮助目标重新站稳脚跟。若目标具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态，则该状态消失。直到你下个回合开始前，目标对措手不及状态免疫，即使该状态本会因情境而施加，例如被夹击或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。随后，目标在 10 分钟内对重新定向免疫。

Applying a combination of vital energy and acupressure, you help the target regain its footing. The target loses the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} condition if it has it. The target becomes immune to the off-guard condition until the start of your next turn, even if the condition would be circumstantially applied, such as by being flanked or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. The target is then immune to reorient for 10 minutes.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Mental.name: 对抗精神效果的所有豁免检定获得 +1 状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Mental

Encouraging Hope.name: 鼓舞希望 Encouraging Hope
Encouraging Hope.description:
30尺。位于天使灵光内的盟友对抗情感和精神效应的所有豁免检定获得+1状态加值。区域内的敌人对抗情感和精神效应的所有豁免检定承受–1状态减值。

30 feet. Allies within the angel's aura gain a +1 status bonus to all saves against emotion and mental effects. Enemies in the area take a –1 status penalty to all saves against emotion and mental effects.

Morale Boost.name: 士气鼓舞 Morale Boost
Morale Boost.description:
使者天使督促其盟友为事业加紧行动。直到使者天使下个回合开始前，使者天使及其100尺内所有能够感知到该天使的盟友，其速度获得+5尺状态加值。

The emissar angel urges their allies to hustle for the cause. Until the beginning of the emissar's next turn, the emissar and their allies within 100 feet that can sense the angel gain a +5-foot status bonus to their Speeds.

Spin Doctor.name: 旋转医生 Spin Doctor
Spin Doctor.description:
使者命令30英尺内的一名盟友无视一个有害效果并继续战斗。目标获得2d10临时生命值，持续1分钟，并在接下来的[[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}内压制当前影响其的一项状态，从以下列表中选择：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑}、恐慌，或愚钝。此后，目标在1小时内暂时免疫“Spin Doctor”。

The emissar commands an ally within 30 feet to ignore a harmful effect and keep fighting. The target gains 2d10 temporary Hit Points for 1 minute and suppresses one condition that's currently affecting it for the next [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}, chosen from the following list: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}, frightened, or stupefied. The target is then temporarily immune to Spin Doctor for 1 hour.

Emissar Angel.publicNotes:
使宣使，或称宣传天使，是激进希望的神圣化身，也是天族对信息战的回应。一些使宣使源自革命领袖或名人的圣洁灵魂，他们生前利用自己的平台帮助他人，并在死后被转化为天族。另一些则会从某场运动或某种理念所凝聚的信仰与愿望中自发形成。

使宣使天使扮演着天族舆论操盘手和政治组织者的角色，激励盟友团结起来，即便败局似乎已不可避免，也要继续朝着目标奋进。使宣使常常支持那些与自身信念和目标一致的凡人事业；尽管他们总是希望用鼓舞人心的演讲或激进善举来打动人心，但使宣使也并不畏惧为自己的信念而战——无论要付出怎样的代价。战斗一结束，他们的首要任务就是照料盟友，并拯救任何可能被说服加入事业的敌人。虽然他们的盟友通常欣赏他们不可动摇的希望与乐观态度，但他们的对手却憎恨那些可被视作使宣使有毒正能量与安慰性谎言的东西。

尽管现代的许多天使都是由宇宙各处的凡人灵魂升华而来，这些天族存在却是整个宇宙中最早出现的生物之一。作为诸神的战士与信使，他们对自己的使命绝对忠诚，无论那是毁灭邪恶，还是将某位神祇的讯息传播至整个银河。

Emissars, or propaganda angels, are a divine embodiment of radical hope and the celestial answer to information warfare. Some emissars spring from the sainted souls of revolutionary leaders or celebrities who used their platforms to help people in life, having been transformed into a celestial in their afterlife. Others spontaneously form out of the condensed faith and desires of a movement or ideal.

Emissar angels take on the role of celestial spin doctors and political organizers, inspiring their allies to rally together and keep pushing toward a goal even when defeat seems inevitable. Emissars often support mortal causes that align with their own beliefs and goals, and while they always hope to change hearts with an inspiring speech or an act of radical kindness, emissars aren't afraid to fight for what they believe in—no matter the cost to themselves. As soon as a battle ends, their first priority is caring for their allies and saving any enemies who might be swayed to join the cause. While their allies usually appreciate their unshakable hope and upbeat attitude, their opponents resent what can be construed as the emissars' toxic positivity and comforting lies.

While many angels in modern times ascended from mortal souls across the cosmos, these celestial beings were among the first creatures to exist in all the cosmos. Warriors and messengers of the gods, they're utterly devoted to their cause, whether that be destroying evil or spreading a deity's message across the galaxy.
Emissar Angel.allSaves: +1 status bonus vs. emotion and mental

Oscriss.name: 奥斯克里斯 Oscriss

Occult Innate Spells.name: 天生异能法术 Occult Innate Spells

Event Horizon.name: 事件视界 Event Horizon
Event Horizon.description:
你释放出一个超大质量黑洞的力量。区域内所有生物受到 6d10 钝击伤害和 6d10 虚空伤害。事件视界无视区域内生物对钝击伤害的至多 10 点抗性，以及它们对虚空伤害的至多 10 点抗性。每个生物都要进行一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并且直到其下个回合结束前处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，直到其下个回合结束前处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 3}，并且处于迟缓 1 持续 1 分钟。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，直到其下个回合结束前处于迟缓 3，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 2} 持续 1 分钟。

You unleash the power of a supermassive black hole. All creatures in the area take 6d10 bludgeoning and 6d10 void damage. Event horizon ignores up to 10 resistance creatures in the area have to bludgeoning, and up to 10 resistance they have to void. Each creature attempts a Reflex save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of its next turn.

Failure The creature takes full damage, is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 3} until the end of its next turn, and slowed 1 for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is slowed 3 until the end of its next turn, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for 1 minute.

Slice Reality.name: 切裂现实 Slice Reality
Slice Reality.description:
你切开现实，形成一道汲取生命的熵之裂隙，呈一直线，高20英尺、长120英尺、厚2英寸。该裂隙提供掩护。裂隙对每个在其被创造时处于裂隙空间内、试图穿过裂隙，或在裂隙内结束其回合的生物造成7d8虚空伤害，进行一次基础反射豁免。在裂隙被创造时于此次豁免中成功的生物被推至其所选择一侧最近的空间。试图穿过裂隙的生物若在该豁免中大失败，则无法通过，并在裂隙旁结束其移动。

强化（+1） 伤害增加1d8。

You slice through reality, forming a chasm of life-draining entropy in a straight line 20 feet high, 120 feet long, and 2 inches thick. The chasm provides cover. The chasm deals 7d8 void damage to each creature that's in the chasm's space when it's created, that attempts to pass through the chasm, or that ends its turn inside the chasm, with a basic Reflex save. A creature that succeeds at this save when the chasm is created is pushed to the nearest space on the side of its choice. Creatures trying to move through the chasm fail to do so if they critically fail the save, ending their movement next to the chasm.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Slice Reality (At Will).name: 切裂现实（随意） Slice Reality (At Will)
Slice Reality (At Will).description:
你切开现实，形成一道由汲取生命的熵构成的裂隙，呈一直线，高20英尺、长120英尺、厚2英寸。该裂隙提供掩护。裂隙对每个在其创造时位于裂隙空间内、试图穿过裂隙，或在裂隙内结束其回合的生物造成7d8虚空伤害，进行一次基础反射豁免。在裂隙被创造时于此次豁免成功的生物会被推至其所选一侧最近的空间。试图穿过裂隙的生物若在此次豁免中大失败，则无法穿过，并在裂隙旁结束其移动。

强化（+1） 伤害增加1d8。

You slice through reality, forming a chasm of life-draining entropy in a straight line 20 feet high, 120 feet long, and 2 inches thick. The chasm provides cover. The chasm deals 7d8 void damage to each creature that's in the chasm's space when it's created, that attempts to pass through the chasm, or that ends its turn inside the chasm, with a basic Reflex save. A creature that succeeds at this save when the chasm is created is pushed to the nearest space on the side of its choice. Creatures trying to move through the chasm fail to do so if they critically fail the save, ending their movement next to the chasm.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Truesight (Constant).name: 真实视觉（恒常） Truesight (Constant)
Truesight (Constant).description: 你可以看见60尺内的事物的本来面貌。GM秘密骰反制检定，对抗区域中的所有幻术或者变形效果，但这只会决定你是否能看破它（例如，如果该检定成功对抗了一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的本来形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

Translocate (At Will).name: 传送（随意） Translocate (At Will)
Translocate (At Will).description:
你立即将自身以及自己正在穿戴和持有的物品从当前空间转移走，移动至法术射程内你能看到的未被占据的空间。如果这将会带着其他生物与你一同移动——即便你把该生物放置在异次元容器中——你就会失去该法术。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至1英里。你不需要看到目的地，只要你曾经去过目的地，并且知晓该地点与你相对的位置以及距离即可。之后你会在1小时内临时免疫该法术。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Transposition.name: 换位 Transposition
Transposition.description:
触发条件 生物在距离欧斯克里斯15尺内进行任意移动动作

效果 欧斯克里斯传送至30尺内一个未被占据的空间。

Trigger A creature takes any move action within 15 feet of the oscriss

Effect The oscriss teleports into an unoccupied space within 30 feet.

Two-Dimensional Thinking.name: 二维思维 Two-Dimensional Thinking
Two-Dimensional Thinking.description:
奥斯克里斯被设计用于对抗二维敌人。如果超过一个敌人处于奥斯克里斯的触及范围内，则无论其实际位置如何，他们都视为形成夹击。若奥斯克里斯因被夹击的敌人而成为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，则其 AC 承受 –3 状况加值减值（而非通常的 –2）。

奥斯克里斯对受益于夹击的近战攻击具有弱点 15，并且每当一个生物在夹击他们时以一次近战打击对奥斯克里斯造成重击，奥斯克里斯便会变为故障 1。

如果奥斯克里斯已经处于故障状态，则他们改为变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑}，直到其下个回合结束。

An oscriss is designed for fighting two-dimensional foes. If more than one enemy has the oscriss within reach, they count as flanking regardless of their actual position. An oscriss made @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} by flanking foes takes a –3 circumstance penalty to AC (instead of the usual –2).

An oscriss has weakness 15 against melee attacks benefiting from flanking, and whenever a creature scores a critical hit with a melee Strike against the oscriss while flanking them, the oscriss becomes glitching 1.

If the oscriss is already glitching, they instead become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} until the end of their next turn.

Amputating Strikes.name: 截肢打击 Amputating Strikes
Amputating Strikes.description:
当一名奥斯克里斯用其相对论锯或二分光束进行“打击”并造成重击时，目标必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:44] 豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物额外受到 @Damage[2d10[slashing]] 伤害。

大失败 该生物额外受到 @Damage[4d10[slashing]] 伤害，并失去一条肢体（手臂、腿，或类似的运动肢体，如触手，由GM随机决定）。

When an oscriss scores a critical hit with their relativity saw or bifurcating beam Strike, the target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:44] save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature takes an additional @Damage[2d10[slashing]] damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes an additional @Damage[4d10[slashing]] damage and loses one limb (arm, leg, or a similar ambulatory limb such as a tentacle, randomly determined by the GM).

Dimensional Pounce.name: 次元猛扑 Dimensional Pounce
Dimensional Pounce.description:
欧斯克里斯【Stride】至多其速度的距离，或施放translocate；在该移动结束时，欧斯克里斯进行一次【Strike】。如果欧斯克里斯在开始此动作时处于隐蔽状态，则直到此能力的【Strike】之后，他们仍保持隐蔽。

The oscriss Strides up to their Speed or casts translocate; at the end of that movement, the oscriss Strikes. If the oscriss began this action hidden, they remain hidden until after this ability's Strike.

Passing Through.name: 穿过 Passing Through
Passing Through.description:
奥斯克里斯无视所有非魔法的困难地形和高等困难地形。

The oscriss ignores all non-magical difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain.

Pause Pulse.name: 暂停脉冲 Pause Pulse
Pause Pulse.description:
奥斯克里斯释放出一阵时间能量脉冲，形成一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:30]，对区域内的生物造成 @Damage[10d8[force]|options:area-damage] 伤害，生物可进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:44] 豁免。奥斯克里斯在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Pause Pulse]]{1d4 轮}内无法再次使用停滞脉冲。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并且减速 1，持续 1 分钟。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并且减速 1，持续 1 分钟，且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2}。
