As admirers of the arts, nymphs are especially friendly toward creatives, and offering to depict a nymph in story, picture, or song is a sure way to win their favor—unless the nymph doesn't like the final result and lashes out at the artist for insulting them with a mediocre product. Vidcasting and livestreaming are popular pastimes among more sociable nymphs, whether to show off their remote environments or find audiences for performances. Some nymphs entice movie crews to film in their territories, with two provisos: first, that the production not damage the environment, and second, that the nymph receive a prominent role in the film.

Unless their territories are threatened, most space nymphs are friendly or indifferent to mortals, but they have long memories. Anyone visiting a space nymph's territory would be wise to research that nymph's grudges, past encounters with mortals, or any recent events in the area that might color the nymph's perspective of those traveling near their home.

A mortal who demonstrates the right attitude and abilities, such as by protecting a stellar body from destruction or creating an especially beautiful work of art, might draw a space nymph's attention. From time to time, space nymphs will offer their services as mentors to solarians or mystics, though they seldom seek pupils on their own. Space nymphs rarely enter into more than one such arrangement at a time and typically only make commitments that promise to last decades or centuries, so they're extremely selective in their choice of mentee.

Draiclipsed.name: 被德莱掩蚀的 Draiclipsed

Infrared Vision.name: 红外视觉 Infrared Vision
Infrared Vision.description:
拟龙蝠可以在所列距离内将红外辐射（例如温血生物发出的红外辐射）作为一种模糊感官来侦测。

A draiclipsed can detect infrared radiation (such as that given off by warm-blooded creatures) as an imprecise sense at the listed range.

Eclipse Shroud.name: 蚀影帷幕 Eclipse Shroud
Eclipse Shroud.description:
15尺。蚀黯龙会吸收光线，并永远被不断变幻的阴影与逐渐延伸的黑暗所环绕。该区域内的光照等级降低一级（例如，明亮光照变为昏暗光照）。

15 feet. A draiclipsed absorbs light and is perpetually surrounded by shifting shadows and lengthening darkness. Light in the area decreases by one step (for example, bright light becomes dim light).

Consume Light.name: 吞噬光明 Consume Light
Consume Light.description:
蚀光龙张开嘴，吸入一道魔法光芒，将其吞噬以为自身力量提供燃料。蚀光龙尝试对60英尺内的一个魔法光照效果进行反制检定（[[/r 1d20+15 #Counteract]]{+15}反制调整值）。若成功，蚀光龙周身环绕着朦胧的光辉，在接下来的24小时内变为光子态。当蚀光龙处于光子态时，它处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

The draiclipsed opens their mouth and sucks in a magical light, consuming it to fuel their own powers. The draiclipsed attempts a counteract check against one magical light effect within 60 feet ([[/r 1d20+15 #Counteract]]{+15} counteract modifier). If successful, the draiclipsed becomes ringed in diffuse light, becoming photonic for the next 24 hours. While a draiclipsed is photonic, they're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Cull the Betrayers.name: 剿灭背叛者 Cull the Betrayers
Cull the Betrayers.description:
每当一只蚀影龙本会对不死生物或其他具有虚空治疗的生物造成虚空伤害时，该虚空伤害改为寒冷伤害。

Whenever a draiclipsed would deal void damage to an undead or other creature with void healing, that void damage becomes cold damage instead.

Darkness Falls.name: 黑暗降临 Darkness Falls
Darkness Falls.description:
需求 该蚀龙处于光子态

效果 蚀龙释放其已吞噬的光芒，形成一阵被腐化的电磁能量爆发，在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] 内造成 3d8 电击伤害和 @Damage[3d8[void]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic] 豁免）。该蚀龙不再处于光子态。

Requirements The draiclipsed is photonic

Effect The draiclipsed releases the light they've consumed in a blast of corrupted electromagnetic energy, dealing 3d8 electricity and @Damage[3d8[void]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic] save). The draiclipsed is no longer photonic.

Gathering Darkness.name: 汇聚黑暗 Gathering Darkness
Gathering Darkness.description:
如果至少有一个其他蚀曳龙处于该蚀曳龙的蚀影帷幕内，则该蚀曳龙的打击额外造成 @Damage[1d8[void]] 伤害。

If at least one other draiclipsed is within the draiclipsed's eclipse shroud, the draiclipsed's Strikes deal an additional @Damage[1d8[void]] damage.

Draiclipsed.publicNotes:
蚀龙骸是永餍蚀日的不死先驱者。永餍蚀日是一位古老而可怖的提兹米特尔军阀，在黑月坠落伊奥克斯时被埋葬，最近又被新诞者唤醒。永餍蚀日正在集结自己的军势，其中包括成群的蚀龙骸，准备夺回伊奥克斯——在他看来，这个世界已经堕入奢靡与轻浮，而其可耻的统治者们竟做出了与生者结盟这一亵渎的决定。

蚀龙骸是狡黠的骷髅不死生物，它们漆黑如墨的骨骼能够吸收光线，使其投下浓重的阴影。它们还能吞噬魔法光芒，利用吸收的光子遮蔽自身形体，随后将其释放为一阵电磁能量爆发。蚀龙骸对其创造者与君主忠贞不二，受训于正面战争，而当它们彼此并肩作战时则更加危险。

Draiclipsed are the undead heralds of the Insatiable Eclipse, an ancient and terrifying tzitzimitl warlord buried when the Blackmoon fell on Eox and recently awakened by the Newborn. The Insatiable Eclipse amasses its forces, including legions of draiclipsed, to retake Eox, a world he feels has fallen to decadence and frivolity, whose disgraceful leaders have made the blasphemous decision to ally with the living.

Draiclipsed are canny skeletal undead whose pitch-black bones absorb light, allowing them to cast deep shadows. They can also consume magical light, using the absorbed photons to obscure their form before unleashing it in a blast of electromagnetic energy. Utterly loyal to their creator and liege, draiclipsed are trained for open warfare and even more dangerous when fighting alongside one another.

Corzador.name: 科扎多尔 Corzador

Follicle Germination.name: 毛囊萌发 Follicle Germination
Follicle Germination.description:
数百条如导线般的神经末梢从科尔扎多尔的头部喷涌而出，形成一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]。区域内每个非科尔扎代人都必须成功通过一次 @Check[reflex|dc:18|options:area-effect] 豁免，否则会立刻被100英尺内的所有科尔扎代人观测到。区域内的科尔扎代人在对这些被侦测到的生物进行攻击检定和伤害掷骰时获得+1环境加值，只要目标仍留在该散发范围内即可。科尔扎多尔的散发会持续生效，直到它执行一个移动动作离开当前空间。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Bw1u0YIbG0ZV1CIR]{效果：毛囊萌发}

Hundreds of wirelike nerve endings erupt from the corzador's head in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. Each non-corzadai in the area must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:18|options:area-effect] save or be instantly observed by all corzadais within 100 feet. Corzadais in the area gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack and damage rolls against the detected creatures as long as the targets remain in the emanation. The corzador's emanation remains in effect until it takes a move action to leave its current space.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Bw1u0YIbG0ZV1CIR]{Effect: Follicle Germination}

Shrieking Utricle.name: 尖啸胞囊 Shrieking Utricle
Shrieking Utricle.description:
触发条件 一个非科尔扎代人生物在科尔扎多尔的活性毛囊萌发范围内移动

效果 科尔扎多尔发出一声高亢的尖啸。所有位于科尔扎多尔毛囊散发范围内的非科尔扎代人生物受到 @Damage[2d8[sonic]|options:area-damage] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:18|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免。

Trigger A non-corzadai creature moves within the corzador's active Follicle Germination

Effect The corzador emits a high-pitched shriek. All non-corzadai creatures within the corzador's Follicle Emanation take @Damage[2d8[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:18|basic|options:area-effect] save.

Corzador.publicNotes:
模样依稀类人的科尔扎多尔人驱赶着科尔扎德群，执行着它们阴森的任务。

科尔扎代人从奥克腾破碎的残骸中诞生。它们被爆炸般抛入太空，这些真菌群落由神秘的力量维系在一起。它们奇异的子实体呈现出众多形态，其中有两种在协约世界比其他形态更常见：科尔扎德和科尔扎多尔人。

Vaguely humanoid corzadors herd corzad packs as they carry out their grim tasks.

Corzadais spawned from the broken remains of Aucturn. Explosively launched into space, these fungal colonies are held together by mysterious forces. Their strange fruiting bodies have taken on numerous shapes, of which two have been more commonly seen in the Pact Worlds than others: corzads and corzadors.

Ulgaazan Nyssholora.name: 乌尔加赞·尼索洛拉 Ulgaazan Nyssholora
Ulgaazan Nyssholora.tokenName: 乌尔加赞·尼斯霍洛拉 Ulgaazan Nyssholora

Telepathy Sense.name: 心灵感应感知 Telepathy Sense
Telepathy Sense.description:
尼索罗拉能够以所列距离内的一种不精确感知察觉所有拥有心灵感应、有限心灵感应或类似能力的生物，例如秘术师的纽带。此感知可穿过墙壁和其他障碍物生效。

A nyssholora senses all creatures that have telepathy, limited telepathy, or a similar ability, such as a mystic's bond, as an imprecise sense at the listed range. This sense works through walls and other obstacles.

Sonic Snarl.name: 音波低吼 Sonic Snarl
Sonic Snarl.description:
触发 一个生物对 nyssholora 的一次近战打击失败或大失败

效果 nyssholora 对触发生物发出咆哮，造成 @Damage[(3d6+6)[sonic]] 伤害。

Trigger A creature fails or critically fails a melee Strike against the nyssholora

Effect The nyssholora snarls at the triggering creature, dealing @Damage[(3d6+6)[sonic]] damage.

Crunch.name: 嘎吱嘎吱 Crunch
Crunch.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 一个生物在 nyssholora 的颚中处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱} 状态

效果 nyssholora 猛力咬下，对该生物造成 @Damage[(2d12+16)[piercing]] 伤害。

Frequency once per round

Requirements A creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} in the nyssholora's jaws

Effect The nyssholora chomps down on the creature, dealing @Damage[(2d12+16)[piercing]] damage.

Discordant Bellow.name: 刺耳咆哮 Discordant Bellow
Discordant Bellow.description:
nyssholora 释放出一阵不和谐的声波爆发，造成 @Damage[18d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] 伤害，范围为 @Template[type:cone|distance:60]（@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic] 豁免）。区域内的物体和构装体视为其硬度只有通常的一半。豁免检定大失败的生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}，持续 1 轮。nyssholora 在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Discordant Bellow]]{1d4 轮} 内不能再次使用 Discordant Bellow。

The nyssholora unleashes a blast of discordant sound that deal @Damage[18d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:60] (@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic] save). Objects and constructs in the area are treated as if they had half as much Hardness as usual. Creatures that critically fail their saving throw are also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round. The nyssholora can't use Discordant Bellow again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Discordant Bellow]]{1d4 rounds}.

Phasic Flurry.name: 相位连击 Phasic Flurry
Phasic Flurry.description:
尼索罗拉先疾行，移动距离至多等于其速度，然后对其触及范围内的每个生物各进行一次相位刃打击。每次攻击都计入尼索罗拉的多重攻击减值，但在所有攻击完成之前，该减值不会增加。

The nyssholora Strides up to its Speed then makes a phasic blade Strike against each creature within reach. Each attack counts toward the nyssholora's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until after all the attacks.

Phasic Strike.name: 位相打击 Phasic Strike
Phasic Strike.description:
nyssholora 的相位刃打击将其命中的任何物体或构装体视为其目标的硬度只有平时的一半。

A nyssholora's phasic blade Strike treats any object or construct it hits as if the target had half as much Hardness as usual.

Ulgaazan Nyssholora.publicNotes:
有记载以来体型最大的尼索洛拉是“无龄者”乌尔加阿扎——一种神话般的生物，古老而庞大，据说连群山在它面前都显得渺小。如今，任何体型达到史诗级规模的尼索洛拉都会被称为“乌尔加赞”，但即便是这些强大的巨兽，与其名号的源头相比也相形见绌。

尼索洛拉凶暴异常，是一种类恐龙生物，名列卡斯卓韦星球上最危险、最令人畏惧的顶级掠食者之中。这些行走的兵器挥舞着致命的生体构造：一张巨大的血盆大口，内衬两排剃刀般锋利的牙齿；镰刀状的相位刃前肢，以超声波般的速度振动；以及一条如鞭笞刑具般的尾巴，能够从周围的大气中吸收电能。然而，尼索洛拉同样狡猾而敏锐——它们头顶冠状的一圈触须能够侦测心灵感应信号，使当地的弗米蚁族和拉申塔人根本无法逃过它们的注意。它们的相位刃切开墙壁和载具就像劈开低矮灌木一样轻而易举，确保猎物无处可安全藏身。

The largest nyssholora ever recorded was Ulgaaza the Ageless, a mythical creature so old and so massive it was said to dwarf mountains. Today, any nyssholora that reaches epic proportions is called "Ulgaazan," though even these mighty beasts pale in comparison to their namesake.

Incredibly ferocious, nyssholoras are dinosaur-like creatures that number among the most dangerous and feared apex predators on the planet of Castrovel. These walking weapons brandish lethal biology: a massive maw lined with twin rows of razor-sharp teeth, scythe-shaped phasic blade forearms that vibrate at ultrasonic speeds, and a scourge-like tail capable of absorbing electricity from the surrounding atmosphere. Yet, nyssholoras are also cunning and perceptive—a frill of tentacles that crowns their head detect telepathic signals, making it impossible for the local formians and lashuntas to escape their notice. Their phasic blades can cut through walls and vehicles as easily as underbrush, ensuring prey have nowhere safe to hide.

Spined Renkroda.name: 棘刺伦克罗达 Spined Renkroda
Spined Renkroda.tokenName: 棘刺伦克罗达 Spined Renkroda

Spine Deflection.name: 脊柱偏转 Spine Deflection
Spine Deflection.description:
需求 棘刺伦克罗达的棘刺已竖起

触发 棘刺伦克罗达将被一次远程打击命中，但尚未掷伤害

效果 棘刺伦克罗达扭转身体，用其棘刺偏转部分攻击，并获得对触发伤害的 10 抗性。其棘刺不再竖起。

Requirements The spined renkroda's spines are bristled

Trigger The spined renkroda would be hit by a ranged Strike, but the damage hasn't been rolled yet

Effect The spined renkroda twists its body, deflecting part of the attack with its spines, and gains resistance 10 to the triggering damage. Its spines are no longer bristled.

Bristle.name: 炸毛 Bristle
Bristle.description:
棘刺伦克罗达竖起它的尖刺并采取防御姿态，AC获得+2境遇加值，直到它使用一个移动动作、使用“尖刺偏转”，或进行任何一次非尖刺打击的打击为止。任何试图对棘刺伦克罗达进行近战攻击的生物都会受到 @Damage[3d6[piercing]] 伤害，无论该攻击是否命中。

The spined renkroda bristles its spines and adopts a defensive posture, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC until it uses a move action, uses Spine Deflection, or makes any Strike other than a spine Strike. Any creature that attempts a melee attack against the spined renkroda takes @Damage[3d6[piercing]] damage, regardless of whether the attack hits.

Spine Barrage.name: 脊刺齐射 Spine Barrage
Spine Barrage.description:
棘刺伦克罗达进行三次远程棘刺打击。

The spined renkroda makes three ranged spine Strikes.

Terrifying Roar.name: 骇人咆哮 Terrifying Roar
Terrifying Roar.description:
棘脊伦克罗达发出凶猛的咆哮。60尺内的每个非伦克罗达生物都必须尝试进行一次 @Check[will|dc:32] 豁免。随后，该生物会暂时免疫10分钟。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}。

大失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 3}。

The spined renkroda bellows ferociously. Each non-renkroda creature within 60 feet must attempt a @Check[will|dc:32] save. The creature is then temporarily immune for 10 minutes.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Spined Renkroda.publicNotes:
棘饰棘盗龙体格厚实、强壮，生活在开阔的平原、台地和平顶高原上。与大多数棘盗龙不同，它们的颈褶是致命武器，其上排列着数百根长达一英尺的尖刺，既是出色的防御手段——也是致命的武器。

棘盗龙是一类原产于卡斯卓韦星球的大型类恐龙掠食者。多亏了走私者、偷猎者以及极其富有的狩猎大型猎物者，它们已经扩散到了这颗丛林行星之外的地区。棘盗龙以双足行走，体格强壮，拥有长颈和装饰性的棘刺，而它们最为人所知的是那令人胆寒的咆哮；它们会频繁发出这种吼声，既作为远距离交流的方式，也用来吓退其他掠食者和食腐动物。棘盗龙已知有十多种物种，每一种都特别适应其所处环境或生态位。

Thickly built and burly, spined renkrodas live on open plains, mesas, and plateaus. Unlike most renkrodas, their frill is a deadly weapon, lined with hundreds of foot-long spines that serve as an excellent defense—and a deadly weapon.

Renkrodas are a family of large dinosaur-like predators native to the planet Castrovel. They've spread beyond the jungle planet's boundaries thanks to smugglers, poachers, and ultra-wealthy big-game hunters. Bipedal and strong with long necks and decorative spines, renkrodas are best known for their terrifying roars, which they bellow frequently as a form of long-range communication and to scare away other predators and scavengers. Over a dozen species of renkrodas exist, each specially adapted to their environment or ecological niche.

Dread Empathnid.name: 惧怖感应蛛尼斯人 Dread Empathnid
Dread Empathnid.tokenName: 恐惧感应蛛形体 Dread Empathnid

Emotionsense.name: 情绪感知 Emotionsense
Emotionsense.description:
这是一种针对处于情绪效应影响下，或被压倒性情绪所支配的生物的精确感知（由GM裁定）。对其他生物而言，这是一种不精确感知。免疫情绪或精神效应的生物，或处于 calm 法术效果下的生物，无法被情绪感知探测到。

This is a precise sense against creatures under an emotion effect or in the grips of overwhelming emotions (at the GM's discretion). Against other creatures, this is an imprecise sense. Creatures immune to emotion or mental effects or under the effects of a calm spell are undetectable by emotionsense.

Dread Venom.name: 恐惧毒液 Dread Venom
Dread Venom.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

最长持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[mental]]伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}（1轮）

阶段 2 2d6精神伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}（1轮）

阶段 3 如阶段2，且额外受到 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{注定 1}（1轮）

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[mental]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 2d6 mental and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 As stage 2, plus @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} (1 round)

Mental Mire.name: 心灵泥沼 Mental Mire
Mental Mire.description:
被恐惧感应蛛的灵能蛛网打击或灵能爆发伤害到的非飞行生物会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{无法移动}，被黏在地面或最近的相邻表面上，直到其 [[/act escape dc=18]]{挣脱}。飞行生物则必须改为成功通过一次 @Check[reflex|dc:18] 豁免，否则坠落 20 尺（若严重失败则坠落 40 尺）。

A non-flying creature damaged by the dread empathnid's psychic web Strike or psychic burst is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, stuck to the ground or nearest adjacent surface until it [[/act escape dc=18]]{Escapes}. A flying creature must instead succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:18] save or fall 20 feet (or 40 feet on a critical failure).

Dread Empathnid.publicNotes:
恐惧共感蛛是原产于丛林行星的致命猎手。它们在有人口聚居的世界上繁衍兴盛，而其偏爱的猎物则是拥有智慧的人形生物。受负面情绪吸引，恐惧共感蛛会吸收垂死受害者的恐惧，并将这些可怖经历灌注进它们的蛛网之中。

共感蛛对其他生物有着极强的共情能力。这种身长8英寸、外形似蜘蛛的生物有多种颜色，而且还拥有能够救命的毒液，这或许解释了为什么它们经常在协约世界各地被当作伙伴或宠物饲养。

Dread empathnids are deadly hunters native to jungle planets. They thrive on populated worlds, and their preferred prey are intelligent humanoids. Drawn to negative emotions, dread empathnids absorb the terror of their dying victims and infuse their webbing with these horrific experiences.

Empathnids have tremendous empathy for other creatures. The fact that the 8-inch spidery creatures come in a variety of colors and have a lifesaving venom likely explains why they're frequently used as companions or pets across the Pact Worlds.

Elder Psychic Fungus.name: 上古灵能真菌 Elder Psychic Fungus
Elder Psychic Fungus.tokenName: 远古灵能真菌 Elder Psychic Fungus

Mycelium Network.name: 菌丝网络 Mycelium Network
Mycelium Network.description:
灵能真菌与一张灵能丝状网络相连，这张网络将同一菌落中的所有灵能真菌连接在一起。该网络使采收者能够以一种[[模糊感知]]，侦测到距离某个已连接的灵能真菌 30 英尺内、且最远可达 1,000 英尺外的具有思维能力的生物。

Psychic fungi are connected to a network of psychic filaments bonding all psychic fungi from the same colony. This network grants the harvester the ability to detect creatures capable of thought within 30 feet of a bonded psychic fungus up to 1,000 feet away as an imprecise sense.

Release Spores.name: 释放孢子 Release Spores
Release Spores.description:
触发条件 收割者的生命值降至 0

效果 收割者会释放一团孢子云，形成一个以其自身空间的一个角为中心、持续 1 轮的 @Template[type:burst|distance:10]。每个处于该云团内或进入其中的生物都会暴露于致惑孢子之下。若此反应是由一次近战攻击造成的伤害所触发，则触发该反应的生物进行强韧豁免时，其结果所对应的成功等级视为比其掷骰结果差 1 级（如果该攻击是颚部打击或其他用生物口部进行的打击，则差 2 级）。

Trigger The harvester is reduced to 0 Hit Points

Effect The harvester releases a cloud of spores in a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] centered on a corner of its own space that lasts for 1 round. Each creature that's in the cloud or enters it is exposed to befuddling spores. If this reaction was triggered by damage from a melee attack, the triggering creature uses the outcome one degree of success worse than the result of its roll for its Fortitude save (two degrees worse if it was a jaws Strike or other Strike with the creature's mouth).

Befuddling Spores.name: 迷乱孢子 Befuddling Spores
Befuddling Spores.description:
植物和真菌免疫

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:21]

最长持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}（1轮）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}（1轮）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 3}（1轮）

阶段 4 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 4}（1轮）

Plants and fungi are immune

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:21]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} (1 round)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4} (1 round)

Drain Brain.name: 脑吸取 Drain Brain
Drain Brain.description:
老年灵能真菌会吸食一名位于其10尺内、死亡不超过1分钟的生物大脑中的体液与灵能精华。老年灵能真菌恢复其已消耗的最高环阶先天法术的使用次数。该生物视为因死亡效应而死亡。

The elder psychic fungus consumes the fluids and psychic essences from the brain of a creature within 10 feet that has been dead for no more than 1 minute. The elder psychic fungus regains the use of their highest-ranked spent innate spell. The creature is considered to have died due to a death effect.

Lore (all subcategories of all creatures.name: 知识（1 英里内所有受训于知识技能的生物的所有子类别） Lore (all subcategories of all creatures trained in Lore skills within 1 mile)

Elindrian Celebrant.name: 艾琳卓人颂庆者 Elindrian Celebrant
Elindrian Celebrant.tokenName: 艾琳卓人颂庆者 Elindrian Celebrant

Integrated Chitinous Painsaw.name: 整合式几丁质痛锯 Integrated Chitinous Painsaw

Celebrant Heart Battery.name: 礼赞者之心电池 Celebrant Heart Battery

Chitinous Painsaw.name: 几丁质苦痛锯 Chitinous Painsaw

Husk Mind.name: 空壳心智 Husk Mind
Husk Mind.description:
艾琳卓人可以通过一种类似于弗米蚁族蜂巢思维的原始联结，几乎瞬时地进行交流。当处于至少另一名拥有尸壳心智的艾琳卓人的心灵感应范围内时，艾琳卓侍僧在先攻检定、察觉检定，以及对抗精神效果的豁免上获得+2环境加值。如果一名艾琳卓人察觉到某个战斗参与者，则范围内尸壳心智的所有成员都会察觉到它。

艾琳卓人的尸壳心智与其气味整合在一起；在探测其他艾琳卓人、弗米蚁族、不死生物或尸体时，他们的嗅觉是精确感官，而非不精确感官。

只要与乌库兰的恐噩处于同一存在位面，艾琳卓人就总是知道其精确距离和方向。

Elindrians can communicate nearly instantaneously via a primal bond similar to a formian hive mind. While within telepathic range of at least one other elindrian with husk mind, an elindrian acolyte gains a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls, Perception checks, and saving throws against mental effects. If one elindrian is aware of a combatant, all members of the husk mind within range are aware of it.

The elindrian's husk mind is integrated with their scent; for purposes of detecting other elindrians, formians, undead, or corpses, their scent is a precise sense, rather than imprecise.

An elindrian always knows the precise distance and direction to the Terror of Ukulam, so long as they're on the same plane of existence.

Pain Bond.name: 痛苦连结 Pain Bond
Pain Bond.description:
一把狂欢者的痛锯由另一名狂欢者的心脏驱动。若一名狂欢者位于一把装有其心脏的痛锯30英尺内，且该痛锯对一个生物进行打击时，该狂欢者恢复等同于其等级的生命值（通常为4）。对狂欢者而言，挥舞一把由其自身心脏制成的痛锯，或由任何一名其并未亲眼目睹（或亲手造成）其死亡的狂欢者之心制成的痛锯，都是禁忌。除此之外，痛锯在各方面的运作方式都与痛戟相同，但不能使用普通电池。一颗狂欢者之心在与痛锯一同使用时可作为战术电池；若该狂欢者在一名艾琳卓女王面前待上10分钟，它便会充能。

A celebrant's painsaw is powered by the heart of another celebrant. If a celebrant is within 30 feet of a painsaw that contains their heart when the painsaw Strikes a creature, the celebrant regains a number of Hit Points equal to their level (typically 4). It's taboo for a celebrant to wield a painsaw made from their own heart or a heart from any celebrant whose death they didn't witness (or cause) themself. A painsaw otherwise functions in all ways like a painglaive but doesn't function with normal batteries. A single celebrant heart functions as a tactical battery when used with a painsaw; it recharges if the celebrant spends 10 minutes in the presence of an elindrian queen.

Elindrian Celebrant.publicNotes:
这些艾琳卓战士沉溺于暴力。他们唯一的动机似乎就是传播痛苦，而他们自己对此却免疫；他们的神经末梢以某种方式发育，使他们根本感觉不到疼痛，或是以某种几乎不会给他们带来痛苦的方式体验疼痛。只要附近有一位艾琳卓女王能够让他们复生，欢庆者大部分时间都会彼此厮杀，在更好的目标出现之前，不断磨炼自己施加暴力的能力。

被称为艾琳卓人的族群早在无数亿万年前便消失了，遁入卡斯卓韦星球地表之下荒凉的空壳巢穴中。直到最近，他们都还只是传说中的生物，仅存在于最晦涩难懂的弗米蚁族历史记载里。如今，卡斯卓韦上的学者们正拼命寻找更多关于艾琳卓人、他们的起源，以及——最重要的是——他们与那个最近从其卫星艾琳卓降下的可怖软泥状生物之间联系的真相。有一种理论认为，艾琳卓人与那个被称为乌库兰之恐噩的软泥怪物之间共享某种原始纽带，也许二者都源自艾琳卓——其他理论则声称，艾琳卓人最初创造了那团软泥，或者他们其实是弗米蚁族的远亲，只是在很久以前被恐噩腐化了。

These elindrian warriors relish violence. Their only motivation seems to be spreading pain, which they themselves are immune to; their nerve endings developed in such a way that they can't feel pain at all, experiencing it in some way that causes them little to no suffering. As long as there's an elindrian queen nearby to revive them, celebrants spend most of their time battling one another, honing their capability to do violence until a better target comes along.

The people known as elindrians vanished eons ago into desolate husk-hives beneath the surface of the planet Castrovel. Until recently, they were creatures of legend, existing only in the most obscure formian histories. Now, scholars on Castrovel desperately search for additional records about elindrians, their origins, and—most importantly—the truth about their connection to the terrifying ooze-like creature that recently descended from their moon, Elindrae. One theory is that elindrians share some primal bond with the ooze-thing called the Terror of Ukulam, and perhaps both originate from Elindrae—other theories claim that elindrians created the ooze in the first place or that they're distant cousins to formians, corrupted by the Terror long ago.

Void Zombie.name: 虚空丧尸 Void Zombie

Salt Water Vulnerability.name: 盐水易伤性 Salt Water Vulnerability
Salt Water Vulnerability.description:
盐水会像强酸一样迅速侵蚀幼体阿卡塔的细胞。若虚空僵尸被完全浸没在盐水中，它会立刻因盐水受到 @Damage[4d6[acid]] 伤害，并且只要仍保持浸没状态，在其每个回合结束时再次受到同样的伤害。它对盐水的弱点适用于此伤害。在任何一个回合中，只要虚空僵尸因其对盐水的弱点而受到伤害，幼体阿卡塔就会缩回并躲藏在宿主体内，使虚空僵尸陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}。

Salt water quickly attacks a larval akata's cells as a strong acid. If the void zombie is fully immersed in salt water, it takes @Damage[4d6[acid]] damage from the water immediately and at the end of each of its turns as long as it remains immersed. Its weakness to salt water applies to this damage. On any round in which the void zombie takes damage due to its salt water weakness, the larval akata withdraws to hide within the host's body and renders the void zombie @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}.

Feed on Blood.name: 汲血 Feed on Blood
Feed on Blood.description:
需求 虚空僵尸上一个动作是以其吸食触须对一个活物进行的一次成功打击

效果 虚空僵尸使用其吸食触须从所需生物体内汲取血液。虚空僵尸恢复 @Damage[4[healing]] 生命值，且该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{ drained 1 }，直到它受到任何种类或数值的治疗为止。

Requirements The void zombie's previous action was a successful feeding tendril Strike against a living creature

Effect The void zombie drains blood from the required creature using its feeding tendril. The void zombie regains @Damage[4[healing]] Hit Points, and the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} until it receives healing of any kind or amount.

Void Zombie.publicNotes:
当阿卡塔咬伤一个类人生物时，它会用微型寄生幼体感染对方。那些因这种寄生而死亡者——这种状态被称为虚空之死——会再次爬起，化作虚空僵尸。尽管它们看起来像是普通的腐烂尸体，但一根细长的蓝灰色摄食触须会从它们破碎的下颚伸出。当体内未成熟的阿卡塔感知到潜在猎物时，这根触须往往会带着令人作呕的急切感扭动翻卷。

宿主尸体一旦死亡，这些幼体便会彼此吞食，直到最强壮的那个钻入受害者的大脑。经过数小时的快速孕育后，它会附着在大脑上，并向其中注入一丝死灵能量。这一过程会让幼体变得极度饥饿，驱使它去吸食活物的鲜血。随着幼体成长，虚空僵尸通常会持续存在数周；但最终，它体内的宿主会迫使它寻找一个安全、隐蔽的地方，在宿主身体彻底失去活动能力前，将幼体吐出，以迎来最后一次成长激增。数小时后，一只完全成形的阿卡塔便会从那滩翻涌起泡的黏液中现身，通常还会把尸体当作自己的第一餐。

一般来说，阿卡塔会对虚空僵尸置之不理，而这些幼体寄生虫也会试图分散开来，以免争夺食物。在封闭且未受打扰的空间中，虚空僵尸会一动不动地站着，以保存能量。体内的幼年阿卡塔会进入休眠状态，并以宿主身体的组织为食，直到它们成熟，或感知到可行的食物来源。鉴于虚空僵尸的存在相对短暂，那些偶然发现先前袭击现场的人，可能会发现虚空僵尸早已被吞食或遗弃，取而代之的是一片诡异的聚落：里面满是寂静、玻璃般光滑的茧，内中则蛰伏着饥饿的冬眠阿卡塔。

虚空僵尸往往会无视其他不死生物，但当它们面对那些被寄生虫感染、或以其他方式受到外力控制或影响的生物时，却会变得莫名地具有攻击性。许多人曾试图通过迫使虚空僵尸与这类对象对峙来研究它们的行为，例如裂体蠕虫宿主，或受施法者奴役的生物。大多数这类实验充其量也只是得出模棱两可的结果，而其中许多最终都以灾难收场。

When an akata bites a humanoid, it infests them with microscopic, parasitic larvae. Those who perish from this parasitization, a condition known as void death, rise again as void zombies. While they resemble a typical rotting corpse, an elongated bluish-gray feeding tendril extends from their shattered lower jaw. When the immature akata within the body senses potential prey, this tendril often undulates and writhes with nauseating eagerness.

Once the host body dies, the larvae feed on each other until the strongest makes its way to the victim's brain. After several hours of rapid gestation, it attaches to the brain and infuses it with a mote of necromantic energy. This process leaves the larva ravenous, driving it to consume the blood of living creatures. Void zombies tend to last several weeks as the larva grows, but eventually its host compels it to seek out a safe, secluded place where it can disgorge the larva for one last surge of growth before the host body goes inert. Several hours later, a fully formed akata emerges from the frothing puddle, typically consuming the corpse as its first meal.

In general, akatas leave void zombies alone, and the larval parasites attempt to spread out to avoid competing for food. In a confined and undisturbed space, void zombies stand completely still to conserve energy. The juvenile akatas within become dormant and feed on the host body's tissue until they either reach maturity or sense a viable food source. Given the void zombie's relatively short existence, those who stumble upon a previous attack might find the void zombies already devoured or discarded and an eerie colony of silent, glassy cocoons full of ravenous hibernating akatas instead.

Void zombies tend to ignore other undead, but they become inexplicably aggressive when confronted with other creatures that are infested by parasites or otherwise controlled or influenced by external forces. Many have tried experimenting with void zombie behavior by forcing them to confront, for example, a rendworm host or a creature under the thrall of a spellcaster. Most such experiments end inconclusively at best, and many have ended in disaster.

Pachinyam.name: 帕奇尼亚姆 Pachinyam

Dusting.name: 掸去灰尘 Dusting
Dusting.description:
帕奇尼亚姆抖动其浓密的毛发，释放出一团以其某个方格一角为中心、半径为 @Template[type:burst|distance:5] 的尘土与皮屑云，效果如同 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kcelf6IHlM1iMchZ]{mist} 法术。此尘云会阻断云内任何人与外界之间的电子通讯。任何带有科技（特征）的物品若位于该尘云内，都会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}。帕奇尼亚姆在以带有移动（特征）的 3 动作活动进行一次尘浴之前，不能再次使用此能力。

The pachinyam shakes it thick fur and releases a cloud of dust and dander in a @Template[type:burst|distance:5] radius centered on a corner of one of its squares that functions as a mist spell. This dust cloud blocks electronic communication to and from anyone inside the cloud. Any item with the tech trait becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{glitching 1} if it's inside the dust cloud. The pachinyam can't use this ability again until they take a dust bath as a 3-action activity with the move trait.

Pachinyam.publicNotes:
单只帕奇尼亚姆算不上多大威胁，但对那些依赖科技的人来说会很烦人。有些帕奇尼亚姆的主人会在它们每天进行沙浴后特意多花些时间陪它们玩耍，尤其是在进入星舰或其他设施之前，因为一团意外扬起的尘云可能会造成灾难性的后果。

这些浑身灰扑扑、长耳朵、毛茸茸、会掘洞的啮齿动物原产于戴马尔科，并于200年前的觉醒时期与巨像一同出现。起初，它们被视为很有潜力的宠物，还被亲昵地称作“尘兔”，但觉醒的幸存者很快便发现，这个物种和那些在星球上横冲直撞的巨像一样危险。

虽然一两只帕奇尼亚姆表现得像温顺的食草动物，但它们繁殖极快。当帕奇尼亚姆的种群数量达到临界点时，它们就会变成凶残的掠食者。它们扬起的尘土能够干扰视觉和通信，这使得聚居地很难对它们发出警报或组织抵抗。在文明区域之外，帕奇尼亚姆的数量之所以能受到控制，是因为它们的虫群会出于本能地想要靠近巨像，尽管这显然十分危险。也有人推测，帕奇尼亚姆虫群尘云的气味会吸引饥饿的巨像。

A single pachinyam isn't much of a threat but can be a nuisance around those who rely on technology. Some pachinyam owners take extra time to play with their pets after their daily dust baths, especially before entering a starship or other facility where an unexpected cloud of dust could have catastrophic consequences.

These dusty, long-eared fluffy burrowing rodents are native to Daimalko and emerged alongside the colossi during the Awakening 200 years ago. They were initially heralded as potential pets and affectionately referred to as "dust bunnies," but the survivors of the Awakening soon found the species were as dangerous as the colossi rampaging across the planet.

While one or two pachinyams behave as calm herbivores, they reproduce rapidly. When the pachinyam population reaches a tipping point, they become vicious predators. Their dust's ability to disrupt both visual and telecommunications makes it challenging for settlements to warn or organize against them. Outside civilization, the pachinyam population is kept in check by their swarms' instinctually drive to be near colossi despite the obvious danger. Some also hypothesize that the scent of a pachinyam swarm's dust cloud attracts hungry colossi.

Jinchori Endling.name: 金乔里末裔 Jinchori Endling

Huntersight.name: 猎人视觉 Huntersight
Huntersight.description:
金乔里可以在所列距离内，将任何持用武器的生物的存在感知为一种精确感官。

A jinchori can sense the presence of any creature wielding weapons as a precise sense at the listed range.

Rejuvenation.name: 复苏 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
当终裔被摧毁时，它会在 [[/gmr 2d4 #days]]{2d4天} 后于其最初现身的区域内重塑，且完全恢复。只有当某人查明其存在的原因，并纠正任何阻止该灵体安息之事时，终裔才能被永久摧毁，例如进行非殖民化行动、生态修复，或治愈导致其灭绝的疾病。

When an endling is destroyed, it reforms after [[/gmr 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the area where it first emerged, fully healed. An endling can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting, such as an act of decolonization, ecological restoration, or curing the disease responsible for its extinction.

Noxious Breath.name: 剧毒吐息 Noxious Breath
Noxious Breath.description:
金乔里末裔向空气中释放有毒烟雾，造成 @Damage[4d12[poison]|options:area-damage] 伤害，作用于一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] （@Check[fortitude|dc:22|basic] 基础豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（若重度失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}）。金乔里在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Noxious Breath]]{1d4 轮} 内不能再次使用“有害吐息”。

The jinchori endling floods the air with toxic fumes, dealing @Damage[4d12[poison]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[fortitude|dc:22|basic] save). A creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure). The jinchori can't use Noxious Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Noxious Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Jinchori Endling.publicNotes:
金克里斯是蜿蜒修长的四足爬行动物，曾在沙漠世界普里奥里-8的地下挖掘出隧道网络。它们虹彩闪耀的鳞片会长成致密的装甲板，保护它们免受那些觊觎其华丽颈褶、想将之制成时尚饰品的猎人侵害。偷猎者开始向金克里隧道中灌入毒气，这种方法被证明过于有效，最终使这一物种灭绝。多年之后，来到普里奥里-8的访客会瞥见发光的巨蛇在洞穴与隧道中尾随他们，而偷猎者则会在幽灵般的毒素中窒息而亡。

每个物种在出现与演化时都会遵循一条自然的轨迹：兴起、繁盛、衰落，并最终走向灭绝。当这些轨迹遭遇极不自然的终结——当突如其来的捕食、工业化，或异星病原体将一个种群彻底抹除——终裔便会诞生。这些已灭绝物种的幽灵成员，通常会发展成对其灭绝命运的“回应”。异种生物学家对于终裔如何形成看法不一，无法确认这些生物究竟是一个物种最后的集体悲伤显化而成，还是仅仅是充满复仇意志的个体灵魂——最后熄灭的微光。

Jinchoris were sinuous quadrupedal reptiles that dug tunnel systems through the desert world of Priori-8. Their iridescent scales grew into dense armored plates, protecting them from the hunters who sought their brilliant frills as fashion accessories. Poachers started flooding jinchori tunnels with poison gas in a method that proved all too effective and wiped the species out. Years after, visitors to Priori-8 spy gleaming wyrms stalking them through caves and tunnels, and poachers die choking on spectral poison.

Every species follows a natural arc as it emerges and evolves: rising, thriving, declining, and falling into extinction. When extremely unnatural ends to these paths occur—when unexpected predation, industrialization, or alien pathogens wipe out a population—endlings are born. These spectral members of extinct species typically develop as "answers" to their eradication. Xenobiologists differ on what creates endlings, unable to confirm whether the creatures are a species' last collective sorrow made manifest or just vengeful individual spirits—the last lights to go out.

Pachinyam Swarm.name: 帕奇尼亚姆虫群 Pachinyam Swarm
Pachinyam Swarm.tokenName: 帕奇尼亚姆虫群 Pachinyam Swarm

Dust.name: 尘土 Dust
Dust.description:
30英尺。帕奇尼亚姆虫群抖动它浓密的毛发，并释放出一团以其所占方格之一的一个角为中心、30英尺半径的尘土与皮屑爆发，其效果如同 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mist]{mist} 法术。该尘云会阻断云内任何人向内或向外的电子通讯。任何带有科技（特征）的物品如果位于该尘云内，都会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}。

30 feet. The pachinyam swarm shakes it thick fur and releases a cloud of dust and dander in a 30-foot radius burst centered on a corner of one of its squares that functions as a mist spell. This dust cloud blocks electronic communication to and from anyone inside the cloud. Any item with the tech trait becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{glitching 1} if it's inside the dust cloud.

Swarming Bites.name: 蜂群噬咬 Swarming Bites
Swarming Bites.description:
虫群空间内的每个敌人受到 @Damage[2d8[piercing]] 伤害（进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] 豁免）。未通过此次豁免的生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（重度失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}）。当生物位于帕奇尼亚姆的尘云内且处于恶心状态时，它还会受到压制，直到其离开尘云或从恶心状态中恢复。

Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[2d8[piercing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] save). Creatures that fail this save are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure). While within a pachinyam's dust cloud and sickened, the creature is also suppressed until it leaves the cloud or recovers from the sickened condition.

Pachinyam Swarm.publicNotes:
帕奇尼亚姆虫群能够释放出一团翻涌的尘云，因为其中的每只啮齿动物都会不断把尘土重新抹到同伴身上。

这些浑身尘土、长耳朵、毛茸茸且善于掘洞的啮齿动物原产于戴马尔科，并在200年前的觉醒期间与巨像一同出现。起初，它们被视为潜在的宠物，还被亲昵地称作“尘兔”，但觉醒的幸存者很快发现，这一物种与在整颗星球上横冲直撞的巨像一样危险。

虽然一两只帕奇尼亚姆表现得像温顺的食草动物，但它们繁殖速度极快。当帕奇尼亚姆的数量达到临界点时，它们就会变成凶残的捕食者。它们的尘土能够干扰视觉和通信，这使得定居点很难对它们发出警报或组织抵抗。在文明区域之外，帕奇尼亚姆的数量之所以能受到控制，是因为它们的虫群本能地想要靠近巨像，尽管其中显而易见地充满危险。还有人推测，帕奇尼亚姆虫群尘云的气味会吸引饥饿的巨像。

Pachinyam swarms can release a cloud of billowing dust as individual rodents constantly reapply dust to their comrades.

These dusty, long-eared fluffy burrowing rodents are native to Daimalko and emerged alongside the colossi during the Awakening 200 years ago. They were initially heralded as potential pets and affectionately referred to as "dust bunnies," but the survivors of the Awakening soon found the species were as dangerous as the colossi rampaging across the planet.

While one or two pachinyams behave as calm herbivores, they reproduce rapidly. When the pachinyam population reaches a tipping point, they become vicious predators. Their dust's ability to disrupt both visual and telecommunications makes it challenging for settlements to warn or organize against them. Outside civilization, the pachinyam population is kept in check by their swarms' instinctually drive to be near colossi despite the obvious danger. Some also hypothesize that the scent of a pachinyam swarm's dust cloud attracts hungry colossi.

Jinsul Trooper.name: 烬蛛族士兵 Jinsul Trooper

Strider Leap.name: 阔步跳跃 Strider Leap
Strider Leap.description:
烬蛛族先疾奔，然后执行一次 [[/act long-jump]]。他们在进行远跳时，即使疾奔少于 10 尺，也不会自动使其检定失败。

The jinsul Strides and then performs a [[/act long-jump]]. They can Stride less than 10 feet and not automatically fail their check to Long Jump.

Jinsul Trooper.publicNotes:
战团中阶级最低的烬蛛族是下级士兵。这些烬蛛族通过猛冲向敌人、发射武器，并以其凶残的腿刃近身作战来证明自己。那些存活得足够久的士兵，会在严酷的烬蛛族军事生活中获得认可并晋升。

烬蛛族是散布于浩界各处的好战种族。烬蛛族是六足生物，拥有覆满眼睛的球状身躯、显著的几丁质节段，以及一对用于操作装备的上肢前臂。它们很久以前生活在被称为荡劫星域的太空区域，但最终离开那里，定居在严酷的世界拉克斯上。近些年来，神圣先驱杜鲁斯将烬蛛族统一为一支名为烬蛛族神权国的凝聚力量，并一度重新夺回了荡劫星域。数个种族与寻星者协会成员组成的联合联盟击败了杜鲁斯，并将烬蛛族重新驱散回浩界。

由于有无数基地和舰队在深空中运作，烬蛛族大多充当袭击者，搜刮装备，并通过与其他种族交锋来检验自身实力。烬蛛族被灌输要将自己视为卓越种族，认为只有荡劫星域的其他居民才具有价值，因此它们更喜欢与敌人进行短距离战斗。

烬蛛族的数量并不足以满足它们在银河各处所控制的众多飞船和太空基地上的每一种需求。相反，它们依赖机器人和自动化计算机系统（且始终至少由一名烬蛛族军官指挥）来维持其空间站高效运转。这些系统被编程得如同烬蛛族自身一样致命且无情；即便是最不起眼的自动化系统或机器人，比如垃圾收集器，也可能配备致命武器，或内置凶恶的科技魔法反制措施。

The lowest ranked jinsuls in a warband are the subordinate troopers. These jinsuls prove themselves by hurtling toward the enemy, discharging weapons, and closing with their vicious leg blades. Those troopers who survive long enough are recognized and promoted through the harsh jinsul military lifestyle.

Jinsuls are a warlike species scattered across the Vast. Six-legged creatures with a bulbous body covered in eyes, jinsuls have notable segments of chitin along with a set of upper forelimbs for using equipment. They long ago lived in the region of space known as the Scoured Stars but eventually departed and settled on the harsh world of Rax. In recent years, the divine herald Dhurus unified the jinsuls into a cohesive force known as the Jinsul Hierocracy, which briefly retook the Scoured Stars. A joint alliance between several species and members of the Starfinder Society defeated Dhurus and scattered the jinsuls back into the Vast.

With countless bases and fleets operating in deep space, jinsuls mostly act as raiders, scavenging for equipment and testing their mettle against other species. Indoctrinated to view themselves as a superior species, with only other inhabitants of the Scoured Stars having any value, jinsuls prefer to engage in short-ranged combat with their foes.

Jinsuls aren't numerous enough to fill every need on the many ships and starbases they control across the galaxy. Instead, they rely on robots and automated computer systems (always commanded by at least one jinsul officer) to keep their space stations running efficiently. These systems are programmed to be just as deadly and ruthless as jinsuls themselves; even the most innocuous automated system or robot, like a garbage collector, might wield deadly weapons or contain vicious technomagical countermeasures.

Rendworm.name: 裂身蠕虫 Rendworm

Infest.name: 侵染 Infest
Infest.description:
裂体蠕虫钻入与其共占同一空间的、仍活着且处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}状态的生物的一个孔口中。裂体蠕虫立刻死亡，并通过该生物的血液循环扩散自身，使其暴露于裂体蠕虫感染。

The rendworm crawls into an orifice of a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} living creature with which it shares a space. The rendworm immediately dies and spreads itself through the creature's bloodstream, exposing it to rendworm infestation.

Numbing Toxin.name: 麻痹毒素 Numbing Toxin
Numbing Toxin.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

最长持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d4[cold]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[cold]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 2}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d6[cold]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[cold]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[cold]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d6[cold]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} (1 round)

Rendworm Infestation.name: 蛉虫侵扰 Rendworm Infestation
Rendworm Infestation.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

发作时间 1 天

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}（1 天）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}以及迟钝 1（1 天）

阶段 3 目标变为裂虫宿主

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

Onset 1 day

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 day)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and stupefied 1 (1 day)

Stage 3 target becomes a rendworm host

Rendworm.publicNotes:
裂噬蠕虫是一种来自协约世界边缘的寄生生物，拥有蜿蜒起伏的身躯，背部沿线长有一排细密的鬃刺。它呈蓝灰色，能够融入其家园领地的冰寒环境之中，因此人们在搭建营地时很容易忽视它。这个短命的生物在繁殖周期中需要一个活体宿主，并使用一种冰冷的神经毒素来麻痹、感染并传播。

A parasitic creature from the edge of the Pact Worlds, the rendworm has a sinuous, undulating body and fine quills that run in a frill down its back. Blue gray in color, it blends in with the frigid surroundings of its home territory, making it easy to overlook when setting up campsites. The short-lived creature needs a living host for its reproductive cycle and uses a chilling neurotoxin to paralyze, infect, and spread.

Abysium Dragon (Young).name: 深渊金属龙（幼年） Abysium Dragon (Young)

Arcane Spontaneous Spells.name: 奥术自发法术 Arcane Spontaneous Spells

Toxic Cloud.name: 毒云术 Toxic Cloud
Toxic Cloud.description:
你创造一团有毒云雾。该效果如同@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{迷雾术 Mist}一般，除了该区域会每轮远离你10尺。在该区域中开始回合的生物承受6d8毒素伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d8。

Unfettered Movement.name: 行动无碍 Unfettered Movement
Unfettered Movement.description:
你驱散可能影响一个生物的阻碍。当处于该法术效果中时，法术目标忽视会赋予其速度环境减值的效果。当法术目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}一个令其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，它自动成功，除非该效果是魔法性的，并且其环级比行动无碍更高。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement}

Fireball.name: 火球术 Fireball
Fireball.description:
在你指定的位置爆发出咆哮的烈焰，造成6d6火焰伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Ignition.name: 引火术 Ignition
Ignition.description:
你打个响指并指向一个目标，后者便开始燃烧。作出一次法术攻击检定对抗目标的AC，命中时造成2d4点火焰伤害。若目标位于你的近战触及范围内，你能选择用火焰进行一次近战法术攻击以取代远程法术攻击，这会使得法术的所有伤害骰提升至d6骰子。

大成功 目标承受双倍伤害以及1d4点持续火焰伤害。

成功 目标承受全额伤害。

升阶（+1） 起始伤害增加1d4点，重击的持续火焰伤害增加1d4点。

@Damage[(@item.rank)d4[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害}

@Damage[(@item.rank)d6[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害（近战）}

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Radioactive Aura.name: 放射性灵光 Radioactive Aura
Radioactive Aura.description:
90尺。进入放射性灵光的生物必须尝试进行一次对抗重度辐射病的 @Check[fortitude|dc:25] 豁免。随后，它会暂时免疫放射性灵光，持续10分钟。

90 feet. A creature that enters the radioactive aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:25] save against severe radiation sickness. It's then temporarily immune to radioactive aura for 10 minutes.

Control Radiation.name: 操控辐射 Control Radiation
Control Radiation.description:
深渊钢龙对在其体内不断增长的放射性能量拥有终极掌控。每当一条深渊钢龙造成火焰或毒素伤害时，它们可以选择该伤害是否为魔法伤害，并且可以将任意数量的火焰伤害转变为毒素伤害（或将任意数量的毒素伤害转变为火焰伤害）。

Abysium dragons have ultimate control over the radioactive energy that grows within their bodies. Any time an abysium dragon deals fire or poison damage, they can choose whether that damage is magical, and they can change any amount of the fire damage to poison (or any amount of poison damage to fire).

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
龙进行两次爪击和一次尾击，顺序任意。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one tail Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙族动能 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
每当这条龙以一次打击造成重击时，他们的辐射吐息就会充能。

The dragon recharges their Radiation Breath whenever they score a critical hit with a Strike.

Radiation Breath.name: 辐射吐息 Radiation Breath
Radiation Breath.description:
巨龙喷吐出一股腐蚀性的过热气体，在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:30]内造成 @Damage[5d6[fire],3d12[persistent,poison]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免）。他们在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Radiation Breath]]{1d4 轮}内无法再次使用辐射吐息。

The dragon breathes a blast of caustic superheated gas that deals @Damage[5d6[fire],3d12[persistent,poison]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] save). They can't use Radiation Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Radiation Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Abysium Dragon (Young).publicNotes:
深渊金龙既将辐射视为一种毁灭之力，也将其视为能量来源，并与同名的放射性星铁——深渊金——紧密相连。这些龙的身体内会生长出纯净的深渊金沉积物，随着年龄增长，它们的放射性也会愈发强烈，从而导致攻击性、躁动，甚至孤独感，因为很少有生物能长期在一头年迈的深渊金龙身边存活。深渊金龙经常投身于义体强化与武器制造等事业（以利用它们与生俱来的能量源），以及机器人的建造（以陪伴自己）。这些工作驱使深渊金龙去寻找坚固、耐辐射、可用于制造的材料，而它们常常会一连数年在小型卫星和小行星上四处搜寻珍贵材料。

Drawing on radiation as both a force of destruction and a source of energy, abysium dragons are tied to the radioactive starmetal of the same name. These dragons grow deposits of pure abysium in their bodies, becoming more radioactive as they age, causing aggression, agitation, and even loneliness since not many creatures can long survive the company of an aging abysium dragon. Abysium dragons frequently turn to pursuits such as augmentation and weapon crafting (to take advantage of their innate power source) and the construction of robots (to keep them company). This work drives abysium dragons to seek out sturdy, radiation-resistant materials they can use for crafting, and they often spend years at a time scouring small moons and asteroids in search of precious materials.
Abysium Dragon (Young).allSaves: +1 status bonus to all saves vs. magic

Surnoch.name: 苏尔诺克 Surnoch

Tail Smash.name: 尾击 Tail Smash
Tail Smash.description:
角鼻龙的尾击猛砸以其所占空间的一个角为中心形成爆发。它不受该爆发影响。

The surnoch's tail smash has a burst centered on a corner of its space. It's excluded from the burst.

Corrosive Spines.name: 腐蚀棘刺 Corrosive Spines
Corrosive Spines.description:
凭借令人印象深刻的控制力，surnoch 能将其棘刺紧密成群地发射到极远的距离。所有位于 @Template[type:line|distance:30] 内的生物都会受到 @Damage[8d8[piercing]|options:area-damage] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] 豁免。若失败，该生物还会受到 @Damage[1d8[persistent,acid]|options:area-damage] 伤害（若严重失败则改为受到 @Damage[2d8[persistent,acid]|options:area-damage] 伤害）。surnoch 在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Corrosive Spines]]{1d4 轮} 内不能再次使用“腐蚀棘刺”。

With impressive control, the surnoch can launch its spines in a tight grouping over a great distance. All creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:30] take @Damage[8d8[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save. On a failure, the creature also takes @Damage[1d8[persistent,acid]|options:area-damage] damage (or @Damage[2d8[persistent,acid]|options:area-damage] damage on a critical failure). The surnoch can't use Corrosive Spines again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Corrosive Spines]]{1d4 rounds}.

Surnoch's Kiss.name: 苏诺克之吻 Surnoch's Kiss
Surnoch's Kiss.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:25]

最长持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]]伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]]伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（1轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]]伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 3}（1轮）

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:25]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3} (1 round)

Tunneling Expert.name: 掘进专家 Tunneling Expert
Tunneling Expert.description:
苏尔诺赫虫已经适应了在地下迅速移动。掘穴时，苏尔诺赫蠕虫会在身后留下隧道。当它穿过先前由苏尔诺赫挖出的隧道移动时，其速度获得 +10 尺的状态加值。

Surnochs have adapted to move swiftly underground. When burrowing, a surnoch worm leaves a tunnel behind itself. When moving through a previously created surnoch tunnel, it gains a +10-foot status bonus to its Speed.

Surnoch.publicNotes:
苏尔诺赫栖息于宇宙各处没有生命的小行星和小型卫星上。苏尔诺赫的口器深邃如漏斗，内壁布满许多排尖锐锋利的牙齿，使其能够在啃噬并熔穿岩石与石块时，将物质碾磨粉碎。苏尔诺赫天生能够感知自身最需要哪些矿物，即使隔着数英里的岩层也能找到这些矿物。苏尔诺赫会排泄出这些矿物的浓缩形态，在其经过之后留下布满奇异合金和宝石级材料的隧道。

当多只苏尔诺赫聚集在一起时，它们的食欲会同步，从而成群结队地搜寻特定矿物。这些蠕虫会对整片区域降下毁灭，直到需求得到满足，随后又会突然彼此相攻，以示支配。

“太空蠕虫”是一个非科学术语，用来指称在异种生物学上构成复杂演化支的无脊椎动物与野兽类群，它们以浩瀚太空为家。其中一些，例如流散带蠕虫和尘蠕虫，表现出智能迹象，且彼此之间有直接亲缘关系。另一些，例如苏尔诺赫，则是各自独立演化而来，其起源对科学而言完全未知。

Surnochs inhabit lifeless asteroids and small moons throughout the cosmos. A surnoch's mouth is deep, funnel-like, and lined with numerous rows of sharp, pointed teeth, which allow it to grind matter down as it chews and melts its way through rock and stone. Surnochs have an innate sense of which minerals their bodies require most and can find these minerals even through miles of rocks. Surnochs excrete condensed forms of these minerals, leaving tunnels full of strange alloys and gem-quality materials in their wake.

When multiple surnochs gather together, their appetites synchronize, causing them to hunt for specific minerals en masse. The worms rain destruction on whole regions until their need is sated, then suddenly turn on each other in a show of dominance.

"Space worm" is a nonscientific term for a xenobiologically complex clade of invertebrate animals and beasts that make their home in the vastness of space. Some, like the diaspora and dust worms, show signs of intelligence and are directly related to each other. Others, like the surnoch, evolved separately, with their origins completely unknown to science.

Void Ooze.name: 虚空软泥怪 Void Ooze

Vitality Siphon.name: 活力虹吸 Vitality Siphon
Vitality Siphon.description:
20尺。生物若试图以魔法效果为灵光内的一名或多名生物恢复生命值，则必须对每个目标成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:25] 豁免；否则，该魔法改为治疗虚空软泥。若有生物在灵光内获得濒死状态，则该软泥恢复 @Damage[10[healing]] 生命值。

20 feet. A creature attempting to restore Hit Points with a magical effect to one or more creatures inside the aura must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:25] save for each target or else the magic heals the void ooze instead. If a creature gains the dying condition while inside the aura, the ooze regains @Damage[10[healing]] Hit Points.

Numb Senses.name: 感官麻痹 Numb Senses
Numb Senses.description:
被虚空软泥的伪足打击命中的活物必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:25] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋} 状态，直到该生物下个回合结束（若为严重失败，则改为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 和耳聋）。

这会麻痹该生物所有的感知感官（例如嗅觉、味觉和触觉），将目眩和失明状态的效果应用于该生物可能拥有的其他精准感官。

A living creature hit by a void ooze's pseudopod Strike must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:25] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} until the end of the creature's next turn (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} and deafened on a critical failure).

This numbs all of the creature's perceptive senses (such as smell, taste, and touch), applying the dazzled and blinded conditions' effects to other precise senses the creature might have.

Shades Linger.name: 阴影徘徊 Shades Linger
Shades Linger.description:
虚空软泥在一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内释放出一阵魔法黑暗脉冲。非魔法光源会自动熄灭 1 分钟。该软泥还会尝试反制此区域内任何 3 环阶或更低的魔法照明效果（反制环阶 3，反制调整值 [[/r 1d20+17 #Counteract]]{+17}）。

The void ooze unleashes a pulse of magical darkness in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. Nonmagical light is automatically extinguished for 1 minute. The ooze also attempts to counteract any 3rd-rank or lower magical light effect in this area (counteract rank 3, counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+17 #Counteract]]{+17}).

Void Ooze.publicNotes:
虚空软泥是整个银河系乃至更远区域中航天旅者的灾厄，它们从虚界滑入物质宇宙。这些生物在太空中漂浮，处于永恒的休眠状态，直到降落在小行星或宇宙飞船上，才会被细微的生命迹象唤醒。仅凭一只足够幸运、找到战场的软泥，整片群落就能在一夜之间形成；它们先吞食无人地带中的死者与伤者，随后蔓延开来，吞噬那些被战争折磨得筋疲力尽的士兵营地。

许多类型的软泥潜伏在银河各处黑暗而荒废的地方，只有在满足食欲并威胁冒险者、探索者和倒霉工人时才会现身。

A scourge to spacefarers across the galaxy and beyond, void oozes slip into the Universe from the Netherworld. These creatures float through space in eternal hibernation until they land on a planetoid or spaceship, awoken by the subtle signs of life. Entire colonies can form overnight from a single ooze lucky enough to find a battlefield, consuming the deceased and wounded in no man's land before spreading to consume the camps of war-weary soldiers.

Oozes of many types lurk in dark and abandoned places across the galaxy, emerging only to satiate their appetites and threaten adventurers, explorers, and hapless workers alike.

Akashic Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).name: 阿卡西巨龙（成年，施法者） Akashic Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster)
Akashic Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).tokenName: 阿卡西巨龙（成年，施法者） Akashic Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster)

Occult Prepared Spells.name: 异能预备法术 Occult Prepared Spells

Occult Innate Spells.name: 异能本能法术 Occult Innate Spells

Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only.name: 位面间传送（随意；仅自身；仅限往返于阿卡西记录与物质宇宙） Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only; to and from Akashic Record and the Universe only)
Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only.description:
需求 你具有目标位面的位面密钥用于给法术定位

你和你的盟友跨越位面之间的屏障进行旅行。目标移动至其他位面，比如火元素位面、幽界、或者外层裂隙。你必须知晓目标位面的存在，而且需要使用由该位面的物质制作的魔法位面密钥来给法术定位。就如同跨界传送这个法术本身一样，大多数著名位面的位面密钥具有罕见稀有度，而鲜为人知的位面及半位面通常具有稀有、甚至有可能时独特稀有度的位面密钥。

该法术极其不精准，你会出现在目标之一（由你选择）上一次造访该位面时的位置周边，误差为1d20 x 25英里。若所有目标都是初次造访某个特定位面，你们就会出现在该位面的随机位置。跨界传送不会提供返回的手段，不过除非发生了什么另外情况，否则再次施放跨界传送能让你返回自身之前身处的位面。

Truesight.name: 真景术 Truesight
Truesight.description: 你可以看见60尺内的事物的本来面貌。GM秘密骰反制检定，对抗区域中的所有幻术或者变形效果，但这只会决定你是否能看破它（例如，如果该检定成功对抗了一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的本来形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

Scouting Eye.name: 探视魔眼 Scouting Eye
Scouting Eye.description:
你在你能看见的500尺范围内，创造一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}的、漂浮的、直径1英寸的眼睛。它如你通常的视觉感官，能看见所有的方向，并且会持续将其所见传送给你。

每轮你第一次维持该法术时，你可以移动该眼睛30尺，且只看见眼睛前方的事物，或者移动其10尺，但能看到周围所有方向的事物。眼睛移动离开你能到达的距离没有限制，但是当你和眼睛不再处于相同的位面时，法术立即结束。你如果你想通过眼睛尝试察觉检定，你可以通过眼睛尝试搜索动作。对眼睛造成的任何伤害会摧毁它并结束该法术。

Subjective Reality.name: 主观现实 Subjective Reality
Subjective Reality.description:
你改变自己的感知，让自己相信另一个生物或物体是幻象。选择一个你在射程内能够感知到的物体或生物。对你而言，目标变得透明，并且不会发出声音、气味或其他感官输出。你可以穿过目标移动，目标也可以穿过你移动。你获得对所有源自目标的伤害的抗性，数值等于你的等级。如果你成为目标的某个能力或效果的目标，或处于其区域内，则目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[flat|dc:5]，若其失败，你不受该能力或效果影响。你免疫目标所有基于听觉、语言和气味的攻击与效果。你的攻击对目标不造成伤害，且目标免疫你的法术和其他效果。你与目标仍可通过间接方式彼此影响，例如通过仆从的打击，或通过受巫战曲者量子场影响的环境。当此法术结束时，目标在24小时内免疫主观现实。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.4P2rPLVKjSpUbOWI]{法术效果：主观现实}

You alter your perceptions to convince yourself that another creature or object is an illusion. Choose one object or creature you can perceive within range. For you, the target becomes transparent and doesn't create sound, smell, or other sensory output. You can move through the target, and the target can move through you. You gain resistance to all damage originating from the target equal to your level. If you are targeted by or are in the area of one of the target's abilities or effects, the target must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5], and if it fails, you're unaffected by the ability or effect. You're immune to all of the target's auditory, linguistic, and scent-based attacks and effects. Your attacks deal no damage to the target, and the target is immune to your spells and other effects. You and the target can affect one another indirectly, such as through a Strike from a minion or through the environment affected by a witchwarper's quantum field. When this spell ends, the target becomes immune to subjective reality for 24 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.4P2rPLVKjSpUbOWI]{Spell Effect: Subjective Reality}

Truespeech.name: 真言语 Truespeech
Truespeech.description:
无论什么语言，目标都可以理解其所有的词语，并且向其他生物用该语言交流。当处于一群各异的生物中时，每次目标将要说话，他可以选择一个生物，并使用一种该生物理解的语言来讲述，即使该目标不知道这语言具体是什么。

升阶（7环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Clairvoyance.name: 鹰眼术 Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description: 你在射程内创造出一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}的悬浮眼睛（它甚至可以在你的视觉线或者效果线之外）。这只眼睛不能移动，但是你可以从该处看到所有方向，如同使用你通常的视觉感官。

Confusion.name: 困惑术 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你使用奇怪的能量波动扰乱了目标的思维，令其随机行动。法术效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标胡言乱语，并且获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑 Confused}1分钟。在其每个回合结束，它能尝试一次新豁免来结束困惑术。

大失败 目标困惑1分钟，并且没有提前结束的豁免。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Eldritch Wrath.name: 邪异之怒 Eldritch Wrath
Eldritch Wrath.description:
你引导存在于物质宇宙外围边际之外的诡异力量，幻影般的利爪、颚部和触手猛然抽向区域内的每个目标，对该区域内每个生物造成 3d12 点精神伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试一次意志豁免。对于任何因该法术效果而陷入恶心状态的生物来说，该区域都是困难地形。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d12。

You channel the bizarre powers that exist beyond the outer reaches of the universe, dealing 3d12 mental damage to each creature in the area as phantasmal claws, jaws, and tentacles lash out at each target. Each creature in the area must attempt a Will save. The area is difficult terrain for any creature sickened by the effects of this spell.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Weight of Ages.name: 岁月之重 Weight of Ages
Weight of Ages.description:
你以一生的痛苦与悲伤加重一个生物的身心负担。目标受到 3d8 钝击伤害和 3d8 精神伤害，并且必须进行一次意志豁免检定。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全额伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{负重} 1 轮。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，并且陷入负重 1 分钟。

升环（+1） 精神伤害增加 2d8。

You burden a creature's body and mind with the pains and sorrows of a lifetime. The target takes 3d8 bludgeoning damage and 3d8 mental damage and must attempt a Will saving throw.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{Encumbered} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is encumbered for 1 minute.

Heightened (+1) The mental damage increases by 2d8.

Clairaudience.name: 锐耳术 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description: 你在射程内创造出一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}的悬浮耳朵（它甚至可以在你的视觉线或者效果线之外）。它不能移动，但是你可以通过该耳朵听到声音，如同你通常的听觉感官。

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法强化了目标，令其行动迅速。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}状态，并且每轮可以使用该额外动作以打击或者行走。

升阶（7环级） 你能以至多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Hypercognition.name: 极化认知 Hypercognition
Hypercognition.description: 你高速分类整理与你当前情况相关的信息。如施放该法术的一部分，你可以立即使用6个回忆知识动作。对于这些动作，你不能使用任何在你回忆知识时触发的特殊能力，反应动作，或者自由动作。

Mind Reading.name: 读心术 Mind Reading
Mind Reading.description:
你通过一次短暂的心灵接触来尝试阅读目标的想法。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。目标会暂时免疫你的读心术1小时。

大成功 目标得知当施放该法术时你模糊的表层想法。

成功 你得知目标的智力调整值是高于，等于，还是低于你。

失败 你得知当施放该法术时目标模糊的表层想法，并且你得知目标的智力是高于，等于，还是低于你。

大失败 如失败，并且在法术持续时间中，你可以维持该法术来再次侦测目标的表层想法。目标不会获得另外的豁免。

Humanoid Form.name: 类人形态 Humanoid Form
Humanoid Form.description:
你将自身变成某种中型或者小型类人生物的外观，例如矮人、精灵、地精、半身人、人类或者兽人。处于该形态时，包含你本来的其他特征，并获得类人特征，以及其他与该生物类型相关的特征（例如地精或者人类）。如果该变形减少了你的体型，他也会对应减少你的触及（通常减少到5尺）。该变形不会改变你的任何数据，并且你不会获得你变形为的类人形态的任何特殊能力。你仍然可以穿戴和使用你的装备，它会改变大小来适应你的新形态（仅如果需要）。如果物品离开你，它会回到本来的大小。

类人形态 赋予你在假装成所选择族裔的欺骗检定上+4状态加值，并且你会加上你的等级，即使你未受训，但是你不能让你看起来像某个特定的人。如果你想要乔装某个个人，你仍然需要制造伪装，但GM不会将族裔不同计入你的欺骗检定DC中。你可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.B9Hzt4ki8eqlXxyh]{Spell Effect: Humanoid Form}

升阶（3环级） 如果你变作的形态有，则你获得黑暗视觉或者昏暗视觉。

升阶（5环级） 你可以变为大型类人生物的外形。这会增加你的体型，你获得变巨术的效果。

Stupefy.name: 愚者之思 Stupefy
Stupefy.description:
你令目标精神迟钝，基于其意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 1}，持续1分钟。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 2}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 3}，持续1分钟。

Translate.name: 通译语言 Translate
Translate.description:
在你施放该法术时，目标会理解其正听到或者阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会令其能够理解密文，使用隐喻表达的含义，或者类似的内容（由GM所判定）。如果目标能够听见数种语言并且了解该情况，它能选择要理解的那种语言；否则，随机选择这种语言。

升阶（3环级） 该目标也能使用该语言交流。

升阶（4环级） 你能以至多10个生物作为目标，并且这些目标也能使用该语言交流。

Akashic Download (at will).name: 阿卡西下载（随意） Akashic Download (at will)
Akashic Download (at will).description:
你对阿卡西记录执行一次灵能检索，以获取关于某个特定主题的信息，并将这些数据以魔法方式传输到你的通讯器或计算机中。当你施放此法术时，选择一项你已受训且拥有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}动作的技能。

在持续时间内的任意时刻，当你尝试使用所选技能进行一次回忆知识检定时，你都可以查阅你的通讯器。此次检定获得+1状态加值。查阅你的通讯器是回忆知识动作的一部分。你必须手持该通讯器才能这么做。通讯器会立即整理并显示与该主题相关的各种媒体中的片段和摘录，从而使你获得该加值。如果你在此次检定中掷出严重失败，则改为失败。如果此次检定成功，且对象是一个生物，你会获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。你一旦查阅了通讯器，该法术便结束。当法术结束时，你对阿卡西记录的访问也会结束，而你下载的所有信息都会返回阿卡西记录。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{法术效果：阿卡西下载}

升阶（3环） 该法术结束前，你可以查阅你的通讯器三次。

You execute a psychic search of the Akashic Record for information about a specific topic and magically transfer this data to your comm unit or computer. When you Cast this Spell, choose any skill in which you're trained that has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action.

Any time during the duration, you can consult your comm unit while attempting a Recall Knowledge check using your chosen skill. This check gains a +1 status bonus. Checking your comm unit is part of the action to Recall Knowledge. You must be holding the comm unit to do so. The comm unit instantly compiles and displays snippets and selections from various media relevant to the topic, which grants you the bonus. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the check is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature. Once you reference the comm unit, the spell ends. When the spell ends, your access to the Akashic Record ends, and all the information you downloaded returns to the Akashic Record.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{Spell Effect: Akashic Download}

Heightened (3rd) You can reference your comm unit three times before the spell ends.

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你专注于目标，在魔法全息影像显示信息的同时收集数据。施法完成后，你会获知关于目标的生物特征信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况以及其他基础生理信息。你或任何经你告知该分析结果的人，在对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充}、对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}，以及对其进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定时，获得 +1 状态加值。若目标是虚幻之物，或处于幻术魔法的效果之下，只有当该效果的环阶低于你的分析目标法术的环阶时，你才能察觉到这一点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{法术效果：分析目标}

强化（3环） 状态加值提高至 +2，且你的目标最多可以为 10 个生物。

强化（6环） 状态加值提高至 +3，且你可以将任意数量的生物作为目标。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Daze.name: 晕眩术 Daze
Daze.description:
你侵入目标的精神，利用精神冲击令目标晕眩。该冲击造成1d6心灵伤害，具有基础意志豁免。如果目标在豁免中大失败，它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 该伤害增加1d6。

Delete.name: 删除 Delete
Delete.description:
你以一个夸张华丽的魔法手势删除一个装置或物体中的数据。这些数据可能是手写、印刷或数字形式。你最多可以删除相当于1,500个单词的文本、一页内容，或一个显示屏上的文本或其他视觉信息。无人看管或被持握的物体中或上的非魔法文字会被自动删除。尝试一次反制检定来删除数字或魔法文字。如果你未能删除属于一个险境一部分的文字，你会触发该险境。这不能用于删除法术书或类似用于储存魔法公式或法术的载体中的内容。

如果你的目标是一个带有追踪特征的有人持用科技物品，尝试一次反制检定。成功时，该物品变为故障 1。持握该物品的生物可以执行“交互”来重启软件，使故障值减少1。

强化（7环） 你可以删除单个装置或书籍中本地存储的全部数据，或删除一个装置或书籍上与某个特定名称、主题或类别相关的全部数据。

You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Disguise Magic.name: 伪装灵光 Disguise Magic
Disguise Magic.description:
你改变一个物品或者魔法的灵光会如何作用于侦测魔法（Detect Magic）这类效果。你可以完全隐藏灵光，让一个物品看起来是普通物品或者更低等级的物品，或者让一个法术看起来是相同获得更低环级的常见法术。你可以解消该法术。使用比伪装灵光更高环级的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{侦测魔法 Detect Magic}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.OhD2Z6rIGGD5ocZA]{阅读灵光 Read Aura}可以通过使用对应该法术的技能（奥术为奥法，神术为宗教，异能为神秘，原能为自然）来尝试不相信幻觉。相同的施法者的进一步的不相信尝试会得到与初次检定相同的结果。

升阶（2环级） 你可以对一个生物施放该法术，伪装其身上所有的物品和魔法效果。

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，拓展神智，以感受魔法灵光。当你完成施法后，你得知该物品是否具有魔法。你或者你共有了灵光情报的人在对该物品@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic}时获得+2环境加值。如果该物体是幻象，仅当该效果的环级低于你的阅读灵光环级时你才能发现此事实。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.J6OhRNSN23KzOPRL]{Spell Effect: Read Aura}

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多10个物体为目标。

升阶（8环级） 你能以任意数量物体为目标。

Shield.name: 护盾 Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一面力场构成的魔法护盾。这视同你使用了举起盾牌动作，赋予你在AC上的+1环境加值，直到你的下个回合开始，但这里不需要手来使用。

当该法术生效时，你可以使用你的魔法护盾来进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡 Shield Block}反应动作。该盾牌具有硬度5。你可以使用该法术的反应动作来减少任何来自法术或者魔法效果的伤害，即使这不造成物理伤害。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，并且你无法在10分钟内再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

升阶（+2） 该盾牌的硬度增加5。

Sure Strike.name: 料敌机先 Sure Strike
Sure Strike.description:
在你的回合结束前，你下一次尝试攻击骰时，骰两次并使用较好的结果。该攻击会忽视对攻击骰的环境减值，以及其他任何目标@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}所导致的纯骰检定。然后你临时免疫料敌机先10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: Sure Strike}

Akashic Eye.name: 阿卡西之眼 Akashic Eye
Akashic Eye.description:
阿卡西龙无需运用自身记忆，而是能够从阿卡西记录中获取信息。这使其获得阿卡西记录学识技能，并可用其对任何类型进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}。

Instead of using their own memories, an Akashic dragon can ascertain information from the Akashic Records. This gives it the Akashic Record Lore skill, which it can use to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} of any kind.

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult.name: 对抗神秘时所有豁免检定获得 +2 状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult

Akashic Interference.name: 阿卡西干扰 Akashic Interference
Akashic Interference.description:
90尺。阿卡西巨龙附近持续不断的上传与下载漩涡，使得尝试 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 变得难以预测。进入该区域或在该区域内开始其回合的、除阿卡西巨龙以外的生物，必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:28] 豁免。无论此次豁免检定结果如何，该生物都会暂时免疫这条巨龙的阿卡西干扰，持续1分钟。

大成功 1轮内，当该生物尝试回忆知识时，其检定获得+3状态加值。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 1轮内，当该生物尝试回忆知识时，其检定承受–3状态减值。

大失败 同失败，但该效果持续1分钟。

90 feet. The swirl of constant uploads and downloads near the Akashic dragon make attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} unpredictable. A creature other than an akashic dragon that enters or begins its turn in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:28] save. Regardless of the result of the saving throw, the creature is temporarily immune to this dragon's Akashic interference for 1 minute.

Critical Success For 1 round, when the creature attempts to Recall Knowledge, it gains a +3 status bonus to its check.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure For 1 round, when the creature attempts to Recall Knowledge, it takes a –3 status penalty to its check.

Critical Failure As failure, but the effect lasts 1 minute.

Deflecting Lasers.name: 偏转激光束 Deflecting Lasers
Deflecting Lasers.description:
触发条件 巨龙被一次攻击重击命中

效果 阿卡西巨龙利用嵌布于其全身的眼睛升起一张偏转激光之网，对触发此次反应的攻击获得对所有伤害 15 的抗性，并吸收此次打击的部分能量，为其阿卡西弹幕充能。如果阿卡西巨龙在过去 1 分钟内曾对该生物的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定成功，则其改为获得抗性 20。

Trigger The dragon is critically hit by an attack

Effect The Akashic dragon raises a web of deflecting lasers using the eyes embedded all over their body, gaining resistance 15 to all damage against the triggering attack and absorbing some of the blow's energy, recharging their Akashic Barrage. If the Akashic dragon has succeeded at a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} check against the creature in the last minute, they gain resistance 20 instead.

Akashic Adaptability.name: 阿卡西适应性 Akashic Adaptability
Akashic Adaptability.description:
阿卡西巨龙可以像其中所含法术是神秘法术一样，以任意传统的“施放法术”激活方式来激活魔法和科技物品。

The Akashic dragon can activate magic and tech items with the Cast a Spell activation of any tradition as if the spells they contain were occult spells.

Akashic Barrage.name: 阿卡西弹幕 Akashic Barrage
Akashic Barrage.description:
巨龙将来自阿卡西记录的尖锐真理与炽烈启示凝聚为嘶鸣的激光火焰，并从其主眼中以锥形喷射而出，袭击敌人。这会造成 @Damage[14d6[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害，范围为 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]（@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:stupefied] 豁免）。如果一个生物在对抗阿卡西齐射的反射豁免中严重失败，且阿卡西巨龙在过去 1 分钟内曾成功对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定，则该生物会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续 1 轮。巨龙在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Akashic Barrage]]{1d4 轮} 内不能再次使用阿卡西齐射。

The dragon condenses cutting truths and fiery revelations from the Akashic Record into sizzling laser fire that they project as a cone from their primary eye to assail their foes. This deals @Damage[14d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:stupefied] save). If a creature critically fails its Reflex save against Akashic Barrage and the Akashic dragon has succeeded at a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about the creature in the last minute, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round. The dragon can't use Akashic Barrage again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Akashic Barrage]]{1d4 rounds}.

Records of the Enemy.name: 敌人记录 Records of the Enemy
Records of the Enemy.description:
每次遭遇中，阿卡西巨龙第一次用其颚部打击命中并对一个生物造成伤害时，他们会获得关于该生物的信息，如同他们在针对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定时成功了一样。

The first time each encounter the Akashic dragon hits and deals damage to a creature with their jaws Strike, they receive information about the creature as if they'd succeeded at a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about that creature.

Shocking Revelation.name: 惊人揭露 Shocking Revelation
Shocking Revelation.description:
需求 龙在过去 1 分钟内，已成功对 90 英尺内的一名敌人进行回忆知识

效果 龙说出一个关于该生物的惊人真相，甚至连它自己都可能不知道，从而使其及其盟友迟疑不决或行动失常。每个 90 英尺内能够听到这个秘密的敌人都必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:31|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed,inflicts:confused] 豁免。随后，每个生物在 24 小时内对惊人揭露免疫。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}，持续 1 轮。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 2}，持续 1 轮。

大失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{混乱}，持续 1 轮。

Requirements The dragon has successfully Recalled Knowledge about an enemy within 90 feet within the last minute

Effect The dragon utters a shocking truth about the creature that even it might not know, causing it and its allies to hesitate or act erratically. Every enemy within 90 feet that can hear the secret must attempt a @Check[will|dc:31|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed,inflicts:confused] save. Each creature is then immune to Shocking Revelation for 24 hours.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round.

Akashic Record Lore.name: 阿卡西记录学识 Akashic Record Lore

Akashic Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).publicNotes:
阿卡西巨龙虽然很少在其摇摇欲坠、堆满遗物的巢穴之外被遇见，但偶尔也会居住在知识的中心枢纽中，例如繁忙的空间站或城市。这些巨龙被赋予了与阿卡西记录的直接连接，是傲慢的知识策展者，认为（而且往往确实如此）其他任何存在都不可能比它们更深刻地理解宇宙的秘密。阿卡西巨龙会在阿卡西记录中度过漫长时间，常常在它们感觉已过去许多天后现身，而对银河系的其他人而言却仅仅过去了几个小时。

Though rarely encountered outside their crumbling, relic-filled lairs, Akashic dragons occasionally live in hubs of knowledge, such as bustling space stations or cities. These dragons, bestowed with a direct connection to the Akashic Record, are arrogant curators of knowledge, assuming (often correctly) that no other being could possibly have a deeper understanding of the universe's secrets. Akashic dragons spend extensive time in the Akashic Record, often emerging after what they perceive as many days while mere hours have passed for the rest of the galaxy.
Akashic Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).allSaves: +2 status to all saves vs. occult

Zitteroc.name: 齐特罗克 Zitteroc

Poison Sense.name: 毒素感知 Poison Sense
Poison Sense.description:
齐特罗克可以在所列距离内以一种不精确感知侦测到毒素，包括有毒物质、中毒的生物，以及其攻击会造成毒素的生物。

A zitteroc can detect poison as an imprecise sense at the listed range, including poisonous substances, poisoned creatures, and creatures with attacks that inflict poison.

Sickening Death.name: 致病死亡 Sickening Death
Sickening Death.description:
频率 每天一次

触发器 齐特罗克受到伤害

效果 齐特罗克释放出一阵酸液喷洒，对 @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] 内的每个生物造成 @Damage[4d4[acid]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] 豁免），然后使用“装死”。

Frequency once per day

Trigger The zitteroc takes damage

Effect The zitteroc releases a spray of acid in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15], dealing @Damage[4d4[acid]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature in the area (@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] save), then uses Still as a Corpse.

Shimmer Hide.name: 微光兽皮 Shimmer Hide
Shimmer Hide.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 齐特罗克专注于改变其外皮图案以匹配周围环境。直到其下个回合开始前，距离它超过 15 尺的生物会将齐特罗克视为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

Frequency once per round

Effect The zitteroc focuses on shifting its hide pattern to match its surroundings. The zitteroc becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to creatures more than 15 feet away from it until the start of its next turn.

Siphon Poison.name: 虹吸毒素 Siphon Poison
Siphon Poison.description:
需求 齐特罗克的上一动作是一次成功的颚部打击

效果 齐特罗克从被击中目标的血流中吸取毒素。若目标正受到一种毒药影响，或拥有一种天生毒素，齐特罗克会吞噬该毒素以强化自身能力。该毒素效果在目标身上被压制 1 轮，或者目标直到其下一回合结束前都无法使用其天生毒素。直到齐特罗克下一回合结束前，齐特罗克的颚部和酸液喷吐打击，以及“致病死亡”的酸蚀伤害骰尺寸提升一级（通常提升为 d6）。

Requirements The zitteroc's last action was a successful mandibles Strike

Effect The zitteroc siphons poison from the struck target's bloodstream. If the target is afflicted by a poison or possesses a natural poison, the zitteroc consumes that poison to empower its own abilities. The poison effect is suppressed on the target for 1 round, or the target can't use its natural poison until the end of its next turn. Until the end of the zitteroc's next turn, the zitteroc increases its acid damage die size for its mandibles and acid spit Strikes, and Sickening Death, by one step (typically to d6s).

Still as a Corpse.name: 仍如一具尸体 Still as a Corpse
Still as a Corpse.description:
直到它下一次行动之前，这只齐特罗克看起来像是死了。它在伪装成死去的齐特罗克时，@Check[deception] 检定和 DC 的自动结果为 21。

Until the next time it acts, the zitteroc appears to be dead. It has an automatic result of 21 on @Check[deception] checks and DCs to pass as a dead zitteroc.

Zitteroc.publicNotes:
齿颤鳄是原产于卡兹穆格的荒诞星域中阿冉首星的一种凶残爬行动物。由于当地阿冉人热衷于贸易，这些生物已传播到宇宙各地，并在银河系各种湿地中找到了新的栖息地。齿颤鳄因其能够天生侦测、并以某种方式无视哪怕最猛烈毒素的能力而闻名整个银河。它们能从目标体内汲取这类毒素，并将其转化为自身消化酸液的燃料来源。即便在完成这种汲毒过程后，齿颤鳄体内仍能发现微量毒素，而新鲜的齿颤鳄尸体对生物技术员和制药专家来说，往往是一座充满药用物质的宝库。

齿颤鳄成熟后站立时仅有2到3英尺高，体长则大约是这个高度的两倍。它们拥有一种病态的蓝色外皮，闪烁着如浮油般的光泽，并能通过专注呈现出周围环境的粗糙特性。此外，当受到猎人或更危险掠食者的威胁时，它们还能装出令人作呕的濒死状态。这些通常温顺的食肉动物，一旦来自危险性较低动物的充足食物耗尽，便会变得凶暴起来，并在那时进入文明边缘地带。

Zitterocs are vicious reptilians native to the Kazmurg's Absurdity world of Azhan Prime. Due to the native Azhans' propensity for trading, these creatures have made their way across the cosmos and found new homes in the galaxy's various wetlands. Zitterocs are renowned across the galaxy for their ability to innately detect and somehow ignore even the most virulent poisons. They can siphon such poisons from targets and convert them into a fuel source for their digestive acids.
