你立即将自身以及自己正在穿戴和持有的物品从当前空间转移走，移动至法术射程内你能看到的未被占据的空间。如果这将会带着其他生物与你一同移动——即便你把该生物放置在异次元容器中——你就会失去该法术。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至1英里。你不需要看到目的地，只要你曾经去过目的地，并且知晓该地点与你相对的位置以及距离即可。之后你会在1小时内临时免疫该法术。

Discharge (at will).name: 放电（随意） Discharge (at will)
Discharge (at will).description:
你引燃一道突如其来的电火花，涌入一个科技生物或物体。你使一个具有科技特征的物品失去能量，或扰乱一个具有科技特征的生物；其效果取决于目标是生物还是物体。

  • 生物 如果你的目标是一个具有科技特征的生物，它必须进行一次意志豁免。若失败，该生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}；若大失败，该生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}。
  • 物体 如果你的目标是一个被持用的物体，则持有该物体的生物进行一次意志豁免。若成功，该物体失去其最大充能的一半。若失败，或者你的目标是一个无人持用的物体，则该物体失去其所有剩余充能。

You ignite a sudden spark of electricity that surges into a technological creature or object. You de-energize an item with the tech trait or disrupt a creature with the tech trait, with effects based on the target being a creature or object.

  • Creature If your target is a creature with the tech trait, it attempts a Will save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}; on a critical failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.
  • Object If you target an attended object, the creature with the object attempts a Will save. On a success, the object loses half of its maximum charges. On a failure, or if you target an unattended object, the object loses all its remaining charges.

Instant Virus (at will).name: 瞬发病毒（随意） Instant Virus (at will)
Instant Virus (at will).description:
你的碰触会植入一种危险的自我复制病毒，扰乱一个科技生物的程序。目标必须进行一次强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}。

失败 目标陷入故障 1，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

大失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2}。

Your touch installs a dangerous self-replicating virus that disrupts a technological creature's programming. The target must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}.

Failure The target is glitching 1 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Thoughtsense.name: 思维感知 Thoughtsense
Thoughtsense.description:
deh-nolo 能以所列距离内的精确感官感知生物的心智本质；它们无法用思想感知感知无心智生物。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Thoughtsense]

The deh-nolo senses a creature's mental essence as a precise sense with the listed range; they can't sense mindless creatures with thoughtsense.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Thoughtsense]

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Brain Loss.name: 脑损伤 Brain Loss
Brain Loss.description:
如果一名 deh-nolo 因一次重击受到 60 点伤害，或受到 50 点精神伤害，则其必须成功通过一次 DC 34 的豁免（重击伤害为 @Check[fortitude|dc:34]，精神伤害为 @Check[will|dc:34]），否则其一个脑囊会被摧毁。

If a deh-nolo takes 60 damage from a critical hit or takes 50 mental damage, they must succeed at a DC 34 save (@Check[fortitude|dc:34] for critical damage or @Check[will|dc:34] for mental damage) or one of their brain sacs is destroyed.

Brain Sacs.name: 脑囊 Brain Sacs
Brain Sacs.description:
一只夺脑魔有四个脑囊，它们用这些脑囊来储存收割来的大脑。每储存在一个脑囊中的大脑，夺脑魔就会额外懂得一种语言，这种语言从该生物在其大脑被收割时所知晓的语言中选择。若一只夺脑魔的四个脑囊没有全部装满，它便会陷入【迟钝】，其数值等于空脑囊的数量。

A deh-nolo snatcher has four brain sacs that they use to store harvested brains. A deh-nolo knows one additional language for each brain they have stored in a brain sac, chosen from the languages that the creature knew when its brain was harvested. A deh-nolo without all four sacs full is stupefied with a value equal to the number of empty sacs.

Open Pustules.name: 开放脓疱 Open Pustules
Open Pustules.description:
当deh-nolo受到伤害时，其身体上的脓疱会爆裂，喷洒出恶臭的毒液。每个相邻的生物都会暴露于支配胆汁。

When the deh-nolo takes damage, pustules on their body burst, spraying foul poison. Each adjacent creature is exposed to dominion bile.

Dominion Bile.name: 支配胆汁 Dominion Bile
Dominion Bile.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:34]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[4d6[poison]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] 伤害、虚弱 1，以及 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[6d6[poison]] 伤害、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}，以及 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 2}（1 轮）

阶段 4 死亡

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:34]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[4d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] damage, enfeebled 1, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} (1 round)

Stage 4 death

Harvest Brain.name: 收割大脑 Harvest Brain
Harvest Brain.description:
deh-nolo 收割一名死亡不超过 1 分钟的生物的大脑。然后，它们可以使用一个 交互 动作，将该大脑固定在它们其中一个空的脑囊中。

The deh-nolo harvests the brain of a creature that's been dead for no more than 1 minute. They can then use an Interact action to secure the brain in one of their empty brain sacs.

Lore (all subcategories).name: 学识（所有子类别） Lore (all subcategories)

Deh-Nolo.publicNotes:
德赫-诺洛斯是统御体最杰出的工程师，能够天衣无缝且阴险狡诈地将科技与生物系统融合，制造出任何可以想象的装置——从邪恶的武器到庞大的星舰，再到舰载心智软泥。它们的这些造物是培育出来的，而不是制造出来的，但它们既不是电控机械，也不是生物工程——而是介于两者之间的某种存在。德赫-诺洛斯试图理解它们所遇到的一切技术，并且它们认为，吞食任何可能帮助自己更好理解陌生装置之人的大脑，是它们的权利。再说，德赫-诺洛斯几乎会为了任何理由吞食大脑，因为在它们眼中，统御体之外的一切生命形式都只是低等存在。

尽管大体上属于有机体，德赫-诺洛斯仍能将自身闪烁的液态金属分泌物凝聚成恶臭的晶体，并将其用作投射物或其扭曲发明中的机械部件。漫不经心的旁观者可能会以为这些造物具有生物科技性质，因为它们往往看起来像是萎缩的器官和变异的身体部位，被看似粗陋或不完整的线路勉强拼接在一起。那些试图将德赫-诺洛斯技术作为强化植入自己身体的人，通常会遭受可怕的痛苦并凄惨死去，即便他们 somehow 设法分离或排出了德赫-诺洛斯异星血肉天然产生的毒素。即使是对德赫-诺洛斯技术进行侵入性更低的实验，也同样不可预测且危险，而所谓“成功”结果所带来的后果，充其量也只是令人不安。

Deh-nolos are the Dominion's foremost engineers, seamlessly and deviously merging technology and biological systems to create any device imaginable, from sinister weapons to massive starships to shipmind oozes. These creations are grown, not built, but they're neither cybernetics nor biotech—rather, something in between. Deh-nolos seek to understand all technology they encounter, and they believe it's their right to consume the brain of anyone they think might help them better understand an unfamiliar device. Then again, deh-nolos have no qualms about consuming brains for nearly any reason, seeing all forms of life outside the Dominion as lesser beings.

While mostly organic, deh-nolos can concentrate their shimmering liquid metal secretions into foul crystals that they can use as projectiles or mechanical components for their twisted inventions. A casual onlooker might assume these creations are biotechnological in nature, as they often look like atrophied organs and mutated body parts held together by seemingly crude or incomplete circuitry. Those who attempt to incorporate deh-nolo technology into their bodies as augmentations typically experience terrible pain and grisly deaths, even if they somehow manage to isolate or drain the toxins naturally produced by a deh-nolo's alien flesh. Even less intrusive experiments with deh-nolo technology are unpredictable and dangerous, and the results of a "successful" outcome are disturbing at best.

Athraxer.name: 阿瑟拉克斯 Athraxer

Motion Sense.name: 动作感知 Motion Sense
Motion Sense.description:
阿斯拉克瑟能通过由移动在空气或水中引起的振动感知附近的生物，作为一项在所列距离内的模糊感知。

An athraxer can sense nearby creatures through vibrations in air or water caused by movement as an imprecise sense at the listed range.

Acid Blood.name: 强酸血液 Acid Blood
Acid Blood.description:
对邻近的阿斯拉克瑟造成挥砍或穿刺伤害的生物，会被酸性血液喷溅，并受到 2 点持续性强酸伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:14|basic] 豁免）。

An adjacent creature that deals slashing or piercing damage to the athraxer is sprayed with acidic blood and takes 2 persistent acid damage (@Check[reflex|dc:14|basic] save).

Colony Mind.name: 群体意识 Colony Mind
Colony Mind.description:
30尺。所有彼此处于所列范围内且具有群体思维的盟友都处于恒常的心灵感应交流之中，并知晓任意个体所知的所有威胁。当一个生物位于至少一名具有群体思维的盟友的范围内时，若其对一个精神效果进行豁免检定并获得成功，则改为获得大成功。

30 feet. All allies with colony mind within the listed range of each other are in constant telepathic communication and are aware of all threats any individual knows about. While within range of at least one ally with colony mind, when a creature rolls a success on a save against a mental effect, it gets a critical success instead.

Death Throe.name: 临终挣扎 Death Throe
Death Throe.description:
触发条件 athraxer 将要死亡

效果 athraxer 先对其触及范围内的一个生物进行一次爪击打击，然后死亡。

Trigger The athraxer would die

Effect The athraxer first makes a claw Strike against a creature in reach, then dies.

Athraxer.publicNotes:
虫群入侵时会将阿斯拉克斯作为步兵部署。它们无畏而凶暴，对于侦察一个世界的环境与防御至关重要。一艘虫群飞船就能携带数千枚处于停滞状态的卵。

虫群在浩界深处由一种名为虫族的类昆虫物种发展而来，被若干文明视为现存最大的威胁。它由无数子殖群组成，而每个子殖群又由无数组成性的亚种构成；虫群是一支庞大的群体，通过灵能联合行动，以吞噬宇宙间的一切物质为目标。最可怕的是，虫群能够同化它们所吞噬对象的知识与DNA。由于其在大断层之前就已发展出星际旅行能力，虫群早在历史中断之前便已吞噬了无数星系，而在获得信标以及被称为漂流域的超空间维度之后，虫群扩张的速度更是进一步加快。

被虫群触及的世界会被抽干自然资源，沦为被称作“空壳世界”的荒芜之地。外界所认为的“虫群领空”，不过是在虫群鲁莽推进中被其吞噬的一大片死寂世界。虫群对这些世界的剥夺极其彻底，以至于勘测者甚至连稀有矿物和水这类无机资源的痕迹都难以找到。很少有这些空壳世界被彻底探索过，因为探索往往会唤醒休眠的工蜂；理论认为，它们是被留下来的，以防这个被吞噬的星系未来再次遭到殖民并恢复生机。在这片星域之外更远的地方，仍存在着零星的虫群活动，因为虫群在大断层之前的漫长岁月里派出了无数子殖群，而即使到了现在，也只有其中一部分到达了预定目的地。

在当今时代，虫群最广为人知的也许是两件重要事实。第一，它对协约世界和维斯卡里姆的进攻，促成了这两大势力停止敌对状态并结成脆弱的联盟。第二，虫群正是希伦族的直接祖先。希伦人在大断层期间的某个时期脱离了虫群，并从女神海拉丝那里获得了庇护；人们认为海拉丝由一种前虫群时代的虫族进化而来，并背离了虫群后来演变成的那个贪婪实体。

近些年来，虫群一直被视为不过是遥远的可怕传说，几乎没有什么活动，除了在浩界的苏斯基隆星系中进行的一些机密行动。然而，近期对失踪的塞赞迪特世界克雷西斯卡的发现，意外唤醒了一个曾对该世界遭到吞噬负有责任的休眠子殖群。自那以后，这个新近被命名为“克雷西斯卡子殖群”的群体已成为近宇的祸患，正积极入侵桑迪特联合体的诸世界，并且眼看就要蔓延至维斯卡里姆和协约世界等其他势力。这一重新现世的子殖群已经开始令其组成部分快速进化，且仍与更广泛的虫群隔绝，但它依然对近宇构成了明确威胁。

Swarm invasions deploy athraxers as infantry. Fearless and violent, they're crucial for providing reconnaissance of a world's environment and defenses. A single Swarm ship can carry thousands of eggs in stasis.

Developing far out in the Vast from an insectile species known as kucharns, the Swarm is considered the greatest threat in existence for several cultures. Composed of countless subcolonies, each consisting of myriad component subspecies, the Swarm is a vast host that acts in psychic union for the purpose of consuming all matter across the cosmos. Most frightening of all is the Swarm's ability to assimilate the knowledge and DNA of those they consume. Thanks to its pre-Gap development of star travel, the Swarm had already consumed innumerable systems before history short-circuited, and the Swarm's pace only accelerated once it received access to the Signal and the hyperspace dimension known as the Drift.

Worlds touched by the Swarm are drained of their natural resources and rendered barren places known as huskworlds. What outsiders consider to be "Swarm space" is little more than a swathe of lifeless worlds that the Swarm have consumed in its reckless advance. The Swarm so thoroughly strips these worlds that surveyors struggle to find even trace amounts of inorganic resources, such as rare minerals and water. Few of these huskworlds have been thoroughly explored, as oftentimes exploration awakens inert drones, theorized to have been left behind in case the devoured system was ever colonized and repopulated. Pockets of Swarm activity exist well beyond this region of space, as the Swarm sent out countless subcolonies in the ages before the Gap, and even now, only some of them have reached their intended destinations.

The Swarm is perhaps most known in the current era for two important facts. First, its assault on the Pact Worlds and the Veskarium led to the cessation of hostilities and tenuous alliance between the two powers. Second, the Swarm is the direct ancestor of the shirren species. Having broken away sometime during the Gap, shirrens found succor with the deity Hylax, who was believed to have evolved from a pre-Swarm kucharn and who turned her back on the ravenous entity the Swarm has evolved into.

In recent years, the Swarm had been seen as little more than a distant boogeyman with no activities save for classified actions in the Suskillon system in the Vast. However, the recent discovery of the missing Szandite world of Krethiskar inadvertently awoke a dormant subcolony that had been responsible for the world's consumption. Since then, the newly dubbed Krethiskar subcolony has become a scourge of Near Space, engaged in an active invasion of Szandite Collective worlds and poised to spill over into other powers like the Veskarium and Pact Worlds. This rediscovered subcolony has begun rapid evolution of its components and remains cut off from the wider Swarm, but it still represents a clear danger to Near Space.

Void Palm.name: 虚空之掌 Void Palm

Antigrav Interference.name: 反重力干扰 Antigrav Interference
Antigrav Interference.description:
120英尺。虚空棕榈会导致反重力科技发生故障。进入该灵光时，任何带有科技特征且采用某种形式反重力科技的物品或物件——包括反重力背带，以及大多数悬浮载具和星舰——都会变为故障 1。

120 feet. The void palm causes antigravitational technology to malfunction. Upon entering this aura, any items or objects with the tech trait that employ some form of antigrav tech, including antigrav harnesses as well as most hover vehicles and starships, become glitching 1.

Disorienting Patterns.name: 扰乱图样 Disorienting Patterns
Disorienting Patterns.description:
触发条件 一个拥有黑暗视觉且位于虚空棕榈60英尺内的生物开始其回合

需求 虚空棕榈处于黑暗中

效果 在黑暗中观察时，虚空棕榈斑驳红色棕榈叶上的纹路像遥远的星空。虚空棕榈以令人迷惑的方式摇摆其棕榈叶。触发生物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:25] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响，并在24小时内免疫迷惑纹路。

成功 该生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态，直到虚空棕榈下个回合结束。

失败 如同成功，且该生物在目眩期间，对虚空棕榈的近战打击也处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态。

大失败 如同失败，且该生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1} 状态，持续1分钟

Trigger A creature with darkvision within 60 feet of the void palm begins its turn

Requirements The void palm is in darkness

Effect The patterns on a void palm's mottled red fronds resemble a distant star field when viewed in the darkness. The void palm sways its fronds in a disorienting manner. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:25] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and becomes immune to Disorienting Patterns for 24 hours.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of the void palm's next turn.

Failure As success, and the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to the void palm's melee Strikes while it's dazzled.

Critical Failure As failure, and the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 minute

Double Lash.name: 双鞭打击 Double Lash
Double Lash.description:
虚空棕榈对同一目标进行两次横扫的叶片打击，每次都使用其当前的多重攻击减值。若两次攻击都命中，则合并其伤害。在计算虚空棕榈的多重攻击减值时，这算作两次攻击。

The void palm makes two sweeping frond Strikes against the same target, each using its current multiple attack penalty. If both attacks hit, combine their damage. This counts as two attacks when calculating the void palm's multiple attack penalty.

Gravity Void.name: 重力虚空 Gravity Void
Gravity Void.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 虚空之掌在 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内制造一片失重的黑暗区域，使该区域内的重力效果和非魔法光源失效。该区域内的魔法光源正常运作。虚空之掌不受这种失重影响，但其他生物若进入该区域或在其回合开始时位于其中，除非它们能够在失重环境中正常移动，否则会变为失控状态；它们在该区域内处于失控状态时，还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。处于失控状态的生物若试图在该区域内进行 Push Off，必须成功通过一次 @Check[flat|dc:5]，否则该动作被打断。重力虚空持续 10 分钟。

Frequency once per day

Effect The void palm creates a zero-gravity area of darkness in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20], negating the effects of gravity and non-magical light sources in the area. Magical light sources in the area work normally. The void palm is unaffected by this lack of gravity, but other creatures that enter or start their turn in the area become untethered unless they can move normally in zero-gravity environments; they're also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} while untethered in the area. An untethered creature attempting to Push Off in the area must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] or the action is disrupted. The Gravity Void lasts for 10 minutes.

Void Palm.publicNotes:
虚空棕榈对有感知的生物及其反重力技术都构成威胁。这种植物繁殖缓慢却稳定，每年都会将一批鲜亮的蓝色种子弹射向太空。被赋予的动量为大多数种子提供了足够的速度，再加上它们能够无视重力的超自然能力，使其得以逃入宇宙深处。每一粒种子都会不断漂流，直到遇到适合维系其生长的物体，无论是游荡的小行星、行星天体，还是大型星舰。

一旦嵌入合适的表面，虚空棕榈的种子便会迅速发芽。植物一经萌发，便开始从周围环境中汲取养分，而这些环境又会因植物受害者腐烂的尸体或被氧化的残骸而周期性变得肥沃。植物的叶片会定期将其区域内的遗骸和其他碎屑扫清，以免这些东西成为可供抓握或保持平衡的着力点，或让潜在猎物察觉自身所处的险境。

A void palm poses a danger to sentient creatures and their antigravity technology alike. The plant propagates slowly yet steadily by catapulting an annual yield of brilliant blue seeds spaceward. The imparted momentum provides sufficient velocity for most seeds, aided by their supernatural ability to ignore gravity, to escape into the depths of space. Each seed drifts unremittingly until it encounters an object suitable for sustaining it, whether a wandering asteroid, planetary body, or sizable starship.

Once embedded in a fitting surface, a void palm seed germinates rapidly. Upon sprouting, the plant begins drawing nutrients from its surroundings, which periodically become enriched by the decomposing corpses or the oxidizing scraps of the plant's victims. The plant's fronds routinely sweep its area clear of remains or other debris that could serve as handholds or counterbalance or that could alert potential prey to their peril.

Oma.name: 奥玛 Oma

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始本能法术 Primal Innate Spells

Chain Lightning.name: 闪电链 Chain Lightning
Chain Lightning.description:
你向目标释放一束强力的闪电，造成8d12电击伤害。目标必须尝试一次基础反射豁免。电流会跳跃到第一个目标30尺的内另一个生物上，接着跳到这个生物30尺内的下一个生物上，以此类推。你可以在任何时候终止连锁。你无法将同一个生物作为目标多于一次，并且你必须与所有的目标间有效果线。只骰一次伤害，并将其应用于每个目标（对于其豁免结果，取半或者加倍）。该连锁反应直到任何一个目标在豁免上大成功为止。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d12。

Overload Systems.name: 系统过载 Overload Systems
Overload Systems.description:
你以一波电磁干扰淹没该区域。你对区域内的生物造成 7d8 点电击伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须进行一次反射豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全部伤害，且其任何带有科技特征的物品都会变为故障 1，持续 1 分钟或直到该状况被移除。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，且其任何带有科技特征的物品都会变为故障 2，持续 1 分钟或直到该状况被移除。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1d8。

You flood the area with a wave of electrical interference. You deal 7d8 electricity damage to creatures in the area. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 1 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 2 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Discharge.name: 放电 Discharge
Discharge.description:
你引燃一道突发的电火花，使其涌入一个科技生物或物体。你使一个具有科技特征的物品失去能量，或扰乱一个具有科技特征的生物，其效果取决于目标是生物还是物体。

  • 生物 如果你的目标是一个具有科技特征的生物，它必须尝试一次意志豁免。若失败，该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}；若重度失败，该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}。
  • 物体 如果你的目标是一个被持用的物体，持有该物体的生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。若成功，该物体失去其最大充能数的一半。若失败，或如果你的目标是一个未被持用的物体，则该物体失去其所有剩余充能。

You ignite a sudden spark of electricity that surges into a technological creature or object. You de-energize an item with the tech trait or disrupt a creature with the tech trait, with effects based on the target being a creature or object.

  • Creature If your target is a creature with the tech trait, it attempts a Will save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}; on a critical failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.
  • Object If you target an attended object, the creature with the object attempts a Will save. On a success, the object loses half of its maximum charges. On a failure, or if you target an unattended object, the object loses all its remaining charges.

Starsong.name: 星歌 Starsong
Starsong.description:
虽然不是一种语言，但星歌允许奥玛彼此之间跨越太空进行心灵感应交流；奥玛可以与同一恒星系中的其他奥玛交流。任何其他拥有心灵感应的生物都可以在10,000英里的范围内接收到星歌，但不一定能够理解。

While not a language, starsong allows omas to communicate telepathically with one another across space; omas can communicate with other omas in the same star system. Any other creature with telepathy can receive but not necessarily understand starsong at a range of 10,000 miles.

Cavatina.name: 卡瓦蒂娜 Cavatina
Cavatina.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 奥玛唱出一首心灵感应之歌，鼓舞其120尺内的友军并打击其敌人的士气。每个能听见这首歌的盟友在1分钟内的攻击检定、豁免检定和技能检定获得+1状态加值。每个敌人都必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:35] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（若重度失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 3}），因为这首歌会影响他们的内耳。

Frequency once per hour

Effect The oma sings a telepathic song that encourages its friends and dispirits its foes within 120 feet. Each ally who can hear the song gains a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, saving throws, and skill checks for 1 minute. Each enemy must attempt a @Check[will|dc:35] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3} on a critical failure), as the song affects their inner ear.

Overloading Shock.name: 过载电击 Overloading Shock
Overloading Shock.description:
当奥玛以其电流释放打击造成重击时，目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[reflex|dc:35|basic] 豁免，否则目标持有的所有科技物品都会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}。

When an oma scores a critical hit with its electric discharge Strike, the target must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:35|basic] save or all tech items held by the target become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.

Oma.publicNotes:
奥玛也被称为太空鲸，它们能投射出强大的魔法电磁场，既能保护自己免受真空和有毒大气的侵害，又能让自己进食。奥玛从微粒环带和气态巨行星的浓密大气中获取养分，尽管究竟哪些物质对奥玛有营养，至今仍不得而知。研究一只正在进食的奥玛并非毫无危险。奥玛有时会不慎吞下无人机和小型星舰，例如战斗机和拦截机；而在受到挑衅时，它们也曾被发现会故意这么做。

人们观察到的大多数奥玛都是独自旅行。偶尔，奥玛会组成由三到五个个体构成的小群，依照只有它们自己知晓的洋流与时序穿越星系迁徙。在极其罕见的情况下，奥玛会在某颗行星的环带中大量聚集。它们的能量场彼此交融，并与当地气体发生反应，使大片太空在一场五彩斑斓的光辉展示中亮起。

它们最神秘却又最为人熟知的特征，是它们的星歌。星歌穿越数十亿英里的太空，是一种萦绕心头的心灵感应旋律。大多数人感知到的星歌都是低吟般的，缓慢而哀伤。没有人能就其中细节达成一致，这表明每位聆听者听到的内容都不相同。迄今为止，翻译星歌的尝试都以失败告终，甚至连最杰出的魔法与语言学专家也束手无策。自漂流危机以来，出于未知原因，奥玛群开始以一种看似全新的星歌频率轰击漂流信标，并在某些情况下导致灾难性的故障。

Also known as space whales, omas project powerful magical electromagnetic fields that protect them from both vacuum and toxic atmospheres while allowing them to feed. Omas gain sustenance from the particulate rings and dense atmospheres of gas giants, although exactly which substances are nutritious to an oma is still unknown. Studying a feeding oma isn't without danger. Omas sometimes accidentally swallow drones and small starships, such as fighters and interceptors, and they've been known to do so deliberately when provoked.

Most omas have been observed traveling alone. On occasion, omas form pods of three to five individuals and migrate across systems, on currents and schedules only they know. In very rare cases, omas gather among the rings of a planet in massive numbers. Their energy fields intermingle and react with local gases to light up large areas of space in a multicolored show.

Their most enigmatic yet well known feature is their starsong. Traveling through space for billions of miles, the starsong is a haunting telepathic melody. Most people perceive starsong as crooning, slow and mournful. No one can agree on the details, suggesting that each listener hears something different. Attempts to translate starsong have failed thus far, stumping even the most brilliant magic and linguistics experts. Since the Drift Crisis, for unknown reasons pods of omas have begun bombarding Drift beacons with a seemingly new starsong frequency, in some cases causing catastrophic malfunctions.

Wayward Warp.name: 迷途扭曲 Wayward Warp

Occult Spontaneous Spells.name: 秘学自发法术 Occult Spontaneous Spells

Void Whispers.name: 虚空低语 Void Whispers
Void Whispers.description:
目标听到蕴含着来自群星之外、不可名状之奥秘的不祥声响，使其心智迷乱。目标进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 目标听到奇异的低语，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1} 1轮。

失败 目标开始漫无目的地游荡，将每个动作都用于朝随机方向调整步法。移动时，目标会采取最安全的路线，且不会进入危险地形。该法术的持续时间为1分钟，或直到有生物对目标使用敌对动作。

大失败 如失败，但目标会语无伦次地喃喃自语。任何在其回合开始时位于目标20尺内的生物都必须尝试一次意志豁免。若失败，它必须在其下一回合将第一个动作用于朝随机方向调整步法，并在24小时内对此法术免疫。这是一个无力化效果。

The target hears ominous sounds containing unspeakable mysteries from beyond the stars that disorient its mind. The target attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target hears the strange whispers, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target begins to wander aimlessly, using each action to Step in a random direction. When it moves, the target takes the safest route and doesn't enter hazardous terrain. The spell has a duration of 1 minute or until a creature uses a hostile action against the target.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target babbles incoherently. Any creature that begins its turn within 20 feet of the target must attempt a Will saving throw. On a failure, it must use its first action on its next turn to Step in a random direction and becomes immune to this spell for 24 hours. This is an incapacitation effect.

Illusory Creature.name: 幻象生物 Illusory Creature
Illusory Creature.description:
你创造一个大型或者更小的生物的幻象。它发出适当的声音，气味，触摸起来也非常可信。如果你和幻象相距超过500尺，法术结束。

幻象不能说话，但是你可以使用你的动作来通过该生物说话，法术会适当地掩饰你的声音。你可能要尝试欺骗或者表演检定来模仿该生物，由GM决定。如果你想表现一个特定的人，并与一个知晓该人的人交互时，很可能会如此。

在战斗中，该幻象每回合能使用2动作，它在你维持该法术时使用这些动作。它使用你的法术攻击调整值为其攻击骰，使用你的法术DC为其AC。其豁免骰调整值等于你的法术DC-10。它足够结实，以至于可以夹击其他生物。如果幻象被攻击命中，或者在豁免中失败，法术结束。

该幻术可以通过令目标相信来造成伤害，但它不能直接影响现实世界。如果幻象生物的打击命中，目标承受@Damage[3d4[mental]]伤害。这是一个心灵效果。幻象的打击是非致命的。如果伤害与怪物的幻象不对应——举例而言，如果幻象巨型龙只造成了5点伤害——GM可以允许目标通过一个自由动作尝试一次察觉检定来不相信法术。只要目标认为能，任何有关的抗力和弱点都会生效，这由GM判定。举例而言，如果幻影持用一把战锤，攻击一个具有钝击抗力的生物，该生物承受的心灵伤害会变少。但是，幻觉伤害不会抑制再生，或者触发其他需要特定伤害类型的能力。GM应当记录幻像造成的幻觉伤害。

当生物触摸幻像，或者使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索 Seek}动作来检查它时，该生物可以尝试不相信你的幻术。当生物不相信幻术时，它回复从该幻术承受的伤害的一半（如果有），并且不会再因该幻术而承受伤害。

升阶（+1） 幻像的打击伤害增加1d4，你可以创造的生物最大体型增大一级（最大为巨型）。

Stupefy.name: 愚者之思 Stupefy
Stupefy.description:
你令目标精神迟钝，基于其意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 1}，持续1分钟。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 2}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 3}，持续1分钟。

Dizzying Colors.name: 眩彩喷射 Dizzying Colors
Dizzying Colors.description:
你释放出大量旋转变化着的色彩，根据生物的意志豁免受到影响。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩 Dazzled}1轮。

失败 该生物@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded}1轮，并目眩1分钟。

大失败 该生物震慑1轮，并目盲1分钟。

Dream of Home.name: 故乡之梦 Dream of Home
Dream of Home.description:
你唤起一个生物关于家园的思绪，以及它在这一概念中所找到的慰藉，以它对“家”所意味着的一切的怅惘回忆将其淹没。目标必须在一次意志豁免中成功，否则会因这些回忆而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{目眩神迷}。

You draw on a creature's thoughts of home and the comfort it finds in that concept, overwhelming the creature with wistful memories of whatever home means to it. The target must succeed at a Will save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the memories.

Eldritch Lance.name: 秘法长矛 Eldritch Lance
Eldritch Lance.description:
你将来自群星之间黑暗虚空、侵袭心智的邪异能量凝聚成一道光束，并将其射向一个目标。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若命中，你造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若严重成功，你造成双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d6。

You condense a beam of mind-assaulting eldritch energy from the dark spaces between the stars and fire it at a target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's AC. If you hit, you deal 2d6 mental damage. On a critical success, you deal double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Figment.name: 虚构幻术 Figment
Figment.description:
你创造出简单的声音或图像的幻术。声音会为法术添加听觉特征，且不能包含能被理解的单词或复杂的音乐。图像会为法术添加视觉特征，但是它不能大于5尺边长的立方体，且在15尺的距离内观察会发现它的构造明显很粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你能尝试用幻术让人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}，这会为你的欺骗检定提供+2环境加值。若对某个生物进行的此尝试失败了，该生物就不会相信虚构幻术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：虚构幻术}

Illusory Object.name: 幻象造物 Illusory Object
Illusory Object.description:
你创造一个固定物体的视觉幻象。该幻象必须能完全处于法术区域中。该物体会自然活动，但是不会发出声音或者产生气味。举例而言，幻象瀑布中会出现水并流下，但是它会是安静的。

当生物触摸幻像，或者使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索 Seek}动作来检查它时，该生物可以尝试不相信你的幻术。

升阶（2环级） 你的幻象也会发出合适的声音，产生正常气味，并且摸起来也很正常。该法术获得听觉和嗅觉特征。持续时间增加到1小时。

升阶（5环级） 如2环级，但是持续时间为无限。

Seek the Stars.name: 追寻群星 Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
在你的心眼中，你勾勒出一条穿越宇宙的路径。如果你身处协约世界空域，你会立刻知道应朝哪个方向旅行，才能抵达艾巴萨罗姆空间站上的星石。若你在协约星系之外，你会知道最近的漂流信标或星石所在的方向。

升阶（7环） 你也可以改为知晓某个熟悉地点的方向，例如你曾到访过的世界或中途站。

In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Telekinetic Hand.name: 念动之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造出一只漂浮着的魔法手掌，它可以隐形或者宛如幽灵，它能抓住目标物体并向着任意方向缓慢漂浮至多20尺。当你维持法术时，你能够将物体移动额外20尺。若物体位于空中之时法术结束，那么该物体便会坠落。

升阶（3环级） 你能以一个1负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至60尺，而且你能以一个1负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

升阶（7环级） 法术射程增加至60尺，而且你能以一个2负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

Void Warp.name: 虚能噬 Void Warp
Void Warp.description:
你唤来虚能伤害生命力量。该目标承受2d4虚能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免. 如果该生物在豁免中大失败，他也会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}直到你得下个回合开始。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Warp Sense.name: 扭曲感知 Warp Sense
Warp Sense.description:
迷途曲变体能够以所列距离内的精确感知，感应其曲变力场内的生物。

A wayward warp can sense creatures within their warp field as a precise sense at the listed range.

Reality Shimmer.name: 现实微光 Reality Shimmer
Reality Shimmer.description:
迷途扭曲体对源自其扭曲场外部的攻击拥有隐蔽。

The wayward warp has concealment against attacks originating outside of their warp field.

Warp Field.name: 扭曲力场 Warp Field
Warp Field.description:
15英尺。区域内的现实会变成另一种类型的地形。区域内的构造体和生物不会被转化，并且当灵变体光环移动或失途扭曲体死亡时，这种变化会立即结束。每当失途扭曲体移动时，光环的性质都会使用下表随机决定。失途扭曲体免疫其自身扭曲力场的效果以及对应伤害类型，但会获得对立伤害类型的弱点 5。

[[/r 1d6]]{D6}力场对应伤害对立伤害力场效果
1太空虚空活力失重
2地穿刺强酸困难地形（沙地）
3炼狱火焰寒冷危险地形 (@Damage[1d6[fire]])
4风暴电击钝击危险地形 (@Damage[1d6[electricity]])
5冰冻寒冷火焰不平坦地面（冰面）
6水域钝击电击水下（淹没）

15 feet. Reality within the area becomes a different type of terrain. Structures and creatures in the area aren't transformed, and the change immediately ends when the aura moves or the wayward warp dies. The nature of the aura is chosen randomly using the table below each time the wayward warp moves. A wayward warp is immune to their own warp field's effects and to the aligned damage type, but they gain weakness 5 to the opposing damage type.

[[/r 1d6]]{D6}FIELDALIGNED DAMAGEOPPOSING DAMAGEFIELD EFFECT
1CosmicVoidVitalityZero gravity
2EarthPiercingAcidDifficult terrain (sand)
3InfernoFireColdHazardous terrain (@Damage[1d6[fire]])
4StormElectricityBludgeoningHazardous terrain (@Damage[1d6[electricity]])
5FrozenColdFireUneven ground (ice)
6WaterBludgeoningElectricityUnderwater (flooded)

Spatial Rending.name: 空间撕裂 Spatial Rending
Spatial Rending.description:
被失控扭曲的空间触须击中的生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:26] 豁免，否则会与现实错位 1 分钟，并在其停留于扭曲场期间，依据场域效应获得一种状态：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{Untethered}（太空）、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed}（地或水）、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}（炼狱或冻结），或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}（风暴中的任何科技生物或持有的科技物品）。

A creature hit by a wayward warp's spatial tendril must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:26] save or become misaligned to reality for 1 minute, gaining a condition based on the field effect while it remains in the warp field: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{Untethered} (cosmic), @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} (earth or water), @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (inferno or frozen), or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{glitching 1} (any tech creature or held tech item in storm).

Wayward Warp.publicNotes:
迷途扭曲是一种活生生的维度裂隙，会在扭曲其周围世界时引发出人意料的破坏。没有两个迷途扭曲看起来是一样的，而且也没有任何一个迷途扭曲能长时间保持同一种外观；每当迷途扭曲移动时，都会显露出一种不同的潜在现实。扭曲体本身是位于灵光中心的一道裂隙，看起来像是现实中的一道裂口，通常呈现出一种隐约类似羽星的形状，其触手边缘排列着仿佛空间本身裂开的碎片状裂痕。

A wayward warp is a living dimensional rift that causes unexpected havoc as they twist the world around them. No two wayward warps look the same, and no wayward warp keeps the same appearance for very long; every time a wayward warp moves, a different potential reality reveals itself. The warp themself is a rift at the center of the aura that appears like a tear in reality, often taking a shape vaguely resembling a feather star whose tentacles are lined with shard-like cracks in space itself.

Protection-Class Security Robot.name: 防护型安保机器人 Protection-Class Security Robot
Protection-Class Security Robot.tokenName: 防护级安保机器人 Protection-Class Security Robot

Integrated Tactical Laser Rifle.name: 集成式战术激光步枪 Integrated Tactical Laser Rifle
Integrated Tactical Laser Rifle.description:
升级： 1

这些可靠、批量生产的步枪会从方形枪管中射出高浓度能量束。协约世界通用标准型号具有极高的改装性，设计上可搭配各种配件和升级使用；使用者能够按照自己的偏好调整激光步枪，甚至通过拼改将其改造成一把几乎无法辨认的武器。

Upgrades: 1

These dependable, mass-produced rifles shoot concentrated beams of energy out of square-shaped barrels. The universal standard Pact Worlds model is highly modifiable and designed to function with a variety of accessories and upgrades, with wielders adapting the laser rifle to their preferences and even kit-bashing it into a nearly unrecognizable weapon.

Covering Posture.name: 掩护姿态 Covering Posture
Covering Posture.description:
这台防护级安保机器人进入一个姿势，使其邻近的盟友获得轻度掩蔽的好处，直到其下一回合开始。一名中型或更小的生物在邻接该机器人时可以[[/act take-cover]]，并获得标准掩蔽的好处。

The protection-class security robot enters a position that grants adjacent allies the benefits of lesser cover until the start of its next turn. A Medium or smaller creature can [[/act take-cover]] while adjacent to the robot and gains the benefits of standard cover.

Nanite Surge.name: 纳米虫群激涌 Nanite Surge
Nanite Surge.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 该安保机器人根据其等级，为一个科技生物或物品恢复 @Damage[24[healing]] 生命值。

Frequency once per day

Effect The security robot restores @Damage[24[healing]] Hit Points per the robot's level to one technological creature or item.

Protection-Class Security Robot.publicNotes:
这些安保机器人通常由比其他机器人更耐用的材料构造而成，使它们能够保护其看护对象。它们笨重的机体常被看到守卫重要人物或贵重物品

安保机器人遍布整个工业化太空，在协约世界和维斯卡里姆中都大量存在，被合作和普通公民 alike 雇用并定制。

虽然大多数士兵机器人型号都被制造得尽可能具有破坏性，而歼灭机器人则被设计用于杀戮，但安保机器人通常会在其行为程序中加入故障保护机制，以防止它们造成超出执行指定安保功能所必需的暴力。这使它们在城市中尤其有用，因为意外破坏可能会伤及旁观者或引发法律问题，甚至在星舰上也是如此，因为偏离目标的激光爆炸可能会对关键的星舰系统造成严重损害。

These security robots are often constructed out of more durable materials than other robots, granting them the ability to protect their charges. Their bulky frames can be seen guarding important individuals or valuable items

Security robots are ubiquitous throughout industrialized space and have major presences in both the Pact Worlds and Veskarium, employed and customized by corporations and private citizens alike.

While most soldier robot models are built to be as destructive as possible, and elimination robots are designed to kill, security robots usually have fail-safes programmed into their behavior to prevent them from causing any more violence than is necessary to perform their designated security function. This makes them especially useful in cities, where unintended destruction might harm bystanders or cause legal issues, and even on starships, where a stray laser blast might cause serious damage to vital starship systems.

Skreeling.name: 斯克里灵 Skreeling

Cluster Attack.name: 集群攻击 Cluster Attack
Cluster Attack.description:
对于处于一个或多个其他尖啸螺攻击范围内的生物，尖啸螺的近战打击会造成 1d4 持续性流血伤害。

The skreeling's melee Strikes deal 1d4 persistent bleed damage to creatures within reach of one or more other skreelings.

Skreeling.publicNotes:
嘶蹿幼兽成群狩猎，靠灰烬、金属、木头或几乎任何其他东西都能维生。

嘶蹿兽，以及它们的后代嘶蹿幼兽，都是凶残的掠食者，潜伏并游荡于宇宙的岩隙与洞窟之中。

Skreelings hunt in packs and can subsist on ash, metal, wood, or near anything else.

Skreesires, and their offspring skreelings, are vicious predators who skulk and prowl in the crags and caverns of the cosmos.

Thresher Lord.name: 鞭尾霸主 Thresher Lord

Motion Sense.name: 运动感知 Motion Sense
Motion Sense.description:
打谷鲨领主能够通过感知由移动在空气或水中引起的振动来察觉附近的生物，此为一个在所列范围内的非精确感官。

A thresher lord can sense nearby creatures through vibrations in air or water caused by movement as an imprecise sense at the listed range.

Colony Mind.name: 殖民地思维 Colony Mind
Colony Mind.description:
30尺。所有彼此位于所列范围内且具有群体意识的盟友都会保持恒常心灵感应交流，并知晓任意个体所知的全部威胁。当位于至少一名具有群体意识的盟友的范围内时，若某生物在对抗精神效果的豁免检定中获得成功，则改为获得大成功。

30 feet. All allies with colony mind within the listed range of each other are in constant telepathic communication and are aware of all threats any individual knows about. While within range of at least one ally with colony mind, when a creature rolls a success on a save against a mental effect, it gets a critical success instead.

Deflecting Blades.name: 偏转刀刃 Deflecting Blades
Deflecting Blades.description:
触发条件 一个位于脱粒领主邻近处的生物以近战攻击将脱粒领主作为目标

效果 脱粒领主对抗该触发攻击的 AC 获得 +2 情况加值。

Trigger A creature adjacent to the thresher lord targets the thresher lord with a melee attack

Effect The thresher lord gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

Blade Storm.name: 刃风暴 Blade Storm
Blade Storm.description:
脱粒领主进行三次臂刃打击。每次打击都使用脱粒领主当前的多重攻击减值，但每次打击还要承受 –2 减值。计算其多重攻击减值时，这算作三次攻击。

The thresher lord makes three arm blade Strikes. Each Strike uses the thresher lord's current multiple attack penalty, but each Strike takes a –2 penalty. This counts as three attacks when calculating its multiple attack penalty.

Hurtle.name: 猛冲 Hurtle
Hurtle.description:
频率 每天三次

效果 脱粒领主以直线进行至多三次疾奔，移动总距离最多等同于其速度的三倍。

Frequency three times per day

Effect The thresher lord Strides up to three times its Speed in a straight line.

Serrated Blades.name: 锯齿刃 Serrated Blades
Serrated Blades.description:
用臂刃进行的打击若造成重击，切碎领主会对其目标造成 @Damage[1d8[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。

On a critical hit with an arm blade Strike, the thresher lord inflicts @Damage[1d8[persistent,bleed]] damage to its target.

Thresher Lord.publicNotes:
作为经过专门设计的重型突击部队，裂斩领主会击溃敌方阵型，并在防御工事中劈开通路，为大批步兵构成体开道。它们前臂上突出的巨大刀刃不仅进化为武器，还能在裂斩领主逼近近战距离时提供空气动力学支撑和一定程度的防护。

虫群在浩界深处由一种名为虫族的类昆虫物种发展而来，被数个文明视为现存最大的威胁。它由无数子殖民群构成，而每个子殖民群又由无数构成体亚种组成；虫群是一支庞大的群体，为了吞噬宇宙中的一切物质而以灵能联合的方式行动。最可怕的是，虫群能够同化被其吞噬者的知识与DNA。由于它在大断层之前就已发展出星际旅行能力，在历史发生断裂之前，虫群就已经吞噬了无数星系；而在获得信标以及名为漂流域的超空间维度的使用权后，虫群扩张的步伐更是进一步加快。

被虫群触及的世界会被抽干自然资源，沦为被称作“空壳世界”的荒芜之地。外界所谓的“虫群空间”，不过是虫群在其肆意推进过程中吞噬后留下的一大片无生命世界。虫群对这些世界的掠夺极其彻底，以至于勘测者甚至难以找到哪怕痕量的无机资源，例如稀有矿物和水。这些空壳世界中，几乎没有几个被彻底探索过，因为探索往往会唤醒休眠的无人机；理论认为，它们是被留在此地，以防那些被吞噬的星系将来再次被殖民和重新繁衍。在这片太空区域之外更远的地方，也存在虫群活动的据点，因为虫群在大断层之前的漫长时代中派出了无数子殖民群，而即使到了现在，也只有其中一部分抵达了预定目的地。

在当今时代，虫群最为人所知的或许有两件重要事实。第一，它对协约世界和维斯卡里姆的袭击，促成了这两大势力停止敌对并结成脆弱的同盟。第二，虫群正是夏任族的直接祖先。夏任人于大断层期间的某个时期脱离了虫群，并从女神海拉丝那里获得庇护；人们认为海拉丝是由一种前虫群时代的虫族进化而来，并且她背弃了虫群这个已经进化成贪婪噬尽万物之实体的存在。

近年来，虫群一度被视为不过是遥远的可怕传说，除了在浩界的苏斯基隆星系中进行某些机密行动外，并无其他活动。然而，近期对失踪的塞赞迪特世界克雷西斯卡的发现，意外唤醒了一个曾负责吞噬该世界的休眠子殖民群。自那以后，这个新近被称为“克雷西斯卡子殖民群”的群体已成为近宇的祸患，积极入侵桑迪特联合体的诸世界，并且随时可能蔓延至维斯卡里姆和协约世界等其他势力。这支被重新发现的子殖民群已经开始让其构成体快速进化，尽管它仍与更广大的虫群主体隔绝，但对近宇而言依旧构成了明确的威胁。

Engineered to be heavy assault forces, thresher lords break enemy formations and cut paths through fortifications to make way for masses of infantry components. The enormous blades protruding from their forearms have evolved not just as weapons, but to provide both aerodynamic support and a modicum of protection while thresher lords close into melee range.

Developing far out in the Vast from an insectile species known as kucharns, the Swarm is considered the greatest threat in existence for several cultures. Composed of countless subcolonies, each consisting of myriad component subspecies, the Swarm is a vast host that acts in psychic union for the purpose of consuming all matter across the cosmos. Most frightening of all is the Swarm's ability to assimilate the knowledge and DNA of those they consume. Thanks to its pre-Gap development of star travel, the Swarm had already consumed innumerable systems before history short-circuited, and the Swarm's pace only accelerated once it received access to the Signal and the hyperspace dimension known as the Drift.

Worlds touched by the Swarm are drained of their natural resources and rendered barren places known as huskworlds. What outsiders consider to be "Swarm space" is little more than a swathe of lifeless worlds that the Swarm have consumed in its reckless advance. The Swarm so thoroughly strips these worlds that surveyors struggle to find even trace amounts of inorganic resources, such as rare minerals and water. Few of these huskworlds have been thoroughly explored, as oftentimes exploration awakens inert drones, theorized to have been left behind in case the devoured system was ever colonized and repopulated. Pockets of Swarm activity exist well beyond this region of space, as the Swarm sent out countless subcolonies in the ages before the Gap, and even now, only some of them have reached their intended destinations.

The Swarm is perhaps most known in the current era for two important facts. First, its assault on the Pact Worlds and the Veskarium led to the cessation of hostilities and tenuous alliance between the two powers. Second, the Swarm is the direct ancestor of the shirren species. Having broken away sometime during the Gap, shirrens found succor with the deity Hylax, who was believed to have evolved from a pre-Swarm kucharn and who turned her back on the ravenous entity the Swarm has evolved into.

In recent years, the Swarm had been seen as little more than a distant boogeyman with no activities save for classified actions in the Suskillon system in the Vast. However, the recent discovery of the missing Szandite world of Krethiskar inadvertently awoke a dormant subcolony that had been responsible for the world's consumption. Since then, the newly dubbed Krethiskar subcolony has become a scourge of Near Space, engaged in an active invasion of Szandite Collective worlds and poised to spill over into other powers like the Veskarium and Pact Worlds. This rediscovered subcolony has begun rapid evolution of its components and remains cut off from the wider Swarm, but it still represents a clear danger to Near Space.

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术预备法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Mask of Terror.name: 惊骇假面 Mask of Terror
Mask of Terror.description:
目标看起来是一个残忍而可怕的生物。该效果对每个观察者均不同，所以一个人类看到的目标可能是一个有着血淋淋的牙的恶魔，而恶魔看到的目标则可能是发出圣光的天使形象。

当任何生物尝试对目标进行敌对动作时，该生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。它之后会暂时免疫直到其下个回合的结束。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 该生物在其进行其动作前获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}。

大失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}，并且其动作失败且浪费掉。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多5个生物为目标。如果一个生物使用的敌对动作或者反应动作同时影响多个法术目标，他只需要进行一次对抗惊骇假面的豁免。

Dominate.name: 支配术 Dominate
Dominate.description:
你操控目标，强行令其服从你的命令。如果你赋予一项明显是自灭的命令，目标不会行动，直到你下达新的命令。该效果基于其意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}以抵抗你的命令。

失败 你控制了目标，其获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}状态，但在每轮结束时可以尝试一次意志豁免。成功时，法术结束。

大失败 如同失败，但是仅当你施加违抗其天性的命令，例如杀害其盟友时，才会获得新的豁免。

升阶（10环级） 该持续时间为无限。

Slice Reality.name: 切割现实 Slice Reality
Slice Reality.description:
你切开现实，形成一道笔直延伸的、汲取生命的熵之裂隙；它高20英尺、长120英尺、厚2英寸。该裂隙提供掩护。裂隙对在其被创造时位于裂隙空间内的每个生物、试图穿过裂隙的每个生物，或在其回合结束时位于裂隙内部的每个生物造成 7d8 虚空伤害，并可进行一次基础反射豁免。当裂隙被创造时，若某生物在此次豁免中成功，则其被推至其所选一侧最近的空间。试图穿过裂隙的生物若在该豁免中大失败，则其无法穿过，并在裂隙旁结束其移动。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d8。

You slice through reality, forming a chasm of life-draining entropy in a straight line 20 feet high, 120 feet long, and 2 inches thick. The chasm provides cover. The chasm deals 7d8 void damage to each creature that's in the chasm's space when it's created, that attempts to pass through the chasm, or that ends its turn inside the chasm, with a basic Reflex save. A creature that succeeds at this save when the chasm is created is pushed to the nearest space on the side of its choice. Creatures trying to move through the chasm fail to do so if they critically fail the save, ending their movement next to the chasm.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Telekinetic Strangulation.name: 念动力扼杀 Telekinetic Strangulation
Telekinetic Strangulation.description:
你以念动力紧紧扼住一个生物的喉咙或类似的重要解剖部位，如同虎钳般死死箍住，强行将其抬离地面数英寸，使其在挣扎中难以呼吸。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若命中，你造成 6d12 点钝击伤害，且目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}。当目标以这种方式被定身时，它必须屏住呼吸，否则便会开始窒息。每轮中你第一次维持该法术时，目标受到 1d12 点钝击伤害，继续保持定身，并且必须继续屏住呼吸。目标可以尝试 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱}（挣脱 DC 等于你的法术 DC，且此次尝试受失能特征影响）。

You telekinetically grasp a creature's throat or similar vital anatomy with a vicelike grip, forcefully lifting it a few inches off the ground as it struggles to breathe. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, you deal 6d12 bludgeoning damage, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}. While immobilized in this way, it must hold its breath or begin suffocating. The first time each round you Sustain the spell, the target takes 1d12 bludgeoning damage, remains immobilized, and must continue holding its breath. The target can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} (the Escape DC is your spell DC, and the attempt is affected by the incapacitation trait).

Shadow Blast.name: 幽影爆破 Shadow Blast
Shadow Blast.description:
你将冥界的暗影物质塑形成一次爆发。选择酸蚀、钝击、寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、穿刺、挥砍、音波或灵魂伤害，并选择一个 @Template[cone|distance:30]、一个 120 尺内的 @Template[burst|distance:15]，或一条 @Template[line|distance:50]。爆发对区域内每个生物造成你所选类型的 6d8 伤害（@Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[acid]]、@Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[bludgeoning]]、@Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[cold]]、@Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[electricity]]、@Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[fire]]、@Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[force]]、@Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[piercing]]、@Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[slashing]]、@Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[sonic]]或 @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[spirit]]）。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d8。

You shape the shadow substance of the Netherworld into a blast. Choose acid, bludgeoning, cold, electricity, fire, force, piercing, slashing, sonic, or spirit damage, and choose a @Template[cone|distance:30], a @Template[burst|distance:15] within 120 feet, or a @Template[line|distance:50]. The blast deals 6d8 damage of the type you chose to each creature in the area (@Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[acid]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[bludgeoning]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[cold]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[electricity]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[fire]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[force]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[piercing]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[slashing]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[sonic]], or @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[spirit]]).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Subconscious Suggestion.name: 深层暗示 Subconscious Suggestion
Subconscious Suggestion.description:
你在目标的心智深处埋下潜意识的暗示，它们会在你指定的触发条件发生时遵照其行动。你向目标指示一系列动作。你的指示的用语对目标而言必须是一系列合理的动作，并且它不可以招致自毁或者明显违抗目标自身愿望。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你尝试控制它。

成功 目标不受影响，并且认为你在和它们正常对话，而不是对其施放法术。

失败 指示会保留在目标潜意识中，直到下一次你日常准备。如果触发条件在那之前发生，目标会立即按照你的指示行动。该效果的持续时间为1分钟，或者直到目标完成一个有终点的指示，或者直到指示变得会招致自毁，或具有其他明显的负面效果。

大失败 如同失败，但该持续时间为1小时。

升阶（9环级） 你能以至多10个生物作为目标。

Eldritch Wrath.name: 秘法之怒 Eldritch Wrath
Eldritch Wrath.description:
你引导存在于物质宇宙外缘彼方的诡异力量，幻影般的利爪、颚口与触手猛然扑向区域内的每个目标，对区域内每个生物造成 3d12 点精神伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试一次意志豁免。对于任何因该法术效果而恶心的生物，该区域为困难地形。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d12。

You channel the bizarre powers that exist beyond the outer reaches of the universe, dealing 3d12 mental damage to each creature in the area as phantasmal claws, jaws, and tentacles lash out at each target. Each creature in the area must attempt a Will save. The area is difficult terrain for any creature sickened by the effects of this spell.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Weight of Ages.name: 岁月重压 Weight of Ages
Weight of Ages.description:
你以一生的痛苦与悲伤加诸于一个生物的身心。目标受到3d8钝击伤害和3d8精神伤害，并且必须进行一次意志豁免。

重度成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全部伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{超载} 状态，持续1轮。

重度失败 目标受到双倍伤害，并且陷入超载状态，持续1分钟。

升阶（+1） 精神伤害增加2d8。

You burden a creature's body and mind with the pains and sorrows of a lifetime. The target takes 3d8 bludgeoning damage and 3d8 mental damage and must attempt a Will saving throw.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{Encumbered} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is encumbered for 1 minute.

Heightened (+1) The mental damage increases by 2d8.

Entropy Strike.name: 熵击 Entropy Strike
Entropy Strike.description:
你释放出一道熵之射线，令物质迅速且不加区分地衰变。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击。若命中，目标受到 5d8 点虚空伤害；若其具有科技特征，则改为受到 2d6 持续性强酸伤害并陷入故障 1。若重击，伤害翻倍；如果该生物具有科技特征，则其陷入故障 2 且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1 个伤害骰。

You unleash a ray of entropy that rapidly and indiscriminately decays matter. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 5d8 void damage, or it takes 2d6 persistent acid damage and is glitching 1 if it has the tech trait. On a critical hit, double the damage, and if the creature has the tech trait, it's glitching 2 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1 die.

Vampiric Feast.name: 吸血鬼之宴 Vampiric Feast
Vampiric Feast.description:
你的接触从目标身上抽出生命之血，以强化自身。你对目标造成6d6虚能伤害。你获得等于目标承受的虚能伤害（在抗力及类似效果生效后）一半的临时生命值。你在1分钟后失去任何剩余的临时生命值。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

Darkness.name: 黑暗术 Darkness
Darkness.description:
你创造一片黑暗的帷幕，光线无法穿透，并且光源无法在区域中发光。光线无法进入该区域，并且任何非魔法光源，例如火炬或者提灯，在区域中不会发出任何光线，即使其光照可能到达黑暗术之外也是如此。这也会压制等于或低于你的黑暗术环级的魔法光亮。光线无法穿透，所以在区域中的生物无法看到外面。对于外面，这看起来如同一团纯粹黑暗的球。

升阶（4环级） 即使具有黑暗视觉的生物（但不包括高等黑暗视觉）也几乎无法看穿这黑暗。它们透过黑暗看到的生物视为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}。

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description: 你干扰法术或者效果中的魔法力量。尝试一次反制检定，对抗目标。如果你成功对抗一个法术效果，你将其反制。如果你成功对抗一个魔法物品，该物品成为该类型的普通物品，持续10分钟。这不会改变物体的非魔法性质。如果目标是一件神器或者类似的物品，你自动失败。

Invisibility.name: 隐形 Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
扭曲光线的幻觉包复目标，令其变得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}。这令该生物对所有生物 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{无踪} ，但生物可以尝试寻找目标，令其改为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}。如果目标使用敌对动作，法术在敌对动作完成后结束。

升阶（4环级） 该法术持续1分钟，但目标使用敌对动作时该法术不会结束。

Resist Energy.name: 抵抗能量伤害 Resist Energy
Resist Energy.description:
元素护盾保护一个生物免受某一种类型能量的伤害。选择酸蚀，寒冷，电击，火焰或者音波伤害。目标和其装备获得对你所选择伤害类型的抗力5。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.con2Hzt47JjpuUej]{法术效果：抵抗能量伤害}

升阶（4环级） 该抗力增加到10，并且你能以至多两个生物为目标。

升阶（7环级） 该抗力增加到15，并且你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你专注于目标，在魔法全息影像显示信息的同时收集数据。当施法完成时，你会获知关于目标的生物特征信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况以及其他基础生理信息。你或任何你告知分析结果的人，在对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充}、对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}，以及对其进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 的检定时，获得+1状态加值。如果目标是虚幻之物，或正处于幻术魔法的影响下，只有当该效果的环阶低于你的分析目标法术的环阶时，你才能察觉到这一点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{法术效果：分析目标}

强化（3环） 状态加值提高至+2，且你最多可以指定10个生物为目标。

强化（6环） 状态加值提高至+3，且你可以指定任意数量的生物为目标。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Enfeeble.name: 衰弱术 Enfeeble
Enfeeble.description:
你抽走目标的力量，基于其强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}，直到你的下个回合开始。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 2}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 3}，持续1分钟

Force Barrage.name: 力场飞弹 Force Barrage
Force Barrage.description:
你发射出一道固态的魔力碎片，射向一个你能看见的生物。它自动命中，并造成1d4+1力场伤害。你施放该法术时每额外使用一个动作，你射出的碎片增加一个，最大为3个动作发射三个碎片。你为每个碎片分别选择目标。如果你对同一个目标射击超过1个碎片，将伤害合计后再计算伤害加值，减值，抗力，弱点等。

升阶（+2） 你花费的每个动作额外射出一枚碎片。

Message.name: 传讯术 Message
Message.description:
你无声地念出言语，这段言语会直接送到目标耳中，而不是从你的嘴中念出。其他人听起来顶多是你与它们正常说话，但法术目标会如同正站在你身边一般听到你的言语。目标可以通过一个反应动作做出一段简要回应，或者根据其意愿，也可以通过其下个回合的自由动作来回应，但它如此做时必须能看见你，并且在射程内。如果它做出回应，它的回应会直接送达你的耳中，如同最初的信息一般。

升阶（3环级） 法术的射程增加到500尺。

Mind Skewer.name: 心灵穿刺 Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
你用过量的灵能信息或神圣裁断使一个生物的心智超载。这次精神冲击造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若严重失败，目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，持续 1 轮。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 2d6。

You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Shield.name: 护盾 Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一面力场构成的魔法护盾。这视同你使用了举起盾牌动作，赋予你在AC上的+1环境加值，直到你的下个回合开始，但这里不需要手来使用。

当该法术生效时，你可以使用你的魔法护盾来进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡 Shield Block}反应动作。该盾牌具有硬度5。你可以使用该法术的反应动作来减少任何来自法术或者魔法效果的伤害，即使这不造成物理伤害。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，并且你无法在10分钟内再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

升阶（+2） 该盾牌的硬度增加5。

Summon Undead.name: 召唤亡灵 Summon Undead
Summon Undead.description:
你召唤一个具有不死生物特征的生物为你而战，其等级为-1。

升阶 如@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.8gcp880pEWZ9VPnF]{召唤 summon}特征列出。

Void Warp.name: 虚能噬 Void Warp
Void Warp.description:
你唤来虚能伤害生命力量。该目标承受2d4虚能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免. 如果该生物在豁免中大失败，他也会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}直到你得下个回合开始。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Aeon Stone (Uplifting).name: 万象石（振奋） Aeon Stone (Uplifting)
Aeon Stone (Uplifting).description:
作为阿兹兰特星际帝国内的常见物品，这些宝石是冒险者和富有收藏家们喜爱的身份象征。尽管这些石头形态与功能各异，但据称它们全都是异界实体在远古时代用来构筑物质宇宙的水晶工具碎片。

当你注入这些经过精密切割的水晶之一时，这块石头会环绕你的头部运行（如果你没有头部，则环绕你身体上其他可见的部位），而不是佩戴在身上。你可以用一个互动动作收起一颗万古石，而一颗正在环绕运行的石头可以被他人对你成功施展 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{缴械} 动作后从空中夺走。被收起或移除的石头仍然保持注入状态，但其效果会处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 状态，直到你让它再次环绕你的头部运行。

万古石有多种类型，每一种都有不同的外观与魔法效果。每颗万古石在嵌入特定物品时也会获得一种共鸣能力，例如具有万古特征的武器，或被称为寻路仪的古董魔法装置。

这枚深蓝色棱晶带有浑浊的内含物，轻若鸿毛。它的共鸣能力使你在特技检定上获得 +1 物品加值。

激活—自在飞翔 1（专注）

频率 每天一次

效果 你获得 1 分钟的飞行速度，其数值等于你的速度或 20 尺，以较高者为准。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.xZ5XMY55S42aGyjg]{Effect: Aeon Stone (Uplifting)}

Staple items within the Azlanti Star Empire, these gemstones are popular status symbols for adventurers and wealthy collectors. Despite their myriad forms and functions, these stones are purportedly all fragments of crystal tools used by otherworldly entities to build the Universe in ancient times.

When you invest one of these precisely shaped crystals, the stone orbits your head (or another visible part of your anatomy if you don't have a head) instead of being worn on your body. You can stow an aeon stone with an Interact action, and an orbiting stone can be snatched out of the air with a successful @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm} action against you. A stowed or removed stone remains invested, but its effects are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until you return it to orbit your head again.

There are various types of aeon stones, each with a different appearance and magical effect. Each aeon stone also gains a resonant power when slotted into specific items, such as weapons with the aeon trait or antique magical devices called wayfinders.

This deep-blue prism with cloudy inclusions is light as a feather. Its resonant power gives you a +1 item bonus to Acrobatics checks.

Activate—Fly Free 1 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You gain a fly Speed for 1 minute equal to your Speed or 20 feet, whichever is greater.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.xZ5XMY55S42aGyjg]{Effect: Aeon Stone (Uplifting)}

Clear Mind.name: 清神醒脑 Clear Mind
Clear Mind.description:
触发条件 死灵维特成为具有情绪特征的法术的目标

效果 死灵维特尝试反制触发的法术（反制等级 7，反制调整值 [[/r 1d20+30 #Counteract]]{+30}）。如果该法术被扰乱，死灵维特获得等同于被反制法术等级两倍的临时生命值，持续 1 分钟。

Trigger The necrovite is targeted by a spell with the emotion trait

Effect The necrovite attempts to counteract the triggering spell (counteract rank 7, counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+30 #Counteract]]{+30}). If the spell is disrupted, the necrovite gains temporary Hit Points equal to twice the rank of the counteracted spell that last for 1 minute.

Fatiguing Presence.name: 疲劳威压 Fatiguing Presence
Fatiguing Presence.description:
30英尺。首次进入该灵光的生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:33] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}。无论此次豁免的结果如何，该生物都会在24小时内暂时免疫死灵维特的致乏存在。

30 feet. A creature that first enters the aura must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:33] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}. Regardless of the result of the saving throw, the creature is temporarily immune to the necrovite's fatiguing presence for 24 hours.

Entropic Touch.name: 熵触 Entropic Touch
Entropic Touch.description:
死灵体造成的虚空伤害会对不死生物和具有虚空治疗的生物造成伤害，如同其为活力伤害。死灵体的近战打击在对灵体不死生物进行攻击时，具有幽灵杀手升级的效果。

Void damage dealt by a necrovite damages undead and creatures with void healing as if it were vitality damage. A necrovite's melee Strikes have the benefits of the ghost killer upgrade on attacks against incorporeal undead.

Painful Mark.name: 痛苦印记 Painful Mark
Painful Mark.description:
当死灵病毒体用其苦痛法杖对一个活物造成伤害时，该生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:33] 检定，否则变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 1}。后续的苦痛法杖伤害会在豁免失败时使该力竭值提高 1，最大至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 4}。

When the necrovite damages a living creature with its wrackstaff, the creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:33] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}. Further wrackstaff damage increases the drain value by 1 on a failed save, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 4}.

Rejuvenation.name: 复苏 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
当死灵体被摧毁时，其意识会立即转移到其脑波仪中。只有在找到并摧毁其脑波仪的情况下，死灵体才会被永久摧毁。

When a necrovite is destroyed, their consciousness is immediately transferred to their electroencephalon. A necrovite can be permanently destroyed only if their electroencephalon is found and destroyed.

Scramble Psyche.name: 扰乱灵能思维 Scramble Psyche
Scramble Psyche.description:
死亡活尸接触一个相邻生物并扰乱其思维模式。该生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:33] 豁免，否则会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 状态，持续1分钟。只要困惑持续，死亡活尸就被视为对该困惑目标处于隐匿状态。

The necrovite touches an adjacent creature and scrambles its thought patterns. The creature must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:33] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 minute. The necrovite is considered hidden to the confused target for as long as the confusion lasts.

Coposirix.name: 科波西里克斯 Coposirix

Seep In.name: 渗入 Seep In
Seep In.description:
触发 coposirix受到伤害

效果 直到其下个回合结束前，coposirix的身体会吸收部分对其造成伤害的物质，使该物质渗入构成它的科皮之中并改变其组成。这种变化的效果取决于伤害的性质。

  • 能量伤害 coposirix的攻击会额外造成2d6点与对其造成的能量伤害相同类型的伤害。

  • 物理伤害 coposirix获得对物理伤害的抗性6。若该伤害是由特殊材料制成的武器造成的，例如银，则在该效果持续时间内，coposirix的猛击淤泥Strike视为同样的材料。

Trigger The coposirix takes damage

Effect The coposirix's body absorbs some of what damaged it until the end of its next turn, the material seeping into its constituent copi and changing its composition. The effects of this change depends on the nature of the damage.

  • Energy Damage The coposirix's attacks deal an additional 2d6 damage of the same type as the energy damage dealt to it.

  • Physical Damage The coposirix gains resistance 6 to physical damage. If the damage was dealt by a weapon made of a special material, such as silver, the coposirix's battering sludge Strike counts as that same material for the duration of the effect.

Falling Rush.name: 坠落猛冲 Falling Rush
Falling Rush.description:
coposirix 扭曲自身周围的重力，使自己朝目标坠去。coposirix 可沿任意方向以直线进行 Stride，移动距离至多为其速度的两倍。若它在此次移动结束时处于至少一个敌人的近战触及范围内，则它可以对该目标进行一次 battering sludge Strike。此次攻击后，如果 coposirix 不在坚实表面上，则会坠落，承受该坠落距离正常伤害的一半，且不会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。如果 coposirix 在此次移动期间的任意时刻经过另一生物 10 尺内，则该生物会受到波动重力的影响，且必须进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:25] 豁免。

大成功 该生物可以利用波动重力来让自己重新调整位置。它可以以自由动作进行一次 Step。

成功 无效果。

失败 该生物会被沿着 coposirix 的移动方向拖拽 5 尺。这遵循强制移动的规则。若该生物在此次移动结束时没有支撑，则它会坠落并倒地，按正常规则承受坠落伤害。

大失败 如失败，但该生物会被拖拽 10 尺，且即使有支撑也会倒地。

The coposirix bends gravity around itself, causing it to fall toward its target. The coposirix Strides up to twice its Speed in a straight line in any direction. If it ends this movement within melee reach of at least one enemy, it can make a battering sludge Strike against that target. After this attack, the coposirix falls if it isn't on a solid surface, taking half the normal amount of damage for the distance fallen and not falling @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the coposirix passes within 10 feet of another creature at any point during this movement, that creature is affected by the fluctuating gravity and must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:25] save.

Critical Success The creature can use the fluctuating gravity to its advantage to reposition itself. It can Step as a free action.

Success No effect.

Failure The creature is pulled 5 feet in the direction of the coposirix's travel. This follows the rules for forced movement. If at the end of this movement the creature is unsupported, it falls and lands prone, taking fall damage as normal.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature is pulled 10 feet and falls prone even if supported.

Coposirix.publicNotes:
小塔布里德上迅速而草率的工业化毁掉了这颗星球，尤其重创了科皮——这种珊瑚正是当地珊瑚人祖先。在科皮与重力的魔法联系最强的地区，肆虐的污染却反而使其变异成怪诞的新形态。作为对珊瑚人演化的扭曲嘲弄，成簇的科皮融合在一起，形成了coposirix——由变异科皮融合而成的蹒跚肉丘，外覆一层部分结晶化废料形成的外壳，移动时噼啪作响、嘎吱作声。coposirix的形态不断变化，有时甚至会呈现出令人不安的人形特征，但又会同样迅速地融化消失。

The rapid and careless industrialization of Tabrid Minor ruined the planet, particularly ravaging the population of copi—the coral that's the ancestor of the native copaxi people. In areas where the copi's magical connection to gravity was strongest, however, the rampant pollution instead mutated it into grotesque new forms. In a twisted mockery of copaxi evolution, clusters of copi fused together to form coposirixes, shambling mounds of mutated copi fused with a partial shell of crystallized waste that crackles and creaks as it moves. The form of a coposirix constantly changes, sometimes even taking on hauntingly humanoid features that melt away just as quickly.

Host Dragon (Young).name: 宿主龙（幼年） Host Dragon (Young)

Covered in Bugs.name: 虫群覆身 Covered in Bugs
Covered in Bugs.description:
触发 巨龙在一次豁免检定中严重失败

效果 成群的昆虫会干扰该效果，牺牲自己以保护宿主体魄与心智。巨龙进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:17]。若成功，巨龙此次豁免检定改为失败，而非严重失败。

Trigger The dragon critically fails a saving throw

Effect Swarming insects interfere with the effect, sacrificing themselves to protect their host's body and mind. The dragon attempts a @Check[flat|dc:17]. On a success, the dragon fails the saving throw instead of critically failing.

+2 status to all saves vs. mental.name: 对所有对抗精神效果的豁免检定获得+2状态加值 +2 status to all saves vs. mental

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打和一次尾击打。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one tail Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙族动量 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
龙每当以一次打击造成重击时，都会为其虫群吐息充能。

The dragon recharges their Swarm Breath whenever they score a critical hit with a Strike.

Excruciating Bites.name: 痛苦撕咬 Excruciating Bites
Excruciating Bites.description:
受到宿主龙颚部打击伤害或被龙吞下的生物，也会被数百只微小昆虫叮咬；该生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:25] 豁免，否则会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1} 1轮。

A creature that takes damage from a host dragon's jaws Strike or is swallowed by the dragon is also bitten by hundreds of tiny insects; the creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:25] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round.

One with Swarms.name: 与虫群合一 One with Swarms
One with Swarms.description:
寄主龙对任何由虫群或类似生物发动的攻击免疫（由 GM 自行裁定）。

The host dragon is immune to any attack made by a swarm of insects or similar creature (at the GM's discretion).

Swallow Whole.name: 活吞 Swallow Whole
Swallow Whole.description:
中型，@Damage[(2d10+6)[bludgeoning]] 外加剧痛啃咬，破裂 19

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Medium, @Damage[(2d10+6)[bludgeoning]] plus excruciating bites, Rupture 19

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Swarm Breath.name: 虫群吐息 Swarm Breath
Swarm Breath.description:
巨龙喷吐出一群叮咬性的昆虫，造成 @Damage[6d8[piercing]|options:area-damage] 伤害，范围为 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] （@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] 豁免）。它们在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Swarm Breath]]{1d4 轮} 内不能再次使用虫群吐息。

The dragon disgorges a swarm of biting insects that deals @Damage[6d8[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save). They can't use Swarm Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Swarm Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Host Dragon (Young).publicNotes:
无数昆虫会追随这些行动迟缓、贪婪无厌的龙，无论它们游荡到何处，都会在其周围盘旋成群，并栖居于宿主龙身体各处无数的孔窍之中。这条龙既是虫群本身的一部分，也是虫群生态系统的一部分——虫群以它们的身体为食，而龙也以虫群为食，在一种怪诞、延续数百年的循环中共生；不知为何，即便宿主龙一生中不摄取任何其他物质，它们依然会因此长得更庞大、更强大。宿主龙从昆虫的原始本能中汲取力量，尽管它们拥有智慧，却常常表现得像被它们聚集到身边的昆虫一样。宿主龙憎恶回答问题，并会以暴力抗拒他人试图理解其本性的任何行为。

Innumerable insects follow these lumbering, ravenous dragons wherever they roam, swarming around them and living in the countless orifices along the host dragon's body. The dragon is both a part of the swarm itself and a part of the swarm's ecosystem—the swarm feeds on their body, and the dragon feeds on the swarm in a grotesque, centuries-long cycle that somehow results in the host dragon growing larger and more powerful even if they feed on no other substance in their lifetime. Host dragons draw their power from the primal instincts of insects and, despite their intelligence, often behave like the insects they gather to them. Host dragons despise answering questions and violently defy all attempts others make to understand their nature.

Hellknight Degradant.name: 狱骑士堕败者 Hellknight Degradant
Hellknight Degradant.tokenName: 炼狱骑士降阶者 Hellknight Degradant

Defrex Hide.name: 德弗雷克斯兽皮 Defrex Hide
Defrex Hide.description:
升级： 1

这件中型护甲由原产于Vesk-2的一种凶猛哺乳动物的皮革制成，尤其受到维斯克蜥人的欢迎。将这种生物厚实皮革的鞣制皮片用金属丝缝合在一起，关节处则用金属饰钉或鳞片加固。

Upgrades: 1

Made from the hide of a ferocious mammal native to Vesk-2, this medium armor is especially popular among vesk. Tanned slabs of the creature's thick hide are stitched together with metal wires, and the joints are reinforced with metal studs or scales.

Graviton Glaive.name: 引力子长刀 Graviton Glaive
Graviton Glaive.description:
劣化者挥舞一柄由凝固引力子形成的太阳长柄刀。他们可以用一个带有专注特征的单一动作召唤并解散这件武器。每当他们用自己的引力子长柄刀成功对一个生物进行打击时，该生物会将其被击中的那个方格所有相邻的方格都视为困难地形，直到该生物下个回合结束为止。

A degradant wields a solar glaive formed of solidified gravitons. They can conjure and dismiss this weapon as a single action that has the concentrate trait. Whenever they successfully Strike a creature using their graviton glaive, the creature treats all squares adjacent to the square in which it was struck as difficult terrain until the end of the creature's next turn.

Black Hole.name: 黑洞 Black Hole
Black Hole.description:
degradant 对 30 英尺内的每个敌方生物造成 @Damage[9d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，目标可进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:26] 豁免。degradant 在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Black Hole]]{1d4 轮}内不能再次使用“黑洞”。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并被向 degradant 方向拖拽 5 英尺。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并被向 degradant 方向拖拽 10 英尺。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，被向 degradant 方向拖拽 30 英尺，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

The degradant deals @Damage[9d6[bludgeoning]] damage to each enemy creature within 30 feet with a @Check[fortitude|dc:26] save. The degradant can't use Black Hole again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Black Hole]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is pulled 5 feet toward the degradant.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is pulled 10 feet toward the degradant.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is pulled 30 feet toward the degradant, and is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Crush.name: 压碎 Crush
Crush.description:
腐化体利用重力压碎100英尺内的一名敌人，造成 @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:26|basic] 基础豁免）；若重度失败，该生物还会额外受到 @Damage[1d6[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。

The degradant uses gravity to crush an enemy within 100 feet, dealing @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:26|basic] save); on a critical failure, the creature takes an additional @Damage[1d6[persistent,bleed]] damage.

Stellar Rush.name: 星辰猛袭 Stellar Rush
Stellar Rush.description:
堕化者进行两次疾行，在这些移动期间，其速度获得+10英尺的境况加值。当其完成这些疾行后，所有位于堕化者15英尺内的敌人都会被向堕化者方向拖拽15英尺，除非他们成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:26] 豁免。

The degradant Strides twice, gaining a +10-foot circumstance bonus to their Speed during these moves. When they complete these Strides, all enemies within 15 feet of the degradant are pulled 15 feet closer to the degradant unless they succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:26] save.

Hellknight Lore.name: 地狱骑士知识 Hellknight Lore

Hellknight Degradant.publicNotes:
地狱骑士最常研究地狱的力量，以此启发他们的战斗风格与魔法，但他们也可能学会与宇宙之力调谐，从而成为太阳武者。

地狱骑士是炼狱骑士，尽管他们曾一度统治失落戈拉里昂上的整个国家，协约世界的地狱骑士则以更整体性的方式执行法律与秩序，乘坐巨大的堡垒星舰四处巡行以扩展其影响力，而不是停留在某一个地方。在战斗中，地狱骑士有条不紊、毫不留情且致命。

Hellknights most often study the forces of Hell to inspire their fighting styles and magic, but they might also learn to attune to the forces of the cosmos to become solarians.

Hellknights are infernal knights, and while they once ruled entire nations on Lost Golarion, the Hellknights of the Pact Worlds enforce law and order more holistically, traveling in massive citadel starships to spread their influence rather than remaining in any one place. In battle, Hellknights are orderly, unrelenting, and deadly.

Akashic Dragon (Adult).name: 阿卡西巨龙（成年） Akashic Dragon (Adult)
Akashic Dragon (Adult).tokenName: 阿卡西巨龙（成年） Akashic Dragon (Adult)

Occult Innate Spells.name: 异能天赋法术 Occult Innate Spells

Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only.name: 位面间传送（随意；仅限自身；仅可往返于阿卡西记录与物质宇宙） Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only; to and from Akashic Record and the Universe only)
Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only.description:
需求 你具有目标位面的位面密钥用于给法术定位

你和你的盟友跨越位面之间的屏障进行旅行。目标移动至其他位面，比如火元素位面、幽界、或者外层裂隙。你必须知晓目标位面的存在，而且需要使用由该位面的物质制作的魔法位面密钥来给法术定位。就如同跨界传送这个法术本身一样，大多数著名位面的位面密钥具有罕见稀有度，而鲜为人知的位面及半位面通常具有稀有、甚至有可能时独特稀有度的位面密钥。

该法术极其不精准，你会出现在目标之一（由你选择）上一次造访该位面时的位置周边，误差为1d20 x 25英里。若所有目标都是初次造访某个特定位面，你们就会出现在该位面的随机位置。跨界传送不会提供返回的手段，不过除非发生了什么另外情况，否则再次施放跨界传送能让你返回自身之前身处的位面。

Truesight.name: 真景术 Truesight
Truesight.description: 你可以看见60尺内的事物的本来面貌。GM秘密骰反制检定，对抗区域中的所有幻术或者变形效果，但这只会决定你是否能看破它（例如，如果该检定成功对抗了一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的本来形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

Clairvoyance.name: 鹰眼术 Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description: 你在射程内创造出一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}的悬浮眼睛（它甚至可以在你的视觉线或者效果线之外）。这只眼睛不能移动，但是你可以从该处看到所有方向，如同使用你通常的视觉感官。

Confusion.name: 困惑术 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你使用奇怪的能量波动扰乱了目标的思维，令其随机行动。法术效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标胡言乱语，并且获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑 Confused}1分钟。在其每个回合结束，它能尝试一次新豁免来结束困惑术。

大失败 目标困惑1分钟，并且没有提前结束的豁免。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Mind Reading.name: 读心术 Mind Reading
Mind Reading.description:
你通过一次短暂的心灵接触来尝试阅读目标的想法。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。目标会暂时免疫你的读心术1小时。

大成功 目标得知当施放该法术时你模糊的表层想法。

成功 你得知目标的智力调整值是高于，等于，还是低于你。

失败 你得知当施放该法术时目标模糊的表层想法，并且你得知目标的智力是高于，等于，还是低于你。

大失败 如失败，并且在法术持续时间中，你可以维持该法术来再次侦测目标的表层想法。目标不会获得另外的豁免。

Akashic Download (at will).name: 阿卡西下载（随意） Akashic Download (at will)
Akashic Download (at will).description:
你对阿卡西记录执行一次灵能检索，以获取有关某一特定主题的信息，并将这些数据以魔法方式传输到你的通讯器或计算机中。当你施放此法术时，选择一项你已受训且具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 动作的技能。

在持续时间内的任意时刻，当你尝试使用所选技能进行一次回忆知识检定时，你都可以查阅你的通讯器。此次检定获得+1状态加值。查阅你的通讯器是回忆知识动作的一部分。你必须手持该通讯器才能这么做。通讯器会立即汇编并显示与该主题相关的各种媒体中的片段与摘录，从而使你获得该加值。若你在此次检定中掷出大失败，则改为失败。若此次检定成功且对象是一个生物，你会获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。你一旦查阅该通讯器，此法术便结束。当法术结束时，你对阿卡西记录的访问也随之终止，而你下载的所有信息都会返回阿卡西记录。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{法术效果：阿卡西下载}

强化（3环） 你可以在法术结束前查阅你的通讯器三次。

You execute a psychic search of the Akashic Record for information about a specific topic and magically transfer this data to your comm unit or computer. When you Cast this Spell, choose any skill in which you're trained that has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action.

Any time during the duration, you can consult your comm unit while attempting a Recall Knowledge check using your chosen skill. This check gains a +1 status bonus. Checking your comm unit is part of the action to Recall Knowledge. You must be holding the comm unit to do so. The comm unit instantly compiles and displays snippets and selections from various media relevant to the topic, which grants you the bonus. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the check is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature. Once you reference the comm unit, the spell ends. When the spell ends, your access to the Akashic Record ends, and all the information you downloaded returns to the Akashic Record.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{Spell Effect: Akashic Download}

Heightened (3rd) You can reference your comm unit three times before the spell ends.

Akashic Eye.name: 阿卡西之眼 Akashic Eye
Akashic Eye.description:
阿卡西龙无需使用自己的记忆，而是可以从阿卡西记录中查明信息。这使其获得阿卡西记录学识技能，并可以用其来对任何类型进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}。

Instead of using their own memories, an Akashic dragon can ascertain information from the Akashic Records. This gives it the Akashic Record Lore skill, which it can use to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} of any kind.

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult.name: 对所有对抗神秘的豁免检定获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult

Akashic Interference.name: 阿卡西干扰 Akashic Interference
Akashic Interference.description:
90尺。阿卡西巨龙附近持续不断的上传与下载漩涡，使得尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}变得难以预测。除阿卡西巨龙之外，任何进入该区域或在该区域内开始其回合的生物都必须进行一次@Check[will|dc:28]豁免。无论此次豁免检定结果如何，该生物随后在1分钟内会暂时免疫这条巨龙的阿卡西干扰。

大成功 在1轮内，当该生物尝试回忆知识时，其检定获得+3状态加值。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 在1轮内，当该生物尝试回忆知识时，其检定承受–3状态减值。

大失败 同失败，但该效果持续1分钟。

90 feet. The swirl of constant uploads and downloads near the Akashic dragon make attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} unpredictable. A creature other than an akashic dragon that enters or begins its turn in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:28] save. Regardless of the result of the saving throw, the creature is temporarily immune to this dragon's Akashic interference for 1 minute.

Critical Success For 1 round, when the creature attempts to Recall Knowledge, it gains a +3 status bonus to its check.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure For 1 round, when the creature attempts to Recall Knowledge, it takes a –3 status penalty to its check.

Critical Failure As failure, but the effect lasts 1 minute.

Deflecting Lasers.name: 偏转激光束 Deflecting Lasers
Deflecting Lasers.description:
触发 龙被一次攻击造成重击

效果 阿卡西巨龙利用遍布其全身的嵌入之眼升起一张偏转激光之网，获得对触发攻击的所有伤害15抗性，并吸收部分打击的能量，使其阿卡西弹幕充能。若阿卡西巨龙在过去1分钟内对该生物的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定已成功，则其改为获得20抗性。

Trigger The dragon is critically hit by an attack

Effect The Akashic dragon raises a web of deflecting lasers using the eyes embedded all over their body, gaining resistance 15 to all damage against the triggering attack and absorbing some of the blow's energy, recharging their Akashic Barrage. If the Akashic dragon has succeeded at a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} check against the creature in the last minute, they gain resistance 20 instead.

Akashic Adaptability.name: 阿卡西适应性 Akashic Adaptability
Akashic Adaptability.description:
阿卡夏巨龙可以像对待其中所含法术为异能法术一样，以任意传统的“施放法术”激活方式来激活魔法和科技物品。

The Akashic dragon can activate magic and tech items with the Cast a Spell activation of any tradition as if the spells they contain were occult spells.

Akashic Barrage.name: 阿卡西连射 Akashic Barrage
Akashic Barrage.description:
巨龙将来自阿卡西记录的锋锐真理与炽热启示凝聚成嘶鸣的激光火焰，并从其主眼中以圆锥形射出，袭击敌人。这造成 @Damage[14d6[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害，范围为 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]（@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:stupefied] 豁免）。如果一个生物在对抗阿卡西齐射的反射豁免中严重失败，且阿卡西巨龙在过去 1 分钟内曾成功对该生物进行过一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定，则该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续 1 轮。巨龙在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Akashic Barrage]]{1d4 轮} 内无法再次使用阿卡西齐射。

The dragon condenses cutting truths and fiery revelations from the Akashic Record into sizzling laser fire that they project as a cone from their primary eye to assail their foes. This deals @Damage[14d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:stupefied] save). If a creature critically fails its Reflex save against Akashic Barrage and the Akashic dragon has succeeded at a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about the creature in the last minute, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round. The dragon can't use Akashic Barrage again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Akashic Barrage]]{1d4 rounds}.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打和一次尾击打。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one tail Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙族势头 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
龙每当以一次打击造成重击时，都会为其阿卡西连 barrage 充能。

The dragon recharges their Akashic Barrage whenever they score a critical hit with a Strike.

Records of the Enemy.name: 敌方记录 Records of the Enemy
Records of the Enemy.description:
每场遭遇中，阿卡西巨龙第一次用其颚部打击命中并对一个生物造成伤害时，它会获得关于该生物的信息，如同它已成功通过一次针对该生物的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}检定。
