You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Daze.name: 晕眩术 Daze
Daze.description:
你侵入目标的精神，利用精神冲击令目标晕眩。该冲击造成1d6心灵伤害，具有基础意志豁免。如果目标在豁免中大失败，它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 该伤害增加1d6。

Delete.name: 删除 Delete
Delete.description:
你以一个花哨的魔法手势删除设备或物体中的数据。这些数据可能是手写、印刷或数字形式。你最多可以删除相当于1,500个单词的文本、一页内容，或一整个显示屏上的文本或其他视觉信息。无人看管的物体中或其上的非魔法文字，或被持握物体中或其上的非魔法文字，会被自动删除。尝试进行一次反制检定以删除数字或魔法文字。如果你未能删除作为一个危害一部分的文字，你会触发该危害。这不能用于删除法术书或类似用于储存魔法公式或法术的媒介中的内容。

如果你以带有追踪（特征）的有人持用科技物品为目标，尝试进行一次反制检定。若成功，该物品变为故障 1。持有该物品的生物可以进行【交互】以重启软件，使故障值减少1。

强化（7环） 你可以删除单个设备或书籍中本地存储的所有数据，或删除设备或书籍上与某个特定名称、主题或类别相关的所有数据。

You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Disguise Magic.name: 伪装灵光 Disguise Magic
Disguise Magic.description:
你改变一个物品或者魔法的灵光会如何作用于侦测魔法（Detect Magic）这类效果。你可以完全隐藏灵光，让一个物品看起来是普通物品或者更低等级的物品，或者让一个法术看起来是相同获得更低环级的常见法术。你可以解消该法术。使用比伪装灵光更高环级的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{侦测魔法 Detect Magic}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.OhD2Z6rIGGD5ocZA]{阅读灵光 Read Aura}可以通过使用对应该法术的技能（奥术为奥法，神术为宗教，异能为神秘，原能为自然）来尝试不相信幻觉。相同的施法者的进一步的不相信尝试会得到与初次检定相同的结果。

升阶（2环级） 你可以对一个生物施放该法术，伪装其身上所有的物品和魔法效果。

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，拓展神智，以感受魔法灵光。当你完成施法后，你得知该物品是否具有魔法。你或者你共有了灵光情报的人在对该物品@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic}时获得+2环境加值。如果该物体是幻象，仅当该效果的环级低于你的阅读灵光环级时你才能发现此事实。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.J6OhRNSN23KzOPRL]{Spell Effect: Read Aura}

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多10个物体为目标。

升阶（8环级） 你能以任意数量物体为目标。

Shield.name: 护盾 Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一面力场构成的魔法护盾。这视同你使用了举起盾牌动作，赋予你在AC上的+1环境加值，直到你的下个回合开始，但这里不需要手来使用。

当该法术生效时，你可以使用你的魔法护盾来进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡 Shield Block}反应动作。该盾牌具有硬度5。你可以使用该法术的反应动作来减少任何来自法术或者魔法效果的伤害，即使这不造成物理伤害。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，并且你无法在10分钟内再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

升阶（+2） 该盾牌的硬度增加5。

Sure Strike.name: 料敌机先 Sure Strike
Sure Strike.description:
在你的回合结束前，你下一次尝试攻击骰时，骰两次并使用较好的结果。该攻击会忽视对攻击骰的环境减值，以及其他任何目标@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}所导致的纯骰检定。然后你临时免疫料敌机先10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: Sure Strike}

Akashic Eye.name: 阿卡西之眼 Akashic Eye
Akashic Eye.description:
阿卡西巨龙无需运用自身记忆，而是可以从阿卡西记录中查明信息。这使其获得“阿卡西记录”学识技能，并且它可以用此对任何种类的事物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}。

Instead of using their own memories, an Akashic dragon can ascertain information from the Akashic Records. This gives it the Akashic Record Lore skill, which it can use to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} of any kind.

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult.name: 对抗秘学时，所有豁免检定获得 +2 状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult

Akashic Interference.name: 阿卡西干扰 Akashic Interference
Akashic Interference.description:
90英尺。阿卡西巨龙附近不断旋动的上传与下载，使得尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}变得难以预测。除阿卡西巨龙外，任何进入该区域或在该区域内开始其回合的生物都必须进行一次@Check[will|dc:38|options:area-effect]豁免。无论此次豁免检定结果如何，该生物都会在1分钟内暂时免疫这条巨龙的阿卡西干扰。

大成功 持续1轮，当该生物尝试回忆知识时，它的此次检定获得+3状态加值。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 持续1轮，当该生物尝试回忆知识时，它的此次检定承受–3状态减值。

大失败 如失败，但该效应持续1分钟。

90 feet. The swirl of constant uploads and downloads near the Akashic dragon make attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} unpredictable. A creature other than an akashic dragon that enters or begins its turn in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:38|options:area-effect] save. Regardless of the result of the saving throw, the creature is temporarily immune to this dragon's Akashic interference for 1 minute.

Critical Success For 1 round, when the creature attempts to Recall Knowledge, it gains a +3 status bonus to its check.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure For 1 round, when the creature attempts to Recall Knowledge, it takes a –3 status penalty to its check.

Critical Failure As failure, but the effect lasts 1 minute.

Deflecting Lasers.name: 偏转激光束 Deflecting Lasers
Deflecting Lasers.description:
触发 该龙被一次攻击造成重击

效果 阿卡西巨龙利用其遍布全身的眼睛升起一张偏转激光之网，对触发攻击获得对所有伤害的抗性20，并吸收部分打击的能量，为其阿卡西弹幕充能。若阿卡西巨龙在过去1分钟内曾对该生物的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定成功，则其获得的抗性改为30。

Trigger The dragon is critically hit by an attack

Effect The Akashic dragon raises a web of deflecting lasers using the eyes embedded all over their body, gaining resistance 20 to all damage against the triggering attack and absorbing some of the blow's energy, recharging their Akashic Barrage. If the Akashic dragon has succeeded at a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} check against the creature in the last minute, they gain resistance 30 instead.

Akashic Adaptability.name: 阿卡西适应性 Akashic Adaptability
Akashic Adaptability.description:
阿卡西巨龙可以激活带有“施放法术”激活方式的魔法和科技物品，无论其属于任何传统，就如同其中包含的法术都是惑控法术一样。

The Akashic dragon can activate magic and tech items with the Cast a Spell activation of any tradition as if the spells they contain were occult spells.

Akashic Barrage.name: 阿卡西连击 Akashic Barrage
Akashic Barrage.description:
龙将来自阿卡西记录的锋锐真理与炽烈启示凝聚成灼热的激光火焰，从其主眼中以锥形投射出去，袭击敌人。这造成 @Damage[18d6[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害，范围为 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]（@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:stupefied] 豁免）。如果一个生物在对抗阿卡西齐射的反射豁免中严重失败，且阿卡西龙在过去 1 分钟内曾成功对该生物进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定，则该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续 1 轮。该龙在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Akashic Barrage]]{1d4 轮} 内不能再次使用阿卡西齐射。

The dragon condenses cutting truths and fiery revelations from the Akashic Record into sizzling laser fire that they project as a cone from their primary eye to assail their foes. This deals @Damage[18d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:stupefied] save). If a creature critically fails its Reflex save against Akashic Barrage and the Akashic dragon has succeeded at a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about the creature in the last minute, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round. The dragon can't use Akashic Barrage again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Akashic Barrage]]{1d4 rounds}.

Records of the Enemy.name: 敌人记录 Records of the Enemy
Records of the Enemy.description:
每次遭遇中，阿卡夏巨龙第一次用其颚部打击命中并对一个生物造成伤害时，它会获得关于该生物的信息，如同它已成功通过一次针对该生物的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}检定。

The first time each encounter the Akashic dragon hits and deals damage to a creature with their jaws Strike, they receive information about the creature as if they'd succeeded at a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about that creature.

Shocking Revelation.name: 震撼揭示 Shocking Revelation
Shocking Revelation.description:
需求 该龙在过去1分钟内，已成功对90英尺内的一名敌人进行过回忆知识

效果 该龙说出一个关于该生物的惊人真相，甚至连它自己都可能不知道，从而使其及其盟友迟疑不决或举止失常。90英尺内每个能听见这个秘密的敌人都必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:38|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed,inflicts:confused] 豁免。随后，每个生物在24小时内对“震撼揭露”免疫。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}，持续1轮。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 2}，持续1轮。

大失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{混乱}，持续1轮。

Requirements The dragon has successfully Recalled Knowledge about an enemy within 90 feet within the last minute

Effect The dragon utters a shocking truth about the creature that even it might not know, causing it and its allies to hesitate or act erratically. Every enemy within 90 feet that can hear the secret must attempt a @Check[will|dc:38|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed,inflicts:confused] save. Each creature is then immune to Shocking Revelation for 24 hours.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round.

Akashic Record Lore.name: 阿卡西记录学识 Akashic Record Lore

Akashic Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).publicNotes:
阿卡西巨龙虽然很少在其满是遗物、摇摇欲坠的巢穴之外被人遇见，但它们偶尔也会生活在知识的中心枢纽中，比如繁忙的太空站或城市。这些巨龙被赋予了与阿卡西记录的直接连接，是傲慢的知识策展者，并认为（而且往往确实如此）不可能有其他存在比它们更深刻地理解物质宇宙的秘密。阿卡西巨龙会在阿卡西记录中度过漫长时间，常常在它们感觉已经过去了许多天之后才现身，而对银河中的其余存在来说，实际上仅仅过去了几个小时。

Though rarely encountered outside their crumbling, relic-filled lairs, Akashic dragons occasionally live in hubs of knowledge, such as bustling space stations or cities. These dragons, bestowed with a direct connection to the Akashic Record, are arrogant curators of knowledge, assuming (often correctly) that no other being could possibly have a deeper understanding of the universe's secrets. Akashic dragons spend extensive time in the Akashic Record, often emerging after what they perceive as many days while mere hours have passed for the rest of the galaxy.
Akashic Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).allSaves: +2 status to all saves vs. occult

Mutant Troll.name: 突变巨魔 Mutant Troll

Regeneration 20 (deactivated by cold or.name: 再生 20（受到寒冷或电击后失效） Regeneration 20 (deactivated by cold or electricity)

Mauling Flurry.name: 猛击连击 Mauling Flurry
Mauling Flurry.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 突变巨魔对一个目标进行两次爪击，都不增加其多重攻击减值。若两次打击都造成伤害，巨魔可以对该目标尝试一次颚击，并正常适用多重攻击减值。

Frequency once per round

Effect The mutant troll makes two claw Strikes against one target without increasing their multiple attack penalty. If both Strikes deal damage, the troll can attempt a jaw Strike against that target with the normal multiple attack penalty.

Mutated Split.name: 变异裂分 Mutated Split
Mutated Split.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 该突变巨魔将自己撕裂为两个彼此分离的大型实体，在它们之间共享一个破碎的意识。处于此形态时，突变巨魔的两个半身共用一个生命值池，并且在它们的回合中共有 4 个动作可供分配。若两个半身都处于某个区域效果内，它们都必须尝试豁免检定，采用较差的结果，但伤害只承受一次。

Frequency once per day

Effect The mutant troll rips themself apart into two separate Large-sized entities, sharing one fractured sentience between them. While in this form, the mutant troll halves share a communal Hit Point pool and have 4 actions to share between them on their turn. If both halves are included in an area of effect, they must both attempt saving throws, taking the worse result, but only taking damage once.

Reforming Merge.name: 重塑合并 Reforming Merge
Reforming Merge.description:
要求 突变巨魔的两半彼此相邻

效果 突变巨魔的两半重新合并为一个单一实体。

Requirements The mutant troll halves are adjacent to each other

Effect The mutant troll halves re-form into a single entity.

Splurting Slime.name: 喷溅黏液 Splurting Slime
Splurting Slime.description:
需求 该突变巨魔处于其“突变分裂”形态，且两半彼此相距在30英尺以内

效果 复制出的两个个体朝彼此喷射突变的血肉与器官，吸收其中大部分碎块，但也会将酸性的内脏碎块倾泻到它们之间那条10英尺宽的直线区域内被波及的任何生物身上。这些生物受到 @Damage[8d8[acid]] 伤害，并可进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:27] 豁免。该巨魔在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Splurting Slime]]{1d4轮} 内不能再次使用“喷溅黏浆”。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

Requirements The mutant troll is in its Mutated Split form, and both halves are within 30 feet of each other

Effect The duplicated beings spray mutated flesh and organs toward each other, absorbing most of the pieces but raining down acidic viscera on any creatures caught in the 10-foot-wide line between them. These creatures take @Damage[8d8[acid]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:27] save. The troll can't use Splurting Slime again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Splurting Slime]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Mutant Troll.publicNotes:
突变巨魔一来到物质宇宙便又踢又叫，对周遭环境几乎毫无意识。它们会撕咬抓挠任何靠近的人，不过没人确切知道它们究竟是如何出现的。它们栖身于银河各处破损的反应堆和危险废料倾倒场中。有时，突变巨魔会东拼西凑一些科技零件，给自己做出喷气背包或火箭舱作为推进装置，好逃离这些地方，去别处寻求血腥的快感。

这些巨魔在外形上差异很大，但往往都有松垮下垂的皮肤和毛发，这是它们扭曲再生能力的副作用。突变巨魔少数钟爱的事情之一，就是沐浴在破损反应堆系统的辉光之中。它们对辐射冲刷皮肤的感觉感到狂喜——它们会低声自语，谈起远古的同类，说那些同类曾让自己的身体充满如此之多的辐射，以至于获得了原始魔法力量。

Mutant trolls come into the Universe kicking and screaming, barely aware of their surroundings. They bite and claw at anyone who comes near, though no one knows for sure how they come into existence. They take shelter in broken-down reactors and hazardous waste dumps throughout the galaxy. Sometimes, mutant trolls puzzle together bits of tech to craft themselves a jetpack or rocket pod for propulsion to escape these sites and seek gory pleasures elsewhere.

These trolls vary greatly in appearance, but they tend to have droopy skin and hair, a side effect of their twisted regenerative powers. One of the few things mutant trolls love is to bask in the glow of a broken reactor system. They take rapturous joy in the feel of radiation washing over their skin—they speak to themselves in hushed tones about ancient kin who filled their bodies with so much radiation that they acquired primal magic powers.

Arqsheth.name: 阿克瑟斯 Arqsheth

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣天生法术 Divine Innate Spells

Truespeech (Constant).name: 真言（恒常城） Truespeech (Constant)
Truespeech (Constant).description:
无论什么语言，目标都可以理解其所有的词语，并且向其他生物用该语言交流。当处于一群各异的生物中时，每次目标将要说话，他可以选择一个生物，并使用一种该生物理解的语言来讲述，即使该目标不知道这语言具体是什么。

升阶（7环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Translocate (At Will).name: 传送（随意） Translocate (At Will)
Translocate (At Will).description:
你立即将自身以及自己正在穿戴和持有的物品从当前空间转移走，移动至法术射程内你能看到的未被占据的空间。如果这将会带着其他生物与你一同移动——即便你把该生物放置在异次元容器中——你就会失去该法术。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至1英里。你不需要看到目的地，只要你曾经去过目的地，并且知晓该地点与你相对的位置以及距离即可。之后你会在1小时内临时免疫该法术。

Revealing Light.name: 显光尘 Revealing Light
Revealing Light.description:
一道魔法光亮的波浪掠过该区域。由你选择光亮的外观，例如五彩斑斓、无热量的火焰或者闪烁的微尘。受显光尘影响的生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}。 若该生物处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}，则它改为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}。如果目标已由于任何其他原因处于隐蔽状态，则它不再隐蔽。

大成功 该目标不受影响。

成功 该光亮影响生物2轮。

失败 该光亮影响生物1分钟。

大失败 该光亮影响生物10分钟。

Message.name: 传讯术 Message
Message.description:
你无声地念出言语，这段言语会直接送到目标耳中，而不是从你的嘴中念出。其他人听起来顶多是你与它们正常说话，但法术目标会如同正站在你身边一般听到你的言语。目标可以通过一个反应动作做出一段简要回应，或者根据其意愿，也可以通过其下个回合的自由动作来回应，但它如此做时必须能看见你，并且在射程内。如果它做出回应，它的回应会直接送达你的耳中，如同最初的信息一般。

升阶（3环级） 法术的射程增加到500尺。

Sure Strike (At Will).name: 精准一击（随意） Sure Strike (At Will)
Sure Strike (At Will).description:
在你的回合结束前，你下一次尝试攻击骰时，骰两次并使用较好的结果。该攻击会忽视对攻击骰的环境减值，以及其他任何目标@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}所导致的纯骰检定。然后你临时免疫料敌机先10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: Sure Strike}

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Archon's Protection.name: 圣使的防护 Archon's Protection
Archon's Protection.description:
触发条件 敌人对圣使的盟友造成伤害，且二者都位于圣使 15 尺内

效果 该盟友针对此次触发的伤害获得对所有伤害 15 的抗性，且圣使可以对该敌人进行一次打击。此次打击不计入圣使的多重攻击减值，且圣使的多重攻击减值也不适用于此次打击。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.IsNnfuzanT5teGt4]{效果：圣使的保护}

Trigger An enemy damages the archon's ally and both are within 15 feet of the archon

Effect The ally gains resistance 15 to all damage against the triggering damage, and the archon can make a Strike against the enemy. This Strike doesn't count toward the archon's multiple attack penalty, and their multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.IsNnfuzanT5teGt4]{Effect: Archon's Protection}

Armament of the Archons.name: 圣使的武装 Armament of the Archons
Armament of the Archons.description:
单个生物只要有两只空闲手，就可以用一个自由动作持握一名邻近且自愿的阿克谢斯。阿克谢斯一旦被另一名生物持握，在该阿克谢斯下一回合开始之前，不能被不同的生物持握。当作为武器被持握时，阿克谢斯视为一把造成 @Damage[2d10[fire]] 伤害的军用远程武器；属于激光武器组；射程增量为40英尺；并具有非电子、圣洁和追踪 +2 特性。用这把武器进行的打击还会额外造成 @Damage[1d10[spirit]] 伤害。它们不需要弹药，且没有体积，因为它们能够自行支撑自身重量。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.c3Y1xZ6IIxbsnPk1]{效果：圣使武装}

A single creature can wield an adjacent willing arqsheth as a free action as long as it has two free hands. Once wielded by another creature, an arqsheth can't be wielded by a different creature until the start of the arqsheth's next turn. While wielded as a weapon, an arqsheth counts as a martial ranged weapon that deals @Damage[2d10[fire]] damage; is in the laser group; has a range increment of 40 feet; and has the analog, holy, and tracking +2 traits. Strikes made with this weapon deal an extra @Damage[1d10[spirit]] damage. They don't require ammunition and have no Bulk, as they support their own weight.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.c3Y1xZ6IIxbsnPk1]{Effect: Armament of the Archons}

Archon's Pursuit.name: 圣使的追猎 Archon's Pursuit
Archon's Pursuit.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 arqsheth 在上一轮内看见另一个生物进行了传送

效果 arqsheth 施放 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{移形换位}，该法术被升阶至5环，并使 arqsheth 出现在其所追击生物30尺内、由其选择的一个未被占据的空间内。如果该生物距离过远，arqsheth 会尽可能靠近地到达。

Frequency once per day

Requirements The arqsheth saw another creature teleport within the last round

Effect The arqsheth casts @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Translocate}, which is heightened to 5th rank and causes the arqsheth to arrive in an unoccupied space they choose within 30 feet of the creature they're pursuing. If the creature is too far away, the arqsheth arrives as close as possible.

Righteous Cannon.name: 正义巨炮 Righteous Cannon
Righteous Cannon.description:
当被另一生物持用时，阿克谢斯可以成为能够以远程武器为目标的法术的目标，例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SbBqa1HStMrV47fb]{超载武器}。

An arqsheth can be the target of spells that can target a ranged weapon, such as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SbBqa1HStMrV47fb]{Supercharge Weapon}, while wielded by another creature.

Arqsheth.publicNotes:
据说，阿克谢斯曾呈现为弩炮大小的强弩形态；它们是有生命的大炮，沿着天堂的城墙列阵，以抵御邪魔。它们常会向心地纯洁的凡人显露自身，这些凡人要么正处于迫近的邪魔入侵路径上，要么正在竭力消灭一个邪恶的敌人。它们往往对目标有近乎偏执的执着，甚至曾有过为了追击邪魔而抛下坚毅盟友、不愿耽误与目标之战的情况。

一旦阿克谢斯摧毁了自己追猎的目标，或认定其持用者已不再需要自己的协助，它们通常便会返回天堂；但在某些罕见情形下，阿克谢斯有时也会长时间停留在物质宇宙中。这些阿克谢斯可能会与一支忠诚的星舰船员一同踏上漫长旅途，守卫一颗看似被遗弃的星球，或在一座漂流信标附近驻守。它们从不透露自己留下的动机，而有些人怀疑，阿克谢斯拥有某种第六感，能够预警潜在威胁，并引导它们承担这样的岗位。

Believed to have once taken the shape of ballista-sized arbalests, arqsheths are living cannons who line the walls of Heaven to defend it against fiends. They often make themselves known to pure-hearted mortals who are either in the path of an imminent fiendish incursion or else struggling to vanquish a vile foe. They can be obsessively goal oriented and have been known to abandon a stalwart ally to pursue a fiend rather than delay the fight against their target.

Once an arqsheth destroys the object of their pursuit or determines that their wielder no longer needs their aid, they typically return to Heaven, but rare circumstances sometimes lead an arqsheth to remain in the Universe for an extended time. These arqsheths might find themselves embarking on long journeys with a loyal starship crew, standing guard over a seemingly abandoned planet, or taking up a post near a Drift beacon. They never reveal their motivation for remaining, and some suspect that arqsheths have a sort of sixth sense that warns of potential threats and leads them to take up such posts.
Arqsheth.allSaves: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Typodaemon.name: 错字恶魔 Typodaemon

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣天生法术 Divine Innate Spells

Speak with Computers.name: 与计算机交谈 Speak with Computers
Speak with Computers.description:
你可以向栖居于计算机中的灵体提问，并从它们那里获得答案。这些合成灵体显现于计算机代码之中，其个性常常会受到设备性质、设备状态，以及其应用程序与个性化设置的影响。计算机的视角、感知和知识赋予它一种与人类截然不同的世界观，因此它不会认为相同的细节同样重要。计算机大多能够回答关于过去与它们交互过的生物的问题，以及其文件中隐藏着什么信息。

强化（6环） 持续时间为8小时。

You can ask questions of and receive answers from the spirits inhabiting a computer. These synthetic spirits manifest within computer code and often have personalities colored by the nature of the device, its condition, and its applications and personalized settings. A computer's perspective, perception, and knowledge give it a worldview different enough from a human's that it doesn't consider the same details important. Computers can mostly answer questions about creatures that interfaced with them in the past and what information is concealed within their files.

Heightened (6th) The duration is 8 hours.

Instant Virus.name: 瞬时病毒 Instant Virus
Instant Virus.description:
你的碰触会植入一种危险的自我复制病毒，扰乱科技生物的程序。目标必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}。

失败 目标陷入故障 1，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

大失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2}。

Your touch installs a dangerous self-replicating virus that disrupts a technological creature's programming. The target must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}.

Failure The target is glitching 1 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Skim Data.name: 浏览数据 Skim Data
Skim Data.description:
你触碰一个物体，并专注于其中包含的一组数据，例如故事、消息、文件、信息圈站点、录音或视频。你会理解这组数据的大意，并且能够迅速定位到与你搜索内容最相关的页面或章节。如果这组数据是用你不懂的语言写成或以其他方式传达的，或者你试图从一台你无权访问的计算机中获取信息（例如一台设有你不知道密码的计算机），则该法术失败。

如果你将此法术作为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{Research} 活动的一部分来施放，则你将重度失败视为失败。

You touch one object and concentrate on a dataset contained within it, such as a story, message, file, infosphere site, audio recording, or video. You understand the gist of the dataset and can quickly locate the most relevant pages or sections to your search. If the dataset is written or otherwise communicated in a language you don't know, or you attempt to gain information from a computer you don't have access to (such as one with a password you don't know), the spell fails.

If you Cast this Spell as part of a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{Research} activity, you treat a critical failure as a failure instead.

Delete (At Will).name: 移除（随意） Delete (At Will)
Delete (At Will).description:
你以一个夸张华丽的魔法手势删除设备或物体中的数据。这些数据可能是手写、印刷或数字形式。你最多可以删除相当于 1,500 个单词的文本、一页内容，或一整块显示屏上的文本或其他视觉信息。无人看管的物体中或其上的非魔法书写内容会被自动删除。尝试进行一次反制检定以删除数字或魔法书写内容。如果你未能删除构成一个危害一部分的书写内容，你会触发该危害。此法术不能用于删除法术书或类似用于储存魔法公式或法术的媒介中的内容。

如果你的目标是一件具有追踪（特征）的有人持用科技物品，则尝试进行一次反制检定。若成功，该物品变为故障 1。持握该物品的生物可以使用“交互”来重启软件，使故障值降低 1。

升阶（7环） 你可以删除单一设备或书籍中本地存储的全部数据，或删除某个设备或书籍上与特定名称、主题或类别相关的全部数据。

You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Implant Data.name: 植入体数据 Implant Data
Implant Data.description:
你重新编程一台计算机或装置，使其在被访问时显示一段你所选定的数据。每个法术环阶你最多可以植入一段数据。一段数据可以是一个简单事实，例如某个生物或物体的位置或物理描述；某个生物或物体的图像；或一段不超过300个字符的简单陈述。当目标计算机或装置被访问时，这段植入的数据会成为访问该装置的生物首先获得的数据，无论该生物正在查找什么数据。植入的数据不会阻止生物访问储存在装置中的其他信息，不会改变装置的运作方式，也不会以其他方式妨碍装置运作。如果在有生物访问这段植入数据之前该法术的持续时间结束，这些信息就会消失。

升阶（3环） 持续时间为一年。

升阶（6环） 持续时间变为无限。

You reprogram a computer or device to display a chosen piece of data when accessed. You can implant up to one piece of data per spell rank. A piece of data can be a simple fact, such as a creature or object's location or physical description; an image of a creature or object; or a simple statement of no more than 300 characters. When the target computer or device is accessed, this implanted data is the first data the accessing creature gains, regardless of what data the creature is looking for. Implanted data doesn't prevent a creature from accessing other information stored on a device, change how the device functions, or otherwise inhibit the device from functioning. If this spell's duration ends before a creature accesses the implanted data, the information vanishes.

Heightened (3rd) The duration is one year.

Heightened (6th) The duration is unlimited.

Measure.name: 测量 Measure
Measure.description:
你会得知你在区域内能够观察到的生物和物体的大致测量值（长度、宽度、深度、高度和重量）。如果某个物体或生物延伸出该区域，你只能得知区域内部分的测量值，而无法得知你无法观察到的部分。例如，你无法判定一堵你只能看到单侧的墙的厚度或重量，也无法判定超出该法术范围的水体深度。每次你维持该法术时，你都会得知区域内一个生物或物体的精确测量值，包括可能表明结构薄弱的不精确之处或异常。经过魔法改变的目标会给予你反映你所观察到内容的信息，而非准确测量值。

升阶（+1） 将测量的范围延长100英尺。

You learn the approximate measurements (length, width, depth, height, and weight) of creatures and objects you can observe in the area. If an object or creature extends out of the area, you learn only the measurements within the area, but nothing about what you can't observe. For example, you can't determine the thickness or weight of a wall you can observe only one side of, or the depth of water that extends beyond the spell's range. Each time you Sustain the spell, you learn the exact measurements of one creature or object in the area, including imprecisions or anomalies that might indicate structural weakness. Magically altered targets give you information that reflects what you observe rather than accurate measurements.

Heightened (+1) Extend the range of measure by 100 feet.

Scan Environment.name: 扫描环境 Scan Environment
Scan Environment.description:
你分析1英里内区域中的自然环境，获知关于大气、生物群系和重力的一般信息。你可以预测接下来1小时内的天气，包括它将从哪个方向而来；获知该区域内有哪些大气、生物群系和重力，以及这些要素的方向和距离；并获知该区域内是否有任何事物构成环境危害，包括寒冷或高温危险（处于何种温度范围）、辐射（处于何种严重程度）、烟雾效应，以及水下环境状况。这仅足以探测直径超过30英尺的大范围效应。你会对这些危险的大致方位和距离有一个总体感知。

升阶（+1） 扫描区域的半径增加1英里。

You analyze the natural environment in the area within 1 mile, learning general information about the atmosphere, biomes, and gravity. You forecast the weather for the next hour, including the direction it will come from; learn which atmospheres, biomes, and gravity are in the area, as well as the direction and distance to those elements; and learn if anything in the area presents an environmental hazard, including cold or heat dangers (at what temperature range), radiation (at what severity), smoke effects, and underwater conditions. This is enough to detect large effects that span spaces over 30 feet in diameter only. You gain a general sense of where and how far away these dangers are.

Heightened (+1) The scanned area increases in radius by 1 mile.

Input Overload Aura.name: 输入过载灵气 Input Overload Aura
Input Overload Aura.description:
20尺。灵光中的敌人在对抗音波效果或会改变书面或存储数据的效果时，其AC和所有豁免检定承受–1状态减值。位于此灵光内且试图阅读文件的生物，必须成功通过一次 @Check[flat|dc:5]，否则在接下来的[[/gmr 1d4+1]]{1d4+1轮}内无法阅读该文件。

20 feet. Enemies in the aura take a –1 status penalty to AC and all saves against sonic effects or effects that alter written or stored data. A creature within this aura attempting to read a document must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] or cannot read the document for the next [[/gmr 1d4+1]]{1d4+1 rounds}.

Pedant Annoyance.name: 学究式烦扰 Pedant Annoyance
Pedant Annoyance.description:
排字魔矛盾地厌恶别人指出它们的错误。如果某个生物通过【互动】来纠正排字魔已经写下或正在书写之物中的语法或句法错误，包括使用如 implant data 之类的法术，排字魔便会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。以这种方式恶心时，该魔族必须花费一个动作来为自己的行为辩解，而不是干呕，并改为尝试一次 @Check[will] 豁免来移除该状态。

Typodaemons paradoxically despise having their errors pointed out. If a creature Interacts to correct the grammar or syntax of something the typodaemon has written or is writing, including with a spell such as implant data, the typodaemon becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. While sickened this way, the daemon must spend an action to justify its actions instead of retching, attempting a @Check[will] save instead to remove the condition.

Error Injection.name: 错误注入 Error Injection
Error Injection.description:
错字魔远程访问60英尺内一个可见且具有科技特征的物品代码，并注入错误数据。该物品变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}；如果该物品由某生物持有，该生物必须进行一次@Check[will|dc:18|options:inflicts:glitching]豁免，成功则抵消此效果。此后，该物品在1小时内免疫错误注入。

The typodaemon remotely accesses the code of a visible item with the tech trait within 60 feet and injects erroneous data. The item becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}; if the item is in possession of a creature, the creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:18|options:inflicts:glitching] save, negating the effect on a success. The item is then immune to Error Injection for 1 hour.

Typodaemon.publicNotes:
这些身形如孩童般大小的邪魔，体现的是因听写错误、转录失误，或文本复制粘贴错误而导致的死亡恐怖。排印邪魔会对文本做出隐蔽的改动，改变一个词，加入一个嘲弄的表情，或调整标点，从而让书写的词句产生全新的含义。这些改动会引发冲突，而排印邪魔则因这些简单错误所导致的纷争与死亡可能而兴盛。

邪魔来自阿巴顿位面，彻底献身于毁灭一切生命。它们的存在建立在特定的死亡方式之上，并为其主人“天启骑士”效命，寻求万物的死亡。每一种邪魔都代表着一种不同的死法，并运用其独特的力量来推进那种死亡方式。

科技的发展只创造出了新的死亡与折磨手段，因此新的邪魔种类也不断诞生——每当累积了足够数量的新型死亡事件，便会孕育出一种新的邪魔。这些新近出现的邪魔通常更喜欢把时间花在银河中，而非阿巴顿，因为在那里它们能更有效地将自己的折磨散播给造物界的凡人。

These child-sized daemons represent the horrors of death through dictation errors, transcription woes, or incorrect copying and pasting of text. Typodaemons make discreet adjustments to text, changing a word, adding a taunting emote, or adjusting punctuation to create entirely new meanings for written words. These changes lead to conflicts, and the typodaemon thrives on the strife and potential for death because of these simple errors.

Hailing from the plane of Abaddon, daemons are utterly devoted to the destruction of all life. Their existence is based around specific means of death, and they seek the death of all things in service to their lords: the Apocalypse Riders. Each daemon represents a different way to die, and they use their specific powers to further that means of death.

Advents in technology have only created new means of death and torment, so new types of daemons enter existence with regularity, each created once a sufficient mass of new deaths occurs to spawn them. These new advent daemons often prefer to spend their time in the galaxy rather than Abaddon, as they can better spread their torments to the mortals of creation.

Emvermod.name: 埃姆弗莫德 Emvermod

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始本能法术 Primal Innate Spells

Truespeech (Constant).name: 真言（恒常城） Truespeech (Constant)
Truespeech (Constant).description:
无论什么语言，目标都可以理解其所有的词语，并且向其他生物用该语言交流。当处于一群各异的生物中时，每次目标将要说话，他可以选择一个生物，并使用一种该生物理解的语言来讲述，即使该目标不知道这语言具体是什么。

升阶（7环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你专注于目标，在魔法全息影像显示信息的同时收集数据。当施法完成时，你会获知目标的生物特征信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况以及其他基本生理信息。你或任何你告知该分析结果的人，在对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充}的检定、对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤势}的检定，以及对其进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}的检定时，获得+1状态加值。如果目标是虚幻的，或处于幻术魔法的影响之下，则只有当该效果的环阶低于你的分析目标法术的环阶时，你才能察觉到这一点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{法术效果：分析目标}

升阶（3环） 状态加值增加为+2，且你的目标至多可以为10个生物。

升阶（6环） 状态加值增加为+3，且你可以将任意数量的生物作为目标。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Daze.name: 晕眩术 Daze
Daze.description:
你侵入目标的精神，利用精神冲击令目标晕眩。该冲击造成1d6心灵伤害，具有基础意志豁免。如果目标在豁免中大失败，它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 该伤害增加1d6。

Delete (At Will).name: 删除（随意） Delete (At Will)
Delete (At Will).description:
你以一个华丽夸张的魔法手势，从一个装置或物体中删除数据。这些数据可以是手写的、印刷的或数字形式的。你最多可以删除相当于1,500个词的文本、一页内容，或一整块显示屏上的文本或其他视觉信息。位于无人看管或手持物体内或其上的非魔法文字会被自动删除。尝试进行一次反制检定以删除数字或魔法文字。如果你未能删除构成某个危害一部分的文字，你会触发该危害。此法不能用于删除法术书或类似用于储存魔法公式或法术的载体中的内容。

如果你的目标是一个带有追踪（特征）的有人持用科技物品，尝试进行一次反制检定。成功时，该物品变为故障 1。持有该物品的生物可以执行“交互”动作来重启软件，使故障值降低1。

强化（7环） 你可以删除单个装置或书籍中本地储存的所有数据，或者删除某个装置或书籍上与特定名称、主题或类别相关的所有数据。

You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Implant Data.name: 植入体数据 Implant Data
Implant Data.description:
你将一台计算机或装置重新编程，使其在被访问时显示一条你选择的数据。每个法术环阶你最多可以植入一条数据。一条数据可以是一个简单事实，例如某个生物或物体的位置或物理描述；某个生物或物体的图像；或一段不超过300个字符的简单陈述。当目标计算机或装置被访问时，这条植入的数据会成为访问该装置的生物首先获得的数据，无论该生物正在寻找什么数据。植入的数据不会阻止生物访问装置上存储的其他信息，不会改变装置的运作方式，也不会以其他方式妨碍装置运作。如果在有生物访问植入数据之前该法术的持续时间结束，这些信息就会消失。

升阶（3环） 持续时间为一年。

升阶（6环） 持续时间变为无限。

You reprogram a computer or device to display a chosen piece of data when accessed. You can implant up to one piece of data per spell rank. A piece of data can be a simple fact, such as a creature or object's location or physical description; an image of a creature or object; or a simple statement of no more than 300 characters. When the target computer or device is accessed, this implanted data is the first data the accessing creature gains, regardless of what data the creature is looking for. Implanted data doesn't prevent a creature from accessing other information stored on a device, change how the device functions, or otherwise inhibit the device from functioning. If this spell's duration ends before a creature accesses the implanted data, the information vanishes.

Heightened (3rd) The duration is one year.

Heightened (6th) The duration is unlimited.

Motivating Ringtone.name: 激励铃声 Motivating Ringtone
Motivating Ringtone.description:
你使目标通讯设备播放一段由宇宙谱就、专属于其所有者的个人主题铃声。当你施放该法术时，目标通讯设备的所有者恢复 1d8+4 点生命值；并且只要该通讯设备继续播放铃声，在持续时间内，其所有者获得所有速度 +5 尺状态加值，以及对抗恐惧效应的豁免检定 +1 状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.NmhqKZyMgQSHbyHj]{法术效果：激励铃声}

强化（+1） 治疗量增加 1d8+4。

You cause the target comm unit to play a cosmically composed personal theme song specific to its owner. The creature who owns the target comm unit regains 1d8+4 Hit Points when you Cast the Spell, a +5-foot status bonus to all Speeds, and a +1 status bonus to saves against fear effects for the duration as long as the comm unit continues to play the ringtone.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.NmhqKZyMgQSHbyHj]{Spell Effect: Motivating Ringtone}

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d8+4.

Pulsecaster Pistol.name: 脉冲投射手枪 Pulsecaster Pistol

Comm Unit.name: 通信单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通信器是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机与蜂窝通信设备，使其能够在行星范围内以音频和文本格式与其他通信器进行即时无线通信。个人通信器还包括计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在接下来的5英尺内发出微光）、可访问任意本地信息圈的浏览器，以及若干娱乐选项（包括游戏）。

集成在护甲中的个人通信器具有一些语音激活功能；你可以在不需要空闲手的情况下，以音频格式与其他通信器通信并接收回复，但输入消息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍需要至少一只手。

能够在更远距离运作的通信器就没那么便携了；它们内置发电机，以提供所需的电力，并依赖活跃的漂流信标进行通信。这类通信器的短期使用服务在大多数大型定居点都可以买到。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Dutiful Moderator.name: 尽职的版主 Dutiful Moderator
Dutiful Moderator.description:
由 emvermod 管理的在线社区绝不会遭遇随机故障或停机。任何将该社区作为工具来进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Yn4jLPVWVE1vtAaF]{接入信息圈}、制作虚拟物品、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{赚钱} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.RF8xNJ8QsMwogerB]{黑入} 的检定，都会获得 +2 情境加值。若 emvermod 的态度为不友好，则这类检定改为承受 –2 情境减值。emvermod 必须在一个线上空间中花费一周时间，才能成为版主。

An online community moderated by an emvermod never experiences random bugs or downtime. Any checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Yn4jLPVWVE1vtAaF]{Access Infosphere}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{Craft} virtual items, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{Earn Income}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.RF8xNJ8QsMwogerB]{Hack} using the community as a tool receive a +2 circumstance bonus. If the emvermod is unfriendly, such checks take a –2 circumstance penalty instead. An emvermod must spend a week in an online space to become a moderator.

Modvision.name: 模组视觉 Modvision
Modvision.description:
一名 emvermod 能以该距离栏所列范围内的一种不精确感知，感知到在其所管理的任何社群中拥有活跃账户的物品和生物。即使社群成员使用信息圈别名，他们也能认出这些成员。

An emvermod can sense items and creatures with active accounts on any community they moderate as an imprecise sense at the listed range. They recognize community members, even if they use an infosphere alias.

Shy.name: 害羞的 Shy
Shy.description:
只要拿着通讯装置或处于虚拟空间中，emvermod天生就是隐形的。它们在其所管理的任何信息圈空间中，似乎都没有账号。它们可以显现出来，甚至还能选择性显现，只允许特定的人看见它们。

An emvermod is naturally invisible while holding a comm unit or in a virtual space. They don't appear to have an account in any infosphere space they moderate. They can become visible, or even selectively visible, allowing only specific people to see them.

Shadow Ban.name: 影子禁令 Shadow Ban
Shadow Ban.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

效果 60尺内一个持有通讯装置或其他连接至信息圈的计算机的生物，必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:18] 豁免，因为emvermod试图禁止其进行交流。

大成功 无效果，且该生物在1天内暂时免疫暗影禁言。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物不能使用听觉动作或进行交流，甚至不能通过打手势、生成文本或使用心灵感应来交流。这也会阻止目标施放法术，因为施法涉及魔法言词，但微妙法术除外。此效果持续1分钟，或直到版主精类撤销暗影禁言或死亡，以先发生者为准。

大失败 同失败，但此效果持续24小时。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect A creature within 60 feet with a comm unit or other computer connected to an infosphere must attempt a @Check[will|dc:18] save as the emvermod tries to ban it from communicating.

Critical Success No effect, and the creature is temporarily immune to Shadow Ban for 1 day.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature can't use auditory actions or communicate, even by gesturing, generating text, or using telepathy. This also prevents the target from casting spells due to the magical words involved in casting, with the exception of subtle spells. This effect lasts for 1 minute, or until the moderator fey retracts the Shadow Ban or dies, whichever comes first.

Critical Failure As failure, except this effect lasts 24 hours.

Emvermod.publicNotes:
作为一种家宅精灵，Emvermod，或称“版主精类”，是一个或多个在线社群中害羞的居民，帮助维持网络空间的活力、参与度与秩序。它们常常呈现出自己头像的外貌，选择与其信息圈小众圈层中其他成员相配的形象。

在得到应有尊重时，emvermod是勤勉的管理员，会与网络空间中的其他版主协作，帮助在线社群蓬勃发展。若受到怠慢，或被指控对社群造成伤害，它们就会制造各种恶作剧，例如删除帖子、影子封禁成员，甚至模仿其他用户。

A form of house spirit, the emvermod, or "moderator fey," is a shy resident of one or more online communities who helps keep the online space vibrant, engaged, and orderly. They often take on the appearance of their avatar, choosing one that fits with the other members of their infosphere niche.

When given proper respect, an emvermod is a diligent administrator who helps an online community thrive while working alongside other moderators in the online space. When disrespected or accused of causing harm to the community, they cause all sorts of mischief, such as deleting posts, shadow banning members, and even imitating other users.

Repair-Class Security Robot.name: 维修级安保机器人 Repair-Class Security Robot
Repair-Class Security Robot.tokenName: 维修型安保机器人 Repair-Class Security Robot

Exigency.name: 紧急情况 Exigency
Exigency.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 一个生物以安保机器人为攻击目标

效果 机器人让其处理能力超频，试图避开一次攻击，对触发该反应的攻击获得 AC +2 的境遇加值。

Frequency once every 10 minutes

Trigger A creature targets the security robot with an attack

Effect The robot overclocks its processing power to attempt to avoid an attack, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to its AC against the triggering attack.

Fire Suppressor.name: 灭火器 Fire Suppressor
Fire Suppressor.description:
机器人喷射出一道急流，效果如同 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jfVCuOpzC6mUrf6f]{液压冲击}（1环，DC 16）。机器人在使用此能力后必须重新灌满其水箱。

The robot sprays a torrent of water that functions as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jfVCuOpzC6mUrf6f]{Hydraulic Push} (1st-rank, DC 16). The robot must refill its tanks after using this ability.

Repair-Class Security Robot.publicNotes:
在许多拼凑而成的星舰和偏远空间站上，想负担得起专用安保机器人并不容易，尤其是当你一开始就没法设法拿到拥有它们的许可证时。大多数这类设施都会依赖廉价的维护机器人挺身而出、击退入侵者——它们或许对付不了真正严重的威胁，但也许能在常见害虫对星舰电路造成过多损害之前把它们清理掉。毕竟，有时候最好的维护就是预防性维护。

安保机器人遍布工业化太空，在协约世界和维斯卡里姆中都占据重要地位，被合作和私人公民广泛使用并加以定制。

虽然大多数士兵机器人型号都被制造得尽可能具有破坏性，而歼灭机器人更是以杀戮为目的，但安保机器人的行为程序中通常会写入故障保护措施，以防它们造成超出执行指定安保职能所必需的暴力。这使它们在城市中尤其有用，因为意外破坏可能会伤及旁观者或引发法律问题，甚至在星舰上也是如此，因为一束失控的激光爆炸就可能对关键的星舰系统造成严重损害。

On many scrappy starships and remote space stations, it's hard to afford dedicated security robots, especially if you can't manage to secure a license to own them in the first place. Most such operations rely on cheap maintenance bots to step up and repel intruders—they might not get the job done against serious threats, but they might be able to take out common vermin before they can cause too much damage to the starship's circuitry. After all, sometimes the best maintenance is preventive maintenance.

Security robots are ubiquitous throughout industrialized space and have major presences in both the Pact Worlds and Veskarium, employed and customized by corporations and private citizens alike.

While most soldier robot models are built to be as destructive as possible, and elimination robots are designed to kill, security robots usually have fail-safes programmed into their behavior to prevent them from causing any more violence than is necessary to perform their designated security function. This makes them especially useful in cities, where unintended destruction might harm bystanders or cause legal issues, and even on starships, where a stray laser blast might cause serious damage to vital starship systems.

Garaggakal Polymath.name: 加拉加卡尔博学家 Garaggakal Polymath
Garaggakal Polymath.tokenName: 博学家加拉加卡尔 Garaggakal Polymath

Emotion Sense.name: 情绪感知 Emotion Sense
Emotion Sense.description:
garaggakal博学者能以所列距离内的不精确感官感知所有处于情绪效果影响下的生物。

The garaggakal polymath senses all creatures that are under emotion effects as an imprecise sense at the listed range.

Sense Through.name: 穿透感知 Sense Through
Sense Through.description:
garaggakal 的不精确感知可穿透大多数材料和墙壁运作。能量场（如力场和力效应）以及足够致密的材料会阻挡这些感知：10 英尺厚的木材或塑料、5 英尺厚的石头、1 英尺厚的普通金属，或 6 英寸厚的铅或任何星铁。

The garaggakal's imprecise senses function through most materials and walls. The senses are blocked by energy fields (such as force fields and force effects) and sufficiently dense material: 10 feet of wood or plastic, 5 feet of stone, 1 foot of common metal, or 6 inches of lead or any starmetal.

Analyzed Strike.name: 解析打击 Analyzed Strike
Analyzed Strike.description:
Requirements 迦拉伽卡尔的上一个动作以颚部打击对一个活物造成了伤害

Effect 迦拉伽卡尔运用其广博的解剖学知识深入伤口，对目标造成剧痛。迦拉伽卡尔对符合要求的生物进行一次颚部打击，并使用与前一次打击相同的多重攻击减值。若命中，目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（若重击则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}）。这在计算迦拉伽卡尔的多重攻击减值时视为两次打击。

Requirements The garaggakal's last action damaged a living creature with a jaws Strike

Effect The garaggakal uses their extensive knowledge of anatomy to dig into the wound, causing agonizing pain to the target. The garaggakal attempts a jaws Strike against the required creature, using the same multiple attack penalty as the previous Strike. On a hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical hit). This counts as two Strikes for the garaggakal's multiple attack penalty.

Draining Saliva.name: 汲取唾液 Draining Saliva
Draining Saliva.description:
受到 garaggakal 的唾液 Strike 造成伤害的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:36] 豁免。若失败，其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 1}（若严重失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 2}）。

A creature that takes damage from a garaggakal's spit Strike must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:36] save. On a failure, it's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} on a critical failure).

Leech Life.name: 汲取生命 Leech Life
Leech Life.description:
需求 garaggakal 30尺内有一个活物且带有汲取状态

效果 garaggakal 强化了对所需生物本质生命力的汲取，造成 @Damage[10d6[void]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:38|basic] 豁免）。garaggakal 获得等同于所造成伤害一半的临时生命值，持续1分钟。无论豁免结果如何，garaggakal 随后都会向所需生物方向飞行至多15尺，并且所需生物在24小时内暂时免疫于吸取生命。

Requirements A living creature within 30 feet of the garaggakal has the drained condition

Effect The garaggakal amplifies the drain on the required creature's essential life force, dealing @Damage[10d6[void]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:38|basic] save). The garaggakal gains temporary Hit Points equal to half the damage dealt that last 1 minute. Regardless of the result of the save, the garaggakal then Flies up to 15 feet closer to the required creature, and the required creature becomes temporarily immune to Leech Life for 24 hours.

Phase Through.name: 相位穿越 Phase Through
Phase Through.description:
garaggakal 可以移出现实位相，因此无法被墙壁或牢笼困住。garaggakal 穿过至多 15 英尺的固体物质。它们必须在其回合结束时离开固体物质，否则受到 @Damage[5d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。garaggakal 无法穿过力场效应。

A garaggakal can shift out of phase with reality and thus can't be held by walls or cages. The garaggakal moves through up to 15 feet of solid matter. They must end their turn outside of the solid matter or take @Damage[5d6[bludgeoning]] damage. A garaggakal can't phase through force effects.

Garaggakal Polymath.publicNotes:
这些加拉加卡尔已经存活了数个世纪，体型长到超过15英尺高、1,000磅重。加拉加卡尔博学者在漫长岁月中折磨并肢解了它们遇到的所有生物，因此对各种活体生物的解剖结构都有极其丰富的记忆。它们甚至比年轻的加拉加卡尔更加残忍，在窃取受害者的生命力之前，会以给对方造成极度痛苦为莫大乐趣。它们在漂流域中比年轻同类旅行得更远，受到永不满足的欲望驱使，去寻找并解剖新的生物。

漂流域是个奇异之地，而原生于其中的生物则更加古怪。加拉加卡尔也不例外。它们外形大致像类人生物，有手臂和双腿，但同时还长着蜡黄而富有弹性的皮肤、长长的鳞状尾巴，以及如薄纱般的翅膀。最骇人的是，它们的脸几乎完全被那张巨大、漏斗状的口器占据，口器内侧布满利齿。虽然它们会用这些嘴完成显而易见的用途——撕咬——但也能利用其强大的吸力从猎物体内抽取真正的生命力。

加拉加卡尔也被称为“漂流域幽魂”，会猎杀任何在漂流域中逗留太久的活体生物。对加拉加卡尔而言，任何不是同类加拉加卡尔的东西都是猎物。然而，它们并非只是毫无心智的猎手。加拉加卡尔聪明得出奇，而且更喜欢解剖受害者，在吞食之前先彻底了解它们。加拉加卡尔经常会在受害者仍然活着时将其肢解。异种生物学家已经确认，加拉加卡尔严格来说甚至不需要进食也能生存，因此它们那无休止的饥饿似乎是心理层面的。不过，在没有食物时，它们确实需要漂流域的能量才能存活；此外，它们繁殖时也需要漂流域的能量，会寻找强辐射区域加以吸收，然后用自身细胞构筑新的后代。它们的孩子在造物时就已完全长成。

加拉加卡尔会出其不意地袭击猎物。它们极其擅长潜行，甚至还能穿相通过实体物质，突然出现在星舰内部——对恰好身处其中的任何活体生物来说，这都是坏消息。骗子们会向旅行者兜售所谓的加拉加卡尔驱避装置，让他们在漂流域中使用，以防止这类来访。

These garaggakals have lived for centuries and reached sizes greater than 15 feet tall and 1,000 pounds. Garaggakal polymaths have spent their many years tormenting and tearing apart all the creatures they've encountered, and they have extensive recollection of anatomy of a wide variety of living things. They're even crueler than younger garaggakals, taking great delight in causing excruciating pain to their victims before stealing their life force. They travel much further through the Drift than their younger counterparts, driven by their insatiable desire to find and dissect new creatures.

The Drift is a strange place, and the creatures native to it are stranger still. Garaggakals prove no exception. Shaped vaguely like humanoids, they have arms and legs but also sallow, rubbery skin with long, scaly tails and gauzelike wings. Most horrifyingly, their faces are almost entirely taken up by their enormous, funnel-like mouth, lined with sharp teeth. While they use these mouths for the obvious purpose of biting, they can also use its powerful suction to draw actual life force from their prey.

Also known as "Drift wraiths," garaggakals hunt down any living creatures that linger too long in the Drift. For garaggakals, anything that isn't a fellow garaggakal is prey. However, they're no mere mindless hunters. Garaggakals are surprisingly intelligent and prefer to dissect victims, learning all about them before eating them. Often, garaggakals take their victims apart while they're still alive. Xenobiologists have determined that garaggakals don't even technically need to eat to survive, so their relentless hunger is seemingly psychological. They do require the energy of the Drift to survive in the absence of food, however, and further need the energy of the Drift to reproduce, seeking out areas of intense radiation to absorb and then build a new offspring from their own cells. Their children are fully grown at creation.

Garaggakals surprise their prey. They are quite stealthy and can even phase through solid matter, suddenly appearing on the inside of a starship—bad news for whatever living creatures happen to be inside. Con artists sell garaggakal repelling devices for travelers to use while in the Drift to prevent such visits.

Terrible Roar.name: 可怖咆哮 Terrible Roar

Thundering Roar.name: 雷鸣咆哮 Thundering Roar
Thundering Roar.description:
触发条件 一个生物对 kyokor 采取敌对动作、产生可见的区域效应，或在距离 kyokor 120 英尺内飞行

效果 kyokor 发出咆哮，朝触发它的生物所在方向释放一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:120] 的声波锥形区域。硬度为 5 或以下的无人持有物体立即获得破损状态，混凝土和金属表面则会扭曲成困难地形。区域内的生物受到 @Damage[20d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:44|basic] 豁免）。若豁免失败，该生物还会受到 @Damage[3d6[persistent,mental]|options:area-damage] 伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

Trigger A creature takes a hostile action against the kyokor, produces a visible area effect, or flies within 120 feet of the kyokor

Effect The kyokor roars, producing a @Template[type:cone|distance:120] of sound in the direction of the triggering creature. Unattended objects of 5 or less Hardness immediately gain the broken condition, and concrete and metal surfaces warp into difficult terrain. Creatures in the area take @Damage[20d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:44|basic] save). On a failure, a creature also takes @Damage[3d6[persistent,mental]|options:area-damage] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Terrible Roar.disable:
@Check[arcana|dc:50]（传奇），@Check[occultism|dc:50]（传奇），或 @Check[performance|dc:50]（传奇）以抵消这声咆哮

@Check[arcana|dc:50] (legendary), @Check[occultism|dc:50] (legendary), or @Check[performance|dc:50] (legendary) to counteract the roar
Terrible Roar.hazarddescription:
巨岳吼兽发出一声可怖的咆哮。

当一只巨岳吼兽经过或穿过一处聚居地——甚至只是发动攻击！——它都会留下一道毁灭的痕迹，可用以下危害来表现。

令人胆寒、体型如摩天大楼般巨大的野兽游荡在戴马尔科的荒原上。居民称它们为“巨像”，这些怪物从地底深处喷涌而出，将城市践踏成尘，在一场可怕的“觉醒”中大肆屠戮人口，并摧毁了这颗星球上所有的地表文明。巨岳吼兽是其中最令人畏惧的巨像之一。若没有瓦尔科——由戴马尔科顽强的幸存者打造、用于对抗巨像的战争机器——就毫无击败它的希望。

The kyokor unleashes a terrible roar.

When a kyokor passes by or through a settlement—or even attacks!—it leaves a trail of destruction that can be represented by the following hazards.

Terrifying, skyscraper-sized beasts roam the wastelands of Daimalko. Called colossi by the population, these monsters erupted from deep within the earth to stomp cities into dust, decimating the population and destroying every surface civilization on the planet in a terrifying Awakening. Kyokors are among the most dreaded colossi. There's no hope of defeating one without a valko—a war machine created by Daimalko's stubborn survivors to fight the colossi.
Terrible Roar.reset:
响尾兽必须等待 [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 轮}后才能再次咆哮。

The kyokor must wait [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} before roaring again.

Crest-Eater.name: 蚀冠者 Crest-Eater

Bone Tracker.name: 骸骨追踪者 Bone Tracker
Bone Tracker.description:
对于在过去 1 小时内受到过冠食者毒液伤害的生物，冠食者可以在所列距离内将其嗅觉作为精确感官使用。

A crest-eater can use its scent as a precise sense at the listed range against creatures that have taken damage from crest-eater venom in the past hour.

Crest-Eater Venom.name: 蚀冠毒素 Crest-Eater Venom
Crest-Eater Venom.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:21]

最长持续时间 4 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[acid]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d8[acid]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d10[acid]] 伤害、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{抽取 1}，以及衰弱 2（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:21]

Max Duration 4 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[acid]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d8[acid]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d10[acid]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}, and enfeebled 2 (1 round)

Scree Strider.name: 砾行者 Scree Strider
Scree Strider.description:
冠食者无视由瓦砾、沙地以及由泥土和石头构成的崎岖不平地面造成的困难地形。

Crest-eaters ignore difficult terrain caused by rubble, sand, and uneven ground made of earth and stone.

Crest-Eater.publicNotes:
冠食兽是大型四足野兽，同时具有爬行动物与哺乳动物的特征。它们起源于遥远的卡萨斯世界，随后扩散至整个宇宙，伴随众多卡萨斯人迁徙，甚至在协约世界的世界飞船伊达里号上也有一个小型聚居地。冠食兽是一种捕食者，以啃食猎物的骨骼而闻名。它们会使用一种腐蚀性极强的酸性毒液，能够轻松蚀穿矿物。它们的名字来源于其过往历史：追踪卡萨斯人，并敲开猎物拉长的头骨，以取食其中的“骨冠”。随着冠食兽摄食骨骼和其他物质，它们的身体各处会长出巨大的矿物质突起。冠食兽是群居生物，常常结成兽群共同狩猎，若被接纳，也会与附近其他物种结伴而行——因此，一艘星舰的船员或当地劫掠团伙中养有一只或多只冠食兽的情况并不少见。与冠食兽一同狩猎数代的驯养者，会在冠食兽死后用它们同伴的遗体制作一副仪式用的拳套；尽管冠食兽骨骼价值高昂、需求旺盛，这一传统至今仍在延续。

大多数冠食兽体长可达14英尺，高约6英尺（还不包括那些显眼的矿物质突起）。由于身体富含矿物，它们的体重往往超过1,000磅，在无法支撑其庞大体型的环境中，这多少会妨碍它们的行动。幼年与成年的冠食兽通常会一起待在小型兽群中，不过在食物来源匮乏的环境里，有些也会成为独行猎手。体型特别巨大的雄性往往会随着年龄增长而变得愈发好斗，并且常因敌意强烈和贪食无度而被其余同类逐出兽群。若这些独行巨兽存活得足够久，它们便会成为难以预测且危险的威胁，试图通过袭击沙漠聚落来建立领地并寻找食物。许多卡萨斯人的史诗中，都会出现一位或数位勇士挺身而出，保卫村庄、对抗一头年迈雄性冠食兽的故事。无论是被当地传奇人物讨伐，还是最终悄然死去，这些体型异常巨大的冠食兽都可能留下可供胆大冒险者发掘的珍贵矿物缓存库。

Crest-eaters are large four-legged beasts with traits of both reptiles and mammals. Originating from the distant world of Kasath, they've spread throughout the cosmos, accompanying numerous kasathas and even having a small enclave aboard the Idari worldship in the Pact Worlds. A crest-eater is a predator known for consuming the bones of their prey. They use a highly corrosive acidic venom that eats through minerals with ease. Their name comes from their history of tracking down kasathas and cracking open their prey's elongated skulls to feed on the "bony crests" within. As crest-eaters consume bones and other substances, they produce large mineral protrusions across their bodies. Crest-eaters are social creatures and often form prides to hunt together or join with other nearby species if they're accepted—it's not uncommon to find a starship crew or local raider gang with one or more crest-eaters they've adopted. Tamers who have hunted with crest-eaters for generations craft a ceremonial cestus from their comrade's body after a crest-eater passes, a tradition still practiced to this day despite the high value and demand for crest-eater bones.

Most crest-eaters can grow as long as 14 feet and about 6 feet tall (not including their noticeable mineral protrusions). Thanks to their mineral-laden composition, they often weigh in excess of 1,000 pounds, somewhat hampering their mobility in environments that can't support their girth. Young and mature crest-eaters tend to stay together in small prides, though some act as solitary hunters in environments where food sources are scarce. Especially large males frequently become increasingly aggressive as they age, and they're often driven away by the rest of the pride for both their hostility and gluttonous appetites. If these solitary beasts survive long enough, they can become unpredictable and dangerous threats that attempt to establish territory and find food by attacking desert settlements. Many kasathan epics feature one or more brave warriors defending their village against an ancient male crest-eater. Whether dispatched by local legends or eventually dying off in secret, these oversized crest-eaters can leave behind a valuable cache of minerals for enterprising adventurers.

Free Captain.name: 自由船长 Free Captain

进阶 Phase Cutlass.name: 进阶 Phase Cutlass
进阶 Phase Cutlass.description:
升级： 1

相位弯刀在启动前看起来像一把传统的弧形剑。启动后，它的剑刃会变形成一片闪烁的虚空，其中每一个它所终结的生命，都对应着一颗微小的星辰。

Upgrades: 1

A phase cutlass resembles a traditional curved sword until it's powered. Then its blade morphs into a shimmering void, with a tiny star for each life it ended.

Starfall Pistol.name: 星坠手枪 Starfall Pistol
Starfall Pistol.description:
升级： 1

虽然最初只是粗糙拼凑出来的等离子发射器，但商用型号能够发射超高温等离子流。阿基通的狂欢者喜欢在户外庆典时朝空中鸣放这些手枪。

Upgrades: 1

While originally a kit-bashed plasma caster, the commercial models fire streams of superheated plasma. Akitonian revelers enjoy discharging these pistols into the air during outdoor celebrations.

Freebooter Armor.name: 掠夺者护甲 Freebooter Armor
Freebooter Armor.description:
升级： 1

掠夺者护甲因常穿着这类装备的海盗与亡命之徒而得名。掠夺者护甲通常由穿在夹克或飞行服内侧的胸甲、厚重的靴子和手套、头盔，以及用于隐藏武器的隐蔽绑带和枪套组成。

Upgrades: 1

Freebooter armor is named for the pirates and outlaws who often wear these outfits. Freebooter armor typically consists of a breastplate worn under a jacket or flight suit, heavy boots and gloves, a helmet, and hidden straps and holsters for concealing weapons.

Seashell Religious Symbol of Besmara.name: 贝斯玛拉的海贝宗教圣徽 Seashell Religious Symbol of Besmara
Seashell Religious Symbol of Besmara.description:
这块木制或银制物件上饰有代表某位神祇的图像。一些神圣施法者，例如牧师，可以使用其神祇的宗教圣徽来施展某些能力并施放一些法术。宗教圣徽可以用链子或别针佩戴在身上，也可以手持。

This piece of wood or silver is emblazoned with an image representing a deity. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious symbol of their deity to use certain abilities and cast some spells. A religious symbol can be worn on the body on a chain or pin, or can be held.

Give 'Em No Quarter!.name: 绝不手下留情！ Give 'Em No Quarter!
Give 'Em No Quarter!.description:
自由船长以心灵感应命令其船员毫不留情地屠戮一个目标。直到自由船长下个回合结束前，60英尺内所有等级等于或低于自由船长的友方生物，对一个生物进行的攻击掷骰和伤害掷骰获得+1状态加值。

The Free Captain telepathically orders their crew to mercilessly slaughter one target. All allied creatures of equal or lower level within 60 feet of the Free Captain gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls against one creature until the end of the Free Captain's next turn.

Soul Squall.name: 灵魂狂风 Soul Squall
Soul Squall.description:
自由船长弯刀上的星辰似乎会强化他们的星陨手枪；只要自由船长同时持握这两把武器，星陨手枪便会额外造成 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害。

The stars of the Free Captain's cutlass seem to empower their starfall pistol, which deals an additional @Damage[2d6[void]] damage as long as the Free Captain is holding both weapons.

Stardust Storm.name: 星尘风暴 Stardust Storm
Stardust Storm.description:
自由船长将其星陨手枪以相位弯刀劈开后使用区域射击，使繁星般的黑暗蔓延开来。该手枪的区域射击使用一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:10]，造成 @Damage[2d6[void]|options:area-damage] 伤害。未能通过对抗该区域射击豁免的生物会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}（若严重失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}）。

The Free Captain uses Area Fire with their starfall pistol split by their phase cutlass, causing the starry darkness to spread. The pistol's Area Fire uses a @Template[type:cone|distance:10] that deals @Damage[2d6[void]|options:area-damage] damage. Creatures that fail their save against the Area Fire become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical failure).

Free Captain.publicNotes:
船长是任何舰船上最高的军衔。他们只服从自由船长中的上将，而且前提是他们的船没有处于正在进行的战斗中。这名船长默认使用她弯刀的虚空模式，刀刃中数以百计闪烁的星辰象征着她在无数次交战中夺走的生命。

自由船长数代以来一直是协约世界星际航运的祸害，但自从采用漂流航道后，这些亡命之徒便借助新的标准化星际航运路线，以银河各地的船只为目标，进一步扩大了他们的活动范围与规模。

Captain is the highest rank on board any vessel. They answer only to admirals of the Free Captains and only if their ship isn't engaged in active combat. This captain uses the void mode of her cutlass by default, the hundreds of shimmering stars in the blade representing the lives taken in her countless engagements.

The Free Captains have been a scourge of interstellar shipping across the Pact Worlds for generations, but since the adoption of Drift Lanes, the outlaws have expanded their reach and scale by targeting ships across the galaxy using the new standardized interstellar shipping routes.

Blight Drake.name: 疫腐龙兽 Blight Drake

Wing Deflection.name: 偏转翼击 Wing Deflection
Wing Deflection.description:
触发条件 枯疫龙兽被其能看见的生物以一次攻击为目标

效果 枯疫龙兽抬起其翅膀，对触发攻击的 AC 获得 +2 情境加值。若枯疫龙兽正在飞行，则在该攻击完成后下降 10 尺。

Trigger The blight drake is targeted with an attack from a creature they can see

Effect The blight drake raises their wing, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If the blight drake is flying, they descend 10 feet after the attack is complete.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
龙兽以任意顺序进行两次颚击和一次尾击。

The drake makes two jaws Strikes and one tail Strike in any order.

Smokestack.name: 烟囱 Smokestack
Smokestack.description:
疫病龙从颈部周围的裂缝中喷吐出浓厚、恶臭的烟雾，在120英尺内一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:20] 中制造出一团烟云，并持续 [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}。云雾中的所有生物都成为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，而云雾外的所有生物对于其中的生物而言也变为隐蔽。

每个在云雾内开始其回合的生物都会受到 @Damage[5d6[poison]|options:area-damage] 伤害（进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened] 豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（若严重失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}）。

The blight drake blasts a thick, fetid smog from slits around their neck, creating a cloud of smoke in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet and that remains for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}. All creatures within the cloud become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all creatures outside the cloud become concealed to creatures in it.

Each creature that begins its turn inside the cloud takes @Damage[5d6[poison]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened] save). A creature that fails the save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).

Toxic Breath.name: 剧毒吐息 Toxic Breath
Toxic Breath.description:
枯疫龙向最远 60 尺处喷吐出一团恶臭的污染腐败物，并在 @Template[type:burst|distance:15] 内爆炸。爆发范围内的生物受到 @Damage[4d8[acid]|options:area-damage] 伤害和 @Damage[4d8[poison]|options:area-damage] 伤害（进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:28|basic] 豁免）。枯疫龙在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Toxic Breath]]{1d4 轮} 内无法再次使用剧毒吐息。

The blight drake spews a fetid ball of polluted putrescence up to a range of 60 feet that explodes in a @Template[type:burst|distance:15]. Creatures within the burst take @Damage[4d8[acid]|options:area-damage] damage and @Damage[4d8[poison]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:28|basic] save). The blight drake can't use Toxic Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Toxic Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Blight Drake.publicNotes:
疫腐龙兽因恶臭与污染而在龙类生物中“声名远扬”。它们会以工业化最恶劣形态中常见的污秽与腐败，污染周围的空气。这些独居的怪物与栖息于沼泽的龙类近亲相似，但周身往往笼罩着一层浓厚、令人窒息的瘴雾。疫腐龙兽乐于玷污洁净而葱郁的环境，在所到之处留下永不消散的污秽痕迹。

龙兽与它们体型更庞大的龙类近亲相似之处，并不只在于披鳞覆甲、凶名在外。从小巧的精类龙兽到巨大如船的星龙兽，龙兽都拥有与龙相似的有翼爬行动物体态、修长的颈部，以及吐息武器。但龙通常同时具有前肢与双翼，而龙兽一般只具其一。不过，它们修长蜿蜒的尾巴与锋利的颚部，足以弥补这项缺陷。

尽管龙兽比龙更加兽性化，它们依然具备惊人的狡黠，而且大多数都拥有如龙一般生成某种吐息武器的能力。然而，由于智力不足，龙兽比其他龙类生物更容易被驯化，而其重视家族群体的天性也使它们成为极为出色的群体猎手。

Blight drakes have a well-earned reputation among draconic creatures for stench and pollution. They corrupt the air around them with the sort of filth and decay commonly found in the worst kinds of industrialization. These solitary monstrosities resemble their swamp-dwelling draconic cousins but are often surrounded with a miasma of thick, choking smog. Blight drakes revel in befouling clean and verdant environments, leaving a permanent trail of filth in their wake.

Drakes resemble their larger draconic cousins in more than just scaled, monstrous acclaim. Ranging in size from the diminutive fey drake to the massive, ship-sized star drake, drakes share a dragons' winged reptilian form, long necks, and breath weapons. But where dragons often have forelimbs and wings, a drake typically only has one or the other. Their long, winding tails and sharp jaws more than make up for this lack, however.

Despite being more animalistic than dragons, drakes still possess a formidable cunning, and most share a dragon's ability to generate some form of breath weapon. However, their lack of intelligence makes drakes substantially easier to domesticate than other draconic creatures, and their familial nature makes them excellent pack hunters.

Appendage Cluster.name: 附肢簇 Appendage Cluster

Cluster Onslaught.name: 集群猛攻 Cluster Onslaught
Cluster Onslaught.description:
附肢簇群尝试进行一次特技检定以[[/act tumble-through]]穿越一个生物的空间。若成功，簇群的口器会猛咬并啃噬该生物，造成 @Damage[3d8[piercing]] 伤害。若该特技检定为大成功，目标还会受到 @Damage[4[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。

An appendage cluster attempts an Acrobatics check to [[/act tumble-through]] a creature's space. On a success, the mouths of the cluster gnash and gnaw at the creature, dealing @Damage[3d8[piercing]] damage. If the Acrobatics check was a critical success, the target also takes @Damage[4[persistent,bleed]] damage.

Appendage Cluster.publicNotes:
凯平是强壮的掠食者，拥有狼一般的敏捷与鳄鱼般的鳞皮。它们最醒目的特征，是覆盖头部的一团不断扭动、具备半自主意识的附肢。这些类似触手的突起中，每一根都长着一只布满血丝的眼球和一张咧开的利齿大口；而凯平自身并没有眼睛或嘴巴，只能依靠这些孔窍来视物与进食。附肢吸收的营养会通过这头野兽下颌上的微小受纳孔传递给凯平，而凯平还能将这些附肢脱离身体，变成一簇簇扭动的团块，独立行动至离本体100英尺远的范围内。在荒野中，凯平会利用这些团块伏击猎物，而这种生物也因其贪婪的食欲而闻名于整个银河——它们能够吃下相当于自身体重一半的生肉。

Caypins are brawny predators with the agility of wolves and the scaly skin of crocodiles. Their most striking feature is a mass of wriggling, semi-sentient appendages that cover their heads. Each of these tentacle-like protuberances contains a bloodshot eyeball and a gaping mouth full of teeth, and the caypin—which has no eyes or mouth of its own—relies on these orifices to see and feed. Nutrients absorbed by the appendages are passed to the caypin via tiny receptive sockets in the beast's jaw, and caypins can detach these appendages into writhing clusters that independently move up to 100 feet from their bodies. In the wild, caypins use these clusters to ambush prey, and the creatures are known across the galaxy for their rapacious ability to consume half of their body weight in raw meat.

Tregalxi.name: 特雷加尔克西 Tregalxi

Wire Sense.name: 导线感知 Wire Sense
Wire Sense.description:
特雷加尔西能够以一种不精确感知察觉30英尺内电线的存在。

A tregalxi can sense the presence of electrical wires within 30 feet as an imprecise sense.

Insulated Shell.name: 隔热外壳 Insulated Shell
Insulated Shell.description:
当特雷加尔西的生命值降至低于其一半时，其绝缘导线外壳会破裂，释放出其所容纳的辐射。特雷加尔西造成的所有电击伤害改为毒素伤害。当生物因特雷加尔西而受到毒素伤害时，它会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}，持续1分钟，且无法以任何方式降低该状态。

When a tregalxi is reduced to less than half their Hit Points, their insulated wire shell breaks, freeing their contained radiation. All electricity damage dealt by the tregalxi instead becomes poison damage. When a creature takes poison damage from a tregalxi, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} for 1 minute with no way to reduce the condition.

Circuit Splice.name: 电路拼接 Circuit Splice
Circuit Splice.description:
特雷加尔西将其线缆身躯延伸至30尺内的所有敌人。每个生物受到 @Damage[2d6[piercing]] 点穿刺伤害和 @Damage[2d6[electricity]] 点电击伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] 基础豁免）。特雷加尔西在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Circuit Splice]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次使用“电路拼接”。

The tregalxi extends their wire frame to all enemies within 30 feet. Each creature takes @Damage[2d6[piercing]] and @Damage[2d6[electricity]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] save). The tregalxi can't use Circuit Splice again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Circuit Splice]]{1d4 rounds}.

Short Circuit.name: 短路 Short Circuit
Short Circuit.description:
当一个生物直接接触到特雷加尔希的电线时，该生物受到 @Damage[1d6[electricity]] 伤害，并可进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] 豁免。

When a creature makes direct contact with a tregalxi's wires, the creature takes @Damage[1d6[electricity]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] save.

Tregalxi.publicNotes:
特雷加尔西通常看起来像一捆打结的电线。它们的真实形态是一团不断变化的放射性能量球，安全地栖身于其线缆外壳之中。特雷加尔西需要近乎持续不断的能源来源，才能安全维持自身的辐射。人们最常发现它们以寄生方式融入飞船的线路之中，秘密窃取能量，或卡在反应堆里。它们会从选定的能量源中汲取能量，直到自己要么饱足，要么无聊到去寻找新的能源。

理论上，一只迷失方向的特雷加尔西可能会进入大型飞船的动力核心、城市电网，或卫星的控制中心；在那里，它几乎必然会造成断电与故障，同时还会一点点变得更加强大、更加具有破坏性。

元素生物是来自原初存在位面的活性能量入侵体。它们形态各异，从风或水中无意识的涡流，到能够驾驭原初魔法的复杂实体，不一而足。太空旅行的到来与科技的进步，使更多作为元素鲜活化身的存在得以在物质宇宙中显现。

野火、太阳风暴和洪水等自然事件，能够在一颗行星上或一片太空区域中释放出大群难以驯服的元素生物。有时，一群强大的元素生物会引发史诗级规模的自然灾害，例如一次强到超出图表范围的太阳耀斑烧毁整颗行星的电网，或一场在气态巨行星大气中不断盘旋、永不停息的风暴。

Tregalxis generally look like a knotted bundle of electrical wiring. Their true form is a shifting ball of radioactive energy safely nestled within their wired shell. Tregalxis need a near-constant source of power to safely maintain their radiation. They're most often found parasitically integrated into a ship's wiring, secretly siphoning power or wedged into a reactor. They leech power from the chosen source until they become either satiated or bored enough to seek out a new power source.

Theoretically, a wayward tregalxi could find their way into a large ship's power core, a city power grid, or the control center for a satellite, where they would most certainly cause power outages and malfunctions, all while becoming incrementally more powerful and destructive.

Elementals are energetic intrusions from the primal planes of existence. They take many forms, from mindless eddies in the wind or water to complex entities capable of wielding primal magic. The advent of space travel and the progress of technology have allowed even more living embodiments of the elements to manifest in the Universe.

Natural events like wildfires, solar storms, and floods can unleash hordes of unruly elementals on a planet or into a region of space. Sometimes, a gathering of powerful elementals causes a natural disaster on an epic scale, like an off-the-charts solar flare that fries a planet's power grid or a ceaseless storm swirling in a gas giant's atmosphere.

Szynegator Swarm.name: 斯兹涅加托虫群 Szynegator Swarm
Szynegator Swarm.tokenName: 斯兹内加托虫群 Szynegator Swarm

Motion Sense.name: 动态感知 Motion Sense
Motion Sense.description:
一个szynegator虫群能够通过移动在空气或水中引起的振动感知附近的生物，将其作为具有所列范围的不精确感官。

An szynegator swarm can sense nearby creatures through vibrations in air or water caused by movement as an imprecise sense at the listed range.

Colony Mind.name: 殖民地思维 Colony Mind
Colony Mind.description:
30尺。所有彼此之间处于所列范围内且具有群体思维的盟友都会保持恒常的心灵感应交流，并知晓任意个体所知的所有威胁。当一个生物处于至少一个具有群体思维的盟友的范围内时，若其对一个精神效果的豁免检定结果为成功，则改为获得大成功。

30 feet. All allies with colony mind within the listed range of each other are in constant telepathic communication and are aware of all threats any individual knows about. While within range of at least one ally with colony mind, when a creature rolls a success on a save against a mental effect, it gets a critical success instead.

Comm Occlusion.name: 通讯遮蔽 Comm Occlusion
Comm Occlusion.description:
40英尺。除与殖群心智能力进行的通信外，所有电子和心灵感应通信都会停止运作，且受影响的生物在感知检定中承受–2情境减值。当三个或更多szynegator虫群使用殖群心智彼此知晓时，通讯遮蔽的范围增加至100英尺。当10个或更多szynegator虫群使用殖群心智彼此知晓时，该范围增加至行星级。

40 feet. All electronic and telepathic communication, except for that with the colony mind ability, ceases to function, and affected creatures take a –2 circumstance penalty to Perception checks. When three or more szynegator swarms are aware of each other using colony mind, the range of comm occlusion increases to 100 feet. This range increases to planetary when 10 or more szynegator swarms are aware of each other using colony mind.

Sonic Distortion.name: 音波扭曲 Sonic Distortion
Sonic Distortion.description:
位于szynegator虫群空间内的每个敌人受到 @Damage[1d8[sonic]] 伤害（进行 @Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] 豁免）。

Each enemy in the szynegator swarm's space takes @Damage[1d8[sonic]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] save).

Szynegator Swarm.publicNotes:
单只干扰虫的振动只会引发轻微眩晕，但当这些甲虫般的微小个体协调共鸣时，它们所造成的大气扰动会使大多数通信方式失效。干扰虫通常出现在行星上偏僻或荒凉的地区，以便其数量能够不受阻碍地增长。它们的出现预示着一场全面的虫群入侵。

虫群起源于浩界深处一种名为虫族的昆虫类物种，对若干文明而言，它被视为现存最可怕的威胁。虫群由无数子殖群构成，而每个子殖群又由无数组成性亚种构成；这是一个庞大的群体，以灵能统一体的形式行动，其目的在于吞噬宇宙中的一切物质。最可怕的是，虫群能够同化被其吞噬者的知识与DNA。由于在大断层前就已发展出星际旅行，虫群在历史中断之前便已吞噬了数不清的星系，而在获得信标以及被称为漂流域的超空间维度之后，虫群扩张的速度更是进一步加快。

被虫群染指的世界会被抽干自然资源，沦为被称作“空壳世界”的荒芜之地。外界所谓的“虫群空间”，不过是虫群在其肆意推进过程中吞噬后留下的一大片无生命世界。虫群对这些世界的剥夺极其彻底，以至于勘测者甚至难以找到哪怕微量的无机资源，例如稀有矿物和水。这些空壳世界中，几乎没有几个被彻底探索过，因为探索往往会唤醒休眠的工蜂；理论认为，这些工蜂是被留在当地，以防这个被吞噬的星系日后再次被殖民并恢复生机。远在这片区域之外的太空中也存在零星的虫群活动，因为早在大断层之前的时代，虫群就已派出了数不清的子殖群，而即使到现在，也只有其中一部分抵达了预定目的地。

在当今时代，虫群最为人所知的或许有两件重要之事。第一，它对协约世界与维斯卡里姆的进攻，促成了这两大势力停止敌对，并建立起脆弱的同盟。第二，虫群正是什瑞恩种族的直接祖先。什瑞恩人在大断层期间的某个时候脱离了虫群，并在女神海拉丝那里获得了庇护；人们相信海拉丝是由一种前虫群时期的虫族进化而来，并且她背弃了虫群后来演变成的那个贪婪实体。

近年来，虫群一直被视为不过是遥远的梦魇，除了在浩界中的苏斯基隆星系进行一些机密行动外，几乎没有其他活动。然而，最近对失踪的塞赞迪特世界克雷西斯卡的发现，意外唤醒了一个曾对该世界遭到吞噬负有责任的休眠子殖群。自那以后，这个新近被称为“克雷西斯卡子殖群”的群体已成为近宇的祸患，正积极入侵桑迪特联合体的诸世界，并准备蔓延至维斯卡里姆与协约世界等其他势力。这支被重新发现的子殖群已经开始让其组成个体迅速进化，虽然它仍与更广泛的虫群网络隔绝，但对近宇而言，它依然构成了明确的威胁。

A single szynegator vibrating causes slight vertigo, but when these tiny beetle-like components harmonize, the atmospheric disruption they generate renders most forms of communication inoperable. Szynegators can usually be found in isolated or desolate areas of planets so their number can grow unimpeded. Their presence harbingers a full Swarm invasion.

Developing far out in the Vast from an insectile species known as kucharns, the Swarm is considered the greatest threat in existence for several cultures. Composed of countless subcolonies, each consisting of myriad component subspecies, the Swarm is a vast host that acts in psychic union for the purpose of consuming all matter across the cosmos. Most frightening of all is the Swarm's ability to assimilate the knowledge and DNA of those they consume. Thanks to its pre-Gap development of star travel, the Swarm had already consumed innumerable systems before history short-circuited, and the Swarm's pace only accelerated once it received access to the Signal and the hyperspace dimension known as the Drift.

Worlds touched by the Swarm are drained of their natural resources and rendered barren places known as huskworlds. What outsiders consider to be "Swarm space" is little more than a swathe of lifeless worlds that the Swarm have consumed in its reckless advance. The Swarm so thoroughly strips these worlds that surveyors struggle to find even trace amounts of inorganic resources, such as rare minerals and water. Few of these huskworlds have been thoroughly explored, as oftentimes exploration awakens inert drones, theorized to have been left behind in case the devoured system was ever colonized and repopulated. Pockets of Swarm activity exist well beyond this region of space, as the Swarm sent out countless subcolonies in the ages before the Gap, and even now, only some of them have reached their intended destinations.

The Swarm is perhaps most known in the current era for two important facts. First, its assault on the Pact Worlds and the Veskarium led to the cessation of hostilities and tenuous alliance between the two powers. Second, the Swarm is the direct ancestor of the shirren species. Having broken away sometime during the Gap, shirrens found succor with the deity Hylax, who was believed to have evolved from a pre-Swarm kucharn and who turned her back on the ravenous entity the Swarm has evolved into.

In recent years, the Swarm had been seen as little more than a distant boogeyman with no activities save for classified actions in the Suskillon system in the Vast. However, the recent discovery of the missing Szandite world of Krethiskar inadvertently awoke a dormant subcolony that had been responsible for the world's consumption. Since then, the newly dubbed Krethiskar subcolony has become a scourge of Near Space, engaged in an active invasion of Szandite Collective worlds and poised to spill over into other powers like the Veskarium and Pact Worlds. This rediscovered subcolony has begun rapid evolution of its components and remains cut off from the wider Swarm, but it still represents a clear danger to Near Space.

Akashic Dragon (Ancient).name: 阿卡西巨龙（上古） Akashic Dragon (Ancient)
Akashic Dragon (Ancient).tokenName: 阿卡西巨龙（上古） Akashic Dragon (Ancient)

Occult Innate Spells.name: 神秘天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Foresight.name: 先见之明 Foresight
Foresight.description:
你获得一种能知晓法术目标即将遇到的危险的第六感。如果对于法术目标你选择一个生物而不是自身，你会创造一个精神链接；通过该链接你能告知目标危险将至。该链接是一个心灵效果。由于该法术需要你处理大量的信息，你无法令超过一个预警术同时生效。再次施放预警术会结束之前的预警术。当预警术生效时，目标在其先攻骰上获得+2状态加值，并且对 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{无踪 Undetected} 生物或者被夹击时不视为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}。除此之外，你获得下列反应动作： @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VOEWhPQfN3lvHivK]{预警 Foresight}
