@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.X9Na6IK8FSPcTuoc]{法术效果：预警术}

Telekinetic Tantrum.name: 心灵动能发脾气 Telekinetic Tantrum
Telekinetic Tantrum.description:
你释放出一阵强大的念动能量弹幕，足以压制生物、抛掷物体并造成伤害。当你施放这个法术时，以及此后每轮第一次维持该法术时，你都可以从以下效果中选择一个。你不能连续两次选择同一种效果。

  • 退后！ 你可以将最多15个物体或生物朝任意方向抛掷最多40尺（包括向上或向下）。对每个生物或物体，你最多可以抛掷总计40 Bulk的重量。生物根据其移动的距离受到钝击伤害，并以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧} 状态落地，如同其承受了坠落伤害一样。对该法术的强韧豁免成功的生物不会被移动。
  • 猛烈坠击 你用区域内的碎片与物体猛砸区域内所有生物，造成5d10点钝击伤害，进行一次基础反射豁免。
  • 念动猛击 你的念动风暴猛击区域内所有生物。进行一次远程法术攻击检定。你命中的所有目标受到7d6点力场伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

You launch a barrage of powerful psychokinetic energy that overpowers creatures, hurls objects, and deals damage. When you Cast this Spell and the first time each round you Sustain the spell, you can choose one of the following effects. You can't choose the same effect twice in a row.

  • Back Off! You hurl up to 15 objects or creatures up to 40 feet in any direction (including up or down). You can hurl up to a total weight of 40 Bulk per creature or object. Creatures take bludgeoning damage based on the distance they moved and land @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, as though they'd taken falling damage. Creatures that succeed on a Fortitude save against the spell avoid being moved.
  • Hard Rain You pummel all creatures in the area with debris and objects in the area, dealing 5d10 bludgeoning damage with a basic Reflex save.
  • Psychokinetic Slam Your psychokinetic storm slams into all creatures in the area. Make a ranged spell attack roll. All targets you hit take 7d6 force damage and are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only.name: 位面间传送（随意；仅限自身；仅可往返于阿卡西记录与物质宇宙） Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only; to and from Akashic Record and the Universe only)
Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only.description:
需求 你具有目标位面的位面密钥用于给法术定位

你和你的盟友跨越位面之间的屏障进行旅行。目标移动至其他位面，比如火元素位面、幽界、或者外层裂隙。你必须知晓目标位面的存在，而且需要使用由该位面的物质制作的魔法位面密钥来给法术定位。就如同跨界传送这个法术本身一样，大多数著名位面的位面密钥具有罕见稀有度，而鲜为人知的位面及半位面通常具有稀有、甚至有可能时独特稀有度的位面密钥。

该法术极其不精准，你会出现在目标之一（由你选择）上一次造访该位面时的位置周边，误差为1d20 x 25英里。若所有目标都是初次造访某个特定位面，你们就会出现在该位面的随机位置。跨界传送不会提供返回的手段，不过除非发生了什么另外情况，否则再次施放跨界传送能让你返回自身之前身处的位面。

Truesight.name: 真景术 Truesight
Truesight.description: 你可以看见60尺内的事物的本来面貌。GM秘密骰反制检定，对抗区域中的所有幻术或者变形效果，但这只会决定你是否能看破它（例如，如果该检定成功对抗了一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的本来形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

Truespeech (constant).name: 真言（恒常） Truespeech (constant)
Truespeech (constant).description:
无论什么语言，目标都可以理解其所有的词语，并且向其他生物用该语言交流。当处于一群各异的生物中时，每次目标将要说话，他可以选择一个生物，并使用一种该生物理解的语言来讲述，即使该目标不知道这语言具体是什么。

升阶（7环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Clairvoyance.name: 鹰眼术 Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description: 你在射程内创造出一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}的悬浮眼睛（它甚至可以在你的视觉线或者效果线之外）。这只眼睛不能移动，但是你可以从该处看到所有方向，如同使用你通常的视觉感官。

Confusion.name: 困惑术 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你使用奇怪的能量波动扰乱了目标的思维，令其随机行动。法术效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标胡言乱语，并且获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑 Confused}1分钟。在其每个回合结束，它能尝试一次新豁免来结束困惑术。

大失败 目标困惑1分钟，并且没有提前结束的豁免。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Mind Reading.name: 读心术 Mind Reading
Mind Reading.description:
你通过一次短暂的心灵接触来尝试阅读目标的想法。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。目标会暂时免疫你的读心术1小时。

大成功 目标得知当施放该法术时你模糊的表层想法。

成功 你得知目标的智力调整值是高于，等于，还是低于你。

失败 你得知当施放该法术时目标模糊的表层想法，并且你得知目标的智力是高于，等于，还是低于你。

大失败 如失败，并且在法术持续时间中，你可以维持该法术来再次侦测目标的表层想法。目标不会获得另外的豁免。

Akashic Download (at will).name: 阿卡西下载（随意） Akashic Download (at will)
Akashic Download (at will).description:
你对阿卡西记录执行一次灵能检索，以获取有关特定主题的信息，并将这些数据以魔法方式传输到你的通讯器或计算机中。当你施放此法术时，选择你已受训且具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 动作的任意一种技能。

在持续时间内的任意时刻，当你尝试使用所选技能进行一次回忆知识检定时，你可以查阅你的通讯器。该检定获得+1状态加值。查阅你的通讯器是回忆知识动作的一部分。你必须手持该通讯器才能这样做。通讯器会立即汇编并显示与该主题相关的各种媒体中的片段与摘录，这使你获得该加值。如果你在此次检定中掷出大失败，则改为失败。如果该检定成功且对象是生物，你会获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。你一旦查阅通讯器，此法术便结束。当此法术结束时，你对阿卡西记录的访问也会终止，而你下载的所有信息都会返回阿卡西记录。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{法术效果：阿卡西下载}

升阶（3环） 在法术结束前，你可以查阅你的通讯器三次。

You execute a psychic search of the Akashic Record for information about a specific topic and magically transfer this data to your comm unit or computer. When you Cast this Spell, choose any skill in which you're trained that has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action.

Any time during the duration, you can consult your comm unit while attempting a Recall Knowledge check using your chosen skill. This check gains a +1 status bonus. Checking your comm unit is part of the action to Recall Knowledge. You must be holding the comm unit to do so. The comm unit instantly compiles and displays snippets and selections from various media relevant to the topic, which grants you the bonus. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the check is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature. Once you reference the comm unit, the spell ends. When the spell ends, your access to the Akashic Record ends, and all the information you downloaded returns to the Akashic Record.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{Spell Effect: Akashic Download}

Heightened (3rd) You can reference your comm unit three times before the spell ends.

Akashic Eye.name: 阿卡西之眼 Akashic Eye
Akashic Eye.description:
阿卡西龙无需运用自身的记忆，而是能够从阿卡西记录中查明信息。这使其获得阿卡西记录学识技能，并可用其对任何类型进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}。

Instead of using their own memories, an Akashic dragon can ascertain information from the Akashic Records. This gives it the Akashic Record Lore skill, which it can use to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} of any kind.

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult.name: 对抗秘术时所有豁免检定获得 +2 状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult

Akashic Interference.name: 阿卡西干扰 Akashic Interference
Akashic Interference.description:
90英尺。阿卡夏巨龙附近持续不断的上传与下载漩涡，使得尝试进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}变得难以预测。除阿卡夏巨龙外的生物进入该区域或在该区域开始其回合时，必须尝试一次@Check[will|dc:38|options:area-effect]豁免。无论豁免检定结果如何，该生物都会暂时免疫这条巨龙的阿卡夏干扰，持续1分钟。

大成功 持续1轮，当该生物尝试回忆知识时，其检定获得+3状态加值。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 持续1轮，当该生物尝试回忆知识时，其检定承受–3状态减值。

大失败 如失败，但该效果持续1分钟。

90 feet. The swirl of constant uploads and downloads near the Akashic dragon make attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} unpredictable. A creature other than an akashic dragon that enters or begins its turn in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:38|options:area-effect] save. Regardless of the result of the saving throw, the creature is temporarily immune to this dragon's Akashic interference for 1 minute.

Critical Success For 1 round, when the creature attempts to Recall Knowledge, it gains a +3 status bonus to its check.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure For 1 round, when the creature attempts to Recall Knowledge, it takes a –3 status penalty to its check.

Critical Failure As failure, but the effect lasts 1 minute.

Deflecting Lasers.name: 偏转激光束 Deflecting Lasers
Deflecting Lasers.description:
触发条件 巨龙被一次攻击重击

效果 阿卡西巨龙利用嵌满全身的眼睛升起一张偏折激光之网，对触发攻击获得对所有伤害的抗性 20，并吸收部分打击的能量，为其阿卡西弹幕充能。如果阿卡西巨龙在过去 1 分钟内曾对该生物的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定成功，则其获得的抗性改为 30。

Trigger The dragon is critically hit by an attack

Effect The Akashic dragon raises a web of deflecting lasers using the eyes embedded all over their body, gaining resistance 20 to all damage against the triggering attack and absorbing some of the blow's energy, recharging their Akashic Barrage. If the Akashic dragon has succeeded at a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} check against the creature in the last minute, they gain resistance 30 instead.

Akashic Adaptability.name: 阿卡西适应性 Akashic Adaptability
Akashic Adaptability.description:
阿卡西巨龙可以像其中所含法术为神秘法术一样，激活任何传统中具有“施放法术”激活项的魔法和科技物品。

The Akashic dragon can activate magic and tech items with the Cast a Spell activation of any tradition as if the spells they contain were occult spells.

Akashic Barrage.name: 阿卡西弹幕 Akashic Barrage
Akashic Barrage.description:
巨龙将来自阿卡西记录的锋利真相与炽烈启示凝聚成灼热的激光火焰，并从其主眼中以锥形射出，袭击敌人。这会造成 @Damage[18d6[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害，作用于一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]（@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:stupefied] 豁免）。若某生物在对抗阿卡西弹幕的反射豁免中严重失败，且阿卡西巨龙在过去 1 分钟内曾成功对该生物进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定，则该生物会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续 1 轮。巨龙在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Akashic Barrage]]{1d4 轮} 内不能再次使用阿卡西弹幕。

The dragon condenses cutting truths and fiery revelations from the Akashic Record into sizzling laser fire that they project as a cone from their primary eye to assail their foes. This deals @Damage[18d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:stupefied] save). If a creature critically fails its Reflex save against Akashic Barrage and the Akashic dragon has succeeded at a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about the creature in the last minute, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round. The dragon can't use Akashic Barrage again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Akashic Barrage]]{1d4 rounds}.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
该龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打和一次尾击打。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one tail Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙族动量 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
每当该龙以一次打击造成重击时，其星忆齐射就会充能。

The dragon recharges their Akashic Barrage whenever they score a critical hit with a Strike.

Records of the Enemy.name: 敌人档案 Records of the Enemy
Records of the Enemy.description:
每次遭遇中，阿卡西巨龙第一次用其颚部打击命中并对某个生物造成伤害时，它会获得关于该生物的信息，如同它在对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定时成功了一样。

The first time each encounter the Akashic dragon hits and deals damage to a creature with their jaws Strike, they receive information about the creature as if they'd succeeded at a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about that creature.

Shocking Revelation.name: 震撼揭示 Shocking Revelation
Shocking Revelation.description:
需求 该龙在过去 1 分钟内，已成功对 90 尺内的一名敌人进行回忆知识

效果 龙说出一个关于该生物的惊人真相，甚至连它自己都可能不知道，从而使其及其盟友迟疑或行动失常。所有 90 尺内能听到这个秘密的敌人都必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:38|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed,inflicts:confused] 豁免。随后，每个生物在 24 小时内对“震撼揭示”免疫。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}，持续 1 轮。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 2}，持续 1 轮。

大失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑}，持续 1 轮。

Requirements The dragon has successfully Recalled Knowledge about an enemy within 90 feet within the last minute

Effect The dragon utters a shocking truth about the creature that even it might not know, causing it and its allies to hesitate or act erratically. Every enemy within 90 feet that can hear the secret must attempt a @Check[will|dc:38|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed,inflicts:confused] save. Each creature is then immune to Shocking Revelation for 24 hours.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round.

Akashic Record Lore.name: 阿卡西记录学识 Akashic Record Lore

Akashic Dragon (Ancient).publicNotes:
阿卡西巨龙虽然很少在它们那些堆满遗物、摇摇欲坠的巢穴之外被人遇见，但偶尔也会居住在知识的中心枢纽中，例如繁忙的太空站或城市。这些巨龙被赋予了与阿卡西记录直接相连的能力，是傲慢的知识策展者，认为（而且往往确实如此）不可能有任何其他存在比它们更深刻地理解物质宇宙的秘密。阿卡西巨龙会在阿卡西记录中度过漫长时间，常常在它们感觉已经过去了许多天之后现身，而对银河系的其余部分而言，其实仅仅过去了几个小时。

Though rarely encountered outside their crumbling, relic-filled lairs, Akashic dragons occasionally live in hubs of knowledge, such as bustling space stations or cities. These dragons, bestowed with a direct connection to the Akashic Record, are arrogant curators of knowledge, assuming (often correctly) that no other being could possibly have a deeper understanding of the universe's secrets. Akashic dragons spend extensive time in the Akashic Record, often emerging after what they perceive as many days while mere hours have passed for the rest of the galaxy.
Akashic Dragon (Ancient).allSaves: +2 status to all saves vs. occult

Bastorox.name: 巴斯托罗克斯 Bastorox

Shield Arm.name: 持盾臂 Shield Arm
Shield Arm.description:
巴斯托罗克斯的攻城臂也可用作盾牌（硬度 5、30 HP、破损阈值 15）。如果该盾牌被摧毁，巴斯托罗克斯使用其攻城臂进行打击所作的攻击检定会承受 –2 处境减值。被摧毁的盾臂会在 24 小时内重新生长出来。

A bastorox's battering arm can also be used as a shield (Hardness 5, 30 HP, BT 15). If the shield is destroyed, the bastorox takes a –2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls made with its battering arm Strikes. A destroyed shield arm regenerates over the course of 24 hours.

Motion Sense.name: 运动感知 Motion Sense
Motion Sense.description:
巴斯托罗克斯可以通过移动在空气或水中引发的振动来感知附近的生物，在所列距离内将其作为一种不精确感知。

A bastorox can sense nearby creatures through vibrations in air or water caused by movement as an imprecise sense at the listed range.

Colony Mind.name: 殖民地意识 Colony Mind
Colony Mind.description:
30尺。所有在彼此所列距离内、拥有殖群思维的盟友都处于恒常的心灵感应交流中，并且知晓任何个体所知道的所有威胁。只要处于至少一名拥有殖群思维的盟友的范围内，当一个生物在对抗精神效果的豁免检定中获得成功时，它改为获得大成功。

30 feet. All allies with colony mind within the listed range of each other are in constant telepathic communication and are aware of all threats any individual knows about. While within range of at least one ally with colony mind, when a creature rolls a success on a save against a mental effect, it gets a critical success instead.

Raise a Shield.name: 举起盾牌 Raise a Shield
Raise a Shield.description:
需求 你正持握盾牌。

你举起盾牌保护自己。当你举起盾牌时，你将盾牌所列的环境加值添加到自己的AC上。你的盾牌会一直保持举起直到你的下一回合开始。

Bioelectric Jolt.name: 生物电震击 Bioelectric Jolt
Bioelectric Jolt.description:
巴斯托罗克斯从其臂刃中释放出一道生物电能量的闪电。该闪电对@Template[type:line|distance:30]内的所有生物造成 @Damage[6d8[electricity]|options:area-damage] 伤害，并可进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:22|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免。巴斯托罗克斯在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Bioelectric Jolt]]{1d4轮} 内不能再次使用生物电震击。

The bastorox unleashes a bolt of bioelectric energy from its arm blade. The bolt deals @Damage[6d8[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:30] with a @Check[reflex|dc:22|basic|options:area-effect] save. The bastorox can't use Bioelectric Jolt again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Bioelectric Jolt]]{1d4 rounds}.

Bastorox.publicNotes:
令人畏惧的堡垒虫是生体有机壁垒，使用巨大的几丁质护盾偏转伤害，同时向敌人发射生物电流束。它们为推进中的克雷西斯卡亚殖民群组件固守阵地，例如大批敏捷的战斗虫。这些生体巨兽只是克雷西斯卡亚殖民群队列中新近出现的创新之一，并且它们曾活跃于罗德纳斯之围，在那颗世界险恶的沼泽中冷酷无情地推进。

虫群由一种被称为虫族的昆虫类物种在浩界深处演化而来，被若干文明视为现存最大的威胁。虫群由无数亚殖民群构成，而每个亚殖民群又由无数组成性的亚种构成；这是一个庞大的群体，以灵能联合的方式行动，目的是吞噬宇宙中的一切物质。最可怕的是，虫群能够同化被其吞噬者的知识与DNA。由于在大断层前就已发展出星际旅行，虫群在历史戛然而止之前就已经吞噬了数不清的星系，而在获得了信标以及被称为“漂流界”的超空间维度的使用权后，虫群扩张的步伐只会更加迅猛。

被虫群染指的世界会被抽干自然资源，变成被称为“空壳世界”的荒芜之地。外界所谓的“虫群空间”，不过是在虫群鲁莽推进中被其吞噬的一大片死寂世界。虫群对这些世界的剥夺是如此彻底，以至于勘测者甚至难以找到哪怕微量的无机资源痕迹，例如稀有矿物和水。这些空壳世界中鲜少有被彻底探索过的，因为探索往往会唤醒休眠的工蜂；理论认为，它们被留在原地，是为了防备一旦某个被吞噬的星系未来再次遭到殖民并恢复生机。远超这片区域之外的宇域中也存在虫群活动的零星据点，因为虫群早在大断层前的漫长时代里就派出了无数亚殖民群，而即便到了现在，也只有其中一部分抵达了预定目的地。

在当今时代，虫群或许最为人所知的是两件重要之事。其一，它对协约世界和维斯卡里姆的袭击，促成了这两个强权停止敌对并结成脆弱的联盟。其二，虫群正是希伦族的直接祖先。希伦人在大断层期间某个时期脱离了虫群，并在神祇海拉克斯那里获得庇护；人们相信海拉克斯是由一种前虫群时期的虫族演化而来，并背弃了虫群如今已演化成的那个贪婪实体。

近年来，虫群一直被视为不过是一个遥远的可怕传说，除了在浩界的苏斯基隆星系进行一些机密行动外，几乎没有什么活动。然而，最近失踪的塞赞迪特世界克雷西斯卡被发现，这一事件意外唤醒了一个曾负责吞噬该世界的休眠亚殖民群。自那以后，这个新近被称为“克雷西斯卡亚殖民群”的群体已成为近宇的祸患，正在积极入侵桑迪特联合体的诸世界，并蓄势蔓延至维斯卡里姆与协约世界等其他势力。这个重新现世的亚殖民群已经开始让其组成部分快速演化，并且仍与更广大的虫群主体隔绝，但它依然对近宇构成了明确威胁。

The dreaded bastoroxes are bio-organic bulwarks that use an immense chitinous shield to deflect damage while loosing bolts of bioelectricity at foes. They hold positions for advancing Krethiskar subcolony components, such as the multitudes of agile emganats. These biohulks are but one of the new innovations found within the ranks of the Krethiskar subcolony, and they were active during the siege of Rodnarth, where they implacably advanced through that world's treacherous swamps.

Developing far out in the Vast from an insectile species known as kucharns, the Swarm is considered the greatest threat in existence for several cultures. Composed of countless subcolonies, each consisting of myriad component subspecies, the Swarm is a vast host that acts in psychic union for the purpose of consuming all matter across the cosmos. Most frightening of all is the Swarm's ability to assimilate the knowledge and DNA of those they consume. Thanks to its pre-Gap development of star travel, the Swarm had already consumed innumerable systems before history short-circuited, and the Swarm's pace only accelerated once it received access to the Signal and the hyperspace dimension known as the Drift.

Worlds touched by the Swarm are drained of their natural resources and rendered barren places known as huskworlds. What outsiders consider to be "Swarm space" is little more than a swathe of lifeless worlds that the Swarm have consumed in its reckless advance. The Swarm so thoroughly strips these worlds that surveyors struggle to find even trace amounts of inorganic resources, such as rare minerals and water. Few of these huskworlds have been thoroughly explored, as oftentimes exploration awakens inert drones, theorized to have been left behind in case the devoured system was ever colonized and repopulated. Pockets of Swarm activity exist well beyond this region of space, as the Swarm sent out countless subcolonies in the ages before the Gap, and even now, only some of them have reached their intended destinations.

The Swarm is perhaps most known in the current era for two important facts. First, its assault on the Pact Worlds and the Veskarium led to the cessation of hostilities and tenuous alliance between the two powers. Second, the Swarm is the direct ancestor of the shirren species. Having broken away sometime during the Gap, shirrens found succor with the deity Hylax, who was believed to have evolved from a pre-Swarm kucharn and who turned her back on the ravenous entity the Swarm has evolved into.

In recent years, the Swarm had been seen as little more than a distant boogeyman with no activities save for classified actions in the Suskillon system in the Vast. However, the recent discovery of the missing Szandite world of Krethiskar inadvertently awoke a dormant subcolony that had been responsible for the world's consumption. Since then, the newly dubbed Krethiskar subcolony has become a scourge of Near Space, engaged in an active invasion of Szandite Collective worlds and poised to spill over into other powers like the Veskarium and Pact Worlds. This rediscovered subcolony has begun rapid evolution of its components and remains cut off from the wider Swarm, but it still represents a clear danger to Near Space.

Psychic Fungus Harvester.name: 灵能真菌收割者 Psychic Fungus Harvester
Psychic Fungus Harvester.tokenName: 灵能真菌采集者 Psychic Fungus Harvester

Mycelium Network.name: 菌丝网络 Mycelium Network
Mycelium Network.description:
灵能真菌与一张灵能丝状网络相连，该网络将同一菌落中的所有灵能真菌连接在一起。该网络使采集者能够以一种不精确感官，侦测到距离某个已连接的灵能真菌30英尺内、且最远可达1,000英尺外的具有思维能力的生物。

Psychic fungi are connected to a network of psychic filaments bonding all psychic fungi from the same colony. This network grants the harvester the ability to detect creatures capable of thought within 30 feet of a bonded psychic fungus up to 1,000 feet away as an imprecise sense.

Release Spores.name: 释放孢子 Release Spores
Release Spores.description:
触发条件 收割者的生命值降至 0

效果 收割者在其自身占据空间的一个角上释放出一团孢子云，形成一个以该点为中心、持续 1 轮的 @Template[type:burst|distance:10]。每个处于该云雾中或进入其中的生物都会暴露于致乱孢子。若此反应是由近战攻击造成的伤害所触发，则触发生物进行强韧豁免时，其结果视为比其掷骰结果低一级成功度（若该攻击是颚部打击或其他使用该生物口部进行的打击，则低两级成功度）。

Trigger The harvester is reduced to 0 Hit Points

Effect The harvester releases a cloud of spores in a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] centered on a corner of its own space that lasts for 1 round. Each creature that's in the cloud or enters it is exposed to befuddling spores. If this reaction was triggered by damage from a melee attack, the triggering creature uses the outcome one degree of success worse than the result of its roll for its Fortitude save (two degrees worse if it was a jaws Strike or other Strike with the creature's mouth).

Befuddling Spores.name: 迷惑孢子 Befuddling Spores
Befuddling Spores.description:
植物和真菌免疫

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

最长持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}（1轮）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}（1轮）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1} 且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 3}（1轮）

阶段 4 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹} 且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 4}（1轮）

Plants and fungi are immune

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} (1 round)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4} (1 round)

Sporocapture.name: 孢子捕获器 Sporocapture
Sporocapture.description:
被收割者之鞭击中的一名有智能生物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:18] 豁免。该效果持续至收割者下个回合结束，但收割者可以维持它，使鞭子在目标前额上保持不可用。一名豁免成功的生物会暂时免疫 24 小时。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物对收割者陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}。

大失败 该生物对收割者陷入着迷，并且必须在其回合中将自己的每个动作都用于尽可能迅速地向收割者移动，同时避开明显的危险。如果一名着迷的生物与收割者相邻，它会停留不动且不采取行动。如果该生物受到攻击，这种着迷即结束。

An intelligent creature hit by a harvester's lash must attempt a @Check[will|dc:18] save. The effect lasts until the end of the harvester's next turn, but the harvester can Sustain it, keeping the lash unusable on the target's forehead. A creature that succeeds at its save is temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} with the harvester.

Critical Failure The creature is fascinated with the harvester and must spend each of its actions on its turn to move closer to the harvester as expediently as possible while avoiding obvious dangers. If a fascinated creature is adjacent to the harvester, it stays still and doesn't act. If the creature is attacked, the fascination ends.

Psychic Fungus Harvester.publicNotes:
为了生长与扩散，足够稳定的灵能真菌群会派出采集者去收集养分。虽然大多数采集者带回的是腐烂的动植物遗骸，但这些真菌偏好的猎物是会思考的生物，它们会将其引回菌落，供长老们食用。

灵能真菌对每一个有感知能力的存在都是威胁，是一种通过利用有智生物心智来繁衍的入侵物种。已经整合了更高等智能的灵能真菌，可能成为一个地区甚至整颗行星的威胁。

In order to grow and spread, a sufficiently stable cluster of psychic fungi dispatches harvesters to collect nutrients. While most harvesters return with decaying animal and plant matter, the fungi's preferred prey are thinking creatures that they lead back to the colony for the elders' consumption.

A menace to every sentient being, psychic fungi are an invasive species that propagate by using the minds of sapient creatures. Psychic fungi that have integrated a higher intelligence can become a regional or even planetary threat.

Hardlight Mascot.name: 硬光吉祥物 Hardlight Mascot
Hardlight Mascot.tokenName: 全息硬光吉祥物 Hardlight Mascot

Arcade Leap.name: 街机跳跃 Arcade Leap
Arcade Leap.description:
全息硬光吉祥物可以进行一次特殊的跃起，无需检定即可垂直跳跃最多15英尺，水平跳跃最多20英尺。

The hardlight mascot can make a special Leap up to 15 feet vertically and up to 20 feet horizontally without a check.

Stomp.name: 践踏 Stomp
Stomp.description:
硬光吉祥物跳跃至一个中型或更小的生物 adjacent，然后对其进行一次踢击打击。若攻击成功，它造成踢击伤害，外加额外 1d8 力场伤害。若为重击，目标还会被击倒 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。

The hardlight mascot Leaps adjacent to a Medium or smaller creature, then makes a kick Strike against it. On a successful attack, it deals kick damage plus an additional 1d8 force damage. On a critical hit, the target is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Taunt.name: 嘲讽 Taunt
Taunt.description:
全息硬光吉祥物向60尺内的一个生物唱起一段短歌，造成 @Damage[4d6[mental]] 点精神伤害（@Check[will|dc:19|basic] 基础豁免）。

The hardlight mascot sings a jingle to a creature within 60 feet, dealing @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage (@Check[will|dc:19|basic] save).

Thermatrod Caldera.name: Thermatrod 火山口 Thermatrod Caldera

Temperature Sense.name: 温度感应 Temperature Sense
Temperature Sense.description:
热传杆火山口能够将侦测附近温度变化作为一种精准感知，用于探测生物以及其他热源。

A thermatrod caldera can detect nearby changes in temperature as a precise sense to detect living creatures and other heat sources.

Melting Aura.name: 熔融灵气 Melting Aura
Melting Aura.description:
15尺。任何在其回合开始时位于此灵光内的生物都会受到 @Damage[4d6[fire]] 伤害（进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:26|basic] 豁免）。

15 feet. A creature that begins its turn within this aura takes @Damage[4d6[fire]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:26|basic] save).

Slag Barrage.name: 矿渣弹幕 Slag Barrage
Slag Barrage.description:
热温罗德将其熔融核心的一部分喷洒成一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:15]，片刻后凝固。区域内的每个生物受到 @Damage[11d6[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:29|basic] 豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}（[[/act escape dc=29]]）。热温罗德在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Slag Barrage]]{1d4 轮} 内不能再次使用熔渣齐射。

The thermatrod sprays part of its molten core in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] that hardens moments later. Each creature in the area takes @Damage[11d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:29|basic] save). A creature that fails the save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} ([[/act escape dc=29]]). The thermatrod can't use Slag Barrage again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Slag Barrage]]{1d4 rounds}.

Thermatrod Caldera.publicNotes:
在某些电磁条件下，两根或更多热棒可能会将它们熔融的核心喷射到一个共用的岩浆室中。这些结合在一起的物质会形成一只火山口——一种强大的巨兽，甲片间流淌着星铁脉络。

热棒最初被认为是来自火元素位面的流亡者，但实际上，它们是在物质宇宙中的多个恒星系里独立演化出来的。热棒看起来像一种熔融的双足生物，不过它们常常用前方的指节行走，以支撑自己沉重的身躯。热棒拥有独特的隆起背板，外形类似六边形玄武岩柱，研究者会借此估算个体的年龄。热棒的硬化外壳会因构成其食物来源的当地矿物沉积不同而有很大差异。

Under certain electromagnetic conditions, two or more thermatrods might eject their molten cores into a shared magma chamber. The conjoined material forms a caldera, a mighty beast with starmetal veins running through its plates.

Originally thought to be exiles from the Plane of Fire, thermatrods actually developed independently in multiple star systems in the Universe. A thermatrod resembles a molten bipedal creature, though they often walk on their front knuckles to support their heavy frames. Thermatrods sport distinctive raised dorsal plates that resemble hexagonal basalt columns, which researchers use to estimate an individual's age. A thermatrod's hardened exterior varies greatly based on local mineral deposits that make up a thermatrod's diet.

Flarysca.name: 弗拉里斯卡 Flarysca

Ray of Sunshine.name: 阳光射线 Ray of Sunshine

Sun Sense.name: 日感知 Sun Sense
Sun Sense.description:
火蝎能以精确感官感知60英尺内阳光的存在。

A flarysca can sense the presence of sunlight within 60 feet as a precise sense.

Lazy Sunlight.name: 慵懒阳光 Lazy Sunlight
Lazy Sunlight.description:
15 尺。除flarysca外，进入该灵光或在其中开始其回合的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:25] 豁免。若失败，生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}；如果其已经处于笨拙状态，则其笨拙值增加 1。

如果其已经是 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2} 或更高，则改为变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}，直到它在慵懒阳光灵光外开始其回合为止。生物在慵懒阳光灵光内时不能降低其笨拙值。

若大成功，生物对慵懒阳光暂时免疫 1 小时。

15 feet. Creatures other than the flarysca that enter or begin their turn within the aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:25] save. On a failure, a creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, or increases it clumsy value by 1 if it was already clumsy.

If it was already @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} or greater, it instead becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} until it begins its turn outside the lazy sunlight aura. Creatures can't reduce their clumsy values while within the lazy sunlight aura.

On a critical success, a creature becomes temporarily immune to lazy sunlight for 1 hour.

Reactive Burst.name: 反应爆发 Reactive Burst
Reactive Burst.description:
触发条件 一个生物与一道含有沉睡中的 flarysca 的阳光光束互动，或穿过该光束

效果 flarysca 惊醒，随着其身体在阳光中重新构成，迸发出一阵火焰。触发该效果的生物以及 flarysca 30 尺内的任何其他生物，都必须成功通过一次 @Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] 豁免，否则受到 @Damage[8d6[fire]] 伤害。

Trigger A creature interacts with or moves through a sunbeam containing a sleeping flarysca

Effect The flarysca startles awake, letting out a burst of fire as their body reconstitutes within the sunlight. The triggering creature and any other creature within 30 feet of the flarysca must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save or take @Damage[8d6[fire]] damage.

Rejuvenate (Deactivated by Cold).name: 回春（寒冷会使其失效） Rejuvenate (Deactivated by Cold)
Rejuvenate (Deactivated by Cold).description:
焰丽斯卡在直射阳光下具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.lR9R5Vld8Eu2Dha5]{再生} 20（被寒冷停用）。除了会被寒冷停用外，每当焰丽斯卡进行一次攻击动作时，这项再生也会停用 1 轮。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Regeneration]

The flarysca has @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.lR9R5Vld8Eu2Dha5]{Regeneration} 20 (deactivated by cold) while in direct sunlight. In addition to being deactivated by cold, this regeneration deactivates for 1 round whenever the flarysca takes an Attack action.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Regeneration]

Creeping Warmth.name: 蔓延暖意 Creeping Warmth
Creeping Warmth.description:
频率 每分钟一次

效果 焰光斯卡迸发出明亮光芒，其慵懒阳光灵光的半径增加 5 尺，持续 1 分钟。

Frequency once per minute

Effect The flarysca shines brightly, increasing the radius of their lazy sunlight aura by 5 feet for 1 minute.

Light Jump.name: 轻跃 Light Jump
Light Jump.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 焰鳞蜥正站在直射阳光下

效果 焰鳞蜥将自己传送到其能感知到的60英尺内另一束阳光光柱或另一片直射阳光区域，效果如同translocate法术。

Frequency once per round

Requirements The flarysca is standing within direct sunlight

Effect The flarysca teleports themself to another sunbeam or area of direct sunlight they can sense within 60 feet, with the effects of the translocate spell.

Flarysca.publicNotes:
看似是在阳光中漂浮闪烁的微尘，可能其实是火烁灵分散的形态，正漂游于太空之中，处于休眠状态，却随时可能被点燃。火烁灵会在太阳光线中以空灵形态显现，舞动着前往太空最遥远的边际，在那里短暂而猛烈地爆燃一阵，随后大概便消隐而去，归于安息。

尽管看起来赏心悦目，火烁灵却是许多世界上，甚至太空中一些无法解释的死亡事件的元凶。它们的催眠灵光会诱使生物懒洋洋地蜷缩在阳光下，忽视对食物的渴求，而火烁灵则围绕这些沉睡者嬉戏。这样的状态或许很适合来一场午睡，或让一位正在寻找零食的蕈植宇航员美餐一顿，但在极少数情况下，这样的沉眠也可能致命。

元素生物是来自原初位面的活跃侵入者。它们形态各异，从风中或水中无心智的涡流，到能够驾驭原初魔法的复杂实体，不一而足。太空旅行的到来与科技的进步，让更多作为诸元素活体化身的存在得以在物质宇宙中显现。

野火、太阳风暴和洪水等自然事件，可能会在一颗行星上或某片太空区域中释放出大群桀骜不驯的元素生物。有时，一群强大的元素生物会引发史诗级规模的自然灾害，比如一次高到离谱的太阳耀斑烧毁整颗星球的电网，或一场在气态巨行星大气中盘旋不息的永恒风暴。

What seem to be glimmering motes of dust drifting in a sunbeam might be the scattered forms of flaryscas drifting across space, dormant but poised to ignite at any moment. Flaryscas materialize ethereally within a sun's rays, dancing to the farthest reaches of space where they flare up for a brief, intense period, then presumably fade away into repose.

While pleasant to look at, flaryscas are responsible for unexplained deaths occurring on many worlds, and even in space. Their soporific aura lulls creatures to curl up lazily in the sun, ignoring cravings for sustenance as flaryscas cavort around these slumberers. While perfect for an afternoon nap or a leshy cosmonaut in search of a snack, on rare occasions such a slumber might prove deadly.

Elementals are energetic intrusions from the primal planes of existence. They take many forms, from mindless eddies in the wind or water to complex entities capable of wielding primal magic. The advent of space travel and the progress of technology have allowed even more living embodiments of the elements to manifest in the Universe.

Natural events like wildfires, solar storms, and floods can unleash hordes of unruly elementals on a planet or into a region of space. Sometimes, a gathering of powerful elementals causes a natural disaster on an epic scale, like an off-the-charts solar flare that fries a planet's power grid or a ceaseless storm swirling in a gas giant's atmosphere.

Elindrian Queen.name: 艾琳卓人女王 Elindrian Queen
Elindrian Queen.tokenName: 艾琳卓人女王 Elindrian Queen

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Call Cosmos.name: 呼唤宇宙 Call Cosmos
Call Cosmos.description:
你探入虚空，召下一道由危险太空物质构成的垂直柱体，对区域内的生物倾泻毁灭，并以旋舞的星尘笼罩其周围的地形。这些物质由燃烧恒星的碎片和冻结彗星的块体组成；当你施放此法术时，它对区域内每个生物造成 5d12 点寒冷伤害和 5d12 点火焰伤害。在法术持续时间内，这些太空物质会降低可见度与机动性，使该区域成为强效困难地形，并使区域内或穿过该区域所见的一切都处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态。

升阶（10环） 寒冷伤害和火焰伤害各增加 2d12。

You reach into the void and call down a vertical column of dangerous cosmic material that rains destruction upon creatures in the area and shrouds the terrain around it in a swirl of stardust. This matter is made up of bits of burning stars and chunks of frozen comets, and it deals 5d12 cold damage and 5d12 fire damage to every creature in the area when you Cast the Spell. For the spell's duration, the cosmic material reduces visibility and mobility, making the area greater difficult terrain and making everything seen within or through the area @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Heightened (10th) The cold and fire damage each increase by 2d12.

Massacre.name: 大屠杀 Massacre
Massacre.description:
你释放死亡的波动，吸尽其路径上的生命力量。每个在线形区域上的17级或者更低的生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。如果来自大屠杀的伤害令一个生物的生命值降低到0，该生物立即死亡。如果大屠杀没有杀死任何一个生物，其奔涌的虚能会向你席卷回来，对线形区域上的每个生物造成额外@Damage[30[void]]伤害（包括17级以上的生物）并且对你造成30虚能伤害。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受9d6虚能伤害。

失败 该生物承受@Damage[(ternary(gte(@item.rank,10),115,100))[void]]伤害。

大失败 该生物死亡。

升阶（10环级） 该法术可以影响至多19级的生物。成功时的伤害增加到10d6，失败时增加到115。

Desiccate.name: 干涸凋死 Desiccate
Desiccate.description:
你将水分从目标的身体中抽出，造成10d10虚能伤害。由水组成的生物（例如水元素）以及植物生物使用其豁免骰更差一级的结果。身躯不包含明显水分的生物（例如土元素）免疫干涸凋死。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d10。

Moment of Renewal.name: 再起时刻 Moment of Renewal
Moment of Renewal.description: 目标立即经历相当于一天的回复。所有24小时后便结束的不利效果会结束，但这不会缩短任何正在影响目标的法术持续时间。该目标如同休息了24小时一般回复生命值和恢复状态，但它们不会再次进行其日常准备，或者获得除了治疗以外的其他休息的好处。这些目标会暂时免疫1天。

Singularity Seed.name: 纯一主义之种 Singularity Seed
Singularity Seed.description:
一个质量极其致密的微小粒子通过魔法绽放为一个引力奇点，将生物拉向它，并对任何被移入其中的生物进行空间压缩。你在一个未被任何生物占据的 5 尺方格内创造一个奇点。施法时，奇点周围 @Template[type:emanation|distance:50] 内的所有生物和未固定的物体都会根据其反射豁免被移向奇点（见下文）。生物和物体的移动从距离奇点最近者开始，因此它们可能会阻挡之后被拉入的其他生物和物体的路径。

生物的空间可以在包含奇点的方格内重叠。进入奇点或在其内结束其回合的生物或物体会受到 10d10 点钝击伤害，且没有豁免。处于奇点内时，生物不能采取任何动作，除了尝试对抗你的法术 DC 进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{脱身}。当该法术结束时，奇点消失，重叠的生物会由 GM 判定并移动到最近的未占据空间。

对于远离奇点移动的生物而言，散发区域内的方格属于困难地形；而朝向奇点移动的生物，每花费 5 尺移动距离可以移动 10 尺。

如果一个生物在施法时位于区域内，以及当它在区域内结束其回合时，都需要进行一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物被拖拽 10 尺，朝向奇点。

失败 该生物被拖拽 20 尺，朝向奇点。

大失败 该生物被拖拽 30 尺，朝向奇点。

A tiny particle of incredibly dense mass magically blossoms into a gravitational singularity that pulls creatures toward it and spatially compresses any creatures that are moved into it. You create a singularity in a 5-foot square that is unoccupied by any creatures. All creatures and unsecured objects in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:50] around the singularity are moved toward the singularity when the spell is cast, depending on their Reflex save (see below). Creatures and objects are moved starting with those closest to the singularity, so they might block the path of other creatures and objects that are pulled in later.

Creatures' spaces can overlap in the square that contains the singularity. A creature or object that enters the singularity or ends its turn there takes 10d10 bludgeoning damage with no saving throw. While in the singularity, a creature can take no actions except to attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} against your Spell DC. When the spell ends, the singularity disappears, and overlapping creatures are moved to the closest unoccupied space, as determined by the GM.

Squares in the emanation are difficult terrain for creatures moving away from the singularity, and creatures moving toward the singularity can move 10 feet for each 5 feet of movement they spend.

A creature needs to attempt a Reflex save if it's in the area when the spell is cast and when it ends its turn in the area.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is pulled 10 feet toward the singularity.

Failure The creature is pulled 20 feet toward the singularity.

Critical Failure The creature is pulled 30 feet toward the singularity.

Execute (at will).name: 执行（任意） Execute (at will)
Execute (at will).description:
你将你的手指指向目标生物，并祈求万物的终结。目标承受70点虚能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。如果目标是不死生物，或者具有虚能治疗能力，该法术失去死亡和虚能特征，获得命能特征，并且目标改为承受70点命能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加10。

Resurrect (elindrians only; up to 10 eli.name: 复生（仅限艾琳卓人；若其在过去 1 小时内死亡，则一次施法最多可复活 10 名艾琳卓人，且施法时间仅为 10 分钟） Resurrect (elindrians only; up to 10 elindrians with one casting and a cast time of only 10 minutes if they perished within the last hour)
Resurrect (elindrians only; up to 10 eli.description:
你尝试呼唤目标的灵魂，使其返回自己的身体。这需要目标的身体位于仪式现场并且遗体相对完整（relatively intact）。目标必须是在过去的一年内死亡的。若 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{法莱斯玛 Pharasma} 认为目标大限已至，或者目标不愿返回到现世的话，该仪式自动失败，但你会在成功的宗教检定后了解到这一点，而且在仪式结束后无需支付开销。

大成功 目标被复活了。她复活时的生命值全满，保留死亡时已经准备的法术以及各种能量池剩余的点数，但原有身体所承受的任何长期性的衰弱（long-term debilitations）仍然折磨着它。目标在复生的过程中会见到自身所信仰神祇的代理人，代理人会激励目标，使其在攻击检定、察觉、豁免检定、和技能检定中获得+1状态加值，持续1星期。目标在彼世所经历的这段时间以某种方式永久地改变了她，这可能是轻微的人格变化、一缕白发或者一个奇怪的新胎记。

成功 同大成功，不过目标复活时生命值为1点，已经准备的法术以及各种能量池均被清空，但原有身体所承受的任何长期性的衰弱（long-term debilitations）仍然折磨着它。取代受到代理人的激励，该角色在彼世的时光使其暂时变得虚弱不堪。目标承受 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 1}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 1}和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1} ，持续1星期；直至这个星期经过为止，这些状态无法被任何手段移除或减弱。

失败 你的尝试未能成功。

大失败 某种可怖的错误发生了——邪恶的灵魂占据了尸身、尸体被转化为特殊种类的不死生物、或者某种糟糕的命运降临到了目标头上。

升阶（6环级） 你能复活至多为12级的目标，仪式基础开销变为125gp。

升阶（7环级） 即便尸体仅剩下一小部分也可以用于复活目标；成功或大成功的仪式会创造出新的身体。目标必须是在过去的十年内死亡的。仪式需要四名次要施法者，每名次要施法者的等级都必须至少达到目标等级的一半。你能复活至多为14级的目标，仪式基础开销变为200gp。

升阶（8环级） 同7环级仪式，但你能复活至多为16级的目标，仪式基础开销变为300gp。

升阶（9环级） 即便没有尸体你也能复活目标，但前提是你了解目标的名字，并且在此之前的任意时刻曾经碰触过她的身体。目标必须是在过去的百年内死亡的，而且仪式结果为成功时不会赋予目标负面状态。仪式需要八名次要施法者，每名次要施法者的等级都必须至少达到目标等级的一半。你能复活至多为18级的目标，仪式基础开销变为600gp。

升阶（10环级） 同9环级仪式，不过目标的死亡时长已经不再重要。仪式需要十六名次要施法者，每名次要施法者的等级都必须至少达到目标等级的一半。你能复活至多为20级的目标，仪式基础开销变为1000gp。

Husk Mind.name: 空壳心智 Husk Mind
Husk Mind.description:
艾琳卓人能够通过一种类似于弗米蚁族蜂巢思维的原始纽带，几乎瞬间彼此交流。只要位于至少另一名拥有空壳心智的艾琳卓人的心灵感应范围内，艾琳卓侍僧在先攻检定、察觉检定，以及对抗精神效果的豁免上获得 +2 处境加值。若一名艾琳卓人察觉到某个战斗参与者，则范围内空壳心智的所有成员都会察觉到它。

艾琳卓人的空壳心智与其气味整合在一起；在侦测其他艾琳卓人、弗米蚁族、不死生物或尸体时，他们的嗅觉是精准感官，而非不精确感官。

只要与乌库兰的恐噩位于同一存在位面，艾琳卓人总是知晓它的精确距离与方向。

Elindrians can communicate nearly instantaneously via a primal bond similar to a formian hive mind. While within telepathic range of at least one other elindrian with husk mind, an elindrian acolyte gains a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls, Perception checks, and saving throws against mental effects. If one elindrian is aware of a combatant, all members of the husk mind within range are aware of it.

The elindrian's husk mind is integrated with their scent; for purposes of detecting other elindrians, formians, undead, or corpses, their scent is a precise sense, rather than imprecise.

An elindrian always knows the precise distance and direction to the Terror of Ukulam, so long as they're on the same plane of existence.

Vision of Elindrae.name: 艾琳卓的幻景 Vision of Elindrae
Vision of Elindrae.description:
艾琳卓女王以艾琳卓卫星上环境破坏的幻象袭击生物。她以其心灵感应范围内且与她之间具有作用线的任意数量生物为目标。目标生物受到 @Damage[3d6[mental],1d6[persistent,mental]] 伤害（@Check[will|dc:40|basic] 豁免），若失败则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}，若重度失败则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 4}。若重度成功，生物将在24小时内暂时免疫“艾琳卓幻视”。

The elindrian queen assails creatures with visions of environmental destruction on the moon Elindrae. She targets as many creatures as she wishes within range of her telepathy and to whom she has a line of effect. The creatures take @Damage[3d6[mental],1d6[persistent,mental]] damage (@Check[will|dc:40|basic] save) and are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a failure (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4} on a critical failure). On a critical success, creatures are temporarily immune to Vision of Elindrae for 24 hours.

Elindrian Queen.publicNotes:
尽管没有人证实过艾琳卓人女王的存在，但艾琳卓人与弗米蚁族之间仅有的几分相似，还是让学者们相信她们必然存在。事实上，这些令人生畏的母系统治者，正是推动艾琳卓人与乌库兰的恐噩联合起来的主要力量。

被称为艾琳卓人的族群，早在无数个纪元之前便消失在卡斯卓韦星球地表之下荒芜的空壳巢穴中。直到最近，他们都还只是传说中的生物，仅存在于最晦涩难懂的弗米蚁族历史记载里。如今，卡斯卓韦上的学者们正拼命寻找更多关于艾琳卓人、他们的起源，以及——最重要的是——他们与那只最近从其卫星艾琳卓降下的、骇人的类软泥生物之间联系真相的更多记录。有一种理论认为，艾琳卓人与那团被称为乌库兰的恐噩的软泥之物之间共享某种原始纽带，也许二者都起源于艾琳卓——另一些理论则声称，艾琳卓人最初创造了这团软泥，或者说他们是弗米蚁族的远亲，只是在很久以前被恐噩腐化了。

While no one has confirmed the existence of elindrian queens, the elindrians' few similarities to formians have led scholars to believe they must exist. Indeed, these formidable matriarchs are the primary force driving elindrians to unite with the Terror of Ukulam.

The people known as elindrians vanished eons ago into desolate husk-hives beneath the surface of the planet Castrovel. Until recently, they were creatures of legend, existing only in the most obscure formian histories. Now, scholars on Castrovel desperately search for additional records about elindrians, their origins, and—most importantly—the truth about their connection to the terrifying ooze-like creature that recently descended from their moon, Elindrae. One theory is that elindrians share some primal bond with the ooze-thing called the Terror of Ukulam, and perhaps both originate from Elindrae—other theories claim that elindrians created the ooze in the first place or that they're distant cousins to formians, corrupted by the Terror long ago.

Cerebinite.name: 脑晶虫 Cerebinite

Blast of Cerebinium Shards.name: 脑晶碎片冲击波 Blast of Cerebinium Shards
Blast of Cerebinium Shards.description:
受到精神伤害的生物在严重失败时还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1} 1轮

Creatures that take mental damage are also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round on a critical failure

Crystalline Ambush.name: 水晶伏击 Crystalline Ambush
Crystalline Ambush.description:
触发条件 一个非无心智生物进入与脑晶兽相邻的一个空间

需求 尚未进行先攻检定

效果 脑晶兽自动注意到该生物，对一个与自身相邻的生物进行一次水晶增生打击，然后进行先攻检定。

Trigger A non-mindless creature enters a space adjacent to a cerebinite

Requirements Initiative hasn't yet been rolled

Effect The cerebinite automatically notices the creature, makes a crystalline growth Strike against one creature adjacent to itself, then rolls initiative.

Mind-Shattering Demise.name: 心灵破碎终结 Mind-Shattering Demise
Mind-Shattering Demise.description:
当脑晶体死亡时，它会爆炸，释放出由其水晶身躯中储存的记忆驱动的冲击波，影响 @Template[emanation|distance:30] 内的所有生物。区域内的每个生物（包括其他脑晶体）都必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:22|options:area-effect,inflicts:stunned] 豁免，否则受到 @Damage[2d8[mental]|options:area-damage] 伤害并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}（若重度失败，则伤害加倍并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}）。

When the cerebinite dies, it explodes in a blast fueled by the memories stored in its crystalline body, affecting all creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:30]. Each creature in the area (including other cerebinites) must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:22|options:area-effect,inflicts:stunned] save or take @Damage[2d8[mental]|options:area-damage] damage and become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} (or double damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} on a critical failure).

Cerebinite.publicNotes:
矿物脑晶，也被称为记忆水晶，会自然出现在被称为卡兹穆格的荒诞星域的破碎太空区域中。通常，这些矿物形成于偏远的地下地点，其生长取决于行星范围内思维心智的存在。一个地区中活跃的心智越多，这些矿物构造的生长速度就越快。拥有数百万居民的大型世界很容易形成巨大的地下储藏，而在这些宏伟的洞窟中，会自发出现脑晶怪。

脑晶怪本质上是没有心智的生物——为其提供驱动力的记忆除外——它们是脑晶生长所衍生出的分支。尽管自身不具备智力，它们会依据构成其形体的晶体中所储存记忆提供的冲动而行动。在很多方面，脑晶怪就像遍布宇宙、潜伏等待的许多软泥怪一样。

遭遇这些活跃的矿物沉积时，往往需要谨慎应对，因为脑晶怪既能近身作战，也能在短距离内掷出脑晶尖刺与带有周遭抽取记忆力量的脑晶碎片爆发进行攻击。即使在死亡时，这些脑晶团块也会爆发出一阵具有破坏性的心灵能量，令附近者的心智受到影响，见到无数不同人生的混乱幻象。当多个受伤的脑晶怪彼此聚集时，这种接近会因脑晶怪自身易受精神攻击影响而引发尤其具破坏性的连锁反应。

The mineral cerebinium, also known as memory crystal, naturally appears in the broken region of space known as Kazmurg's Absurdity. Typically, these minerals develop in remote subterranean locations, where they grow based on the presence of thinking minds within a planetary range. The more active minds in a region, the faster these mineral formations grow. A major world of millions can easily create vast underground stores, and in these majestic caverns, cerebinites spontaneously emerge.

Cerebinites are essentially mindless creatures—save for the memories that power them—who have developed as an offshoot of cerebinium growth. Though possessing no intellect of their own, they act off the impulses provided by the memories stored within the crystals that constitute their forms. In many ways, a cerebinite is like the many oozes that lie in wait throughout the cosmos.

Encountering these active mineral deposits often requires a delicate approach, as cerebinites can engage up close or at a short range by hurling cerebinium spikes and blasts of cerebinium shards charged with memories drawn from their surroundings. Even in death, these masses of cerebinium explode in a destructive burst of psychic energy, affecting the minds of those nearby with jumbled visions of countless different lives. When multiple injured cerebinites gather near one another, this proximity can cause an especially destructive chain reaction due to cerebinites' own susceptibility to mental attacks.

Xenowarden Biohulk.name: 异生守望者生体巨械 Xenowarden Biohulk
Xenowarden Biohulk.tokenName: 异种守护者生物巨躯 Xenowarden Biohulk

进阶 Hammer.name: 进阶 Hammer
进阶 Hammer.description:
升级： 1

这把锤子既是珍贵的制作工具，也是高效的武器；它采用经过特殊配重的锤头和锤柄，使每次击打都能释放出最大力量。

Upgrades: 1

Valued as both a crafting tool and an effective weapon, this hammer uses specially weighted heads and handles to deliver maximum force with each strike.

Grenade Launcher (Tactical).name: 榴弹发射器（战术型） Grenade Launcher (Tactical)
Grenade Launcher (Tactical).description:
升级 1

激活 2 区域射击

这种自动后膛装填发射器的旋转弹巢可容纳最多六枚配备智能装填技术的任意类型手雷，使其持用者每次射击时都能选择不同的手雷。手雷发射器是一种军用远程武器，装填值为 2，射程为 350 英尺。

Upgrades 1

Activate 2 Area Fire

The rotating barrel of this automatic breechloading launcher holds up to six grenades of any variety with smart loading technology, allowing its wielder to choose a different grenade each time they fire. A grenade launcher is a martial ranged weapon, has a reload of 2, and a range 350 feet.

Frag Grenade (Advanced).name: 破片手雷（先进型） Frag Grenade (Advanced)
Frag Grenade (Advanced).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 @Damage[1d6[bleed]]

这些破片手雷会爆炸成一团弹片云，在一个 @Template[burst|distance:10] 内造成 3d8 穿刺伤害，并可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d6[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 3d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Lattice Armor.name: 格栅甲 Lattice Armor
Lattice Armor.description: 在惊世奇土的某些地方也被称为“瓦尔曼（varman）”，这种护甲由金属细索编织成格状图案，并配有板甲部分，用于保护头部、颈部和肩部。这种护甲能像链甲环一样分散打击，但结构更紧密，因此更安静。

Grenade Launcher (Frag Grenade).name: 榴弹发射器（破片手榴弹） Grenade Launcher (Frag Grenade)

Battering Charge.name: 猛击冲锋 Battering Charge
Battering Charge.description:
异种守望者生化巨躯进行三次Stride，然后进行一次近战Strike；若命中，则额外造成 @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。若此次Strike的目标是物体或构装体，则此次Strike无视 5 点硬度。

The Xenowarden biohulk Strides three times, then makes a melee Strike, dealing an additional @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] damage on a hit. If the target of this Strike is an object or construct, this Strike ignores 5 Hardness.

Destructive Power.name: 毁灭力量 Destructive Power
Destructive Power.description:
每当异种守卫生体巨兽进行一次本会造成钝击伤害的近战打击时，该次打击获得拆毁特征。

Whenever a Xenowarden biohulk makes a melee Strike that would deal bludgeoning damage, that Strike gains the razing trait.

Nature's Fury.name: 自然之怒 Nature's Fury
Nature's Fury.description:
异种守卫生物巨像发出愤怒的咆哮，令植物从地面萌发，阻碍生物巨像的敌人。生物巨像周围30英尺内的生物会受到狂乱植物造成的 @Damage[6d8[slashing]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic] 豁免），且该区域变为困难地形，持续10分钟。异种守卫生物巨像无视由“自然之怒”制造的困难地形。然后，异种守卫生物巨像可以对区域内的每个生物尝试一次威吓检定以进行[[/act demoralize]]。

The Xenowarden biohulk bellows with rage, causing plants to sprout from the ground and hinder the biohulk's enemies. Creatures within 30 feet of the biohulk take @Damage[6d8[slashing]] damage from the thrashing plants (@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic] save), and the area becomes difficult terrain for 10 minutes. The Xenowarden biohulk ignores difficult terrain created by Nature's Fury. Then, the Xenowarden biohulk can attempt an Intimidation check to [[/act demoralize]] each creature in the area.

Xenowarden Lore.name: 异域守护者学识 Xenowarden Lore

Xenowarden Biohulk.publicNotes:
生体巨怪是忠于异星卫士的成员，他们有意将自己的身体与植物及其他草木融合，以获得惊人的力量。这种转化通常通过生物工程、魔法或基因实验来完成，而且无法逆转。无论采用何种方法，生体巨怪都拥有难以置信的力量，能够轻松击垮大多数人造屏障。异星卫士中的生体巨怪通常都是极端分子，完全而狂热地投身于异星卫士的事业。

异星卫士是一个强大且备受尊敬的组织，致力于保护和研究自然世界，并确保技术进步在生态上是负责任的。其成员构成极为多样，麾下既有修习自然魔法、摒弃科技的隐士，也有利用藻类创造可再生能源的科学家。处于光谱另一端的，则有像荒野骑士和绿卫士这样的菁英战斗部队，以及像神秘的夹竹桃那样令人畏惧的生态恐怖分子。异星卫士由一位绿议长领导，此人通过拥戴选出，并由同僚提供建议。

Biohulks are devoted Xenowardens who purposefully fused their body with plants and other flora to gain formidable strength. This transformation is usually accomplished using biotech, magic, or genetic experimentation, and can't be reversed. Regardless of their method, biohulks are incredibly strong and capable of battering down most artificial barriers with ease. Xenowarden biohulks are usually extremists, entirely and passionately devoted to the Xenowardens' cause.

The Xenowardens are a powerful and well-respected organization who aim to safeguard and study the natural world and ensure that technological advances are ecologically responsible. With an incredibly diverse membership, their ranks include, among others, hermits who practice nature magic and eschew technology and scientists who create renewable energy from algae. On the other end of the spectrum are elite combat units like the Wildknights and the Greenguards and feared ecoterrorists like the enigmatic Oleander. The Xenowardens are led by a Greenspeaker, who's elected by acclaim and advised by their peers.

Vanguard-Class Soldier Robot.name: 先锋职业士兵机器人 Vanguard-Class Soldier Robot
Vanguard-Class Soldier Robot.tokenName: 先锋级士兵机器人 Vanguard-Class Soldier Robot

Integrated Advanced Painglaive.name: 集成式先进痛薙刀 Integrated Advanced Painglaive
Integrated Advanced Painglaive.description:
升级： 1

这把凶悍却有着迷惑性优雅的长柄武器以电机驱动的獠刃撕裂敌人。可调节的脉冲扳机允许持用者通过这件武器传导额外的痛楚。

Upgrades: 1

This fierce but deceptively elegant polearm rips apart enemies with a motor-powered fangblade. An adjustable pulse trigger allows the wielder to channel extra pain through the weapon.

Integrated Advanced Seeker Rifle.name: 集成式先进寻迹步枪 Integrated Advanced Seeker Rifle
Integrated Advanced Seeker Rifle.description:
升级： 1

这把单发狙击步枪凭借其稳定性和可靠性，并且几乎无需维护，成为浩界中最受欢迎的武器之一。

Upgrades: 1

This single-shot sniper rifle is one of the most popular weapons in the Vast thanks to its stability and reliability with minimal upkeep.

Assault Jump.name: 突击跳跃 Assault Jump
Assault Jump.description:
这台先锋职业士兵机器人跃向其视野内60英尺内的一个空间。机器人落地处5英尺内的所有生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[reflex|dc:33] 豁免，否则将被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。然后，机器人对一个位于其触及范围内的生物进行一次痛刃戟打击。机器人在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Assault Jump]]{1d4轮} 内不能再次使用突击跳跃。

The vanguard-class soldier robot Leaps to a space it can see within 60 feet. All creatures within 5 feet of where the robot lands must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:33] save or be knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. The robot then makes a painglaive Strike against one creature within reach. The robot can't use Assault Jump again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Assault Jump]]{1d4 rounds}.

Linked Senses (60 feet).name: 感官链接（60尺） Linked Senses (60 feet)
Linked Senses (60 feet).description:
该先锋级士兵机器人与60英尺内其他友方先锋级士兵机器人共享感官。

The vanguard-class soldier robot shares senses with other allied vanguard-class soldier robots within 60 feet.

Seeker Warhead.name: 追猎者弹头 Seeker Warhead
Seeker Warhead.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 先锋职业士兵机器人向其视线所及、200英尺内的一个交叉点发射一枚等离子弹头。所有位于@Template[type:burst|distance:15]内的生物受到 @Damage[8d12[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害（进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:33|basic] 基础豁免）。若失败，该生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋} 状态，持续1分钟。弹头爆炸的区域变为困难地形。

Frequency once per day

Effect The vanguard-class soldier robot fires a plasma warhead at an intersection within 200 feet it can see. All creatures in a @Template[type:burst|distance:15] take @Damage[8d12[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic] save). On a failure, a creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 minute. The area in which the warhead exploded becomes difficult terrain.

X-Ray Vision (60 feet).name: X射线视觉（60尺） X-Ray Vision (60 feet)
X-Ray Vision (60 feet).description:
这台先锋职业士兵机器人能够看穿60英尺内的大多数材料和墙壁。它的视线会被2英尺厚的木材或塑料、1英尺厚的石材、2英寸厚的金属，或任意厚度的铅或星铁阻挡，而且它只能以黑白方式视物。

The vanguard-class soldier robot can see through most materials and walls within 60 feet. Its sight is blocked by 2 feet of wood or plastic, 1 foot of stone, 2 inches of metal, or any amount of lead or starmetal, and it can see only in black and white.

Vanguard-Class Soldier Robot.publicNotes:
先锋级士兵机器人是庞大的战争机器。它们通常有四只带爪的手、趾行的腿、一条长尾巴，以及一个毫无特征的菱形头部。背部安装的等离子发射器和短时爆发的跳跃喷射器，再加上一流的武器装备，使它们呈现出一种佝偻而掠食性的外观。每台高8英尺，重700磅。

尽管它们醒目的形象吸引了媒体关注，先锋级士兵机器人仍然过于昂贵，无法以军队规模进行量产，因此它们被用作特种部队、先锋、保镖，甚至是全机器人部队的战地指挥官。诚然，对于任何身处搜寻者弹头射程内的人来说，缺乏大规模实用性算不上什么安慰。

活着的士兵是一种负担。他们有不希望他们死去的家人，需要薪水，有士气，需要纪律约束，会犯下暴行，而且还会对战争持有看法。对于任何不真心热爱死灵术的社群来说，他们都是战争中必要却令人遗憾的一部分。

最尖端的士兵机器人承诺能解决这个问题。士兵机器人没有挚爱之人、没有观点、没有自我保护本能，也没有随机施暴的倾向。许多公司将他们的士兵机器人宣传为现代战争中的人道解决方案。

但实际上，它们绝非如此。

由于没有生命置于险境，士兵机器人反而鼓励其拥有者更频繁、也更暴烈地投入冲突。对峙会变成小规模冲突，小规模冲突会升级为战斗，而无辜者也不可避免地被卷入其中。它们尤其受合作和非政府组织欢迎，因为这些实体很欣赏这样一种能力：可以把十几台士兵机器人扔向任何他们不喜欢的唱反调者、公众批评者或探险者，同时又能否认真正为所发生的一切承担责任。

尽管公众一直担心士兵机器人失控，但这至今尚未被证明是一个严重问题。如果一台士兵机器人想让你死，那是因为有人并不介意它杀了你。

Vanguard-class soldier robots are hulking machines of battle. They often have four clawed hands, digitigrade legs, a long tail, and a featureless, diamond-shaped head. Their back-mounted plasma launcher and burst-duration jump jets give them a hunched, predatory appearance, augmented by top-of-the-line weapons. Each is 8 feet tall and weighs 700 pounds.

Though their striking image has captured media attention, the vanguard-class soldier robot is too expensive to mass-produce on the scale of an army, and so they are used as special forces, vanguards, bodyguards, and even field commanders for all-robotic forces. A lack of large-scale feasibility is, admittedly, poor comfort to any soul within seeker warhead range.

Living soldiers are a liability. They have families who don't want them to die, need salaries, have morale, require discipline, commit atrocities, and have opinions on the war. They're a necessary, but unfortunate, part of warfare for any society without an abiding love for necromancy.

Cutting-edge soldier robots promise to solve this problem. Soldier robots have no loved ones, opinions, self-preservation instinct, or tendency toward random atrocities. Many companies market their soldier robots as a humane solution to modern combat.

In practice, they're anything but.

Without lives on the line, soldier robots encourage their owners to engage more often and more violently. Standoffs turn into skirmishes, skirmishes into battles, and inevitably the innocent are caught up in the mix. They're particularly popular with corporations and non-governmental organizations that appreciate being able to throw a dozen soldier robots at any naysayer, public critic, or explorer they dislike while being able to deny true responsibility for what happens.

Though there's constant public fear of soldier robots going rogue, it has yet to prove a serious concern. If a soldier robot wants you dead, it's because someone doesn't mind if it kills you.

Dust Worm.name: 尘虫 Dust Worm

Electrocommunication.name: 电通信 Electrocommunication
Electrocommunication.description:
尘虫通过塑造和读取电磁场进行交流。这对拥有相同能力的生物而言，作用方式如同心灵感应。

Dust worms communicate by shaping and reading electromagnetic fields. This functions like telepathy with creatures that share this ability.

Electromagnetic Sight.name: 电磁视觉 Electromagnetic Sight
Electromagnetic Sight.description:
沙尘蠕虫通过读取电磁场来感知周围环境，包括由生物或物体造成的扰动。这是在所列范围内的一种精确感官。强烈的电磁场，例如正在发出辐射的区域或带有电流灵光的区域，会使其中的生物对流散带蠕虫而言处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态。

Dust worms sense their surroundings by reading electromagnetic fields, including disruptions caused by creatures or objects. This is a precise sense within the listed range. Intense fields, such as areas emitting radiation or auras of electricity, make creatures within them @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to the diaspora worm.

Electromagnetic Blindness.name: 电磁致盲 Electromagnetic Blindness
Electromagnetic Blindness.description:
受到电击伤害的尘虫必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:23] 豁免。

大成功 该虫不受影响。

成功 该虫陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1轮。

失败 该虫陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 1轮。

大失败 该虫先失明1轮，随后目眩1轮。

Dust worms that take electricity damage must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save.

Critical Success The worm is unaffected.

Success The worm is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The worm is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The worm is blinded for 1 round, then dazzled for 1 round.

Sandstorm Veil.name: 沙暴帷幕 Sandstorm Veil
Sandstorm Veil.description:
需求 沙尘蠕虫处于沙地或遍布垃圾的环境中

效果 沙尘蠕虫利用其磁场卷起一层旋转的沙粒与金属碎片帷幕，环绕自身形成 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10]。这层帷幕会随着蠕虫一同移动，并持续 [[/gmr 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 轮}。该帷幕使蠕虫获得对物理伤害的抗性 6，且任何在该区域内结束其回合的生物都会受到 @Damage[2d6[slashing]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic] 豁免）。

Requirements The dust worm is in a sandy or junk-ridden environment

Effect The dust worm uses its magnetic field to kick up a swirling shroud of sand and metallic bits in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] around itself. This shroud moves with the worm and lasts for [[/gmr 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 rounds}. The shroud grants the worm resistance 6 to physical damage, and any creature that ends its turn within the area takes @Damage[2d6[slashing]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic] save).

Tongue Grab.name: 舌头攫取 Tongue Grab
Tongue Grab.description:
被沙尘蠕虫舌头击中的生物会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{抓住}状态。生物可以对 AC 21 发动一次打击，且至少造成 @Damage[14[slashing]] 伤害，以切断这条舌头。这会使蠕虫无法使用其舌头打击，直到它的舌头重新长出，这需要 1 天。

A creature hit by the dust worm's tongue becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}. A creature can sever the tongue with a Strike against AC 21 that deals at least @Damage[14[slashing]] damage. This prevents the worm from using its tongue Strike until it regrows its tongue, which takes 1 day.

Tongue Reel.name: 卷舌器 Tongue Reel
Tongue Reel.description:
需求 沙尘蠕虫已用它的舌头使一个生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱} 状态

效果 流散带蠕虫尝试对被擒抱的生物执行 [[/act reposition]]，将其朝蠕虫拉近。如果被擒抱的生物被带到距离蠕虫 10 尺或更近处，蠕虫可以尝试将该生物整吞。

Requirements The dust worm has @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} a creature with its tongue

Effect The diaspora worm attempts to [[/act reposition]] the grabbed creature toward the worm. If the grabbed creature is brought to within 10 feet or less of the worm, the worm can attempt to Swallow Whole the creature.

Dust Worm.publicNotes:
流散带蠕虫发生了变异，以便能在多沙或贫瘠的小行星表面活动；因此，尘蠕虫以灵活性换取了更庞大的体型，并且能够抵抗辐射。它们对电磁力的操控会影响少量含铁物质，使它们能够用念动力挥舞沙粒和细小的金属碎片，将其作为武器或披覆。

“太空蠕虫”是一个非科学术语，用来指称一类异种生物学上复杂的无脊椎动物与野兽，它们以广袤的太空为家。其中一些，如流散带蠕虫和尘蠕虫，表现出智慧的迹象，且彼此有直接的亲缘关系。另一些，如苏尔诺克，则是各自独立演化而来，其起源对科学而言完全未知。

Diaspora worms mutated to navigate sandy or barren asteroid surfaces, and as a result, dust worms trade agility for bulk and can resist radiation. Their electromagnetic manipulation affects small bits of ferrous material, allowing them to telekinetically wield sand and small metallic shards as weapons or cloaks.

"Space worm" is a nonscientific term for a xenobiologically complex clade of invertebrate animals and beasts that make their home in the vastness of space. Some, like the diaspora and dust worms, show signs of intelligence and are directly related to each other. Others, like the surnoch, evolved separately, with their origins completely unknown to science.

Ferrofluid Ooze.name: 铁磁流体软泥怪 Ferrofluid Ooze
Ferrofluid Ooze.tokenName: 铁磁流体软泥怪 Ferrofluid Ooze

Magnetic Sense.name: 磁感应 senses Magnetic Sense
Magnetic Sense.description:
铁磁流体软泥怪能够感知磁场，使其可以侦测到列出范围内的大型磁性金属源（1体积或更高）以及具有科技特征的物品。

A ferrofluid ooze can feel magnetic fields, allowing it to detect large sources of magnetic metal (Bulk 1 or greater) and items with the tech trait within the listed range.

Magnetic Field.name: 磁场领域 Magnetic Field
Magnetic Field.description:
30尺。铁磁流体软泥怪被一个恒定力场包围，会干扰附近的设备。位于该灵气内、具有科技特征的物品在使用它们进行的所有检定中受到 –1 情境减值。灵气内体积为1 Bulk或以下的无人持有金属物体会被拖拽至与该软泥怪相邻的位置。

30 feet. A ferrofluid ooze is surrounded by a constant field that interferes with nearby equipment. Items with the tech trait inside the aura take a –1 circumstance penalty to all checks using them. Unattended metal objects in the aura of 1 Bulk or less are pulled adjacent to the ooze.

Attach.name: 附着 Attach
Attach.description:
铁磁流体软泥怪可以将自己附着在任何与其体型相同或更大、具有科技（特征）特征的生物，或穿戴、持用具有科技（特征）特征物品的生物身上。这类似于擒抱，但软泥怪会随该生物一起移动，而不是将其固定在原地。

只要软泥怪处于附着状态，它便处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，而它所附着的生物在与具有科技（特征）特征的物品进行交互时，必须成功通过一次 @Check[flat|dc:11]。若失败，该物品会附着到软泥怪身上（视为由软泥怪持有）。

A ferrofluid ooze can attach itself to any creature its size or larger that has the tech trait or is wearing or wielding items with the tech trait. This is similar to Grab, but the ooze moves with that creature rather than holding it in place.

As long as the ooze is attached, it's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}, and the creature it's attached to must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:11] to Interact with items with the tech trait. On a failure, the item becomes attached to the ooze (treat as if being held by the ooze).

Demagnetization.name: 退磁 Demagnetization
Demagnetization.description:
受到火焰伤害的铁磁流体软泥怪，其磁场会被关闭，直到该软泥怪下个回合结束为止。它会从任何其所附着的生物身上脱离，掉落任何持有的物品，并且在其磁场恢复之前，无法使用磁力跃迁或附着。

A ferrofluid ooze that takes fire damage has its magnetic field deactivated until the end of the ooze's next turn. It releases itself from any creature it was attached to, drops any held items, and can't use Magnetic Leap or Attach until its magnetic field returns.

Magnetic Leap.name: 磁力跃迁 Magnetic Leap
Magnetic Leap.description:
铁磁流体软泥怪会立即黏附到其磁场范围内、满足该能力要求的一个生物身上。铁磁流体软泥怪在[[/gmr 1d4 #充能 Magnetic Leap]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用此能力。

The ferrofluid ooze instantly Attaches to a creature within its magnetic field that meets the requirements of that ability. A ferrofluid ooze can't use this ability again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Magnetic Leap]]{1d4 rounds}.

Ferrofluid Ooze.publicNotes:
自太空旅行最早的时代起，工程师们就一直使用铁磁流体来协助星舰的建造、运行和维护。只是在时间问题上，过于热心的施法者迟早会摆弄这种物质，并在无意间赋予其些许生命，从而创造出另一种为宇宙带来祸害的软泥怪异种。这些奇特的软泥怪拥有磁力，并本能地渴望寻找电磁源。铁磁流体软泥怪被视为银河中的害虫，协约世界各地的许多船坞已经开始雇用专业的“软泥管控”人员，以确保这些流体不会妨碍他们的日常运作。

常见的铁磁流体软泥怪看起来像一滩带有尖刺的黑色金属液体，以波动的方式变换形态，但总会对附近的磁源作出反应。它们大多藏身于星舰和空间站最黑暗的角落。

多种类型的软泥怪潜伏在银河各处黑暗而废弃的地方，只有在满足食欲并威胁冒险者、探索者以及倒霉工人时才会现身。

Since the earliest days of space travel, engineers have used ferromagnetic fluids to help with the construction, operation and maintenance of starships. It was only a matter of time before overeager spellcasters tinkered with this substance and inadvertently imbued a modicum of life into it, creating yet another strain of ooze to plague the cosmos. These strange oozes exert magnetic powers and have an instinctive desire to seek out sources of electromagnetism. Ferrofluid oozes are considered galactic nuisances, and many shipyards across the Pact Worlds have begun retaining the services of expert "ooze control" agents to ensure these fluids don't impede their day-to-day operations.

A common ferrofluid ooze appears as a spiked pool of dark metal liquid that shifts in erratic ways but always reacts to nearby magnetic sources. They're mostly found hiding in the darkest corners of starships and space stations.

Oozes of many types lurk in dark and abandoned places across the galaxy, emerging only to satiate their appetites and threaten adventurers, explorers, and hapless workers alike.

Host Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).name: 宿主龙（远古，施法者） Host Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster)
Host Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).tokenName: 宿主龙（上古，施法者） Host Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster)

Primal Prepared Spells.name: 原初预备法术 Primal Prepared Spells

Energy Aegis.name: 辟能圣盾 Energy Aegis
Energy Aegis.description:
你使用长效的强力能量护盾保护目标。目标获得对酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、音波、命能、以及虚能伤害的抗力5。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.4Lo2qb5PmavSsLNk]{法术效果：辟能圣盾}

升阶（9环级） 该抗力提升到10。

Regenerate.name: 再生术 Regenerate
Regenerate.description:
灌注的命能赋予一个生物持续的治疗。目标临时获得再生15，这令其在每个它的回合开始时回复15生命值。当它具有再生时，目标不会由于对生命值造成的伤害死亡，并且其 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死 Dying} 值不会增长到会杀死它的程度（多数生物的濒死值会在濒死3停止），但如果其 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{受伤 Wounded} 值到达4或者更高，它会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识 Unconscious} 直到受伤被治愈。如果目标承受酸蚀或者火焰伤害，其再生失效，直到其下个回合结束。

每当该生物从再生中获得生命值时，他也会再生一个受损或者被破坏的器官（如果有）。在法术持续时间中，该生物可以花费一个交互动作，将被切下的肢体接合到它被切下前的位置，将其重新接上。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.dXq7z633ve4E0nlX]{法术效果：再生术}

升阶（9环级） 该再生增加到20。

Root of all Pain.name: 万痛之根 Root of all Pain
Root of all Pain.description:
你的手指将一条微小的根须推进目标体内，它开始生长，在神经系统中钻行，并以其侵入性蔓延所引发的剧痛触发的电信号为食。目标必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 每轮中，目标第一次执行任何并非纯粹精神性的动作时，都会受到 2d8 点精神伤害，例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}（或其他由 GM 判定的动作）。

失败 同成功，但目标受到 4d8 点精神伤害，且在法术持续时间内处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1} 状态。

大失败 同成功，但目标受到 6d8 点精神伤害，且在法术持续时间内处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 2} 状态。

Your finger pushes a tiny root into the target's body that begins to grow, burrowing through the nervous system as it feeds off the electric signals triggered by the agonizing pain of its intrusive spread. The target attempts a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes 2d8 mental damage the first time each round it performs any action other than an action that is purely mental, such as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} (or other actions as determined by the GM).

Failure As success, except the target takes 4d8 mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for the duration of the spell.

Critical Failure As success, except the target takes 6d8 mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for the duration of the spell.

Field of Life.name: 生命力场 Field of Life
Field of Life.description:
命能形成的场充满该区域，为其中的生物赋予温暖和活力。每个在该区域中开始回合的活物回复1d8生命值，并且任何在该区域中开始回合的不死生物承受1d8命能伤害。

升阶（8环级） 该治疗与伤害提升到1d10。

升阶（9环级） 该治疗与伤害提升到1d12。

Carcinization.name: 癌化 Carcinization
Carcinization.description:
你操纵目标的遗传密码并加速那不可避免的结局，迫使目标经历癌化并变成一只螃蟹。自愿的目标会完全变形成一只螃蟹，如同其施放了升阶至与此法术相同环阶的animal form，并使用以下数据。

  • 螃蟹

    • 速度25尺，游泳15尺
    • 近战 1 大螯，伤害 2d8 穿刺
    • 近战 1 螯（灵巧），伤害 2d4 穿刺。
    • 可以在空气和水中呼吸。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.16Li37zRYKClxqsv]{法术效果：癌化}

不自愿的目标则必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的身体长出少量螃蟹特征，它的附肢变成螯，使其变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

失败 目标变形成一个部分螃蟹化的存在，变为笨拙 1、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 目标被变形成一个部分螃蟹化的存在，并变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

You manipulate the target's genetic code and accelerate the inevitable, pressuring the target to undergo carcinization and become a crab. A willing target fully transforms into a crab, as if it had cast animal form heightened to the same rank as this spell and using the following statistics.

  • Crab

    • Speed 25 feet, swim 15 feet
    • Melee 1 big claw, Damage 2d8 piercing
    • Melee 1 claw (agile), Damage 2d4 piercing.
    • Can breathe air and water.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.16Li37zRYKClxqsv]{Spell Effect: Carcinization}

Unwilling targets must instead attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's body gains minor features of a crab, its appendages turning into claws and causing it to become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}.

Failure The target transforms into a partial crab-like being, becoming clumsy 1, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The target is transformed into a partial crab-like being and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Toxic Cloud.name: 毒云术 Toxic Cloud
Toxic Cloud.description:
你创造一团有毒云雾。该效果如同@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{迷雾术 Mist}一般，除了该区域会每轮远离你10尺。在该区域中开始回合的生物承受6d8毒素伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d8。

Wall of Stone.name: 石墙术 Wall of Stone
Wall of Stone.description:
你塑造一面岩石墙壁。你创造一个至多120尺长，20尺高1寸厚的石墙。你可以塑形石墙的路径，将墙壁的每5尺放在方格之间的边界上。该墙壁无需竖直，所以举例而言，你可以用其塑造一座桥，或者一组阶梯。你必须将该墙创造在连续的开放空间中，令其边界不会穿过任何生物或者物体，否则你会失去该法术。

每一段10尺乘10尺的墙壁具有AC10，硬度14，以及50生命值，并且它免疫重击，寒冷伤害，以及精准伤害。一段被摧毁的墙壁可以移动通过，但是因此留下的碎石会令其变成困难地形。

升阶（+2） 每一段墙的生命值增加15。

Unfettered Movement.name: 行动无碍 Unfettered Movement
Unfettered Movement.description:
你驱散可能影响一个生物的阻碍。当处于该法术效果中时，法术目标忽视会赋予其速度环境减值的效果。当法术目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}一个令其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，它自动成功，除非该效果是魔法性的，并且其环级比行动无碍更高。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement}

Earthbind.name: 地缚术 Earthbind
Earthbind.description:
你使用大地的重量以干扰目标的飞行能力，其效果基于强韧豁免。如果该生物安全到达地面，它不会承受坠落伤害。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标安全坠落至多120尺。

失败 目标安全坠落至多120尺。如果它碰到地面，它1轮内不能飞行，浮空或者以其他方式离开地面。

大失败 目标安全坠落至多120尺。如果它碰到地面，它1分钟内不能飞行，浮空或者以其他方式离开地面。

Life Seal.name: 生命封印 Life Seal
Life Seal.description:
触发条件 范围内的一个生物进入了一个会对其造成伤害的环境。

一个闪烁的气泡包裹住目标的身体，使其能够在真空或其他不安全环境中正常呼吸，并保护其免受严酷温度和辐射的伤害。

强化（7环） 你可以额外指定至多5个目标，使其获得针对触发该法术的生物所进入环境的保护。该法术持续8小时，并且还能防护极端温度和辐射。

强化（10环） 你可以额外指定至多10个目标，使其获得针对触发该法术的生物所进入环境的保护。该法术持续至你的下一次每日准备，并且还能防护难以置信的温度和辐射。

Trigger A creature within range enters an environment that would be harmful to it.

A shimmering bubble envelops the target's body, allowing it to breathe normally in a vacuum or other unsafe environment and protecting it from severe temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 5 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts for 8 hours and also protects against extreme temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (10th) You can target up to 10 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts until your next daily preparations and also protects against incredible temperatures and radiation.

Wall of Wind.name: 风墙术 Wall of Wind
Wall of Wind.description:
你创造一层会干扰所有通过事物的暴风墙。这面由旋风组成的墙有5尺厚，60尺长，30尺高。该墙为竖直的，但你可以指定其形态。虽然风墙会搅动空气，但不会阻碍视觉。该墙壁具有下列效果。

  • 来自物理远程攻击的弹药（例如箭，矢，投石索弹丸，以及其他类似大小的物体）无法穿过该墙。更大的远程武器的攻击，例如标枪，如果其路线通过该墙壁，则其在攻击骰上承受-2环境减值。重型远程武器和不创造实体物体的法术效果可以不受减值地通过该墙。
  • 该墙对尝试从地面通过它的生物为困难地形。气体，以及处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V8wXOsoejQhe6CyG]{Vapor Form}的生物，无法穿过墙壁。
  • 尝试使用移动动作飞过墙壁的生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物本回合可以正常移动穿过该墙。

成功 该飞行生物本回合可以正常移动穿过该墙，但是该墙为困难地形。

失败 该墙阻挡飞行生物的移动，并且当前动作的剩余移动力被浪费。

大失败 如同失败，并且该生物会被推离该墙10尺。

Entangling Flora.name: 纠缠植被 Entangling Flora
Entangling Flora.description:
植物与菌类无法抑制地快速成长，缠绕生物。区域内的所有表面均为困难地形。对于每轮内在该区域内开始自身回合的生物，必须尝试1次反射豁免。失败时，其速度承受-10尺环境减值，直至离开该区域为止，大失败时，它还会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}1轮。生物能够尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱 Escape}来移除这些效果。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.rjM25qfw5BKj9h97]{法术效果：纠缠植被}

Environmental Endurance.name: 忍受环境 Environmental Endurance
Environmental Endurance.description:
你保护目标对抗危险气温。选择严寒或炎热。目标不受你选择的气温的影响，但这对极寒和极热无效。

升阶（3环级） 目标受到保护，免遭严寒或炎热影响。

升阶（5环级） 目标受到保护，免遭严寒、炎热、极寒和极热影响。

Speak with Animals.name: 动物交谈 Speak with Animals
Speak with Animals.description: 你能向动物提问、得到动物的回答、以及对动物使用交涉技能。该法术不会让动物们变得比平时更加友善。狡猾动物的沟通表现得简短且模棱两可，而缺乏智能的动物通常会发表无意义的意见。

Water Breathing.name: 水中呼吸 Water Breathing
Water Breathing.description:
目标可以在水中呼吸。

升阶（3环级） 该持续时间增加到8小时。

升阶（4环级） 该持续时间增加到直到你的下次日常准备。

Ant Haul.name: 重负术 Ant Haul
Ant Haul.description:
你增强了目标的骨骼和肌肉系统，以承受更大的重量。目标可以比通常达到@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{Encumbered}额外携带3负载，最大不超过6负载。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.5yCL7InrJDHpaQjz]{Spell Effect: Ant Haul}

Caustic Blast.name: 酸液喷溅 Caustic Blast
Caustic Blast.description:
你发射一团立即爆发的酸液，泼溅到周围生物上。区域中的生物承受1d8酸蚀伤害，这有一次基础反射豁免；在大失败时，该生物也会承受@Damage[(1+floor((@item.rank -1)/2))[persistent,acid]]伤害。

升阶（+2） 该初始伤害增加1d8，并且持续伤害增加1。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Detect Poison.name: 侦测毒素 Detect Poison
Detect Poison.description:
你可以侦测一个生物是否分泌毒素或者具有毒素，或者一件物体是否是毒素或者已经被下毒。你无法判断目标是否有多种毒素，也无法了解毒素的种类。特定的物质，例如铅或者酒精，是毒素，并会遮盖其他毒素。

升阶（2环级） 你会得知毒素的数量和类型。

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你将恐惧植入目标；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}.

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}.

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 3} 并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing} 1轮.

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Seek the Stars.name: 追寻群星 Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
在你的心眼中，你描绘出一条穿越宇宙的路径。如果你位于协约世界的空间内，你会立刻知道应朝哪个方向旅行，才能抵达艾巴萨罗姆空间站上的星石。如果你在协约星系之外，你会知道通往最近的漂流信标或星石的方向。

升阶（7环） 你也可以改为知晓通往一个熟悉地点的方向，例如你曾造访过的世界或中途站。

In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Stumble.name: 蹒跚 Stumble
Stumble.description:
一阵微重力爆发在目标周围引发震颤，将其拉向地面。目标必须进行一次反射豁免。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，持续1轮。如果目标原本正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，它会向下坠落10尺。

严重失败 目标倒地 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{伏倒}。如果目标原本正在飞行、游泳或漂浮，它会向下坠落20尺。

强化（+1） 如果目标坠落，则在失败时额外坠落5尺，在严重失败时额外坠落10尺。

A burst of microgravity causes a tremor around the target, pulling it toward the ground. The target must attempt a Reflex save.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 10 feet downward.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 20 feet downward.

Heightened (+1) If the target falls, it falls an additional 5 feet on a failure and 10 feet on a critical failure.

Tangle Vine.name: 绊足藤 Tangle Vine
Tangle Vine.description:
一条藤蔓凭空出现，从你手上弹射而出并捆绑在目标身上。尝试一次法术攻击检定对抗目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：绊足藤}

大成功 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}状态，并且其速度承受-10尺环境减值，持续1轮。它能尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱 Escape}对抗你的法术DC，来以此移除减值和禁足状态。

成功 目标速度承受-10尺环境减值，持续1轮。它能尝试逃脱对抗你的法术DC来移除减值。

失败 目标不受影响。

升阶（2环级） 效果持续2轮。

升阶（4环级） 效果持续1分钟。

Covered in Bugs.name: 虫群覆盖 Covered in Bugs
Covered in Bugs.description:
触发 该龙对一次豁免检定大失败

效果 成群的昆虫干扰该效果，牺牲自身来保护宿主体魄与心智。该龙进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:17]。若成功，该龙此次豁免检定改为失败，而非大失败。

Trigger The dragon critically fails a saving throw

Effect Swarming insects interfere with the effect, sacrificing themselves to protect their host's body and mind. The dragon attempts a @Check[flat|dc:17]. On a success, the dragon fails the saving throw instead of critically failing.

+2 status to all saves vs. mental.name: 对抗精神效果的所有豁免获得 +2 状态加值 +2 status to all saves vs. mental

Excruciating Bites.name: 折磨啃咬 Excruciating Bites
Excruciating Bites.description:
被宿主龙的颚部打击造成伤害，或被该龙吞下的生物，也会被数百只微小昆虫叮咬；该生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:34] 豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2} 1轮。

A creature that takes damage from a host dragon's jaws Strike or is swallowed by the dragon is also bitten by hundreds of tiny insects; the creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:34] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 round.

Fast Swallow.name: 快速吞咽 Fast Swallow
Fast Swallow.description:
触发 该龙擒抱一个生物

效果 该龙施放吞噬。

Trigger The dragon Grabs a creature

Effect The dragon uses Swallow Whole.

One with Swarms.name: 与虫群合一 One with Swarms
One with Swarms.description:
宿主龙免疫任何由虫群或类似生物发起的攻击（由GM酌情决定）。

The host dragon is immune to any attack made by a swarm of insects or similar creature (at the GM's discretion).

Swallow Whole.name: 活吞 Swallow Whole
Swallow Whole.description:
大型，@Damage[(3d10+7)[bludgeoning]] 外加剧痛啃咬，破裂 26

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Large, @Damage[(3d10+7)[bludgeoning]] plus excruciating bites, Rupture 26

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Swarm Breath.name: 虫群吐息 Swarm Breath
Swarm Breath.description:
巨龙喷吐出一群噬咬性的昆虫，在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:50]内造成 @Damage[12d8[piercing],2d6[persistent,piercing]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:37|basic] 豁免）。它们在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Swarm Breath]]{1d4轮} 内不能再次使用虫群吐息。

The dragon disgorges a swarm of biting insects that deals @Damage[12d8[piercing],2d6[persistent,piercing]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] (@Check[reflex|dc:37|basic] save). They can't use Swarm Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Swarm Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Swarm Shape.name: 虫群形态 Swarm Shape
Swarm Shape.description:
这条龙变形为一团虫群。他们会掉落所有手持、穿戴和携带的物品。处于此形态时，他们不能使用攻击动作（虫群啃咬和虫群吐息除外），也不能施放法术，但他们可以穿过足以容纳其个体昆虫通过的狭小区域，而无需进行挤压。他们可以使用同一个动作重新聚合，恢复成正常形态。

The dragon transforms into an insect swarm. They drop all held, worn, and carried items. While in this form, they can't use attack actions (except Swarming Bites and Swarm Breath) and can't cast spells, but they can move through areas small enough for their individual insects to fit without having to Squeeze. They can use the same action to coalesce back into their normal form.

Swarming Bites.name: 蜂群噬咬 Swarming Bites
Swarming Bites.description:
需求 该龙是一个虫群

效果 虫群空间内的每个敌人受到 @Damage[12d6[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:37|basic] 豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}，持续 1 轮。

Requirements The dragon is a swarm
