Effect Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[12d6[piercing]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:37|basic] save). A creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round.

Host Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).publicNotes:
无数昆虫跟随着这些步履蹒跚、贪婪饕餮的巨龙，无论它们游荡到哪里，都会在它们周围盘旋成群，并栖居在宿主巨龙身体上无数的孔洞之中。这头巨龙既是虫群本身的一部分，也是虫群生态系统的一部分——虫群以它们的身体为食，而巨龙又以虫群为食，在这种怪诞而持续数百年的循环中，不知为何，宿主巨龙即使终其一生不摄取任何其他物质，也会变得更庞大、更强大。宿主巨龙的力量源自昆虫的原始本能，而且尽管它们具有智慧，行为却常常像它们聚集而来的昆虫一样。宿主巨龙厌恶回答问题，并会以暴烈的方式抗拒他人试图理解其本性的所有尝试。

Innumerable insects follow these lumbering, ravenous dragons wherever they roam, swarming around them and living in the countless orifices along the host dragon's body. The dragon is both a part of the swarm itself and a part of the swarm's ecosystem—the swarm feeds on their body, and the dragon feeds on the swarm in a grotesque, centuries-long cycle that somehow results in the host dragon growing larger and more powerful even if they feed on no other substance in their lifetime. Host dragons draw their power from the primal instincts of insects and, despite their intelligence, often behave like the insects they gather to them. Host dragons despise answering questions and violently defy all attempts others make to understand their nature.

Free Captain Gunner.name: 自由船长炮手 Free Captain Gunner
Free Captain Gunner.tokenName: 自由船长炮手 Free Captain Gunner

Carbon Shield.name: 碳素盾 Carbon Shield
Carbon Shield.description:
这种耐用却轻便的防护板有多种形状和尺寸，而且常常会加装 LED 显示屏，用来展示个人徽记或某个组织的颜色与标志。

This durable yet lightweight defensive plate comes in a variety of shapes and sizes, and it's often customized with LED displays that broadcast personal insignia or an organization's colors and symbols.

Freebooter Armor.name: 掠夺者护甲 Freebooter Armor
Freebooter Armor.description:
升级： 1

掠夺者护甲因常穿着这类装备的海盗和亡命之徒而得名。掠夺者护甲通常由穿在夹克或飞行服内侧的胸甲、厚重的靴子和手套、头盔，以及用于隐藏武器的暗藏系带和枪套组成。

Upgrades: 1

Freebooter armor is named for the pirates and outlaws who often wear these outfits. Freebooter armor typically consists of a breastplate worn under a jacket or flight suit, heavy boots and gloves, a helmet, and hidden straps and holsters for concealing weapons.

Four-Armed.name: 四臂 Four-Armed
Four-Armed.description:
你有四只手臂，这使你能够持用和持握总计最多相当于四只手所能持用的武器和装备。任何时候，其中一对手都会被指定为你的活跃手。你可以通过执行 Switch Hands 动作，将这一指定从一对手改为另一对手；这是一个单动作。你只能用你的活跃手持用物品。

You have four arms, which allows you to wield and hold up to four hands' worth of weapons and equipment. At any time, one pair of hands is designated as your active hands. You can change this designation from one pair of hands to another by taking the Switch Hands action, which is a single action. You can wield items only with your active hands.

Raise a Shield.name: 举起盾牌 Raise a Shield
Raise a Shield.description:
需求 你正持握盾牌。

你举起盾牌保护自己。当你举起盾牌时，你将盾牌所列的环境加值添加到自己的AC上。你的盾牌会一直保持举起直到你的下一回合开始。

Shield Block.name: 盾牌格挡 Shield Block
Shield Block.description:
@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ShieldBlock] 除了@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ShieldBlock]的通常用法外，自由船长炮手还可以使用@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ShieldBlock]来防止来自区域攻击的伤害，并且还可以防止本应由与其相邻的盟友承受、而非由其自身承受的伤害。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ShieldBlock] In addition to the normal use of Shield Block, a Free Captain gunner can use Shield Block to prevent damage from an area attack and also prevent damage that would be dealt to an adjacent ally instead of themself.

Fire in the Hole!.name: 洞里有火！ Fire in the Hole!
Fire in the Hole!.description:
一种特殊弹药使破障炮获得区域（@Template[type:cone|distance:15]）和笨重特征，直到炮手回合结束。炮手使用区域射击进行一次攻击（@Check[reflex|dc:19|basic] 豁免），该攻击会消耗3枚弹丸。受影响区域内未能通过此次攻击豁免的敌人会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{压制}，直到炮手下个回合开始。

A special payload gives the breaching gun the area (@Template[type:cone|distance:15]) and unwieldy traits until the end of the gunner's turn. The gunner makes an attack using Area Fire (@Check[reflex|dc:19|basic] save) that uses 3 projectiles. Enemies in the affected area who fail their save against the attack become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of the gunner's next turn.

Raid Ready.name: 突袭就绪 Raid Ready
Raid Ready.description:
自由船长炮手切换持手，然后以任意顺序举盾或重新装填。

The Free Captain gunner Switches Hands, then Raises a Shield or Reloads, in any order.

Shiver Your Timbers.name: 希芙你的木料 Shiver Your Timbers
Shiver Your Timbers.description:
被炮手的破拆炮造成伤害的生物，在炮手的下个回合开始前，无法降低其恐慌状态。

A creature damaged by the gunner's breaching gun can't reduce its frightened condition until the gunner's next turn.

Free Captain Gunner.publicNotes:
以炮火爆发为突击先锋，炮手在登舰小队中的职责是通过压制舰船防御来掀起溃逃，同时保护自己的船员同伴。

自由船长数代以来一直是协约世界星际航运的祸害，但自从采用漂流航道以来，这些亡命之徒借助新的标准化星际航运路线，将目标扩展到整个银河的船只，从而扩大了他们的活动范围和规模。

Leading the assault with an explosion of cannon fire, the gunner's role in a boarding party is to incite a rout while protecting their fellow crew by suppressing a ship's defenses.

The Free Captains have been a scourge of interstellar shipping across the Pact Worlds for generations, but since the adoption of Drift Lanes, the outlaws have expanded their reach and scale by targeting ships across the galaxy using the new standardized interstellar shipping routes.

Garaggakal.name: 加拉格卡尔 Garaggakal

Emotion Sense.name: 情绪感知 Emotion Sense
Emotion Sense.description:
加拉格卡尔能在所列距离内，将所有处于情绪效应之下的生物感知为一种不精确感官。

The garaggakal senses all creatures that are under emotion effects as an imprecise sense at the listed range.

Sense Through.name: 感知穿透 Sense Through
Sense Through.description:
加拉加卡尔的不精确感官可穿透大多数材料和墙壁发挥作用。能量场（例如力场和力效应）以及足够致密的材料会阻挡这些感官：10英尺厚的木材或塑料、5英尺厚的石材、1英尺厚的普通金属，或6英寸厚的铅或任何星铁。

The garaggakal's imprecise senses function through most materials and walls. The senses are blocked by energy fields (such as force fields and force effects) and sufficiently dense material: 10 feet of wood or plastic, 5 feet of stone, 1 foot of common metal, or 6 inches of lead or any starmetal.

Draining Saliva.name: 汲取唾液 Draining Saliva
Draining Saliva.description:
受到 garaggakal 的唾液打击造成伤害的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:20] 豁免。若失败，则其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{汲取 1}（若严重失败，则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{汲取 2}）。

A creature that takes damage from a garaggakal's spit Strike must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:20] save. On a failure, it's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} on a critical failure).

Leech Life.name: 吸取生命 Leech Life
Leech Life.description:
需求 Garaggakal 30尺内的一名活体生物具有汲取状态

效果 Garaggakal 强化对所需生物本质生命力的汲取，造成 @Damage[5d6[void]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:20|basic] 豁免）。Garaggakal 获得等于所造成伤害一半的临时生命值，持续1分钟。无论豁免结果如何，Garaggakal 随后朝所需生物方向飞行至多15尺，并且所需生物在24小时内暂时免疫于 Leech Life。

Requirements A living creature within 30 feet of the garaggakal has the drained condition

Effect The garaggakal amplifies the drain on the required creature's essential life force, dealing @Damage[5d6[void]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:20|basic] save). The garaggakal gains temporary Hit Points equal to half the damage dealt that last 1 minute. Regardless of the result of the save, the garaggakal then Flies up to 15 feet closer to the required creature, and the required creature becomes temporarily immune to Leech Life for 24 hours.

Phase Through.name: 穿越相位 Phase Through
Phase Through.description:
加拉加卡尔可以移出相位、脱离现实，因此无法被墙壁或牢笼困住。加拉加卡尔可穿过至多15英尺的固体物质。它们必须在其回合结束时位于固体物质之外，否则受到 @Damage[5d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。加拉加卡尔无法穿过力场效应。

A garaggakal can shift out of phase with reality and thus can't be held by walls or cages. The garaggakal moves through up to 15 feet of solid matter. They must end their turn outside of the solid matter or take @Damage[5d6[bludgeoning]] damage. A garaggakal can't phase through force effects.

Garaggakal.publicNotes:
大多数garaggakal身高约8英尺，体重400磅，翼展20英尺。它们总是在不停移动，可能会在一艘破损的星舰或一块漂浮的地形碎块上找到临时巢穴，但很快又会再次离开，去寻找下一只成为自己下一餐的新生物。虽然在物质宇宙中很少会遇到garaggakal，但这种情况确实可能发生，尤其是在它们的临时巢穴出口位于漂流域时。

漂流域是个奇异之地，而原生于此的生物则更加怪异。Garaggakal也不例外。它们的外形大致像类人生物，有手臂和腿，但同时还长着蜡黄而富有弹性的皮肤、细长的鳞尾，以及如薄纱般的翅膀。最可怖的是，它们的脸几乎完全被那张巨大的漏斗状嘴占据，嘴里布满锋利的牙齿。除了用于显而易见的撕咬之外，它们还能利用这张嘴强大的吸力，从猎物体内吸取真正的生命力。

Garaggakal也被称为“漂流域幽灵”，会猎杀任何在漂流域中停留太久的活物。对garaggakal而言，任何不是同类garaggakal的东西都是猎物。不过，它们并非只是毫无心智的猎手。Garaggakal聪明得出人意料，且更喜欢肢解受害者，在吃掉他们之前尽可能了解其一切。Garaggakal常常会在受害者还活着的时候就将其拆解。异种生物学家已经确定，严格来说，garaggakal甚至并不需要进食来维持生存，因此它们那种无休止的饥饿似乎是心理层面的。然而，在没有食物时，它们的确需要漂流域的能量来存活；此外，它们繁殖也需要漂流域的能量，因此会寻找强辐射区域进行吸收，然后用自身细胞构筑出新的后代。它们的子嗣在被创造出来时就已完全成熟。

Garaggakal会出其不意地袭击猎物。它们极其擅长潜行，甚至能够穿过固体物质，在星舰内部骤然现身——这对碰巧待在里面的任何活物来说都是坏消息。江湖骗子会向旅行者兜售驱赶garaggakal的装置，声称可供他们在漂流域中使用，以防止这种造访。

Most garaggakals are around 8 feet tall, weighing 400 pounds, with a 20-foot wingspan. Always on the move, they might find a temporary lair on a broken starship or floating chunk of terrain but are soon off again, in search of a new creature to be their next meal. While one rarely encounters garaggakals in the Universe, it can happen, particularly if their temporary lair exits in the Drift.

The Drift is a strange place, and the creatures native to it are stranger still. Garaggakals prove no exception. Shaped vaguely like humanoids, they have arms and legs but also sallow, rubbery skin with long, scaly tails and gauzelike wings. Most horrifyingly, their faces are almost entirely taken up by their enormous, funnel-like mouth, lined with sharp teeth. While they use these mouths for the obvious purpose of biting, they can also use its powerful suction to draw actual life force from their prey.

Also known as "Drift wraiths," garaggakals hunt down any living creatures that linger too long in the Drift. For garaggakals, anything that isn't a fellow garaggakal is prey. However, they're no mere mindless hunters. Garaggakals are surprisingly intelligent and prefer to dissect victims, learning all about them before eating them. Often, garaggakals take their victims apart while they're still alive. Xenobiologists have determined that garaggakals don't even technically need to eat to survive, so their relentless hunger is seemingly psychological. They do require the energy of the Drift to survive in the absence of food, however, and further need the energy of the Drift to reproduce, seeking out areas of intense radiation to absorb and then build a new offspring from their own cells. Their children are fully grown at creation.

Garaggakals surprise their prey. They are quite stealthy and can even phase through solid matter, suddenly appearing on the inside of a starship—bad news for whatever living creatures happen to be inside. Con artists sell garaggakal repelling devices for travelers to use while in the Drift to prevent such visits.

Biotech Superior War Machine.name: 生物工程卓越战争机器 Biotech Superior War Machine
Biotech Superior War Machine.tokenName: 生物工程 卓越战斗机器 Biotech Superior War Machine

Interstellar Comms.name: 星际通讯 Interstellar Comms
Interstellar Comms.description:
远程战争机器与其驾驶员维持着恒定的数据链接；对于任何未列出的技能，它使用驾驶员所知的语言以及驾驶员的技能调整值。此外，驾驶员还可以通过该数据链接，借助远程战争机器作为发声媒介来讲话。

A remote war machine maintains a constant data link with its pilot, using its pilot's languages and skill modifiers for any unlisted skill. In addition, the pilot can speak through the data link using the remote war machine as a mouthpiece.

Corpse Flower.name: 尸花 Corpse Flower
Corpse Flower.description:
触发条件 战争机器将被降至 0 生命值

效果 战争机器自毁，对 @Template[emanation|distance:60]{60 英尺半径} 内的所有生物造成 @Damage[12d6[electricity]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:30|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免）。在此能力使用后的 1 分钟内，任何接触战争机器残骸的生物都会暴露于极度辐射病之中。

Trigger The war machine would be reduced to 0 Hit Points

Effect The war machine self-destructs, dealing @Damage[12d6[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:30|basic|options:area-effect] save) to all creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:60]{60-foot radius}. For 1 minute after this ability is used, any creature that touches the war machine's remains is exposed to incredible radiation sickness.

Thermal Shadow.name: 热影 Thermal Shadow
Thermal Shadow.description:
10英尺。战争机器收集并反射热能以掩盖其存在。任何从灵光外侧以战争机器为目标的生物，除非其具有嗅觉或非视觉型感官，否则都将其视为处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态。

10 feet. The war machine collects and reflects thermal energy to mask its presence. Any creatures targeting the war machine from outside the aura treats it as if it were @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} unless they possess scent or a non-visual–based sense.

Tentacle Flurry.name: 触须连袭 Tentacle Flurry
Tentacle Flurry.description:
战争机器对触及范围内至多四个生物进行一次触手打击，对所有目标只进行一次攻击检定和一次伤害掷骰。

The war machine makes a tentacle Strike against up to four creatures in reach, rolling the attack and damage roll only once for all targets.

Thoughtlance.name: 意念长枪 Thoughtlance
Thoughtlance.description:
被这台战争机器的一条触手碰到的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:30|options:inflicts:slowed] 豁免，失败则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}（重度失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 2}）。每当一个受影响的生物结束其回合时，其迟缓值减少 1。

A creature touched by one of the war machine's tentacles must attempt a @Check[will|dc:30|options:inflicts:slowed] save, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} on a failure (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} on a critical failure). Each time an affected creature ends its turn, its slowed valued decreases by 1.

Biotech Superior War Machine.publicNotes:
这台代号为“atlapak”的机器人战争机器由以卡洛-马霍伊为基础进行设计的工程师所研发，专为水下作战而建造。就像它两栖的创造者一样，atlapak在陆地上同样运用自如。代号“ksarik”的个体最早是在一次骇人的袭击中被观测到的；那场袭击针对的是由乌尔丽卡氏族控股公司运营、位于星散带的一处采矿前哨。展开战斗形态时，ksarik会化作一团布满尖刺的触手与刺目的红色传感器，能在数分钟内撕碎整排士兵。

这场入侵始于阿巴隆上的新械族探测到的一系列侦察行动。带着炽亮传感器与可动触手的诡异机器凭空现身，似乎毫无规律地撕裂基础设施，并在协约世界的各处太空收集情报。恐慌迅速蔓延，但由于这些机器总是消失得无影无踪，或在被捕获时自爆，相关目击始终无法得到证实或辨明其身份。流言开始传播，说这些机器是一种前所未见的生物工程造物。很快，理事军正式介入，以最高安全许可那道坚不可摧的隔离墙将这些事件彻底封锁起来。

在ag 325年的萨伦尼斯月，数十次军事行动都未能与这些行踪飘忽的侦察机交战后，一支由伊达里号派出的战斗机联队终于撞上了好运，在其中一台机器自毁前将其瘫痪。协约世界的顶尖科学家诱使它吐露了部分秘密，这艘生物工程载具也因此成为如今正在测试、拟投入实战的“本土培育”遥控战争机器原型。复制品并非活体，而是采用机器人制造模板建成，因为原始生物工程设计的核心过于复杂，无法用协约世界的技术逆向解析。

遥控战争机器是一种可在极远距离外操控的代理体。原始的生物工程战争机器通过灵能链接或某种未知的无线电频率与驾驶员的心智相连。机器人遥控战争机器则通过数据链路连接至计算机，使驾驶员能够用键盘、虚拟现实设备，甚至电子游戏控制器来操纵自己的代理体。

Devised by engineers based on Kalo-Mahoi, the robotic war machine, code name "atlapak," was built for aquatic warfare. Just like its amphibious creators, the atlapak is equally proficient on land. Code name "ksarik" was first observed in a terrifying attack on a Diasporan mining outpost operated by Ulrikka Clanholdings. When unfurled for battle, the ksarik becomes a mass of spiked tentacles and glaring red sensors that can tear through platoons of troopers in minutes.

The incursion began with a series of probes detected by anacites on Aballon. Strange machines with blazing sensors and articulated tentacles appeared out of nowhere, ripping through infrastructure seemingly at random and collecting intelligence all around Pact Worlds space. Panic spread fast, but since the machines always vanished without a trace, or exploded when captured, the sightings couldn't be confirmed or identified. Rumors began to circulate that the machines were a form of biotech never encountered before. Soon the Stewards became formally involved, shuttering the incidents behind the adamantine partition of top security clearance.

In Sarenith of 325 ag, after dozens of military operations failed to engage the elusive probes, a wing of fighters dispatched from the Idari finally got lucky and disabled one of the machines before it could self-destruct. Coaxed into giving up some of its secrets by top Pact Worlds scientists, the biotech vessel became the prototype for the "home grown" remote war machines that are currently being tested for use in combat. The replicas aren't alive but are built using robotic construction templates since the core of the original biotech design has proven too complicated to reverse engineer with Pact technology.

Remote war machines are proxies that can be controlled from a great distance. The original biotech war machines connect to the pilot's mind through a psychic link or unknown radio frequency. Robotic remote war machines connect to a computer via data link, allowing the pilot to control their proxy using a keyboard, virtual reality rig, or even a vidgame controller.

Scavenger Slime.name: 食腐黏浆怪 Scavenger Slime

Plasma Cannon.name: 等离子加农炮 Plasma Cannon

Techsense.name: 科技感知 Techsense
Techsense.description:
装配软泥怪能够将具有科技特征的生物和物体，作为其所列距离内的精确感官来探测。

An assembly ooze can detect creatures and objects with the tech trait as a precise sense within the listed range.

Scavenger Shell.name: 拾荒者贝壳 Scavenger Shell
Scavenger Shell.description:
拾荒史莱姆会用废弃的科技零件和一种天然树脂分泌物为自己构筑一层外壳。这使这团软泥获得硬度。该硬度会使其受到的任何伤害减少一个等于其硬度的数值，但会暂时移除其对重击的免疫。一旦拾荒史莱姆的生命值降至一半，或在受到一次重击伤害后立即，其拾荒外壳就会破裂，失去其硬度，并使其护甲等级降至22。

A scavenger slime builds a shell for itself from discarded pieces of technology and a secretion of natural resin. This grants the ooze Hardness. This Hardness reduces any damage it takes by an amount equal to its Hardness but temporarily removes its immunity to critical hits. Once the scavenger slime is reduced to half its Hit Points or immediately after being damaged by a critical hit, the scavenger shell breaks, removing its Hardness and reducing its Armor Class to 22.

Kitbash.name: 拼装改造 Kitbash
Kitbash.description:
食腐史莱姆无需工具即可修理任何具有科技特征的物品。

Scavenger slimes can repair any item with the tech trait without tools.

Salvaged Armaments.name: 回收军备 Salvaged Armaments
Salvaged Armaments.description:
一只拾荒史莱姆最多可以将三件武器并入其原生质身躯中，并获得对每件武器的熟练。 这些武器被视为一体化武器，由拾荒史莱姆自身的科技魔法本质驱动，无需装填。

A scavenger slime can incorporate up to three weapons into its protoplasmic body, gaining proficiency with each. These weapons are treated as integrated weapons and are powered by the scavenger slime's own technomagical nature without needing to reload.

Scavenger Slime.publicNotes:
长久以来，拾荒史莱姆遍布银河各处，早已久到无人能记清。它们搭乘星舰便车，在残骸与陨石之间漂流，并潜藏于废品堆场之中。它们唯一的目标：修复它们的原生质所能触及的一切。人们认为，拾荒史莱姆是科技与魔法意外结合的产物，由一个极其先进的文明制造，作为一种通用修复凝胶，后来却发展出了初步的知性，并比它们的创造者存续得更久。

这些生物有一种本能的驱动力，会去修复并重建它们遇到的几乎任何科技物品。凭借它们极其可塑的身体——能够分泌一种高度专门化的树脂——拾荒史莱姆甚至能修复极其复杂的科技装置。它们凭直觉就懂得如何保护自己免受伤害，以及如何操作它们设法找到的任何武器，并会充满攻击性地使用这些武装，将所有生物都驱离它们永无止境的修复工作。

各种类型的软泥怪潜伏在银河各处黑暗而废弃的地方，只会在满足食欲以及威胁冒险者、探索者和倒霉工人时现身。

For longer than anyone can remember, scavenger slimes have been found all over the galaxy. They hitch rides on starships, drift among wrecks and meteors, and lay hidden in junkyards. Their only goal: to repair everything they can get their protoplasm on. Scavenger slimes are believed to be an accidental marriage of technology and magic, built by an extremely advanced civilization as an all-purpose repair gel, only to develop rudimentary sentience and outlive their creators.

These creatures have an instinctive drive to repair and rebuild nearly any technological item they encounter. Using their extremely malleable bodies, which excrete a highly specialized resin, scavenger slimes can repair even exceedingly complex pieces of technology. They intuitively understand how to shield themselves from harm and how to operate any weapon they manage to find, aggressively using such armaments to drive any and all creatures away from their never-ending repair work.

Oozes of many types lurk in dark and abandoned places across the galaxy, emerging only to satiate their appetites and threaten adventurers, explorers, and hapless workers alike.

Thasteron Khefak.name: 煞油·凯法克 Thasteron Khefak

Gnaw Scrap.name: 啃噬废料 Gnaw Scrap
Gnaw Scrap.description:
一只凯法克会啃咬无人看管的物体来进食，每 10 分钟对该物体造成 @Damage[4[piercing]] 伤害。该伤害无视 10 点硬度。如果一只凯法克每天不至少花费 1 小时啃咬废料，它就会开始挨饿，直到它花费 10 分钟啃咬废料为止。

A khefak chews on an unattended object to feed, dealing @Damage[4[piercing]] damage every 10 minutes to the object. This damage ignores 10 points of Hardness. If a khefak doesn't spend at least 1 hour Gnawing Scrap per day, it begins to starve until it spends 10 minutes Gnawing Scrap.

Thasteron Radiation.name: 煞油辐射 Thasteron Radiation
Thasteron Radiation.description:
10英尺。煞油克法克会散发出轻度辐射灵光。生物若在该灵光中开始其回合，则必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:20] 检定，否则受到 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

10 feet. A thasteron khefak gives off an aura of mild radiation. A creature who starts its turn in the aura must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:20] save or take @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Thasteron Khefak.publicNotes:
当克法克吞食煞油时，它们会呈现出晶体般的外观，并成长为具有领地意识、贪婪凶残的威胁。

克法克生物遗传公司通过生物工程制造了克法克，让它们吞食废弃煞油，以便将这些废料提炼为星舰燃料。结果，这些生物最终成了“解决方案反而制造出自身问题”的典型例子。随着漂流域旅行被发现，阿基顿的煞油市场暴跌，对采矿基础设施的需求也随之消失，克法克也包括在内。克法克生物遗传公司摧毁了生产设施，认为他们已经将自己的造物彻底消灭。然而，克法克生命力顽强，少数幸存者离开了那些设施。除煞油外，它们还以无机物为生，而其极快的繁殖速度使它们迅速扩散到阿基顿各地。有些还偷渡上了星舰，使它们得以散布到整个协约世界。

When khefaks consume thasteron, they take on a crystalline appearance and grow into territorial, ravenous threats.

Khefak Biogenetics bioengineered khefaks to consume scrap thasteron so the waste could be refined into starship fuel. These creatures eventually became a prime example of a solution becoming a problem of its own. After the discovery of Drift travel, Akiton's thasteron market plummeted, removing the need for mining infrastructure, including khefaks. Khefak Biogenetics destroyed the production facilities, thinking they'd completely eradicated their creations. Khefaks are hardy, however, and the few survivors left the facilities. Beyond thasteron, they subsisted on inorganic materials, and their rapid reproduction rate allowed them to quickly spread all over Akiton. Some stowed away on starships, allowing them to spread throughout the Pact Worlds.

Sapient Purple Orb.name: 有智力的紫色宝珠 Sapient Purple Orb
Sapient Purple Orb.tokenName: 有智紫色宝珠 Sapient Purple Orb

Occult Innate Spells.name: 天生异能法术 Occult Innate Spells

Telekinetic Maneuver.name: 念动战技 Telekinetic Maneuver
Telekinetic Maneuver.description: 你通过一股猛烈的念动力移动一个敌人或者其携带的事物。你可以对目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{卸武 Disarm}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞 Shove}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{移位 Reposition}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{摔绊 Trip}，使用法术攻击骰，而不是运动检定。

Translate.name: 通译语言 Translate
Translate.description:
在你施放该法术时，目标会理解其正听到或者阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会令其能够理解密文，使用隐喻表达的含义，或者类似的内容（由GM所判定）。如果目标能够听见数种语言并且了解该情况，它能选择要理解的那种语言；否则，随机选择这种语言。

升阶（3环级） 该目标也能使用该语言交流。

升阶（4环级） 你能以至多10个生物作为目标，并且这些目标也能使用该语言交流。

Daze.name: 晕眩术 Daze
Daze.description:
你侵入目标的精神，利用精神冲击令目标晕眩。该冲击造成1d6心灵伤害，具有基础意志豁免。如果目标在豁免中大失败，它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 该伤害增加1d6。

Figment.name: 虚构幻术 Figment
Figment.description:
你创造出简单的声音或图像的幻术。声音会为法术添加听觉特征，且不能包含能被理解的单词或复杂的音乐。图像会为法术添加视觉特征，但是它不能大于5尺边长的立方体，且在15尺的距离内观察会发现它的构造明显很粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你能尝试用幻术让人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}，这会为你的欺骗检定提供+2环境加值。若对某个生物进行的此尝试失败了，该生物就不会相信虚构幻术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：虚构幻术}

Mind Skewer.name: 心灵穿刺 Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
你用过量的灵能信息或神圣裁决使一个生物的心智超载。此次精神冲击造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若严重失败，目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，持续 1 轮。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高 2d6。

You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Seek the Stars.name: 寻求群星 Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
在你的心灵之眼中，你描绘出一条穿越宇宙的路径。若你身处协约世界的空间中，你会立刻知道应朝哪个方向旅行，才能抵达艾巴萨罗姆空间站上的星石。若你在协约星系之外，你会知道距离最近的漂流信标或星石的方向。

强化（7环） 你也可以改为知晓某个熟悉地点的方向，例如你曾造访过的世界或中途空间站。

In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Soothe.name: 安抚术 Soothe
Soothe.description:
你安抚目标的精神，增强其精神防御并治愈其伤口。目标在你施放该法术时，回复1d10+4生命值，并且在持续时间中，目标对抗心灵效果的豁免上获得+2状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.nkk4O5fyzrC0057i]{法术效果：安抚术}

升阶（+1） 该治疗量增加1d10+4。

Telekinetic Hand.name: 念动之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造出一只漂浮着的魔法手掌，它可以隐形或者宛如幽灵，它能抓住目标物体并向着任意方向缓慢漂浮至多20尺。当你维持法术时，你能够将物体移动额外20尺。若物体位于空中之时法术结束，那么该物体便会坠落。

升阶（3环级） 你能以一个1负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至60尺，而且你能以一个1负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

升阶（7环级） 法术射程增加至60尺，而且你能以一个2负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

Telekinetic Projectile.name: 念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile
Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你向目标射出区域中一个未固定的，无主的，1负载1以下的物体。对目标尝试一次法术攻击骰。如果你命中，你造成2d6的钝击，穿刺，或者挥砍伤害（对应于你所扔出的物体）。射出物体的特殊特征或者魔法特性不会影响该攻击或者伤害。

大成功 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成完整伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d6。

Mistvision.name: 迷雾视觉 Mistvision
Mistvision.description:
有知觉的紫色球体始终无视由雾、烟和薄雾造成的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

A sapient purple orb always ignores @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment} caused by fog, smoke, and mist.

Astral Mist.name: 星界迷雾 Astral Mist
Astral Mist.description:
频率 每分钟一次

效果 这颗有智紫色球体以自身为中心放出红雾（如同该法术）。有智球体可以选择放出透明雾气，不提供隐蔽。雾中的盟友和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}生物获得对豁免检定的+2状态加值。此外，任何在雾气出现时位于雾中、进入雾中，或在雾中结束其回合的敌人，除非其已着迷，否则都必须进行一次@Check[will|dc:21]豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响，并在24小时内暂时免疫。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物被雾气所着迷。

大失败 该生物被雾气所着迷，并且@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

Frequency once per minute

Effect The sapient purple orb emits a red mist (as the spell) centered on themself. Sapient orbs can choose to emit transparent mist, granting no concealment. Allies and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} creatures in the mist gain a +2 status bonus to saving throws. Additionally, any enemy that's in the mist when it appears, that enters the mist, or that ends its turn in the mist must attempt a @Check[will|dc:21] save unless it's fascinated.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and becomes temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature becomes fascinated by the mist.

Critical Failure The creature becomes fascinated by the mist and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Excandescent Flash.name: 炽耀闪光 Excandescent Flash
Excandescent Flash.description:
频率 每分钟一次

效果 这颗有智能的紫色球体会短暂地将自身亮度提升到极具侵略性的明亮光谱。20尺内所有其他能够看见这颗有智能的紫色球体的生物，都必须成功通过一次 @Check[reflex|dc:21] 豁免，否则会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}。若重度失败，目标则改为先陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 1轮，随后再陷入目眩 [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}。

Frequency once per minute

Effect The sapient purple orb momentarily increases their luminance to an aggressively bright spectrum. Each other creature within 20 feet that can see the sapient purple orb must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:21] saving throw or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}. On a critical failure, the target instead becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, then dazzled for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Sapient Purple Orb.publicNotes:
紫色球体是充满好奇、善于交际的存在，它们总会尝试与遇到的任何生命形态建立联系，尽管这些尝试往往笨拙拙劣。几乎没有其他生物能够理解它们的古老语言，因此紫色球体会转而使用魔法、心灵感应、微小幻象，以及从其直径3英尺的发光身躯中迸发出的闪光与流动雾气来交流。

紫色球体渴望与自己选定的朋友和家人合作并团结一致，无论那些对象是其他有智球体还是截然不同的存在，这使得与它们成为朋友相对容易——也让它们相对容易受骗。紫色球体是同伴虔诚的支持者与守护者；若朋友身陷险境，它们会直接以身体投入战团。随着它们在冲突的白热化中（无论是否暴力）情绪愈发高涨，它们会变成深沉的暗紫色，尽管它们的情绪很少会强烈到让它们愿意夺走另一个存在的生命。紫色球体似乎比起自己更珍视朋友的生命，这或许正是物质宇宙中有智紫色球体数量似乎正在减少的原因之一。

这些神秘的球状存在似乎没有母星、组织化的社群、传统或宗教。关于这些球体的目击报告零星不定——它们会短暂地大批出现，随后消失一年或更久，之后又只在另一片截然不同的太空区域现身数月。研究者和这些球体的朋友们已经注意到，每一次它们出现时，其数量都会减少。

有智球体有时会形成永久纽带，将三个到六个球体（据目前所知，总是同一类型）融合为一个被称为“辉体”的簇群。只有处于其生命周期先进阶段的有智球体才能形成这样的簇群，而这种融合是永久且无可逆转号的。辉体极其聪慧，但比其他有智球体隐居得多，因此很难辨明它们在有智球体社群中的动机或目的。

Purple orbs are curious, social beings who unfailingly attempt to make contact with any life-form they encounter, though these attempts are frequently inept. Few other creatures understand their ancient language, so purple orbs instead use magic, telepathy, minor illusions, and flashes of light and flowing mist from their 3-foot-diameter luminous bodies.

Purple orbs are eager for cooperation and solidarity with their chosen friends and family, whether those are other sapient orbs or completely different beings, making it relatively easy to befriend them—or deceive them. Purple orbs are devout supporters and defenders of their companions, flinging themselves bodily into the fray if a friend is in danger. They become a deep dark purple as they grow more emotional in the heat of conflict (violent or otherwise), though their emotions rarely grow so intense that they're willing to take another being's life. That purple orbs seem to value their own lives less than those of their friends might be among the reasons that the number of sapient purple orbs in the universe seems to be dwindling.

These enigmatic, orb-shaped beings seem to have no home world, organized society, traditions, or religion. Sightings of the orbs are sporadic—they briefly appear in large numbers, then vanish for a year or more, only to reappear in an entirely different region of space for a few months. Scholars and friends of the orbs have noticed that each time the orbs appear, their numbers have diminished.

Sapient orbs occasionally form permanent bonds, merging three to six orbs (always of the same type, as far as anyone knows) into a cluster called a luminant. Only sapient orbs at advanced stages of their life cycle can form such clusters, and the merge is permanent and irrevocable. Luminants are highly intelligent but far more reclusive than other sapient orbs, making it difficult to discern their motivations or purpose in sapient orb society.

Plasma Ooze.name: 等离子软泥 Plasma Ooze
Plasma Ooze.tokenName: 等离子软泥怪 Plasma Ooze

Thoughtsense.name: 思维感知 Thoughtsense
Thoughtsense.description:
等离子软泥怪能够感知列出范围内所有非无心智生物。

The plasma ooze can sense all non-mindless creatures within the listed range.

Electromagnetic Field.name: 电磁场 Electromagnetic Field
Electromagnetic Field.description:
100英尺。若带有科技特征的物品在灵光内被启用，则它必须成功通过一次 @Check[reflex|dc:36] 豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}（若重度失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}）。

具有科技特征的生物若在灵光内开始其回合，必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:35] 豁免。若其失败，则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}（若重度失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}）。

在此次豁免中成功的物品或生物会对该灵光免疫1小时。

100 feet. When an item with the tech trait is activated inside the aura, it must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:36] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2} on a critical failure).

A tech creature that starts its turn within the aura must attempt a @Check[will|dc:35] save. If it fails, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2} on a critical failure).

An item or creature that succeeds at this save becomes immune to this aura for 1 hour.

Magnetic Draw.name: 磁力抽引 Magnetic Draw
Magnetic Draw.description:
100英尺内的大型及更小的生物，以及所有无人照看的物体，都必须成功通过一次 @Check[reflex|dc:36] 豁免，否则会被向等离子软泥怪拖拽15英尺（若严重失败则为30英尺）。

Large and smaller creatures and all unattended objects within 100 feet must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:36] save or be pulled 15 feet toward the plasma ooze (30 feet on a critical failure).

Plasma Drain.name: 等离子汲取 Plasma Drain
Plasma Drain.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 位于等离子软泥 100 英尺内、具有科技（特征）的每个生物和被持用物品都必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:36] 豁免。对于每个未通过此次豁免的目标，软泥恢复 @Damage[15[healing]] 生命值，且该物品失去其剩余一半的充能（如果由电池供能）。

Frequency once per day

Effect each creature and wielded object with the tech trait within 100 feet of the plasma ooze must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:36] save. For each target that fails this save, the ooze regains @Damage[15[healing]] Hit Points and the object loses half of its remaining charges (if battery-powered).

Plasma Slag.name: 等离子炉渣 Plasma Slag
Plasma Slag.description:
被该软泥怪的拟足伤害的生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:36] 豁免，否则会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}（若严重失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 2}）。具有科技特征的生物将其掷骰结果的成功等级按更差一级处理。

A creature damaged by the ooze's pseudopod must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:36] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} on a critical failure). A creature with the tech trait uses the outcome one degree of success worse than the result of its roll.

Plasma Ooze.publicNotes:
等离子软泥怪对协约世界中经验丰富的太空旅行者构成重大威胁。这些实体会显现为大范围噼啪作响的电磁能量网络，呈现出迷人的球形，脉动着紫色与蓝色的发光色彩，其间点缀着灼热的白炽爆裂。

这些软泥怪主要潜伏在恒星表面附近，但也会被物质宇宙其他地方强大的电磁现象所吸引。软泥怪散发出的电磁场会在太空中带来危险，甚至可能使有护盾保护的星舰失去行动能力。与火元素位面相连、被称为“噬日者”的武装子嗣声称会积极猎杀这些神秘存在，并配备了专门装备和音波武器。

许多种类的软泥怪潜伏在银河各处黑暗而废弃的地点，只有在满足食欲并威胁冒险者、探索者和倒霉的工人时才会现身。

Plasma oozes pose a significant menace to seasoned spacefarers within the Pact Worlds. These entities materialize as expansive networks of crackling electromagnetic energy, assuming a captivating spherical form pulsating with luminous hues of purple and blue, with searing white-hot bursts scattered throughout.

These oozes primarily lurk near the surface of stars but are also drawn to potent electromagnetic phenomena elsewhere in the Universe. The electromagnetic fields exuded by the ooze present dangers in space, potentially even incapacitating shielded starships. Armed scions connected to the Plane of Fire, known as the Sunkillers, claim to actively hunt these enigmatic beings, armed with specialized gear and sonic weaponry.

Oozes of many types lurk in dark and abandoned places across the galaxy, emerging only to satiate their appetites and threaten adventurers, explorers, and hapless workers alike.

Noquasar Spark.name: 无类星体火花 Noquasar Spark

Gravity Lurch.name: 重力突震 Gravity Lurch
Gravity Lurch.description:
被诺夸萨星火花的引力子耀斑重击的生物会被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

A creature critically hit by a noquasar spark's graviton flare is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Ionized Plasma Blast.name: 电离等离子爆裂 Ionized Plasma Blast
Ionized Plasma Blast.description:
微类星体火花释放出等离子体，形成一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 或 @Template[type:line|distance:30]。区域内的每个生物受到 @Damage[2d4[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害（进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:16|basic] 豁免）。严重失败其豁免的生物还会受到 @Damage[1d4[persistent,electricity]|options:area-damage] 伤害，并被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。微类星体火花在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Ionized Plasma Blast]]{1d4轮} 内不能再次使用电离等离子爆裂。

The noquasar spark unleashes plasma in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] or @Template[type:line|distance:30]. Each creature in the area takes @Damage[2d4[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:16|basic] save). A creature that critically fails its save also takes @Damage[1d4[persistent,electricity]|options:area-damage] damage and is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. The noquasar spark can't use Ionized Plasma Blast again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Ionized Plasma Blast]]{1d4 rounds}.

Noquasar Spark.publicNotes:
一团无星类星火花显现为一抹极其明亮的闪光，其中浮现着一张痛苦扭曲的面孔。

当一名索拉利安在与群星循环失去同步时死去，他们的灵魂可能会与其太阳微粒纠缠在一起。在灵魂试图抵达灵魂之河的过程中，极端的太空力量会作用于其上，将其无限地拉伸变薄，直至永恒。

A noquasar spark appears as a glimmer of intensely bright light with an agonized face.

When a solarian perishes while out of sync with the cycle of stars, their soul might become entangled with their solar mote. Extreme cosmic forces act on the soul as it attempts to reach the River of Souls, stretching it infinitely thin for all of eternity.

Hardlight Havoc.name: 强光浩劫 Hardlight Havoc

Error State.name: 错误状态 Error State
Error State.description:
在 hardlight havoc 于战斗中开始其回合之前，它会随机获得以下错误状态之一，并失去任何先前的错误状态。

角色变更 hardlight havoc 恢复 @Damage[2d8[healing]|options:area-damage] 生命值。

像素化 hardlight havoc 对所有生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态。

能量泄漏 hardlight havoc 处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1} 状态。在其回合结束时，它对 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 内的生物造成 @Damage[4d6[electricity]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:22|basic] 豁免）。

涌动 hardlight havoc 获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速} 状态，直到其回合结束，并且可以将额外动作用于疾行或打击。

Before the hardlight havoc begins its turn in combat, it gains one of the following error states at random, losing any previous error state.

Change Character The hardlight havoc regains @Damage[2d8[healing]|options:area-damage] Hit Points.

Pixelation The hardlight havoc is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from all creatures.

Power Leak The hardlight havoc is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}. At the end of its turn, it deals @Damage[4d6[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage to creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] (@Check[reflex|dc:22|basic] save).

Surge The hardlight havoc is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} until the end of its turn and can use the extra action to Stride or Strike.

Tethered 120 feet.name: 系缚于 120 英尺 Tethered 120 feet
Tethered 120 feet.description:
一个硬光生命体不能离其投射器超过所示的英尺数进行移动。一个硬光生命体在生命值降至 0 时会消失，不过它的投射器会在 [[/gmr 1d4 #hours]]{1d4小时} 内将其重构。永久摧毁一个硬光生命体的唯一方法是找到它的投射器，并将其修好或摧毁。

A hardlight life-form can't travel more than the indicated number of feet from its projector. A hardlight life-form reduced to 0 HP vanishes, though its projector reconstructs it in [[/gmr 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours}. The only way to permanently destroy a hardlight life-form is to find its projector and either repair or destroy it.

Flicker.name: 闪烁术 Flicker
Flicker.description:
全息光浩劫传送至多 40 尺。若目的地位于某个敌人的近战触及范围内，它可以对该敌人进行一次近战打击。若它传送到一个没有可供站立表面的方格中，则它会在尝试打击后坠落，且不会因坠落而受到伤害。

The hardlight havoc teleports up to 40 feet. If the destination is within melee reach of an enemy, it can make a melee Strike against that enemy. If it teleports to a square without a surface to stand on, it falls after attempting a Strike and takes no damage from falling.

Hardlight Havoc.publicNotes:
这种硬光生命体并不稳定，会出现画面卡顿和波动的动作。

与普通的全息影像不同，硬光生命体是可触碰的活体存在。

This hardlight life-form is unstable, displaying stuck frames and erratic movements.

Unlike normal holograms, hardlight life-forms are tangible, living entities.

Whiskered Renkroda.name: 长须伦克罗达 Whiskered Renkroda
Whiskered Renkroda.tokenName: 长须伦克罗达 Whiskered Renkroda

Motion Sense.name: 动态感知 Motion Sense
Motion Sense.description:
长须伦克罗达能够通过振动以及空气或水流的移动感知附近的生物，作为一种非精确感知，范围如上所列。

A whiskered renkroda can sense nearby creatures through vibration and air or water movement as an imprecise sense at the listed range.

Circling Reposition.name: 盘旋转位 Circling Reposition
Circling Reposition.description:
触发 一个生物在胡须伦克罗达触及范围内结束其移动

效果 胡须伦克罗达绕着它的猎物移动，以其速度进行一次Stride。伦克罗达必须移动到一个使触发生物位于其触及范围内的位置。

Trigger A creature ends its movement within the whiskered renkroda's reach

Effect The whiskered renkroda circles its prey, Striding up to its Speed. The renkroda must move to a location where the triggering creature is within its reach.

Forest Passage.name: 林间穿行 Forest Passage
Forest Passage.description:
长须伦克罗达无视任何由植物造成的困难地形，例如灌木、藤蔓和下层植被。

The whiskered renkroda ignores any difficult terrain caused by plants, such as bushes, vines, and undergrowth.

Terrifying Roar.name: 恐怖咆哮 Terrifying Roar
Terrifying Roar.description:
长须伦克罗达发出凶猛的咆哮。60尺内每个非伦克罗达生物都必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:22] 豁免。随后，该生物会暂时免疫10分钟。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}。

大失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 3}。

The whiskered renkroda bellows ferociously. Each non-renkroda creature within 60 feet must attempt a @Check[will|dc:22] save. The creature is then temporarily immune for 10 minutes.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Upending Charge.name: 颠覆冲锋 Upending Charge
Upending Charge.description:
有须伦克罗达向前猛冲并撞向其猎物。它进行两次疾行。若有须伦克罗达在移动结束时有一名敌人位于其触及范围内，它便对该敌人进行一次身体打击。若命中，该敌人被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

The whiskered renkroda charges forward and slams into its prey. It Strides twice. If the whiskered renkroda ends its movement with an enemy within its reach, it makes a body Strike against that enemy. On a hit, the enemy is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Whiskered Renkroda.publicNotes:
在所有伦克罗达中，须触伦克罗达体型最小，已经适应了在茂密丛林与森林中轻松穿行，并融入鲜艳翠绿的植被之中。须触伦克罗达的下巴上长有类似胡须的触角，能够感知振动，使它们可以发现藏匿在浓密枝叶间的猎物。当它们发现猎物时，伦克罗达会猛冲入战，用足以撞倒树木或载具的力量猛撞猎物。偶尔，须触伦克罗达会群居并集体狩猎，以便更好地保护自己，抵御体型更大的掠食者。

伦克罗达是一类原产于卡斯卓韦的大型类恐龙掠食者。多亏了走私者、偷猎者和极端富有的猎捕大型猎物者，它们已经扩散到了这颗丛林行星之外。伦克罗达以双足行走，体格强壮，拥有长颈与装饰性的棘刺；它们最广为人知的是那令人胆寒的咆哮声，它们会频繁发出这种吼叫，既作为远距离交流的方式，也用来吓退其他掠食者与食腐动物。伦克罗达已知有十多种，每一种都特别适应自身所处的环境或生态位。

The smallest of all renkrodas, whiskered renkrodas have adapted to move easily through dense jungles and forests and blend in amid the vibrant green flora. Whiskered renkrodas have whisker-like antennae growing from their chins that detect vibrations, enabling them to detect prey hiding amid the dense foliage. When they spot their prey, renkrodas charge into the fray and slam into their prey with enough force to topple trees or vehicles. Occasionally, whiskered renkrodas live and hunt in packs, to better protect themselves from larger predators.

Renkrodas are a family of large dinosaur-like predators native to the planet Castrovel. They've spread beyond the jungle planet's boundaries thanks to smugglers, poachers, and ultra-wealthy big-game hunters. Bipedal and strong with long necks and decorative spines, renkrodas are best known for their terrifying roars, which they bellow frequently as a form of long-range communication and to scare away other predators and scavengers. Over a dozen species of renkrodas exist, each specially adapted to their environment or ecological niche.

Nihili.name: 虚无主义者 Nihili

Decompressing Glance.name: 解压一瞥 Decompressing Glance
Decompressing Glance.description:
触发条件 虚无者能看见的、位于30尺内的一个生物开始其回合

效果 目标必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:20] 豁免。若其失败，它会因竭力喘息而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 状态，持续1分钟。

Trigger A creature within 30 feet that the nihili can see starts its turn

Effect The target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:20] save. If it fails, it's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} for 1 minute as it struggles to catch its breath.

Decompressing Gaze.name: 减压凝视 Decompressing Gaze
Decompressing Gaze.description:
虚无体凝视其 30 英尺内一个它能看见的生物，并将其先前因减压而死亡的鲜明幻象灌输给对方。受此凝视影响的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:20] 豁免。如果失败，且此前尚未因减压一瞥或此能力而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}，则其变为疲乏。如果该生物已经疲乏，则豁免失败会使其开始窒息，直到虚无体的下个回合结束。该生物仍保持清醒，并且可以在其回合中采取行动，例如施放法术或寻找空气来源。该生物可以如常屏住呼吸。

生物可以在其回合结束时尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:20] 豁免，以挣脱被投射进其心智中的这段经历；若成功，减压凝视的效果结束。虚无体可以在其回合中维持减压凝视，或以一个自由动作结束此效果。当虚无体以其减压凝视指定一个新目标生物，或该生物成功豁免此效果时，目标生物获得空气的能力会恢复。除此之外，此效果遵循窒息规则。

The nihili stares at a creature they can see within 30 feet and imparts vivid visions of their prior death by decompression. A creature affected by this gaze must attempt a @Check[will|dc:20] save. If it fails and hasn't already been @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} by Decompressing Glance or this ability, it becomes fatigued. If the creature is already fatigued, a failed save causes the creature to begin suffocating until the end of the nihili's next turn. The creature remains conscious and can take actions on its turn, such as casting a spell or searching for a source of air. The creature can hold its breath as normal.

A creature can attempt a @Check[will|dc:20] save at the end of its turn to break free from the experience being projected into its mind; on a success, the effect of Decompressing Gaze ends. The nihili can Sustain Decompressing Gaze on their turn or end this effect as a free action. The targeted creature's access to air is restored when the nihili targets a new creature with their Decompressing Gaze or the creature successfully saves against the effects. This otherwise follows the rules for suffocation.

Gravity Grab.name: 重力擒抓 Gravity Grab
Gravity Grab.description:
虚无体生成一片重力场，将所有生物和未固定的物体拉向自身。位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内的每个生物都必须进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:20] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物被拖拽 5 尺，朝向虚无体。

失败 该生物被拖拽 15 尺，朝向虚无体。

大失败 该生物被拖拽 30 尺，朝向虚无体。

The nihili generates a field of gravity that pulls all creatures and unsecured objects toward it. Each creature within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:20] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is pulled 5 feet toward the nihili.

Failure The creature is pulled 15 feet toward the nihili.

Critical Failure The creature is pulled 30 feet toward the nihili.

Nihili.publicNotes:
在太空暴露环境中死去是极其可怖的，因此许多星舰船员都会近乎偏执地监控舰体与装甲的完整性，以避免落得如此下场。这种死亡也可能导致一种名为nihili的污秽不死生物诞生。nihili会在这样的情况下出现：某人在真空中因窒息而死，体内所有气体逸出，并且肺部因试图屏息而塌陷。传说中，第一个以这种可怕方式死去的人曾见到不死女神厄加图娅的幻象，女神赐予其一个吻，将其转化为最初的nihili。同样的传说还声称，这个nihili至今仍在太空中漫无目的地漂浮，等待附着到一艘毫无防备的星舰上。

不同nihili的外貌各不相同。大多数看起来像各自族裔的僵尸版本，但身上带有骇人的皮肤撕裂痕，以及因死亡时气体逸出而形成的肿胀鼓包。nihili保留着生前的智力，但这种智力已完全扭曲，只为了将自己承受过的同样痛苦施加于生者。通过将目光集中在目标身上，nihili能够把自己死亡时的记忆灌输给那个生物，甚至可能使其窒息。

Dying from exposure in space is horrific, and many starship crews obsessively monitor their hull and armor integrity to avoid such a fate. It can also lead to the creation of the foul undead known as nihilis. A nihili arises after an individual in vacuum dies of asphyxiation while all gases exit their body and their lungs collapse from attempts to hold their breath. Legends say the first person to die in such a terrible manner had a vision of the goddess of undeath, Urgathoa, who bestowed upon them a single kiss, transforming them into the very first nihili. The same legends go on to claim that this nihili still floats aimlessly through space, waiting to cling to an unsuspecting starship.

The physical appearance of a given nihili varies. Most appear as zombie-like versions of their respective ancestries, but with gruesome stretch marks and pockets of bloat caused by escaping gases during their death. A nihili maintains their prior intellect, subverted entirely to inflicting the same suffering on the living that they endured. By focusing their gaze on a target, a nihili can impart to that creature the memories of their own demise, potentially suffocating them.

Electrovore.name: 噬电者 Electrovore

Electricsense.name: 电感知 Electricsense
Electricsense.description:
噬电体能够感知电流，包括大多数生物神经系统中的电信号，并在所列距离内将其作为一种不精确感官来感知。

An electrovore can sense electricity, including the electrical impulses found in most living creatures' nervous systems, as an imprecise sense at the listed range.

Electrical Discharge.name: 放电 Electrical Discharge
Electrical Discharge.description:
效果 电噬兽释放一道冲击波，对 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 内的生物造成 @Damage[2d6[electricity]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:15]）。它在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Electrical Discharge]]{1d4轮} 内不能再次使用电流释放。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。其持有的带有科技特征的物品变为故障 1。若目标具有科技特征，则其变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}。

失败 如成功，但受到全额伤害，且为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}。

大失败 如成功，但受到双倍伤害，且为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 3}。

Effect The electrovore unleashes a shock wave that deals @Damage[2d6[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage to creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] (@Check[reflex|dc:15]). It can't use Electrical Discharge again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Electrical Discharge]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage. Items in its possession with the tech trait becomes glitching 1. If the target has the tech trait, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}.

Failure As success, but full damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.

Critical Failure As success, but double damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 3}.

Siphon.name: 虹吸 Siphon
Siphon.description:
当电食兽用尾部打击对持用或穿戴科技装备的活体生物，或具有科技特征的生物造成重击时，它会虹吸目标的一部分电能。这会立即为电食兽恢复 @Damage[5[healing]] 生命值，之后在接下来的 10 分钟内每分钟再恢复 1 点生命值；如果电食兽进行多次虹吸，这项额外治疗不会增加。

When an electrovore scores a critical hit with a tail Strike against a living creature wielding or wearing tech gear or a creature with the tech trait, it siphons off a portion of the target's electrical energy. This restores @Damage[5[healing]] Hit Points to the electrovore immediately, plus 1 Hit Point per minute for the next 10 minutes; the additional healing doesn't increase if the electrovore siphons multiple times.

Electrovore.publicNotes:
噬电兽以电力作为其唯一的食物来源。在它们的母星上，它们以一种三头电鳗为食，但火山活动摧毁了它们的食物来源，使噬电兽濒临灭绝。后来，当探险者登陆它们的星球时，噬电兽找到了生机。探险者的设备和飞船中都有大量噬电兽所需的电力。它们偷偷藏上飞船，很快扩散到整个协约世界，所到之处都造成破坏与混乱。

对一支工程师团队来说，没有什么比在星舰偏僻角落里发现一只正在啃咬电线的噬电兽更可怕了。只要发现一只噬电兽，很可能还有十几只正等着被找出来。这些身高3英尺的爬行动物有时被称为“导线鼠”，繁殖速度极快，并会对能源系统造成严重干扰，以至于在几天或几周内，一艘星舰或一座工厂就可能因电力耗尽而彻底停摆。太空中有许多毫无生气、漂流不定的飞船，正是因为噬电兽的 infestation 没有被及时制止。

要清除一次 infestation 并非易事，因为噬电兽目标单一且狡猾。这些生物很擅长寻找藏身之处，潜伏追踪它们偏爱的能量来源，并找准时机发动袭击。成群的噬电兽甚至会协调在不同区域同时进食，让人更难阻止它们。

遭遇对抗时，噬电兽很少死战到底；它们更倾向于先吃掉一些电力，然后撤退、藏匿并恢复，之后再回来大快朵颐。

Electrovores consume electricity as their sole source of sustenance. On their native planet, they fed on a species of three-headed electric eels, but volcanic activity wiped out their food source, sending electrovores to the brink of extinction. Electrovores found their salvation when explorers landed on their planet. The explorer's equipment and vessels had ample amounts of the electricity that the electrovores require. They stowed away on the vessels and soon spread throughout the Pact Worlds, causing damage and mayhem wherever they appeared.

Nothing terrifies a team of engineers more than finding an electrovore chewing on wires in a remote part of their starship. Where there's one electrovore, a dozen more likely await discovery. These 3-foot-tall reptilian creatures, sometimes called "conduit rats," breed rapidly and create such a disturbance in power sources that, over the course of days or weeks, a starship or factory might completely shut down from lack of power. There are many lifeless star vessels adrift in space because an electrovore infestation wasn't stopped in time.

Removing an infestation is no easy task, as electrovores are single-minded and cunning. The creatures are adept at finding places to hide, stalking their preferred energy sources and finding the correct moment to strike. Packs of electrovores even coordinate feedings in different areas at the same time to make it harder to stop them.

When confronted, electrovores rarely fight to the death, preferring to eat some electricity and retreat, hide, and heal, then return for another feast.

Snoop-Class Infiltrator Robot.name: Snoop-Class 渗透机器人 Snoop-Class Infiltrator Robot
Snoop-Class Infiltrator Robot.tokenName: 窥探级渗透机器人 Snoop-Class Infiltrator Robot

Integrated Commercial Crossbolter.name: 集成式商用弩弹枪 Integrated Commercial Crossbolter
Integrated Commercial Crossbolter.description:
升级： 1

这把高科技弩利用一系列活塞将弩矢沿着其枪管推进。这种安静发射的半自动武器在高密度聚居地很受欢迎，因为在那里枪声可能会引发恐慌。

Upgrades: 1

This high-tech crossbow uses a series of pistons to propel bolts along its barrel. These quiet-firing semiautomatic weapons are popular in high-density settlements where gunfire might cause a panic.

Integrated Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).name: 集成式黑客工具包（商用） Integrated Hacking Toolkit (Commercial)
Integrated Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).description:
进行“入侵”计算机的计算机检定需要一套黑客工具包。你可以使用黑客工具包在不借助用户界面的情况下访问计算机，但这需要与计算机进行物理接触，或通过信息圈或类似的联网网络进行接触。

A hacking toolkit is required for Computers checks to Hack computers. You can use a hacking toolkit to access a computer without using a user interface, but this requires physical contact with the computer or contact via an infosphere or a similar linked network.

Integrated Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commer.name: 集成式渗透者工具包（商业） Integrated Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial)
Integrated Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commer.description:
你需要一套渗透者工具包，才能使用偷窃技能来@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。

You need an infiltrator's toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

Projectile Ammo.name: 抛射武器弹药 Projectile Ammo

Reactive Camouflage.name: 反应式伪装 Reactive Camouflage
Reactive Camouflage.description:
该机器人外部面板上装有感光反射器。即使没有掩护或隐蔽，它也可以 [[/act hide]]。

The robot comes packaged with photosensitive reflectors on its exterior panels. It can [[/act hide]] even without cover or concealment.

Sleeping Gas Bomb.name: 睡眠瓦斯炸弹 Sleeping Gas Bomb
Sleeping Gas Bomb.description:
渗透机器人向30英尺内发射一枚炸弹，在 @Template[type:burst|distance:10] 内散布催眠气体。区域内的每个生物都必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:18] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物的察觉检定获得 –1状态罚值，持续1轮。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}。如果它在1分钟后仍处于失去意识状态，则会自动醒来。

大失败 该生物失去意识。如果它在1小时后仍处于失去意识状态，则会自动醒来。

The infiltrator robot fires a bomb within 30 feet that disperses sleeping gas in a @Template[type:burst|distance:10]. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:18] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes a –1 status penalty to Perception checks for 1 round.

Failure The creature falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}. If it's still unconscious after 1 minute, it wakes up automatically.

Critical Failure The creature falls unconscious. If it's still unconscious after 1 hour, it wakes up automatically.

Snoop-Class Infiltrator Robot.publicNotes:
渗透机器人并非前线战斗人员，其主要战术是悄无声息地进入某处，使用睡眠 gas bomb 使守卫目标的人失去行动能力，然后收取其载荷。协约世界的领导层发现，在静默战争期间，snoop级渗透机器人还能够承担其他更黑暗的任务：其反应式伪装可以帮助它运送致命爆炸物，用于破坏舰船、造船厂以及其他军事设施。

渗透机器人在对抗维斯卡里姆的战争中被推上前台，并在协约世界内各类企业利益集团的推动下进一步完善。它们以能够进入其他人无法进入之处而闻名。渗透机器人通常体型小巧且动作敏捷，会潜入敌方领土，要么下载珍贵数据，要么记录下定罪证据。

Not a front-line combatant, an infiltrator robot's primary tactic is to quietly enter a location, use its sleeping gas bombs to disable those guarding its target, and collect its payload. The leadership of the Pact Worlds found that the snoop-class infiltrator robot could have other, darker tasks during the Silent War: its reactive camouflage could help it transport deadly explosives to sabotage ships, shipyards, and other military installations.

Brought to the forefront during the war against the Veskarium, and further perfected by various corporate interests within the Pact Worlds, infiltrator robots are known for being able to get into places where no one else could. Generally small and agile, infiltrator robots sneak into enemy territory and either download precious data or record incriminating evidence.

Akata.name: 阿卡塔 Akata

Hibernation.name: 休眠 Hibernation
Hibernation.description:
阿卡塔能够分泌树脂，将自己安全地包裹在一个零质茧中。该茧的硬度为 9，生命值为 40，破坏阈值为 18。它对来自魔法来源的伤害具有 5 点抗性。当阿卡塔安置于这个茧内时，它不会受到伤害，不需要进食或饮水，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.sebk9XseMCRkDqRg]{生命感应} 30 尺。在冬眠期间，阿卡塔会保持休眠状态，直到暴露于极端高温之下或感知到一个活着的生物。随后，它可以在 [[/gmr 1d4 #minutes]]{1d4 分钟}内破茧而出。

An akata can secrete resin that encases it safely in a noqual cocoon. The cocoon has Hardness 9, 40 HP, and a BT of 18. It has resistance 5 to damage from magical sources. While ensconced within this cocoon, the akata can't be harmed, doesn't need to eat or drink, and gains @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.sebk9XseMCRkDqRg]{Lifesense} 30 feet. During its hibernation, the akata remains dormant until exposed to extreme heat or it senses a living creature. It can then break free of its cocoon within [[/gmr 1d4 #minutes]]{1d4 minutes}.

No Hearing.name: 无听觉 No Hearing
No Hearing.description:
阿卡塔免疫听觉效果，在需要听觉的察觉检定中会自动严重失败，而在涉及声音但也依赖其其他感官的察觉检定中承受 –2 状态减值（但先攻掷骰不受影响）。

Akatas are immune to auditory effects, automatically critically fail Perception checks that require it to hear, and take a –2 status penalty to Perception checks (but not initiative rolls) that involve sound but also rely on its other senses.

Salt Water Vulnerability.name: 盐水易伤性 Salt Water Vulnerability
Salt Water Vulnerability.description:
盐水会侵蚀阿卡塔的细胞，并如强效酸液般起作用。若阿卡塔被完全浸没在盐水中，它会立即因盐水受到 @Damage[4d6[acid]] 伤害，并且只要它仍保持浸没状态，就会在其每个回合结束时再次受到该伤害。它对盐水的弱点适用于此伤害。

Salt water attacks an akata's cells and acts as a potent acid. If the akata is fully immersed in salt water, it takes @Damage[4d6[acid]] damage from the water immediately and at the end of each of its turns as long as it remains immersed. Its weakness to salt water applies to this damage.

Void Death.name: 虚空死亡 Void Death
Void Death.description:
阿卡塔会将微小的幼虫植入任何被它咬中的生物体内，但只有小型或中型类人生物适合作为宿主；所有其他生物在第 2 阶段及之后改为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:17]

第 1 阶段 成为携带者，但无不良影响 1（1 天）

第 2 阶段 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{衰竭 1}（1 天）

第 3 阶段 同第 2 阶段（1 天）

第 4 阶段 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{衰竭 2} 且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}（1 天）

第 5 阶段 同第 4 阶段（1 天）

第 6 阶段 死亡，且尸体会在 [[/gmr 2d4 #hours]]{2d4 小时}后作为虚空僵尸复起

An akata implants microscopic larvae into any creature it bites, but only Small or Medium humanoids make suitable hosts; all other creatures are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} at Stage 2 and further instead.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:17]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect 1 (1 day)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} (1 day)

Stage 5 as stage 4 (1 day)

Stage 6 dead and corpse rises as a void zombie in [[/gmr 2d4 #hours]]{2d4 hours}

Akata.publicNotes:
几乎没有什么生物能比无息、狮形的阿卡塔更让偏远探险者和孤立的太空站感到恐惧；它们会用寄生虫感染生物，将其转化为贪婪的虚空丧尸。

阿卡塔那布满利齿的大口、发着黄光的眼睛，以及甩动的双尾，都表明它是一种无声的掠食者。它们潜行时，蓝色的无毛皮肤向外延展，形成一圈橡胶般的触手鬃毛。尽管没有耳朵，这些四足生物仍凭借强化的视觉与嗅觉追踪猎物。阿卡塔通常高约3-1/2英尺，重400磅。

在匮乏时期，阿卡塔会从毛孔中渗出诺夸，并织出淡绿色的晶体茧，使自己能在其中停滞数个世纪。它们甚至还能利用这些茧穿越太空，为幼体寻找新的宿主。当宿主因这种被称为“虚空之死”的感染而死去时，最强壮的后代会将尸体转化为一只虚空丧尸。它们领地意识极强，通常以群落形式狩猎，足以在数周内让一处聚居地彻底崩溃。

Few creatures inspire more dread in isolated explorers and lonely space stations than the breathless, leonine akatas, which infest creatures with parasites to transform them into ravenous void zombies.

An akata's toothy maw, glowing yellow eyes, and lashing twin tails mark it as a silent predator. Their slinking, hairless blue flesh spreads out into a mane of rubbery tentacles. Despite lacking ears, these quadrupeds stalk prey with an enhanced sight and sense of smell. Akatas typically stand at about 3-1/2 feet tall and weigh 400 pounds.

In times of scarcity, akatas ooze noqual from their pores and spin pale green crystalline cocoons capable of holding them in stasis for centuries. They can even use their cocoons to traverse space and find new hosts for their larvae. When a host dies from this infestation, known as void death, the strongest offspring animates the cadaver as a void zombie. Fiercely territorial, they hunt in colonies that are capable of bringing a settlement to its knees within weeks.

Diaspora Worm Sage.name: 流散带蠕虫贤者 Diaspora Worm Sage
Diaspora Worm Sage.tokenName: 流散带蠕虫贤者 Diaspora Worm Sage

Electrocommunication.name: 电通信 Electrocommunication
Electrocommunication.description:
流散带蠕虫通过塑造并读取电磁场进行交流。这对拥有同样能力的生物而言，其效果类似于心灵感应。

Diaspora worms communicate by shaping and reading electromagnetic fields. This functions like telepathy with creatures that share this ability.

Electromagnetic Sight.name: 电磁视觉 Electromagnetic Sight
Electromagnetic Sight.description:
流散带蠕虫通过读取电磁场——包括生物或物体引起的扰动——来感知周围环境。这是在所列范围内的一种精确感知。强烈的场域，例如散发辐射的区域或电流灵光，会使其中的生物对流散带蠕虫而言处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态。

Diaspora worms sense their surroundings by reading electromagnetic fields, including disruptions caused by creatures or objects. This is a precise sense within the listed range. Intense fields, such as areas emitting radiation or auras of electricity, make creatures within them @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to the diaspora worm.

Electromagnetic Blindness.name: 电磁盲感 Electromagnetic Blindness
Electromagnetic Blindness.description:
受到电击伤害的流散带蠕虫必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:23] 豁免。

大成功 该蠕虫不受影响。

成功 该蠕虫陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，持续1轮。

失败 该蠕虫陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，持续1轮。

大失败 该蠕虫先陷入目盲，持续1轮，然后陷入目眩，持续1轮。

Diaspora worms that take electricity damage must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save.

Critical Success The worm is unaffected.

Success The worm is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The worm is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The worm is blinded for 1 round, then dazzled for 1 round.

Darkwater Veil.name: 暗水帷幕 Darkwater Veil
Darkwater Veil.description:
需求 流散带蠕虫位于水中

效果 该蠕虫改变 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内水的结构，形成吸收光线的纳米管。该区域随蠕虫一同移动，并持续 1 分钟。该散发区域会使非魔法光源失效，并自动尝试反制魔法光线（反制等级 9，反制修正 [[/r 1d20+38 #Counteract]]{+38}）。该区域还会为其中的生物提供针对外部生物的掩护，反之亦然。

Requirements The diaspora worm is in water

Effect The worm alters the structure of water within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20], forming light-absorbing nanotubes. This field moves with the worm and lasts for 1 minute. The emanation deactivates non-magical light sources and automatically attempts to counteract magical light (counteract rank 9, counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+38 #Counteract]]{+38}). This field also provides cover for creatures inside of it from those outside, and vice versa.

Darkwater Vortex.name: 黑水漩涡 Darkwater Vortex
Darkwater Vortex.description:
流散带蠕虫贤者在300英尺内搅动起一个半径20英尺、高40英尺的水柱。如果该区域原本未被水充满，此能力失效。漩涡会猛烈冲击所有生物，造成 @Damage[5d10[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:35|basic] 豁免）。豁免失败的生物会被拖拽 5英尺，朝漩涡中心移动（若重度失败则为 10英尺）。

The diaspora worm sage stirs up a 40-foot-tall cylinder of water with a 20-foot radius within 300 feet. If the area isn't already filled with water, this ability fails. The vortex buffets all creatures, dealing @Damage[5d10[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:35|basic] save). Creatures that fail the save are pulled 5 feet toward the center of the vortex (or 10 feet on a critical failure).

Electromagnetic Surge.name: 电磁涌流 Electromagnetic Surge
Electromagnetic Surge.description:
流散带蠕虫贤者释放出一股集中的电磁波，作用于一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:50] 内的区域。区域内的每个生物都必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:35] 豁免。带有科技特征的生物，其结果视为比其掷骰结果低一级成功度。

大成功 该生物不受影响，并在 1 小时内免疫电磁激涌。

成功 该生物带有科技特征的物品变为故障 1，持续 1 轮。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}，且其带有科技特征的物品变为故障 2，持续 1 分钟。带有科技特征的生物也会获得此故障状态。

大失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}，持续 1 轮，且其带有科技特征的物品变为故障 3，持续 10 分钟。带有科技特征的生物也会获得此故障状态。

The diaspora worm sage emits a concentrated wave of electromagnetism in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50]. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:35] save. A creature with the tech trait uses the outcome one degree of success worse than the result of its roll.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and becomes immune to Electromagnetic Surge for 1 hour.

Success The creature's items with the tech trait become glitching 1 for 1 round.

Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, and its items with the tech trait become glitching 2 for 1 minute. A creature with the tech trait also gains this glitching condition.

Critical Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round, and its items with the tech trait become glitching 3 for 10 minutes. A creature with the tech trait also gains this glitching condition.

Tongue Grab.name: 舌头抓取 Tongue Grab
Tongue Grab.description:
被流散带蠕虫舌头击中的生物会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{攫抓}状态。生物可以通过一次对 AC 37 的打击切断这条舌头，且该打击至少造成 @Damage[32[slashing]] 伤害。这会使蠕虫无法使用其舌头打击，直到它的舌头重新长出来，这需要 1 天。

A creature hit by the diaspora worm's tongue becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}. A creature can sever the tongue with a Strike against AC 37 that deals at least @Damage[32[slashing]] damage. This prevents the worm from using its tongue Strike until it regrows its tongue, which takes 1 day.

Tongue Reel.name: 卷舌线轴 Tongue Reel
Tongue Reel.description:
需求 流散带蠕虫已用它的舌头使一个生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}

效果 流散带蠕虫尝试将被擒抱的生物朝自己方向 [[/act reposition]]。如果被擒抱的生物被拉到距离该蠕虫 10 尺或更近的位置，蠕虫可以尝试将该生物整个吞下。

Requirements The diaspora worm has @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} a creature with its tongue

Effect The diaspora worm attempts to [[/act reposition]] the grabbed creature toward the worm. If the grabbed creature is brought to within 10 feet or less of the worm, the worm can attempt to Swallow Whole the creature.

Diaspora Worm Sage.publicNotes:
存活数百年的流散带蠕虫会在体型、力量和智力上显著增长。它们大多守护自己的祖居地，保存生物电珊瑚记录，并指引较年轻蠕虫的行动

“太空蠕虫”是一个非科学术语，指一类在异星生物学上很复杂、以广袤太空为家的无脊椎动物与兽类。其中一些，如流散带蠕虫和尘蠕虫，表现出智慧迹象，且彼此有直接亲缘关系。另一些，如苏尔诺奇，则是分别独立演化而来，其起源对科学而言完全未知。

Diaspora worms that survive for centuries grow significantly in size, power, and intelligence. They mostly protect their ancestral home, preserving bioelectric coral records and directing the actions of younger worms

"Space worm" is a nonscientific term for a xenobiologically complex clade of invertebrate animals and beasts that make their home in the vastness of space. Some, like the diaspora and dust worms, show signs of intelligence and are directly related to each other. Others, like the surnoch, evolved separately, with their origins completely unknown to science.

Biotech Ultimate War Machine.name: 生物工程终极战争机器 Biotech Ultimate War Machine
Biotech Ultimate War Machine.tokenName: 生物工程终极战争机器 Biotech Ultimate War Machine

Constant Pulse Radar.name: 恒常城脉冲雷达 Constant Pulse Radar
Constant Pulse Radar.description:
战争机器能够侦测到自身100英尺内的所有生物和物体，将隐匿、隐形和未察觉的生物视为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

The war machine can detect all creatures and objects within 100 feet of itself, treating hidden, invisible, and unobserved creatures as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Interstellar Comms.name: 星际通讯 Interstellar Comms
Interstellar Comms.description:
远程战争机器会与其驾驶员维持一条恒定的数据链路，并使用其驾驶员的语言以及任何未列出技能的技能调整值。此外，驾驶员还可以通过数据链路，借助远程战争机器作为发声媒介来讲话。

A remote war machine maintains a constant data link with its pilot, using its pilot's languages and skill modifiers for any unlisted skill. In addition, the pilot can speak through the data link using the remote war machine as a mouthpiece.

Corpse Flower.name: 尸花 Corpse Flower
Corpse Flower.description:
触发 这台战争机器将被降至0生命值

效果 这台战争机器自毁，对@Template[emanation|distance:60]{60英尺半径}内的所有生物造成 @Damage[16d6[electricity]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免）。在此能力被使用后的1分钟内，任何接触这台战争机器残骸的生物都会暴露于极度辐射病之中。

Trigger The war machine would be reduced to 0 Hit Points

Effect The war machine self-destructs, dealing @Damage[16d6[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic|options:area-effect] save) to all creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:60]{60-foot radius}. For 1 minute after this ability is used, any creature that touches the war machine's remains is exposed to incredible radiation sickness.

Psionic Flare.name: 灵能闪焰 Psionic Flare
Psionic Flare.description:
触发条件 战争机器60英尺内的一个生物施放法术

效果 战争机器发射一道聚焦的闪电束，仅以触发该反应的生物为目标。若该生物的豁免失败，该法术会被削弱。若被削弱的法术需要进行豁免检定，则目标将其掷骰结果的成功等级视为提高一级的结果。若被削弱的法术需要进行法术攻击，则该攻击检定承受 –4 情境减值。

Trigger A creature within 60 feet of the war machine Casts a Spell

Effect The war machine fires a focused lightning beam targeting only the triggering creature. If the creature fails its save, the spell becomes weakened. If the weakened spell requires a saving throw, the target uses the outcome one degree of success better than the result of its roll. If the weakened spell requires a spell attack, that attack roll takes a –4 circumstance penalty.

Radio Silence.name: 无线静默 Radio Silence
Radio Silence.description:
60英尺。远程战争机器光环内的非盟友通信单元和其他计算机无法运作，除非其操作员以一个交互动作成功通过 @Check[computers|against:stealth|rollerRole:target] 检定，对抗该战争机器的隐匿 DC。

60 feet. Non-allied comm units and other computers don't function within the remote war machine's aura unless their operator succeeds at a @Check[computers|against:stealth|rollerRole:target] check against the war machine's Stealth DC as an Interact action.

Swirling Shield.name: 回旋护盾 Swirling Shield
Swirling Shield.description:
1 到 3

遥控战争机器的触手以防御阵型环绕其周围。持续 1 分钟，它获得等同于施放“旋盾”所花费动作数的反应数量。这些额外反应只能用于灵能闪焰或借机攻击。

1 to 3

The remote war machine's tentacles surround it in defensive patterns. For 1 minute, it gains a number of reactions equal to the number of actions spent on Swirling Shield. These extra reactions can be used only for Psionic Flare or Reactive Strike.

Tentacle Flurry.name: 触手连击 Tentacle Flurry
Tentacle Flurry.description:
战争机器以一根触须对触及范围内至多四个生物进行一次打击（Strike），并且对所有目标只进行一次攻击检定和一次伤害检定。

The war machine makes a tentacle Strike against up to four creatures in reach, rolling the attack and damage roll only once for all targets.

Thermal Camouflage.name: 热能伪装 Thermal Camouflage
Thermal Camouflage.description:
战争机器变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}，持续 1 分钟，或直到它试图进行一次打击为止。

The war machine becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} for 1 minute or until it attempts to make a Strike.

Biotech Ultimate War Machine.publicNotes:
理事军中只有一名成员曾遭遇过那种被称为代号“月花”的生物工程恐怖造物，并活着讲出了这段经历——而且还是在经历了长达数月的昏迷之后才苏醒过来。根据她的说法，单单一台月花战争机器，就应对利亚瓦拉卫星 S-117 上的大屠杀负责；那里过去设有整整一座理事军深空望远镜阵列和行星防御炮台。

这场入侵始于阿巴隆上的新械族侦测到的一系列探测器。那些带着炽亮传感器和多节触手的奇异机器凭空出现，似乎毫无规律地撕裂基础设施，并在整个协约世界空域四处收集情报。恐慌迅速蔓延，但由于这些机器总会消失得无影无踪，或者在被捕获时爆炸，目击事件始终无法得到确认或辨明。流言开始传播，称这些机器是一种前所未见的生物工程产物。不久后，理事军正式介入，将这些事件封存在最高安全许可那道精金般坚不可摧的隔离墙之后。

在 ag 325 年的萨伦尼思月，数十次军事行动都未能与这些行踪飘忽的探测器交战之后，一支自伊达里号派出的战斗机联队终于走运，成功在其中一台机器自毁前将其瘫痪。顶尖的协约世界科学家设法诱使它吐露部分秘密后，这艘生物工程飞船便成为如今正在测试、计划投入实战的“本土培育”遥控战争机器原型。这些复制品并非活体，而是采用机器人建造模板制造，因为原始生物工程设计的核心过于复杂，无法用协约世界的技术进行逆向工程。

遥控战争机器是可以从极远距离进行控制的代理体。原始的生物工程战争机器通过灵能链接或某种未知无线电频率与驾驶员的思维相连。机器人遥控战争机器则通过数据链路连接至计算机，使驾驶员能够用键盘、虚拟现实设备，甚至视频游戏控制器来操控自己的代理体。

Only one member of the Stewards has ever encountered the biotechnical horror known as code name "moonflower" and lived to tell the tale—and only after they emerged from a months-long coma. According to her story, a single moonflower war machine was responsible for the massacre of Liavaran moon S-117, which used to house an entire Stewards deep space telescope array and planetary defense battery.

The incursion began with a series of probes detected by anacites on Aballon. Strange machines with blazing sensors and articulated tentacles appeared out of nowhere, ripping through infrastructure seemingly at random and collecting intelligence all around Pact Worlds space. Panic spread fast, but since the machines always vanished without a trace, or exploded when captured, the sightings couldn't be confirmed or identified. Rumors began to circulate that the machines were a form of biotech never encountered before. Soon the Stewards became formally involved, shuttering the incidents behind the adamantine partition of top security clearance.

In Sarenith of 325 ag, after dozens of military operations failed to engage the elusive probes, a wing of fighters dispatched from the Idari finally got lucky and disabled one of the machines before it could self-destruct. Coaxed into giving up some of its secrets by top Pact Worlds scientists, the biotech vessel became the prototype for the "home grown" remote war machines that are currently being tested for use in combat. The replicas aren't alive but are built using robotic construction templates since the core of the original biotech design has proven too complicated to reverse engineer with Pact technology.

Remote war machines are proxies that can be controlled from a great distance. The original biotech war machines connect to the pilot's mind through a psychic link or unknown radio frequency. Robotic remote war machines connect to a computer via data link, allowing the pilot to control their proxy using a keyboard, virtual reality rig, or even a vidgame controller.

Skreesire.name: 斯克里西尔 Skreesire

Camouflage.name: 伪装 Camouflage
Camouflage.description:
要求 skreesire 处于岩石地形中

效果 直到他们下一次行动时，skreesire 看起来就像岩石地形。他们在伪装成岩石地形时，其 @Check[deception] 检定与 DC 自动视为 29。

Requirements The skreesire is in rocky terrain

Effect Until the next time they act, the skreesire resembles rocky terrain. They have an automatic result of 29 on @Check[deception] checks and DCs to pass as rocky terrain.

Enthrall.name: 注目术 Enthrall
Enthrall.description:
效果 30英尺内的一个目标听到尖啸领主意志的心灵感应显化，且必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:22] 豁免。

失败 该生物必须在其下一回合用第一个动作朝尖啸领主进行Stride。

大失败 该生物必须在其下一回合用全部动作朝尖啸领主进行Stride；当它与尖啸领主相邻时，它会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧} 并结束其回合。

Effect A target within 30 feet hears a telepathic manifestation of the skreesire's will and must attempt a @Check[will|dc:22] save.

Failure The creature must use the first action of its next turn to Stride toward the skreesire.

Critical Failure The creature must use all its actions on its next turn to Stride toward the skreesire; when it's adjacent to the skreesire, it drops @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and ends its turn.

Skreesire.publicNotes:
嘶翼魔是爬行类的怪物，拥有强大的意志、锋利如剃刀的牙齿，以及一团能够行走的触须之上那对无法发挥作用的翅膀。

嘶翼魔及其后代嘶翼幼魔，都是凶残的掠食者，潜伏并游荡于宇宙的岩隙与洞窟之中。

Skreesires are reptilian monstrosities with a formidable will, razor-sharp teeth, and nonfunctional wings atop a mass of ambulatory tentacles.

Skreesires, and their offspring skreelings, are vicious predators who skulk and prowl in the crags and caverns of the cosmos.
